nice place great neighbour hood, mirjam was away when we visited but we were greeted by a friend, lovely décor and enjoyable stay, lots of helpful booklets :)

Very nice stylish flat true to description. The courtyard is very very lovely. Its a bit off the city centre but its a very nice and quite area and within walkable distance to everything. We also enjoyed spending time in Wester park and the kebab shop at the corner. We didnt meet the host but she was very nice and always answered right away. And thanks a lot for the welcome wine.

Despite a few problems due to the airport (our luggage was gone, but sent to Mirjam's within 24 ours) our stay there was very very nice. Mirjam and her Husband are so caring people, wenn ever we had any problem they where there to help, thanks a lot for that, that was really something else :) great place to discover amsterdam, very convinient bus and tram stations right in front of the building, top location, top flat, unfortunately I suppose we were one of the last to see that beautiful 100 year old tree in the backyard which didnt survive the storm on ou arrival day, R.I.P. :( anyway total recommendation!

Accoglienza buona, mirjam e suo marito sono molto gentili. Il quartiere è tranquillo e economico rispetto al centro e la vicinanza al parco è essenziale con i bambini. La casa è accogliente per una famiglia.

DIe Familie von Mirjam waren sehr nette und hilfsbereite Gastgeber. Wir haben uns bei ihnen sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Gegend, in der die Wohnung liegt hat uns gut gefallen. Für eine Nacht war die Wohnung auch für vier Leute okay  - danke, dass Ihr das für uns möglich gemacht habt! Danke für die guten Ideen und die freundliche Begegnung.

The hosts were really nice, welcoming, happy to answer all our questions, and flexible. The apartment is nice and very well located in a good and quiet neighborhood, just next to the park, with bus stops and tram stops just next to it. The description is accurate and we found our stay as a whole to be very comfortable and pleasing. We strongly recommend this place.

Mirjam & Didi were very welcoming and full of information about how to get from here to there and what businesses were close by. The apartment is very accessible to all the public transportation and it was easy to get into the center of town where all the famous places are.
I found that the apartment lighting was very dim, and thought brighter lighting would be helpful.
We had a lovely stay and enjoyed Amsterdam immensely.

El lugar olía a humedad
No estaba limpio ni cómodo
La cama tenía una forma extraña por lo que 2 personas duermen incómodas
La ubicación es muy buena pero nada cuidada
Ni el barco ni el interior
Mucho pollo y telarañas

This is the perfect location to stay in Amsterdam. It is central to everything. Lydia was the best host we have ever had with Airbnb. She provided us with everything we needed and more! Upon arrival we were greeted with snacks and wine. The boat is so cute, and provides a beautiful view of the other boats that pass by in the canal. It was very quiet and private on the boat, yet minutes away from a lively scene of cafes, bars, and restaurants. Great for a romantic stay. We will definitely book with Lydia again when we return.

Boat is close to everything. We walking from the central station to the boat it took about 15 mins. This boat is close to the night life but just far enough to not be loud when your ready to go to bed, which was nice.

Dream come true in Amsterdam! I wonderful, charming houseboat that is located close to everything! Lydia was a great hostess, and the place was perfect for two people. Location couldn't be beat - and I would certainly stay there again! My boyfriend and I loved it!
Fantastic location and a lovely boat

Awesome location! This was our second stay with Lydia. We love this houseboat! Lydia always has everything set up so nicely for us. Everything is as pictured. The location is fantastic! Highly recommended.
I recommend the place and the host. Close to the city center and Lidia is brilliant in help and relations. Living facility is not modern new but is OK for stay.
Everything was fine. We had a really nice stay and can recommend this accommodation!

We had a fantastic stay on Lydia's houseboat, it was super unique and exactly as advertised. The location was unbeatable, such a beautiful canal and walking distance to everything. We arrived a bit early but luckily but Lydia was very responsive and arranged for us to check in early. And she let us check out late! My boyfriend and I especially loved relaxing on the deck in the evenings. We would definitely come back.

Ottima posizione, tutto raggiungibile facilmente a piedi. Lydia non ha potuto accoglierci di persona a causa di un problema, ma una sua amica ci ha aspettato per mostrarci la barca. La host è comunque venuta a salutarci qualche giorno dopo, molto simpatica e disponibile a dare informazioni. L’alloggio è confortevole e intimo, ottimo per una viaggio con il proprio partner. L’host ci ha fatto trovare tutto in ordine e come da foto, in più alcune cose per la colazione. Per quanto riguarda il check-out, l’host è stata così carina da prolungarci l’orario di partenza data l’ora tarda del nostro volo. Consigliato!

Really enjoyed my time on the boat it's characteristic is quirky, A nice change to a regular hotel didn't get to meet the host. But good communication though airbnb arrived  to some food supplies which after travelling come in handy.

Lydias Hausboot ist klein aber fein. An super Lage nur wenige Gehminuten vom Bahnhof entfernt und trotzdem ruhig während der Nacht. In der Küche ist alles vorhanden um einfaches Essen zuzubereiten, welches man bei gutem Wetter auf dem Deck des Bootes geniessen kann. Das Bad und Bett waren sauber, einzig einige Regale und Ablageflächen im Wohnzimmer waren etwas staubig.

Great location and value right in the heart of Amsterdam.  Slightly musty due to the fact that there is only one window (you are on a boat).  Non-traditional bed was fine but a little uncomfortable since it slopes slightly.  Otherwise, a fun and unique space.

ANNUNCIO MENZONIERO

Abbiamo dovuto annullare il soggiorno a causa dell’insalubrità dei luoghi. Air BNB vedendo le foto che abbiamo fatto, ci ha rimborsati e fatti partire subito senza nemmeno aspettare spiegazioni da parte dell’host…

Annucio che non corrisponde né alle foto (prese probabilmente 10 anni fa o piu), né ai commenti che ci hanno tratto in inganno.

Cabina doccia con escrementi e capelli, muffa diffusa, stato generale molto sporco e dismesso (sedie rotte, tavolo completamente rosicchiato dalla ruggine, stufetta con scotch da tutte le parti), impossibilità d’ arieggiare la cabina (le finestrine di legno erano rotte e marcie).
Presenza di gatti non comunicata che puo’ rivelarsi problematica per persone allergiche e/o asmatiche.
Odore nauseabondo di pesce marcio, l’host aveva lasciato il proprio pattume con resti di pesce sulla barca.
L’host vive inoltre su ¾ della barca e da aperitivi e feste con i suoi rumorosi amici.

DELUSIONE completa altre che “romantic houseboat”

We enjoyed our stay on Lydia's boat immensely.  It is wonderfully convenient to everything and very cozy.  It is listed as a private room but could also be listed as entire place because although Lydia also lives on the boat the spaces are completely separate, nothing is shared.  Lydia is a very generous host; allowing us to leave our bags early and also providing welcome wine, small snacks and groceries.  She went above and beyond.  We would definitely stay here again.

Boot in toller zentraler aber trotzdem ruhiger Lage! Einzigartiger Blick von Deck auf das Wasser, vor allem bei Nacht. Sehr herzlicher Empfang von Lydia.
Das Boot war leider etwas ungepflegt und staubig. Das könnte so einfach behoben werden. Wir haben uns jedenfalls nicht so gerne im Inneren des Bootes aufgehalten, obwohl wir viel reisen und nicht super anspruchsvoll sind. Die Kommunikation hat leider auch nicht gut funktioniert und wir mussten lange auf Antwort warten, was bei einem kurzen Aufenthalt schade ist. Fazit: Schön, aber für den Zustand zu teuer.
We had an amazing time at Lydia’s houseboat. It’s super central, really cozy, and she’s an ace host! We would definitely recommend it for a couple looking for a romantic time in Amsterdam.
We enjoyed our stay on the houseboat. It was a memorable experience. The location was perfect for exploring Amsterdam.

We really wanted a houseboat experience for our second time in Amsterdam. We found this one which was in an area we didn't explore last time, and it was actually a good idea because it was nice and quiet. Just like the rest of the city - it's not too far to walk to anything and not too far from the train station. If you want a cool place to sleep and watch some nightlife after exploring all day, this place will work for you.  It's comfortable but pretty cozy, a nice experience.

Nice p
lace.

Endroit très bien situé pour visiter Amsterdam.
Néanmoins Lydia devrait apporter quelques améliorations à ce logement atypique (changer la literie qui est très inconfortable et pallier à un problème d’odeur tenace).

A truly Amsterdam experience. On the canal, watching the world go by in a peaceful area yet only a few footsteps from busy Amsterdam. This area is a very special and you feel exclusive. The houseboat is cosy and cool at the same time and Lydia is very helpful. Highly Recommended.

Very quirky and very old which added to the feel.  Very central to everything we had a great time Lydia was very welcoming then left us on our own a lovely stay in a great city will be back for longer next time

Super Emplacement et Lydia est vraiment très attentionnée. On recommande.
Il y avait même du vin ainsi que du fromages et des oeufs pour le petit dej dans le frigo. Royale !!
Super cute, very centrally located and romantic! Great value as well. If you can snag the dates, don’t hesitate!

Amazing! If your looking for a nice little place to stay in Amsterdam then look no further. The houseboat is very comfy and homely and Lydia is a great host! The location is amazing, simply walk for 5 mins and your in the city centre of Amsterdam. This is my 5th stay in Amsterdam and I've never had it so easy, everything is so close and it's great for going out because no need to get a taxi or anything. I would highly recommend to stay at this place especially if you've never been on a house boat before. It's a experience, especially in Amsterdam...

Lydia’s houseboat is absolutely incredible for a weekend trip to Amsterdam! It has everything you need and is in the best location possible! We walked everywhere and felt very safe here. I highly recommend it!

Perfectly situated on a canal close to the hustle and bustle of Amsterdam. Easy walking distance from the trams and the Metro - markets and pubs and shops a few minutes away ( have breakfast in the coffee shop on the corner!) We loved our stay and all the little extras set out to welcome us and and will hopefully be back soon!
great

Nice location, charming boat, unfortunately, we couldn’t stay as planned because of heavy rain leak coming from the roof of the boat directly onto the bed. We had to find an hotel by ourselves at midnight!
Then difficult communication appeared when I asked Lydia to cancel the reservation (to get the full reimbursement).
Nevertheless, Airb&b was very reactive and reimbursed me as soon as I called them...
Incredible location and very responsive host.

We enjoyed our stay at Edwin's place. Would stay again if back in Amsterdam.

Communication with Edwin was helpful and responses were quick. Easy check in/out process. Towels and shower gel etc provided.

Great location, if not a bit loud in the evening (weekend stay) as it is near a lively bar scene.

Edwin does have a cat which wasn't a problem but just a note for anyone with allergies.

The boat is absolutely lovely!! Cosy, tidy and perfectly located!
Lydia is such an amazing person, lovely, careful, kind and super sweet!!
We really enjoyed our time there and definitely will look for her in our next holiday in Amsterdam!!
awesome, cozy place near the city center in Amsterdam

Wow just wow, hands down one of the best places to stay in Amsterdam.  Truly gorgeous setting and location is right in the middle of the city.  The boat is a great place to hang out and relax after a day of touring around.  If your thinking about it just do it.

Were looking for a great and central spot where it’s possible to find freedom. And I found it. Awesome place! Lovely host!!

Because I definitely like to come back and worry that all of you book out the place, better you go ahead and book somewhere else... ;-)
Loved our stay, couldn’t recommend more!
Cool and unique experience right in the centre of Amsterdam. Lydia was a great and attentive host. Would definitely recommend!

Super empfangen worden.
Klar das Boot is 100 Jahre alt aber das heißt nicht dass der Staub es auch sein muss.
Aber sonst eine Erfahrung wert.

This was a surreal experience. Ever since I saw the tv series "Highlander" as a kid, I always wanted to stay on a boat (like he did in Paris), so this was a dream come true! The place has a rustic charm, but is also stylish and cozy. Loved the central location and the chairs on deck for morning coffee :) And the positivity and communication of Lydia was outstanding - such a great host! Overall, a wonderful place - thank you, Lydia, for making this experience possible for us.
Nice houseboat very close to center of city but still a quiet are.😊

Nous avons adoré notre séjour de 6 nuits chez Lydia. Il faut dire que loger dans une péniche est peu banal. C'était exactement comme sur le site. Lors de notre arrivée, Lydia avait fait des courses: croissant, pain, jambon, fromage, jus d'orange, olives et deux pâtisseries ainsi qu'un bouquet de fleurs. Nous avons beaucoup aimé prendre l'apéro sur la petite terrasse en regardant passer les bateaux d'excursions. Les gens nous regardaient en nous enviant. La péniche est très bien située et proche de tout. Lydia est une hôtesse très sympatique et disponible. Elle répond rapidement lorsqu'on lui demande quelque chose. Elle ne parle pas le français mais elle nous a mis en contact avec son ami Mark qui nous a donné des informations pour une excursion que nous voulions faire à Keukenhof. Nous recommandons la péniche de Lydia pour une expérience hors du commun.
Thank you for everything, it was a great trip in Amsterdam.
Lydia’s boat is a fantastic place to stay. Very central, cosy and warm. You can watch the world go by from your deck. Very special.

Book this right now!! The boat is incredible and so much fun to stay on. We loved relaxing on the deck and watching tours boats go by.
The cabin is much larger than I was expecting, which is great. The bed was really comfortable and cozy and the neighborhood was pretty quiet. it’s a very short walk to many restaurants and shops and not far to other sites- we were able to walk to the Red Light District in about 10 min.
We didn’t get the chance to meet Lydia in person, but she was really easy to get in touch with when needed.
Y do have to go down a short ladder to enter, so if you have large luggage, that might be awkward.
I would definitely recommend staying here!
Brilliant host fantastic location. Champagne and goodies on arrival. Lovely cosy houseboat. Couldn’t ask for a better place to stay

A bit quirky, a bit different, fabulous 😊
We were able to sit out each night and watch all the tourist boats pass and look at us in awe as they clearly thought it was our boat!
Lydia was a happy lady who let us check in early and left some fizz and bread and cheese which she didn’t need to.
The extra touches which you just wouldn’t get in a hotel ......thank you xxx

This place and this host were the highlights of our European trip. Sitting on the barge, soaking up the sun and watching the boats go by while drinking the best beer in the world was our version of heaven. Lydia was beyond amazing. Friendly, responsive and caring. We miss her already.
Lovely boat, great location and warm welcome!

Lydia was an amazing host getting supplies for us prior to arrival and being very helpful with check-in. The location is perfect as it is right next to all the activity, without having a lot of traffic or noise. The boat is very clean and has all the amenities needed for a great stay. I highly recommend.

Location is absolutely fantastic, so central to everything but on a nice quiet stretch so no noise at night.  Make the most of the outside space when the sun is shining - so relaxing watching other boats going past.  Lydia has some great recommendations for local restaurants.  A great host and a great boat!
Хозяйка крайне гостеприимно, учтивый, и готова помочь в любой момент. На лодке есть всё необходимое, кроме кондиционера. Необычный опыт, рекомендую
Charming quarters in the heart of Amsterdam! I can't imagine a better way to stay in the city.
It's a 9 out of 10. View, lifestile, adventure, location, host, uniqueness - perfect. The only downside was the dust everything else defenitly worth the money.
Excellent location and great host. Will definitely be staying again on next visit to awesome Amsterdam
Beautiful boat great position and lovely hostess. Once it has been cleaned, it will be fantastic

A cozy, very comfortable houseboat to come home to after a night out (Which you don't have to walk far at all to find! Bars right nearby!). Has a cute deck to sit on and take in the city life - turns into an absolutely beautiful scenic view at night. The host is wonderful! Very welcoming and great tips for exploring the city. If you're thinking about booking a houseboat for your trip, stay here if you can!

There is no better place to stay in Amsterdam. This was probably our favorite Airbnb we’ve ever stayed in. Lydia was wonderful and offered a warm welcome, many tips about Amsterdam, fresh flowers, and also a bottle of wine and snacks!! The boat itself was magical and in a really     perfect location. We were able to walk basically everywhere. We got engaged on this trip and made a pact that we would return to the boat on our 10th anniversary, I seriously hope it is still available then. Don’t hesitate, if it’s available book it!!

Wonderful little adventure in a gorgeous boat on the canal in Amsterdam. Close to amenities and everything you want to see but also a quiet area.
Tourist Boats come and go a lot so don’t forget to wave. They last till the sun goes down but don’t start until 10 am in the morning so have a nice sleep in.
Very cosy . Nice to have a cup of tea up on the deck and sit in the sun and read the paper, or sit and have drinks with friends on the deck.
Enjoy.. I did .

Nous étions en week-end de noce moi qui croyais faire un week-end romantique comme il est indiqué sur le descriptif de la péniche mais non plus l’horreur
On a été accueilli par ?
Le logement était sale, lit défait, cafetière utilisé, tache noir, couverture sale, lit en mousse pas confortable.
Après la vue de la péniche est agréable, pouvoir ce faire à manger sur place c’est top.
Vraiment dommage, on a eu une sensation d’insécurité car on peut pénétrer facilement dans la péniche, nuit pas sereines et comme on a été content la personne que la péniche de l’autre côté a été désagréable.

The host,are amazing, very helpful and polite, they helped us and explained us every thing we needed to know about amsterdam and the apartment. The apartment located almost in the city center, close to everything, and the neighborhood is amazing, i will recomend this apartment to any one i know.
Mirjam's place was in a great neighborhood right near the westerpark: she greeted me and provided super info.

Wir hatten zwei sehr schöne Tage im Appartment von Mirjam und Didi. Beide waren sehr gastfreundlich, hilfsbereit und jederzeit ansprechbar. Die Lage ist prima, die Anbindung mit öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln sehr gut. Das Appartment war genauso nett, wie auf den Bildern. Wir hatten alles, was wir brauchten. Wir kommen gerne wieder.

We had a great two night stay. The apartment is clean and tidy with interesting artwork and books in the room. The nearest metro was a 5 minute walk away, very handy! We would happily book to stay next time we’re back.
Edwin’s apartment is centrally located which adds so much convenience. He also shares great local tips and recommendations!

The house is super clean and its location is amazing. It is obvious that the host cares about its perfection. Only the internet was not working well.
It is more of a guesthouse than a private house. Also the behavior of the host was like that, you are just a customer to him, don’t tend to help if you are in need. From our perspective he was rude enough that we didn’t felt welcome.

The double bedroom was clean and comfy! Edwin' s place has tea and coffee available 24/7 and a good pressure shower! Overall the location was perfect for us as many museum's and parks are within walking distance.

My boyfriend and I had a wonderful stay at Edwins! His house is beautiful and in a convenient and very central location. It is a little loud at night as some bars/clubs are nearby however with some ear plugs we had no trouble sleeping. Edwin is a very attentive host with lots of local knowledge and he made the stay excellent for us. The room was comfortable, clean and beautifully decorated. We can't wait to come back soon!

Edwin and his place are simply lovely. He was friendly, accommodating with luggage, and helpful with advice. Yes, the street is loud at night, but location couldn't be better. Thank you very much, Edwin! See you next time.

We stayed in the double room at Edwin’s place which was a really good size, spotless and clean.
The location is perfect, central to everything so you can simply walk to most attractions.
Edwin himself is extremely helpful and friendly and we would highly recommend staying here.
Perfect location to get to all parts of Amsterdam, great value for money, and lovely host!
Very nice place, Edwin is a really cool host 5/5 would recommend
Best Host ever, super cool person! Perfect location, really cute traditional House in Downtown Amsterdam 😍 Thank you for keeping us 🤩
Nice place and very well located!
Hôte super cool super géolocalisation par contre interdit aux fumeurs ! Je recommande
Great location and big thank you to Edwin for a wonderful stay. I would definitely recommend!

Excelente ubicación! En pleno corazón de Amsterdam . Se puede escuchar algo de ruido a la noche pero es mínimo, no molesta.  Único detalle que está en un 2do piso que se sube por unas pequeña escalera caracol algo complicado para el equipaje. Salvo esto. Exelente habitación

We had a good time here in Amstrdam. Mirjam and her husband Didi were very kind and gave us useful information about visiting the city. The location of Mirjam's apartment was perfect since. It was easy to go the centre of the city and the train station by bus or tram. The bus station is right across the street.
The house is just in front the tram station and very close to the centre. There are Supermarket and restaurants near. Didi and Mirjam are very friendly and helpfull. We had great time in Amsterdam!

Nice area not too far away from town, foodstore and café is Close by and the appartment was cosy and not too expensive. Host couple was very Nice and caring. Nice space if you have a baby since there is alot of space, only thing is the bed could use an extra madrass,  but overall a good stay in a Nice neighbourhood,  buss / tram is just outside the house.  Aprox 15 bussride from central station.  A walk from appartment to Dam square is about 2 km ~ 20-30 min,  we would recomend this appartment to any friend :) wifi is incl so that is also a plus.

Mirjam and Didi made us feel very welcome and were very helpful whenever we needed to ask something. They even provided us with some toys for the kids to play and a stroller. The appartment is very cosy and I was suprised that I slept very well even though it is "only" a sofa-bed, not a real bed.
Lovely neighbourhood, very close to beautiful Westerpark (with two great playgrounds). Tram and bus are just 20meters away and you can get anywhere in town very quickly. However, it's very quiet.
There's a great bike rental just around the corner, too, where you can even rent bakfiets.
Amazing hosts who were very hospitable and also gave us space. The flat was very cozy and the neighborhood was perfect. I would definitely stay there again!

We do not have the opportunity to meet Mirjam, unfortunately, but we were welcomed by his husband, Didi. He gave us some quick and useful advice on what to see and what to do and he told us the few rules in place in the house. The apartment was as described: warm and comfortable, really quite neighborhood and well placed in order to move to the Centrum. I really recommend this solution for your trip to Amsterdam!

The apartment was clean and spacious with a nice back yard. We had plenty of privacy during our stay. A bit further from the city center than we wanted but we were able to rent bikes just across the street which made it super easy to traverse across the city.

Des hôtes vraiment sympathiques!! Elle nous accueil avec une bonne bouteille de vin. Elle parle anglais et français ce que facilite les échanges.
Le lieu est idéalement situé, 10 minutes, en vélo, du centre. Mirjam nous a indiqué les meilleurs lieux pour le jour de l'an. Elle et son mari nous contactaient tous les jours pour savoir si tout ce passé bien.
Nous avons eux des problèmes avec la location de vélo, Miriam a réglé le problème en un rien de temps!
Je recommande grandement ce Airbnb!

First of all Mirjam was very very friendly and helpful. Unfortunately we didn´t meet each other personally, but she was available at any time. The B&B is very close to Westerpark (200m) and not far from the City centre and central Station (by Bus Line 21 - 10 min), there is also a tram directly on the other side of the street. The Apartment has enough space for three Person and it is very cosy. There is also a little garden house and a small backyard terrace. We stayed there for 2 nights and everything was fine...

Thank you very much ! We had a great time in Amsterdam in part thanks to you. Everything was perfect !
See you soon,
Quentin

The houseboat sits in a busy canal, with tourist boats, walking tours and the antique market all within view.  Lydia is very communicative and easy to work with. The part of the houseboat you have access too is perfect for two people, like a small studio apartment.

Lydia's houseboat was so unique and cute! There are a lot of cute and thoughtful decorations that really make the space as well.

She also stocked the fridge, which was amazing as well and had lots of local snacks and drinks. We had a great time and would want to stay again in a heartbeat :)

The boat house is located in the city centre, very convenient. It is an antique boat.  Living on it gives us a very special experience.  The host Lydia is very nice, energetic, generous and very friendly.

My girlfriend and I stayed 3 nights and had a wonderful time. We enjoyed just sitting on the top of the boat and watching the boats on the canal. Lydia was a great host and gave us great information. The boat was charming. The bed could have been a little more comfortable, but it didn't ruin our experience. The location was really convenient as well. I highly recommend this place to stay when you're in Amsterdam.

Amazing place in the heart of Amsterdam centre. The location is really exceptional and connected to everything in Amsterdam, the boat itself made the whole trip even better. We were a bit worried that living in a boat in such busy canal might be a bit noisy or uncomfortable. Absolutely the opposite, inside the boat you won't hear much noises outside and I slept so comfortably and peacefully like I haven't in ages. Lydia was very nice to welcome us, she even welcomed us with a bottle of wine as her treat. Communication with the host was super effortless and the boat was ready with everything, including food and snacks all around the kitchen. My best Airbnb experience, hands down. Thank you Lydia for such a wonderful stay, your place is a gem in the heart of beautiful Amsterdam.

La habitación es tal cual las fotos,la ubicación es excelente,inmejorable,si bien está en un lugar céntrico y transitado no se escucha nada de ruido del exterior.Edwin es súper amable y predispuesto a ayudarte en todo,nos sentimos en como en casa,sin dudas nos volveríamos a alojar en su hogar.

El apartamento está muy bien ubicado, puedes acceder a varios sitios turísticos y bares. Me encantó que en la esquina puedes encontrar el mercado de las flores.
Edwin es siempre muy amable y atento.
Estuvimos en un momento difícil ya que comenzaba lo del Coronavirus y Edwin estuvo siempre al pendiente de nuestra situación.
Esperamos volver pronto para disfrutar Amsterdam de la mejor manera.
Muy recomendado.

Our stay in Amsterdam at Edwin's house was exquisite.
Being able to go absolutely everywhere on foot was great. We weren't home much of course, but the little time we spent there was very nice.
Edwin is cheerful and welcoming, very understanding of travel difficulties.
Our double room was adorable, cosy and clean. Through the window, we can hear a very living neighbourhood, although not too loud: just what it takes to be charmed!
Great host, great stay, adorable cat; awesome vacation! xoxo

Edwin was a wonderful host super reactive and very kind to us !

The location is just ideal for a week-end or more for a couple and close to everything by walk (many bars, night shops, living parts of the city etc...)

Definitely recommend it !!

Thanks Edwin 🥰

Manuel & Mélanie
Highly recommended, everything was perfect !!
Everything was perfect and Edwin was si nice and thoughtfull !

We stayed for two nights in Edwin’s guesthouse. He also lives there so communication was easy. Edwin was always very friendly, gave us tips and told us about the history of the house and the street. Everything was clean too. We can highly recommend this AirBnB if you’re looking for a place to sleep right in the city centre.
Edwin is the most helpful and lovely person in Amsterdam, you can rely on him eyes closed ! The room is pleasant and not so noisy ! Do not hesitate to book a room :)

we had such a great time, the location is perfect.
I highly recommend
Un moment expetionelle vous attend chez Lydia. Que de douce intention et lieu vraiment cool a découvrir en plein coeur d'Amsterdam
Wonderful place, perfect location and was welcomed like family!!!

It was a very warm welcome and we enjoyed the stay in Mirjams apartment a lot! The apartment is extremely good located- close to the centre and a wonderful park. Mirjam gave us good recommendations in the neighbourhood. Very nice is the courtyard in the Sunshine!
Très bonne expérience pour notre famille dans l'appartement très sympa de Mirjam. Super accueil.

Llegar fue fácil, y la entrega de llaves también. Dentro del apartamento nos esperaban flores y el sol de la tarde. Todo estaba limpio y cómodo. cerca del Westerpark - un parque muy bonito y con actividades culturales. Agradable estancia, muchas gracias

Hallo Mirjam,
nochmals vielen Dank für die schönen Tage. Wir haben die Zeit in eurer gemütlichen und gut gelegenen Wohnung sehr genossen. Die Kinder fanden ihr eigenes Schlafzimmer im separaten "Gartenhäuschen" sehr gemütlich.
Euch alles Gute.
Gruß
Guido

Der Aufenthalt in Amsterdam und insbesondere bei Mirjam war wunderbar.
Mirjam ist sehr freundlich und die Kommunikation vor meiner Anreise war hervorragend, sodass ich das Appartement sehr schnell gefunden habe.
Mirjam hat mich ausführlich über Amsterdam und insbesondere die Attraktivitäten informiert, die vielleicht nicht jeder Tourist zu sehen bekommt, So hatte ich einen wunderbaren und interessanten Aufenthalt in der Stadt.

mirjam s est montrée très sympathique et de bon conseil...notamment pour la visite du quartier NDSM werf ...haut lieu du street-art
logement avec jardin-patio(très agréable) ds quartier sympa juste a coté d un parc animé...
bonne experience
Home of mirjam is perfect for 4. Is very cosy and confortable. The neighboor is perfect. I hope to came back very very soon
Really terrific hosts! We loved staying in this little garden apartment. Mirjam and Didi made us feel very welcome and like we were in our own home. We will be back!
The welcome was warm and friendly . mirjam and his family were always helpful and kind. House is located in a quite area with all service that are needed and the description was very precised

Very nice contact to Mirjam (owner) and her daughter. We've been welcomed personally on our arrival. Warm atmosphere. The flat is cozy, lots of wood. It had enough space for the four of us who stayed there for some days. There is a bus stop (line 21) to downtown just across the street.

Nuestra estadía en la casa de mirjam estuvo muy bien. Tanto ella como donna se pusieron en contacto días antes para arreglar la llegada a la casa. Donna nos recibió muy amablemente, incluso llegamos con retraso y no hubo ningún problema. La casa está bien, la cocina está bien equipada, las camas son cómodas. Esta ubicado frente a la parada de tram y colectivo que llegan al centro de amsterdam, es un viaje de menos de 10 minutos y pasan con mucha frecuencia. El barrio es lindo y tranquilo, con supermercados y lugares para comer cerca. Donna fue muy amable, permitió que dejáramos las valijas el último día hasta el horario de partida de nuestro tren. Estamos muy agradecidas y recomendamos este lugar!!!
Perfect stay, Mirjam and Didi are lovely people!
Ottima posizione in centro di Amsterdam, perfetta per visitare la città. Edwin é davvero gentile e disponibile e ci ha fatto sentire a casa nostra. La consigliamo.

Super service, sehr sympathischer Gastgeber und eine Top Lage.
Außerdem eine süße Katze :)
Edwin is a Great host, can only recommend👍🏻
You can expect and old authentic amazing looking houseboat at a great place where you will enjoy the city like nowhere else!
We have stayed with Lydia several years ago and it was like returning to a dear friend's home.  Her hospitality is exceptional and her big smile was welcoming once again.

Just like the description and reviews!  Lydia was a great communicator.  She lives on the other half of the large boat but we had complete privacy (separate entrances and spaces).  No issues with the bathroom/shower, plenty of living space for two people.  We really enjoyed waking up to the sounds of the water birds and having a morning coffee or evening drink on the terrace.  Quite street, very residential with little tourists - outside the canal tour boats that do not start until late morning, fun to watch them go by, you cannot hear the commentator. Easy walking to all the attractions.  Would definitely stay again!  Thanks Lydia for a wonderful stay in Amsterdam!
Una habitación limpia, confortable y en una situación excepcional. Edwin es un gran anfitrión. Siempre disponible y atento por si necesitas ayuda. Sin duda es 100% recomendable.

Super séjour, la chambre est top, tout est clean et le logement très bien situé !
Edwin est un hote au top, souriant, accueillant et tres serviable !
Rien à redire quant à la qualité de la chambre comme de l'accueil et d'Edwin !
Great room on a very nice location. Really friendly host and the rooms were very clean!
The room was lovely and also very clean. It is also perfectly located in the city centre of Amsterdam.

Edwin is an awesome person, very kind and fun ! You'll feel like at home at his place. More over he will answer kindly to all of your trip interrogations.

The appartement is clean and very well situated (15 / 20 mins by foot from all the major sports)

I sincerely recommend you this accommodation if you want to make your Amsterdam journey unforgettable :)
This apartment has a very quaint interior and nice location :)
Very nice host and room, the location is ideal
Top.

Edwin is the perfect host. This place is clean, comfortable and in a great part of town. If you like nightlife this is the place to stay, but even if you go to bed earlier, Edwin provides a nice fan to drown out the noise and help you sleep. We will definitely stay here again.

Un long weekend très agréable chez Edwin. Chambre idéalement située pour pouvoir visiter les moindres recoins d'Amsterdam. Edwin est un hôte charmant, discret et très arrangeant. je recommande chaudement ! and go to party !

Logement idéalement situé en plein cœur d'un quartier vivant. Accès à la chambre sans déranger l'hôte (un escalier dessert chaque partie privée du logement).   Salle de douche partagée avec avec la seconde chambre, très propre. Literie de qualité.  Merci !

Edwin was awesome and we loved our stay at his place! He was a great communicator and very helpful with directions/things to do. His place is in the perfect location for getting around. 10/10 will go back to stay with him!

Ewdin is a super friendly, open minded and funny host & the communication was very easy.  The accomodation was comfy and extremely central, best place we've stayed at so far in Amsterdam! :) Thanks a lot!

We stayed at Edwin’s guest house for only three days but we loved it! So clean, so neat, and the best part: so close to the center. Besides, Edwin is a lovely, helpful and friendly person that we loved to chat with. I recommend it vividly!

The apartment is perfect for exploring the city by foot as it is located right in die center of Amsterdam! Everything was clean and Edwin was a great host! We loved our stay and would definietly come back.

Un grand merci pour l'accueil!
La chambre est très spacieuse et se situe dans un appartement typique d'Amsterdam et très bien situé
L'hôte communique rapidement et est arrangeant sur les modalités d'arrivée et de départ

Honestly, a great value for money choice of accommodation. The house was ideally located in the center of Amsterdam next to all the museums and attractions. Also a very lively neighborhood with multiple choices for a night out. Edwin was an amazing host. His smile and friendliness made our stay even better.
Stayed 2 days but what an impression!  From the location,  hospitality, to cleanliness!  Not more to say stay with Edwin!
It was a nice stay at Edwins appartment. Our room was prepared well. We enjoyed the conversations with Edwin a lot. when coming back to Amsterdam I will look out his appartment, if its free.
Super Lage. Sehr zentral und alles zu Fuß erreichbar. Das Zimmer war sauber und ordentlich. Alles Bestens.

We had an excellent experience. Edwin is a very dear person and received us very well. The apartment is very clean and comfortable. The location is really good too! Amsterdam is really an amazing city.
Thanks, Edwin!

Me and my boyfriend stayed two days in this room when we were in amsterdam The owner was very friendly and happy. He gave us plenty of positive energy. The room is cozy and it has an vintage decoration which we loved. The location is absolutely perfect because it is in the heart of a street full of bars in the centrum of Amsterdam. We enjoyed our stay there and we hope to visit it again for more days 😁
Edwin was super nice and the room was as described! I’d go back next time I visit Amsterdam! Thank you!

The flat is really well located and clean .
Edwin is nice and welcoming.
I recommend .

We really appreciated the proximity for the proximity with the museum, the center of Amsterdam, and very close to great bars.
Moreover, the place was both clean and comfortable (the bed was very good, and the neighborhood not that noisy at all)
And Edwin is a very cool host 😁

Logement super au niveau de l’emplacement. Nous avons pu faire beaucoup de chose à pied.
Hôte très accueillant.

Edwin was amazing! He felt like a friend you were meeting up with even though you’ve never met them. Just a great host all around! Made some great recommendations for authentic local food (definitely make sure to ask!) The location was amazing and central to everything. I didn’t have any issues with the internet and had to work for a few of the days, my connection was great. And while some of the reviews advised it was noisy, I did not have that experience. It might have been because everything was locked down by 8PM but even leading up to it no issues with the noise. Absolutely would stay here again! Great location, great host, great experience!
Really a nice stay at Edwin’s, the location is really excellent !

Edwin's stay is absolutely perfect. Clean, nice size, amazing location. Metro station is right down the street & there are tons of things within walking distance, including the Van Gogh Museum about 15 min away. Also Edwin is a very kind, cool host! If I return to Amsterdam I will be staying here again.

My friend and I had such a lovely stay here! The location was perfect. Edwin was welcoming and communicative, and the room had everything we needed. We spent more time here than expected because of covid, so we’re glad we picked such a cozy spot.
Miriam è  una splendida padrona di casa.. ci siamo trovati benissimo!!!la casa è  comoda facilmente raggiungibile da e per il centro.. Ideale per le famiglie!!! da consigliare

This is a unique little place with a nice garden and great surroundings, I wish I could have stayed longer.  A short walk from the apartment is the Westergasfabriek area with a lot of bars and restaurants. Right outside the door there are stops for both bus and tram. During my stay I had no problems at all, Mirjam was a very helpful host and I highly recommend anyone to visit Mirjam.
We had a nice stay! Fair price vd quality. Near trendy Jordaan and walking distance of city center ...
Very nice people, nice appartment, great location!
Notre hote est trés souriante, disponible a notre arrivée et l'appartement est bien situé tout proche d'un magnifique parc.
Everything went very smoothly and the host was very available if needed..   The location is Wonderful... Great amenities and transportation within blocks.

Appartement proche centre ville / pratique et bien desservi / nous étions finalement 2 personnes au lieu de 3 et nous aurions souhaité que le prix soit revu à la baisse ce qui n a pas été possible ☹️ / le lit canapé dans la pièce principale est côté rue donc assez bruyant au final . La ville d Amsterdam est très agréable / séjour correct pour 3/4 jours

Un très grand merci à Mirjam et Didi qui ont été de formidables hôtes,  très disponibles. L appartement est situé a 10min max du centre en transport en commun (bus ou tram en bas de l appart). le quartier est assez sympa avec un grand parc à proximité.  L appartement quant à lui a un côté atypique avec une chambre à l exterieur. L' appartement est très propre.
hermoso lugar y recomendable para quien quiera pasar una estadía hermosa en Amsterdam. nosotros vinimos con 2 nenes y nos acomodamos muy bien, lindo lugar y cerca a pie y en bus.

Mirjam and Didi's place was great! Would probably have been walkable from the city if it wasn't quite as rainy as it was when we stayed but the public transport is great, right across the road from the apartment and so cheap and frequent! There are lots of cute cafes in the area for breakfast, we loved Bagels and beans just down the road!
The apartment was well stocked with everything you could need and the beds were super comfy. We would totally be back for another (hopefully sunnier) trip!
Superbe séjour, très agréable. Merci !!
The place quiet, convenient transportation, easy check in, everything is good
Ideal location, comfy, clean and host was very helpful.

SUCH a terrific blessing being here instead of the overcrowded hustle and bustle in centre of the city. We had a perfectly GREAT time, thanks to the park, the wonderful hosts and the ease this stay provided us for ourselves and our children! so please, GO FOR IT! and enjoy your stay/trip very much. cheers. karla

Un charmant appartement dans le centre d’Amsterdam !
Je recommande vivement Edwin !

We had a really nice stay at Edwin’s house. The place is really cosy and Edwin very welcoming. We enjoyed the good location of the place, at the centre of the city, and the books of art in the room at our disposal.
Geweldig verblijf. Heel vriendelijk en een lekker bed. Wij zouden zeker terugkomen😍
Very good location to see Amsterdam on foot. Many restaurants, coffeeshops, and grocery stores right below or arond the corner. The room is very spacious. Overall great value.

Perfect! Edwin is super nice and the room is amazing! Perfect position in the center of Amsterdam, near the flower mkt!
Hope to come back soon!

Super grosse Unterkunft, welche tolle gelegen ist. Mit dem Bus ist man in 10 min. beim Bahnhof, was sehr bequem ist. Ebenso mit dem Tram ist man in wenigen Minuten in anderen tollen Gegenden.
Mirjam ist sehr gastfreundlich und hilfsbereit, die Wohung ist herzig eingerichtet. Wissen muss man, dass ein Doppelbett im "Gartenhaus" steht, was bei kälteren Temperaturen und Regen etwas ungemütlich ist.
Können die Unterkunft jederzeit weiterempfehlen und würden diese auch wieder nutzen.

Mirjam è molto gentile e disponibile.
Check in ottimo anche la sera tardi quando siamo arrivati.
Un pò lontano dal centro ma facilmente raggiungibile con il tram che ferma proprio davanti a casa.
Casa pulita e ordinata.
Camera in giardino un pò scomoda perchè scollegata dal resto della casa e molto stretta, ma comunque per brevi periodi va benissimo.
Nel complesso ottima per 2-3 giorni.
Muy recomendable! Mirjam y Didi su marido nos ayudaron en todo lo posible.
La anfitriona es un encanto, es lo que compensa el apartamento
Good location. Good price. Really enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam at Mirjam's place
The stay was very nice, Mirjam and Did were very helpful, the communication worked well and everything was as described. Good connection to downtown.

An authentic Amsterdam  experience. We had a great stay on the houseboat- absolutely perfect location, walking distance to everything in Amsterdam central and all amenities nearby. It is located on a very pretty canal where you can watch the world go by. Very good check in experience, and particularly good provision of food/drink when we first arrived. Lydia was very friendly and provided useful tips on nearby shops and cafe. The boat conversion is perfect for a couple, essentially a studio set-up. Lydia stays in the other half of the boat which makes for a very efficient check in/check out process, and the half we stayed in is very private and cosy. We would definitely recommend and would like to stay there again on any future return to the city.

So schön dieses Hausboot liegt, es ist leider aktuell absolut nicht empfehlenswert, da einem der Schimmelgeruch in die Nase und Augen beißt, sobald man die Leiter herab steigt. Im Bad ist es besonders beißend - wie wir dann herausfinden durften, weil die Toilette undicht ist und das Abwasser mehr ins Bad als ins Rohr fließt!
Zudem halten die Dichtungen der Dach-Bullaugen im Wohnbereich nicht dicht - es tropft rein und das nicht erst seit unserem Aufenthalt (dem Zustand des Metalls um die Dichtungen herum nach zu urteilen...). Die eine Hälfte der Matratze in der wirklich "kuscheligen" Koje war auch nass, als wir ankamen - da war ein Bullauge nicht richtig zu/undicht.
Diese ganzen gravierenden Mängel werden dann durch die durchaus den Bildern entsprechenden Einrichtung und Deko leider auch nicht mehr herausgerissen.
Lydia selbst war auch weder anwesend noch erreichbar - ihre arme, am Tag unserer Ankunft für sie einspringende Freundin war natürlich mit all den Problemen überfordert und trotz ihrer sehr guten, telefonischen Erreichbarkeit (sie wohnte nicht in Amsterdam) hat sie unsere Beschwerden zwar angenommen und versucht, etwas zu retten und war immer freundlich - aber eben nicht hilfreich. Wir sind dann früher abgereist, weil es wirklich nicht mehr auszuhalten war - sehr ärgerlich (vermiester Urlaub und so viel Geld für so eine Absteige!) und super schade! Lydia selbst hat sich bis heute (wir waren Anfang Oktober dort) nicht bei uns gemeldet.
Amazing location and adorable space

We loved everything about this place! Lydia was so friendly and had great recommendations on where to go. The space itself was so cute and cozy. We really enjoyed our stay and would definitely stay here again. It made our trip even more special!
Amazing place. Lydia was also awsome - great communication, met me even though I arrived late in the evening and loads of really nice touches in the boat. Thanks so much.

We are back in South Africa and reminisce fondly on our special time on Lydia’s house boat! We so loved our stay. She is a wonderful host with a beautiful boat, that is centrally located but on a quiet street. It’s a romantic getaway perfect for two, with a private entrance on a beautiful street in Amsterdam. The boat is well loved and well cared for. It was such a pleasure to meet you and stay with you. Thank you so much for your warm hospitality! It’s a memory we will treasure forever!
Much love
Simone and Drew

Lydia was such a great host and her boat is absolutely beautiful and in the perfect location. We didn't have to use public transport once during our stay as we could walk everywhere. We had been worried that with the time of year we went (end of Oct) and with the boat being so old that we would get cold but this was not the case at all! It was so lovely and warm and cosy and really made our trip to Amsterdam that much more special. My boyfriend had been several times before but said this was his favourite trip due to the boat and its location. Lydia was easily contactable and gave a warm welcome with lots of tips of what to see/where things were etc. Thank you again Lydia! We can't wait to come back :)
Un emplacement unique , un logement unique , c’est LE must sur Amsterdam :)

What a gorgeous boat with great amenities and fantastic location and soooo warm onboard considering it’s November!!

Close to absolutely everything yet far enough to be in a peaceful spot away from the noisy and busy central.
We walked everywhere
Lydia was a fantastic host and made us feel like we were in our own home. Thank you Lydia :0)

Lydia’s hospitality and friendliness has been top notch during our stay. We feel extremely blessed to have had an opportunity to stay at this beautiful home. The boat is located perfectly next to a cafe and walking distance from everything. We will definitely stay here again, if she’ll have us! ❤️
Experiência única em Amsterdam ❤️
Great location, very friendly host! Outstanding experience of living in a boat house:)

Lydia is an amazing host, very friendly and thoughtful. Her boat is full of character and extremely cosy, even in the deep winter (January 2020). She was very easy to get in touch with and went the extra mile of buying a small oven for us so that we could have freshly baked croissants on New Year's day. A blue tooth speaker for music would have been nice but by no means essential. The location is fantastic as we could walk everywhere. Lydia left wine and cheese, sparkling wine, ollibollen and other snacks for us as well as vase of fresh tulips. We were sorry to leave and would love to come back to this lovely and cosy "love boat". Thank you Lydia for being such a great host x

I will never stay at another place in Amsterdam. The location was unbelievable. A five minute walk from just about anything in the historic district with streets that were quiet at night. And for the host—Lydia is truly a fantastic woman. She went above and beyond the call of duty to make sure I was comfortable and even came out to say goodbye as my taxi picked me up. I could not imagine a better place to stay in Amsterdam. So much fun—so cool! Thanks, Lydia!
Lydia is a great no nonsense host. Super accommodating and friendly.

Lydia's boat is in a perfect location. Peaceful & beautiful surroundings but only a short stroll to everything you could need or want. Lydia had provided us with some snacks & a bottle of wine which was a nice touch. The boat is just idyllic & we would love to stay again, the perfect space to spend a few days. Would highly recommend to anyone. Lydia was a great host & gave us some tips for local places to eat & drink. We are hoping that Lydia will host us again :)

Lydias’ Boat is fantastically located close to all parts of Amsterdam.
She is a wonderful friendly host who looked after us on arrival and when we left, offering advice on how to get around the city and to contact her if we needed any further help.
The boat was very warm which helped as it was a very chilly February.
She supplied tea, coffee, biscuits, crisps and even a bottle of wine so we didn’t have to rush out straight away to get amenities which was very kind and handy.
The boat was clean with a nice sized living space. Because of its size don’t expect a large bathroom and bedroom although they are both large enough for a couples needs.
Surprisingly the boat is very still with no movement felt during our stay despite the river cruises passing frequently.
We would thoroughly recommend this cosy boat and we imagined that it would be ideal in the summer months on deck with a glass of wine waving at the tourist boats that go by and wishing it was ours.
Thanks Lydia

Lydia's place is truly such a special spot. The pictures really don't do justice to this beautiful boat, it is spacious and much more light than I thought there might be. The bed area is big and comfortable with windows and a skylight, there is even a small kitchenette which was a pleasant surprise! It was nice and toasty with the gas burner, clean and had everything we could have wanted including little jars of sweets, and different teas etc. ! Its super cosy at night, the tv is hooked up to lots of On demand TV as well. The location is amazing, we walked everywhere - didn't need to get a tram once and the deck on the boat is so lovely for watching the world go by. Lydia was so welcoming and had such a great energy and gave us super helpful tips for our trip and an amazing welcome basket with local treats. I could go on and on about how fab this place is but the reviews speak for themselves. Thank you Lydia for a perfect stay - we will see you again soon :)

Lydia's houseboat is amazing! It was one of my favorite Airbnb's I'vever stayed in. Might even be number 1, and I've stayed in a lot! Everything was as advertised but better than you can imagine. Lydia is an incredible host. She was super responsive and very quick to answer any questions at all. She helped me find my way back when I got lost at night in the pouring rain. And this boat is beautiful. The weather wasn't great for us, but it didn't matter. We still fully enjoyed our little deck area with the adorable sweet little touches that make it so relaxing. I 100% highly recommend this houseboat!

Bed was very comfortable, room smelled nice and shared bathroom was cleaned regularly. Location is great if you don't mind tourist noise, even better if you want to be out late. We never needed public transport in the end because it was so central. We slept very well anyway. Edwin was very helpful. A beautiful cat lives with Edwin and we were allowed to spend time with her too! Highly recommend for a getaway
Edwin was super helpful and the location could not have been better

We enjoyed our stay immensely and loved the atmosphere of the house and our room; everything was incredibly comfortable, clean and cosy and we enjoyed coming "home" every day.
Thank you so much for being so nice, personal and accommodating!

Sehr schöne Zimmer, gut gelegen, man hat alles was man braucht direkt vor der Tür. Edwin ist sehr Freundlich und zuverlässig. Er gibt gerne Auskunft was man braucht. Im Großen und Ganzen sehr zufrieden. Für kurztrip sehr gut geeignet.

Everything about our experience here was amazing! Edwin was so kind and welcoming, and went above and beyond to be accommodating to us. The location was perfect, and the room was super comfy with all the amenities you could possibly need. We would love to stay here again!
Perfect location and a perfect host. Edwin is a wonderful host with a wonderful home!

The house is in the middle of the city with a lot of sites nearby. You can find something to eat very easily and the nightlife is very vivid. However because of the nightlife, some noises in the night can't be avoided.
The room was clean and orderly. We were greeted warmly by Edwin and enjoyed our stay very much.
Amazing locations, host Edwin was so helpful with tips on the best places to visit and how to get to and from the airport

La chambre était très bien, idéalement placée et tout était propre. Nous avons pu profiter pleinement de la ville et Edwin à été très arrangeant au départ et à l'arrivée. Cela peut être un peu bruyant en fin de semaine mais c'est précisé dans l'annonce donc pas de surprise. Je recommande vivement.
It was a great location to stay for a few days and enyoing Amsterdam in the middle of this beautiful city! Edwin was so lovely and funny and also has a sweet cat 😻 thank you for everything! 😊
Very nice

Nice place and a super Host, very helpful and kind in every circumstance!
I would like to come back

location is just perfect to fulfill your trip in amsterdam!everything is near from the centre of tourist attractions !Ed place  is ideally located for a couple or single traveller . The tram area stop is 2 minutes away which allows access to everything and a minutes to walk Too for markets,restaurants .bars!We really liked Ed place..⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Edwin was a perfect host. The room was absolutely clean and cozy. He provided us with all the basic necessities as mentioned.
Fast responding and approachable indeed. We had a good time. Thankyou

Edwin is a wonderful host! He is a super fun guy but also very strict with the rules. Answered us very quickly and gave us great recommendations! His place is very clean, comfortable, and in an amazing location!

We were welcomed nicely and we had a cozy room for two. Toilet and showers are very clean and equipped.

The location has a good train connection and right infront of the house is a party street.

Well, yes it could be loud for those who just want to spend a day in silence but nonetheless, you won’t notice until you do.

The room was very clean and comfortable, and in an incredible location. There are many restaurants right outside, and everything else is only a short walk away. If you are sensitive to noise though, the street can get pretty loud at night (especially on a weekend), so don’t forget earplugs. Thanks Edwin!

If you want a place convenient to many of the highlights of Amsterdam, and convenient to many restaurants and the nightlife of Amsterdam, this is a perfect place for you.  Edwin is very prompt with his communication.
Great place and location

Lydia was an amazing host, super welcoming and friendly! We arrived late and she made sure we had some food there in case we couldn't still go out and get something, she even got us some wine! The boat is absolutely lovely as well and in a great location! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and the boat was a big part of that :)

A MUST-BOOK SPOT!


The houseboat itself is very quaint, the location within the city is perfect, and the host Lydia is incredibly welcoming!

It doesn’t feel like a shared space at all—it feels very private.
Très bon moment passé chez lydia. C’est une personne adorable et la péniche est charmante. Emplacement parfait

Lydia’s houseboat was great, and we will definitely return. She (and her cats) was a very welcoming and friendly host. The place was very cozy and it was great being right on the water. It was walking distance to many shops, restaurants, and bike rental places.

Lydia and her place is pure Amsterdam magic. Her warmth and genuine excitement to meet guests plus the beautiful views from the boat is something special. Every nook has a different view or something to discover. Definitely will stay here again!
Absolutely charming old houseboat, very cosy and comfortable and in an incredible location. Lydia is an amazing host and we couldn't recommend this stay higher

We absolutely loved our boat house experience in Amsterdam at Lydia's!

My wife and I visited Amsterdam with our 3 children ages 8, 5 and 3. Though the room was only rated for 2 pax, kind Lydia offered to put up an air mattress so we could try the boat house experience - and I'm so glad we did!

Lydia is easily the best Airbnb host we've ever had. She went the full distance to make us (especially the kids) feel welcome. My daughter was sobbing in tears when having to leave, for missing Lydia and her 2 cats Tommy and Neemus.

The boat house itself is authentic, something we specifically were looking for - not the kind that is basically an apartment floating on the water. It's a 100-years-old cargo boat that Lydia lovingly preserved. Has all the charms, like a ladder leading down into the living quarters and a heating furnace-like thing to keep warm in winter.

The location itself is just awesome. We basically walked the entire 4 nights we were in Amsterdam, didn't need to use any form of transport, and could still cover all the popular sights of Amsterdam itself.

10/10 would stay again. Thanks Lydia!
Super comfy and cozy. Lydia was an excellent host and was fantastic at communication!!!
Great for a special stay - lovely to have such a unique experience with a great host and great communication!
Great location and unique place to stay in Amsterdam. Lydia is a very friendly host and makes you feel welcome immediately. We had a great time and will definitely recommend to friends and family.

Great place to stay in Amsterdam !

The accomodation is unique and charming, two nights went great in cold wintertime.

Thank you Lydia for your warm welcoming and your special attentions regarding st valentine's day 😉

Definitely a place we'll pass by if back in Amsterdam in the future !!!

We stayed in Mirjam's apartment on the occasion of Awakenings Festival 2017.
I didn't have the opportunity to meet Mirjam but everything was perfect just as we were expecting! The apartment is very cozy and its position also very good.
I hope we'll be back soon :)

Un apartamento muy comodo con todo lo necesario para pasarla de maravilla.
Estuve con mi esposo y niño y Mijram fue muy atenta y estuvo pendiente para que no nos falte nada y nos sintieramos como en casa.
Super recomendable.
Se toma el tranviA frente al apartamento y en 10 minutos se esta en el centro.
Great location and super host.

What a lovely place! Very comfortable apartment that has everything you need. Very clean bathroom, nice little backyard and great neighborhood. Mirjam was always there to answer phone calls or messages. Would definitely come back!

We stayed over the easter holidays in Mirjam apartment.
The communication with her and her husband was perfect so that we had a great and easy arrival and a warm welcome.
The location of the apparent is very comfortable. We could walk by feet to the city centre. Additionally, there is a train directly in front of the house, so we were able to get to the city even faster. However, in the neighborhood there are many nice spots to eat and drink, especially the Westerpark is worth it to visit.
We'd love to come back to Amsterdam and to Mirjam.
L'appartement atypique est paisible et très bien situé. La terrasse est agréable. On s'y est senti comme chez nous.

Casa molto carina ed accogliente. Comoda per i mezzi pubblici.
Host gentilissimi.
Valida per un breve soggiorno
Bella casetta a pochi minuti di passeggiata dal centro. Miriam è una host ineccepibile, ci ha accolto con grande cordialità e dato ottimi consigli!
Lo mejor la ubicación, el resto deja bastante que desear, sobre todo para 4, si es para 2 está bien. La Wifi no funcionaba.

L'appartamento è situato in un quartiere residenziale, lontano dal caos del centro. Per raggiungere il centro bisogna prendere bus o tram, che sono comunque a due passi. Nel periodo della nostra permanenza purtroppo non siamo riusciti a trovare nelle vicinanze un buon posto dove fare colazione. L'appartamento è in stile bohemienne e ci è piaciuta tanto. La consiglio per famiglie per via della posizione vicina al parco e per la tranquillità della zona.

Appartement bien situé et qui doit être calme mais quand nous y sommes allés, il y avait des travaux tout autour
Accueil chaleureux des propriétaires
Équipement un peu vétuste, en particulier la literie
Endroit néanmoins charmant

This place was close to public transportation and there were plenty of places to eat that were walking distance. The hosts were very nice and quick to respond to my messages. They also made sure to stop in and make sure everything was going well and if there was anything we needed.

Mirjam and Didi are great hosts! Very thoughtful and quick to suggest places to eat or things to check out. They live upstairs (through a separate entrance) and are almost always available if you happen to need them.

The apartment is in a great spot of Amsterdam. Very quiet but close to a tram/bus stop that can get you anywhere in the city within minutes. There was also a snackbar just a few doors down that was perfect for late night cravings.

We did have a few bugs in the gardenhouse, but nothing unbearable. Overall, it was a great experience and we’d gladly stay there again.

Mirjam and Didi are exceptional hosts. They were there to greet us upon arrival and provided a portable crib for our infant. Thank you!
The location is wonderful if you want a quieter neighborhood outside of the city center. It is also very easy to get to with public transportation.
The apartment itself was a bit dusty so if you have allergies I would avoid it.
Mirjam and Didi were awesome hosts, very helpfu and just too kind. Check In was absolutely hassle free, the flat is located near the centre in a very quite area. 5/5, we would definitly come back.

Lieve en meedenkende verhuurders. Echt een privé plekje, en binnen krijg je niks mee van de ‘drukte’ van de weg. Fijne locatie, veel op loopafstand en het openbaarvervoer voor de deur. Wij komen zeker nog eens terug!
We had a wonderful stay, thank you so much Mirjam!

I highly recommend Lydias place for everyone.

It is located in the center, close to supermarkets and quiet, clean and warm at the same time.

Super séjour ! Lydia est très accueillante, chaleureuse, souriante, nous a indiqué les bons endroits. Bateau bien agencé, propre et en plein centre, difficile de faire mieux. Je recommande chaleureusement !
it's amazing and worth all the experience

The houseboat was perfect for what we were looking for. Something original, centrally located (yet not on a super busy main street - thus not bombarded with tourists), and with a very friendly and communicative host. Would absolutely stay here again!

This place is amazing. It is situated on a quiet street but a great location. Walking distance from the Dam square, lots of shops and restaurants, red light district, and public transportation. Lydia added a special touch in the room to help me celebrate my birthday. Such a gracious host. Can't wait to stay again.
Don't hesitate, if you want one of a kind experience book now.

The best AirBnb we've ever stayed at. The boat was so charming and remarkably comfortable, and we enjoyed sitting on the terrace with the flowers and the cats (Tommy was so friendly!) It was really a unique experience. The location was also perfect, and Lydia was a warm and welcoming host. We definitely plan to stay here again when we revisit Amsterdam!

Could not recommend this stay more highly. Lydia is the loveliest and friendliest Air BnB host we’ve ever had and was so welcoming after we arrived - with a bottle of red wine ready to be cracked open on arrival! She was extremely communicative and gave us some great tips and ideas for our stay.

The boat itself is beautiful, cozy and romantic as the name suggests! We loved having our morning coffee up top before heading out for the day. The location is fantastic - we never once used public transport - and although it is around a busy area, as soon as you turn off to the canal where it is located it’s so calm and peaceful.

But the best part are Lydia’s gorgeous cats who live on her side of the boat that welcome you home after a day out - particularly the one that wears a little jacket!

Two things:
Firstly,: Lydia is just a wonderful host. I received a warm welcome from her and some treats waiting for me inside.

Secondly: the boat is just beautiful! Outside was adorned with colorful flowers, there’s table, chairs and a lounge pug outside where I enjoyed sitting on for my morning coffee and afternoon/evening wine while I wave at the people on cruises that pass by. It’s centrally located and everything is nearby. There’s also a real cute cafe on the corner with excellent coffees and pastries. Rows of restaurants are only few minutes walk away.
It’s very quiet considering its location. Only the church bells every hour. And, I’ve noticed that there’s no more boat tours after 10pm.
Inside was very cozy. It’s clean and tidy and there’s cute little knick-knacks in every corner. Everything you need is pretty much there.
10/10! I highly recommend here whenever you’re planning a trip to Amsterdam.

We had an absolutely amazing experience at Lydia’s Airbnb. Lydia was excellent to deal with, communication and check in went flawlessly. The accommodations were even more amazing than expected. A beautiful Airbnb in a perfect location. We cannot wait to go back!

A beautiful old barge in an amazingly central location.  Loads of character on board with flowers lining the roadside too.  Well equipped, although we ate out most of the time as there are great cafes and restaurants within a minute or twos walk. Lydia is very friendly and a perfect host with lots of local knowledge. We liked the outside seating area the best for just watching the world go by anytime of day.  Would definitely book again next time we are in Amsterdam.
Book this Boathouse now!

This was the best air bnb experience I have ever had. First, Lydia is incredible. She is so hospitable and extremely kind. She allowed us to store our bags with her before we were able to check in and she allowed us to leave our bags with her after we had to check out but still had some time in the city. Second, her boat is truly amazing. Do yourself a favor and book 3 nights here.

Lydia! What can we say you were amazing from start to end.

The communication was amazing. We were able to check in a little earlier and Lydia greeted us at the boat and took us down to where we were staying on the boat. It was such a beautiful space and the two chairs up on deck were the perfect spot to watch the boats down the canal.

If ever we are in Amsterdam again we know where we will be staying.

Thank you Again Lydia 😀
Super nice hostess who greets you, making sure that your stay is a good experience.  And, staying a night on a houseboat is a unique and special experience.

Our stay at Edwins was great! The location is amazing and although it could be noisy outside, it wasn't too bothersome. There's a lot of food/shops in the neighborhood. The WiFi didn't reach the room all too well but we were rarely home so it wasn't an issue. I would definitely book this place again when I return to AMS. :)
Edwin was great, very friendly! The location is great! Very clean! Overall a great stay and a great trip!

We really enjoyed our stay in Sophia's apartment. The place is located at a distance of 10 minutes away  by fast train from the city centre. Still being close to a city centre you find yourself in a village surroindings and in the morning you wake up hearing not the sounds of a big city's heavy traffic but singing of birds and quacking of ducks, geese and swans who live in a canal that flows right by the big terrace full of greenery. But more charming than the apartment is its owner Sophia. She was so caring that we constantly felt her presence any moment we needed anything. We really recommend this apartment to anybody coming to Amsterdam!!!
Easy access to airport and downtown area by public transport/apt felt safe and clean/great internet connection/unable to find restaurants or groceries within walking distance at night.
It was wonderful, thank you!
Chambre simple et spacieuse située en plein centre d Amsterdam. Très pratique pour les visites.

La ubicación es la mejor,  a pasos del paseo de las flores y cerca de todos los atractivos de Ámsterdam, la habitación tiene lo necesario para descansar, la ducha y el baño son correctos. Edwin fue un anfitrión excelente, siempre atento y pendiente. Check in y check out muy fáciles

nous sommes venus à Amsterdam pour le marathon, et l'appartement est situé à 2.5 km du départ, donc parfait . Très bien desservie en tram (30 mn du centre), nous avons apprécié le calme de cette banlieue. Un grand super marché se trouve à proximité, mais par contre cela manque de restaurants .
L'appartement est petit, mais douillet et convient parfaitement à la farniente des vacances. Sophia est aux petits soins, et vous renseigne de son mieux pour la découverte de la ville; on sent qu'elle aime son pays et son petit "chez soi"

I loved staying in Sophia's apartment! I rented the apartment for 6 nights to attend a conference at the Vrije University. It was literally 5 minutes walk to the main entrance of the university (and less to the tram stop for easy transport to other places). The location could not have been better for me, but what I loved most was how peaceful it was. The apartment is small, but the windows are big. All you see out the windows is green and all you hear are gentle duck and other bird sounds. The lounge and bedroom look over the small garden with a hedge, beyond the hedge is a small stretch of mown lawn surrounded by big trees and beyond that is the canal. Except for the occasional person walking their dog, hardly anybody walks next to the canal, so it is very private. It is also lovely and sunny (when the sun shines) in the garden and in the lounge.

Sophia was also very friendly and helpful and was quick to respond to messages. If I ever need to travel to Amsterdam again, I hope Sophia's apartment is available, because I would book it again without thinking twice.

Nouvel an 2013 ... 3 jours et 3 nuits inoubliable ! Merci à Sofia pour son accueil , sa patience , sa gentillesse ... Son appart est charmant, pratique pour se rendre en centre ville ... Les photos reflètent complètement le logement , calme , cosy et zen ... Notre hôte nous a comblé par sa chaleur et ses différents renseignements sur la ville et les transports afin de nous faciliter notre séjour ... Merci encore ... Peggy et Leila

Sophia nous a accueillis avec beaucoup de chaleur ;elle avait préparé une documentation très utile pour trouver des restaurants ou autres lieux pour sortir.Elle avait gentiment fait des courses pour le petit déjeuner du lendemain.
L'appartement est très agréable,avec un joli jardin , dans un environnement calme mais très bien situé pour aller dans le centre.

Merci à Sophia pour son formidable accueil, elle est venue nous chercher au métro et le pdj nous attendait dans le frigo ! Son appart est conforme à la description , cosy et surtout petite terrasse en bord de canal très agréable ! Le métro est à 30secondes et il vous faut 10min pour rejoindre l hypercentre, le mieux est de louer des vélos (10min jusqu au centre) idéal pour un
Couple peut être moins pour des jeunes teuffers car un peu excentré de la vie nocturne . En tout cas première exp sur airbnb et ne regrettons pas nous nous sommes sentis chez nous !
I've spent a magic weekend in this house ! And thank you Sophia for your kindness..you showed us the best part of Amsterdam ;)
small but very pretty house with a garden in the countryside. very quiet area but well connected to centro.sophie is a hostess very welcoming and friendly. we loved it here

Sophie es una chica encantadora, nos recibió en casa a pesar de que nuestro vuelo llegó casi a media noche. Livia y yo hemos pasado un fin de semana estupendo, combinando turismo y trabajo. El apartamento está mejor de lo que se ve en las fotos, localizado cerca de los centros de trabajo y muy bien comunicado con el centro. Definitivamente recomendamos a Sophie y su app!

Where do I start!! Best person I have met in my Airbnb experience. Very kind. Friendly and a perfect host. The house is nice big. Clean with a nice garden. Fully equipped. Sophia even kept some breakfast for us and as she could not welcome us Becoz of our odd time. She came home and met us and explained us the neighborhood. I would highly recommend staying here. It's 10 min from city center and tram stop is across the road. Thank you Sophia. Always. Cheers.

Appartement cosy avec un jardin très agréable. À deux minutes de la station de train qui vous emmène en 20 minutes dans le centre ville.Nous avons eu la chance d'avoir du soleil tout les matins, c'était un vrai bonheur. Sophia est vraiment très sympa, elle est passé prendre un café pour nous rencontrer. Elle est resté disponible tout au long de notre séjour! Si vous cherchez un appartement cosy avec jardin,un quartier calme et une hôtesse sympa, c'est ici!

Sophia was an amazing host. Very clean and adorable apartment, in a fantastic location right across the street from a tram stop. She left us breakfast, and so many suggestions on restaurants and activities in the area. She helped make our stay so great, and we couldn't have been happier!!

Sophia was an incredibly accommodating and communicative host, who went out of her way to make sure that our check-in was smooth and our stay was as comfortable as it could be.

The place is located in a quiet, conveniently located neighbourhood. There is a (relatively) small shopping mall just a 5-minute walk away, with a large supermarket and a bunch of cafes and restaurants. The closest metro/train station is likewise a short stroll away, around 10 minutes.

The flat itself is super cosy, with plenty of amenities, including a coffeemaker and good Wi-Fi. There is a lovely small backyard with access to a quaint canal. Having breakfast outside is a must in good weather!

All in all, I would definitely recommend this place to anyone.
Good for a trip in or near the city, everything you need is around you, Sophia gave us a lot of informations!
Comfortable for two, especially convenient garden level, no steps. Walking distance to stores, shops, restaurants etc. Easy access to public transport for all the tourist destinations.

Sophia is the best! She was very communicative and helpful before the trip. She left Dutch cookies and juice for us on the first day and even had a list of recommendations for things to do in town. It felt like staying at a good friend’s house. We even shared a lovely chat about her own travels. What a fantastic experience!

Sophia was great. She was attentive and was easy to reach. Her place was a train ride away from the busy city center. You can easily find directions for the entire transit system on maps. We used it all weekend long. Don’t forget to tap in and out every time you ride the train. The place was nice and cozy. Sophia left us tons on recommendations. Which was great. I would definitely stay here again. Thanks a lot. It was awesome.
Great stay, Sophia is a fantastic hostess the apartment is in a great location and as described :D

The location is ideal! It's a nice neighborhood and so close to absolutely everything needed, especially public transportation.
