This cosy apartment was comfortable, clean, and the kitchen fully equipped, including a Nesspresso machine! The apartment is not an investment property, which meant it was lived in and had all those little necessities like scissors, corkscrew, etc.
The weather was horrible but I loved the time I spent with my family
Sophia was a lovely host with a beautiful apartment in a very convenient location for anyone looking to stay in amsterdam 😀
Sophia was fantastic with communication and her place is a wonderful stay in a very convenient location - I can’t wait to revisit!
Really nice apartment! Beautiful and clean. Sophia is a really friendly and welcoming host! Everything was perfect and organised. I really highly reccomand it !

The apartment is as described. The location is calm, but not too far away
from the city. Its nice to chill there after a long day of sightseeing or whatever.
Sophia was a great host, the communication went well! We can definetly recommend it!

Sophia is a wonderful host - helpful, friendly and responsive. Her apartment is located in a very pretty residential area - not much around but very easy to get to the city, especially if you have a car. Not much room to put your own stuff, but if you’re traveling light, you’ll find everything you need.
It has been a fantastic holiday. We really enjoyed Amsterdam and probably we will come back soon. The house was really confortable and cozy. We will love to come back to Hinde's house the next time.
Awesome stay! Edwin was so helpful will come back!

Das Airbnb hat eine super Lage in Amsterdam. Unser Schlafzimmer hat auch eine super Größe und auch das gemeinschaftliche Badezimmer war sauber und wirklich super. Bringt euch für Nachts Oropax mit und dann ist man sehr gut ausgestattet. Wir werden die Unterkunft definitiv weiterempfehlen.
Nice guy, quick responde. The place is in the centre, in a very living street

El alojamiento de Edwin es tal cual puede apreciarse en las fotos. Habitación súper cómoda y baño muy limpio.
El lugar se encuentra muy cerca de los mayores puntos de interés de Ámsterdam y en una zona muy viva.
Recomendamos plenamente el alojamiento de Edwin.
Edwin is a fantastic host, he gave us many tips on places to go in Amsterdam and his room is very clean, comfortable and well-located.
Super ubytování v centru. Vše blízko. Jenom se vybavte špunty do uší, ulice přes noc žije 😁.
Edwin was super nice and friendly! The place was clean and was a great location
Edwin was absolutely amazing host, warm and welcoming! Also, the location of Edwin's  place was just perfect, and the room was really lovely and clean. We couldn't have asked more for out stay!

Perfect room for a few nights in a very convenient location of Amsterdam. The shared bathroom was kept clean and the bedroom was neat and clean upon arrival. Edwin was very sweet upon check in and check out. I would certainly stay again.

Our first impression was, that Edwin is a really sympathic and handsome guy and we felt welcomed with open arms. We only met him once so we can't say much more about him.
The room is nice and proper and really in the center of nightlife so earplugs are advised if you want to sleep.
20 min to walk to central station and everything around the corner. So a really great place to be in the heart of Amsterdam.

When we saw the pictures on Hindi apartments we fell in love with them at first sight! In reality, they were even more comfortable and impressive! We spent a lovely time in Hindi, which will take care of everything to make our stay as comfortable as possible. Hindi is lovely and very hospitable hostess and we were very glad to meet her. Thank you so much!

Hinde and her family welcome us very warmly. Staying in their house was comfortable and the apartment is very nice and full of light (and it was clean too). The girls were comfortably accomodate in a inflatable bed. Hinde gave us also advice on where to buy food or have dinner, very useful! We want to thank Hinde very much! Next time we'll go to Amsterdam, we will like to come to Hinde's house again!

We had the most wonderful stay at this Mediterranean apartment located in the west of Amsterdam! The location was perfect for us, as we rented bikes right after arrival. The apartment itself was super cozy with a lovely balcony/kitchen which we used more then once to enjoy a bottle of red and cheese. Since there were three of us, one of the girls had to sleep on the sofa in the living room, but from our experience this worked great and the sofa was very comfortable.

The communication and preparation arrangements with Hinde was very effective, and he provided us with everything we needed before arrival.

If we would ever go back to Amsterdam again, this would definitely be the apartment we would like to stay at!

Thank you!

We loved staying at Hinde and Rafael's house. The house was perfect for our family of five. We had two cribs and a little bed for the kids. Also they loved to play with Chadi's toys. The house is great if you travel with kids.

The kitchen is very luminous and has all the necessary tools and tableware to cook at home. The apartment is conveniently located around 10 min. walk from tram 13 that takes you to central station. There are two super markets close to the house too.

If I had something to say I think the bathroom could have been a little cleaner. Anyway, it is a great and charming place to stay that I would definitely recommend. I want to thank Hinde and Rafael for being so nice and helpful with all our needs.

We had a wonderful in
Your amazing apartment!!! The neighborhood is quiet and nice and the apartment is beautifully designed and super comfortable!!! Thanks so much;))

Hinde est resté en contact avec nous jusqu'au départ afin de préparer au mieux notre voyage. Son aide a été d'une grande utilité. Il fait preuve d'une grande disponibilité et répond au mieux à nos questions dans les plus brefs délais. Le quartier est très calme et très sympathique. Des commerces de proximité rendent le quartier vivant et pratique. Les arrêts de tram sont à 5min et desservent  le centre en moins de 15 min. Emplacement idéal.L'immeuble donne d'un côté sur des jardins qui apportent une touche de verdure très agréable. L'appartement est conforme à la description et très agréable à vivre. Excellent séjour.

Super appartement bien placé et très confortable!
Hind et Rafael ont été très disponible pour nous et on a passé un très bon séjour!

Merci beaucoup! !

Je me recommande vivement! !

Beautiful apartment in a fantastic location - super easy to get in to the centre, but a much more relaxed area to stay for when the hustle and bustle of tourists gets too much.
Hinde was a really great host - easy to contact and very helpful when needed. I felt like she went above and beyond to ensure we were happy and comfortable for our stay in her place.
Thanks Hinde and I'm sure we'll be back in Amsterdam before long!

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans l'appartement de Hinde et ça petite tribu!
Elle nous a aidée du début à la fin, elle a toujours répondu rapidement à nos questions (beaucoup)!
Prévenante, souriante (on l'a même vu en vrai!

Hinde's apartment was perfect for my friend and I during our week long stay in Amsterdam. Des Baarsjes was a perfect neighborhood, just far away enough from the city center to escape the crowds (and we didn't even go during peak tourist season), but right around the corner from several tram stops. There are several great restaurants and cafes in the neighborhood as well. We did not get to meet Hinde, but check in was very easy with their very flexible neighbor! Would stay here again, definitely.
Very nice apartment, everything we needed. Hinde was very helpful with everything and sorted out all our questions. Thank you!

Hinde's home was exactly as she has described. Beautifully and tastefully done up house. We had a great stay at Hinde's place and loved every moment spent there. The house is in convenient locality and 10-15 min distance from city centre by Tram/bus.

Whilst we found the house a bit cramped, but you will see everything is on it's right place and isn't an obstruction. The house needs special care if you have small child, it would be good to be upfront with Hinde. The house is on the 3rd floor with no lift, be mindful if you are travelling with heavy luggage.

A great stay for our visit at Amsterdam.
Everything was great staying here! I loved the house and location. It was convenient to get pretty much anywhere in Amsterdam. Would recommend to couples or a very small group of people.
по факту, жильё во многом не соответствует тому,что заявлено

Great apartment close to city center. Charming decoration/ real home. Everything you need. Big place can (Email hidden by Airbnb) munication with owner and arrival was super easy. Very nice in general :)
We had a wonderful time at Hinde's place. Would definitely recommend this place to others. It is close enough to transportation & has required amenities & shops close by.

Great space! Plenty of space for the 3 of us (couple +1) staying there. I actually opted to sleep on the couch bc it was so big and comfortable! There is balcony access which is lovely, and the apartment is a very cozy and  in a great location. Hinde was very accommodating, responded quickly, check in was easy, all great things!
very nice apartment in a good location

La chambre est très bien située, le quartier est très sympa et tout est proche à pied. Bien que petite elle est confortable et la salle de bain même si partagée est top. Edwin est tres réactif et sympathique.

Absolutely perfect place to stay, exactly what we needed and the location couldn’t have been better! Clean, simple and warm room and spotless bathroom. Would highly recommend, Edwin was a great host and very accommodating.

Noriko is SUPER SWEET. We met her when we arrived. Then, upon leaving, we got to meet her equally nice friend who was helping her host the apartment while she was away.

The apartment itself is in a GREAT location. 5-10 minutes walk to train station, but then also very close to all the good stuff. Amsterdam is so small, you can walk everywhere anyway, but for those who don't like to walk much, she's in a great location for getting to whatever you want.

Apartment is spacious, clean, and has private access to the rooftop which is beautiful!

I really can't think of anything that didn't work out great for us with regards to this place. I highly recommend staying at Noriko's when you're in this great city!

I arranged this apartment for my colleague and he was really happy about it. It has a great location in the center however in a quiet area.
The key exchange with Sam (who does this for Noriko) was ok but had limited flexibility due to our lack of time because we're both working.
if the situation would occur, I would book it again.
Great! In a wonderful location. Will definitely consider Norikos apartment next stay.

Noriko was so friendly and the apartment was beautiful with a great location!  Noriko even invited us to dinner on our first night which was lovely :D  I can recommend staying here if you are visiting Amsterdam.

Ero alla ricerca di un posto ad Amsterdam in cui io e il mio ragazzo potessimo sentirci a casa e l'appartamento di Noriko è esattamente quello che cercavo: una casa accogliente, deliziosa e arredata con gusto.
Una location luminosa e dotata di tutti i comfort.
Anche la posizione è davvero strategica: è vicinissima a Central Station, a due passi da Piazza Dam e circondata di bar, ristoranti e locali di ogni genere.
E in più il terrazzino che ti permette di vedere Amsterdam dall'alto: impagabile la vista da lassù!

Wonderful apartment, infinitely better than staying at the hotel. Very clean and spacious, with a huge bedroom and a wonderful view. Quite close to the "happening" part of the city (probably a 15 minute walk to the Red Light District), but just far enough away to be quiet in the evenings. Would definitely stay again.

Noriko's place was very nice. I stayed there with two friends for 4 nights and had a great time. The location is very central, yet on a quiet and beautiful street. The apartment is nice and spacious and would be ideal for 2 people, although it worked very well for 3 people, with 2 people in the bed and 1 on the couch (which has extra sheets and pillows). Overall I had a great time and would stay there again!

This apartment is aaaammmmaaaazzziiinnng! Location is great! Apartment is clean! It's really big and has a private rooftop which has an amazing view. We had to book this last minute and Noriko was very quick to respond. Highly recommended!
Great flat and exactly true to the photos.  Super location and the roof top makes it magic.

Pleins de bons souvenirs de ce séjour. Appart de NORIKO très bien situé, à la fois prêt du centre historique, des animations, du marché, et au calme. Appart agréable, coquet, chaleureux, et en bonus la terrasse ensoleillé. J'y retournerais avec plaisir.
Really great appartement in the center of the city, Noriko was really a good host. We were four guys coming for two nights and everything was perfect. I recommand it ! :)
Everything was great!!!
Really nice apartment, tidy and and ideally located. Noriko was friendly, helpful and very accommodating; had a great stay, we couldn't have asked for more!

An amazing stay!

I can't say enough about how much staying in Noriko's apartment added to my Amsterdam experience. Being a Travel Agent I quite often have the opportunity to stay in 5* hotels when traveling. My first thought when leaving was thank god I rented the apartment from Noriko instead! The apartment was very clean and so awesome. The pictures if anything are not doing it justice. French balconies on every floor, comfortable bed, and WIFI throughout. I could not have asked for a better location. 2 minutes from the subway, 5 minutes to the Red Light District, and 5 minutes to the Rembrandt Museum. Everything Amsterdam has to offer is easily assessable from the apartment.

Location, quality, and cleanliness where absolutely there. Only thing that made it even better was Noriko. I met Noriko early in the morning (8am). I would have thought she would show me around the apartment and off she'd go.. But no! Noriko offered to take me to breakfast, brought her Ipad with her and gave me a full orientation of where I am and where I need to visit before leaving Amsterdam. The day I left Noriko had left me a very nice note and a small gift.

I am currently organizing another trip to go back in just a couple of months!

I cannot say enough about how great everything was. Especially for how much less than a hotel would have cost.

Thank you Noriko!!

The experience was great! Noriko helped us to find a parking spot in the city, offered us a bottle of wine, tea, coffe, etc...
She gave us some tips for the city and a small present for the girls! Thanks!
Wonderful apartment in a great location and a lovely host, highly recommended.

We spend the perfect time in the flat of Noriko. From the first moment we felt like you're at home. Noriko was very friendly also during the booking process.
The flat is well situated. You can reach all important places in the Center of Amsterdam by walk. Central Station 10mins, Rembrandtplein 15mins, ShoppingStreet 10mins etc. etc.
One highlight of the flat is definitely the roof top.
The next time I'm in Amsterdam I def. will choose Norikos place again.
The reservation was canceled 53 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

I had great communication with Edwin throughout the stay; he let us drop our bags off early and was very accommodating, also providing recommendations and help with trams/metros. His guesthouse is extremely central as everything was on our doorstep. A really nice and enjoyable stay in Amsterdam!
Just a note, it is on a busy street, but once the window is closed, most of the noise is drowned out and especially with earplugs.
Overall I would definitely stay here again.
Muy simpático y amable, me ayudó en todo
Edwin was an amazing host! The room is spacious and right in the centre, making everything within walking distance. The room and bathroom were clean and private, as well. 5/5 stay!

Edwin is a very nice person and a great host - we had a lovely time in Amsterdam and are thankful that we were able to stay at this very cozy apartment at an amazing location. Can definitely recomend - cheerio :)
The location is perfect and easy to find. The room is very beautiful and cozy into a typical Amsterdam building. The owner is very kind.

Charlie's flat was the perfect base for our recent stay in Amsterdam. It's in a great location with easy access to the city centre, tram and shops. Charlie made us feel really welcome and was happy to assist with any questions we had.

Fantastisk hyggeligt ophold. Centralt beliggende værelse så nemt at kunne gå fra og til. Der var det plads vi skulle bruge. To senge og et badeværelse. Hurtigt svar fra Edwin ved spørgsmål inden opholdet.
Edwin's apartment is well located right in the middle of everything in the city center. Our room was super comfortable and nicely decorated. Thank you for a nice stay, Edwin.

First time in Amsterdam and we had a great stay in Charlie's apartment. It is very well located, in a nice area and still close to the center, museums, etc.
Charlie also gave us good tips (restaurants, cafés, etc) which made our stay even better :)

The flat is lovely, very well located. You get even more than you expect regarding the picture. There is a little balcony which is very charming. Charlie is considerate and so friendly and you can easily join her if necessary.

You will share the flat with her cat Coco who is nice.

So, if you're not afraid of cats, Charlie & Coco appartement is definitely the right choice.

Enjoy amsterdam !

Charlie's apartment was perfect!
In a great neighborhood, with an adorable cat to keep us company =)))

Charlie was available for all we needed, and provided for a wonderful stay in Amsterdam.

Would definitely stay with her again =))

Thank you!

This flat is an absolute dream to stay in. The most centrally located that you could imagine, and yet 2 short blocks away from the nearest loud and busy parts... So it's quite nice.  Everything you would need while traveling is in the flat. Honestly, I travel more than any of my friends, and this was the BEST flat that I have EVER rented!  Thank you so much!
Edwin is a great host! The house is cute and clean and in a great location! Gonna book again

Very nice flat, accommodated us 3 very easily,  and excellent location. The rooftop is ideal, especially in the summer time. Noriko and her hosts were brilliant,  would definitely recommend this flat.

Noriko's apt was the prefect apartment for us. The apartment was spacious for 3 people, with a nice bathtub that always had hot water, a highly equipped kitchen and a nice heating all over the house. The location of the apartment is great, it's about 7 minutes walk from the Dam square, 3 minute walk from the red light district, 3 minutes away from some nice coffeeshops, bars and a supermarket that has everything you need to cook some delicious food in Noriko's kitchen.
We loved our stay at Noriko's place and we will definitely come again!
Great place, great location, great privacy. Just be careful with the steps and don't bring too large of luggage. Definitely recommend it to anyone.

The place was very great, Noriko wasn't here, but her friends give us a very nice welcome.

I can only recommand this apt !

Everything was perfect! Noriko has accpeted my request 6 days before our arrival. No problem with Marja to get the keys.
Appartment clean and quiet, 10min walk from central station, and there is everything you need!
Highly recommend !!!

Tout s'est très bien passé, on a adoré notre séjour la bas. L'appart est situé en plein centre a 10min de la gare, dans un quartier calme.
Très bonne communication avec Noriko, et aussi avec Marja pour récupérer les clés à notre arrivée. Bref, je recommande, et j'y retournerai ! ;)

Noriko's appartment is perfectly located on a quiet street, you can walk everywhere!
We had everything we needed, it wa sclean and very comfortable for the 3 of us.
Her friends, Jacob and Marja were very nice and helpful and we didn't have any problems collecting or giving the keys back.
We recommend Noriko's place to anybody looking for a place to have a relaxed holiday in Amsterdam!
Thank you!

I love Noriko's apartment, it was the ideal apartment for the 3 of us. It has everything you need and is located in a great location. So, if you're looking for a great apartment, this is the one for you.

Location: Perfect. Right in the centre.
Apartment: Cozy, clean and even with a roof terrace : )
Noriko & Friends: Very kind and helpful
Amsterdam <3

Great experience!
Noriko was very kind when we got there and also gave us contact info of here neighbor which was very helpful (thank you very much Gerard!).
The apt is beautiful (especially the view from the roof) and in a very good location!
We were 4 people and there was no problem, both beds were comfortable.

I highly recommend Noriko's place!
Thank you :)
Shira & friends

Noriko's apt was very nice located in the center of Amsterdam but in a surprisingly quiet neighborhood. Just the perfect place to stay for a week end. The flat had everything what we needed and it big enough for all four of us. We loved it! Specially the roof terrace! When you visit Amsterdam you should absolutely rent this flat. Thanks a lot! Greetings from switzerland.

The apartment si very nice, clean, spaceful and excellent located.
The view from the roof is beautiful, it's awesome to have breakfast there!
The kitchen has everything you need.
Noriko is very kind! :)
Very raccomanded!!
Great Location . nice safe area . The flat had everything what we needed including a ipad . Very close to transport links . Overall ten out of ten.  i recommend Noriko's place.

Noriko's apartment is close to the Nieuwmarkt, but it isn't noisy.
The cozy apartment has also a nice view from the terrace! Noriko is really friendly, so everything was fine and maybe we'll book this apartment for another time! :)

I loved Noriko's apartment. It was exactly like in the pictures. Everything was very clean upon arrival and everything was well explained by her friendly neighbor. Noriko also took her time to inform us when the market was open. The neighborhood was nice and quiet and most importanlty the apartment was minutes away from various destinations. A super-market and an ATM machine are just minutes from the apartment. I highly recommend this apartment for the location, experience and hospitality.

Excellent apartment. Easy to deal with and great location. Would recommend to all.
I am fussy and cannot fault this apartment. Would stay here again in a flash.
Thank you Noriko and Jacob for being honest and generous.

Sehr zentrale Wohnung in Amsterdam. Absolut ruhige Lage nur wenige Gehminuten vom Geschehen. Somit absolut perfekt. Auch ein Bierchen auf der Dachterrasse haben wir genossen.
Wir waren zu 3 und haben sehr Komfortabel geschlafen. Die Schlafcouch war viel bequemer als Sie aussah.
Wir würden sofort wieder kommen:-)
Vielen Dakn

Great flat with a perfect l'outil in the center of Amsterdam. The roof top is very nice.

Schönes und sauberes Appartment, genau so wie auf den Bildern angegeben. Wir haben uns sofort wohl gefühlt. Noriko haben wir leider nicht getroffen aber ihr Bekannter Jakob der in der gleichen Strasse wohnt, hat uns alles gezeigt. Wir waren zu zweit und würden jederzeit wiederkommen.

Norika was very accomodating, provided transit and tour information and welcomed with a beverage & tour.  Apartment is nice, very convenient location, close to metro, but walking distance to almost everything.  All the conveniences one needs for a nice trip.  Truly enjoyed this Amsterdam experience.

We had a really great time at Charlie's home.
The neighbourhood is nice and the apartment is well located.
Charlie was truly helpful. We would go there again and again.
Thanks a lot

We had a great stay at Charlies apartment. It's a very nice neighborhood with lots of good restaurants and a supermarket nearby.
Charlie was available for all the questions we had!

The apartment is cute, perfectly located and very comfortable. Connection with main city attractions is also very good. In sum, perfect for exploring Amsterdam like a local.
Thank you Charlie!

Charlie is friendly and helpful and her apartment is great. It's well located near public transport, restaurants and cafés and is quiet. Although there is only one bedroom, it was very comfortable for two couples with a good pull out couch. Coco, the cat, has great character and is good company.

We'd go back again and would recommend it.

Chalie's house is great! Perfectly comfortable for 4 with a great livingroom. The best of the best the balcony facing the garden!. The neighbourhood really nice but a little bit more away than expected.
Loved staying at Charlie's!  Great neighborhood and cute apartment that allowed for a fresh view into real Amsterdam.  Thanks again!

Very nice appartment, really resembles the photos a lot. Everything tidy, there's a grocery store just a couple of houses away. The tram station also is reachable in 2minutes and brings you directly downtown to Rembrandtplein, Dam and Central Station. The only thing that could lower the level of comfort is Coco, the little cat, that has to be approached with some caution for unexperienced guests ;-)

All in all, four star stay for relatively low cost! Thanks, Charlie!

Very nice apartment in superb location. Very colorful place, lots of charm, felt at home right away. Very residential, local and convenient are to stay in, away from tourists!
Very steep stairs to get up to the apartment, so for any one who has some walking/climbing issues just keep that in mind.
Easy contact with Charlie. Would stay here again!

We booked Charlie’s Apartment for 4 people and stayed 5 days. Each room is very stylish and can easily fit for 4 people! Except for the bathroom or the bedroom:) Everything was tidy and clean when we arrived.

The apartment is located next to a big shop to buy all your things you need, coffee shops and great other stuff all along the main street next to the street where the apartment is located. You can easily get in the center by taking the tram which is only a 2 min walk from the flat.

All in all we had a great time in her apartment and would like to come back once again! The only pity was that the rear balcony has been renovated and Coco can be a moody cat.

Charlie was really good at informing us before and during the stay even though she was busy with her store so we did not met her. We felt welcome and the description matched the reality. The neighbourhood was nice and calm with a lot of small stores and we felt very safe during our stay. We had some problems with the cat in the beginning but ind the end we became close friends ! (most of the time :) ) unfortunately we dont have the same cleaning standard, and we are only used to have the cat and its hair outside of our house. we would not recommend it to people who dont have any experiences with cats, but despite that we had a lovely stay in the apartment.
the apartment was very nice. there was information about the city in the rooms.

Staying at Charlie & Coco's apartment was a wonderful time.
A very good location close to tram and supermarket. The place is lovely with a very good decoration. I liked the fact that the bathroom was renovated apart from the others rooms. It felt very clean.

Coco was a bit nervous meeting us but the day after he was very nice !

In short : Great location, Great place, go for it !
Can't recommend Edwin's place enough. From the location to the comfort - Edwin being super responsive and helpful takes it to easily the best experience you can get in the city.

Charlie was very uncomlicated and everything went perfectly well.. the apartment is a great place to stay at with everything you could possibly need just around the corner :)
I would defenitley recommend staying here!

I definitely love my staying at Charlie's place. The location is great, there is a supermarket behind the corner and the flat is so cozy!
I enjoyed a lot staying there with my family, there was a intimate atmosphere. Everything was clean and we had the pleasure to meet Coco the cat. She is really indipendent and sometimes defensive but we got to know each other! This was a really good experience, and I would definitely recommend Charlie's place to any friend !

Great thanks to Charlie for excellent hospitality.
Our flight time was changed and Charlie took us one day earlier without any questions.
She gave us very detailed route directions, that helped us to reach the apartment easily.
The apartment is part of the classic Dutch house. Which located in the very quite area of the city.
A walk to the Dam square in 20-30 mins or 10-15 mins by tram.
You need 3 mins to reach the supermarket, cafe or bar.
Charlie's apartment is very convenient for living. The kitchen has everything you need, and a large dining room helps to the comfort eating. Soft and king size bed in the bedroom helps to sleep well. Living room well suited for rest with your friends after long day in the city.
Should be noted, that bathroom was renovated in the modern style and has everything needed, as and whole apartment.
Coco is well-mannered cat. She needs one or two days to accept you. After one week Coco became our best friend :)
I'll recomend Carlie's apartment for all my friends and will hope to stay here one more time.

Great thanks to Charlie, she made our holidays much better.
It was a very satisfying experience! Comfy beds, great location and a very friendly host that greeted us with food and drink upon our late arrival.
Noriko was extremelly kind in providing tips of cultural activities and made us feel very welcome.

Noriko was a great hostess! Very considerate and willing to work to meet our scheduling needs. The apartment was nice (lots of stairs!). The location of the apartment was awesome! Just two short blocks from the town center.

Séjour impeccable.
Noriko est très simpatique et très disponible.
L'appartement est bien situé (5min du red light district, 10min de la gare, 10min de la place DAM).
C'est un appartement vraiment typique d'Amsterdam, il y a tout ce dont on a besoin et la terrasse c'est vraiment le petit plus pour les jours de beau temps.
Appartement très accueillant, où on se sent bien.
The apparent was great. Central location. The only downside was the tv not working.
The Place was really comfy. Very central. The Contact with Noriko worked Perfect, even if we didn't met her. We had a amazing Time there. For Lovers or/and Friends a good Place to stay.
we spend beautiful days in Amsterdam and apartment it was perfect!, perfectly located!
Really Really nice apartment! Charlie and Coco (the Cat) were both great!

We really enjoyed our time in Amsterdam and in Charlies apartement.
It is located in a nice neighbourhood surrounded with beautiful boutiques, shops, cafés, restaurants and bars. And there is a supermarket nearby (1 minute to walk).
Charlie is a nice person and very helpul. Everything went straightforward. The flat was big enough for three people plus one cat ; )
Coco was a little bit wary in the beginning but after a few hours we became friends : ) I think she only wanted to play now and then.

Recommendable !
That was without a doubt our best stay in Amsterdam so far! Thanks for your kindness and hope to stay with you again soon!

Vi havde nogle dejlige dage i en rigtig hyggelig og rummelig lejlighed.
Kvarteret er alletiders og ligger i fin gå afstand til centrum og Amsterdams attraktioner.
Vi nåede aldrig at blive bedste venner med katten Coco, men hun var en harmløs størrelse og et sjovt indslag på vores ferie :-)
Mine varmeste anbefalinger til Charlies dejlige sted.

Charlie was a very welcoming host, who guided us before our arrival as well. The house was in a very nice and quite neighbourhood of Amsterdam, with the tram to the centre of the city just a few metres away. The house is fully equipped and you get to have a feel of how the locals live in Amsterdam. The grocery shop with all the essentials (even for guests with babies) is just around the corner.
Inside the house, the sofa-cum-bed actually becomes a proper bed and is quite comfortable, so 4 adults can stay here without any issues. In all, this could be very nice base for all the adventures of Amsterdam..

The house was ok and it was like the description on the site; coco the cat was very nice and friendly and she was easy to manage..the kitchen has all the things ready to use, although we haven't use it! We have not meet the host but we have communicate with her by phone. Amsterdam was great, the public transport is very near to the apartment.

Wir hatten in dieser tollen Wohnung für fünf Tage ein wunderbares Zuhause und mit der Katze Coco sogar noch eine kleine, verspielte Mitbewohnerin. Übergabe hat super geklappt und alles war sehr unkompliziert und sympathisch.
Die Wohnung ist zudem super gelegen, in einem lebendigen zentru (Hidden by Airbnb) ahen Quartier mit vielen netten Kneipen. Unbedingt Fahrräder mieten; vor dem Hauseingang sind immer ein paar «Parkplätze» frei.

Beautiful flat, in my favorite area in Amsterdam. Charlie was a very nice and helpful host (many thanks!). Coco the cat was a bit schizo, sometimes very nice, sometimes a bit crazy ;-), but a friendly cat anyway. Great place, great host, great city.

Staying in Charlie & Coco's Apartment has added a really good impression for total impression of Amsterdam. Location is good - close to tram station, all necessary stuff is available - kitchen things, hair dryer, etc. Supermarket is less than 1 minute walking.
Nice and comfortable place to stay for lettle company of friends!

L'appartement de Charlie et Coco est agréable et cosy. Il est bien situé dans un quartier commerçant et proche du centre d'Amsterdam que l'on peut  rejoindre facilement à pied ou par le tram. Amsterdam est une ville très agréable surtout lorsque l'on s'éloigne des quartiers très touristique près de la gare.  Avec des enfants la visite du zoo est particulièrement appréciée. La cohabitation avec  Coco s'est fort bien passée.

Charlie's apartment is absolutely lovely, it felt like home away from home with everything you could ever need within the apartment. I didn't meet Charlie but she made sure she checked in with us to see if we had settled in OK which I thought was rather kind.

The neighbourhood is a not super close to central but I preferred it this way as it made you go out and explore more. De Pijp is quirky and cool with loads of really nice places to eat and drink. Plus if you hire a bike then it's easy to get anywhere in Amsterdam in quick time. You should also check out Charlie's boutique too if you're into ethical and fair-trade fashion!

I would not hesitate in staying here again, in fact I hope to come back in August if Charlie will let me! Coco the cat is a little cutie too, although she is quite territorial about the main table in the middle room. That appears to be here favourite area of the house! She is well trained and goes outside to use the litter tray etc etc.

Overall, a fantastic stay and I can't wait to come back!

Nriko's apartment is wonderfully located in the center of Amsterdam. She keeps the place very clean and well organised, with nice personal touches here and there to make it feel like home, I really appreciate all.

On reception, she made sure I had everything I needed to have and know before leaving me to enjoy the space.

We have some problem with the departure and She also was very nice helping us to stay more and getting more pleasure of city.

I wouldn't hesitate to stay here the next time I am in Amsterdam.

My boyfriend and I stayed at Noriko's apartment for 4 nights as we visited Amsterdam for my birthday.
What can I say - an absolutely amazing stay in a beautiful apartment that we really didn't want to leave!
The location was perfect. 5 minutes from the centre of Dam and all the cafés, and the area was so quiet and peaceful which made for a very relaxing sleep at night.
Noriko was a lovely host who was helpful every step of the way and we arrived to find flowers and bubbly - an unexpected and personal birthday treat. Wonderful.
There's lots of stairs in this apartment so you need some energy but it's so worth it and there's a lovely roof terrace too.
Comfy huge bed and large bathroom with power shower.
Plenty of means to play music and cook lots of good food.
Noriko's neighbour Jacob who lives just down the road greeted us on our arrival and was extremely helpful and kind and answered lots of our questions. He was fantastic.
Will be staying again for definite!
Appartement agréable à vivre idéalement situé en centre ville dans un quartier calme à proximité de la gare. Cette situation idéale conviendra parfaitement aux adeptes du tourisme urbain.
The apartment was just as described. We found it in a perfect condition and we had a great time in Amsterdam. I highly recommend staying in Norikos apartment!
Parfaitement conforme à la description, comme l'an passé. Noriko nous a reçu avec le sourire et un café, je n'en doutais pas.

My friend and I stayed in Noriko's place for 3 nights and we really enjoyed our stay! Noriko's apartment is amazing and the rooftop deck is great place to relax. However, the best part about the apartment is the location! Everything we wanted to see was well within walking distance.

We weren't able to meet Noriko in person but her instructions were very detailed and made managing everything within the apartment extremely easy. I would highly recommend this apartment to anyone who has the opportunity to stay in Amsterdam!
The apartment was very cosy and comfortable just as I remembered it last time. Two very enjoyable stays!
Great apartment and location! Would recommend staying at her place. We were able to walk or take a short tram/metro ride to everything we wanted to do in Amsterdam.

L'appartamento di Noriko è gradevole e in posizione perfetta, a pochi passi ci sono tutti i servizi importanti e soprattutto  si è nel meraviglioso centro città.  Noriko è un Host premurosa e - anke se fuori città - si è sempre dimostrata disponibile  alle nostre esigenze. La casa è esattamente come descritta es ha una terrazza splendida sa cui si gode una magnifica vista dei canali!!! Soggiorno gradevole!!

Une amie de Noriko nous a accueillie avec un grand sourire, nous faisant découvrir un appartement spacieux, lumineux et agréable.
Idéalement situé en centre ville, à deux pas de Nieuwmark, l'appartement est en centre ville mais échappe à l'effervescence du quartier rouge bondé. Un petit coin de paradis calme et idéal pour découvrir la ville.
A perfect Dutch vacation and Noriko's house is the starring of our family movie. We're talking about a very nice appartment, clean and well equipped. The roof garden is really the icing on the cake.
We had wonderful time in Noriko's place. Amaizing location! Amaizing host! Amaizing Amsterdam style apartment! Apartment has really evrything you need!

We really loved our week in Norikos house. The house is just how she describes in AirB&B, beutiful houseright in the center of Ámsterdam. We will definetely come back and I highly recommend Norikos house, you just feel at home.

Wonderfull home , great loction ! Alot of staris jajaja , but all amsterdam it like that.
Thanks !!
Noriko was great, fast answers, very nice and helpful. Will come again soon!
Very comfortable and central appartment. Clean! Everything what you Need for Amsterdam! Next time Amsterdam  - same place! ;)

Noriko's apartment was probably one of the best desicions we made during our trip. Jacob, Noriko's neighboor who gave us the keys was very nice, and the housekeeper too. The apartment is well located, so we could walk by foot almost everywhere. It should be noted that there's a relatively steep stairway inside the apartment, so it may be a problem for some people.

Better than what you can expect.
The location is a 11/10. It's next to clubs, bars, stores, foodplaces, its basically at the heart of Amsterdam.
The room itself is spacious, clean and comfortable.
The host, as written, deserving the title of a Superhost.
Nothing you could complain about.
Great location, very clean & lovely host!
C’était un séjour parfait, le quartier est super. L’emplacement est idéal et proche de tout à Amsterdam ! Je recommande vivement de venir chez Edwin :)

Not a long ago I stood at Downtown Guesthouse in Amsterdam.
It was really wonderful to stay right in the center of the old city.
Sint Jorisstraat leads near the Flower Market and Kenigsplein.
The host is a very nice, open minded person. You have no any problems with the arrival – he is also helpful with everything you need staying as the guest. The "single room" is a small, nice and quite room. The street has the special nice atmosphere typical for the old town. If you want to spend really nice time visiting museums, walking on the streets looking at the canals you could not choose the best place. In the future ff i will visit Amsterdam I would like stay as a guest at Downtown Guesthouse (Website hidden by Airbnb)

Upsides:
spacious & light filled rooms
very well stocked kitchen
nicely decorated place
clean and not cluttered
comfortable bed and bedding
access to a well sized roof area with a wonderful view
located in the center of Amsterdam
yet in a quiet and beautiful area

Ideal for:
a young couple
group of friends up to 3 persons
someone who doesn't mind going up 3 stories of steep steps

Noriko was an excellent host. Communication went smoothly. The apartment is in the absolute best location in Amsterdam with walking distance to nearly everything and great markets and restaurants at your door step. The stairs would be tough for an older couple, but for me was fine and it's common in Amsterdam. The apartment was spacious and had some great views. I had a great time.

Excellent experience from start to finish! Well priced, spacious, quiet apartment. Everything was exactly as detailed in the listing and the place is even bigger than it appears in the pictures. Had beautiful weather so the rooftop patio was amazing! You can't go wrong with this place. Fast wifi and great communication from Noriko!

My boyfriend and I stayed at Noriko's apartment. It is in a great location, right in the center of the city.
It's is a beautiful apartment. It has a rooftop where you can see the city while you have dinner or hangout.
The apartment has a lot of stairs (like almost everything is Amsterdam). To go to the room you have to go up 4 floors, so if you have a leg or knee problem you would have to think about it.
For me and my boyfriend was totally fine!
It's very close to the Rembrandt house and a lot of local fairs.
We loved it!
Everything went smoothly. Host was efficient and the space was as advertised and of great value. Great location and great trip in general. Would definitely recommend.

The apartment is great, much better than the pictures. Communication with Noriko was fast and quick, she provided all the necessary details. A friend of hers gave me keys to the apartment and showed me inside. Fantastic experience overall.

Central location and great experience. A piece of advice though: pay attention to the noise warning by the neighbors as noise travels much easier than you'd think. Be ready to get used to stairs, theres a lot of em!

Noriko was a great host always checking on us if we need anything. Jacob her assistant was nice as well when we met for the keys to the apartment. Her place is spacious and has everything you need and more. Also it is very close to everything!!! I would highly recommend this place to anyone and would rent again!
Nice apartment, very central.
The host canceled this reservation 80 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.
Excellent location. Near everything!
I recommend this place, it's close to everything and the rooftop is very nice!

Great house, very lovely, host was friendly and helpful. Highly reccomend, but don't expect to be able to be too social after 11pm as a neighbour will maybe start shushing you even with your doors and windows closed. That s something to likely expect in a residential area though so not a big deal =)

As described, a great location, only a few short blocks from the red light district and in the middle and walkable to everywhere in central Amsterdam, yet in a quiet side street. This place was in keeping either the style of the typical 17th century building in historic central Amsterdam; narrow building, with private narrow and fairly steep spiral type stairway. The apartment proper begins on the fourth floor with a living/dining area and a galley style kitchen. There is a futon that converts to a double bed in this room. The next floor contains the main bedroom and bathroom, and the staircase further leads up to a skylight hatch which is the access to a rooftop terrace. There is also a metro station about two blocks from e building.

Host was out of town so checkin and initial apartment walk through was handled by a close by neighbor.
The apartment is in central location, just near a metro station but in a very beautiful and silent street. It's a cozy place to stay in and it's well accessorized and clean.

This apartment was exactly as advertised. We’ll kept and very close to great restaurants and shops. The market in the square on the weekend was terrific as well which was a nice bonus. While there were quite a few stairs in the apartment we didn’t find it to be a problem at all. Nice cozy spot in a fantastic location. The host was fantastic and communicated everything we needed to know ahead of time. Directions were very easy from Central Station. While she wasn’t in town while we rented she had her friend meet us to let us in and pass along everything we required during our stay - thanks Jacob for all your help and making some great recommendations to local restaurants. Do not hesitate renting this (Website hidden by Airbnb) was great!
Noriko was a gracious, accommodating and unobtrusive host. I highly recommend her lovely, very central apartment to any visitors to Amsterdam.
This location is amazing!! The rooftop view is incredible! The place really felt like a home which made the stay so much more enjoyable! All the way class act!!!
Had a great stay. Very centrally located. Noriko was very helpful as were Ubit and Jacob. Will stay again.
Perfect location, beautiful view from the roof terrace, clean and cozy apartment, nice and helpful host :)
A charming place in a great location!

The location is great, everything is really near by (supermarkets, coffee shop, restaurants..)
The place was sparkling clean and well organized.
nice place
eine sehr ruhige Lage und doch gleich zentral an der Metrostation, Einkaufsmöglichkeiten und Geschäfte.

Norkio' s place is perfectly located - right in the centre yet in a very quiet street. The pictures don't do the place justice. Its much cosier and spacious than it looks. The rooftop is just the icing on the cake. I stayed 2 weeks and it felt like home. This is a rare find and a no brainer to book. Enjoy! 5 STARS all the way
Very central location and quite spacious - best part is the roof terrace with a nice view

We lived here May 11-22, 2019. Noriko is a very good and punctual hostess.  The apartment has an excellent location, even perfect. A supermarket, a train station, a metro station are nearby. The apartment is located very close to the red light district, but here it is very quiet and peaceful. You will have great sleeping :) mattress and pillows are nice and comfortable. The kitchen is equipped with everything necessary. Heating worked and was warm. There are really a lot of steps here, but for us it was not a problem. I recommend! *** Отличная квартира сочетает несочетаемое: центр, драйв, толпа - остаётся в пяти минутах ходьбы, а  здесь уютная тишина.  Супермаркет, метро и вокзал - рядом. Кухня оборудована всем необходимым; отопление работает. Матрац и подушки отличные (а я это ценю), мы отлично высыпались. Не подходит для гостей, если есть проблемы с ногами - много ступеней, квартира на нескольких уровнях  и не подойдёт любителям громко и весело погудеть ночью- это спальный район, очень строго с соблюдением тишины. Нам  все подошло и все понравилось, очень рады удачному выбору. Норико хорошая и пунктуальная хозяйка. Я рекомендую:) !
Great place; very well situated in the city; closed to services, restaurants and bars. And you can appreciate the sky and the rooftops, and enjoy the city.

Amazing location, right by the city centre but separated by a very peaceful canal so the street was very nice and quiet. Brilliant view from the rooftop. Plenty of space inside, just note that there are lots of steps. Everything you could want and more! ☺️ Would definitely stay again.

Noriko’s place is in a very convenient location close to the metro or just a short stroll to central station. Amazing value for such a big, cost apartment and amenities. Thank you Noriko for the local guides and tips too! 👍

Noriko is very welcoming, caring and understanding! She helped us out with a lot of things that happened to us during our stay. She was very responsive even before we arrived. On our arrival Noriko welcomed us, showed us around, explained to us how to dispoce garbage and so on. She arranged cleaning for us in the middle of our stay. That was very much appreciated!

The apartment itself is lovely! Perfect location - in the middle of downtown, but on a very quite street, surrounded by canals. We felt at home! This place is a gem, don’t miss your chance:)
The rooftop terrace was incredible, and the location was great as well. A really nice stay overall.
Loved Noriko's place. Charming place. 12 minute walk from Central Station. Very quiet at night (and really, quiet pretty much all the time). Would totally stay here again.
It is the second time I have stayed with Noriko. The apartment is very well located, and fulfilld all my necessities.
Noriko’s house is amazing! Great place in the center of Amsterdam

Although noriko wasn't there, she left someone very capable in Jacob,a very nice person, friendly and helpful, her place is great, and next to a great little coffeeshop, the solo,yes I would definitely recommend staying here,I found myself needing help a couple of times and Jacob was spot on and quick to respond, especially as on one occasion I lost the keys, very good about that

Great place, awesome location!
A really typical Amsterdam experience.
Super cool and nice place! Was really enjoyable! Gonna come back!
appartement très bien situer dans le centre, calme, proximité de tout, je recommande +++++

We had a wonderful time at Norikos place. It is so close to the city, but quiet. The roof terrace was a special highlight. Communicaton with Noriko and her friend Jakob, who let us in, was easy, friendly and uncomplicated. Thank you!

Noriko's place is located in the very heart of Amsterdam but just far enough away from the touristic areas to be nice and quiet. The apartment is large and very fairly priced for such an expensive city. Noriko was flexible, quick to respond and the whole experience was very smooth  – definite recommendation!
Beautiful apartment right in the city center! I surely can recommend Noriko! Great host!

Noriko’s apartment was amazing! It is so cosy and in the best location, everything is a short walk away. It was fully equipped and a lot bigger than the photos show, the rooftop terrace has a lovely view and perfect for your morning tea. Jakob was very friendly and showed us into the apartment and then Noriko greeted us after she finished work, the loveliest host you could ask for she was amazing! Overall a great place to stay and would stay here again :) Thanks Noriko!

Noriko is very welcoming and we enjoyed our stay at her place!
Nice flat, perfect location and very calm

We definitely recommend for a week end trip to Amsterdam

Noriko’s House is really beautiful and located in a central place. She is really kind and able to help you with everything.
Recommended!
Loved staying over at, Noriko's place. We would not hesitate to come back.
Great apartment, great location.

My partner and I had a lovely six day stay in Noriko's home.  The location is terrific, quiet but close to everything one needs for a longer stay including the metro and a great area for walking around.  Her home has so much character and was plenty of space for the two of us for a long stay.  The stairs could be a challenge for those with mobility issues but were fine for us.  The views from the roof, living room and bedroom were lovely.   We would stay here again if we could.

Notre séjour fût parfait et ce en grande partie grâce au magnifique appartement de Charlie.

Cet appartement traversant est lumineux et correspond tout à fait à la description ainsi qu'à l'image que je regarde aujourd'hui avec nostalgie. Silencieux, on y dort très bien.

Très bien situé, il conviendra tout particulièrement à ceux cherchent à découvrir un autre aspect de la magnifique Amsterdam. Le quartier, résidentiel tout en étant actif, regorge de petites échoppes et de restaurants savoureux.

Charlie est une hotêsse disponible, qui a su répondre à nos questions avec précision et bienveillance.

Mention spéciale n°1 pour Coco, l'espiègle petite chatte qui vous accueille toujours avec des calins.

Mention spéciale n°2 : De supers voisins, qui dès notre arrivée nous ont proposé leur aide et leurs conseils.

Merci Charlie!

Charlie's apartment was perfect. The decor, location, and neighborhood were all exactly what we wanted to see while in Amsterdam. Coco the cat was skeptical of us the first few days but quickly warmed up to us the day before we left. I really don't know what else to say...this place was great, and I can't wait to return to Amsterdam on my next vacation!

I really really enjoyed staying at Charlie's apartment. The cat is a bit shy at first but by the end of your time she will be friendly. The location is excellent, the house has a very special decor and an awesome vibe to it, walking distance to everything needed and great dinner table for long breakfasts (bought at the next door supermarket, very handy!). Will def. stay here next time I come to Amsterdam!!

We had a great time staying in Charlie's beautiful flat. Charlie was there to welcome us, and was SUPER understanding when we got on the wrong train from the airport and were late; she interrupted her dinner with a friend to come all the way back to let us in, and was incredibly nice about our idiocy.

We were two friends staying in the apartment, so used the very comfortable sofa bed in the living room as well as the bedroom. The flat was a tiny bit smaller than we thought from the pictures, but still easily big enough, and very comfortable; Charlie has a real eye for decor, and the sitting room is really bright and lovely.

The neighbourhood is great; we were really glad we stayed in De Pijp rather than Jordaan, as we loved the vibe and all the shops and cafés (especially the amazing wine bar, Glou Glou). We rented bikes nearby too, and were glad we braved them; it was fine once we set off, and an amazing way to see the whole city.
Edwin is fenomenal! The place is located in the center, and the room was perfect. Can't wait to go there again.

A very nice tiny apartment not very far from the city centre.
Actualy we haven't seen Charlie, but everything was nice. The apartment was enough for three of us, nice that all the doors can be closed (so, the one who sleeps on the sofa has his own room).
The apartment is well equipped, you can find everything you need. The cat is a bit nervous, but gets used to all new guests soon.I usually allergic to cats, but in this case everything was fine.
A great place in a very nice en central area in Amsterdam. We haven't met Charlie but the key pickup was easy. Overall a very pleasant stay.

Charlie was very helpful in getting us ready for our stay and remaining in contact. She answered all of our questions and provided lots of information and suggestions for our stay. Her apartment is lovely and very unique!

Charlie's place was welcoming, warming, and absolutely perfect for a weekend stay in the city. Easily accessible to the metro system, great restaurants in the area, and a gorgeous apartment. Coco (the cat) is a bit grumpy and will scratch if you approach abruptly, so be careful when first meeting! Otherwise a fabulous stay.

Great location, room was very clean and even smelled good.
There are lots of restaurants in the area, and it can be a bit loud
at night but who goes to Amsterdam to get sleep??????
Edwin was quick to respond to my emails and I will definately stay here the next time I am in Amsterdam.

Such fantastic hosts, and a perfect place to stay in Amsterdam! The accommodation is really homely, while also giving you lots of privacy- Such a nice change from the sterile hotel rooms I usually stay in! Edwin puts lots of energy into keeping it clean and comfortable, and is always such a delight to bump into. I couldn’t say 1 bad thing about these fabulous hosts and their beautiful home. Thanks so much for having me!
Edwin is lovely, and the room was great! 5*!

Really enjoyed the stay with Coco the cat. The apartment was lovely, really nicely decorated and a good space to relax and cook in the evenings. Location was really good too as you can walk into town easily. Thanks Charlie and Coco!

The neighborhood was really nice,  there was a supermarket next to the appartment and access to main tram stations close-by. The apartment was very charming and Charlie had prepared route information waiting for us there. Coco the cat was also pretty friendly.
Very nice and stylsih appartment in the heart of the hipster district De Pijp. Very family friendly and a nice balcony.  Very recommendable!

Our host gave us an information sheet on the apartment, which helps.
The appartment corresponds to photos. And it's very well located. Beautiful area.

Charlie's apartment was a dream to stay in for an Amsterdam getaway! Beautifully designed, welcoming and located in a great, hip neighborhood. Coco the cat is feisty and fun. The place really did feel like a home away from home.
A very good experience at all levels !

Amsterdam a gelmeden önce Charlie bize gerekli bilgileri verdi.Havalimanina geldigimizde kendisiyle kolayca iletisim kurabildik ve evi rahatça bulduk.Kendisi bizi evde karsiladi, hem evle hem de Amsterdam ile ilgili bilgiler verdi..Coco ilk basta biraz gergindi ama sonradan alisiyor , korkmaya gerek yok:) Cok guzel 5 gunluk bir deneyim oldu..Thank you Charlie , you are great host:) see you next time

Charlie was a great host. Even though she wasn't in the Netherlands during our visit, she helped us when we had problems. We were able to reach her easily. Her apartment is a cute one. It was very comfortable. Location is great too, with using the tram, we were able to reach wherever we wanted. I also want to mention Coco, the lovely cat. It was fun staying with her. However, her hair is everywhere. It didn't create much problem for us, but it is something important to consider.

Ottima esperienza!! Abbiamo soggiornato in 4 per cinque giorni e siamo stati benissimo! L'appartamento è come lo si vede dalle foto, piccolino ma confortevole.. La posizione è strategica: fermata del tram vicina, supermercato a due passi, rent a bike pure! Inoltre il quartiere è uno dei più belli di Amsterdam! Charlie durante il nostro soggiorno era fuori per lavoro ma è sempre stata disponibile telefonicamente! Ci sono stati alcuni problemi con la consegna delle chiavi il primo giorno, ma ha risolto tutto in un paio d'ore. Coco è una coinquilina formidabile, un po' diffidente inizialmente, ma poi una simpatica compagna di viaggio:) Consigliatissimo!

This is a lovely, very stylish & light flat in a great location.  Nice neighbourhood & quiet street,  with really fine shops, cafes and restaurants just a few minutes walk away and very close to the museum quarter.  Charlie was really friendly and quick to help out with anything.  The only issue we found was that Coco the cat didn't really take to us over the weekend, she scratched and was very unpredictable and I would be hesitant if you have small children.  You might have better luck than us though.
Beautiful place with a perfect location. Impeccably clean.
Charlie est une hôte très accueillante et son appartement est très confortable et facile d'accès. Je recommande cette réservation !
Great apartment, good location... don't think Coco was our number 1 fan so if you have young children I wouldn't recommend

Charlie's place is amazing! True to pictures and located in a beautiful neighborhood.

Things to note though, the stairs to her house is steep! So if you have mobility difficulties or large luggages, this would a big problem. We were struggling to go up! Another thing is that the cat Coco, scratches and is a little feisty. So don't be alarmed if she doesn't take to you too well. Other than cat hair/odours in certain parts of the house, Charlie's home is a dream. If you're used to being around cats, this wouldn't be a problem. There are great places to eat round the corner and the grocery store is only 5 minutes away. Central area is only 15 minutes away by tram.

We would love to be back here again!
Charlie's place was amazing. Clean in a quiet neighborhood. Very well located. Coco was slow to warm up but ended up being a very friendly cat. Would highly recommend

Our stay at Charlies place was really really nice. Everything was as expected and depicted in the pictures. The area is really nice and quite close to the famous Albert Cuyp market, as well as several bars and restaurants. The only thing to mention is that in my eyes the flat is a little bit too small for 4 persons, but if you stay there with less people or don´ t mind sleeping on a mattress on the floor I think its really a perfect place to stay in Amsterdam.

Charlie's place was super cute! And it was also in a great location. Check in was very easy, as Charlie let us know everything before we arrived. The place was very comfortable and had everything we needed. Coco was a bit cranky and snappy. Be careful - she scratches.
The host canceled this reservation 13 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Les plus de l'appartement: à 2 min du tram 4 qui va au centre ville en 8 stations. L'appartement est bien équipé. Il est loin du brouhaha du centre d'Amsterdam et jouit de toutes les commodités à proximité.
Les moins: Pour récupérer les clés il a fallu se rendre au magasin de Charlie qui se situe à plus d'un kilomètre de l'appartement. Charlie a un chat très agressif sachant que nous avons l'habitude des chats, celui-ci est dérangé par la présence des étrangers, ce qui est normal dans la mesure où nous empiétons sur ton territoire. Aussi il lui arrive de griffer si on s'approche de lui.

!!!!What a wonderful apartment and a wonderful host!!!!! I couldn't have wished for a better experience. Wow!! the description does the place an injustice. This room is wonderfully decorated and in a wonderful location about 20mins tram ride into centrum. You are however, very close to Vondelpark and a fair few local cafes. Do not be put off by the tram ride into centraal, not only is it easy but it also gives you the sense of coming home. Did I mention the room is lovely? well it is. It has a balcony with a table and 2 chairs for you to have breakfast or just sit and read a book. Wireless Internet access is provided and works well.

The host is a wonderful lady who was kind enough to show us around town. If you are also lucky you may get to meet her partner who is a a charming dude :-)

Put simply; A wonderful room hosted by 2 wonderfully people!!
Great location right in the center of Amsterdam. Edwin is very friendly and accomodating and keeps the place clean.

Had the perfect 2 nights staying at Edwin's place in the vibrant centre of Amsterdam, walking distance to all museums and attractions, the place is full of charm and charachter, if you're concernrd about night noise, a set of earplugs will solve the problem! will definitly stay there again in my next visit.

I loved this place. I stayed at a few different places during my trip, and the location here is pretty ideal. Transportation is great, but it is central enough that you can walk to most places you would want without trouble, and it is enough out of the heart of the city to be a little more sane. The room is great, and Edwin is an excellent host. I will definitely think about returning here in the future.

Edwin is a charming host. He's very helpful and fun. And a neat-freak, which is great--who doesn't enjoy fresh towels, clean floors and fresh flowers in the entrance? The location was perfect for me as it was a five minute walk from where I needed to go every day throughout my week long stay. I would also warn others, however, that the neighborhood is indeed lively (and therefore quite noisy) at night. I slept fine, and was very cozy.

Edwin offers a comfortable room in a historic house in an incredible location. Having stayed in several guest rooms in Amsterdam, I can say that Edwin's was spacious for the city, and it was fun to stay in a home dating back to the 1600s.

The Reguliers area is vibrant, with a nice mix of clubs and restaurants, yet just far enough away from Central Station to avoid the crassest tourist traps. But, with a less-than-five-minute walk to Dam Square, Edwin's house is still in the heart of the city.

Edwin was extremely accommodating, offering detailed directions to the home and having the room and towels ready and waiting when I arrived. He was also there to greet me and offer some helpful tips, but didn't impose. I enjoyed full privacy during my stay.

In short, Edwin is a competent, trustworthy, and welcoming host with a great private room, and I'd be glad to stay again.
Excellent location and very friendly host! Recommended.

Edwin´s house from the 16. century is nicely located right next to the city center. The major sights should be within walking distance, altough I must admit I was on business in the city and can´t say to much about the touristic aspects. Edwin is a very friendly and helpful host, and the price for his room is very good. The room itself was clean and even had a Flat-TV with a nice DVD collection. One should know that you share the bathroom with other guests who can book a second room in the house. The room I rent could fit two persons, but if you have a lot of luggage, it would be to small. The biggest problem I think is the noise: The street under the window is very lively at night, but the windows and walls can´t keep that noise out. If you are in the city for partying, the room is perfect, but if you seek some sleep, you´ll probably want to book another room.

the place is a hot spot to enjoy night life in Amsterdam. and Edwin was very cheerful and nice person. even though it was kind a noisy untill the last night but to enjoy real Amsterdam, It is a perfect place.

I had a wonderful time staying at Edwin's while in Amsterdam. After I booked initially, there was a double-booking situation and Edwin quickly took care of it and offered me the spare room at an attractive rate. And it was perfect for my needs. The location is unbelievable. It's right in the center of the city without being too obnoxious or touristy. I will definitely visit again on my next trip to Amsterdam.

Also, I got into a little bit of a bike wreck while in town and Edwin took great care to get me the information that I needed regarding urgent care facilities. Great host!
Edwin was great, nice friendly & chilled guy with a great place in a good area, highly freccomended!

Edwin was very welcoming, extremely helpful and a great host. The room was really cosy and it only enhanced my awesome New Year experience. Next time I'm in Amsterdam, I'd love to get the same room again!

It was exactly what I needed. Good location, friendly host, even some nespresso in the morning.
I managed to see the entire city and had real fun despite on the rain.

Didn't get to say goodbye so let me take this way to say THANK YOU to Edwin! He has been a fantastic host. He went out of his way to make my stay cozy and memorable. The room was wonderful, I hardly wanted to leave the bed in the mornings. I had plenty of space for all my stuff and the whole flat is decorated in a very unique stylish way. The apartment is set right in the centre of everything, it's perfect. Edwin made sure I had everything and really took great care of everything. I can only recommend staying with him and would love to come back.

The room is very comfortable and is perfectly located within close proximity to shops, attractions and there's a tram station at the end of the street. A couple of considerations though, there's is a steep narrow staircase to climb to get to the room, so a bit tricky with large luggage. Also, the house is located in a popular cafe street, so if staying over weekends, it can get a little loud at night so bring ear plugs. Otherwise. I had a great stay, and Edwin the host is really helpful and nice as well. Orann

Very lively neighbourhood and cozy place to stay. Just like the previous reviews have told, there are lots of restaurants, bars and clubs and it's very close to the city center. I was able to walk prettymuch everywhere I had to go. Edwin was very friendly and attentive host.
The room was exactly as advertised.  It was very clean, comfortable and has a perfect location in Amsterdam.  Edwin was very friendly and helpful.  I would definitely stay here again.

Edwin is a complete sweetheart who happens to have an incredible room in a great location. His room is incredibly clean and comfortable. It can be noisy but if you want to be out enjoying Amsterdam at night with curtains for napping in the day and all the sights a quick walk away, you won't find a better value. I would definitely recommend Edwin's guesthouse for a trip to Amsterdam as long as it's not for dates when I will be returning!

Edwin and Patrick were great hosts. These guys were very friendly, attentive  and accommodating. I need to mention how clean both the room and the bathroom were. Coffee and tea were available. Staying in a 400 years old house was an experience. The location could not have been any better. I would and probably will come back again. Thanks guys.
Very good location if you want to enjoy amsterdam night life. The room is cosy and very clean.

Edwin was great as a host. When I arrived, he offered to me immediately a refreshing drink. His place was very clean, and right in the center city very closed to everything. Also, his display of painting makes the place very cozy. I enjoyed so much the coffee he had for his guests. It's a supermarket very close to the place making easier for a low budget travel. Don't forget to try the chips with mayonnaise (french fries)...I was in Amsterdam for only two days which it went too (Website hidden by Airbnb) enough time to visit everything in the city....wishing for more days .... Edwin was very helpful with directions and visit tips....
Thanks so much Edwin...looking forward to return to your place....

I had a great stay with Edwin in Amsterdam the place was in a perfect location right near the flower market and close enough to walk to everything. I'm pretty tall so the  shower is quite small but clean which is all that really matters. If Im ever in Amsterdam again i'll be sure to consider staying with edwin.

Amsterdam ist eine sehenswerte Stadt und noch besser wird sie, wenn man direkt am Vondelparkt wohnt. Das Appartment ist einfach klasse. Das Zimmer ist ausreichend groß und der Balkon ist wunderbar. Morgens beim Frühstück und Abends mit einem Glas Wein wurde der Balkon zu unserem Lieblingsplatz. Henreitte ist eine wirklich nette und sympathische Gastgeberin. Bei Fragen hilft sie, wo sie nur kann und ist auch so eine liebe Person. Das Appartment hat uns den Aufenthalt in Amsterdam ziemlich schön gemacht. Die Lage ist einfach das Beste. Nicht mitten in der Stadt aber dafür direkt am Vondelpark. Die Stadt ist super mit der Tram zu erreichen und in wenigen Minuten ist man da, wo in Amsterdam das Leben tobt. Ich und meine Freude können dieses Appartment und die Gastgeberin nur weiterempfehlen

Awesome accommodation and awesome hosts!
Very nice welcome and farewell, both with a coffee for us.
Henriette also gave us some books to read and some crisps and a bottle of wine.
The tram takes you in about 20 minutes to the city centre.
Also the price is very good for this wonderful place and those wonderful hosts!
Thanks a lot Henriette & Leo!

super emplacement, super chambre, super hote.
juste parfait.

We had a grateful stay in Amsterdam at Henriette's lovely house. The room is very clean and comfortable. Henriette and her friend are very kind and helpful. She suggested lots of things to do in the evening that were more alternative and not so touristy. We loved this suggestions because they make our stay in Amsterdam more special.
It was a perfect stay in Amsterdam. I can just recommend Henriettes room.
Thank you very much Henriette and Leo.

We had a lovely stay in Amsterdam at Henriette's. Her place was great and she was such a lovely host. She suggested lots of things to do and places to go that weren't touristy. She was incredibly helpful and accommodating and the room was just gorgeous!

I booked this apartment for my 18 year old son and 2 of his friends so am giving this review as a third party  They returned from Amsterdam and loved the apartment.  They said it was very central and had everything they needed.  My communication with Charlie prior to the visit was excellent.   The boys would definitely recommend it.
Nothing to add, great Appartement in a nice area, you will love it!

Charlie was very responsive and easy to contact. It's a lovely apartment! It was too cold to enjoy the balcony, but it would be nice in warmer weather. Coco the cat took some time to adjust, which seemed normal. I wouldn't bring babies under 2 (or at least those who cannot walk yet) because they need to be able to understand to leave Coco alone, and not play with the plants.
Suitable for cat lover
Charlie + Coco place was perfect. Great location and the apartment brought the best vibes. Would recommend. Coco the cat was great once you get to know her and approached her calmly.

Lovely and confortable place! The location and neighborhood were perfect.
Charlie gave us some excellent tips and was available to answer every question. Oh Coco she is so beautiful and sweet cat.
We have enjoyed our stay so much.
Great place and great host!
Highly recommended!
Thanks Charlie
problème la récupération des clés assez loin du logement.. et le chat ...

Bright, comfortable apartment within walking distance of all Amsterdam’s attractions - there is also a tram right out the front for when the legs are tired!

Charlie had the place sparkling clean, and was fantastic in her communication & flexible with us regarding check-in as we arrived into Amsterdam quite late at night.

Would recommend this place.

Charlie + Coco's appartament is lovely. You can actually feel how it will be living in Amsterdam. Close to the tram, just 10-15 min to the city centre, and close to a open street market where you can try traditional food. Coco is friendly but don't forget is a cat and needs her space! If I go back to Amsterdam I will repeat the experience!
Great space & a unique experience for cat lovers!!!
The host canceled this reservation 49 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

We had a great days in Amsterdam, and we stayed very confortable in Charlie and Coco’s apartment.
The apartment was perfect for us nice. And of course we recommend it!
Si vous êtes allergiques au chat, n’y allez pas.

Mieszkanie godne polecenia. Wszystko zgodnie z opisem, mieszkanie dobrze skomunikowane i duże. Jedyne czego brakowało, to informacji o kocie (Coco) w mieszkaniu. Z kotem dało radę się jednak dogadać, jest bardzo przyjazny.  Mam nadzieję, że jeszcze tam wrócimy.
Appartement sympathique, propre et bien placé. Charlie répond rapidement aux sollicitations.
The host canceled this reservation 20 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Charlie has one of the coziest Airbnbs I’ve ever stayed at. Everything about it makes you feel at home among the streets in Amsterdam. We loved that it was in walking distance (or a tram ride) to all the sites, yet was tucked away in a quieter, trendy neighborhood. We hope to be back again!

Edwin's place was amazing. The location could simply not be any more central (easy access from the airport too).
The room was sunny and nicely decorated. And actually bigger than it looks on the picture! Everything was very clean, and I had a great experience staying there. Edwin was helpful and kind. He gave me a map of the city on my first day and provided helpful suggestions on where to eat, go out, etc.
I will certainly book the place again when I am next in Amsterdam.
the room was very nice and the location was excellent. The only disadvantage is that the street is very noissy. Edwin was very nice and flexible
Great space & a unique experience for cat lovers!!!
Lovely apartment, wonderful location. Charlie was responsive and check in was easy.
Charlie has a wonderful apartment. It’s clean and functional. Coco is a great host. I loved.
Wir hatten ein tolles Wochenende in Amsterdam! Die Wohnung ist super gelegen und trotzdem ruhig mit einem wunderschönen Balkon zum Innenhof.

Charlie’s house is at a very convenient location where the tram is just a minutes away and takes about 15- 20 minutes to get to the city central. The neighorhood is lovely and has many options for restaurants.

However, the beds are not as comfortable. The bed from the main bedroom is a pull-out couch and the pillow has strong mold odor which my friend was not able to sleep for the first night. The room for the single bed is extremely small and there is a hole on the door leading to the balcony which the cat can go through at night. This is very uncomfortable if you are not used to have a cat walking around by you when you sleep.

Coco is a cute cat and we feed her every day during our stay. He likes to cuddle with you when you are home but also scratches unexpectedly. So be careful if you try to approach him. I would come back if the owner can fix the above problems.

English version below

Charlie is een uitstekende gastvrouw. Door mijn eigen fout waren er wat problemen bij het inchecken maar Charlie heeft deze allemaal opgelost (waarvoor dank), je kan haar dus zeker vertrouwen. Het appartement zelf is zeer mooi ingericht, je zou er zo zelf willen wonen. Het appartement was ook ruimer dan verwacht. Alles wat je nodig hebt is aanwezig. De locatie is ook top: weliswaar niet pal in het centrum maar er toch kort bij. Bovendien is de straat ook erg rustig wat een extra pluspunt is. Een echte aanrader!

Charlie is an excellent host. There were some problems when checking in (completely my own fault) but Charlie managed to solve them all, therefore I'd say she is completely trustworthy. The apartment itself is really nice and cosy, you would want to move in immediately. I think it is the nicest airbnb I've ever stayed in.
