The room was very clean, comfortable and cozy. There is an access to a balcony, which is very nice for breakfast. The house is located near the city centre, and is easily accessible through public transports. It is located in a lovely and quiet neighbourhood, near Vondelpark.

I really recommend Henriette and Leo's house. They have been wonderful hosts.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at De Keizer Inn. This lovely boat is perfect for 2 looking for a true Amsterdam experience.  The park view from the wheelhouse and terrace is outstanding! The boat is quiet, warm and very comfortable even for my 6 foot 4 inch boyfriend. Peter our host was very friendly and welcomed us with a nice gift basket of wine,  mints and stroopwaffels. As well as some helpful information and maps. We loved sitting on the terrace enjoying glasses of wine watching boats go by and lovers and friends enjoying the park across the canal. What a blissful slice of Amsterdam!  I know exactly where i want to stay whenever i come through Amsterdam. Thank you Peter for a beautiful stay!

Peter was very flexible and accommodating to our schedule. We were greeted with a welcome basket and the place was immaculate. The stay was wonderful and it was great to come home to something so inviting.

We stayed 2 nights here and I wish we could stay longer. There was nothing about the stay that i can complain about, only praise. The bed was comfortable, the kitchen had all the necessities, and the bathroom was comfortable for the space. Luckily it rained while we were on the boat, we sat in the wheel house and got to see a storm in 360 degree view. I cannot rave about the stay enough

My girlfriend and I had the best five days on peter's boat. Peter was very nice and helpful. The location is great and the boat itself is very cozy, and the bed is comfortable as hell.
Definitely recommended!

Super! Peter ist total nett und zuvorkommend. Auf dem Boot war es sehr sauber, außerdem hat man eine sehr gute Anbindung zur Tram und ist in nu im Zentrum.
Alles in allem kann ich diese Erfahrung nur weiterempfehlen, würde es sofort wieder buchen!
Everything fine

La barca di Peter è in un posto incantevole: posto tranquillo, centrale e ben servito dai mezzi pubblici (si può raggiungere il centro anche con una piccola camminata a piedi). Il miniappartamento è comodo e funzionale, curato nei minimi dettagli: dalla cucina al bagno, alla piccola veranda fuori: tutto è fatto per vivere una comoda ed originale esperienza ad Amsterdam. Peter è gentile, discreto e disponibile: il cesto di benvenuto rispecchia la sua ottima ospitalità! Consiglio la barca di Peter a chiunque voglia fare un soggiorno ad Amsterdam stando in un posto bellissimo, rilassante e comodo, ma allo stesso tempo immerso nella vera atmosfera olandese.

My boyfriend and I spent 4 days on Peter's houseboat and we absolutely loved it.  The houseboat was clean and cozy and had everything we needed.  The shower water was hot and the bed was very comfortable.  We loved sitting in the wheelhouse and out on the terrace watching the world go by.  The houseboat is situated perfectly - you can walk everywhere and there are 3 tram stops nearby (for those who were too intimidated to bike, like us)!  Peter provided a welcome basket & brochures.  He was quick to respond and even took us on our own private boat ride through the canals of Amsterdam.  I highly recommend staying here if you have a chance!  An overall amazing experience! Thank you, Peter!

We had the best time in Peter's boat . Enjoying the sun and the view on the deck. The boat is very cozy and has everything you need (hot water, comfy bed, fridge and freezer) and has a shop really close to it .
It's really close to the centre, we did everything by foot along the pretty canals .
Good communication with our host, Peter.  Clean, cheery.  Well-designed space and appointments.  Pleasant and quiet spot.  Would be happy to come again.

What a fanatic few days on Peters boat, we were made to feel very welcome straight away but also given our privacy.  One of the many highlights was eating out breakfast on the deck in the glorious sunshine! Highly recommend this to all seeking an adventure in Amsterdam!

We thoroughly enjoyed our all-too-brief time on Peter's boat. It's private, comfortable, and in the most beautiful park-like setting in a quiet residential area. Yet everything we wanted was a walkable distance and there is also excellent public transit nearby. Peter was an excellent host, knowledgeable about the area, and able to give good directions and suggestions. I appreciated the little touches, like the cushions and blanket for the deck chairs, and the basket of treats left for us to enjoy. We loved sitting in the wheel house and watching passing boats in the canal. Altogether a most enjoyable experience - thanks Peter!
The boat was absolutely lovely! Located a short walk from the city center, it provided a great quiet home base for seeing the city. The boat was very clean, and Peter's check-in process was great.

It was a great experience.
Peter is very Kind as well.

My girlfriend and I loved everything here! The boat was cozy and beautiful (we especially loved laying out up top on the lawn chairs, hanging out with the cat, watching all the fun at the neighboring park). The area was great and near the tram. Everything was perfect. Wished we stayed longer!

Peter var en fantastisk hyggelig mann og vert! Husbåten hans var til og med finere enn på bildene, rent og nyoppusset! Super koselig for et par med en ettåring på tur! Kveldssolen varmer på taket der hagestolene står og med vår lille gutt sovende trygt nede satt vi der himmelsk med vår take away! Alt man trenger av kjøkken var også helt supert i båten! + fint bad med nok varmt vann!
Vi betalte litt og fikk en lang sightseeing på kanalene fra en annen båt Peter hadde. Dette var en fantastisk måte å se Amsterdam på og så hyggelig sammen med Peter og hans kunnskap om Amsterdam! :-)
Neste kjærestetur blir til Amsterdam og husbåten til Peter! Anbefales!!! :-D

Peter made us feel very welcome and helped us with any queries and requirements. He even provided a welcome pack.
The accommodation on the barge, though small in size had all the necessary fixtures and fittings to enable us to enjoy our stay.
The location is excellent, because it is close to the city and public transport.

Peter was an excellent host. He provided us with absolutely everything that we needed for our accommodations.  He was very friendly and he gave us all the privacy we needed. His house boat was amazing. There was coffee and tea readily available and a grocery store withing a 5-10 minute walk. We were able to buy groceries to make breakfast and enjoy it on the terrace outside. My wife and I had an excellent time and we hope to come back one day. We will also miss Binky the cat.

My girlfriend and I stayed on Peter's beautiful boat for two nights. It was a wonderful time! The boat is extremely cozy, well decorated, and perhaps too easy to stay inside! It's located on what seemed to be a very private canal (only spotted one boat during our stay). It's a lovely area with the tram less than a 3 minute walk! Due to its central position, a walk to the city center couldn't take more than 15 minutes. If ever you go to Amsterdam, don't pass this housing option up! Thanks, Peter.

I had a wonderful experience at Edwin's. His place is in a perfect location (right next to the Flower Market) and it was extremely easy to get anywhere in the city. The room itself is small with a bathroom directly next to the bedroom. If you are looking for a centrally located, clean and safe place to stay during your time in Amsterdam, I would highly recommend staying here.

Edwin was a great host! The room for one person (which could easily be shared by two as well) is very comfortable. Of course - as to expect in a house in one of the smaller streets in Amsterdam - it is not huge, but definitely big enough to accommodate one person and fulfill all needs. Edwin even provided towels! The bathroom, which is shared with other guests, was always very clean.
The location itself is right by the flower market and you can easily walk to a lot of the sights or just wander through the canals. If you're not into walking the tram station close by brings you to a lot of other great places. With streets such as Spui and Spuistraat close by you are not only close to museums but also great restaurants and bars. At night it can be loud and the street lantern can shine into your room if you don't use the curtains (I didn't because I like waking up to sunlight), but if that doesn't bother you and you're not a light sleeper, traveling by yourself and willing to explore the city, this is a great location for you. I had a good time and would definitely recommend Edwin's place!

You will feel being taken care of a big brother in a very good way. Suuuuuper clean room with insanely comfortable bed. Untouched bathroom is beyond five star hotel. Unbelievable center location. What else will stop you from booking Edwin's room? Maybe no sleepover policy. Hahah.

It was better than the brief review on AirBnb. The host is just amazing: very charming and full of suggestions so you will find everything you are looking for in the city.
I will visit again. Thank you for a great time.

It was my first trip to Amsterdam and for a short duration, so I was looking for a room that is close to city center. And I found Edwin's home suitable as per my requirement.

Located in a prime location, every major tourist destination is close by. The Tram station is 100 steps away and 15mins walk from Amsterdam Central Station (if you prefer to walk). Edwin briefed me very well how about the routes from the Airport to the home.

The house is located in a street which has many eateries and pubs around making it a happening place. The room was cozy and on the first floor of the house. The only issue that I faced was, the noise coming from the road in the night. But I didn't mind it.

There is a beautiful cat in the house, so if you are not a cat lover, you can inform Edwin beforehand and he will take care of it.

Coming back to Edwin, he's a good host giving all the privacy you need. I am definitely going back to his place soon.

This was my first time to book and use AirBnB. I chose Edwin for the location, the great rate, and the positive reviews others have left. Even though i arrived late Edwin was there to greet me and bring me to my room while making me feel welcome to his home. The room i stayed in was perfectly setup, very clean, and exactly as described in Edwins posting. The room was overlooking the main street and the bed was comfortable. I got a good nights rest even though i could hear people out on the street it did not bother me to fall asleep. The bathroom and shower were clean and very well kept. Edwin offers coffee and tea whenever the desire hits you and the cafes to eat were right outside the door. Edwin spent time with me to talk about my visit and offered words of advice as i journeyed out to see Amsterdam. He even offered a great place to get a hair cut! Thanks for that Edwin. I would definitely stay again with Edwin when i visit Amsterdam again. I would highly recommend to anyone that Edwins house is the perfect place to stay and enjoy what Amsterdam has to offer. Everything i wanted to see was within walking distance of Edwins house and at the end of the day the house was a welcome sight.

Edwin hat mich kurzfristig bei sich aufgenommen. Seine 3 Zimmer sind sehr gefragt, was ich nach meinem Aufenthalt sehr gut nachvollziehen kann. Die Räumlichkeiten sind schön! Das Bad ist sehr sauber und wird täglich gereinigt. Ich habe mich rundum wohlgefühlt. Für Fragen oder ein Gespräch ist Edwin immer zu haben.

Edwin was a fantastic host! He was very easy to talk to, on top of friendly and helpful when it came to the city. His place was clean and wonderfully located. I hope I can stay here again when I visit later in life.

The location is ideal just 25mins walk from the Amsterdam Central railway station. The room was good with all that was needed. Shared bathroom next door which was clean with all that was required. Edwin welcomed me and showed me the room, explained that tea and coffee making facilities were available and explained the single house rule - don't let the cat out!

The road has lots of restaurants on it as well as a noisy bar. If, like me, you prefer an early night then take your earplugs.

Unsere erste Airbnb Buchung und gleich so eine tolle Unterkunft ! Das Boot ist genau wie beschrieben , sehr geschmackvoll mit schönen Accessoires eingerichtet ! Peter ist ein netter Gastgeber und immer ansprechbar wenn man etwas benötigt oder wissen möchte ! Die Innenstadt  ist auch zu schnell zu erreichen ! Wir haben zwei tolle Tage in Amsterdam verbracht und werden gerne wieder kommen!

Peter war ein sehr netter Gastgeber. Wir haben uns ausgeprochen wohl bei ihm gefühlt. Es war interessant, auf einem Hausboot zu wohnen. Auch wenn es natürlich sehr beengt ist, fanden wir alle Annehmlichkeiten, sogar verschiedene Kaffee- und Teesorten.
Vom Boot aus hat meine eine wunderschöne Sicht auf den hortus botanicus und fühlt sich in der Gegend überhaupt sehr wohl, da rundherum alles grün ist. Wir können Peters schönes Quartier auf jeden Fall weiter empfehlen.

Henriette et Léo sont deux hôtes très accueillants et très aimables, pleins d'attention et de gentillesse avec leurs visiteurs. Ils parlent aussi bien anglais que français. Le logement est confortable, chaleureux et très bien tenu, situé dans un quartier agréable et très calme, bien relié au centre historique. Tout est fait pour se sentir bienvenu et pour passer un bon séjour à Amsterdam !

Great Stay in Amsterdam. Perfect Room for 3 guests offered by the extremely welcoming and friendly Henriette and Leo! Thanks for having us there!

Easy Access to the City Centre by Tram and nicely located Right next to the beautiful vondell-parc.

Het was een plezier om bij Henriette en Leo te verblijven. Heel vriendelijke mensen, een gezellige lichtrijke en grote kamer, ook de badkamer is leuk.
De buurt is aangenaam rustig, voor wie even uit de drukte van het centrum wil zijn. vlakbij is het Vondelpark en een paar toffe (boek)winkeltjes en restaurantjes. Op 10' sta je met de tram in het centrum. Ik zou hier zeker terugkomen.

Welcome package put out for us upon arrival, very kind of Henriette! Lovely and spacious room, we even had our own balcony. Would definitely recommend to anyone going to Amsterdam. Good location too, very near the famous museums.

When we first arrived they welcomed us with open arms and showed us where to go and how to get there. Very helpful and responsive and they gave us our space as well which was a plus. It is a little bit out of the main area but beautiful area
Henriette and Leo were beyond welcoming. They brought us a welcome tray of goodies and were very warm and hospitable. Definitely would stay here again if we ever go back to Amsterdam.

As this was our first Airbnb experience, we didn't really know what to expect; but Henriette and Leo made us feel compeletly at home! They provided us with everything we needed without we even asked, and shared wonderful recommandations about the city. Thank you very much again for your hospitality and kindess Henriette & Leo!

We definitely recommend their place without a hesitation!

Nice accommodations, very true to description.  Friendly and helpful hosts with a nice welcome basket of goodies.  Good location with easy access to trams, buses and walking to city centre.  Thanks for the great time!

Although Henriette was outside the city during my visit, she did the best possible effort to make my stay as comfortable as possible.

She provided tips for the trip, brought some presents in for my stay, and arrange her friend to meet me in her house.

The room itself is extremely cosy and clean, with lots of vintage furniture and even a little balcony.

All in all, I couldn't wish for a better stay, and I most strongly recommend Henriette and her appartment for anyone!

We recently stayed at Henriette and Leo's for four days and were left with the best impression! The house is located in a wonderful quiet neighborhood which we had no trouble finding using Henriette's  instructions! There is a beautiful park not 10 minutes from the house and a supermarket. Most importantly there is easy and fast access to the centre of the city using the tram. The house itself is -if not better- as depicted in the photos! The room we used was cozy and spacey and provided us all comforts! Snacks,wine and fresh towels awaited  us when we arrived! The house was very clean and very comfortable and we feltat home. The two hosts were the most pleasant surprise! Both Henriette and Leo are extremely warm and friendly . Henriette provided us various info about things to do in the city and how to use local transport! They both offered their help when needed and they really seem to enjoy accommodating people! They were very discreet and never bothered us at all! We highly recommend their place if you ever plan to visit Amsterdam!

Henrietta n her husband Leo are both very nice n accommodating, they always take care of what you need, helps you out about the places where you want to go. The place was so easy to find n a plus it's near the tram..

Henriette fue muy amable con nosotros, nos recibió con unos pequeños snacks típicos Holandeses y nos dio tips para movernos por la ciudad.
La ubicación es relativamente central (alrededor de 60 min. a pie de Amsterdam Centraal), pero tiene muy buena locomoción lo que te permite llegar en 15 min. al centro turístico. Totalmente recomendable.

Leo and Henriette were both ready to share as many information as needed to make our stay a pleasant experience.
We enjoyed their discretion as well as their lifestyle.
The house is very well located (close to the tram and to a very pleasant park, to a supermarket and close to a bus stop linking their house to the airport).
We highly recommend staying with them.

Avec patience, arrivée tardive,  retard d'avion, et sourires et bienvenue à l'arrivée. Explications données sur le fonctionnement de la maison avec application pour me donner tous ces détails en français.

Hello Edwin.
Thank you so much for hospitality. Everything was just so cool :)
hope to come back end enjoy to stay in your beautiful, cosy house.

Regards,
Natalia from Ukraine

Room was perfect. Edwin was informative and charming. The WiFi was spotty at times, both networks, but the restaurant across the street had a good signal even from the house. Great location and close to trains and buses. Within 20 mins walk of all attractions.

I had a lovely stay At Edwin's place. Its a fabulous traditional old Amsterdam house in a great location. Comfortable clean room and bed, and nice host and decent WiFi. Easy to walk everywhere in the town from here.

Thank you for letting me stay in your gorgeous house Edwin. I will be back!
Edwin was very good host.  He has excellent communication skills and makes a guest feel welcome.

We cannot recommend this boat enough! Check in was easy, great communication, everything inside the boat was clean and modern, the bed was so comfortable and warm too. We ate breakfast on the sun loungers and even though it rained most of the time it didn't matter!! Peter thank you so much, this experience made our trip to amsterdam worthwhile and we miss the cat already!!
Peter was very welcoming and friendly.

Host was awesome. Nice comfortable room near tram stop that can get you anywhere and supermarket right around corner.

Awesome place to stay.

P.S. Hair dryer will not work in weak current socket in shower room, take it to your room and use there.

P.P.S. There is Heineken bar(or smth like that) nearby that gets rowdy from 10pm to 2am so plan your sleep schedule accordingly.

Edwin was so nice and helpful (he even helped me carry all of my 70 lb luggage up two flights of stairs that I was bringing from university). The room was really nice and I felt right at home in Amsrerdam thanks to him and his hospitality!

The description fits the room as Edwin states, the room Is perfectly fitted in the middle of the city to all the destinations you will need. I was able to experience everything I needed from the perfect location and Edwin was a perfect host and kept the building clean and in order and even provides a towel for the shower and info on the city. The bars are literally 10 minutes away and then opera house is about 15 minute walk as well along with rijksmuesm. I would definitely come back!

Edwin is a delightful host: considerate, friendly while still respecting his guests' privacy, patient with my scattiness and completely trustworthy. His 1642 house has charm and all the modern conveniences you want. Countless restaurants immediately outside and close to just about everything you'd want to see in Amsterdam.  And his cat is a beauty.

It was a fantastic week-end. Peter received us graciously. A gifty basket was installed. The houseboat is a romantic place, very clean.
We were independent but Peter can be joigned easily. He lives in a another place of the houseboat. And we were near the city centre.
This town is very charming with a beautiful architecture and very quiet with all those bikes.
We recommend this location. We have now a lot of fantastic memories...

Had a fantastic time in Amsterdam staying on Peters boat. The boat is clean, comfortable, cosy and very well looked after. Peter was very welcoming and made sure we had everything we needed for the duration of our stay. The boat is located on a peaceful canal and felt very safe but near enough for us to walk everywhere. There is a good selection restaurants and bars nearby. Pizza and Prosecco for, well, great pizza and prosecco and Bagel and Beans for lovely breakfast.
Also enjoyed the welcome form Binky the cat every morning and evening.

We had a great time in Amsterdam although the weather was not very pleasant, our stay has been perfect most of all because the hospitality of Peter and Jeroen.
De KeizerInn is a very cozy, nice and clean place. The ship is situated in a quiet neighborhood close to the center of Amsterdam. The very best part of it for us is definitely Binkie the cat, who was the loveliest companion and the true captain of the ship :)) When travelling to Amsterdam we are looking forward to stay at this place again. We highly recommend!

In 1 woord: GEWELDIG!!!!

We voelden ons helemaal thuis. De gastvrijheid van Peter speelde hier zeker een grote rol in :)

We hebben heerlijk geslapen, en genoten van alle gemakken die op de boot aanwezig waren, inclusief de lieve rode kat die af en toe even kwam buurten...

We kijken uit naar onze 3 nachten in oktober.

Tot dan, liefs Ruben en Petra

Great cosy accommodation and friendly host. Excellent location close to the centre. The boat was spotlessly clean and with all the facilities we needed. Nice touches from the host, cookies and wine and the offer of help with any info needed. Great way to see the city and feel like a local. Would highly recommend this accommodation.
We had a great long weekend, loved staying on the boat. It had everything you could need and was in a great location and loved the host's ginger cat. A great place for a couple to stay in Amsterdam.

Freshly arrived into Amsterdam after an 8 day bike tour, Peter greeted us with big smiles and a warm welcome to his ship. My husband and I couldn't have felt more cozy and relaxed in what we dubbed "a beautiful nest." Situated in a quieter area of Amsterdam and near an amazing zoo, our stay was more than what we could have expected to get some much needed rest. We already miss Binkie!!

As far as we are concerned this was the best possible place to stay in Amsterdam! Peter was a gracious and generous host. The ship is cozy, super clean and very comfortable. It was easy to get to the museums we wanted to visit as well as other points of interest. It was fun to see other boats passing right by ours at different times! Very quiet for sleeping and a sweet cat to visit us. A wonderful experience.

Host was awesome by greeting us at the location which he lives on he other side of the boat so it was nice to know if we did need anything he was on premise. The neighborhood was very accessible to all the attractions Amsterdam has to offer. In addition the neighborhood was very quiet and peaceful at night and we always got a great night sleep.
A most fantastic staying. The boat was so nice and Peter had really the feeling for the little extra. We highly recommend this!!

Peter is a wonderful, low key, friendly host.  The house boat is so well located, near everything but on a very quiet side street.  The wheel house is a lovely place to sit if the weather is touchy, and the two deck chairs on the deck give you the perfect Amsterdam canal experience.  It could not have been a better stay and we would love to stop there again.

Location: Quiet peaceful canal across from botanical gardens yet easy walking to centre and close to underground, tram, bike rental and many eating options.
Accommodation: Everything you need and more in a small package. Living area (indoor and out), kitchen bathroom and bedroom stylish and clean. The experience of staying on a canal boat adds to the romance of Amsterdam.
Host: Peter is relaxed, welcoming and responds quickly with help and information when needed.

Amazing and unique experience. Peter keeps the boat immaculate and super clean. We relaxed on the deck or in the wheel house with a drink and some snacks. My wife really enjoyed the robe! Excellent and quite location, but enough traffic to experience the locals. Good job Peter!

This is a one of a kind experience!!!! Once we got there we knew we made a huge mistake only staying 2 days. I wish we stayed a week. What can I say-- Peter was amazing and so kind- the boat is perfect for a couple and the bed is soooo comfy!! We sat outside and just people watched and relaxed. I couldn't have thought of a better way to end our honeymoon.

Such a lovely place to stay. Over looking a nice park with fantastic weeping willow. A very calm and quiet place to stay yet ideal for exploring the city. Expect a visit from the lovely cat and also some ducks who have clearly been having their breakfast regularly at the boat.

Peter was a warm, generous and friendly host. There if you needed him but otherwise left you to yourselves.

The boat was spotlessly clean, well equipped, comfortable and so much better than staying in a hotel. Can thoroughly recommend it.

Het was weer helemaal fijn. We komen zeker een keer terug! Het is een aanrader voor iedereen die in Amsterdam een fantastisch logeer adres zoekt....

Bedankt Peter

Peter was so responsive when we had a bunch of questions to ask him while we were out in Amsterdam. The houseboat is so cute and comfortable-- i wanted to use the outdoor patio but it was raining. Close to public trans and easy to get to.
Wonderful trip un Amsterdam thanks to the Ship! Really good located, room was very clean and sweet !

Peter's canal boat and Peter were amazing!  The location is fantastic, with Herons on the canal, great resturants and convient to the Tram.  So much fun to sit in the wheelhouse, enjoy the welcome basket wine and goodies and just watch the life around the canal. Could not have been a better place to be for our 40th anniversary.

What a find!
Perfectly formed house boat for fantastic authentic trip to Amsterdam. Fantastically located for centre / bars / canals / restaurants - what more can you ask for? The heated floor and wine welcome were an added bonus and Peter was there to welcome us and kept great communication.
Really enjoyed our trip, just sad it wasn't longer.
Thanks : )

Hi guys what a Lovely quiet location, very cosy. Place was beautifully presented, Peter our host was very patient waiting for our arrival as we where very lost which is a common theme for us. Excellent experience

My experience was excellent! As soon as I booked, I became high maintenance and Peter did not block an eye. I asked if I could drop my suitcase off early so I could pick up my rental bicycle; of course, he said. He was even there to meet me and give me my key; it was perfect. The welcoming basket of wine and goodies was very much appreciated as I had cousins over for a visit that first evening and no time for shopping! The description was accurate though I was not expecting such a big bathroom! The neighbourhood was the best. I met my cousins at the zoo, we walked to the Botanical Garden and then back to the houseboat for cocktails (we later realized we could see the BG just across the canal). Then we walked 1 block to a wonderful Italian restaurant (Palermo); everybody's meal was superb and only one of us had the pizza; thank goodness we had gone early as there was a queue to get in for most of the evening. I walked to the Opera House alone one evening and felt very safe both going and coming after dark. The bakery ... also a block away ... was excellent. Though very convenient to everything, the houseboat was also very quiet and peaceful. There was even a heron on the neighbour's deck one morning! Thanks for everything Peter!

We had very nice time at Henriett's place. Its comfortable, clean and close to the canals and the center of Amsterdam. Tram stations and a supermarket are located very close to the place.
Henriette and her friend Leo are very nice and tried to help us with information and made us feel welcomed.

Henriette and Leo are fantastic people, very friendly, very attentive, available... The space is quite cozy, it makes us feel at home. It is quite close to the city center (3 km), it has several transports within 2 minutes walk and is quite quiet. We love and recommend

The room is very beautiful abd the balcony is very nice to have breakfast. The house is situated in a very nice and quiet street. Is very near to the centre and it is near to the transport stop.
Henriette is so nice, kind and helpfull.
It was a very good travel.
I recommended to everyone.

This place was perfect for a few days in Amsterdam. I didn't have too much interaction with Edwin, but when I did, he was helpful, friendly and easy-going. I recommend this place for anyone looking for a fabulous deal in the center of the city.

The room is very cozy and has everything you could need. Coffee and tea are provided! Which was excellent for the mornings. The hosts were very friendly and provided all the information you could need about the area. The check-in and check-out process was very easy.

It is located very close to public transportation (Tram lines 16 and 2) so it was really easy to get into the city center. It is also not a far walk from the main museums, my friends and I preferred to walk there.

The neighborhood is really nice and family friendly. It was a great place to come back to after exploring the city, if you're looking to come back to a quiet place.

Nonostante il nostro arrivo in tarda notte Henriette e il suo compagno sono stati molto disponibili ad accoglierci, casa bella e comfortevole. Thè e caffè a disposizione con dolcetti molto buoni.
Consiglio a tutti! :)

The stay at Henriette's place was amazing. It is such a beautiful house, very comfy and clean. We were 3 in the room and the spare bed for the third person is comfortable and there is still enough space left so you're not feeling limited, which is great. :)
Henriette and her friend Leo are both nice and friendly people. We got all the help and information needed.
The house is very close to bus or tram station that takes you to the city center or you can simply walk. It is about 15 - 20 minutes to Rijksmuseum. The Volden park is about 5 minutes walk.
There is plenty cafes, restaurants and bars around, where you can have something to eat or just chill for a while. The Anne&Mac cafe from Henriette's list of tips is a lovely place with great coffee and breakfast. Also I like the 't Blauwe Theehuis at the Vondel park.
I can recommend Henriette's place to anyone who wants to spend some nice time in Amsterdam. When I'm coming back to A'dam, I will definitely pick this place to stay again. :)
Очень внимательные хозяева. Уютная комната. Близко к центру. В пяти минутах ходьбы парк. Множество кафешек рядом и супермаркет.
Fab location, lovely and homely. Perfect for couples and friends.

The best host in Europe I only say this because she was my first time but definitely not the last. Other wise she would be the best in the world .Very kind and sweet couple and communicative. Ahhhhhhhh the best above and beyond my expectations. Mind you I am not a critical person and even if you are this is a place you will be very happy with.

Logement agréable, propre chambre et salle de bain spacieuse. Henriette et son mari ont été très gentil et nous bien accueilli avec toutes les explications nécessaires ! L appartement est très bien située et tranquille. A recommander et nous y retournerons avec plaisir !! Merci à vous

чистая и уютная комната,  удобные кровати, приятная атмосфера,  гостеприимные и дружелюбные хозяева. приятно было получить презент при заселении) район тихий. в хорошую погоду будет приятно прогуляться в вондельпарке. рядом супермаркет. до рейксмузеума и музея ван гога три остановки на трамвае, до центрального вокзала ехать минут 15. остановка в двух минутах ходьбы.
I enjoyed the warm hospitality that my host gave the whole time. She was warm and caring. I could not recommend her more to anybody looking to stay with a wonderful host in a perfect location.
Comfortable and close to public transport. Herniette was very helpful and kind

Mahtava pariskunta !!! Hieno huone jossa myös parveke.
Hyvät yhteydet niin lentokentälle kuin myös kaupupngin keskustaan.
Lämpimät suositukset ja Kiitokset Henriette ja Leo ! :)

Henriette and Leo were perfect hosts. They had excellent advice for transportation and restaurants. The room was equipped with a tea kettle, fridge, silverware/plates, and coffeemaker. Not to mention there is a balcony! They were so nice to leave us goodies in the room while we were away at dinner. I would recommend this place if you are looking for a nice and quiet place that is close to public transportation and Vondelpark.
It was a great stay. The host is really good. She emailed us all the places we could go to. The location was peaceful and close to everything.
praticamente ci siamo trovati come a casa, persone sempre disponibili e pronte a fare due chiacchere. altamente consigliato A+++

Our stay with Henriette was perfect. She was a wonderful host as she was very friendly. Leo was there when we checked in and he offered us plenty of advice and information about the house and how to get around Amsterdam. The room was spacious and full of character, we felt at home straight away. Her house is only around a 3 minute walk to the tram stop which made it so easy to get into central Amsterdam. In the build up to staying at Henriette's she was easy to reach with questions and answered them wonderfully.

La chambre est grande, propre ; on peut faire des courses à proximité et y prendre ses repas : il y a même un petit frigo.
Facile d'accès depuis l'aéroport et 2 lignes de tramway à proximité qui vous emmène vers le centre-ville et les musées.

Henriette & Leo are great host. They help bringing our luggages up to the room on the 1st floor and help wheeling the luggages to the tram station on our last day in Amsterdam. The apartment is located within 10 mins walk from station for tram no. 2. There is another station for tram no. 6 which is possibly nearer, however the station is currently closed for few months due to road construction. The closure also impacts bus 197 from airport as the bus will skip the bus stop near the apartment, so you will need to stop at different bus stop and find the station for tram no. 2. Apartment is clean and very close to supermarket.

Nous avons notamment choisi ce logement car il avait beaucoup de commentaires positifs, et nous n'avons pas été déçus ! Accueil très chaleureux des hôtes, chambre spacieuse, très propre et bien conçue avec le petit frigo et tout ce qu'il faut pour pouvoir prendre le petit déjeuner ou les repas, literie très confortable, emplacement pratique à 2mn à pied d'un arrêt de tram direct pour le centre ville, bref une adresse à réserver sans hésiter pour un séjour à Amsterdam ! Merci encore à Henriette et Leo pour leurs conseils et leur gentillesse, une belle rencontre !
Great location
Mes parents ont été très bien accueillis chez Henriette. Le logement est très bien situé et correspond bien à la description. Ils ont été ravis de leur séjour.

Très jolie chambre, bien décorée dans l'appartement d'Henriette, très agréable hôte qui fournit de précieux conseils en anglais et français.
L'appartement est dans une rue très calme, d'un quartier visiblement bourgeois. Le tramway est à 2 minutes à pied, tout comme Les restaurants et locations de vélos qui sont au bout de la rue. De l'aéroport, il faut compter 25 minutes de bus direct jusqu'à Olympic Stadium puis 10 à 15 minutes à pied pour rejoindre l'appartement. L'hébergement est à quelques minutes de Vondel Park, joli parc où les locaux aiment se promener, jouer au foot ou même pour un barbecue.
Le lit électrique de 2x90cmest parfait! Ma fille dormait sur un matelas pneumatique de très bonne qualité.
Pour le petit déjeuner une excellente boulangerie est au bout de la rue.
Great space, nice, clean and warm. Peter is very friendly and helpful! The location is great and perfect situated to explore the inner city

A beautiful little home in an excellent location. Peter is a lovely fellow, very friendly and helpful with some excellent  advice about what to do and see and how to get there. Our stay there was a real pleasure.

We enjoyed our stay on Peter's lovely boat. The location could not have been better! You can walk everywhere and there is also a very convenient tram stop very nearby. It was a great start to our holiday.

It was awesome!
The boat exceed all expectations. The furnishings was nicely arranged, Peter welcomed us so friendly with a wonderful gift basket filled with cards, infomations and some presents.
He was within our reach all the time.
The neigbourhood was quiet and easy to find, but very central.
We'll come again!

Logement parfaitement adapté pour un couple. La péniche est située dans un quartier très calme mais tout près du grand centre ( tramway a quelques pas). Week end de détente et de dépaysement total. Parfait accueil de nos hôtes ni trop ni trop peu, le parfait équilibre.

Le logement de Peter est étonnant ! Un vrai cocon très agréable et propre. La péniche est très bien située dans Amsterdam et le canal est calme. Le seul bémol est le manque de table pour manger.
Nous avons été très bien accueillis par Peter et nous le remercions encore de son hospitalité.

This houseboat is a must do for anyone travelling to Amsterdam. The canal is beautiful and located in the quieter area near some parks and gardens. The room is small but everything, from the location of light switches to towel racks in bathroom, is extremely well thought out and convenient. There is no perceptible motion on the boat so if you're thinking you might feel uneasy then you can rest assured it won't be an issue.  The bed was very comfortable. We didn't spend enough time in Amsterdam and look forward to staying on Peter's again in the future.

Edwin is a jewel! He was bright, cheerful and friendly. He even planned with my boyfriend so a surprise package would arrive for me. Although the washroom is shared, it is cleaned every morning around 6am and is stocked with shampoo, conditioner and body wash. The room is very spacious and clean. Edwin also did my laundry. Lastly, it is in the perfect location which means no tram (little) or buses which saves the EUROS. When I go back to Amsterdam, I am going to stay with him again! Can't recommend him enough.

This house is all you need for Amsterdam! It is located in the center and you can go anywhere you want, from the most visited places to your special preferences. My room was also really good, I liked eveything about it. And Edwin, what an amazing person he is! Thanks for helping me, telling everything i needed to know about the city and specially I enjoyed all our funny chats! Thank you!

Edwin was a super nice host, made me feel very welcome. Everything was super clean and tidy, the room was perfect, the bed was soft and the bathroom was nice too.
Edwin also gave me directions to find a couple of things I needed and was always available to talk.
The place is perfectly located in the middle of everything; it's half way of everthing so I was able to walk to every place.
And Edwin, I'll always dearly remember your umbrella and when you told me "take it, take it" with a smile. It was a life saver and helped me in more ways than I expected

Edwin is the funnies host i have ever met since i started to use airbnb services. you know what, friendliness, hospitality and kindness is way too little to describe him as a host.

if you wanna explore the true essence of amsterdam, his place is always your first choice.

located in the heart of the city and it only takes 4 stops to get to his place by tram.

highly recommended!

Edwin was able to meet me at my arrival time, even though i arrived late.

He was really friendly and hospitable, and made me feel at home.

Would recommend!!

Edwin is a great host, since my flight got delayed I wasn't able to get there at the given time. He was there waiting for me, very welcoming and frindly. The place is just what I needed for a few days. It was clean and cozy. He dedicated a little bit of his time to   me in a map how to get around Amsterdam. At night, there is a few bars downstairs and it can get noisy but with some hearos extreme protection earplugs I solved the problem. The area is friendly and safe! I would stay at Edwin's guest house if I return to Amsterdam.

I had a lovely stay at Edwin's house. The room and bathroom were very clean. The bed was cosy and comfortable. Great atmosphere. Edwin was so lovely and friendly. He is also full of advice if you need any about Amsterdam. He was very helpful when I first arrived helping me with my suitcase upstairs. Great location. Highly recommended.

Edwin was a fantastic host. He made me feel at home right away. His home has a nice and warm atmosphere. Edwin was always available for help. The room was very clean, cosy and right in the city centre.  I would certainly return here!
Die Schlüsselübergabe hat perfekt geklappt. Alles war saube (Website hidden by Airbnb) und ordentlich. Ein schönes  Zimmer zum Übernachten in einer lebhaften Umgebung im Zentrum.
We had a lovely stay on Peter's boat. He is a wonderful accommodating host. The location is perfect- both peaceful and central.
Great position, great accomodation, great host

Peter welcomed us with a smile and a wonderful gift basket - it made us feel right at home! The boat is cozy and warm, even at freezing temperature. Was lovely to meet the friendly house cat. We thought that this was our best stay on our entire month long trip to Europe.

The houseboat was great!  It was perfect for a couple of nights for two people.  The location was good and made it easy to get around on foot or by bike.  Peter was very friendly and made the stay go very smoothly.  Watching the sun rise over the canal while sipping coffee in the boat is a tough experience to beat!

Fue una muy buena experiencia haber parado en el barco de Peter. El anfitrión fue muy respetuoso y muy amable durante toda la estancia. El gatito que vive con ellos muy cariñoso tb.. El barco es muy acogedor y calentito y tiene todo el espacio necesario para estar cómodo en el con todas las cosas que necesitas al alcance y de una manera muy adecuada. Es una experiencia que no se debe perder durante tu estancia en Ámsterdam..

We just absolutely loved it there.  The boat is quaint and in a great neighborhood.  The boat gives you a great Amsterdam experience of living on the canals.  The bed was comfortable, shower was very large considering being on a boat.  We did not use the kitchen but it was large enough to cook a meal and there is small fridge for groceries and beer.  Peter was a great host and made you feel right at home.  If you have any questions on the city he would be more than glad to help you out.

We had a great stay on the KeizersInn houseboat. Peter and Jeroen are charming hosts and the accommodations are really cozy, well-thought out and immaculately clean. We didn't lack for anything. Also, it's a fast walk to a tram line to the center and all sites. Sunrise in the wheelhouse is beautiful.
Uber drivers were only a few minutes away, with trips to the station about 8-9 euros. 5-star recommendation!
Really enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam on Peter's boat. Was very clean and writhing 15-20min walk to local attractions.

Really enjoyed our stay. The houseboat is cute and cozy. It was a little small for my tall boyfriend but the location was ideal. Peter was a very gracious and understanding host. Recommend this one of a kind stay in Amsterdam!

O quarto é como aparece na foto, amplo, claro e com utensílios do dia a dia. Está ao lado do trainway, o que permite uma locomoção prática e eficiente. O único inconveniente é a escada, mas que faz parte da cultura de Amsterdã. Os anfitriões muito atenciosos e gentis. Recomendo
perfect!!

The room is very clean and decoration is so nice.
Host is so kind and friendly.
I really enjoyed stay here.

Room very clean and tastefully decorated in a very quiet area, close to the Vondelpark and public transport (tram, bus). We were very well received by Henriette and her husband. We thank them for their attention and advices that made us enjoy our stay in Amsterdam.
Great place to stay, direct tram 2 to city centre, otherwise 15-20mins walk through vondelpark. Friendly host with very detailed orientation of the house and Amsterdam. Lovely home to stay in

We loved staying at Henriette's! The room is big and beautiful with a private balcony! We ended up renting bikes during our stayed and loved it, only about a 15 minute ride to the town centre, but public transportation is very close as well as many shops and places to eat. We would always find somewhere nearby to eat. Henriette and Leo give you many tips and recommendations on where to go and are always there to answer any questions! Thanks for having us!

Edwin was such a lovely host, directions to his place was very simple to follow, and the room itself was very nice and comfortable. Edwin was very accommodating and made my stay in Amsterdam even more wonderful!

I definitely recommend Henriette’s flat. The localization is great, next to the beautiful Vondel Park with convenient connection to the city centre. The room itself was clean and nicely decorated. The climate of the flat and neighbourhood area makes you feel like you a resident of Amsterdam. Tinka (a friend of Henriette) was very nice and helpful. If I ever go back to Amsterdam I would definitely stay at Henriette.

Henriette's house is warm and lovely. Henriette texted us beforehand for our arrival time so check in is no problem and welcomed us with drinks and traditional dutch snacks which made the stay memorable. Please note that the stair is very steep (though it's very typical of Dutch houses). Since we have big luggage from 3-week trip, Henriette's boyfriend helped us carry the luggage up. Bless his back! The room is well equipped even though we did not make much use of it except to rest. There is a balcony to hang out and we loved it. Sharing bathroom is no problem. There's another toilet downstairs for emergency. There's a fridge in our room and Henriette let us use the kitchen - with microwave and stove so we made breakfast and dinner with stuff bought from supermarket (Jumbo) just off the block. The house is very close to tram no.2 (from Central train station and Museumplein) stop and within walking distance from Museumplein itself. Overall we loved the experience!

Henriette and Leo were fantastic hosts! They communicated with us ahead of time, gave great advice, helped us navigate the city and were very kind. We had a fantastic time during our stay and would absolutely recommend it to anyone!

Cozy and most beautiful apartment in Amsterdam. Peter and Jeroen are friendly, welcoming and helpful hosts. We did not miss anything on the boat, even on such a small place everything we needed was there. It is a great experience of how living on a boat feels like. The boat is located near the city centre and everything is within walking distance.
We had a great stay and if I go back to Amsterdam this would be my first address to look for.

Un posto romantico nel centro di Amsterdam
Assolutamente consigliabile per confort / location, posizione centrale (a 10 minuti dai luoghi principali di Amsterdam) ma nel contempo in posizione silenziosa.
Bellissimo fare colazione e vedere i fuochi di capodanno nel confort della barca.
Molto pulito e ottima biancheria da bagno.
Peter sempre molto disponibile e presente per qualsiasi necessità.
Nel complesso, dovessi tornare ad Amsterdam ritornerei sicuramente nella House Boat di Peter e la consiglierò ai miei amici.
Solo una piccola nota che però non dipende da Peter: purtroppo la corrente del canale porta spazzature a fianco della barca che non rendono perfetta la location, forse la nettezza urbana della città dovrebbe pensarci.

La experiencia de dormir en un bote, te acerca de una manera única a como se vive en Amsterdam, dudo que exista un hotel que pueda ofrecerte algo así. Peter, fue muy amable y muy detallista. Nuestra experiencia en su bote fue increíble y aunque pensaba que podría hacer frío, fue todo lo contrario. Es un lugar pequeño pero muy acogedor. Ideal si quieres experimentar algo diferente. Con gusto recomiendo este lugar. Es un lugar que provoca el regresar. Esta situado en una zona tranquila, pero de fácil acceso a las zonas más concurridas de Amsterdam.

Peter was very welcoming excellent host couldn't ask for better!!
the boat was beautiful just perfect good enough to get engaged on !! :) :) thank you very much for a perfect stay

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié notre séjour dans ce logement. Celui ci est très proche du centre. Il est fonctionnel et très propre.
Nous avons également profiter des fauteuils extérieurs (avec le plaid) le soir.
Le logement totalement indépendant.

We thoroughly enjoyed our two-nights stay in Peter's houseboat. A genuinely unique experience in Amsterdam. Small quarters, naturally, but the space was very well-appointed, with robes, coffee, fridge, and stove. Close to all the attractions.

Fantastic little boat, with plenty of room for a short visit to the beautiful Amsterdam. We were able to easily hop on and off when visiting all the attractions. Convenient location for all the top attractions, within walking distance or hopping on the tram.

The place was a gorgeous central location, a great and different way to stay and Peter was an absolutely lovely host to deal with,  was no problem arriving a bit early and leaving a little later.  Along with the few little touches like stroop waffles on arrival it was just an all around great experience

Peter was so great that nothing I say here can describe the experience to stay in amsterdam on a ship. The location is perfect the ship is perfect everything in this city is perfect. The tram station and the underground station are very close to the ship. We have a wonderful and different experience and I want to come back soon. Thank you Peter.

Ci siamo trovati molto bene:
- la posizione è molto comoda: in una via tranquilla, residenziale, a 15 minuti a piedi dal centro di Amsterdam.
- la soluzione abitativa è inusuale e perciò caratteristica: la cabina di pilotaggio è diventato un piccolo salottino con timone; tramite delle scalette si scende sottocoperta per trovare una camera con cucina, letto matrimoniale nella parte ribassata e un bagno inaspettatamente grande con doccia.
- abbiamo trovato tutto molto pulito e in ordine; Peter è stato un ospite gentile accogliente.
Per via di passaggi stretti di ponticello, porte e scaletta lo sconsiglio solo a chi ha difficoltà motorie.
It was a very pleasant stay! We enjoyed the unusual location. It was very cozy, clean and Peter was very nice. We defnitly could come back again!

The stay, location, host and everything else was more than we could have asked for. Clean, warm, friendly and welcoming. I booked as a suprise for my boyfriend's 30th, the day we arrived. I'd asked if i could send some balloons and banners over to Peter to make my boyfriend's birthday extra special- which were put up with no extra charge. We couldn't have asked for a more perfect first stay in Amsterdam, and we will definitely be back. Thank you!

Had a fantastic few days in Amsterdam made even more special by staying on the houseboat! Peter had decorated the houseboat with balloons and banners for my boyfriends birthday which was such a lovely touch - thanks again. The houseboat was really cosy and its location was perfect. Would definitely recommend staying here again.

We loved staying on Peter's boat! Very easy to find and very close to the tram making central Amsterdam very accessible. The boat was very clean, plenty of clean towels and the bed is incredibly comfy! Wish we would have booked one extra day just to spend in that cozy comfortable bed! Thanks for making our trip so memorable, Peter.

Edwin is a very friendly and helpful host. The room was comfortable and cozy and the location is fantastic. Right in the heart of town you are extremely close to everything. There are bars and restaurants right outside your door. Only downside is it can get noisy at night but you expect that given the location and it is a small price to pay. Would recommend this place to anyone who wants to experience Amsterdam.

What a fabulous place to stay. Small ( well it is a boat) but beautifully presented and a wonderful cosy atmosphere. Also in a terrific position  to see everything. We walked everywhere. Not a single metro,tram or taxi required. Although we did walk a lot! Highly recommended as long as you are fit enough to descend the 6 or 7 steps into the cabin backwards. But I'm an overweight 60 yr old and had no problems. Comfortable bed, nice coffee and tea. And even some welcome wine. Thanks Peter

Très jolie péniche! Très propre, bien décorée avec tout le confort nécessaire, à deux pas du tram!  Nous avons très apprécié la présence de dosette café, chocolat chaud, thé pour nos petits déjeuner. Encore merci Peter

My stay on Peter's boat was great! The listing was exactly as pictured and was the most unique Airbnb experience I've ever had. Peter was a great and approachable host and left a basket to welcome us filled with maps, wine, mints, a postcard, and cookies-- it was a really nice touch. Aside from the sometimes spotty wifi, I have no complaints about the boat and it was fun sitting on the top part in the morning looking out on the water. Would definitely stay on the boat again if I ever make it back to Amsterdam.
Best place to stay in Amsterdam :-) Thank you
Endroits très sympathique cosy et propre, parfait pour un sejour à 2.  De plus l'hôte est tres agréable et accueillant.
Wir hatten eine sehr entspannte Zeit in Amsterdam. Richtig schön auf einem Hausboot zu schlafen. Da war echt an alles gedacht: Handtücher, Bademäntel und Kaffeemaschine! Herrlich!!

Peter was a highly welcoming host, and very helpful, plus it was great to meet Binky too! The boat is well positioned and has all you need for a comfortable stay. I would definitely recommend staying with Peter to anyone while in Amsterdam - I only wish we had a longer stay!
Very friendly, nice and clean. Perfect for a weekend in Amsterdam!

We had a wonderful time on Peter's boat. Small but perfectly formed, it has everything you need. The kitchen area was great, and the shower with heated floor a real bonus. The area is quiet and the herons put on quite a show over the canal! We loved every minute and Binky the cat was a handsome creature. Would heartily recommend to couples, lots of great walking and restaurants. Do your research beforehand and enjoy, or ask Peter. We have visited before so knew our way about, so seek out little gems like 'Gartine' and 'The pancake bakery' for food. Mikes bikes great for a day out, go 'off road' and escape the city. Enjoy! Thank you, Peter.

Everything was as shown in the description. IT is a wonderful little place close to everything. Appreciated were the bathrobes, tea and coffee and the vine.
Peter was at hand for questions and helpful. I can certainly recommend this boat and would like to return myself. Something out of the ordinary.
L'acceuil est chaleureux,avec des petits cadeaux de bienvenue.Le quartier est très agréable et très calme.Le logement correspond à la description.L'équipement intérieur est correct.
It was a great way to spend a few days to get the houseboat experience

Peter was really fast and friendly when answering both when booking and when I needed to unbook this lovely trip. Happy to have had the pleasure to communicate with him, and I hope next time we will actually get to visit this pittoresque scene.
Boat very romantic and confortable. It is well located, near the centrum and quiet.

We only stayed on the boat for 2 nights, but it's a fabulous place to be,  it's tranquil but close to trams, the metro and nice places to eat.  The boat has been beautifully renovated and fitted out.  Prior to our arrival, communication with Peter was excellent.  Peter was on holiday when we stayed, but we hope to come back, stay for longer, and meet him then.
Fantastic, great location - Peter's listing was fantastic the boat was perfect will be staying again, a very relaxing weekend

What an awesome place and host. They were very accommodating to us when we arrived a little early.
The boat was clean and had everything you would need.
Great experience and would recommend Peter and the boat to anyone going to Amsterdam.

Wow! What an amazing experience! We had so much fun in Amsterdam and staying on Peter's boat made it even better! The boat is in a great location, really clean with everything you need - thank you Peter for the little goodie basket when we arrived! Communication with Peter was always quick and easy and Peter was happy to answer any questions - making the whole experience veru smooth. We would love to return and will recommend to our friends! ☺
The Place was beautiful, the bed was cosy, the little terasse was great, everything was clean and in a nice quiet location very near to the city center!

Im letzten Sommer war unsere Tochter mit Ihrem Freund auf dem Boot und empfahl uns Eltern, nun auch dort Quartier zu machen.
Bei Peter haben wir uns sofort willkommen und wohl gefühlt. Er begrüßte uns sehr freundlich und war, da er selbst auf dem Boot wohnt, jederzeit verfügbar. Die kleine nette Unterkunft in der Gracht an einer ruhigen und doch zentral gelegenen Straße ist sehr geschmackvoll und zweckmäßig eingerichtet. Wir fanden alles vor, was wir brauchten. Es ist sehr sauber und das Doppelbett wirklich bequem. Die Fotos entsprechen genau dem, was wir vorfanden.
Die Lage gegenüber dem Hortus Botanicus ist ideal, um Amsterdam, idealerweise mit dem Fahrrad, zu erkunden. Ein Verleih ist in der Nähe und auch Einkaufsmöglichkeiten sind schnell zu erreichen.

Very unique experience - we both loved it! The boat is beautiful, space small but surprisingly functional - everything you need for a few days in Amsterdam is there. Quiet residential location, walkable to most attractions. Peter is a great host, very accommodating and easy to communicate with. Thanks to Peter and his ship our stay in Amsterdam was truly memorable.
Excellent host - Peter was very accommodating. We had a wonderful time!

Had a very wonderful time! Peter is a great host and very accommodating. We were able to store our luggage after checkout time with him while waiting for our early evening flight which was super helpful. The boat itself was amazing. A lot more spacious then it seems in the pictures and very functional and cozy. Would definitely go back and would recommend to anyone visiting Amsterdam.

klein aber wunderschön ;-) Es ist alles da was man braucht um eine super Zeit zu haben!

Wir konnten total bei einer guten Tasse Kaffee oder Tee entspannen, während wir den großen, kleinen und grünen Vögeln im gegenüberliegendem Park zuschauten wie sie umherfliegen - egal ob von der Terrasse oder dem bequemen Platz im Steuerhaus.

Peter ist ein sehr zuvorkommender Gastgeber und der Liegeplatz des Hausbootes sicher einer der besten von Amsterdam - sehr idyllisch ;-) .... gerne wieder!

Parfait we chez Peter, avec le soleil au rdv la terrasse de la péniche est un réel plaisir. La chambre n est pas grande mais tout le confort y est avec une déco travaillee et sympathique. Petit panier d acceuil charmant et grande flexibilité dans les horaires d'arrivée et de départ. Très calme. Tres reposant.

Peter was waiting for us as promised with helpful ideas for enjoying our stay in Amsterdam. The houseboat was all we hoped for. Across from a willow tree and small park. It was close to the centre of town making it easy to get around. Even the weather was perfect. We'd definitely recommend Peter's houseboat for those contemplating a trip to Amsterdam.
We had a lovely stay, they were very welcoming and easily contactable. Easily accessible to the centre by tram and some great amenities and restaurants nearby! Thank you

Everything was as we expected. The room was great with great furniture and design. The neighbourhood was nice and quiet and close to the center of the city (approximatelly 10 min by tram). Hosts were very helpfull and charming to us :). I really recommend this place for anyone.
Leo and Henriette are lovely hosts. So engaging and interesting! Many thanks for the great information and helpful hints. We will always think of their place fondly.

Our experience began with a beautiful, quite street within easy walking distance to the centre. Henriette and Leo were very welcoming and opened their home to us. They assisted us in every way that we needed.
Top hosts.

I had a very pleasant stay at Henriette's place! A proper, cosy and colorful room with very comfortable bed. The host was very helpful and polite. It is a place that I do recommend - vmgood money for value ratio.
Nice!!! host

We were greeted with a warm welcome for our first visit to Amsterdam (with Dutch snacks waiting in the room included!).  Henriette and Leo were informative and extremely helpful. The room was exactly as advertised.  The three of us fit comfortably in the space provided.  Public transportation to the city centre was convenient.  It was the perfect home base to explore the rest of the city.  Would stay here again!  Thank you for everything Henriette and Leo!

What a fantastic stay we had with Henriette and Leo! We was greeted by Leo who made us feel very welcome and gave us lots of hints and tips of what to do in Amsterdam!
Henriette is a lovely lady who we was very happy to meet on our last day- lovely couple and I would highly recommend!!
Beautifully decorated upstairs room with a nice balcony. It was a great place to spend a few days in Amsterdam. Our host set up a nice little plate of goodies for us. Definitely recommend!

Henriette et Léo ont été adorables, très prévenants et chaleureux. Ils nous aussi donné de précieux conseils pour nos déplacements et nos visites. L appartement est très proche du centre via le tram 2, il est très agréable, la chambre en particulier, grande, lumineuse et très bien équipée. Le quartier est calme et résidentiel mais bénéficie de toutes les commodités (boulangerie, supérette, resto, laverie automatique, distributeur de billets...).
Nous reviendrons avec plaisir !

Henriette and her husband Leo were really very nice and hospitable. They gave us all the guidance on how to move to Amsterdam. The house is very welcoming, clean and well connected with public transport. Very beautiful
Excellent stay!
Henriette's place is in a great location. My friends and I loved biking through Vondelpark every day. We found Henriette's home to be very cozy. She was very helpful and kind to us!

It was the 1st time for me to use AirBnB and I can say that Henriette represents the whole spirit how this "phenomenon" hosting via AirBnB. She and her hausband share in stand of just a place in the house also a bit of their life. It's nice just to talk with someone who is exually liveing in the city like Amsterdam. They also give us useful tips about what to visit and how to move around. Beautiful experienc that my family and i will never forget.

Hope to see you in Slovenia where i would like to return you a favor for a nice experience.

Mitja
If you want a quiet sanctuary that isn't too far from the action in Central Amsterdam, this is the perfect place for you.
Muito bem localizado e com ótimos anfitriões! Só tenho a agradecer a Henriette e Leo.

Henriette and Leon made me very welcome, and were both friendly and charming. The house is lovely, and they took care to make sure I had what I needed. The room was really nice, comfortable and had some interesting art and a balcony looking over a nice Amsterdam street. Convenient for the Tram and for the Vondelpark and for me, the marathon weekend. I'd certainly recommend it as an enjoyable place to stay.

This location is amazing. It is close enough to public transit to get to central Amsterdam. If you were to walk, it would be a nice long one (definitely doable). If you were to stay in central Amsterdam, it will be quicker to get to the core, but would be a bit more noisy at night  from my experience. It is quiet and in a great neighbourhood, close to grocery, coffee shops, and other shops. Loved it!
Recommend for an amazing time
Edwin was a caring and great host! Location is fantastic and the room fit my needs perfectly.  If I come back to Amsterdam,  I will look to stay at Edwin's.

Sehr guter Platz, etwas laut, aber man ist müde von der tollen Stadt und schläft sofort hinweg. Sehr netter Gastgeber, unkompliziert, zuvorkommend. Bestens zu empfehlen!
Christian
Clean room in a very central location. it can get a bit loud in the evenings but you're in Amsterdam. that's how it goes. would stay again. thanks Edwin.

The house and it's location are great: midway between the cultural and the crass attractions in beautiful Amsterdam.
The street gets few vehicles, but lots of non-rowdy people.
Very easy walking to all the city's attractions, shopping, and if you can't find something you want to eat nearby, you just ain't hungry!

In EVERY Way, EDWIN made me feel WELCOMED. HE took me shopping to a Great Plaza with great prices, which I LOVED!
Was Very understanding when I showed up 1 day EARLY for my reservation. I'll stay there again in a heartbeat & recommend him wholeheartedly.
He Helped me with directions & ANY questions I had.
GREAT location & close to everything.

I had a great stay at Edwin's. The room was cosy and the location is perfect, just near the flower market right in the center of Amsterdam. It can get a little noisy at night because it's located in a street with bars, but it's not hard to get used to. And Edwin is a very nice and helpful host. So thumbs up to this place.

Edwin was very thorough with his instructions, I manage to arrive at his home with issues. His place was perfect for my short stay in Amsterdam. Very near the tram station and is a walking distance to popular tourist attractions. Will definitely recommend his place for solo travellers.

This is a great listing. The house is located on a street with a lot of restaurants and bars so you can get your fill of what ever you like and stumble a couple of steps back to the room.

Edwin was gracious and helpful. The bed was comfortable and the room was clean. the Bathroom was shared with 3 other guests when the other listings are filled up. the room I was in had a queen bed.

The only thing is like I said the room over looks a street full with bars so it can get loud at night.
Edwin is a great host, he takes care his guests and has an amazing sense of humor. Thank you very much for hosting me!!

I really loved this room right in the middle of Amsterdam. It allowed me so much freedom to be able to come and go and make it my base of operations while I was in the city.  The room was certainly very clean and tidy and nicely decorated.  The most wonderful thing about the room is the window which gives a great view to the alley and once the windows are shut there is not much noise.  This was my first time using Airbnb and after this experience I will surely use it agai.
Heb twee dagen heerlijk van Amsterdam genoten! De kamer is superknus en Edwin een super aardige gastheer!

I had a great expirience. the room was nice, clean and comfortable. the location was perfect! really close to anything else in the center of amsterdam. Edwin is a great host and person (with wonderful sense of humor got to say).
Edwin was very welcoming and ensured I had everything I needed.

I Booked Edwin's place for my son, who enjoyed his stay very much! Edwin was very easy to communicate with and went out of his way to answer questions about Amsterdam. I would be very comfortable and secure in recommending Edwin's place to anyone.
Great room in perfect location, Edwin is the perfect host, very helpful, enjoyed my stay.
Lovely clean room, plenty of space for three. Friendly hosts and amazing value for the location. Easy access to the centre via the tram and a very safe friendly neighborhood
Friendly and kind with everything needed :)

Henriette's place is very comfortable, clean and good located. Very close to the vondelpark and the tram and bus stops. She's very attentive, easy to communicate and for sure you'll have a nice stay in there! Highly recommended!

Henriette and her partner were extremely hospitable and kind.
They were very available and willing to give advice about where to go, eat and what to do in the city, as well as transport etc. On our last day they even walked us to the bus stop bright and early on a Sunday morning and waited for the bus with us. Had a very pleasant experience in Henriette’s place which is also very cosy, homely and in a great position- close to the centre in a lovely area and easy to get around with public transport.
Todo muy bien en nuestra estancia con Henriette. No encontramos el lugar exacto y vinieron a buscarnos, nos explicaron los lugares mas turisticos y la casa estaba muy limpia.

Henriette and Leo were really nice and welcoming. They even helped us with our luggage!! The room was sufficient for the 3 of us and it was relatively easy to find from the tram station, following Henriette's instructions from the central station!
Me and my boyfriend had a great stay on Peter's boat. Great little space with a great location! I would truly recommend it to anyone looking for accomodation in central Amsterdam!

Wow! We (my husband and I) are in the midst of a 6-country European vacation and other Airbnbs have not been as kind to us as this place!

To begin, our hosts were warm, friendly, and welcoming--even inviting us right in for a drink to discuss great options around the city. They regularly checked in with us, offering clean towels, beer, wine, cookies, etc. We truly felt pampered and that the comfort, cleanliness, quaintness, and friendly vibes of our stay was of the utmost importance to our wonderful hosts.

Next, the houseboat! BEST. DECISION. EVER. Every square centimeter of the place is meticulously thought out, planned for, and executed with the goal of maximum usefulness, efficience, and visual charm. It was SPOTLESS (like, hotel-level clean) and the kitchen was filled with complimentary instant hot cocoa, tea, cappuccino, and coffee. The kitchen and bathroom appliances were all brand new and totally sanitized. The bed was plush and so cozy in its little sleepy nook. It had the softest linens and dreamy blankets. There were even luxurious robes for us to louge in!

This place has all the positives of an Airbnb (character, better location options, local hosts to personalize your experience, fresh towels/refreshments) without any of the negatives that tend to accompany Airbnbs ("lived in" residue in the unit, contending with all of the host's personal items, etc.)

This rental was so memorable it was hard to tear ourselves away from the boat in order to actually explore the stunning city of Amsterdam! This boat was a vacation FROM our vacation and we couldn't thank our hosts more for paying attention to every thoughtful detail! Next time we come to Amsterdam, we wouldn't stay anywhere else!

Communication with Peter was quick and easy. The boat is clean and the bathroom is very functional. The shower is large, however you must bring you own shampoo/conditioner, soap. There was a hairdryer but we did not use it as I had brought my own. The kitchen has a two-burner stovetop, an under-counter refrigerator, and dishes. Coffee machine, kettle, coffee, tea, sugar, hot chocolate is provided. It would be nice to have a couple of wine glasses. The bed is tucked under the stairs and against the wall. The ladder going down to the living space is steep but manageable. There are two seats and a small half-moon table attached to the wall in the wheel house. The seats are a bit slanted and somewhat awkward to sit for any length of time. There is no chairs in the lower part. The only place to sit is the bed. There is two lounging chairs on the deck of the boat (unfortunately we didn’t use them as it rained while we were in Amsterdam). The bottle of wine upon arrival is a very nice touch. The boat is situated three blocks from the tram station and numerous restaurants. There is a coffee shop about two blocks away.

We loved our stay on the house boat.  It was cozy and in a beautiful location, a bit a way from the hustle and bustle of some of the busier canals.  The location was perfect.  Close enough to city center that it was an easy walk to many sightseeing places.  Peter was a great host and gave us many recommendations of places to visit.  The boat has everything you need - we especially enjoyed have coffee available.  We would love to come back and stay again!

Fantastic!
We had such a lovely welcome aboard this incredibly clean, spacious and comfortable boat. It has everything you need (towels, robes, kitchen facilities etc) and should you need anything else, Peter was incredibly helpful. We loved sitting on the top of this boat in the sunshine with a glass of wine! We slept brilliantly - the bed is bigger than ours at home! We also had our 10 week old baby with us, and we had plenty of room. Location is also brilliant. Such a lovely stretch of the canal and very close to a tram stop with only a very short journey to all the major attractions. Would definitely recommend this boat to anyone coming to Amsterdam. Just brilliant!

Peter est très accueillant et sympathique.
Le logement est petit mais très confortable et bien agencé. Le lit est merveilleux, on a presque envie d'y rester toute la journée. Le mauvais temps ne nous a pas permis de beaucoup profiter de la petite terrasse bien que Peter nous ait laissé une couverture et des coussins, mais le peu que nous y sommes resté était super.
Le quartier est calme et proche du centre en même temps. c'est le compromis parfait.

Beim Einchecken war Peter sehr entgegenkommend - unser Zug hatte Verspätung, das war aber kein Problem für ihn! Das Hausboot ist sehr gemütlich und das Bett hat für zwei Personen eine sehr gute Größe. Einen Supermarkt in der Nähe haben wir leider nicht gefunden, aber in der Innenstadt gibt es genügend Supermärkte (z.B. hinter dem Dam), so dass man gut vor dem Nachhausefahren einkaufen kann. Das Hausboot liegt in einem recht ruhigen Grachtenbereich und unter Deck hört man gar nichts mehr (gut isoliert). Von der Straßenbahnhaltestelle ist es zu Fuß nur drei, vier Minuten entfernt und leicht zu finden. Das Hausboot ist auf jeden Fall ein Erlebnis in Amsterdam, das man nicht verpassen sollte :-)
A wonderful place to stay! Beautiful barge, and a beautiful view! Very close to the centre, easy to walk into town. Best Airbnb we have stayed in :)

Dans un quartier charmant, le bateau de Peter est un petit havre de paix, proche du centre tout en étant à l'abris de l'effervescence nocturne du Red District et des coffee shop touristiques.
Une entrée dédiée pour les hôtes.
Serviettes, gants de toilettes et même robes de chambres à dispo!
De quoi se faire un café/thé/chocolat.
Un lit et une couette en plume à tomber!
Et une terrasse privée sur le pont pour se détendre!
On recommande très vivement!
This was fantastic.  It was in a quiet area and it was really nice to sit and relax.  Peter has thought of everything.  The wildlife on the water was a treat.
We had a lovely time on the boat. It was very clean and cozy. The view from the deck is quite nice with park on the other side of the canal.

Peter was very nice and helped us with everything we needed. Sleeping on the boat was a really great experience. It was very clean and is a very good place for staying in Amsterdam and exploring the city. You find there everything you need and you have a beautiful terrace. Definetly would stay there again.

nice ship and peter is a nice man as well，it is easy to the ship by tram 9 from central sration about 20minutes. And when we arrived the ship everthing is prepared perfect，clean and tidy.We hope will be here again！

My wife and I absolutely loved the Keizer Inn, and we have already recommended it to several friends.  Peter was so nice and welcoming, and the boat is perfectly located in Amsterdam City Centre, within walking distance of everything we wanted to do.  We loved sitting on the terrace, and we really enjoyed making friends with Binkie.  We can't wait to come back!

O anfitrião é simpático e disponível para ajudar no que for preciso. O barco corrsponde à descrição feita no anúncio. É muito agradável. Está-se lá muito bem. O bairro também é agradável e com boa acessibilidade a transportes públicos para o centro. Também se pode ir a pé e apreciar os canais.

Peter was very welcoming and eager to find out if he could help with our plans ie places to visit, and ways to get there. He kept a low profile, but was on hand if we needed him. All the amenities were as described and suited our needs perfectly. We enjoyed the complimentary wine as we embraced this new experience! We loved the boat and the setting is just wonderful. It was so relaxing sitting on the deck, wine in hand, watching and waving to the passing boats, with a lovely view of the park too. If you've never done this before, we can highly recommend you give it a try! Peter's boat is in a peaceful location but is within easy reach of the main attractions of Amsterdam.

Peter is the best host with a gem bnb.
The charm, cuteness, cleanliness, and beauty just stole my heart. I'd stay forever if I could. The location on the water was always a dream of mine and Peter did an amazing job exceeding those dreams. I can not thank him enough
I hope we'll be back! I will tell all my friends and family

Lovely place and unique experience having a boat stay. Location is quiet and ambience peaceful. Few minutes walk to both tram and metro.

Peter was so kind to allow us to leave and help us with our massive luggages before/after our stay.
