Excelente, muy agradable Edwin y mjy abierto a ayudarte tambien. La unica observacion es la calidad del wifi no es muy buena, pero en lo mas importante el alojamiento fue excelente.

Henning and Anna were the perfect hosts and they have a beautiful loft in Amsterdam. Their home has been very tastefully done and has everything a family would need when visiting a new city. They were very helpful and communicated clearly and regularly throughout our stay there. The location is great and very central. We enjoyed our stay there and would recommend the hosts and their home to anyone who goes to Amsterdam.
Perfect hospitality, Amazing and super creative design home, Prime location.

Henning was the ideal host - extremely easygoing, thoughtful and responsive.

His apartment was clean, central and very large - it would easily accommodate 8 guests.

The housecat (Buddha) was friendly and we were all devastated to say goodbye to him!

Without a doubt, I would stay at this location again and highly recommend to others.

Henning's place is located in the centre and it is a wonderful loft, modern and comfortable, equipped with anything you may need. The seats and the table outside complete the perfect picture.  We were two couples and we enjoyed our time very much. The Hennings have been very caring and nice with us. Least but not last, the cat Buddha is simply the cutest cat in the world!

This is a very unusual space but extremely well-located and comfortable. Easy walking distance to museums, the city center, and just blocks from transit options that can take you anywhere in Amsterdam. We had an exceptionally good time in the space—and the resident cat made the home seem like your own home-away-from-home; the nicest and most loving cat you’ll ever meet. Henning was very responsive and helpful; he even left us a bottle of wine as a welcome gift. My highest recommendation. We will be back the next time we’re in Amsterdam.

My friends and I agreed Henning’s apartment was the best Airbnb we have ever stayed in. The location is perfect with a great outdoor sitting area. Henning and his family are kind people who were very helpful.

Es un alojamiento fantástico, decorado con gusto y muy singular. Su céntrica localización da acceso a todos los sitios importantes a pocos minutos andando o en tranvía.  La casa esta perfectamente equipada con todo lo necesario, y el espacio es genial y muy cómodo. Sin  duda para repetir.
Great time at this beautiful loft. Very well located. Close from all key activities and sites. Our host has been very responsive and nice. We strongly recommend.

Edwin's place is perfect for anyone looking to stay in the heart of Amsterdam. It is very conveniently located close to everything- including some of the best bars and clubs in town. I would definitely recommend Edwin's place and would stay there again in a heartbeat!
Overall absolutely loved it! I felt right at home

Edwin is an attentive host who makes sure the bathroom is clean. The room was clean, the bed was comfortable. The view from the room is authentic and truly worth a stay. I would stay here again if I had a chance. The area is actually located near a lot of stuff.
Edwin muhteşem bir adam. Evin fiyatı konumuna göre gayet iyi. Yatak rahattı biraz ses olmasına rağmen kolayca uyudum. Tavsiye ederim.

My friends and I stayed for a week in Henning's flat. It is a beautiful, spacious, spot located in the center of Amsterdam. Bonuses include: an Espresso machine, a huge outdoor area, and the friendliest cat in the world. It doesn't get much better than this.
Amazing location, super friendly and efficient host and wonderful neighbours. Had a really great time in this very special spot!

An amazing apartment in a super location. Very easy to get to from the rail station by metro, just a couple of minutes walk from the metro station. A really good neighbourhood, walking distance from the centre but quieter and more elegant! Really convenient for the museums and the Vonderpark too. Henning a great host, informative and helpful, they made their home feel like our own for the time we were there. Perfect stay!
Great location but the street is busy at times and so there was the odd street yelling during the night.

Had a nice 5 day stay in this gem in Central AMS.
Edwin is a fantastic host.
Knowledgeable and congenial.
Highly recommended.

Edwin is a great host, this is a brilliant location to stay while visiting Amsterdam if it is available!!! location, location, location.
Plus the Host!, room, value. A+

The location is excellent, very central, a good sized room with a very comfortable bed, a little noisy on an evening (as he points out), but it is only people chatting outside the bars, no booming music, so no problem unless you are a light sleeper - it was perfectly fine for me. Nice to be in an old 'Amsterdam style' house rather than a hotel. Would definitely recommend it.

Edwin's place was great! The location is ideal for exploring the city, especially the night life. Personally, I did not find the place to be so loud as other reviewers, but I also live in an urban area.

Very clean room with a nice view of the street. Incredibly comfortable bed. Great shower.

Edwin is such a kind and charistmatic person! Would definitely recommend his place to others.

Great location! Very close to everything and near two trams to get you around. Bed was very comfortable and clean. Only access is to the bedroom and shared bathroom, shared with another AirBnB-er. Kind of awkward but not a big deal. On a street with a lot of noise so bring ear plugs!!! Its very loud. Overall great stay. Edwin even gave me some tips on where to go grab traditional dutch food.
Edwin is a great host! The hospitality is 5*plus!!! I can recommend it to everyone in the world! Great to come in contact with such human beings.

Stop looking and book. As the review states, there is some nightlife outside however I never had an issue with sleeping. It actually became my background noise and I didn't use my white noise app like I usually do. Amazing location, super amazing host, cool space, everything you need.
Amazing Amsterdam and very good location and apartment near of all museum, nice bars and gay and cultural life! I love it!
Wonderful host. Will definitely be booking again.
Great location close to bars, perfect for a 2 night stay.
Céntrico.

Don’t think twice and book. This is my second time at Edwin’s and his place is just as I remembered, amazing. The location is great you can walk everywhere or choose to take the tram, there are two stops really close by. My room was perfectly clean and the bathroom is always clean as well.  Best location to stay in Amsterdam. It can be loud at night, I personally love it but if you are a light sleeper take earplugs. There are literally tons of restaurants and bars down below you can get food or a drink at almost any time! I will book it again when I return to Amsterdam. Best choice!

Edwin's house is in a perfect location, an easy walk to just about anywhere you want and trams are close as well. It's a party street, but if you don't mind a little noise at night, I would highly recommend.

This "house" boat is amazing, truly one of the more unique properties in Amsterdam. You'll have to stay here and ask them about it to find out! We were really happy with our stay. The place was immaculate and clean, the amenities were perfect for our needs, and the hosts were generous and knowledgeable. I would definitely recommend this to anyone interested in enjoying a unique and memorable stay on a boat in Amsterdam. I hope someday to be able to come back! Danku wiel!

Incredible Airbnb! The place is in a perfect location, everything was within a 20-30 minute walk. It was also very close to the tram. There are a lot of bars, restaurants and a few “Coffeeshops”  in the neighborhood so you can expect a lot of noise, but I had earplugs so the noise didn’t really bother me. The location and the comfortable atmosphere of the room was worth the noise. Edwin is a very friendly host.
Excellent location. Best for those who enjoy nightlife

Edwin is a pleasant easy going guy, his place is spacious with large windows and a view bang in the centre where all the bars and restaurants in the central canal district. Plenty if hot water comfortable bed large room shared bathroom which was ok.
Nothing was missing
You need to climb a few stairs but thats no problem. Cat is friendly too. Recommended if sharing a bathroom is ok and you have no problem with stairs I would happily come back and I would like to.

Edwin’s place was very convenient and tidy! Do note that this room was up a narrow stairway which Edwin very kindly helped me with my suitcase. Overall, I had a pleasant stay and would happily stay here again. :)

Nice clean bright single room. Comfy bed and plenty of fresh air. easy to keep cool.  Very central location with everything on your doorstep. Edwin is friendly and helpful. Would definitely recommend to stay here. Other people have mentioned that it is busy in the street at night. If you are a light sleeper then ear plugs would be a good idea to bring. Not crazy noise but its nice to keep the windows open wide for air.  Bathroom was good as well.
Muy recomendable

Everything went well, Edwin was a good host and his apartment had all I needed. The location was nice, my only point is about the noice of the street at night, but I guess it is similar around Amsterdam. The stairs are small and dangerous, especially trying to climb the baggage, but I also think it is something very particular in this city.
Au top chandre et salle de bain propre le lit et confortable edwin et super accueillant y'a rien à dire

Excellent stay, prime location. AMS has excellent public transportation but I hardly bothered, since everything I wanted to see was within walking distance. Edwin is great host. Bed very comfortable and the street noise didn't bother me a bit! I'll certainly plan to stay here again my next time in AMS.
The best! Perfect location and perfect place to stay. I will be back!

I was arrived quite late, Edwin was helped with my Luggage which is not easy to get in there. The room is clean, sharing bathroom is not a problem for me. Edwin clean and dry it all the time. Great host and perfect location - close to everything you need but not too busy or touristy. Would definitely stay here again if I come back to Amsterdam
Edwin is a really cool host with a really well located apartment, a lot of nice paintings on the wall.
As other reviewers have already pointed out, Edwin is a great host, the location is great although a bit noisy at night, and the room was clean. The wifi was a bit slow though.

Edwin is a fantastic host and has created an equally fantastic location. Just off the famous tulip market and butted against a lively street full of clubs, it's the perfect place to get an immediate dose of what Amsterdam has to offer. HIGHLY recommended.

The guesthouse is at a very convenient location - very close to the Centraal station. The room and the bathroom were clean and Edwin provided most of the amenities you would need. However, even though the location is convenient, the house is on a very crowded street, so expect noise all through the day and night.

Ok, I usually do not write long reviews, but bear with me. I stayed at Edwin’s home for 4 nights and the price was great comparing to the other options available. The room and bed are spacious enough for 1 or 2 people (bed was comfortable). However, the bathroom is small, but manageable (doesn’t dry well). Warning, steep spiral steps (like all other places in Amsterdam); so if you have a suitcase you would need to carry it well above your hip to go up. Also, no “visitors” after 10pm.

In the listing, Edwin does not mention that he has a cat, Mooki. She’s sweet and decided to spend a night with me lol (tbh I was skeptic at first, but let her stay). One of the other guests is allergic, so it’s worth mentioning.

Now onto my review, the most aggravating aspect of my stay is that the keys, locks and doors DON’T work properly. I can’t tell you how bad it was trying to get in the front door for 20 minutes out in the cold late night (morning?), and THEN another 15 to get into the room (which I did not bother to lock after the first night). Repeatedly.

In the second night I had the same hardship to enter, to which I texted him through AirBnB. Did not get a response, but eventually I somehow managed to enter AND notified him. Fast forward some hours (I’m already asleep) and all of a sudden he is violently beating on the door to my room trying to open it (I had the hook-lock on). I can’t tell you how uncomfortable it was to be woken up this way. After I opened the door, he realized what happened and apologized. Dude, I texted you for a reason. Another night I had the same lock and key trouble, but didn’t get a response until 5:48 am.

The location of the house is in the heart of the city and the street has several restaurants. I’m a heavy sleeper naturally, but it was difficult to sleep because of the noise. I’m surprised the Dutch/tourists were screaming and being so loud in a street that has no bars or reason to behave that way.

Overall, I would rate Edwin’s AirBnB 3.5/5.
-1 for communication
-1 for the damn keys and locks
-.5 for the noise (which Edwin has no control over)

Pros:
-close to the Metro and all the action
-cheap when compared to other listings at the time of booking
Close to center.  A bit noisy at night.

Edwin's place was perfect for my visit. When you enter the house, there is winding staircase, Edwin's cousin was staying in the downstairs flat, you keep climbing and on the second floor is this room, the bathroom, and the double room. Up one more flight is the attic room. The layout is very convenient and private.

The room is more spacious than pictured and there is a closet for your clothes. On the second floor, there is a small communal fridge and tea kettle. The bathroom is communal but is cleaned everyday. Edwin is very responsive and the location is perfect. The bed and pillows are very comfy! Like with many older buildings, the keys can be finicky so you must be gentle when inserting the key and unlocking the door.
I was delighted with the hospitality, it was nice staying  at this place with great sorroundings and where you could find the most of amsterdam near everywhere :)

This is a good option for travelers on a budget. The room has ample space for your belongings and it’s very conveniently located in central Amsterdam. The host rents out a double room and a single attic room in the same unit, so you share the  bathroom with up to three other guests. As others have noted, there is a lot of noise from the street, but I played white noise on my computer and slept fine. The locks are old and can be tricky to use. I couldn’t get the hang of the lock to my room so I left my room unlocked during the day. I had some trouble unlocking the door to the building, as well. In the future I think the host should provide instructions on how to properly lock and unlock the building door. Merely closing it isn’t enough - you have to really force or slam the door shut to lock it. I think other guests didn’t get this memo because the door was sometimes left unlocked during my stay.

This is in a great location! There are a number of bars on the street, as well as some pretty nice restaurants. That being said, the noise from people walking around and leaving bars is pretty loud until around 4am. I didn't mind it because I was out late and just passed out as soon as I got back. Another thing to note is that the stairs in Edwin's house are very narrow so it can be hard to bring a full-sized suitcase up the stairs. If you travel light, you shouldn't have any problems though. I'd definitely stay there again! :)
Edvin's guesthouse it's a great place in the heart of Amsterdam. Very polite Host and perfect quality of hospitality service. Hope to come back soon!
괜찮은 숙소입니다. 암스테르담 중앙역에선 거리가 조금 있지만, 미술관 지구는 걸어갈 수 있을 정도로 가까워요.

Edwin's home is the perfect place to stay in Amsterdam. Situated a short 10-15 minute walk from Centraal Station, it is super easy to find and right in the heart of a busy little street full of bars, cafes and restaurants, so you'll never need to go far to find great food and great nightlife. However, as you explore further afield you will find that you are never very far from the highlights of Central Amsterdam and all it has to offer. Leidseplein and Rembrandtplein, the city's prime nightlife spots, are a short distance away, as is Vondelpark if you are looking for somewhere to chill out in the day. The Red Light District and most of the city's museums are also situated within a 10-15 minute walk in any direction. You really will struggle to find the need to use public transport as everything you need is within easy walking distance.

The home itself is very charming and Edwin is a wonderful host. Upon entering you will climb a spiral staircase to the first floor where you will find Edwin's living quarters. A further floor up and you will find two private rooms and a bathroom all connected by a communal landing where you can find a small shared fridge and tea making area. The room in which I stayed was plenty spacious, featured some lovely artwork (a theme running throughout the house) and was super comfortable. and I mean super comfortable. The bed was soft yet firm, and the huge pillows a delightful place to rest your head. It is a little noisy, as others have noted, but it's merely a little background noise.

I certainly would not hesitate to stay at Edwin's place again when I next visit Amsterdam and I would strongly recommend it to all fellow tourists and travellers as it is superb value for money. I am sure you will not be disappointed.
great time! Edwin is awesome host and super helpful. recommend!
Great location and nice accommodations. It is in city around plenty of bars so expect plenty of noise at night. I slept fine none the less.

Edwin’s home is in the heart of Amsterdam. If you looking actions all around, this property give great values. Of course, there will be a few amenities one needs to sacrifice.

I had great stay at Edwin’s guesthouse. Everything was walking distance and I decided to rented a bike to explore other part of this city. Edwin was friendly and approachable.

This place will not an idea place for light sleeper. I was okay with noises out on the street. Sleep aid,

Cómo aspecto negativo es que en las noches se escucha mucho ruido ya que se encuentra en una zona de bares y es complicado dormir.

It was an overall awesome trip, staying in a comfortable room in the middle of the city.
Edwin’s helpful and welcoming. To sum it up, I wish I could’ve stayed longer!
Edwin was a excellent host, helped me with my luggage. The house is well located, the bed is comfortable. What more you need? When i return to amsterdam i'll be un Edwin's house

Localização central numa rua animada e com bons pubsbe restaurantes,  o quarto era muito acolhedor e decorado com muito bom gosto.  Host muito simpático e prestativo. Não podia ter escolhido uma melhor casa para ficar.
Great location, attentive host, fast and effective communication.

Great place in an amazing part of Amsterdam. Edwin was such a wonderful host, even after a miscommunication from my part about my check in time he handled it professionally and responded fast for my check in.
Also the place is great with all the amenities one needs to have the best time in Amsterdam.
All in all a great value for your money
Edwin is a very friendly host that was very clean and easy to access all types of event around his place. Great place, clean  room and restrooms
Great and kind host, lovely place and room. I loved it!

Edwin is quick to respond and gives helpful recommendations. The room is cute and clean. The bed was comfortable. The location is close to anything you'd want to see, with tram lines close by. I read the other reviews and brought ear plugs. You will need them. It does quiet down after midnight but in the early hours it wasn't unusual for a few people to walk down the street yelling or arguing or singing with no regard for anyone in the neighborhood. If you know what your in for, the price and location can't be beat.

Perfect place to stay right in the heart of Amsterdam! Everything was easily walkable and I loved my time there! It does get loud at night from all the bars, so just have headphones otherwise it’s perfect!
Edwins place is in a great location, extremely clean and comfortable! Edwin is a lovely guy! Can't recommend enough!

Cozy airbnb in the city centre. If you sometimes go in circle visiting various places and need to drop some items off so you don't carry a lot with you, Edwin's place has convenient location and is accessible from multiple sides. Thanks a lot again Edwin. :)

Edwin is a perfect host. He keeps the old house clean and efficient and very well aired. His cat is very well educated, clean, shy and respectful, so you won't have any problem. I got the chance to see the beautiful cat only one time in five days. The house is perfectly located but overlooking the most crowded street of Amsterdam at night, the parties are like taking place in your room like it or not and the weekend seems to be starting on Tuesdays in Ams!

What a perfect spot , right in the hub of everything ..yes noisy but I loved it ...absolute value for money . EDWIN was absolutley lovely I felt at home immediately..I was suffering from a terrible cough and he gave me some magic mutti that really helped . The room it self was comfy and cosy with a view of the road. The bathroom was clean a working and the availabilaty of tea and coffee a great touch ...I would love to stay there again.
Genial alojamiento para una persona.Barato, céntrico y con un anfitrión inmejorable. Un trato de 10.Sin duda volveré en próximas visitas a Amsterdam.
Great location and easy check in. Edwin is fast. It stands smack in the middle of restaurants and bars, which can be both an advantage and a regret.
Very nice host and wonderful location!

Rien à redire.
Emplacement parfait et prix très attractif.
Si estas acostumbrado a la vida nocturna es un buen lugar, esta muy céntrico el lugar lo que hace que escuches gente toda la tarde y noche
Great host, great location.
Fantastic location.
Very nice place
Absolut perfect place. Central. Nice guy.
Edwin was a perfect host, kind, clean and responsive
Very nice place to stay in Amsterdam...close to lots of attractions! Edwin is very friendly and keep the apartment tidy and clean.
Wonderful host, great wee room. Very central and busy location, right in the heart of things. Edwin was a great host, really friendly and welcoming.
The bed was insanely comfortable, the location fantastic, and Edwin was very helpful.
Can't recommend highly enough.
Charming little place right in the centre of town with a lovely host

Quartier festif et donc très très bruyant toute la nuit. Pratique pour une personne voulant sortir tard cependant. Sinon Edwin est très attentif et disponible pour tout ce qu'il vous fait. La chambre bien que minuscule, suffit pour une personne seule pour quelques nuits. Propreté au top !
Great place, great location! Edwin was a fantastic host! I recommend it
Perfect Location, really friendly host!
Room is very cozy, not too small with a nice view out over the street. The location is perfect, can‘t get any better. Safe to say, I had a great time.

L’appartement est très bien situé, peut-être même trop bien situé, car il se trouve au-dessus d’un bar (plus largement dans une rue de bars). Les fenêtres étant très mal isolées, il y a beaucoup de bruit qui peut en déranger plus d’un. Pour le reste, je trouve le prix un poil excessif compte-tenu de l’équipement à disposition et du peu d’intimité à disposition. En bref, un appart recommandé aux couche-tard avec tout le nécessaire dans les rues voisines
The perfect host!
I really enjoyed my stay at Edwins place. He is very nice and helpful.

Edwin offers comfortable accommodation in the heart of Amsterdam (bars and restaurants right under the window, comfortable mattress, very clean). He was very helpful and flexible when it came to check in / out. I highly recommend and will definitely be back 😊.

a cozy room in the heart of the city, within walking distance of bars, restaurants and coffee shops. Edwin was a super flexible and highly repsnsove host.

You can expect noise outside on the street in the night though.
Ontzettende leuke locatie, middenin het centrum. We hebben erg genoten.
Good place and better ubication

I had a nice stay. Edwin is a friendly and helpful host, who kindly washed and dried some of my clothes. Everything is kept very clean. Location is very central. Cute furnishing around the place.

Room is loud at night due to restaurants and bars in the street two storeys below, and closing the windows doesn’t help very much. However, if you plan to stay out very late, this may not be a problem for you.

Bed could have been somewhat more comfortable, I thought — there seemed to be some kind of a divide in the middle of the frame below the mattress, which made me want to sleep only on one side.

All in all, good value for central Amsterdam.
Perfect place to stay, Edwin was so nice. I'll recommend
It was absolutely lovely, the room made our visit a 10/10 Trip

Edwin's place is fantastic for your visit to Amsterdam! The location is incredible, with tons of restaurants and bars in the surrounding area and you can easily walk to all of the major sites. The private room is cozy with a beautiful view of a quaint Amsterdam street bellow. The bed is comfortable and although the bathroom is shared it is exceptionally clean. As a host, Edwin is perfect! He was extremely responsive to all of my questions prior to arrival and kept in touch for my arrival and check in. He was very helpful in recommending restaurants in the area and all around very friendly. I highly recommend Edwin for anyone's next visit to Amsterdam.

Edwin’s place is very well located: A 20 mins walk from the central station and next to a lot of bars and restaurants. If you would like to have a quiet place, don’t go there - but who wants a quite time in Amsterdam? :)
Edwin is a very good host and i definitely recommend him and his place!!

Great part of town, great host, clean and well decorated room. The only downsides are 1)the wifi is really slow and 2) it is right near a bunch of bars so it’s pretty loud until really late on the weekends.
I had a great time at Edwin's place. the location is perfect in the center of Amsterdam but as the room is above some bars it is really loud in the evening. Earplugs are necessary
Great location in the center of the city, easy check in, clean place, good wifi. Thank you so much for the stay Edwin!

My relaxing boat trip was fun to stay and sleep in, the bed was really comfy below the wheelhouse and the boat is  warmly heated, shower had great pressure and is big enough in size for two hehe. Cooking and storage is all compact but very very adequate for a boat stay, the wheelhouse is good fun sitting relaxing at the  table with your drinks or snacks also lovely views to the canal banks. surrounding walking area has shops bars restaurants also within 5 mins from the boat is the metro to take you anywhere absolutely fantastic experience. J
The houseboat was lovely and clean, we stayed for only one night but it was a beautiful experience, we would definitely stay at Peter's again!

Peter and his boyfriend were very welcoming and helpful! The boat is so nice and cosy, we recommend it to everyone!We would definently come back, as the boat is also close to the centre either with the tram or bikes!

Nothing but positives to say about our stay on Peter's houseboat.  Prime location, very clean, very accommodating, very friendly (as was their cat that would visit us at our window at night).  There was plenty of good coffee and tea, as well as maps and area info.  As long as you can climb a small ladder, and don't need much space, you will enjoy your stay here.  He even let us drop our luggage prior to check-in which was much appreciated.  I actually anticipated more movement from the boat, but it doesn't seem to rock at all, so no worries about motion.  Would definitely recommend!

We loved our stay at Peter's barge! Peter was a great host making sure that he was there to great us, to show us around and was really quick at responding to any communications we sent. The barge is spotless, cosy and close to all the best that Amsterdam has to offer (but secluded enough to get away from the hustle and bustle).
We also loved meeting Binkie!
Thanks again for hosting our stay.

Great place to stay at ! Edwin's is perfectly located in the heart of the old city, above a lively and lovely pedestrian street filled with parties and joy. If you're on bike, no worries, there's a free bike parking under surveillance about a minute away. The city itself is absolutely gorgeous, and I recommend this place to anyone wishing to visit the old Amsterdam !

The place has the best location , you are in the middle of Ámsterdam , all in walking distance. If you want a fun party area at night and a little noisy take it . Well known Thai food 50 mts from it .Edwin is fantastic host and will make your stay very comfortable!
Great central location and super nice tidy rooms !
The location is really nice, very centrally located.

Staying by Edwin was great, good location, good price and everything!
I like this place and Amsterdam and hope to come back again
A comfort Room in inner City
I had a very pleasant stay. Edwin was very reliable and the rooms are clean and comfortable. Location is perfect i can only recommend this host.
Edwin is just the best, cool energy and vibe. The place was so clean and nice and in the middle of the middle of the city life. Highly recommended!!!
Edwin has a great room. He is very kind and it was honestly a great stay. I would stay again.
Great location, nice space and fabulous host.
De ligging van de kamer is goed en het is er goed verzorgd. Het is een prima verblijf voor een paar nachten.
Great place in the heart of Amsterdam. Highly recommended.

definitivamente maravilloso, la ubicación es excelente todo queda muy cercas se puede ir caminando a los museos y edwin ha sido muy atento, está al pendiente si se necesita algo, me ha gustado mucho lo recomiendo :)

Edwin ist ein super netter Gastgeber! Man konnte sich super gut mit ihm unterhalten. Das Haus liegt mitten in der Innenstadt, somit konnte ma Amsterdam super einfach und zu Fuß erkunden. Ich würde jeder Zeit wieder dort mein Zimmer buchen.

The house was in a nice central position and a few minutes away from basically any place you want to see in Amsterdam.
The host is nice and his cat is cool.
The only kinda weird thing is the overprice of 30€ a night for an extra guest (extra as in 2 people instead of one for a room listed as double)

Super accueil de la part de Edwin.
Chambre propre et un plein centre ville. Idéal pour un week-end.
Great space & location. Edwin is easy to talk to & responds quickly when you need help. Highly recommend
Great host and comfy place well located

Edwin was extremely friendly and was a great help after I missed my flight - appreciate the hospitality dude!

Location was perfect

Nice room, nice host, nice city!

It is a quite noisy place, because it is located at a trendy district, but it did not really bothered me.
Everything ok and as expected. Great location!

Stanza molto bella e comoda, per le dimensioni delle camere di amsterdam è anche grande.
Vicino a coffè shop e ristoranti a buon prezzo.
a 350m da the dampkring
Awesome place to stay at, with great location and a super nice host. Thank you Edwin!

Edwin was an amazing host. the room and bathroom were clean and comfortable.
there where some noice from the street but way less than expected.
the place is centrally located and easy to travel to and from.
5/5
Edwin is really nice! Felt like I was greeting a friend and the location of the Airbnb is perfect! I recommend it!

Habitación muy acogedora y céntrica, tiene todo lo necesario para la estancia, baño, cama, posibilidad de tomar café o té, confortable y con calefacción.
Edwin es muy amable, te saluda todas las mañanas.

Edwin was so nice.
Location is perfect.
Very cozy and lovely room.
Cat is so cute too.

The location can't be better, Edwin is a nice host that takes care of everything so quickly, the room was comfy and tidy, and if you are a cat lover, you may find the cutest one here.. Just bring noise canceling headphones or earplugs! I have one so very up to revisit someday later :)
Right in the center of Amsterdam, great price and a kind host! Willing to repeat as soon as possible
Best host ever
El alojamiento está increíble con excelente ubicación y la habitación muy cómoda, Edwin es súper atento y te ayuda en lo que necesites, recomiendo su hogar
Everything was great, super clean, perfect location. Edwin is very friendly!

Lugar muy acogedor, muy céntrico, a minutos de los
Museos y lugares de interés, variedad de comida en el sector.
Great location, great host, the street can be a little loud at night, but no problem if you bring good earplugs. I had no issues.

Really cute appartement in the centrum of Amsterdam. Location is perfect, only 20 minutes walk from the train station and the neighborhood is really animated so lots of things to do close to the habitation. Edwin is the funniest host, really nice and very communicative. I recommend 100%.
Best location ever, very central and very clean place. Perfect for short stay. Edwin is a lovely host. Would recommand

Edwin was a fabulous host, greeted me personally when I arrived and was very happy to give me any tips and advice on the city. He also helped me carry my bags into and exiting the flat! The location is right in the middle of everything and perfect for a tourist. Couldn't have been better! My favorite Airbnb stay to date!

Edwins place is in the middle of downtown with only a 5 minute walk to a tram station, meaning that you can go pretty much anywhere easily within a reasonable time. The apartment was clean and tidy, the bathroom was also cleaned and freshened up every day. There was a fridge and a water heater, free coffee- and tea-pouches, towels and a wardrobe. As it is downtown, the noise can be pretty loud at night, but I brought earplugs and was reasonably tired after a day of exploring Amsterdam, so it did not become a noticable issue for me. All-in-all I can fully recommend this apartment for an authentic experience in Amsterdam.

El alojamiento de Edwin es increíble. Justo en el corazón de la ciudad, lo cual hace que ir a cualquier parte sea muy fácil y rápido. El cuarto es muy grande y bonito, con vista a la calle.

Edwin es súper amable y siempre está atento de que estés pasando un buen momento.

Gracias por todo!! 💜
La ubicación es increíble, cerca de todo y muy seguro.

The place is perfectly central, very clean and comfy. The street is noisy but full of bars and not clubs so you can sleep at some point for sure, just bring earplugs if you’re sensitive about people’s voices or morning noises as the window is not quite soundproofed.
Evin konumu oldukça iyi, her yere yürüme mesafesinde. Canlı bir sokak olduğundan müzik sesi fazla ancak uyuyamayacak kadar rahatsız etmiyor. Evin temizliği ve odalar da gayet güzel, tavsiye ederim.

Hey guys, this place is just amazing! Location-wise is just fantastic, located right in the middle of the city and everything is just so accessible, a grocery shop just 2 minutes away and loads of restaurants and cafes right outside the door. Edwin is just such an amazing host and made my entire stay so comfortable and relaxing. He's extremely welcoming and hospitable. I forgot to bring my plug adapter with me and he borrowed me his phone charger for the whole of my stay and was so grateful for that, especially when it was already so late and the electronics store were already closed. Definitely, would 100% recommend you to stay here! Although do bear in mind that it is located on a street with cafes and coffeeshops that stay open till super late and that it can get quite noisy at night but it was fine with me because I sleep like a log.
Edwin’s a very accommodating and helpful host. Great central location, clean and private space. Highly recommended.

Absolutely amazing stay at Edwin’s place. It was our first visiting Amsterdam, and Edwin’s place was perfect. It’s right in the centre of town, we walked everywhere. The room had a lovely view of the street and the bathroom had everything we needed. Edwin is super friendly and always up for a chat! 100% recommend staying at Edwin’s if you are visiting Amsterdam.
Good
It was really good experience to stay at a typical amsterdam house and Edwin was friendly. The only bad thing is the bath room key was old and too hard so I was struggle to open it.
I had an amazing stay in Amsterdam

Edwin is super friendly and answers texts quickly. He has an answer for everything and was so helpful! The room was just as pictured. Clean and cozy! It is noisy, but the location is incredible - and who needs to get a lot of sleep on vacation?! I definitely recommend this stay!
Great accommodation! Edwin was so nice and patient when we were late. Such a good room! Edwin was the best host ever! And the location was amazing. Thank you!

Edwin’s apartment was perfect for my trip. The location is great, close enough to walk to all the sites; excellent location for visiting all the attractions. The place is stylish, clean and simply wonderful.
Edwin is an amazing host, very kind, gracious and responsive!
I would recommend the place to anyone staying in Amsterdam!

Nachdem ich mit Edwin die genaue Uhrzeit abgestimmt hatte, wann ich ankomme, war ich quasi auch schon fast da.
Ich kam an und war zunächst überwältigt, wie toll die Lage der Unterkunft ist! Gegen Mittag kam ich also an, wurde freudig begrüßt, ins Zimmer begleitet und habe dann das Wlan-Passwort und den Schlüssel bekommen.
Das Zimmer ist wirklich niedlich und auch das Badezimmer völlig ausreichend und es fehlte einem an Nichts.
Man war wirklich direkt mittendrin! Was abends und nachts schon eher laut war aber das wusste ich ja vorher, da die ganze Straße voll mit Bars und Restaurants ist - dann weiß man aber gleich, wo man essen gehen kann 😉
auch das auschecken verlief unkompliziert.
Ich werde auf alle Fällen wiederkommen! Diese Unterkunft ist wirklich ein Bonbon ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
I really had a great stay, no bad surprises it was perfect
Great location, host, and city!

The perfect place to stay in Amsterdam. Great location, within walking distance of everything you could ever want. Check in was easy. The room is very cute, clean, safe. Locks on the inside & outside. Edwin was the best host, gave me recommendations of places to go that ended up being amazing. Loud at night with the partying outside but with a fan on you can still sleep well.

Eine kleine schnuckelige Unterkunft.
Wer einen leichten Schlaf hat , sollte oropax für die Zeit von 22:00 bis ca. 24:00 Uhr am besten aus Silikon mitbringen.
Mit den Dingern im Ohr schläft es sich dann super.
Edwin ist sehr nett und hilfsbereit.
Cute apartment in the center of the city. Its in the tourist area so it can get loud at night but also close to things you might want to do around. Host is helpful and nice.
Really great place to stay if you're in Amsterdam for a few days. Great location as the bars are just around the corner and it's just a short walk to the central area or the museum quarter.

Edwin is very friendly and helpful! The location of his place is the best location you can have in Amsterdam especially, solo traveller! I will definitely stay at his place again in the future if I have a chance to visit Amsterdam again!

Awesome location!! Very cute room and fun view onto the street for great people watching. A bit noisy at night but that comes with the area. Close to public transportation and lots of great shops and restaurants. Would love to stay here again!
Super cosy location

Edwin is great and provides all the extras that you might need. Location is centrally located and close to restaurants/bars/shopping/transportation. Room was quite noisy at night since it overlooks a busy bar/restaurant street but I just used earplugs and slept fine.

Edwin is a wonderful host and his townhouse is perfectly located to let you get the most out of your time in Amsterdam, the room had all the amenities expected and there are plenty of Bars and restaurants nearby

Fantastic place, comfortable and super central. Overlooking a busy street with bars and restaurants open late so can be an issue if you're a light sleeper, but I loved it! Can't wait to stay again on a future visit.

There’s pros and cons. Pros you’re in the middle of central Amsterdam. Con it is on a party strip, so noise does go all night. It didn’t bother me but if noises do bother you bring earplugs. Accurate to the pictures. Would definitely stay at this location again! Edwin is fast on responding if you need anything!

Everything went smoothly since I have booked a room, till I came to Amsterdam and met wit Edwin, which was on the work, but he'd rush from his work to check me in.
You'll got 2 keys, one for the main door, the other for your room. Nice bathroom just next to your room to do all of your "cleaning" routine.
Location is top in Amsterdam. Centar.
Excellent communication via messages, fast response from him.
Edwin, I'll return for sure!

El lugar está en el centro de todo. Decidí disfrutar de la vida nocturna de Ámsterdam por lo que estar acá fue perfecto. Tenía a lado coffee shop y cerca bares y restaurantes. La habitación es cómoda y prefiero siempre dormir solo que compartir habitación, así que eso estuvo bien. El baño fue compartido pero todos los huéspedes muy respetuosos. 100% recomendado.
Edwin’s Guest house is in a great location. Both the bathroom & bedroom were very clean. Transportation from central station was easy. I will be back again

Edwin was very friendly and accommodating. He met me as promised and was available for anything I needed. The room and bathroom were very clean/well maintained.
This house is in the middle of everything so it is not meant for a peaceful getaway. A fair trade for being close to everything!
Owner is cool, location is awsome. Was a relly good trip ! Thanks !

암스테르담 중심부에 지내시고 싶다면 좋은 방입니다. 시내 한복판에서 이 가격을 찾기는 쉽지 않을 겁니다.
장점으로는, 호스트가 정말 친절하고 소통하기도 편했습니다. 방이나 화장실 상태도 좋았습니다.
시내 한복판에 있어서 어디든 금방 갈 수 있다는 점도 장점이 될 수 있습니다.
다만 이 부분이 단점이기도한데, 집 바로 아래 거리가 식당, 펍 등이 이어져 있는 곳이라 밤에 좀 많이 시끄럽습니다.
특히 저는 금토일 3일동안 머물었는데, 이어플러그를 사용해도 바깥 음악소리까지 다 들립니다. 밖 소음이 새벽 4시까지는 이어져서 잠귀가 밝으시다면 비추입니다. 자려고 누웠는데 너무 시끄러워서 이태원 길바닥에 누워있으면 이정도이지 않을까 싶었습니다.

주변의 펍, 식당 등에서 밤 늦게까지 즐기고 싶으신 분들에게는 추천드리고, 밤에 조용히 쉬고 싶으신 분들에게는 비추입니다.

The house is small (typical Amsterdam) but there is everything you need. Edwin is a super nice host and always there for a small chat. He cares about his guests and takes care of the rooms, the bathroom was very clean!
The house is very close to the city center, if you need a quiet place to sleep maybe something different would be better for you but I liked it very much to stay close to bars, restaurants and the centre.
Thanks for hosting me Edwin!

Edwin is a great host.  The place had great personal touches and decorations.  It was ver clean and fresh.  I felt right at home.  The location is central to everything.  Great restaurants and bars right there.
Great stay. Thanks!

The location was perfect for me. Walking distance to everywhere. Edwin received me on arrival
I didn't saw him much, but everything was ok, and communication was very smooth.

Amazing location. It's in a busy area of Amsterdam, and conveniently located literally right next to a great coffee shop too.
Edwin was great, polite always on time and super friendly. The apartment was cozy, cute and clean with reasonable price!
Lovely place, very good location and nice host, 10/10:)
The location is perfect. Very clean. Host is very nice and flexible. I will be staying here again in the future.
Super séjour de 3jours passé chez Edwin. Hôte très accueillant et super sympathique. Chambre propre et conforme à la description. Rien de plus à ajouter.
Das Zimmer war sauber, Lage Top👍🏼  Edwin war auch ein sehr netter Gastgeber. :)
Great location, just in the heart of Amsterdam. Clean and Tiddy Room 👌

If you are traveling alone to Amsterdam, there’s no better spot to stay than with Edwin. His house is so well located, easy to traverse to Vondelpark, Centraal, Jordaan etc., and the room is so cute and charming. Edwin himself is responsive and kind and if you’re lucky, Puki will take a liking to you as well.
Great location and nice, comfortable room.
It was great! Thanks for all

Stayed 2 nights at Edwin's place. Location seems to be ideal for exploring Amsterdam on foot. The room quite small and noisy (several bars and restaurants are extremely close) - but earplugs did their job and noise was a non-issue. The stairs to the room is very steep. Communication with Edwin went very well.
Habitación comoda, ubicación excepcional  y edwin es un excelente anfitrión
Edwin was very lovely and accommodating. The room was clean and spacious with a clean bathroom and perfect location
Very nice and spaced flat, in the very center of amsterdam, near everything you'll need and close to beautiful spots.

The experience at Jan's place was great, We arrived into town late and he was most accommodating to meet us at his place close to 10 o'clock at night. The apartment is just as pictured and as clean as you could ask for. We stayed for two days and it was the perfect location, bus stop is less then 1 block away and can easily take you to central station and reach anywhere from there. We couldn't of asked for a better experience and we can thank Jan for that.

Peter's boathouse is everything you need for a short stay in Amsterdam. I had no idea you could have such a large comfortable bed, a fridge and a modern shower in a boat. And considering that we were only 15mn walk from all the cafés, restaurants and lively nightlife, this is the place to stay.

This was a lovely experience staying with Peter. The boat is situated in a walking distance from city centre, yet strategically parked at one of the quieter streets. Peter is a great host, his communication was always swift. He also was very flexible about check-in times.
The host canceled this reservation 3 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.
The flat is big and nice, well located 15 mins from the station and close to city center just 10mins to paperstraat where you can find nice restaurant and a very cozy bar
Everything was perfect and as described. Jan greeted us at the agreed time and was very polite. Slightly marred by abandoned clothes, but all in all everything was great. My advice to others!

Our stay at on the Tasmania was amazing! It was such a unique experience and we highly recommend staying with Sonja and Michael, both lovely and generous hosts.
The room is at the bow of the boat, spacious yet cosy with all the mod cons such as heater, wifi, TV, ipod dock and coffee maker. We were blown away with the finish of the Tasmania - stylish, immaculate, practical and the detail and thought that went into it was evident, from the storage under the bed to the port hole covers. We plan to come back again just to spend some more time on the boat!
The Tasmania is moored to a jetty, a short distance from Tram stop 3, the shopping street Haarlemmerdijk, and approx 15-20 stroll to Central Station.
a lovely spot to stay! Very tasty surrounding, a great view and a welcoming host:-)

It was just amazing! The boat is as nice, if not nicer, than the foto! We spend 2 fantastic night on the Tasmania. It was better than to spend a night in a hotel! The room is really well equiped with TV; Musik; Nespresso; Tea; Fruits; a fridge with drink and food...the furniture are really nice. Everything was perfect! We loved it!
Michael and Sonja are really nice host! Very helpfull, they gave us a lot of information about Amsterdam.
The Tasmania is good located, in a quite place not so far away from the city center. Only 10 min with the bus to the central station. Michael and Sonja gave us 2 bycicles for the weekend. It was fun to discover the city on that way :-)
We will anytime come back again!

Ich habe eine Reise für Freunde organisiert und gebucht. Jan war immer sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Er hat auf meine Rückmeldungen gewartet (die ich zuerst mit meinen Freunden absprechen musste).
Für die Wohnungsübergabe hat er eine Freundin organisiert, die Deutsch sprach, dies hat die Übergabe natürlich leichter gestaltet...
Von meinen Freunden habe ich erfahren, dass die Wohnung sehr schön ist, eine riesengrosse Terasse steht zur Verfügung und die Zimmer sind mit allem was man braucht eingerichtet. Der Standort ist auch sehr gut. Zu Fuss in ca. 20 Minuten von Amsterdam Central erreichbar oder mit dem Tram in 10. (Tramhaltestelle in unmittelbarer Nähe). Meine Freunde waren begeistert :)

Our host arranged for someone to meet us, and they were prompt and extremely helpful with introduction to the home, transportation options, local restaurant recommendation, etc.  A travel guide and travel information to help us around the city was provided for us in the unit. It was just as pictured and was quite lovely and in a quaint neighborhood with a market on the ground floor.  It has easy access to a bus to the central station less than a block away and the tram is just a short walk.  It is also easily walkable to/from the pier if you are coming to Amsterdam from a cruise (15 min).  We had a great stay.

Very good location. Everything we wanted to see was easily reachable by foot. A supermarket is right downstairs. Bus stop just 2 minutes away. Jan wasn't there personally but we were welcomed by a friend of his who was very kind , reliable and available.
Everything was perfect and it allowed us to have a lovely holiday. We will visit again!

Great place, wonderful environment, if you are on foot, by bike or by car, you will find your way to Amsterdam attractions. There is a supermarket on the same  building, what makes things easier to feel like home. Thanks Jan for sharing your space.

L'amie de Jan a été adorable, nous a laissé faire notre check out tardif et nous sommes arrivés vers minuit et elle nous attendait. Les photos magnifie un peu l'appart mais est globalement très agréable, sauf peut être la salle de bain, sans plus. La terrasse par contre est un vrai bonheur!

The apartment was very spacious with everything we needed, the location was very good - away from the noisy center but not too far, a convenient 20 minutes walk.
The communication with the host was very good, Jan reacted immediately to my messages and although we were late to arrive, the check in went smoothly.
Would recommend Jan's apartment.

Everything was as shown. It's a rather large apt. Close to shops and restaurants and just outside the city center(a short walk or quick bike ride)so it was quite. I'd definitely stay here again when I visit.
Great place to stay, recommend for all!

Jan's place is great.
Jan's brother, who met us for checkin was nice and available.
recommend!

Jan is a great host. Fantastic communicator and responds quickly. His location is quiet part of Amsterdam, which I was looking for. Super convenient to be next to national grocery store, shops, etc. Definitely recommend.

Great apartment in a brilliant part of the city. Not too far from the city centre and with a supermarket a 10 second walk away. Easily accessible and with space to park rental bikes, the apartment was clean and tidy and had a nice modern look. Excellent backyard area too. I would definitely recommend staying here!

Jan, was a fantastic host. Communication was superb! Polite and friendly, very quick to reply to any questions i had. Which made my booking, a very pleasant experience. Welcomed with a warm smile, Jan gave us a tour.

The apartment, was great. Clean and modern. Nice outdoor space at the back with an sitting/eating bench, which was a sun trap on my visit, so lovely. Comfy beds. The front room had a projector, my friends enjoyed watching a movie in the evening after a day out. So would be great for the kids also.
Only downside for me is I could not find a kettle. As a brit, this is huge, cup of tea in the morning is routine, but we used a saucepan instead. Keep calm and carry on as we say.

Nice location, only 20 minute walk to central station, it's like a €6/7 uber ride. Has a supermarket right next to the apartment, which was very convenient.

Check it out.
We had a wonderful stay. Jan's place is clean and spacious and very close to the center. Jan was very professional and friendly.

Apartment is nice and not too far from Central Station.  There is a grocery store just below the apartment which is very nice.  The toilet room has an occasional odor from the sewer.  Overall I would stay here again.
Everything is perfect. It's big enough for 4 people. Have to bedroom and a veranda. And near the bus station.

Thank you for hosting us! We had a great time. Jan's place is in a quiet, safe little neighborhood. 10 minutes walking from the main nightlife scene and 15 minutes walking from central station. It features just about everything you need! We will be back!

We loved Jan's place! It was in a nice, safe area conveniently right next to a small food market. The apartment was very spacious and nice. The beds were comfy, and the outdoor balcony/patio was an added bonus. Would definitely recommend.

The apartment is so close to tram station and it takes 15-20 minutes walk to the central station. The rooms are very clean and comfortable.
Jan is very communicative that we could get in touch with him before and during our stay. thank you Jan 👍🏻✌🏻

Jan's unit is in a perfect location and the kitchen and lounge were great.  The patio was definitely a bonus as well. He was very responsive and check in was very easy.  The unit does have one flight of stairs (it is common for Europeans to have a floor 0 and then 1st which is confusing to Americans, 1st floor means one flight of stairs with no elevator, normally not an issue but we had BIG suitcases). We did have a couple of minor issues that we have passed on to Jan but nothing that would keep us from renting this unit again.  Thank you for a great stay in Amsterdam!!!
Outstanding place. Huge apartment compared to others I have stayed at in Amsterdam. Would highly recommend
Me and my friends had a nice stay in Jan's apartment. It's a good place to start your explorations to the city centre from. We didn't have any problems and found everything we needed.

Jans place perfectly met all our needs. All the creature comforts of home, in a quiet area, nice walking distance to all the local hotspots. Had great communication from Jan prior to arrival and Merel his friend who greeted us and gave us plenty of tips for getting around. All in all had an excellent stay!
It was perfect location for our trip.
Good place, great location, and brilliant communication
Très bon séjour dans cet appartement plutôt calme. Accès au centre ville à vélo ou en bus en quelques minutes. Commerce alimentaire sous l'immeuble,  pratique !  Nou recommandons.
This place was a great spot. Location was within walking distance to the city center.

Jan saved our weekend ! He answered very quickly and helped us out (my first reservation was a fake and we had no place to go) ! He is really friendly and the flat is very nice (two real bedrooms) and not so far from the center (15min by walk) ! Without hesitation I recommend Jan
Jan's place was spacious, meets all the description on his listing. But the best part of Jan's fast response. Thank you again for making it a pleasant stay.
I would highly recommend Jan’s place for a stay in Amsterdam. Great area and zero issues during our visit here, the sun was shining and the garden was a huge advantage.

We had a nice stay at Jan's apartment in Amsterdam. The apartment had all that we needed and the location was really good for us with a grocery store just next door.

Jan was helpful and swift to respond to our messages. We had an issue with the toilet but we were quickly able to find a mutual agreement that satisfied both parties.
Fantastic place in a great location. Jan was helpful and quick to respond from booking to our last day.

Jan was an excellent host. He was willing to let us have an early check-in and answered all of our questions. The location of the apartment was great. It was easy to walk to Amsterdam centrum and was located right above a grocery store.
Nice place in central Amsterdam. Jan was helpful and accommodating.
Great place, quiet and close to everything

Spent 4 great nights at a cozy nice place in a quiet area in east amsterdam 20 min by tram from city centre.
Jan is a nice host and he made everything quick and easy to enjoy! Recommended
We all really enjoyed our stay here, the apartment is fantastic and Jan was extremely helpful.
Super helpfull and overall very friendly guy. He was very flexible, and made time out of his day to make our day better. Nothing to complain about, 10/10

Beautifully decorated and comfortable apartment in a quiet and beautiful part of the city. Loved the proximity to the brewery t ij :) the patio and hammock was so nice to hang out on as well. If you’re looking for an authentic, cool apartment to stay in while visiting amsterdam that’s in a less busy part of the city, this is your place.
Central location, nice host, good view

I do loved to stay there, it was so nice, i do felt like an Amsterdamer!! Thanks Joanna for all your help before and while we were there. I Hope to stay in Multatuli's house again. I miss my bedroom:)
Greetings xxx

We couldn't have imagined a more wonderful apartment--light and airy, spotless, perfectly appointed and located--or more warm and helpful hosts. We've rented many apartments, and this was, by far, the best. We hope to return before long!

Thanks again, Joanna and MP

Jo and Mp were great hosts, and their apartment is absolutely gorgeous and ideally located for exploring Amsterdam. The apartment is very comfortable and immaculately clean - it is just like the pictures but more charming in person! There is a bike shop right around the corner where you can pick up your wheels, or you can easily take the metro or walk to central locations. Half a block away is one of the most lively streets in Amsterdam, with lots of cute, small shops and restaurants. Walk a half block in the other direction and you're on a picturesque canal. It is also a very easy walk from the central station. I really can't say enough good things about this place - I would love to stay here again when I return to Amsterdam :)

We had a fantastic experience (my first with AirBnB). The flat was immaculate and every bit as beautiful as the photos. Joanna (the hostess) was helpful, communicative, and charming. The location was nigh-perfect; a short walk away from the touristy areas, but outside the bright bustle of central Amsterdam, and a stone's throw away from some lovely pubs and the famous canals.

Honestly, can't recommend enough.

Fantastic apt, fantastic position!
Really recommended!

Joanna's and MP's apartment is perfect! The location couldn't be better, it's very central and everything's a pleasant walk away.

You can see how much they care in the way they've arranged the rooms. I wish MY apartment looked this good! Everything we needed was there and all in great condition.

We would definitely stay here again in a heart beat!
Great place, location, apartment, excellent trip in Amsterdam for 3 days, and very nice & friendly host with Jo & MP. We can only recommend this place !

We were fortunate to stay in Joanna and MP’s well-appointed, stylish flat during our stay in Amsterdam. Joanna was very accommodating and we especially appreciated the listing of recommended food, dining, shopping, etc. in the area. We would love to visit again.

The Tasmania was one of the nicest places I've ever stayed.

It is just like in the pictures: light, modern and unique. My boyfriend is now very keen to buy a houseboat!

Sonja and her husband were friendly, engaging and welcoming hosts. When we arrived, we meant to go straight out and explore Amsterdam, but ended up taking naps, eating snacks from the complimentary food and drinks they'd left us and generally chilling out on the houseboat because it was such a nice space to be in. We used the bikes nearly everyday and Sonja gave us very good recommendations for restaurants and bars locally (including a restaurant on an oil rig). It was in a great location-peaceful, but with the city centre easily walkable/cyclable.

Siobhan and Ali
Beautiful and cosy room in a boat, with lovely bathroom.

Well i can just recommend it,  is a great space to be, you are close to the city and feel the sea, the host are great, they give us great tips about where to go. if you are planing to visit Amsterdam this one must!

В Амстердаме надо обязательно жить на лодке и ездить на велосипеде. "Тасмания" -- идеальный вариант.
Хозяева гостеприимные и радушные. Комната очень светлая и уютная, есть все необходимое. Вдобавок -- велосипеды на всё время проживания, что очень упрощает перемещение по городу.
Удобное расположение: до Центрального вокзала 25 минут пешком, 10 -- на велосипеде. Поблизости есть несколько ресторанов и магазинов.
Мы отлично провели время на "Тасмании". Всем рекомендуем.

This place is simply A DREAM COME TRUE!! Everything is perfect, of good taste and clean.   We couldn't asked for more...we felt immediately welcome by Sonja.  We got to meet better both her and her husband and they are beautiful people so interesting and willing to share the boat experience with us. We will definitely go  back there for our next trip to Amsterdam!!

Sonja ist eine sehr angenehme Gastgeberin und  das Boot ist toll!  Wir hatten drei abwechslungsreiche Tage in Amsterdam, dank speziellen Restauranttipps von Sonja und Fahrrädern zum Gratis-Gebrauch. Unbedingt empfehlenswert!

Sonja was a wonderful host! The accommodations were immaculate, and the hospitality was amazing. Staying in the studio was like spending 3 days inside of an inspiring design catalog, full of delicious snacks and beverages. I couldn't recommend a place more!

wir waren 26 und 27 April 2013 zum zweitem mal auf dem Wohnboot von Sonja und Michiel und es war schon wieder besser als wir erwartet hatten. Schön, funktional, gemütlich und sehr bequem, wir können nur ein herzliches Dankeschön sagen für die wunderbare, ja magische Tagen die wir auf den Tasmania verbringen dürften. Amsterdam ist natürlich auf sich selbst schon sehr spezial, aber wenn man sich dann noch so schon zurückziehen kann und wieder wach wird und dass Sonnenlicht spiegelt einen an die decke und es kommt einen so vor als habe man die Nacht auf eine Wolke geschlafen, dass ist dann schon wirklich einzelartig! Wir können es nur von ganzem Herzen weiter empfählen. Natürlich möchten wir auch noch erwähnen, dass man zwei Fahrräder zu Verfügung hat obwohl der Weg zur Fuss Richtung Dammplein Zentrum über den Haarlemerdijk und Haarlemmerstraat unser Erachtens denn weitaus schönste Spaziergang in Amsterdam ist. Alles Liebe von Rosario und Frederik de Vries Herisau Schweiz

We had 2 wonderful nights at Sonja's. Not only the weather was great and we celebrated Queen's day, but the room in the houseboat really matched our expectations. It is a hidden gem, close to the Jordan area and within 10-15 minutes by bike from the city centre. The room is really comfy with very good standard for cooking facilities, bedding and bathroom. You also have the feeling to really be on a boat, but in a very quiet area of Amsterdam. Finally, do not hesitate to explore the North of Amsterdam via the Ferry, you are very close from the new Film museum (the Eye) and typical dutch suburbs and villages by the IJ. Sonja was a very nice host, and offered 2 bikes to borrow for free. We also enjoyed the sun on the dek.

I booked the Tasmania as a surprise 50th birthday present for my partner. It turned out to be a truly wonderful experience. Sonja had thought of every small detail. There were drinks, snacks and sufficient food for breakfast and a picnic the following day. The Tasmania is modern, airy, light and clean and we felt very happy, safe and content staying there. We loved being able to use the bikes and had great fun cycling round Amsterdam for 3 days. We absolutely loved the location beacause it was so peaceful, a great retreat after a busy day in the city. We had a fantastic experience and hope to return.

Thank you for your really warm welcome! it was all perfect! amazing boat and amazing city!!!! Awesome! it all looks like on the pics published and there was no bad surprise, at all :-))))
Das Hausboot war wirklich traumhaft schön und wir haben die Zeit in Amsterdam in Ruhe auf dem Boot sehr genossen!
Perfekte location, perfekte Gastgeber!

100%ig empfehlenswert!

Vielen DANK!!!!!!!
sehr netter Kontakt, klasse Unterkunft, super Verpflegung, alles in allem absolut empfehlenswert

We stayed at Sonja's comfortable and beautifully designed houseboat and enjoyed every minute of our stay!
Every little thing is so well and thoughtfully organized, you feel been taken care off and as if at home. Unlike many hotels and places we stayed there is a touch of host's personality and a feeling as if they created this space for themselfs, not worse.
Also Sonja was very helping and prompt in any request and issue we addressed her and provided service above our expectations.
The space is in a great location. Peter is very friendly and accommodating. The bed is very comfortable. And the cat, Binky, is a bonus for those people that miss their pets while traveling.

It was amazing. Staying on a house boat in the middle of Amsterdam was surreal and peter made us feel very comfortable and at home. His cat was also a friendly plus. I highly recommend this spot for couples. 10 out of 10

If you are looking for an authentic houseboat experience in Amsterdam, Peter's lovely listing is perfect for you. The boat is near the university, with cafes, a tram stop, and the zoo only a few minutes away. The heart of the city takes about 15 minutes to reach via the tram.

The boat was clean, and Peter was friendly and helpful. He welcomed us with wine, Stroopwaffles, and information about the city to make our stay more memorable.

A perfect place for a perfect trip !
The boat is amazing, and pleansant.
Really nice neighborhood, a quiet street but very close to the center !
Peter is very kind and available.
And the cat is (in french :) ) LE PETIT PLUS !
Sorry, I thought what I just wrote was public!

Boat life suited us well, a fantastic way to experience this beautiful city. Everything you need is on the boat but shops, cafes and bars all 5 mins away and Peter was always at hand to help with anything we needed.

Would recommend this stay for anyone wanting an authentic canal side experience in Amsterdam.
We had a great stay on the beautiful boat and definitely recommend it!

Петер приятный, гостеприемный и деликатный человек. Очень подробно ввел нас с 11 летним сыном в свою обитель-лодку, предложил свою помощ по вопросам связаным с городом. Мы ночевали одну ночь на лодке, находящейся с одной стороны в центре города, но в укромном, тихом местечке. Было чисто и уютно, вид на канал с плавающими утками и плачуще ивой просто потрясающий. Очень рекомендуем лодку Петера. Незабывающееся, уникальное переживание.
Спасибо Петер!

Peter's boathouse is really cosy! It's small so if you like having a lot of space, it's not for you. But small doesn't mean uncomfortable; the boathouse has everything one needs: heating, running water, electricity. It's also very well situated; close to the city centre and yet very quiet!
Es ist total kuschelig in dem Böttchen.

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour à Amsterdam grâce à Peter.
La qualité et la localisation de son logement atypique, cooconning et fonctionnel, ponctué de chaleureuses petites attentions qui nous attendaient à l'intérieur.
Nous recommandons à tout duo de touristes souhaitant loger au calme et profiter jusqu'au bout de la promiscuité des canaux de la ville ce logement qui a plus que répondu à nos espérances !

Faustine&Greg

A unique and lovely place to stay for 2 people. I was there with my 14 year old daughter for the weekend. It was safe, cosy, impeccably clean and very comfortable. The tram is close by and you can walk everywhere too. Staying on the water in such a beautiful part of Amsterdam made it a very memorable trip.

Wir hatten 4 wunderbare Tage auf Peters Wohn-Boot. Die Lage ist optimal: sehr ruhig und trotzdem zentral. Das Boot ist zwar klein, aber sehr liebevoll und zweckmäßig eingerichtet. Peter ist ein aufmerksamer und sehr hilfsbereiter Gastgeber.

We had a lovely stay at Peter's houseboat! It has a beautiful terrace where you can sit outside and watch the swans and people pass by on boats. It was the perfect cozy place to come back to each day. We wish we could have stayed longer. The boat is just around the corner from the tram and is walking distance to many things. It has all the amenities you need and is the perfect size for one or two people. Meeting Binky, the houseboat cat, was an added bonus since we miss our pets back home. We hope to be able to stay here again someday.

We had a wonderful experience in Amsterdam and staying at the KeizerInn ship was a significant part of our experience. We felt very welcomed, the location was excellent:  quiet, comfortable, close to sites, and very safe.  It was especially meaningful to stay on a canal boat in this lovely city. We would highly recommend the KeizerInn to other travelers to Amsterdam!
A truly amazing boat on the canal. Fantastic location and Peter was a very friendly and helpful host. You really feel part of Amsterdam staying here. Hopefully we will be back for another visit.
Il soggiorno in barca è stato parte integrante della nostra esperienza ad Amsterdam: insolito, e se vogliamo romantico! Bella anche la zona, tranquilla e verde, ma vicina alla fermata della metro.

My partner and I stayed 4 nights on the boat. It is in a great location, away from all of the tourists but also close enough to stroll in to the centre. We were a little concerned about how secure it would be however it was in a very safe area and was easy to lock up and leave with out being concerned about our belongings. Both Peter and Jeroen were lovely, up for a chat and always had friendly smiles☺️ we would definitely love to return. Could sit up on the deck/in the cabin for hours just watching the world go by!

Wir hatten wundervolle Zeit in Amsterdam! Das Boot ist toll und liebevoll eingerichtet, die Location wunderschön, zentral und ruhig und die Gastgeber hatten an alles gedacht: man fühlt sich willkommen. Danke dafür!

I came to Amsterdam to celebrate my birthday. I found the apartment in exceptionally clean condition. The street seems noisy during the day but was quite at night. All the appliences were brand new and working. The owners were freindly although I communicate with them only via internet. I highly recomend this apartment. Its worth every dollar,great central location is a bonus.
Fantastic! Jo was a very gracious hostess and made us feel welcome. The apartment exceeded my expectations and we will definitely retun. What a great location.
Original pour un sejour a 2, proche de tout mais neammoins au calme, parfait pour une visite à velo, en laissant la voiture au park n ride.
Le bateau de Peter est extra ! Logement insolite, très bien situé, dans un quartier tranquille. Nous avons été acceuilli comme des rois et avons passé un très bon séjour à Amsterdam.

It was great to stay on this lovely little house boat. Everything we needed was available. The City centre is very closed.
Our extra tipp: take your bikes with you (if possible) or rent bikes in Amsterdam. It was a great adventure to explore the city on our bikes.
We would love to come again
We enjoyed the stay, the boat and the beautiful city of Amsterdam. Peter is super supportive and a great host. Would definitely come back!

If there were more than 5 stars for each review point we would give it. Peter was a great host always on hand if needed even for a friendly chat. The cabin was clean and we spent very enjoyable times on the deck of the boat watching the world go by on the canal. This boat stay is a must for any couples who want to feel like a local. Thanks again Peter. Jane & David

Sehr hübsches und gemütliches Hausboot! Peter hat bei der Ausstattung wirklich an alles gedacht und auch die Sauberkeit ließ keinen Wunsch offen! Das Bett war für uns genau richtig, nach einem anstrengenden Tag kann man gut in der weichen Matratze versinken und sich in die gut duftende Bettwäsche kuscheln.
Der Kontakt zu Peter war sehr gut, wir konnten uns per Nachrichten über unseren Ankunftszeitpunkt austauschen. Auch falls wir während unseres Aufenthaltes fragen gehabt hätten, wäre er zur Stelle gewesen denn er bewohnt den vorderen Teil des Bootes.
Das Boot liegt in einer ruhigen Seitenstraße und etwa 10-15 Gehminuten vom Zentrum entfernt. Öffentliche Verkehrsmittel sind nach kurzem Fußmarsch zu erreichen.

Fazit: Es gab für uns nichts auszusetzen, wir werden definitiv wieder kommen!

We spent two nights on Peters boat and it was an excellent experience, although the living space is small it is equipped with everything that you could need and is situated in a beautiful, peaceful part of the city.

De Keizerinn ist mit viel Liebe zum Detail eingerichtet und es wurde an alles gedacht. Alles war sehr sauber und die gastgeber supernett und unkompliziert. Zentrale und doch ruhige lage mit herrlichem ausblick. einfach entspannen...wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!
Fantastic accommodation in a quiet but well connected location.

We had an amazing time staying here at the House boat, the location is excellent close to Jordaan very peaceful location and easy to find and reach. The "apartment" was very tidy and modern.
And the snacks and foods in the fridge really saved my day. Sonja was a lovely host and I will certainly stay here again. Thanks again!
-Robert

Eine tolle sehr detailreiche Unterkunft im modernen Stil.
Wirklich nette und sehr aufmerksame, aber in keiner Weise störend.
...hier kann man die Seele baumeln lassen
Very nice and clean apartment at an excellent location!
Great location, amazing hosts, beautiful and clean apartment :)
Perfect accomodation, nice owners ! Would definately recommend it to anyone willing to spend some days in Amsterdam

Beautiful, clean, and comfortable apartment in the heart of Amsterdam. Great hosts very accommodating, my 7 friends and I had a wonderful experience and would be glad to stay here again if we get the chance to go back!

We loved this apartment! It is a perfect location in Amsterdam, super clean with everything you need. The beds were very comfortable with nice duvets. Joanna was a great host. She welcomed us upon arrival and helped us with everything we needed. We would love to stay here again!
Great stay in an immaculately presented and perfectly equipped apartment.  It is also in an excellent location and we wouldn't hesitate to return.  Thanks again Joanna and MP.

We had the absolute pleasure of staying at this amazing home earlier this month for a few nights.  It was absolutely perfect in terms of location, luxury and most importantly, comfort!  Joanne and her husband are such amazing hosts we didn't want to leave! She even brought toys for the tiny tots we had in tow.  Can't recommend highly enough and would definitely stay again! Thanks!

We were visiting Amsterdam for a business trip and decided to give airbnb a try. Turned out it was a very good decision.
From the first contact Joanna was super friendly, described everything we needed to know and was waiting for us to arrive.
There is only one word for the apartment: WOW!
Everything was super clean and there is a lot of space. The living room is great, and if it is raining outside a DVD player and a very fine choice of DVDs wait for you, but also you will find good books around the flat. The bedrooms are huge and very modern. The bathroom new and comfortable.
The flat is in walking distance from the center, we never needed a Taxi to get back, and still it is very silent in the night.
I will definitely come back.

A group of 8 friends stayed in this wonderful apartment the beginning of Dec. It was exactly as the pictures, VERY clean and VERY stylish and could not of asked for a better location. We will return and I very much recommend staying here. Jo and MP were very very helpful. I would like to Say a huge thank you to them for letting people stay and experience your amazing, apartment ! :)

We arrived to Amsterdam early on a sunday morning and Jo was more than happy to take our luggage and look after it, whilst the apartment was cleaned from the previous people staying ( we knew this was the case before hand). She was extremely friendly, had excellent recommendations, and we just knew we'd found a great stay! The apartment was clean, modern and had lots of space, it was also perfectly located for good cafes & nice walks. The bedrooms were cosy and we would have all like to have stayed on. In fact two of our group did and Jo and MP were more than accommodating. We really couldn't speak highly enough - we felt they went above and beyond there duties. We had the most wonderful of family breaks and Jo & MP were apart of making it so great. We would highly recommend this apartment and we will be back!!!!

My husband, three daughters and i absolutely loved staying in the Historic Multatuli home of Jo and MP Van Dijk. The apartment was as beautiful as the photos. We found it to be so spacious and spotless.  There were lots of "extras" such as guide books, dvds and kitchen basics. The beds were very comfortable with nice linens and feather pillows. This fully equipped home, located in a quiet residential part of Amsterdam is a great find. We highly recommend the Multatuli and hope to be back. Jo and MP were perfects hosts.

Our family of 5, with 1 extra stayed at Jo and MP's apartment in December 2012. Jo was extremely helpful prior to our booking, and provided us with plenty of information on what to see in Amsterdam once we arrived. The apartment is very close to Amsterdam Centraal Station, and is situated in a lovely part of the town, with everything you would need nearby. As with any Amsterdam apartment, the stairs are very steep, but this did not detract from our enjoyment of the apartment. I would thoroughly recommend this apartment.

Five of us stayed in Joanna and MP's beautiful apartment. It is in one of the best locations in Amsterdam, in a quiet street 5 minutes walk from Centraal Station with fabulous restaurants, bars, shops, supermarket all within 1-2 minutes walk. The apartment itself is wonderful, very well equipped, stylish and immaculate. Joanna is a very welcoming host and provided us with excellent recommendations. We had such a fantastic family break and we will definitely be returning! Thanks again.

January 2013 I've spent 2 nights in this beautifull appartment with 6 of my friends. It was absolutly amazing. The appartment is very comfortable and relaxing. Also it's very well situated in an upcoming touristic neighbourhood and within walking distance of all major attractions.
