It was also nice that it was close to the railway station so it was easy to reach.

This is a terrific apartment on three floors. Somewhere a large family or up to three couples could stay comfortably for an extended period. It really is as generously proportioned as the photos suggest. It is newly renovated, in perfect condition and very quiet. It is in a fabulous location.

One thing to note for the mobility challenged: as is quite typical in Amsterdam, especially for a house over 300 years old, the stairs are very steep and quite narrow.

Jo, MP and their two beautiful little girls live on the first two floors. Jo and MP were attentive hosts.

A solid five stars with no reservations whatsoever.

Me and 4 friends stayed at Joanna's apartment for 4 nights and absolutely loved it. The apartment is even more beautiful in real life and very cosy! There was snow outside but we were very snug. Kitchen was equipped with everything we needed and even spare toiletries in the bathrooms! I could not recommend the apartment more. Joanna is a brilliant host and helped us with places to visit and directions! We will definitely be back. Thank you!

We had a great stay in the Multatuli apartment. The neighbourhood is fantastic, with the canals, great shops and numerous restaurants and bars just around the corner. The apartment has everything you can think of and is exactly as you would expect from the pictures. Nice living, great kitchen, and beautiful bedrooms (great linen) & bathrooms. Everything was arranged for and communications with Jo were good, easy and extremely quick. We would recommend anyone (except for people who cannot easily climb the stairs) to stay here. Amsterdam at its best!

The appartment is smashing !
Excellent position in the historical center of Amsterdam, surrounded by beautiful canals.
Nice place to stay for a short but intensive stay :-)

Es war ein Traumurlaub auf dem Boot. Sonja ist eine hervorragende Gastgeberin. Mit viel Liebe und Details ist die Unterkunft ausgestattet. Die Lage zur Stadt ist genial und mit den Fahrrädern einfach perfekt. Immer wieder und gern weiterempfohlen.

I can only recommend the Tasmania in Amsterdam !! We had a beautiful 2 nights stay on the tasmania. We arrived a little bit late at night at about 9pm. We parked our car in Noord for free and then took the free ferry to the Houthavens (i hope i spelled it correctly). We were a little bit concerned, that the ferry won't take us to the houseboat anymore, because of being so late, but they depart until 11:50pm. Great! When we got to the tasmania Sonja and Michael were welcoming us very warmly. They were very courteous and helpful. Once we got to our studio we are absolutely astonished by the style of it. It is so modern and comfy. The bed was a dream, it was like sleeping on a cloud! There was a Nespresso-Coffeemachine which we could use, a well filled fridge with cheese, yoghurt, butter, marmalade and everything you can think of. Bread for breakfast and a bottle of champagne. We were really looking forward to spending the next few days here. We always used Sonja's two bikes to go to the city center and it only took us about 10 minutes to get there. The central station is also very close to the tasmania. It's about 4 minutes by bike. We had to take the metro to get to a concert on saturday and Sonja was really helpful and told us how to get there the easiest and cheapest way. We will definitely come back someday. I guess we'll never stay anywhere else anymore when we travel to amsterdam. The tasmania is the most beautiful houseboat you'll ever see and staying there is really relaxing. Especially, when you put the chairs on the deck and get some rest in the sun! Thank you Sonja and Michael for sharing your dreamboat with us. ABSOLUTELY GREAT.

I spent a weekend with my boyfriend in Amsterdam and I really wanted it to be special and romantic for us. Renting the Tasmania was the best thing I ever tried! It is so light, friendly, open og central. We swam in the canal, we rode the bicycles and we tried the kajaks. On arrival Sonja had left a bottle of champagne in the fridge, which was a very nice gesture. There was also some bread, cheese, jam, and yoghurt for breakfast the next morning. We slept like engels and we had peace and quiet around us. It really was one of the best experiences I ever had from just one weekend.
I can highly recommend the Tasmania to anyone who is thinking on going to Ams and want it to be a bit more special than just a normal, boring hotelroom. This is the way to do it!!
We already decided that we are coming back - sometime soon hopefully.
Michael and Sonja are very sweet and welcomming hosts. We felt right at home from the first moment.

Wir waren entzückt! Die Erwartungen wurden mit Leichtigkeit übertroffen. Absolut empfehlenswert! Sonja und Michiel sind zwei warmherzige Gastgeber, die auch zwischendurch mal nachfragen ob alles in Ordnung. Bei zwei sonnigen Tagen konnten wir Amsterdam genießen und sogar vom Deck ins Wasser springen. Traumhaft!!! Danke dafür!

Sonja was a fantastic host and the houseboat is incredible.
It's an amazing space, in a great location. The boat is finished to a high spec and really well looked after and you could happily spend the whole weekend on the boat relaxing and enjoying the harbour.

The bikes were a huge asset, as well as the fantastic restaurant recommendations, which were all delicious. Sonja really goes the extra mile to cover of all he details so you have an amazing stay with her.

We had a great time and will be returning in the near future.

I simply cannot say enough about this accommodation. What an experience! The houseboat is beautiful, and our time on the Tasmania absolutely exceeded our expectations. The room is large, the bathroom is exquisite, and the boat is wonderful. Sonja put a lot of care into leaving local food and beverages in the mini-fridge, which made for wonderful breakfasts during our stay. My husband and I spent many hours sitting on the top of the boat marveling at the beauty of our surroundings. Definitely do not hesitate to stay here!! It was a major highlight of our European trip.

After scheduling your romantically peaceful holiday upon the Tasmania, you may begin relaxing.

All will be well and just as it should be. Everything you need will be there, before you even realize you need it. Just look around! Yes. Life CAN be this simple.

It has already been said in all the previous comments, but I can’t resist making my contribution !!
Very, very, very (ad lib) good experience in the Tasmania ! Something that must be done once in a lifetime !!
Sonja and Michiel are so friendly that this studio was almost ours during our WE… We were this close to cry when we had to leave ! (Amsterdam and sunny weather weren’t for nothing…)
We’ve particularly enjoyed the bicycles, restaurant recommendations, the bottle of wine, the healthy breakfast, the quietness of the studio, the harbor (close to the city center) and also the privacy. Ideal for a romantic WE !!
Thanks again !

We were only in Amsterdam for 2 nights, but wish we would have had more time on this wonderful boat!  The space was beautiful (plenty of space for 2 people), and in a very convenient location near the Jordaan, and Sonja provided more than everything we needed for our stay.  She even had a bottle of champagne waiting for us when we arrived!    The 2 bikes included with the rental were perfect to get us around town, and the tram stop near the dock took us directly to the museum district (Van Gogh, etc.).  I would highly recommend to anyone traveling to Amsterdam, and would stay again if I return.

It is the second time we spend a week-end on Sonja's houseboat. As usual everything was perfect, the studio is really clean, well-maintained, orginally decorated and above all really well located. With the bikes you can easily explore the Centre of Amsterdam, the beautiful Jordaan district but also alternative areas. Take the ferry and cross the Ij towards the North
Best boat in town😀

Das kleine, nette Hausboot liegt sehr zentral, mit Tram und Metro ist man in kürzester Zeit am Hauptbahnhof, vieles lässt sich auch auf direktem Weg zu Fuss erreichen. Schön auch der kleine Platz an Deck, zum entspannen, wo man den anderen Booten beim vorbei fahren zusehen kann.
Excellent location. Across from park so lots of birds!  Very accommodating host.

If want to experience something special in Amsterdam, give the hotels and apartments a rest and spend some time sleeping on a boat in the canal! This was a unique and enjoyable experience and we were made to feel very welcome!!
Thanks guys for such a wonderful stay on your boat! Everything surpassed our expectations! You were both so helpful and kind! We loved everything about the experience!x

What a cool experience sleeping on a boat in an Amsterdam canal.  Peter's place is sweet.  Great spot on deck to lounge, or in the boat house if raining.  Below is a full kitchen and nice bathroom.  Comfy bed with well placed TV for relaxing.  The houseboat is centrally located, so it is about 45 minutes to the farthest of tourist destinations, on foot.  Super close to the Zoo, University area, and spots to grab a coffee or a "coffee".
Det var dejligt nemt og hyggeligt. Vi manglede ikke noget.
Such a great and unique little spot to stay! And so lovely to have a little welcome pack when we arrived! Especially nice to sit in the sun on our little decking area, and watch over the water.

Lovers of efficiency, quiet, and solitude will love this place. We were enchanted by the cozy space as well as the frequent canal passers-by. Don't hesitate to stay here for a place away from the crowds.
Great stay, helpful host, cosy accommodation in a lovely spot. Everything within walking distance.

Замечательное место!!! Радушный хозяин!!!
Не смотря на то, что находится в самом центре, создаётся ощущение тихого и спокойного района. Хорошо подойдёт для отдыха небольшой семьёй.
Обязательно в следующей поездке будем рассчитывать на данное место пребывания)
This is the perfect place for a stay in Amsterdam. Peter has done a great job with this nice boat, with great taste too. Peter and Jeroen are nice hosts.

This is one of my best Airbnb experience. The boat house is beautiful with fantastic view. Neighbourhood is quite. It's conveniently located. The house is super clean. Peter is very easy to communicate with. Recommend to stay here, you won't regret it!

- gute, saubere Unterkunft
- sehr zental gelegen
- sehr nette Gastgeber
- sehr ruhig
- man merkt gar nicht das man auf einem
Boot schläft
- ein super Erlebnis
Sehr schönes Boot. Tolle Lage und alles schnell erreichbar.

There are not enough wonderful things to say about these accommodations! The location is serene and picturesque, quiet but very close to lots of fun restaurants and shops, and the house boat itself is beautiful!
The actual accommodations are surprisingly spacious for being on a house boat (this coming from someone who had never been on one before so I didn't know what to expect.) There is a functional kitchen space, a very comfortable bed, a beautifully finished bathroom and a gorgeous sitting area. We loved having an evening wine and a morning coffee on the terrace area on the top of the boat!
Our hosts were helpful, incredibly quick to respond to messages, quiet and very kind!
Our only complaint was that we had only booked one night here! We definitely hope to visit again!

Foi adorável estar no barco de Peter e Jeroen! O lugar estava muito limpo, agradável e charmoso!
Nesse Airbnb você estará em um local central o suficiente para conseguir fazer tudo que quiser à pé e, ao mesmo tempo, poderá usufruir de um local extremamente calmo para descansar à noite. E, não, o barco não fica se mexendo, pode ir tranquilamente!
Muito obrigada, Peter, Jeroen e Binky por uma experiência única em minha viagem de férias!

It was lovely to be on Peter and Jeroen's boat! The place was very clean, nice and charming!
In this Airbnb you will be in a central place enough to be able to do everything you want on foot and, at the same time, you can enjoy an extremely quiet place to rest at night. And, no, the boat does not move!
Thank you so much, Peter, Jeroen and Binky for a unique experience on my vacations!
Everything was just great. Perfect location, beautiful spot, quite road AND waterway. Only I wished we had more indoor space to be used upstairs to hang out during the rainy hours...

Fantastic location and a great experience. The boat is very well situated and a great place to take a morning coffee or a glass of wine in the evening. The amenities are great, and the hosts very helpful and accommodating.

Das Besondere an dieser Unterkunft war für uns die authentische Athmosphäre auf dem Schiff. Es liegt sehr ruhig und zentral, ist sehr sauber und gepflegt. Die Gastgeber sind sehr offen, freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir empfehlen diese tolle  Unterkunft sehr gerne weiter.

Ik , mijn vrouw en twee andere bevriende echtparen, hebben drie dagen en nachten met volle teugen genoten van deze toplocatie. Het appartement, dat drie woon lagen telt, bevindt zich op de bovenverdieping van een typisch Amsterdams historisch pand. Het is zeer gunstig gelegen nabij de bekende grachtengordel, de Jordaan en o.a. Het Anna Frank Huis. Het zeer goed onderhouden interieur heeft een sfeervol historisch karakter waarin op weldoordachte wijze zeer goede sanitaire voorzieningen, alle denkbare moderne huishoudelijke apparaten en hedendaagse communicatiemiddelen zijn aangebracht. Vele bekende bezienswaardigheden en het bruisende centrum van Amsterdam bevinden zich op loopafstand. Voor wie, vanuit het hart van de stad, Amsterdam in al haar facetten wil verkennen en ervaren, is deze locatie een ideale uitvalbasis. Deze toplocatie durf ik dan ook zonder enige reserve bij iedereen van harte aan te bevelen. Ons gezelschap heeft zich drie dagen echte Amsterdammers gevoeld. Jo & MP hebben ons voortdurend voorbeeldig en soepel ter zijde gestaan.

Om teleurstelling te voorkomen: het appartement is minder geschikt voor invaliden.

27 februari 2013

Bert.

Staying in a houseboat in Amsterdam is next-level amazing. Just book this place! If the weather is nice, spend lots of time on the boat deck waving at the locals and tourists going by in their boats. There's also a little glass enclosure that gets a nice breeze and also has great views. From this location, we had access to everything we wanted access to (e.g., De Pijp, De Wallen, Winkel 43, Mike's Tours of Amsterdam, Hortus, free jazz at the Hermitage, etc.) - thank you Peter!!

This place was wonderful! Easy to find! The kitchen is well stocked and the bed was super comfortable. The boat is just secluded enough that it was quiet at night but everything was within easy walking distance.

Zentru (Hidden by Airbnb) ah und auf einem Schiff originell gelegen. Klein und mehr als komplett eingerichtet. Freundliche, entgegen kommende Gastgeber. Ältere Gäste: Weg an Bord nur teilweise gesichert, Treppe im Steuerhaus steil.

Vi boede to nætter på husbåden i september måned. Det var helt klart en god oplevelse. Båden er ren, pæn og i rigtig god stand. Føles som et hotel værelse👌🏼
Rigtig sød vært som vil være behjælpelig med restauranter, transport eller andet. Vi kan kun anbefale dette.
Great location, accurately described and clean and orderly -- this was a fun experience!

Me and my husband spent part of our honeymoon at Peters cozy boat. We are really happy with our stay and communication was fast and good with our host. The wine was a nice gesture for us, the newly weds. We also got to mer Binkie, the cat! Great stay and we highly recommend!

The weather was not so nice when we came but Peter's place made our stay enjoyable. Boat was cozy. We were like in a cocoon. Enjoyed sipping hot chocolate while looking at the cold and rainy outdoors. Loved the heated floor!
Very nice stay. Very hospitable. Very central. Very quirky. Very cool. Very happy

Super verblijf in amsterdam. Vriendelijke ontvangst en proper logement. Correcte en snelle communicatie en afhandeling van alle details zoals we het graag hebben. Een rustig unicum zo dicht bij de grachten. De amsterdam experience ten top !

Peter was very friendly and helpful before as during our stay. You can trust the description as well as the photos. The houseboat is clean and very comfortable. If you think about an overnight in Peter's ship don't think to long because the this boat is very popular. We had a wonderful stay in amsterdam close to the center.
See you soon KaizerInn.
Excellent hosts!! Definitely would like to come back!
Lovely place to stay

Lovely compact space for one or a couple, ideal setting on the canal and not too far from a tram to take you straight to the city centre although I walked as there are so many different routes to discover!  Peter was there if I needed anything but to be honest everything was already though of - very well appointed.
Peter is so nice and attentive! The boat is wonderful and everything was so clean. There are so many lovely details around the boat :) and it was so central!
Very cute place in a nice quiet setting but still close to many attractions. Peter was very responsive and all interactions were prompt with no issues. We would stay here again.

Peter's boat is fantastic! So fun, cute, and charming. He welcomed us with a friendly wave for a late check in, left us wine and stroopwaffels, and showed us around. He was extremely responsive to our questions and was very accommodating. The boat itself is perfect. Clean, well appointed, and cozy. We would certainly stay here again and would recommend it to everyone. Thanks Peter!

Overnattet her to netter i begynnelsen av oktober. I alle fall nå virket det som et veldig stille strøk. Kort vei til sentrum og museer. Kort vei til en dagligvarebutikk. Et koselig innslag var at vi kunne spise frokost i styrhuset, og mate svaner og ender derfra med restene som var igjen etterpå.
Everything we could want! It was cozy, charming and quiet yet within walking distance of many top attractions. Peter is a wonderful host.

Nos hospedamos con mi esposa en el bote de Peter para nuestra primera visita a Amsterdam.

Es bastante pintoresco el hecho de hospedarse en un bote, y pasamos un buen rato!

Es un poco pequeño pero tiene lo necesario, nosotros como todo el día paseamos por la ciudad solo dormíamos en el bote. Cumple con lo necesario para pasar un buen rato!

Ofrecen café, te y algunos snacks de cortesía, hay también mapas y recomendaciones de actividades.

La comunicación fue siempre excelente y con muy buena predisposición!

Peter’s place was such a lovely experience! Beautiful location- walking distance from everything, right on the canal across from a park, with swans swimming by and a darling cat on the property! Small but roomy and stylish, with a comfortable bed, and modern bathroom and kitchen. Essentials provided, and Peter’s a very thoughtful host to provide a little welcome kit with wine, tasty treats, and city info. It was a bit chilly out the night we were there, but the heating inside kept us warm and cozy. There’s a cute little deck to enjoy the provided coffee, separate entrance for guests, and the check in/out process was very simple. Wish we had more time to spend there!
It was a great time. Peter is so friendly and answer you any questions.  Nice boat and a nice place to sleep.  You can have very good coffee ans bagels rund the corner. Thanks a lot
Absolutamente recomendable! Ningún detalle librado al azar. Cálido, pintoresco y excelente relación precio-producto para Amsterdam.
Unkompliziert, herzlich und sauber beschreibt unseren Aufenthalt auf dem Hausboot genau. Auf jeden Fall würden wir wieder auf die KeizerInn wenn wir in Amsterdam sind.
Beleef Amsterdam op zijn Amsterdams en slaap in een woonboot in de gracht. De boot ligt in het hartje van de bruisende stad en is ingericht met oog voor details. Een echte aanrader dus!
Unforgetable experience

Such a cool experience to stay on this boat. The space itself is a bit tight, but it's situated right in the heart of the city in a gorgeous setting and points for being close to bike rental. All in all, it's a perfect way to enjoy the Amsterdam spirit.
Good location, easy check in and out - Peter was very flexible to our timings which was really helpful. The boat had everything we needed for our brief stay.

El barco estuvo padre, la llegada es accesible. Estaba muy limpio y con detalles personales que nos dejó Peter. Su mamá nos atendió y nos dio la llave. Es buena la experiencia de vivir  en una casa flotante perl sí se me hizo caro.
Absolutely fabulous stay at Peters,  everything and more we expected.  Great location and perfect for us.

What an experience. The boat had everything you need for a short stay in Amsterdam. The location is perfect, just outside the centre but not too far away. We walked everywhere and were happy to do so. Only a mere 15min to the CBD/Red light district etc.
Peter was very responsive and made check in and out very easy. I would happily stay there again.
If you are spending a weekend or week in Amsterdam then discard those hotel possibilities and choose to stay with Peter on his wonderful boat.

Stylish, beautifully appointed and spotlessly clean. Although the weather was wet and chilly the underfloor heating kept us snug. A generous welcome basket included wine, peppermints and stroopwaffels. An easy walk gets you to all the major sites. Lots of good places to eat very close by. Peter was a friendly and helpful host.

Such a great place to stay - idyllic and well connected by tram. For one or two people, Peter’s boat is perfect and a lovely little base in a quiet area. I was surprised by how well appointed the boat is with bathroom and kitchen amenity and would absolutely stay here is again - waking up to the water is beautiful.

This is a great place to stay for a single or Romantic couple. It's a close walk to everything in central Amsterdam and in a great neighborhood close to the skinny bridge. Lots of restaurants close by on Utrecht street and tons of bars and shops as well.

The boat is gorgeous and well put together with many thoughtful touches. Coffee/tea, with sugar and milk in the fridge were great, as was the welcome basket of snacks and wine ( which we forgot to drink :) ) .

only caveat, is that the space is tight for 2, although the bed was super comfy. this place is NOT for those who are obese, young kids, or those who are frail and unable to climb a vertical ships ladder. Fatter people will have an issue not only squeezing into the cabin via the ladder, but also trying to get into the shower ( I'm 6'1, 217lbs and I fit fine ), but larger folks will have issues. ( nothing against larger folks, just a warning to the Olive Garden crowd ;)

overall, Highly recommended for a very romantic getaway or solo space.

I would love to return to Amsterdam and I would stay at Peter’s house boat again. The area is perfect! It’s quiet but still close to transportation. The house boat itself was adorable it was perfect for our stay and gave us a feel of living on the canals which was so unique for us. Thanks Peter!

Best place I have ever been!! Thx Peter for the friendly welcome. It was a mess due to the snow we got airplain canceled and Peter reacted very great!! He waited for us very late.
The place is just awsome and a must see in amsterdam
Peter's boat is absolutely amazing ! He is a wonderful host, would highly recommend.
Wonderful spot! Only wish I had more time

Parfaitement entretenu , chaleureux
Et accueil bienveillant. A recommander pour chacun qui veut visiter Amsterdam
Posizione vicina dal centro. Riscaldamento a pavimento. Doccia spaziosa e bagno grosso. Cucina servita di tutto
Peter est un hôte formidable. L’endroit est magique, calme, proche de tout. Nous avons passé un séjour très romantique. Je recommande vivement :)

An absolutely amazing place to stay.  An easy walk to many fantastic attractions in Amsterdam.  I will definitely stay here again on my next visit.  I found myself just wanting to sit in the top area of the boat and enjoy the peaceful view of the canal and the beautiful boats there. Next time I would love to visit in summer and be able to relax out on the chairs.   I will definitely be recommending this place to anyone I know visiting Amstersam.

Super communication and great location. The space is small but perfect for a couple and has everything you could need. Spotlessly clean. Even with the cold outside, it was really cosy and warm, with the underfloor heating. Plus there was a nice welcome pack of biscuits, wine etc.
I think it would be great in the summer, when you can sit out on top. We had a great stay, thanks!

This place has everything! Very cosy appartment on the prettiest boat in the street. Lovely spot, nice views, floor heating, whats not to like? We stayed here for only one night but that was much too short. Would definitely recommend. Thanks Peter!
Great place. Exactly what I was hoping for.
Tolles Erlebnis. Gerne bald wieder

Le logement est tel que décrit dans l'annonce et même mieux que nos attentes. Peter est un très bon hôte, la propreté est parfaite et les petites touches d'attention font très plaisir. Nous reviendrons sans problème si l'occasion de présente à nouveau !
Thanks Peter for this very nice moment, the boat is located in a very nice place and it was a great experience to sleep on a boat !
We had a fantastic stay at Peter’s boat. Highly recommend to stay here if you are visiting Amsterdam. It close to the city centre!
Alles was goed geregeld, snelle reactie en erg schoon allemaal. Bedankt!
Cosy and clean in an ideal location
Excellent reception upon arrival from Peter, along with a tour of the boat and it’s features. The added welcome basket with wine was the icing on the cake!
We enjoyed our stay at Peter's place. The boat was a unique experience and well-equipped for a comfortable stay. The coffee was great too! Highly recommend
Exactly as described 5 stars!! Loved the free wine! Great host!
Perfect in every way . Little bit of heaven right there x
环境优美安静，公共交通步行五分钟。
Super leuk om eens in een woonboot te slapen! Het was er erg knus en gezellig. Gastvrijheid was ook top!
Nous ne sommes restés qu’une seule nuit, pourtant Peter nous a très bien reçu! Tout était parfait!

Notre nuit chez Peter sur sa peniche s'est très bien passé. L'emplacement est idéal pour voir Amsterdam. Le lit est confortable, tout etait impeccable et les petites attentions nous on fait plaisir. Merci encore!

Peter was very prompt and supportive when replying to messages. He kindly allowed us to check in early as our flight arrived in the morning. He was warm and offered a number of suggestions on our arrival. The ship was clean and beautiful. Everything functioned well and there was everything we needed to cook a yummy meal. There was plenty of space for two, and the location was lovely, right near the botanical gardens and many lovely cafes and bars.

Just the place to be in Amsterdam !
Merci Peter et son ami !
The place is just amazing to have a great experience! Peter was always thoughtful and a great host
We had a lovely evening at Peter’s place. What a great and unique experience. The boat is beautiful and cosy, I highly recommend it!
The perfect place to stay!=)

Our two-night-stay on Peter’s ship is marvelous! You can find everything you need here. If you are going to Amsterdam, I highly recommend this place. Peter’s boyfriend invited us to their home as well, also sweet!

Peter's houseboat is AMAZING. It is so cute inside and he left so many helpful resources! City maps, tourist brouchures, wine, snacks, umbrellas, power convertors, coffee and tea, shampoo, towels, and robes. I loved spending my mornings and evenings sitting on top of the boat. The fridge and microwave were also very helpful! Cant wait to come back!
Fantastic, quiet location.  Easy access to public transportation.  Peter and Joeren are fantastic hosts and their boat is very neat.
Wow. This was one of my favorite air bnb stats yet. The boat was gorgeous. Every thoughtful touch was just great. And Binky the cat was hilarious. He definitely made the boat feel like home.

Bijzonder te slapen in een schip.
Alles goed voor elkaar in kleine ruimte.
Ontbijten in de stuurhut met mooi uitzicht is goed wakker worden!

I truly can’t say enough about Peter’s houseboat. So charming, unique, romantic, tasteful, and well-appointed with a great shower, heated floors, super comfy bed, complimentary wine and coffee. We just popped into Amsterdam on our day long layover and it ended up being our favorite evening a 5 country trip thanks to Peter’s taste and thoughtfulness. We will definitely be back. In many years of Air B and B this was the greatest find yet.

Hammer Gefühl auf einem Hausboot in Amsterdam unterzukommen. Peter war ein super Host! Immer erreichbar, zuverlässig und sehr hilfsbereit! Das Hausboot an sich hat eine kleine Terasse auf der es sich sehr gut aushalten lässt! Gerne wieder!
Heel aangenaam verblijf gehad bij hele attente en warme mensen. Alles was tiptop in orde en heel net. Dcht bij het centrum en op wandelafstand van het centrum. Zeker een aanrader!

Wir hatten ein super tolles Wochenende auf der KeizerInn! Die lage ist absolut perfekt, nach ca. 10 Minuten zu Fuß ist man in der Stadtmitte und dennoch ist es absolut ruhig mit einer herrlichen Umgebung. Wir hatten das erste warme Wochende dieses Jahr erwischt und konnten die Terrasse mit Lichterkette bis spät nachts richtig genießen! Das Bett ist super bequem und alles in allem war es einfach super gemütlich, ein bisschen wie Zuhause! Danke Peter, wir kommen bestimmt wieder!
Une petite cabine bien équipée et tranquille à l’arrière de son bateau. Nos hôtes ont été d’une grande flexibilité pour nous aider à profiter au mieux de notre séjour.

Nice quiet, spot nearby the crowdy city-centre, very gentle owners.
Highly recommended.

The place is well located, close to public transport and restaurants. House is quite small but very comfortable and well equiped.
Regarding prices in Amsterdam is a good relation quality-price.
The experience of sleeping and waking up in a boat in Amsterdam is just great and worth it.
I would definatelly recomend this house for two.

Great place! I was worried about the location at first but its very easy to get to by tram. The houseboat is small but cozy, and has everything you need. The bathroom was surprisingly roomy and the deck area was great. I was worried that it would be too small (I'm 6'4"), but my girlfriend and I fit easily. Peter was very friendly and made sure we had everything we needed. Would definitely stay again!

Peter’s boat was an AMAZING experience. I cannot recommend  his boat enough! Peter greeted us upon arrival and provided fantastic hospitality. The boat is located in a quiet neighborhood that is still steps away from transportation/bars/restaurants. If you want a true Amsterdam experience this is it! There are some stairs to climb in the boat. Overall, this was an amazing end to a trip and we cannot thank Peter enough!
We enjoyed staying on the house boat. Great location very pretty and quiet for being right in Amsterdam.  Walking distance to many bars and restaurants and tram stops near by.
We had the best stay ever! Lovely hosts! We Will be back!

Le bateau de Peter est très moderne, bien équipé et dans un cadre exceptionnel, dans une rue calme mais à quelques minutes à pied du centre d'Amsterdam, c'était parfait!  Les petites touches d'attention à l'arrivée nous ont touché :) Je recommande ce voyage, il est atypique à souhait, et confortable à la fois!

The boat house is really a very special experience in Amsterdam. The night in it was warm, safe, only sound of rain, water and wind. All things are clean and well organized. But the quits are quite too heavy and maybe the windows are not so tight? I can feel little wind through it. The location is a little bit far away but we can find tram towards it. Peter is a very nice and kind person, we checked out is 10 minutes later, and he is not annoyed but waited for us. Really good experience.

We loved Peter’s boat! This was our first trip to Amsterdam and we wanted a location that was close to restaurants and activities but also quiet and safe. We were a bit apprehensive in such a large city, but Peter’s boat was the perfect location. The tram stop is close and the tram system is the most convenient way to get around the city. We walked to many restaurants from Peter’s place as well. The boat was clean, comfortable, and had lots of little touches to make it feel like home. Peter even arranged for his sister in law and brother to greet us because he was out of town. I highly recommend Peter’s boat!
Don't look any further. If you are single or a couple book this quaint barge. Beautiful location and great owner. You won't regret it.
Lovely location, small bit functionaliteit Withall everything you need, recommand

The houseboat is a beautiful way to experience Amsterdam! Our stay was at the end of a long vacation so the terrace was a great place to relax on the canal. We walked everywhere in Amsterdam and really enjoyed our stay.  The place was clean and Peter personally welcomed us (and even had a welcome basket with wine and snacks). All the amenities were great and the descriptions on Airbnb were spot on. Definitely recommend staying on Peter’s houseboat!
This place is in a great spot to explore town. Comfortable home and peter was great about any questions we had!
Alles ok!
Great place! Beautiful spot on the canal with a really cute space.  Ceilings are tall which was a great surprise and Peter was very helpful!

Staying on Peter’s ship was great !! We travelled by public transit from the airport and it was so easy to get to the ship. Travel time from the airport, using the train and tram and a short walk, was about 45 minutes. Peter’s directions were perfect.
The accommodations were lovely. The ship is located on a quiet canal. While sitting on the boat deck, we enjoyed watching herons, ducks and boats pass by. There is a park directly across the canal and it was always entertaining to watch life going on there.
Peter was a great host - always ready to help but never intrusive.
The kitchen was set up nicely and coffee, creamer and sugar were provided which was a nice touch. The bathroom is very clean. There are 2 robes provided which is very thoughtful touch. Towels were changed every other day.
Getting down to the bedroom area was a little tricky at first but got easier quickly.
It was very easy to get to the city centre via public transportation and got to Centraal Station within 15 minutes.
We felt very safe in this area and walked extensively, morning, noon and night.
We really enjoyed this unique way to stay in Amsterdam . Who wouldn’t want to stay on a canal in Amsterdam. Much more fun than a hotel room !!
We’d recommend staying here - you’ll really enjoy the experience.

Absolutely gorgeous place to stay in Amsterdam! Such a lovely opportunity to stay on the famous canals. The boat was divine and the terrace was perfect to sit out on in the evening sun. My friend and I were welcomed with smiles and a very kind and generous basket of goodies and advice on places to go - much appreciated! I'd definitely recommend this place! Thank you Peter!

Perfect place to see both the busy centre yet just far enough to be in a beautiful quite spot close to cafes botanical gardens and a supermarket. 5 min tram ride to museums and 10 mins into central station. After a day out walking and playing tourist it was perfect to sit out on comfy deck chairs and watch the canal boats go by with a beer or wine in hand. Absolutely the best.
Peter's place far exceeded our expectations - the bed was very cozy, the terrace was lovely, and we thought it was situated in the best possible neighborhood. Would definitely stay here again!

Es war ein super schönes Wochenenden in perfekter Lage.   Die Stadt, Sehenswürdigkeiten  sowie ein Supermarkt waren von dort super zu erreichen. Die Haltestellen für die Metro, Tram waren innerhalb von fünf Gehminuten erreichbar. Das Boot ist sehr gepflegt und gemütlich eingerichtet. Danke für das schöne Wochenenden. Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder.

You know that Seinfeld episode where Jerry realizes too late that he has agreed to wear the ‘puffy shirt’ that Kramer’s girlfriend has somehow asked him to wear? As he sees the actual shirt for the first time he is stunned and utters the phrase “I agreed to wear this?” “When did I agree to wear this?” Well, as I gazed at my ‘houseboat’ accomodation, specifically the confining, minuscule ‘lower living quarter’ I had my own puffy shirt/houseboat moment. I thought “I agreed to stay here?” “When did I agree to stay here?” This isn’t what I signed up for. I am not here to affront the owner of this houseboat- he may be a very earnest, serious, and compassionate man. I have no idea, insofar as we spoke on only a few occasions. However, as I gazed around at the train wreck of a houseboat (sorry for the mixed metaphors), at the tiny, cramped closet of a space and the ‘sleeping area’ that frankly reminded me more of a coffin than a bed, I could not believe that someone would offer such a sparse and utterly lackluster accomodation and call it an apartment. Calling this place an apartment is like calling someone who can count to ten a mathematician. In fact my thoughts, after being downstairs in the confining, cramped quarters, were that hostages in Lebanon might have stayed in places like this (ok, not exactly like this, they probably had worse wifi!) not vacationers looking to relax and see Amsterdam. The bed, for example, is wedged between the outer and inner wall and virtually takes up what feels like ½ the space of the whole ‘apartment’ to use the owner’s term. To make matters worse, much worse, is that the ceiling over the entire bed is approximately three feet high- in short a claustrophobe’s nightmare, one MRI meltdown from fleeing in terror, except instead of spending 30- 40 minutes in a highly anxious, heart pounding state of mush, you will be lying here 7-9 hours each night wondering if the damn ceiling is gonna fall on your head. I never considered myself a true claustrophobe before, but after spending two nights- two very very long nights, I think this place should come with a black box warning, sort of what they place on certain prescription drugs to warn people of untoward or dangerous side effects. “Caution, staying here for more than five minutes may cause severe panic attacks.” With a living space of about 4 feet by 5 feet, there is no where to sit (there are no chairs) and almost no space for your stuff. So I just piled stuff around the place and ironically found it was harder to find things in this molecular jungle than it would have been if I had 10 or 20 extra feet. When you wake up in the middle of the night to use the bathroom (here is a plus- the bathroom is about two steps from your bed) you...
Excellent location, extremely clean, practical, great view and atmosphere. Very original way to spend a night in Amsterdam. Thanks for the hospitality, it was a visit to remember.

Ontzettend leuke locatie in Amsterdam om te overnachten, als je geen probleem hebt met een trap naar de keuken/slaapplek..Ondanks hartje Amsterdam was t erg rustig.
Eigenaar is erg gastvrij en flexibel; we konden onze spullen na uitchecken even stallen en later ophalen.
Ik kom zeker terug als ik een bed in Amsterdam nodig heb!
Fantastic accommodations on a boat! in the middle of town. Super clean and friendly hosts as well.

This was our first Airbnb experience and we couldn't have wished for anything more. Peter is a lovely host,his boat is short of perfect and is situated really conveniently but also in a lovely neighborhood. We immediately felt at home. Highly recommend and hopefully we will be returning.

Peter and Jeroen were both so kind; they both made sure to say hello. They are very easy to get in touch with, which made check-in simple. The apartment has much more space than expected and is beautifully renovated - the bed was very comfortable. We were only in town for 1 night, but we can’t wait to go back and stay a few days!

Peter and his partner were excellent hosts, very friendly and helpful. The boat is situated in an exceptionally quiet area, you would nearly think you were in the countryside, yet it is only 2 stops on the metro to Central Station. The walk from the closest metro was less than 5 minutes. I highly recommend this place to stay and would love to stay again!

Peters place is awesome! We stayed for one night (our last night before flying home) and just enjoyed sitting on the top of the boat relaxing in the beautiful Amsterdam weather! The actual living space inside the boat is super well done and much more spacious than expected. Peter was very friendly and communicated check in and check out well. The amenities were great (especially the well-equipped kitchen). Peter provided snacks, wine, and even robes in the bathroom. So cute! Loved our stay, honestly one of the highlights of our trip which is saying a lot!
Awesome place to stay.  Amazing amenities and excellent location.  Fantastic hospitality.

Staying on Peter’s boat, right in the best part of Amsterdam, was one of the highlights of our extensive trip through Europe. Every evening we would sit on the “porch”, drink some wine, and watch the people enjoying the park across the canal and boating on the canal in everything from tiny dinghies to huge tour boats. Then, as dark approached, the canal traffic disappeared, and we would go below to the perfectly prepared cabin area, climb into the comfortable, large bunk, and sleep peacefully until starting again in the morning.
If you are interested in a unique but very comfortable accommodation, in a perfect location to explore Amsterdam, we strongly recommend staying on Peter’s boat. But book early, this is a very popular city and a very desirable accommodation.
An extra special location you have to do. Highly recommend this place. Many extra touches. Relaxing. Amsterdam was great and a trip out of town is worth it. A stay with Peter makes it amazing.

We had a fantastic time in Amsterdam. The KeizerInn was so nice and our host, too. Everything was there (and even more) to feel good and comfortable (e.g. welcome presents, coffee, the view from the boat...)The boat is clean and very, very nice! Hope, we‘ll come along again soon!

Lovely place to stay, close to the centre but very quiet. Small and cosy inside the boat. Newly decorated and furnished beautifully. Peter was a great host, welcomed us warmly and offered his assistance to us if we so needed it. Very pleasurable stay and experience

Wir verbrachten  eine wundervolle Woche auf dem Hausboot. Das Boot ist gemütlich eingerichtet und bietet alles, was man für einen gelungenen Aufenthalt braucht. Egal ob man seine Ruhe haben möchte oder viel erleben will - das Boot liegt in einer sehr ruhigen Gasse direkt neben dem Herzen von Amsterdam.

Unbelievable accommodation. Everything that is written and reviewed about this place is true! Great location, wonderful scenery and awesome host. Peter is a wonderful host and the extra touches were greatly appreciated. This once in a life time trip was awesome and Peters boat helped make it happen!
Fantastic waterfront experience in downtown Amsterdam!! You won't be disappointed!
Ein toller Ort, für einen Amsterdamtripp jederzeit wieder.

Mein Freund und ich haben eine wundervolle Übernachtung auf Peter‘s Hausboot genossen. Die Lage war super, ruhig und gegenüber ein kleiner Park. Der Empfang war super unkompliziert, Peter war sehr nett und hat uns alles gezeigt. Es hat uns an nichts gefehlt. Gerne jederzeit wieder!
Great location, perfect for getting into the hustle and bustle but great quiet location. Perfect for a tranquil get away. Highly recommend
Adorable and different place to stay! Perfect experience

Great accommodation for a short visit. Great location for easy access to the City Centre, you can walk everywhere!
Nice quiet area and we felt safe staying there. Would recommend this accommodation to anyone and we would love to go back and stay again in the future.
Peter is a nice host, and the place is very clean and functional. The location is good too, in a nice beautiful neighborhood.

We had such a beautiful stay at peter’s boat! It‘s a very calm place in busy Amsterdam city and we could walk everywhere, the place to rent bikes was also very close and Peter was available everytime. The boat is so cozy, the bed very comfortable and we had everything we needed in there. We can definitely recommend this place!
Ein ganz besonderes Erlebins, dass wir in jedem Fall weiterempfehlen können.  Die Lage ist sehr gut uns die Gastgeber sympathisch und hilfsbereit.

We arrived in Amsterdam after a difficult trip from Sydney and Peter was so accommodating. He allowed us an early check in and provided a really lovely welcome pack. The boat was absolutely amazing and really added to our Amsterdam experience. The location is central and we easily walked everywhere we needed or caught the tram to the local stop which was very close by. We loved every minute of our stay and would definitely highly recommend this place and hopefully we have the opportunity to stay again.
One of the best stays I’ve ever had.  Great location!  Super cool space.  Helpful host.  Would definitely come back next time I’m in Amsterdam.
great experience! everything was perfect !
Peter is a great host, the apartment is lovely, definitely a special experience!

Die Zeit auf der KeizerInn war einfach schön. Ein ganz besondererer Ort. Allein unseren Frühstückskaffee auf einer Gracht in einer gemütlichen Umgebung trinken zu können- ein echter Genuss. Die Ausstattung strahlt Persönlichkeit und Liebe zum Detail aus. Wir kommen gerne wieder.

Beautiful place to stay. You have your own little floating apartment in the captain’s quarters of a picturesque old tug boat. My boyfriend and I were greeted warmly and there were even mini bottles of wine to welcome us. Peter was friendly and very fast with responses and the outdoor cat that lives on the boat is VERY sweet! I would do it all over again in a heartbeat.

Staying at Peter’s place was such a sweet experience. The location was perfect. Close to everything, yet the street felt really peaceful and quiet. My daughter and I never had stayed on a boat before and from all other places I have stayed this is my favorite so far. Peter is a great host and made us feel very welcome. We will certainly be back whenever we need a place to stay in Amsterdam!
I couldn’t recommend this place more!! Peter is wonderful and the place is an amazing experience!!

Het was een bijzondere ervaring om te verblijven op een boot. De boot was perfect gelegen, dicht bij het centrum en toch erg rustig.
Peter was een soepele gastheer wat betreft in en uitchecken.
Het was kraaknetjes en zeer verzorgd.
Amazing place in the center of Amsterdam, beautiful quiet and atypic ! Perfect for a couple.
Peter is a great host. Everything is thought of. The boat was clean, in a beautiful area. No faults at all. Will return

Not many people can say they slept on the canals of Amsterdam, but now we can! Sweet porch, free wine and other amenities, in a quiet neighborhood. It is small, but we like living tiny. Super cozy and great for the price.

Exactly as described, this is a fantastic alternative to a hotel in Amsterdam. Great location and so much fun sitting on the deck and watching the boats go by on the canal. Apt is very clean and plenty of room.
The place is great, was clean, and walking distance to a lot of places. The experience about staying in a boat in an Amsterdam canal is extraordinary.

An absolutely fabulous spot. An oasis in a very busy city. We ate dinner on the deck both evenings as the location is simply wonderful.
Highly recommend Peter’s boat.

Die Übernachtung auf dem Boot war unser Highlight!! Die Ecke mit dem Bett ist sehr gemütlich und lädt zum kuscheln ein. Wir haben auf dem dazugehörigen Sitzplatz auf dem Boot einen Apéro sowie das Frühstück genossen, diese Momente sind unvergesslich. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
Peter was amazing and the room and boat were perfect! Great location!! We will definitely be coming back.
A unique experience in a very nice quiet neighbourhood,  Peter was a friendly and great host.
A returning guest, everything still top notch! Close to everything, an amazing and unique experience staying on this boat.  We'll be back.
Thanks for the stay.  Peter is a good Nd helpful host.  Boat is warm and comfortable.  Just what I needed after a long flight. Nice restaurant nearby.

Looking for a romantic and typical Amsterdam experience? You have to pick this spot. Everything about it is just perfect. The host, Peter, will go out of his way to make sure you have a pleasant stay. Safe to say my best Airbnb experience thus far!

Peter’s houseboat was a fantastic find! The space was lovely and modern and clean with everything you needed.
The top room with the wheel being turned into a seating area was great and sitting up there watching the world go by was very unique!
Really comfy bed.  Opposite a park and in a great location.  Easy to find and get the keys.  Would highly recommend.
Peters cabin on his boat is a great way to experience Amsterdam. Located in a rather quite Gracht you can walk easily to the city center. The bed is super comfy - best I ever and in an AirBnB !

Sonja is an amazing host and it is evident how much thought she puts into providing a great experience! The space is clean, bright and unique and she provides so many things to make your stay as comfortable as possible.   It was so much fun using the bikes! Can't wait to come back and will recommend to friends!

Absolutely wonderful experience staying on the Tasmania!!  Very clean, beautifully and thoughtfully stocked with basic food items and bubbly!  Sonja was very helpful, the bikes were great and we hope to stay there again in the future!  THANK YOU!!

Lovely boat, lovely host. "Spectacular" is more than precise!
Thank you for the hospitality

What a fantastic place to stay whilst in Amsterdam ! I had unfortunately messed up the travel aspect of our trip which left me in trouble with my girlfriend. However, as soon as she saw the boat house I was immediately forgiven.. If you're debating spending a little extra then I honestly believe it's well worth it : ) and Sonja is the perfect host !

Sonja ha sido una gran anfitriona, desde el primer dia nos trato estupendamente y en seguida nos sentimos como en nuestra casa. Nos tenia reservada una bienvenida de lujo con comida y bebida asi como toda clase de detalles para estar comodos en el barco, guias de la ciudad,recomendaciones,fotografias, wifi de alta velocidad, television hd internacional etc... y dos bicicletas para movernos por (Website hidden by Airbnb) una pena que el tiempo halla sido lluvioso todos los dias que hemos estado alli, pero la experiencia ha sido unica, sin duda volveremos a visitar a Sonja a su marido y a su precioso gato.
Recomendamos la experiencia de vivir en un barco aunque sea con mal tiempo, es una sensacion unica y de lujo.

Bonjour
Je recommande fortement ce lieu...original, propre et surtout un super accueil.
des petits details qui font plaisir mais je vous laisse la surprise !!!

Nous avons eu avant notre arrivée des explications pour aller au bateau ce qui nous a permis de trouver très rapidement !

Amsterdam est une ville trés agréable.
Si nous y retournons, nous irons chez Sonja !

Bon voyage à tous

This was a fantastic stay and I would recommend to anyone wanting a beautiful, cosy and loving experience. It is easy to get to from the centre, peaceful and full of thoughtful touches like delicious muesli, coffee, bread etc. The whole space was gorgeous and my daughter and I have raved about Tasmania since our return.

Abbiamo trascorso 3 notti nella spettacolare houseboat e che dire...un'esperienza fantastica e alternativa! la camera è deliziosa e dotata di ogni comfort, calda (nonostante il freddo polare esterno!) e accogliente. Sonja ci ha fatto inoltre trovare dell'ottimo vino e tutto il necessario per una squisita colazione. Consigliata a tutti quelli che vogliono vivere una particolare Amsterdam! Matteo e Livia

My girlfriend and I had a quick weekend away in Amsterdam and the pleasure of staying in Sonja's beautiful houseboat.  The boat is incredible as were our hosts.  I would highly recommend it to everyone.

From the moment we arrived at the harbour and spotted the Tasmania we knew we were in for a fantastic time! A truly lovely place to spend your holiday down time, and her location is perfect if your looking to explore Amsterdam. Her owners Sonja and Michael have done such a perfect job of creating a masterpiece of a home to live in and it's a pleasure to spend time on board their dream boat. It completely made our Christmas holiday for us. Modern designed room, well thought out, comfy bed, mood lighting, tv, fridge, IPod Dock, coffee machine, spotlessly clean, and we were even left a full fridge and some food for breakfast to snack on. We would recommend a stay on board the Tasmania to anyone and hope to return in the future. Marie and Mark
An amazing place to stay! And the best place to welcome the new year. An absolutely wonderful experience, we wish we could have stayed a little longer...,
Fantastic place and fantastic hosts who took care of everything, including fresh bread for breakfast. Wholeheartedly recommended!
This was a spectacular stay. We enjoyed ourselves in a modern pretty house boat and the rides with the not-so-modern bicycles have also been unforgettable :-) Thank you for your hospitality.

Sonja wasn't there, but her parents were when we arrived. Ralph was the best and kindest host we could ever ask for, he was a great help to us during our short stay in the Netherlands, and we would definitely come back to visit again. Hopefully next time we would be able to meet Sonja perhaps! Thank you so much again for hosting us, your boat was absolutely beautiful and the entire experience really made our visit to to Amsterdam an unforgettable one.

P.S. The cat (Boris I believe?) was amazing, I've never met a more friendly cat!

Cheryl and Audrey

Wir sind begeistert von diesem wunderschönen, einzigartigen und durchdesignten Apartment im Bug. Die Fotos spiegeln sehr gut den wirklichen Zustand wider. Es ist sehr hell und absolut sauber. Sonja hat uns so leckere Leckereien hingestellt, das war eine tolle Überraschung! Wir haben nichts vermisst in den Tagen, auch hatten wir die Möglichkeit eines herrlichen Frühstücks für uns an Bord, u.a. dank Kühlschrank, Mikrowelle und Wasserkocher. Für uns wird Sonjas Apartment immer die erste Wahl in Amsterdam sein! Vielen Dank für Alles, Sonja.
It was absolutely fantastic - would love to come back

Me and my friend had a fabulous stay in the houseboat. It was much more than expected. Easy access and "check-in", bread, cookies, drink and enough supplies to eat some arrivalfood so we didnt have to stress to find a shop. The bikes used only 15 minutes to city centre and with taxi it was only 7-8 minutes so a very central and nice play to stay. Thank you so much for the high standard stay in you´re wonderful houseboat.

Die Tasmania ist ein sehr schönes, luxuriöses Boot.
Wir haben uns wie zuhause gefühlt und die beiden Gastgeber sind sehr zuvorkommend. Uns wurde ein traumhaufter und unvergesslicher Aufenthalt in Amsterdam ermöglicht. Immer wieder gerne.

I spent 2 nights and 3 days on this boat. I highly recommand this place and its hosts. There was an independant studio for us in the boat; It was very well prepared and decorated! We had the possibility to use city guides. It is very close to the city center with the bikes and also very quiet at night.

Et helt fantastisk overnatningssted, super hyggelig placering, lys og tjekket indretning. Og så er værtsparret utrolig gæstfrie - der lå frisk brød, ost, müsli, vin og meget mere og ventede på os, da vi kom. Man får en helt unik oplevelse ved at overnatte på båden, som gør Amsterdam-besøget til noget særligt. Vi kommer igen og kan kun anbefale på det varmeste til venner og familie.

We had a wonderful stay there! Sonja is such a great host! If again in Amsterdam, we will definitively stay on that beautiful houseboat! Loved everything, from the Nespresso machine to the fresh bread. THE place to stay.

Sonja's houseboat is really spectacular and perfect for a couple to spend some time in Amsterdam. The place is cool and clean. With the bikes that are included getting in to town is really easy.
As an added bonus Sonja provided wine, grapes, snacks and breakfast for the first morning. That was unexpected and a really nice touch.
We are more than happy to recommend this place.

My wife Laura and I stayed at Sonja and Michiel's beautiful houseboat for 2 nights as part of a long weekend in Rotterdam / Amsterdam. We were excited about staying based upon the reviews already posted and the many photographs on their profile. We were not disappointed!
Its clear Sonja and Michiel have spent a lot of their time building this fantastic home. They are also great hosts - the accommodation is very modern and clean, and the food provided very welcomed!
We would recommend this accommodation and the two friendly hosts to anyone. We hope to return in the future.

What an amazing place this beautiful houseboat is! We would recommend it to anyone wanting to spend a few days in Amsterdam.  Our host Sonja was very helpful and welcoming and there were plenty of unexpected 'goodies' for us in the fridge when we arrived.  The boat is very well situated (a short walk to a tram or about 20 mins walk from the city sights), comfortable and simple to find (especially with Sonja's clear directions).  We loved it and Amsterdam!

We enjoyed every minute of staying on the Tasmania for five days at the end of April. The boat itself well exceeded our already high expectations, all we could say on entering the boat was wow! We found it really easy to get around from the area the boat was located, with trams and buses nearby, and it being so quick to walk to the centre of Amsterdam. The generous amount of food and drink provided were very much appreciated, and added that extra special touch to our already amazing experience. If you are debating over whether to book a stay on the Tasmania, please don't hesitate, you will not be disappointed. We have already been recommending the Tasmania to friends and family and fingers crossed will return one day ourselves.

Wat een fantastische plek... Zo rustig en toch zo dicht bij De Jordaan.
Sonja was een geweldige gastvrouw. Het frigootje was gevuld met zowel drank (oa bubbels) als food. Na een verkwikkende nachtrust zorgde het Nespresso apparaat voor het nodige caffeineshot. George Clooney daarentegen was er niet.
Naast het leuke studiootje had je ook twee goed bollende fietsen waarmee je naar harte lust Amsterdam kon verkennen.
Op 10 minuutjes lopen, vind je een supermarkt, hippe winkeltjes en eethuisjes
We hebben genoten en vinden deze plaats dan ook super! Kortom een aanrader !

We really enjoyed our stay at Sonja and Michals houseboat. It was the perfect place to come home to after a long day of sightseeing, and an especially perfect place to crash after arriving in Amsterdam tired and jet lagged. The cabin was stocked with snacks and drinks, and the pictures did the place great justice. They have everything you need to get around, including maps, guides and bikes! An amazing couple of days, thanks for a great time!!

We stayed in the boat for 3 wonderful nights.
The location is ideal and the cabin was spacious and welcoming to our taste spacious (we where a couple + 3m baby).
Everything felt like thought, care and planning were put into it to make our stay go smooth. Starting from the driving instruction to the breakfast we had waiting for the first morning.
I can't think of a better way to experience the uniqueness of the Amsterdam way of life.

We arrived for our four night stay and were greeted by Sonja who showed us round their wonderful boat. Our accommodation was so comfortable and the bed was heavenly. During our stay we had utter peace and Sonja was extremely generous leaving us various items of food and drink including a fresh delicious loaf of bread and various other treats, along with a gorgeous bunch of fresh flowers.
We were able to experience the best of Amsterdam without being exposed to all the tourist tat. The Jordaan is charming and the little shops and cafés are excellent. We treated ourselves to dinner at BAK restaurant nearby and would highly recommend it.
We were able to walk to and from Centraal Rail
station with our bags within 20 minutes. We also enjoyed using the bikes to get around.
If you like a peaceful time in a beautiful setting, where you can watch the boats come and go, stay with Sonja and Michael, you will not be disappointed. We very much look forward to returning again one day soon.

Many thanks again to you both for a wonderful boat experience.

Our two night stay at Sonja's place was quite awesome - great location with everything in walking/cycling distance while not being too close to the touristy spots in Amsterdam.
She is a great host, putting a lot of effort into making you feel comfortable - fresh bread, lovely seasonal flowers, fruit and a bottle of bubbly.
The boat itself is stunning and it was great hearing how much effort they had to put in to get it.
I can highly recommend this place.

Our two-night stay on Sonja's houseboat was absolutely beautiful!  She's a great host who puts a lot of care and effort into her place and also to make sure her guests are comfortable. Little touches like bringing us fresh bread and champagne were quite a treat.  She also provides lots of helpful information on Amsterdam.  The houseboat is located in a fairly quiet and scenic area of the harbor yet still in a convenient position to visit the sights of the city.  The place is very clean and the bed is super comfortable.  We really enjoyed lounging on the deck of the boat and using the bikes provided to tour the city.  Highly recommend this place!

We had the most wonderful time on the Tasmania. Sonja was there to receive and welcome us even though our flight was almost 3 hours delayed. She and family live at the back of the Tasmania, but you will have absolute privacy. Sonja's place is so clean, and well equipped with food, guidebooks and comfortable little touches that you won't need any more. The Tasmania is located very near public transportation, yet the surrounding area is peaceful and picturesque. Highly recommended!

The picture of Sonja's houseboat appearing on the airbnb website does not begin to give it justice. It truly is "spectacular"! The accommodations were above any expectations. The amenities provided were more than I could have asked for. What a gorgeous ship! I would stay here anytime. I highly recommend it!

Es war ein tolles Erlebnis in diese ganz besonderen Lokation zu übernachten.
In der Umgebung liegen ebenso Hausboote, das macht den kleinen Pier sehr entspannt. Zum Zentrum ist es ein bischen zu laufen, aber wenn man dann abends wieder aufs Boot kommt, macht es die 2 Schritte mehr sofort wieder wett.

We had a wonderful experience.  Sonja was extremely helpful and hospitable.  She responded quickly to email questions and went out of her way to make us comfortable.  The boat lodging was very modern and comfortable, with great amenities like coffee, tea, and cookies.  The location was close to central Amsterdam but very quiet in a nice neighborhood.  We could walk 20 minutes from Central Station.  A highlight was the use of her bikes to explore the area and get to central city in 10 minutes.  We hope to return.

Together with my girlfriend we had a beautiful stay on this amazing boat. Sonja and her husband are perfect hosts. They made our time on the boat as pleasant as possible. We could use the bicycles, the canoes as well as the garden furniture to have some sunny hours on the deck. We definitely will come back and had an epic week! Thanks for everything.
Sonja's houseboat was unbelievable.  Gorgeous. Spectacular. The location was great.

Facile d'accès et bien placé, le séjour a été au top.Le bateau est situé à qqs minutes à vélo du centre et à l'intérieur plein de petites attentions lors de notre arrivée.
A réserver à les yeux fermés, si on retourne à Amsterdam nous avons déjà notre location.

Sonja was a great host.
The boat is not good... it is AMAZING!
really comfortable, good bathroom, great bedroom.
Close by bike from everything.
I strongly recommend if you want to stay in a quiet place, but still close to everything.

Sonja was a great host- the houseboat was just as described with lots of nice touches (fresh flowers, nice espresso, offer of champagne, use of bikes, etc). She was very quick to respond to questions via email and gave us a very detailed info sheet before our arrival with directions, restaurant recommendations, etc.  We enjoyed our stay on her house boat!

Sonja war eine perfekte Gastgeberin - von der ersten bis zur letzen Minute haben wir uns sehr willkommen und wohl gefühlt. Die Unterkunft übertraf unsere Erwartungen  - vielen herzlichen Dank noch einmal für den schönen entspannten Aufenthalt.

Living some days with Sonja on the housboat was a great experience. The location is close to the city but it is a very quiet place. Sonja borrowed us two bikes so we saw a lot of lovely corners and we were undependent of public transport. Thanks again!
On the houseboat we had everything we needed: some food for breakfast, beverages, maps...
I really recommend to stay at the Tasmania!

Our stay was amazing, the boat is truly spectacular. During the heavy raining nights and mornings we had a great time in (watching movies, good dvd selection :] )
It was particularly inspiring to me, to see how their dream came true =)
Sonja is a great host, we loved all the little details (the delicious breakfast, with bread, cheese...)
The neighborhood is perfect, quiet and close to main streets.

We voelden ons enorm welkom tijdens ons verblijf op de tasmania. Echt alles was voorzien gaande van vers brood, heerlijke druifjes tot rituals producten in de badkamer. Ook kregen we vele tips van leuke adresjes in de buurt! Wij komen zeker terug!

We spent two days and nights on the Tasmania and had an absolutely amazing time. The house boat is dream-like (which helped a lot during bad weather since it rained a lot) with everything you might want (comfy bed, fresh towels, nice shower, DVDs, ......). Sonja was an amazing host. Before we arrived, we received a lot of information on how to find the boat and where to go for dinner etc.. We arrived early in the morning and everything was ready. We had a full fridge with everything you need including breakfast items, sparkling wine, grapes, biscuits, a yummy fresh bread and tea/coffee - thanks again - we really appreciated that. The boat is easy to find and perfect for walks and bike rides into town. What more could you want?
Absolutely perfect. The space was clean and accessible. The breakfast was lovely and Sonja was kind and welcoming

Sonja is very hospitable and kind person! We do really enjoy meeting her! The boat is so nice, cozy and romantic! It was the best decision to choose the boat instead of any hotels. Neighborhood is amazing, there are a lot of cafe and bars that are different from usual touristic places. We will certainly  recommend this boat to all our friends!

Sonja describes this houseboat as their dream come true, and it felt like a dream for us, too! The boat itself is absolutely gorgeous and in a quiet, convenient location.

The suite is UNBELIEVABLE! What an incredible use of space. It felt light and airy and warm and cozy, all at once. So well done.

From Sonja's up-front communication and directions, to all the little treats she provides (Stroopwafels!!! We didn't even leave the room the first night because it had literally everything we needed), to her dining and sightseeing recommendations, to the amazingly comfortable bed, and let's not forget the fantastic shower, I could not recommend the Tasmania more highly.

Sonja's houseboat was a dream to stay on. She was there to greet us and show us around the boat. She was so sweet and provided fresh flowers, bread and a stocked mini fridge for our arrival. This was great to walk into as I was feeling a bit under the weather when we first arrived.

There was a fantastic binder she had put together of the most popular Amsterdam attractions, a list and map of her favorite restaurants in relation to the Tasmania. We throughly enjoyed our stay and using the bikes Sonja provided. I couldn't imagine exploring Amsterdam any other way. We will definitely be coming back, hopefully in the near future! Thanks again for the hospitality!

Fantastic! The boat is incredible. It's modern and comfortable and Sonja was a great host. The location is a bit removed from the city center, but the bikes helped. It was also quiet, which we loved. Definitely recommend this!
Perfect! Best night sleep I've had in a long time. Hospitality was second to none. And we adored out time in your home. Thank you for having us and for being so accommodating. Victoria and Daniel
Amazing experience, beautiful boat, perfect for a relaxing holidays full of comforts
Nous avons passé un très agréable séjour chez Sonja. Le logement était super et conforme aux photos. Sonja a beaucoup de petites attentions pour ses invites. Nous recommandons fortement cet endroit.

We had a fantastic stay in Amsterdam made all the more special by staying on the Tasmania. After a very warm welcome from Sonja we were shown our very impressive room. Everything about it was great! We loved drinking coffee on the deck in the morning and sipping bubbles on the deck in the evening!! We've already recommended it to a few friends :-)

Easily the best space me & the Mrs have ever stayed in. Everything about our stay was just perfect. Thankyou so much to both Michael & Sonja for their incredible hospitality. They made our couple of days in Amsterdam an idyllic experience.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay on the lovely 'Tasmania' houseboat. Everything we needed was within walking distance and Sonja was a wonderful host. Every detail was taken care of and we couldn't think of a better way to have spent our time in Amsterdam.
cosy boat!!! best hosts ever!

Ich Hab nur ein wort für sonjas hausboot.........traumhaft!einfach traumhaft.
Unsere unterkunft hat all unsere erwartungen übertroffen und Sonja ist eine topgastgeberin :)
Gerne wieder

This houseboat is simply amazing. Highly recommend staying on the Tasmania. The snacks and beverages Sonja had ready for us were perfect since we arrived in the late evening and had not eaten dinner. The houseboat is located in a quiet area but only about a 15-20 minute walk to the Central part of Amsterdam. When we come back to Amsterdam, we would love to stay on the houseboat again!

Wir hatten 3 wundervolle Tage bei Sonja auf der Tasmania. Das Boot liegt mit dem Fahrrad etwas 10 Minuten vom Zentrum entfernt, es lohnt sich allemal! Das Bad war sehr stylisch und auch sehr sauber. Wir geben 5 Sterne und würden es auf jeden Fall weiterempfehlen!

This is why you travel with AirBNB. Sonja's houseboat is indeed spectacular, and overall this was easily one of the very best AirBNB experiences I've ever had. The room is fantastic - comfortable, beautifully-decorated, clean, full of amenities, quiet, and in such a cool location. Sonja herself did so much to make sure I felt very welcome right from the start - lots of little touches to show you are cared for. And even though I was a bit skeptical at first about the location north of the city center, I ended up loving this location. Such a cool neighborhood, and really just on the edge of the center. I will definitely be staying here again on future trips to Amsterdam.

What a fantastic boat! The place is lovely, the bed comfortable, some decent snacks etc laid on. Lovely and quiet on the water and it was great to be woken up by the sunshine through the portals (these can, of course, be covered!).

Highly recommended and I will be staying here again on my next visit.

Convenient and comfortable. The Tasmania is a relaxing home away from home, located just 10 minutes bike ride from Centraal and Damrak.
Sonja made us feel very welcome, and provided enough information for us to commence our exploration of beautiful Amsterdam, along with the added bonus of our first breakfast supplied (lasting 4 days!) and a generous offering of beverages.
We felt free to come and go as we pleased with a dedicated access and use of their two bicycles. Situated very near to Harlemstraat and 9 Statjes, was a bonus for us to enjoy it's vibrancy and offered wonderful boutiques, art spaces and design houses as opposed to the usual fare of the red-light district.
Thank you Sonja for making our visit so memorable!

Everything about our stay was great and I mean everything. Sonja, Michael and Hector are great hosts and the boat itself is amazing. Brilliant place for a couple. Very central, very cozy, very private, very comfortable. We're most definitely staying there next time we're in AMS. No questions about that.

Nous avons passé 2 magnifiques jours à Amsterdam, grâce à l'hospitalité unique de Sonja sur le Tasmania ! Tout est fait pour se sentir à l'aise, la chambre est très agréable, les petits détails d'accueil font le plus ! A recommander pour une expérience hors du commun !

Sonja and Michael were very gracious hosts - Michael met us on the boat upon our arrival and provided us with plenty of information regarding the local area.  Prior to our arrival, Sonja had given us recommendations in terms of where to eat and visit, so we felt comfortable exploring straight away.  The houseboat is amazing - very well equipped.  We would definitely recommend staying here!

The Tasmania boat is SO GREAT ! Peaceful, elegant, clean... We really enjoyed our stay in Sonja's boat and we enjoyed a lot her way of communication and reception. Easy to contact, nice food and wine when we arrived.
We warmly recommend her... Thank you Sonja

We had an absolutely wonderful time on the Tasmania!! The boat is stunning, the pictures are good but the real thing was even better. A beautiful boat in a beautiful location. It was really clean and very comfortable, we could come and go as we pleased. It was such a peaceful environment and we loved our time there.

Sonja and Michael couldn't have done more, they made us feel very welcome. They had very kindly stocked the fridge with a lovely breakfast (that lasted us the whole three days) as well as wine and beer. They provided lots of information about tourist attractions, good places to eat/drink as well as the more unusual places - and the use of the two bikes was perfect.

We will definitely be returning to Amsterdam in the near future and would love to stay on the Tasmania again!! Would definitely recommend to anybody planning a trip to Amsterdam :) It beats a hotel any day.

p.s We especially loved Hector the ginger cat!!! :) :)

We had the most amazing weekend away on this stunning houseboat!

The location is wonderful - easy to walk into the centre of Amsterdam and surrounded by wonderful architecture. The views from the boat are amazing.

The boat itself is absolutely beautiful and finished to an extremely high standard. The wifi is fast, there is a bluetooth stereo which meant that we could easily play music and there are a number of DVDs provided.

Sonja is a wonderful hostess who very kindly provided us with wine and a range of food for breakfast. The boat also has a coffee maker, kettle, toaster and microwave.

We couldn't have had a better time and we'll certainly be back! Thank you!

The Tasmania boat is Amazing ! Everything about our stay was great and I mean everything is beautiful, elegant, clean.
We really enjoyed our stay in Sonja's boat. Smart to contact, nice breakfast and wine when we arrived. Sonia give us more suggestion about resturant and place to stay in Amsterdam.
We warmly recommend her...

Wir hatten drei traumhafte Tage in Amsterdam, bei Sonja und Michael auf der Tasmania. Danke an euch beide dafür!

Ein sehr gemütlich gerichtetes Gästezimmer, ein mit Leckereien gefüllter Kühlschrank, der uns den ersten Morgen versüßt hat, tolle Tipps von Michael für Kneipen, Restaurants und Sehenswürdigkeiten - was will man mehr? So freundlich, nett und aufgeschlossen habe ich Gastgeber selten erlebt.

Das wundervolle Boot, der saubere und liebevoll eingerichtete Gästebereich und die schöne Atmosphäre am Hafen haben die drei Tage unvergesslich gemacht! :-)
---
We had three wonderfull days in Amsterdam, at Sonjas & Michaels Tasmania. thnx to you!!!

A cosy guestroom, the perfect filled fridge for the first breakfast, nice tips for bars, restaurants and sights from Michael - what do you need more? I never before met hosts, that were so pleasant, kind and open :-)

The wonderful boat, the tidy and cosy furnished guest area and the loveley atmosphere at the port made the three days unforgettable!

A very cool unique way to experience Amsterdam. Very easy to get to from the airport via train and a quick 5 minute bus ride. The location is great, very easy to get to all the tourist spots and taking the complimentary bikes around the city is fantastic! The Tazmania feels brand new and very modern, the wifi is great and the bed is cozy & comfortable. We will be back! Thanks Sonia for the stocked fridge full of snacks and the bottle of wine!
Lovely place to stay and great hospitality! A must for those who love to have an experience on a boat house! Thanks a lot Sonja!

Sonja made herself available at all times and responded very quickly to communications. When we arrived we we're made very welcome and we had everything we could possibly want for our stay. The boat was breathtaking and once we found our bearings it turned out to a be very accessible, quiet and cool location. A couple of very friendly local bars/cafes made our experience even better when we wanted a break from the City. All together quite a find and heartily recommended.
We had an excellent stay on the Tasmania. Great location and the bikes made seeing the city so much easier.

Sonja is nice and kind, she gives us many informations, the location was very clean and tidy. The boat is near several shopping opportunities  and near the center of Amsterdam. I will recommend Sonja and her location to all guest who search a very special location in Amsterdam :)

Our week end in the Tazmania boat was great. Sonja was really welcoming and prepared a lot of things for us to feel like at home.
I recommend this experience!

The Tasmania is the perfect accommodation if you are looking for somewhere unique and special with a great location, and all the amenities you could need.

Sonja was great with responding to my emails promptly, and very friendly, even when I kept losing the directions email!

She met us on the boat and showed us around, and was very helpful in providing suggestions of where to go, and great places to eat.

The Tasmania is a stunning boat, and photos do not give it justice. It is far more impressive in person, and the decor is beautiful and modern, whilst still being very cosy and homely.
