They obviously put a lot of work to make house boat that is truly exceptional and aesthetically pleasing, and I would recommend a visit on seeing the architecture of it alone.

Inside you are in your own section of the boat, and can come and go as you please. The room itself is fully contained with comfortable double bed, kitchenette, small table with chairs, bathroom with big 'rainfall' style shower.

It is really lovely inside with all the amenities needed. Sonja was kind enough to leave a stocked fridge so we had enough food for two breakfasts, and snacks, as well as sparkling wine, beers, juice and waters. As keen coffee fiend, I was very happy to find a Nespresso machine for my regular caffeine fix!

The location is a 2 minute walk to the famous Haarlemmerstraat with it's wonderful boutique shops, and eateries, and about 20 minutes walk from the Centraal train station. It is a great location as it allows you to walk to the best of Amsterdam including the museum area, and the 9 streets, but is out of the hustle and bustle, so it is lovely and quiet. There are also bikes to borrow, but we just walked.

It is a picturesque view from the boat, and lovely to wake up on the water surround by boats.

It even comes with a lovely big ginger cat called Hector!

I could not recommend the Tasmania enough as a perfect accommodation option if you are looking for somewhere unique, convenient and luxurious. We cannot wait to return!

Accurate description, friendly and welcoming host, quiet and relaxed location but not too far to city centre (walking distance) and beautiful accommodation. Little extras like having some food in and fridge stocked made it feel really special.

Fantastic accomodation for a weekend break! The hosts were lovely and made us feel at home. They recommended places to eat and had provided lots of tasty food and drink on the breakfast bar so we were sorted for breakfast! The boat was stunning, it was a gorgeous double room with breakfast bar and private bathroom so it was all self contained. Absolutely stunning exterior and interior- great location, safe and easy walk in and out of the city centre. Will definately recommend!

Lors de notre séjour nous avons apprécié la gentillesse de nos hôtes et les petites attentions mises à disposition, comme le petit déjeuner, les produits frais dans le réfrigérateur et les produits cosmétiques dans le coin salle de bain. L'hébergement fut accessible rapidement depuis la gare. Un bon moment en amoureux qui sort de l'ordinaire. Nous retenterons l'aventure aux beaux jours. Max et Virg

We had a fantastic stay on Sonja's houseboat. Your parents were so welcoming and the studio was so beautiful with the most comfy (Website hidden by Airbnb) was hard to leave. Already recommended the place to family and friends, thanks Sonja for a great stay in Amsterdam.

(Amsterdam vom 20.2. bis 22.2.15) Meine Frau und ich haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Sonja war zwar im Urlaub, hat aber vorher angekündigt, dass sich Ihre Eltern  um uns kümmern. Die Begrüßung bei Regen war warmherzig, im Zimmer war es mollig vorgwärmt und der Kühlschrank mit leckeren Sachen gefüllt. Bei Fragen haben sie uns immer sofort geholfen. Insgesamt ein tolles Wochenende, dafür dass das Wetter so besch... war kann keiner was. Immer wieder gerne!!!  Torsten und Silke aus Enger

Fantastic weekend in Amsterdam!
The boat is cozy and very special, the hosts very welcoming (details in the fridge were really appreciated) and the location perfect.
We really enjoyed taking the provided bikes for long strolls around the fantastic city.
Overall a big thumb up for the complete package.

Ein herzliches Dankeschön an Sonja und Michael. Wir hatten ein wundervolles Wochenende in Amsterdam und haben den Aufenthalt auf der bezaubernden Tasmania sehr genossen. Ein Hausboot mit wirklich ganz besonderem Charme. Wir wurden herzlich empfangen und haben uns sehr über den liebevoll befüllten Kühlschrank gefreut. Unsere Erwartungen wurden völlig übertroffen und wir würden jeder Zeit gern wieder kommen.

My wife and I shared a brilliant 4 days onboard the Tasmania. Sonja and her husband were wonderful hosts with breads, snacks and some bubbly all laid on on our arrival. The room is immaculately clean and a joy to be in. I strongly recommend any future guests make use of their two bikes - a great way to see Amsterdam. My thanks again to Sonja for her warm hospitality. You're welcome to sail to Ireland anytime!

I could not have wished for a better host that Tanja. Even before we arrive Tanja emailed with help and advise on how to get from to her from the airport as well as resteeraunt reviews. We arrived earlier than th eusual check in time to which Tanja allowed us to check in . The room was amazing, complete with food, snacks and various drinks. The bikes were useful and we used them all day to get around. As our fligh wasn't until the evening Tabja also let us check out late. She was simply an amazing host and if I am ever back in Amsterdam I will definitely check her availability

Nous avons passé un excellent WE dans cette belle ville d'Amsterdam et le fait d'avoit logé dans le Tasmania y est pour beaucoup !
Le logement est simple d'accès et très bien expliqué par Sonja dans son email.
L'acceuil a été formidable, la chambre conforme aux photos et il y a tout ce qu'il faut dans la chambre (jus, café, eau, bière, pain, fromage, chips etc). la salle de bain est aussi très bien équipé (shampoing, gel douche, serviettes etc).
Cette première expérience avec Airbnb est une réussite et je recommande très fortement ce logement très original (des vélos sont aussi gentillement mis à disposition si besoin)
Foncez les yeux fermés ...
Merci à Sonja et Michael pour leur gentillesse. Le bateau était tout simplement magnifique et fonctionnel. Nous avons pu découvrir Amsterdam grâce aux vélos prêtés.
We love the place. It was cozy and Sonja was really helpful. She provided us a great place to stay. I would recommend staying in Tasmania. Good experience!

Wunderbare Unterkunft an perfekter Lage!
Haben uns von Anfang an sehr wohl und super betreut gefühlt.
Sonja made us very welcome, and we were well provided for on arrival. The Tasmania is an amazing boat, so cosy, and spacious. We found it hard to leave! Thanks for having us!

We loved the houseboat! It looked exactly like the pictures and Sonja really spoiled us with lots of snacks for us to have during our stay.  Sonja was a great host and provided us with a map and a lot of information about the city to help us settle in.  Great location within walking distance of Central Station and on the nicer, less touristy side of the city.  We love how unique the boat was and will certainly recommend it to anyone we know visiting Amsterdam.  It truly exceeded our expectations.  Wish we could've stayed longer!

WOW!!! Stay here! This was our last stop on a two week honeymoon in Europe. We both loved it. It's already interesting enough to stay on a boat, but it's absolutely beautiful. The location is easy to find. It's a little bit removed from the center city attractions, but that's a good thing. It's in a nice area, and they provide two decent bikes so you can get into town pretty easily. There's also a free ferry across the river nearby. Take it to a place called Pllek! The room is clean with plenty of space. It's beautifully decorated. They stocked it with all kinds of nice food and drink. The host was there when we showed up and made check in and check out very easy. It's very secure and comfortable (this is not a leaky rocking boat). This was easily the coolest place we stayed in the whole two weeks. Stay here!

I think there is pretty much everything already said regarding Sonja's and Michael's kindness and hospitality.
In my view there is only one word to describe the location, the surrounding and the couple: AWESOME !!!
We will be back for sure. As soon as possible.
We had a wonderful time on this boat, really spacious and comfortable! We were delighted to be looked after so well... do not hesitate to book this place!

Die Reise nach Amsterdam war ein Geburtstagsgeschenk für meinen Mann und es sollte was besonders sein... Durch Zufall nr.1 entdeckte ich die App Airbnb und Zufall nr.2 die "Tasmania"! Ich und mein Mann waren sehr begeistert von Tasmania, sie ist noch schöner als auf den Bildern und zugleich über die freundliche und liebevolle Art von der Gastgeberin Sonja! Nochmal vielen herzlichen Dank an Sonja für die Möglichkeit auf einem Boot zu wohnen!!! Das ist ein tolles Gefühl! Wir werden wieder hin fahren!

Great experience on a beautiful custom built houseboat!  Cozy bedroom in the bow has everything you need - super comfortable bed, private bath, small kitchen and your own private entrance. Sonja was great communicating after we booked and provided excellent local information, as well as a wonderful welcome refreshments and local treats. Location is quiet and removed from the busy tourist center but you are just a couple blocks walk from bus and tram to all of city's adventures.
Perfect - a really lovely stay thank you. Apologies only for our chaotic dash to leave and our slightly late arrival!
Vriendelijke ontvangst , uniek verblijf in een mooie rustige omgeving. Alles aanwezig volgens beschrijving.

Great all round experience for our first time in Amsterdam. The boat was absolutely lovely and exceeded expectations!  Fresh bread and a full fridge when we arrived was a very nice touch. Directions & local information given were brilliant and we had no trouble finding the boat from the train station. Nice distance away from the city centre and the bikes provided made it easy to get around (and a nice way to see the city). Highly recommended and would defiantly return if we ever visit Amsterdam again. Thank-You Sonja!!

The perfect house to spend 3 days in Amsterdam.
Located only 7 min walks from Amsterdam Central station. We were able to live as locals as the area was less touristic!
Sorrounded by canals and only 10 min walk from all the city atractions.
I was there with my full family (6 adults & a 3year old girl) and it really had everything we needed. The big living room & kitchen allows you to spend lovely evenings all together. We felt like at home.
I really recomend Joana's house and I hope to be back soon!

La casa perfecta para estar 3 días en Amsterdam.
Está situada a solo 7 min de la estación central de tren pero es un barrio mucho menos turístico. Durante 3 días hemos vivido como holandeses 100%.
El barrio está rodeado de canales y además a tan solo 10 min andando del centro turístico.
Estuve con mi familia (7 adultos & 1 niña de 3 años) y cubrió perfectamente las necesidades de todos. El gran salón y cocina permitió disfrutar de las noches relajadas en familia. Nos sentimos como en casa.
Realmente recomiendo 100% la casa de Joana y espero poder volver pronto!

I did not travel personally in this listing. Just my daughter, my wife and her parents was there.
They had a really beautiful and warm experience, they want to come back very soon in Amsterdam.
The appartement is very clean, very well decorated and in the center of Amsterdam.
I had a very good communication with Johanna, she always responded to me very quickly, i'll come back as soon as i can

Nous avons eu beaucoup de plaisir à passer quelques jours dans l'appartement de Jo et MP Van Dijk, l'accueil était irréprochable de même que la qualité de l'hébergement. L'appartement était magnifique et très bien situé. Nous y retournerons!

Excellent stay - apartment was supremely well located, with great shops and restaurants nearby.  Good recommendations for places ot eat which we used.  Joanna was charming and helpful and was ever-present for us! It was very helpful to be able to leave bags on arrival/departure.  Appartment, clean and uncluttered,  was as described - the stairs are indeed steep and require care in navigating Highly recommended.

Superbe appartement, correspondant parfaitement aux photos publiées. Nous étions 8 et avons passé 5 jours vraiment très agréables. Très bien situé, nous avons pu visiter Amsterdam à pied sans difficulté. Joanna est une personne très coopérative qui nous a permis de disposer de l'appartement plus tôt que prévu à l'arrivée, et au départ, de laisser nos valises dans son appartement.
Pour toutes ces raisons, je conseille vivement cet appartement et j'espère bien y retourner un jour.

cet appartement est parfaitement bien placé dans Amsterdam , à la fois proche des canaux, de la gare centrale et du centre historique , mais aussi dans un quartier qui ressemble plus à un village qu'à une capitale . Le confort et les équipements de très bon gout et de qualité de la maison sont parfait si vous voulez éviter la cuisine hollandaise et les restaurants moyens d'Amsterdam . La gentillesse et l’accueil de Joanna sont également à signaler pour parfaire votre séjour .
Pascal (Rouen , France )

Nous avons passé un très agréable séjour en famille dans ce vaste appartement lumineux et fonctionnel. Je recommande cet endroit situé idéalement, dans un chouette quartier. Bref: tout bien!
Véronique

Our group of 6 had the absolute pleasure of staying at Jo's place in early May. To begin the place is located in a wonderful area near numerous restaurants, grocery stores, banks and clothing stores but was quiet at night so there were no issues with noise. The space is unbelievably beautiful,  well decorated, warm and welcoming. Check in went smoothly and Jo even provided a welcome manual that provided us with frequently asked questions and outlined nearby sites. It was easy to contact Jo with any questions through out the stay. I have nothing but great things to say an would highly recommend this space.

Nous avons passé un séjour extraordinaire à Amsterdam, l'appartement est fantastique, très grand (parfait pour 6 ou même 8 personnes) , très propre, la décoration est splendide ! l'appartement est situé à 5 minutes à pied de la gare , au milieu des canaux et tout proche de tout ce qu'il y a à visiter  ! Le quartier est génial car il y a tout ce qu'il faut à proximité : supermarché  , petits commerces sympas , restaurants ... bref c'était parfait et si nous devions retourner à Amsterdam  nous retournerions sans hésiter dans cet appartement !!

Everything was perfect! Location (the best neighbourhood),apartment (clean and very nice interior) and Jo was very kind and helpful.All over everything worked out very smooth and we will definetly be back.Thanks for everything!
/Anders

The stay at Jo,s place was perfect! 5min away from Amsterdam Centraal station, very very clean flat, lot of practical features in the house, ( eg. Wireless phone in each room, hair dryers in each room, city guides, etc!!!)
The arriving and departure procedures were very easy and flexible!
Was a perfect first but not last stay at Jo & Marc's place!
Thank you!

We are two families with little children. We have been in Multatuli apartment for 5 days. We are very satisfaied of it! It's very well located in central Amsterdam in a very pleasant neighbourhood. Very clean and in a tipical Dutch style (it means very steep stairs too, so not for ones with mobility problems). We thank a lot Jo and MP for their help in managing our luggage the day we left and for their help to find a doctor when we need it. They have been very helpfull and very nice. We recommend the apartment and if we'll come back we'll surely stay there again
We found the apartment very nice, clean and comfortable. It is close to the Dam Square. Jo helped us with everything. I would definitely like to stay here again in my next trip to Amsterdam.

I and some friends stayed at Jo and Mp Van Dijk apartment for 4 days. It had been a wonderful experience! Many space in the living room where we could stay together. A kitchen fully equipped and bright bed rooms. The optimun location let us reach easily every place we wanted to visit. Joanna supported us in everething we needed. Thank you for all!
Amazing apartment! Amazing location, only a 5 minute walk from the station. Very clean and bright. 3 minute walk to a good cheap supermarket. Will definitely come back again.

The apartment was perfect for our family trip (3 couples, for 4 nights); apartment was immaculate and stylish, amazingly comfortable beds, and great hosts!
So many good memories of walking the city, exploring shops and museums, navigating the canals, eating delicious food...and the Multatuli apartment was the perfect "home base" for all our excursions.
Jo and MP were great hosts--very accommodating and helpful, always ready to provide a restaurant recommendation or help with logistics.
We recommend 100%!!

A wonderful house smack in the center of town. Very friendly hosts.
We had a great stay!

Had a great stay at the Multatuli! It's a wonderful apartment, exactly as described. Very comfortable, clean, great set up, beautiful apartment. Location is central to most everything, lot's of shopping, cafes, bike rentals and 10 minute walk to the central station. Jo and MP are super hosts! Jo was very responsive and attentive in helping us have a fun time in Amsterdam. Helpful in any way that we asked, real professionals in the hospitality business. Very nice people! Would most certainly go back and stay next time I visit.

We absolutely LOVED our stay in Amsterdam! The apartment was beautiful and functional and in a fantastic location! Jo was so great and gave us lots of information on things to do and see and we would definitely recommend this apartment to anybody wanting to be comfortable and problem free! Thank you so much.

Best Airbnb we have ever stayed at! The apartment is very clean, light and spacious and is in a great location. We could walk everywhere & found excellent restaurants close by.
Although we didn't meet Jo & MP, they left wonderful, user friendly information about Amsterdam and locations to help us.
Maartje meet us and made our orientation of the apartment and area very easy.
We would choose to stay here again on our next visit to Amsterdam.

Really nice apartement, clean and in a very nice location. The hosts were not there but the girl who welcomed us was really nice (the contact we had by email with the hosts were really good too). We had a great time staying there.

Amazing boat! Really enjoyed our stay here the boat is lovely and Sonja is an excellent host. She was there to meet us when we arrived and showed us around. Sonja even provided some breakfast items and a bottle of fizz which made it that extra special! Would definitely go back! Thanks again!

Had a wonderful stay at Sonja's houseboat. Could only stay three nights as we were on a tight schedule, would have loved to spend a little more time there.
Sonja supplies maps and guide books as well as helpful first hand knowledge about Amsterdam and the best areas to explore.
Bikes are right next to the boat and it's super easy to get around on them.
Would strongly recommend this as a place to stay.

The boat house was amazing! Wasn't to far from the central of Amsterdam and in a lovely quiet location! Inside was lovely and clean and Sonja had very kindly supplied milk, orange juice, cheese which was delicious, bread which was amazing, tea, coffee, jams and few other little extras!! A lovely bottle of champers was also in the fridge! The bedroom was fresh and very comfortable, there is not one negative thing about this amazing place and the host as we had the best weekend! Advice for anyone staying try the bikes we had a lot of fun on them and a fab way to get around, looks scary but once you get the hang of them they are fantastic! Thank you Sonja for making our experience a very 5 star and special one would love to return.

On a passé un séjour incroyable grâce à cet endroit inédit et les petites attentions laissées par sonja.
Tout était parfait.
Je recommande cet endroit ludique et agréable à tout le monde.
Nous y avons trouvé une tranquillité que nous n aurions pas trouver ailleurs !!!!
Incroyable

We had a wonderful stay with Sonja on the Tasmania. We were greeted warmly and she had prepared an entire folder for us of information and things to do in Amsterdam which included a list of even places to eat and a map of where they were. Very helpful. Great area- we walked everywhere. Bikes were included also even though we didn't ride them. Would stay there again. Thanks Sonja :)

Wow! We had a great experience staying on the Tasmania.  Sonja greeted us warmly and gave us a guided tour of everything we needed.  We were delighted with the drinks and goodies she provided for us and made good use of them.  Amsterdam is a wonderful city and staying on such a beautiful houseboat was the perfect place to experience it.  The 'apartment' is lovely - roomy, modern, quirky.  We loved it and will definitely come to stay again, only longer next time!  Thanks Sonja.

Special accommodation, wonderfully warm host. Excellent communication beforehand, great information on local restaurants and attractions given. What a room - everything you dream of when you think of an ideal room on a boat! Plenty of lovely extras too - snacks, drinks, coffee pods, delicious fresh bread - thanks for a sensational end to our holiday!

Très beau logement.
Les photos reflètent la réalité et encore la réalité est encore mieux. Car on se sent très bien accueillis. Produits locaux pour le petit dej, bouteille de vin pour l'apéro....
Tout était parfait et le gros plus, ce sont les vélos mis à notre disposition.
Magnifique endroit

A unique,extraordinary place to stay. Lovely accomodation,very friendly hosts. You enter the boat And the holidays Start directly. You Even have some nice Little things to eat And drink to welcome you And Two Bikes you can use to go easily & quickly to the City Center. The view on the water is amazing,you can perfectly chillout on deck  And if you go Inside, it is just cozy, very clean And you have a nice huge confy bed awaiting you. We Feel so Lucky that we Found this perfect place to escape And we will for sure come back. Thanks for the lovely Weekend!

This was probably the nicest place I stayed at in Amsterdam so far, and I will be back. Sonja is awesome, she really thought of every detail and it's so easy to live there. The boat is extra clean, comfortable, quite and relaxing. Thank you for your great hospitality. Looking forward to spending more days here in the future.

Het was een leuke ontvangst, goede info over wat er in de buurt te zien was. Een rustige omgeving en toch snel in het centrum. Het verblijf was geweldig, je bent het niet gewoon om op een boot te slapen, maar dit was toch een leuke ervaring!

Sonja welcomed us warmly on her truely spectatular houseboat. The apparment was all nice and clean, the fridge was filled with drinks and cheese. A great asset were the two bikes we could use a - true Dutch experience. We enjoyed our time and would have preferred to stay way longer ....  Thanks Sonja and hope to return some time :-)

Had a great stay on the houseboat. Welcomed and orientated to facilities. Thoughtful and generous supplies to make our stay more enjoyable. Comfy bed. bicycles welcome and useful addition. Sonja's instructions on how to get there and other useful tourist attraction tips really great.
Sonja was a fantastic host and the houseboat was exactly as pictured. It was a great experience and I recommend everyone stay aboard a boat in Amsterdam :)

Sonja is a very welcoming host, treat us with sparkling wine, juice, cheese and simple breakfast for our enjoyment.
She replies very efficiently and is. Very helpful host.
The boat is very great designed, neat and tidy. We just like staying in a dream boat.
The only drawback is its location. It requires about 20-25 minutes to walk to the Central Station or city centre.

Séjour au top à bord du Tasmania. L'accueil de Sonja est parfait : petit déjeuner frais, boissons, deux vélos à disposition, logement très bien équipé, et il a été très facile de communiquer.
Le quartier est tranquille, situé à proximité de la gare et du Jordaan, donc parfait pour quelques jours de visites à Amsterdam. Et le bateau en lui-même est à voir! Confortable et très bien rénové, on peine à le quitter.
Excellente expérience.

Absolutely Fabulous experience from start to finish.. The houseboat is even better than its pictures.. Great location, close to everything, and all the information one could ever need about Amsterdam.
Fully provisioned fridge.. And Bubbly too.
Thank you Sonia .. We will return.

Everything was perfect, literally.  Sonja is superfriendly, easy, efficient, helpful, everything you'd want a host to be. The boat is great, excellent modern design with lots of clever practical ideas, stylish but cosy at the same time. The morning swim was refreshing, the bike distance to the city (literally 10 minutes) fun and easy. It's hard to be taken seriously when you're so enthusiastic about everything, but believe me, when I am dissatisfied with anything, I make that clear too. So, Amsterdam and the "Tasmania" are definitely on top of our "back soon"-list -- thank you so much, Sonja.
Peter has so many cute amenities. Loved the robes. The boat was amazing and it was close to everything and he was always super speedy with communication

This was the best experience! The boat is so much fun and neat. It is just a block or so from the tram and even just walking, it is only a short distance to all the popular tourist spots and also plenty of quiet neighborhood bars and restaurants. there is a market and coffee shops nearby. Peter was very friendly and let me store my luggage until the boat was ready for occupation. I am loking forward to my next stay on the boat!

Words cannot describe how much we loved our stay on Peter's boat. It's so well appointed, with lovely touches to make your stay extra nice. Even if it was a chilly November night we could sit on the deck, wrapped in the fluffy and super warm blanket. And the heated floors are absolutely great. Peter is a wonderful host, he knows how to make guests feel welcome.
Great location. Glad I tried the houseboat thing for a night.
The best place I’ve ever slept! A ship in the middle of the centre of Amsterdam, how amazing is that.. everything was clean and we were well taken care off. PETJE AF!

Great place, great location, great reception.
Accommodation was perfect - we particularly loved sleeping in the sauna on the top floor. ;-)
Highly recommended.

This is a very centrally located apt - large and light.  Despite the horrendous stairs, we managed well with 4 adults, and 2 small kids aged 2 and 4.  Friendly host who went out of her way to help us - eg link us with sirport transfers (tho the website was in Dutch).

Eine tolle Wohnung in perfekter Lage. Die Treppen sind sehr steil, also für Menschen mit Bewegungseinschränkungen problematisch.
Die Eigentümer wohnen nebenan und sind ausgesprochen freundlich.
Ein stolzer Preis, aber auch eine 1 A Wohnung. Die Bilder sind ein wenig weich gezeichnet, treffen aber trotzdem die Qualität.

After a past negative experience with another host in Europe, Joanna & MP renewed our faith in the AirBnB service. The apartment is stunning, perfectly situated and lived up to our expectations in every way. For future visits to Amsterdam, the Multatuli would be on top of our list!

We absolutely loved our stay at Jo's place - the flat is exactly as described, spacious and in an excellent location in central Amsterdam.

The kitchen is huge, as is the living room, and the rooms on the next two floors up are well kept, comfy and quiet at night. The kitchen has a dishwasher, washing machine.tumble dryer, and is well equipped with all you need (including salt/pepper etc); the bathroom is a good size, as is the 2nd on-suite bathroom. The flat is on a side street, so not loud at all - but just around the corner from lot's of lovely bars, cafe's and coffee shops! Plenty amazing restaurants nearby as well, and walking distance to main train station and red light district.

Jo was warm and welcoming, explained all the important "need to know" to us, and was also available when we had questions over the weekend. Could not ask for more.

We will certainly be back in Amsterdam and in this flat - we had a great time, and I would recommend anyone to stay here!

Me and my family stayed at Multatuli for 3 nights at September. Apartment is spacious, comfortable and very well located.
Jo was warm and friendly. Gave all us information we needed about restaurants, shops etc.
I would highly recommend this place to stay in Amsterdam.
If we'll ever be back to Amsterdam we choose this apartment again for sure.
Everything was perfect!!!

Location, location, location - perfect -  and a well equipped and well-appointed apartment to match.  Only drawback which we were forewarned about was the very steep stairs to get to the upper  floors.  Not for the faint of heart.  Jo, the owner, was most accommodating.  Highly recommended.

L'appartement était magnifique comme sur les photos, très spacieux et très agréable pour un grand groupe. Nous étions 8 à loger dans l'appartement de Jo&MP et nous ne nous sommes jamais marchés sur les pieds. le grand salon et la cuisine spacieuse conviennent parfaitement, ainsi que les deux salles de bain. Tout était beau et propre. Et les lits étaient incroyablement agréables! J'ai rarement si bien dormi!
Il y avait du thé et du café à disposition, ainsi que du gel douche dans la salle de bain, comme a l'hôtel! Joanna nous a très bien accueilli en nous donnant de bons plans concernant Amsterdam (location de vélos, musées etc.) et une charmante adresse pour bruncher. De plus elle parlait très bien français. Lorsque nous avons quitté l'appartement dans la matinée, elle a eu la gentillesse de nous laisser entreposer nos valises chez elle jusqu'à l'heure de notre départ. Ce fut un réel plaisir de loger à cette adresse, et j'y retournerais avec plaisir, sans hésiter!

Das Apartment ist wirklich sehr zu empfehlen. Top Lage, super Ausstattung und sehr nette Vermieter. Joanna ist wirklich sehr zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit. Fragen werden schnell und kompetent beantwortet. Das Apartment erstreckt sich über drei Etagen. In der ersten Wohnetage befindet sich die sehr geräumige Wohnküche (mit allen nötigen Utensilien die man zum Kochen benötigt) sowie das Wohnzimmer. In der zweiten Wohnetage befinden sich zwei Schlafräume mit je einem Doppelbett. Eines der Zimmer hat ein separates Bad. Das zweite Bad befindet sich ebenfalls auf der zweiten Wohnetage. In der dritten Wohnetage befindet sich ein weiters Dachgeschoss Zimmer mit Doppelbett sowie zwei Schlafcouchen. Das Apartment liegt ca. 7 Gehminuten von der Central Station. Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten befinden sich ebenfalls zahlreich, in unmittelbarer Umgebung. Wir sind mit insgesamt acht Personen angereist und alle waren sehr begeistert.

This is a fantastic house! beautiful and very well located. We walked from the central train station to the house in less than 10 minutes with our luggage.

Jo was very kind and helpful to me and my group by giving us the best tips to make the most of our experience in Amsterdam. Share your plans with Jo and she might provide some insight from a local's perspective to make your stay even better.

To top it all off, there's a Iberico ham restaurant across the street from the house, just delicious.

Thanks Jo


Daniel D
Chicago

We enjoyed a few very nice days in Amsterdam. The location of this appartment is perfect. It is also very spacious and featues excellent interior design. Our hosts were helpful in providing tips on performances or events to visit. The very steep stairs are normal for Amsterdam, I believe, and give a place an authentic touch.

Lovely large apartment in the heart of Amsterdam. Joanne and her husband were lovely hosts. We communicated by email often as she helped me book a RT transfer from the airport, book the Ann Frank house and gave us information on the boat tours, museums and where to eat in the area. There is a large living area and new large kitchen. All three bedrooms are of good size and two average bathrooms with nice showers.

We arrived early prior to the current guests leaving and the apartment would still have to be cleaned. Jo had us leave our luggage in her apartment while we went to the museum. She let us borrow umbrellas. Her husband took all of our luggage up the stairs to the main floor to us.
We enjoyed the apartment, hosts and guests. As her description states, there are step steps up to the apartment and similar to the 2nd and 3rd floors. We found the steep steps as the only issue but as mentioned her husband helped with the luggage upon arriving and departing.

I would recommend the apartment to others.
Dean Jerome
York, Pa.

Beautiful, stylish, comfortable apartment with every need catered for - great attention to detail. Joanna is an excellent, considerate host. The apartment is in a perfect location, really couldn't ask for anymore!  Highly recommended, would definitely stay again.
We loved this apartment. It was clean, spacious, beautifully decoarted and in a perfect central location. We would highly recommend!
We spent a long weekend at this apartment. It's spacious, clean, well decorated, and cosy.  The host Jo is very nice and helpful.  Great experience! Highly recommended!
Magnifique appt très propre et très bien décoré. Son. Emplacement est idéal pour visiter Amsterdam. Joanna est très sympa et très disponible. Je recommande vivement

Tiny, but super cute!! It’s a houseboat...on a (Website hidden by Airbnb) Amsterdam!! Obviously awesome!! We were able to walk to quite a few places from there. If we couldn’t walk, it was a cheap Uber ride. We really enjoyed our stay...only wish it was longer!! Thanks Peter!
Unieke ervaring, goede locatie, schoon. Peter reageert snel op berichten en is erg vriendelijk. Aanrader!

Wir haben ein wunderschönes langes Wochenende auf der Tasmania verbracht. Es gab wirklich nichts, was es nicht gab. Sonja hat sogar den Kühlschrank mit Leckereien fürs Frühstück gefüllt und auch Bier kalt gestellt ;) Ihre Restauranttipps waren auch sehr gut und hilfreich. Die Ausstattung pikobello! Toll, dass es auch zwei Fahrräder gibt. Von dem ruhig gelegenen Anlegeplatz ist alles andere prima zu erreichen. Vielen lieben Dank! Wir kommen wieder!
Service in top!

This apartment is so lovely, and it couldn't be in a better neighborhood to explore the city, everything is at your doorstep.  Joanna was in constant contact before, during and after our stay and was always willing to call us cabs, anything to ensure our stay was easy, comfortable and enjoyable.  The apartment is very clean, comfortable beds, large bathrooms and bedrooms, very quiet for sleeping.  I cannot say enough great things about our stay and our hosts. We certainly would rent again if we are ever lucky enough to return to Amsterdam!

At our arrival we have been welcomed by Sonja and she showed us around. We felt very welcome.
The Houseboat is really nice and we have had a lot of space in our Room.
Together with the Bikes we had used it was a perfect stay which we have enjoyed. We definitly would recommend this for everybody who want to stay a few Days or a Week in Amsterdam.

We loved our stay on the house boat!  Such a thrill!  I was concerned the boat might rock - but was so thrilled we couldn't even feel we were on water. It was a very doable but slightly steep flight of stairs to get to our room - such luxury and comfort!  Loved looking at the stars through the skylight as we lay in bed. Would recommend people try the bikes. Such a faster way to get around the city!   Stay here- it will be the most unique experience in Amsterdam!

BEST PLACE TO STAY IN AMSTERDAM! I felt so lucky to stay on Sonja's boat. It was the coolest experience and so cute!!!! She was a spectacular host who stocked the fridge, and provided fresh flowers and bikes. It was all just so perfect. I will be back!!!

Wow. What a wonderful boat. It made our weekend in Amsterdam  a very memorable one. The host was great and we was supplied with food and drink which was very kind. It Has very good transport links by bus and tram so the centre is only 10 minutes away. It's a Lovely quite location away from the hustle of the centre. We was recommended to try the oldest cafe in Amsterdam that sells apple pie and that's a must. If I could upload a picture I would. Don't miss the opportunity to stay here in your life. Thank you Sonja...

Tout était comme indiqué ! Une hôte très prévenante, avec beaucoup de petites attentions pour note arrivée (de quoi faire un petit déjeuner avec du pain frais, carte annotée pour une visite sans mauvaises surprises, des vélos à discrétion, un mini frigo remplit de produits frais pour ne pas devoir faire les courses dès notre arrivée).
Sonja était là pour nous accueillir et répondre à toutes nos questions pour que nous puissions profiter d'Amsterdam au mieux.
Le logement était splendide, spacieux, fonctionnel, très lumineux.
Bref, un séjour magnifique dans un lieu magnifique avec une hôte très gentille et prévenante.
Si vous voulez visiter Amsterdam, c'est le lieu de séjour qu'il vous faut !

O anúncio de Sonja explica exatamente o que encontramos, uma houseboat espetacular. Adoramos a experiência, fomos muito bem recebidos por ela, que nos apresentou o barco e nosso quarto. Fomos recebidos com vinho, tivemos a disposição no quarto uma nespresso, geladeira, forno elétrico, uma cama deliciosa e ainda 2 bicicletas para passearmos por Amsterdam. Toda dúvida ou ajuda necessária Sonja nos atendeu prontamente. Quando voltarmos com certeza nos hospedamos novamente no Tasmania. Realmente inesquecível.

Sonja made everything easy for us during our stay and provided bikes to use whenever we liked. Our room had fresh flowers, fresh bread and a stocked fridge. This meant we were in no rush to find somewhere to eat when we arrived.

The houseboat was walking distance from Central Station and a good location from which to explore the city.

The houseboat was clean, wonderfully designed with everything we needed to have a great stay. Sonja recommended lots of lovely restaurants to eat at - I can now highly recommend BAK restaurant, well worth a visit.

if you are thinking of visiting Amsterdam, there really is no better place to stay than Houseboat Tasmania!

The Tasmania is just wonderful. It is so beautiful, comfortable and relaxing.
Sonja prepared everything for us and made our trip in Amsterdam real unique and memorable.
The neighbor, Els, is very nice and helpful.
I will definitely come back to the Tasmania when I goes to Amsterdam again in the future.

Amazing!! What more is there to say? We felt so welcomed and comfortable from the moment we arrived. The room is beautiful. Sonja has clearly spent a lot of time thinking through every detail. We loved the fresh bread and wine upon arrival. Also, yogurt and granola for breakfast while planning our day. The bed is super comfy and the shower heavenly. Even with all these amazing amenities, the best part was the use of the bikes. We were able to see so much of the city and felt completely comfortable riding around. Thank you Sonja, for sharing your beautiful home and city with us!

The houseboat is fantastic and the hosts very welcoming. It is though, on the edge of central Amsterdam. I was in the city to attend a conference, so the first day I took a bus (four stops) and then walked to the  Pathé Tuschinski theatre, but on the second day I borrowed a bike from the hosts. I have to say that riding a bike through Amsterdam is a blast (unlike in London which is like Death Race 2000). I got to the venue in 20 minutes on a bike.

I'ts hard to write any better reviews that already haven't been left. If anything whatsoever is putting you off booking here for your trip to Amsterdam then immediately write it off as it is perfect.
From the moment you walk up the yeti to the houseboat, it oozes class and quality and awaiting you is a warm reception from the host.
On arrival, Michael showed us around our home for the week and how to use everything. The fridge was fully stacked and there was even a bottle of champagne waiting for us.
It's a great location to explore the city and the use of the two bikes are fantastic, although everywhere is accessible by foot.
My girlfriend and I stayed here whilst attending ADE 2015 and were a little apprehensive about being loud or arriving back to the boat in the early hours, however after speaking to our hosts, understood that they enjoyed similar music and even attended an awakenings party during one of the nights pf the festival, which we thought was brilliant.
During our stay, I managed to lose my Iphone and without the help of our brilliant hosts I wouldn't have had any hope whatsoever of getting it back. Michael was on the phone to numerous people for over an hour and managed to get it back which i am extremely grateful for. 10/10

Tout était top !! Accueil super chaleureux tout en restant discret, super bateau, super studio, avec plein de petites attentions, et en bonus, le prêt de vélo et des conseils pour découvrir cette ville magique. À refaire sans hésiter.
I hope to return to Amsterdam one day. When I do, the first thing will be to check the availability of the Tasmania.

Houseboat was truly spectacular. We have never stayed in a houseboat before so wanted to give it a go while in Amsterdam. It was very clean and the bed was very comfortable.
Sonja was so lovely and even stocked essentials such as bottled water, milk, bread, chips, tea, coffee etc for us which made our stay even more comfortable.
Sonja also provided 2 bikes, the ride was so much fun! Bought out the inner child in me. It is about a 10 min ride or a 25 min walk to the city centre. Highly recommend the boathouse!
We had a great time in the boat! Everything was really nice prepared - thank you for the snacks and bread! It's a experience you really should do - we felt very comfortable!

Not only Sonja was an amazing host, the studio in the boat was really luxurious - we just loved it.

Unfortunately Sonja was not available to meet and greet us when we first arrived, but she was very proactive and made sure we could easily enter the studio by ourselves. Absolutely perfect (and the nice chat later also made up for this). Not only I will recommend this to everyone I know, but also most definitely see to book another stay here when I travel to Amsterdam again!

My fiancé and I had a great stay on the Tasmania.  The boat itself was a lot bigger in real life than expected, as what the room, which was very spacious. The room was clean, warm, modern and comfortable. It had everything we needed including towels, hairdryer, cutlery, microwave, kettle, coffee machine etc. Sonia had also left us some bubbles, crisp, bread, jam, butter, milk and cheese which was very kind. Michael was very helpful and gave us the bikes to use and directions to a good place to eat. The bikes are the best way to get around Amsterdam and it's a bonus that they come as part of the  booking as it saves having to hire them. Staying on the boat was a unique experience and was a great base to explore the beautiful city of Amsterdam. Would love to go back one day...

HouseBoat Amazing !!
Rien à dire (Boat très bien positionné, d'une grande gentillesse, accueil parfait avec pleins de petites attentions et même 2 vélos mis à disposition ..etc )
En résumé effet Waouh garantie

Peter and Jeroen have a lovely boat. This room that they rent was just perfect. It is under from deck, accessed through the cabin (yes, there's the wheel as well!).
There's a kitchenette, a good bathroom, with big shower and toilets.
Also, the description is spot on: the room is completely separated from the rest of the boat, where our hosts lives.
The heating system is effective; we went there in mid-November, it was cold outside, but very comfortable inside, and the bed was very good.
There's even an expresso machine for coffee !

Finally, we were both very glad to see the little personal touches they added, including a sweet custom welcome message! There's also a city map in cabin that they've scrapbook-ed to customise! It's the little things that made our stay perfect in Amsterdam.
Great, cozy space for someone looking for a unique experience! Loved staying on Peter’s boat! Highly recommend this great stay!
amazing, so many little extras meant we could sit on the deck with a hot chocolate and a sheepskin like blanket as soon as we arrived! cosy little place and completely modern
Nice and warm place, close to the city center in a quiet area.
We had a great time on the boat – a unique place to explore Amsterdam!

Wonderful place!! if you're searching for a non conventional bnb, with a bit of pirate and a lot of romance, this is for you!! the host is really kind and make you feel like you're at home.
I thought I freeze staying in a boat, but I was wrong! Peters boat is warm and comfortable, really clean and rich of lovely details!
we loved it

Peters place was fantastic! the location is great, a quiet sanctuary but still close to everything. I can't think of a better place for someone looking to take advantage of the Dutch houseboat experience. peter was very communicative and helped us with a flexible check in and suggestions for our stay. a kitchenette and the nicest bathroom I've ever seen on a boat were among the amenities. we had no issue with motion sickness (and I've developed it later in life). no complaints what so ever! it was everything I expected and more.
Nous avons passé une superbe nuit à bord de la péniche. On s'y sent bien. Elle est également très bien placée.

We were totally satisfied and enjoyed our time on the beautiful houseboat. Booking/Communicatiom was super uncomplicated and very friendly. The bed/mattrass was very comfortable. Peter provided us with complimantery coffee, tea and even wine which was really nice.

Such a fun spot. These canals are more quiet and reserved than other's throughout the city, so it is a very relaxing experience. Close to Amsterdam U and some good dining options, or an easy walk to the tram. Peter is a fun host who has it down to a science. The boat itself is really nicely done and had a bathroom nicer than ours at home! Fun experience. If you've never been on a boat, then just know that the quarters can be narrow, but we found it made the experience more fun/romantic. Thank you Peter!

PS: Amsterdam has some of the best public transit options in the world so you're pretty much connected to anywhere you could want to go. Recommend buying the 24hr or 72hr transit card depending on your length of stay.
Awesome location!! Fun and unusual place to stay- a great experience! Wish we could have stayed longer. Paid 24€ for 24hrs to park about 10 min away. Peter was a great host!!

Peter and Jeroen are lovely hosts. Super accommodating, allowing us to leave our bags at the boat and even check in early. Location is great, close enough to walk to everything but far enough away to relax and enjoy the peaceful park opposite the ship. Definitely would stay again.
If you are looking for a unique experience when in Amsterdam, this is it! The view of the canal banks is so quaint, and the boat itself was well-equipped and very comfortable.
Such an amazing experience staying on this boat! Really spacious and it had everything I needed. Will definitely be coming back in the future!
A great experience
Cute little (but not too little) space. Very nice bathroom — didn’t feel like a boat bathroom at all. We only had one night, but wish it could have been longer.
Perfect way to visit Amsterdam. The house boat is perfectly located and very traditional. Thanks to Peter for that amazing weekend.

Ein zauberhaftes Hausboot mit sehr freundlichem „Hausherr“.
Unsere Erwartungen wurden übertroffen und wir werden auf jeden Fall wieder kommen.
Es fehlte uns an nichts.
Großes Dankeschön 🍀
Gezellige comfortabele woonboot voor 2 personen. sfeervol en warm (vloerverwarming). op loopafstand van het Waterlooplein en makkelijk bereikbaar per tram. Alles is aanwezig en Peter is gastvrij.
It was a pleasure staying in this beautiful house boat! Definitely an experience to not miss :) Peter's hospitality made it more nicer to stay! I highly recommend it

Es war ein absolutes Erlebnis. Das Hausboot ist wunderschön, in einer perfekten Lage, super sauber. Im Bad gibt es sogar Bademäntel für die Gäste und an Bord kleine Aufmerksamkeiten. Wir kommen definitiv nochmal wieder! Danke für dieses Erlebnis.

This place is super cozy!  I wanted something special for our layover in Amsterdam and this was it!   Directions from the airport were accurate and easy to follow. (From airport to the front door was less than an hour).  Walking distance to restaurants and downtown shopping.  How ever our favourite was sitting on the top looking into the canal and people watching in our private and cozy space.
Peter's place was unbelievable. very close to the centre and immaculately presented, this has been my favourite airbnb to date by far.

We had an excellent experience in Jo & MP's apartment. Joanna responded promptly and in detail to my inquiries during the reservation process. Upon arrival, the apartment was exactly as depicted in the pictures and as described. We cooked breakfast and dinner for 4-5 adults, a toddler and a baby both days and found everything we needed in the kitchen. The beds were very comfortable. The location also was excellent. It's a short and easy walk to Central Station, even when carrying luggage. At one end of the street is arguably the prettiest intersection of canals in all of Amsterdam and at the other is a great shopping street with grocery stores, a wine shop and a fantastic cheese seller.

Great Apartment.
Very recommended.
Location is good. the apartment is big and 6 people can be there with a lot of space.
The kitchen has all equipment needed.
Hot water was very good in all hours.
great boat!

Peter's house boat is just the loveliest space. The place was super clean and tidy, and perfectly tiny. And peter greeted us with such warmth, welcome, and care.

Would love to come back in the future!
Perfect location on the canal, a very romantic little spot. Peter and Joreon were welcoming and kind, we can’t wait to come back!

We had a great time at this special accomodation! The location is very good and the space is cosy, clean, comfortable and has everything you need! It was great fun to sleep on this lovely boat! The hosts were also very friendly and easy to communicatie with. We would definitely recommend it!

Staying at Sonja's was a treat; the boat is beautiful and comfortable and located conveniently. It was easy to find and in a safe area. Bikes were great to use and the place was very clean. Sonja was a very helpful host and I'd definitely stay again. Do not hesitate to book!
The houseboat was really fantastic.  I loved the location.
Tres bon accueil, disponible et agréable. C'était parfait

Sonja was a great host. She provided champagne on arrival, with beers, fresh bread, cheese, juice, coffee & teas. The houseboat is beautiful, quite and very comfortable! Nice walk along the canals to the centre of town, close to bars, restaurants and supermarket. Would recommend to anyone travelling to Amsterdam! Will defiantly be returning.
Absolutely fabulous stay on Tasmania and Sonja is a gracious hostess!  Only wish that we had had more time.  Next time in summer to enjoy the deck patio!!
Accueil parfait! Chambre bien équipée, une bouteille de cava, petit déjeuner,... Bateau aussi beau en vrai qu en photo...
Great experience and great place to stay! Sonja was very welcoming and the snacks she provided made it feel like home! Would definitely go back.

Ankommen und sich wohlfühlen - einfach wunderbar! Sonja ist ein wundervolle Gastgeberin, das Boot/das Zimmer einfach nur großartig, ich komme aus dem schwärmen gar nicht mehr raus! Ich werde ganz sicher wiederkommen, aber diesmal nicht alleine!! Auf dem Boot ist es so wunderbar ruhig. Zu Fuß bis zum Bahnhof durch die Haarlemermerstraat ist kurzweilig und immer einen Gang wert.

Le séjour à bord du Tasmania a été une expérience formidable ! Nous avons été accueillis chaleureusement par Sonja, qui a su nous mettre à l'aise avec sa gentillesse, son sourire, et son français ( car nous ne parlons pas anglais !)
Le studio est magnifique, conforme aux photos, propre et très bien entretenu. Sonja avait garni la kitchenette (pop corn, gâteaux spécialité au miel d Amsterdam,yaourts, fromage, lait, jus de fruit, bières, champagne, eau gazeuse et Plate, disette de café, thé...). Inutile de porter votre gel douche et vos serviettes. Tout y est !! Un vrai bonheur.
Il est d un calme solennel ce qui fut très agréable. Un dépaysement total.
Nous n'avons pas eu le loisir de connaître un peu plus notre hôte, car nous partions du matin jusqu'au soir, mais nous avons suivi ses conseils avisés pour nos visites. Il y a dans le studio des guides de voyage sur Amsterdam et Sonja tient à jour un portfolio complet avec restaurants visites et itinéraires. De la gare, il faut compter 20 min à pied en marche rapide.
Une adresse à retenir dans son calepin.
Si nous devions donner un conseil: juste préciser aux futurs visiteurs L itinéraire avec le numéro du bus et le nom de l arrêt de bus pour se rendre au Tasmania, et peut être une notice explicative pour la TV. Mais cela reste superflus.
Merci encore pour cette fabuleuse expérience.
Je ne manquerais pas de donner cette adresse à quiconque me demandera où séjourner sur Amsterdam. Un séjour inoubliable pour nous.
Allez y les yeux fermés !!!

My boyfriend and I had a fantastic time on the Tasmania. Sonja immediately made us feel welcome on arrival with snacks and drinks in the fridge including breakfast and champagne - a really nice touch that made us feel at home right away. The boat is a lot bigger than it looks in the images and there was plenty of privacy for us in our section. The room was so well put together, clean and cosy that we couldn't wait to come back every evening to chill out there. The bikes included as part of the price were a great addition and we loved using them to cycle into the centre of town (the ride was approximately 12 minutes) I'd definitely recommend it as great way to explore Amsterdam. We stayed with Sonja in February so the weather was pretty chilly but the boat was a lovely retreat back from the cold. I'd love to come back in the summer and spend some more time exploring the nearby beaches and sitting on deck with a glass of wine! We've already recommended this listing to our friends and family!

We spent a long weekend in December at the Multatuli house.
We had a wonderful experience. The apartment is very confortable, with a lovely sitting room with great sofa and the kitchen area has a big table, perfect for having some very nice and relaxed dinners at home. The kitchen is also very well equipped.
The beds are perfect and the rooms are full of character.
The location is very central and close to the station, it is really very convenient.
Our host Joanna was lovely and very helpful by showing us things on the map.
We had a great time and I would sincerely recommend this apartment.
Wonderful place, walking distance to the Central Station. Joanna was a wonderful host and this is indeed a beautiful apartment!

Multatuli was a FABULOUS apartment in the heart of Amsterdam. We were very impressed with the accommodations, the location and the assistance we received from Jo.

The apartment is very clean, very well-furnished and comfortable. Jo compiled an assortment of recommendations for restaurants (even a "best of" the neighborhood list), activities and conveniences. There were all the modern conveniences with historic details. IF you have trouble with steep stairways, though, this is not the place for you to stay, as the apartment begins on the third level of the building and extends into the fourth and fifth levels via stairs and then a ladder to the attic.

The location was unbeatable--markets, shopping, bakeries, Christmas Markets, canals, restaurants, and museums were all within walking distance. If you fly into the Amsterdam Airport, you can take a train to the Central Station and walk (with bags--yes, everyone is pulling suitcases all over Amsterdam) to the apartment, or pay 5-10 Euro (depending upon the number of passengers) for a taxi ride. The walking is the best part--lose yourself in the beautiful architecture, views of canals, and cobblestone streets--just be aware that bicyclists are EVERYWHERE--it is the primary mode of transportation (you can rent one nearby to participate).

We would definitely go stay here again, and the hosts were friendly and available. Excellent experience.

Thank you, Jo!

We stayed at this apartment for a weekend. Joanna is the perfect host and the apartment is stunning! It has everything you need, the bedrooms are all very spacious and well presented. There's ample space for a party of 8 which was really great. Location wise, it's ideal. There are lots of lovely shops and restaurants within walking distance and there's a great place to hire bikes a few doors down from the apartment. The only issue for some people might be that there are 4 flights of stairs to the top bedroom and these are quite steep. All in all, a great place and we will definitely be recommending it to friends (and hopefully returning at some point too!)

It was a lovely flat - everything was spotless and well stocked for all our needs.  The hosts were really helpful and it was great knowing they were on hand should we have needed them. The location is so central - only a few minutes walk from the station but right in the heart of the quirky shops and round the corner from the canals - biked are a definite way to see the place and the hire shop at the end of the street was so easy!
Magnifique appartement , très agréable, que l'on avait plaisir à retrouver le soir. Tout était parfait!

In one word Amazing!
In two words REALLY amazing!

Great host, great location, great apartment, great price.
You cant go wrong booking this place!
Great apartment in a great location.

Jo was an amazing host that met us at the apt and gave us a well guided tour. The apartment was amazing and so was Jo's hospitality. She let us stay past check out since our train was later in the day. That made for even a better Dutch experience!
The neighborhood is very very nice with great shops and very friendly people. It is right next to an Ibericus deli that we had multiple snacks at over 3 days and 2 nights.

Wir - fünf verrückte Hühner - waren Ende März 2014 für 5 Tage in Amsterdam. Unsere Unterkunft war so, wie wir es uns erhofft hatten. Super Zentral, 5 Minuten vom Bahnhof entfernt. Das Quartier hat sehr viel zu bieten, ist echt hip! In die Wohnung kommt man über zwei sehr steile Treppen - typisch Holländisch. Nicht ganz einfach, aber man gewöhnt sich daran. Die Betten sind super! Wir haben alle sehr gut geschlafen. Die beiden Badezimmer sind ok. Die Küche ist grosszügig ausgestattet, was wir jeweils am Morgen ausgiebig genutzt haben. Joanna, unsere Gastgeberin, hat uns herzlich Willkommen geheissen und uns alles gezeigt. In unmittelbarere Nähe gibt es mehrere Einkaufsmöglichkeiten, so dass der Kühlschrank immer gut bestückt ist. Achtung: der Bäcker schräg gegenüber akzeptiert nur Kreditkarten.
Ich kann die historische Multatuli-Luxuswohnung wärmstens empfehlen! Bin nicht zum letzten Mal dort gewesen.

The apartment itself is nothing short of amazing. We were a family of 6 adults making a short stop in Amsterdam and everyone agreed that Jo's apartment was one of the highlights of our visit to the city! Jo is responsive, helpful and friendly. She met us at the apartment and gave us a good intro to the apartment and the neighborhood. The place is impeccably clean and spacious. Kitchen was equipped with everything we needed, in fact it was so well equipped and comfy that we decided to stay in for dinner instead of eating outside. Location is great, lots of eating places and shopping nearby, and the neighborhood is beautiful. If we were to visit Amsterdam in the future, it's a no-brainer to stay with Jo again.

We value really positively this apartment because its situation (close to the
Central Station, the center of the city, next to a commercial street and channels),
design, distribution, house equipment and a really good condition of conservation
and cleanliness. The fabulous apartment, has allowed us to enjoy during some days of an Amsterdam’s typical house with its different floors and large windows. We thank Joanna for her great disposition that she had with our family. We recommend 100% the apartment.

My family and I had a wonderful time staying at Jo and MP's gorgeous Multatuli apartment. Our hosts were friendly, easily reachable, and patient with my (inexperienced-at-international-travel) elderly family! Despite some initial trepidation, my relatives managed just fine with the typical steep Dutch staircases, and MP was friendly enough to help carry up suitcases. The beds were wonderfully comfortable, and everything was beautifully appointed and spotless. Ideal location near shops, restaurants and Centraal Station. The normal city noise was present, but did not detract from our trip or our ability to sleep. I would highly recommend this apartment to anyone visiting Amsterdam.

We had a really pleasant stay in this wonderful apartment. The house is incredible, so full of light,       exactly like the pictures! Two amazing bedrooms and bathrooms, so clean and cozy! Close to everything, I suggest to everybody to take a bike in Amsterdam, and you can find a place for renting almost next to the apartment ! I 'd definitely come back again here in my next journey in Amsterdam.

Joanna was friendly and helpful and the apartment living area is spacious and clean. However this property did not meet our expectations. There were two primary reasons: the very steep, small treaded, narrow stairs and the cleanliness of the entry area to the apartment. Words can barely express the challenge presented by the stairs in this unit. There are basically 4 sets of stairs....2 of the sets would be better classified as "ladders." The cleanliness of the entry area diminishes your opinion of the apartment every time you enter and leave. Access between the living area and the bathrooms is on a curved, narrow treaded stairway.

Based on our experience with other Airbnb rentals, this would not be a "luxury" apartment. However, for someone who really doesn't care about ease, cleanliness and safety of access, but is looking for a great location, good living space and a cooperative, friendly host....this apartment would be a good value.

L'appartement est parfait, conforme aux photos, tout est très propre, tout est pensé pour passer un super moment.
Johanna et son mari sont très accueillants, toujours joignable si on a une question, très arrangeant. Ils ont même pensé aux parapluies pour les jours de mauvais temps !!
Ce n'est pas la première fois que je loue un appartement à Amsterdam, celui-là est de loin le mieux, le mieux entretenu, très bien placé ... J'y reviendrais c'est sûre.

Si il fallait trouver quelque chose à redire, ce sont les escaliers qui sont abruptes, mais c'est le cas dans tout le centre d'Amsterdam.

Joanna and Marc-Peter were wonderful hosts for our 3 night stay! They went out of their way to help us get acclimated in Amsterdam. The apartment was very clean and as pictured. It was in a perfect location too. Our group of 5 adults found the accommodations an excellent start to our 16 day vacation in Europe!
Also, the web site is excellent! (Website hidden by Airbnb)

My partner and I recently stayed at Multatuli with both sets of our parents. The superb communication prior to our arrival and warm welcome from Joanna was the perfect way to start our trip to Amsterdam. The apartment is even more beautiful and spacious in person. It is very well appointed. Kitchen, bedrooms and bathrooms are equipped with everything a luxury apartment should have.

Access to the apartment is up some very typical Amsterdam stairs. Although steeper than American stairs, everyone found them as easy to navigate. Our hosts were more than willing to help with luggage up to the apartment and arrange for taxi transportation during our stay. Their list of recommendations for restaurants, tours and museums was awesome.

The one thing I did not expect was how incredible the location was. After our first few days of exploring the city everyone agreed that this particular neighborhood and street felt exceptionally cozy. It is very close to the train stain, grocery stores, bars and restaurants. I feel extremely lucky to have found this apartment to call home on our first trip to Amsterdam. I can't wait to return!

We loved staying at Multatuli. We were with three teenagers and four adults. There was plenty of room and having a kitchen was so helpful. The neighbourhood was very close to many local attractions and very beautiful to walk around! Joanna was so helpful and recommended some great things to see and do and places to eat! We will definitely go back if we are ever in Amsterdam again!

Très bon contact avec Joanna avant et pendant la durée du séjour. Appartement très bien situé, et propreté remarquable. Localisation parfaite, proche de la gare et excellent point de départ pour découvrir Amsterdam à pieds.
Occasion unique de vivre comme à la maison, les escaliers sont certes très raides, mais témoignent de l'habitat traditionnel amstellodamois.

The apartment was better than expected. Great location and lots of space. We stayed there with 4 adults and 2 small children. Jo had a crib set up for us and there were some toys for the kids to play with. The apartment had everything we needed for the stay including umbrellas which we really needed! She has lots of helpful information and was very easy to get in touch with. Would 100% stay there again when we go back to Amsterdam!
The experience was great! Gorgeous house with all the facilities needed. Jo was very nice and helpful. The neighbourhood is a bit out of the way, but we loved it!
Nous avons été reçues comme des pachas. Sonja est une vraie hôtelière de luxe! Mieux à faire en couple qu'entre copines mais c'était absolument parfait! Merci 1000 fois pour cet accueil.

Staying on the houseboat Tasmania was a truly wonderful experience. Sonja is a lovely host, her communication was faultless throughout and the warm welcome she gave us made us feel instantly at home.

The boat itself is a dream. Spacious and well equipped it makes for perfect base for exploring the city and beyond.

The bikes make getting around easy and mean you can see a lot more in a short space of time.

Overall I can thoroughly recommend houseboat Tasmania as a place to stay for your trip. 10/10. :)

The Tasmania house boat is a fabulous experience. It is a great place to stay. Well equipped, very comfortable and in a good location. The food and drinks provided were delicious. The fresh flowers added a touch of luxury and class. The 2 bikes were a great asset as this is the way to explore Amsterdam. Sonja and Michael's restaurant recommendations were appreciated.  We highly recommend this place.
Sonja was a lovely host and Tasmania provided a great "home" for our few days. Would recommend to anyone, had a great time.

Amazing..... Just as expected. Super comfy bed, welcomed with bubbles and breakfast ready in the fridge. Such a beautiful location and a beautiful boat. Thank you SO much for your hospitality and restaurant recommendations Sonja!

Sonja has been the perfect host and her boat the perfect place to stay.
She made sure that we would be able to get in even if she was at work and since we were arriving in the morning, she left us some food to prepare our breakfeast.:)
About the boat, well that is quite something, the studio is really nice and my girlfriend and I loved it.
The location is pretty good too since the bus stop is just a few meters away and central station less than 10 minutes by bus.

If we go back to AMS, we know where to stay! :)

Abbiamo soggiornato due notti  a marzo e possiamo dire che  l'esperienza è stata davvero piacevole! Atterrati al mattino presto ad Amsterdam, abbiamo seguito le indicazioni di Sonja e siamo arrivati facilmente alla barca (piccolo consiglio: noi siamo andati a piedi dalla stazione ferroviaria, ma il tragitto più lineare non è cortissimo e nemmeno molto affascinante, vi consigliamo il bus o un taxi!): Sonja ci stava attendendo e ci ha accolto subito a bordo con calore e simpatia!  Sulla barca potrete trovare tutto ciò che vi occorre,  per la prima colazione  (Sonja ci ha fatto trovare, oltre a te e caffè nespresso, le uova, il burro, la marmellata, del meraviglioso pane ai cereali, del buonissimo succo di frutta bio, dell'uva e... last but not least, un'apprezzatissima bottiglia di vino bianco!) ma non solo, visto che la cucina è equipaggiata anche con un piccolo frigorifero e un forno microonde... noi ne abbiamo approfittato per una romantica cena a  bordo  la prima  sera!  Se siete fortunati con il tempo, potete muovervi facilmente con le biciclette  a disposizione (gratuitamente!) degli ospiti, altrimenti  con un bella passeggiata di circa mezz'ora potrete essere in centro... se non avete voglia di camminare, però, nelle immediate vicinanze troverete   dei mezzi pubblici sia per il centro che per il quartiere  dei musei. Il fatto che la barca non sia ormeggiata  in uno dei tanti canali del centro toglie forse un po' di fascino  alla sistemazione, ma il tutto è compensato  dall'estrema tranquillità del luogo...soprattutto in estate, crediamo che  questo sia un valore aggiunto!

We booked the first time about Airbnb and because of the great experience not the last time . The ambiance on the Tasmania is unique and very special. The surrounding area has much to offer and Sonjas tips are worth gold. The expectations were more than exceeded and Sonja is a great hostess! We would go back anytime.
Heel hartelijk bedankt Sonja!

Sonja made us feel very welcome on the Tasmania. Her directions were straightforward and we found the boat easily. The boat is in a great location near to lots of funky bars, restaurants and shops and the use of the bikes was brilliant for getting around Amsterdam.

There were lots of thoughtful touches that made our stay that much easier - having a few essentials and our first morning breakfast provided was great!!

We couldn't fault our stay on this beautiful houseboat and would definitely recommend it.

Thanks Sonja!!
Amazing experience will definitely be rcomending to our friends. One of my favourite places I have ever stayed.

Nous avons passé un séjour parfait ! Tout y était, une péniche luxueuse, très moderne.
Accompagné des deux vélos qui nous ont permis de visiter Amsterdam comme nous le souhaitons ! Tout y était
Je vous le conseil !
Merci Sonja ! Merci pour tout !

We had 4 days at Sonja's boat and we simply loved it. Beautiful studio, incredibly friendly host, clear instructions and stocked small kitchen: all that made our stay easy and pleasant.:) Great experience , highly recommend for anyone ! Loved evenings with wine on the deck watching sunset as well!

Dear Sonja,

We absolutely loved your house boat and are very thankful for your generosity and hospitality. :)
You have thought of every little detail to make our stay more than comfortable. This will be an unforgettable stay and we will definitely recommend your place and try to come back soon.
Maybe see you in Dubai.

Sezen and Cihan

Sonja nous a très bien accueillis. Il y avait des friandises, le minimum pratique/utile dans le frigidaire, des tulipes fraiches. Le logement était parfaitement celui décrit dans l'annonce, le ménage parfait. Tout a été super !

Grazie Sonia per l'ospitalità! Un soggiorno splendido, per un'esperienza diversa dal solito. Abbiamo trovato ad attenderci del pane fresco, frutta, dolci, vino e molto altro ancora. Oltre a due splendide biciclette rosse che sono state il nostro "pass par tout" per vivere una città fantastica. Tutto semplicemente perfetto.

We had an amazing Kings Day experience while staying on the Tasmania. The houseboat is one-of-a-kind, it is beautiful and cozy, we'd definitely stay again. The included amenities really provided a welcoming and satisfying visit. Sonja had the fridge and pantry stocked with a great assortment of snacks and food stuffs for when we arrived. And we used the two bikes everyday, which we're crucial for exploring the city. A+

Gracias Peter por todo hemos estádo muy agusto, el primer dia nos volvimos un poco locos para abrir el grifo de la cocina pero rápido aprendimos!
Hemos pasado una estancia maravillosa, corta nos vamos con pena esperamos poder volver algun dia de nuevo.
Y cuando queráis sois bienvenidos a Bilbao!
Un abrazo,
Eskerrik Asko / Danke Bel!
Maite&Eyuan

Peter's houseboat is really cosy and hospitable. The location is perfect, and Peter himself has been really helpful, as he allowed us to let our luggage early in the morning even though our check-in time was not before the afternoon. I would strongly recommend staying at his place for anyone wishing to discover Amsterdam!

Nice place, getting the full Amsterdam-feeling.
The place was small, but very fine
Everything was great organised and clean. Peter is a very good host, a early check in is no problem. It’s silent, but also close to the botanic garden and other sightseeing.
Great option when you get tired of hotel rooms
Amazing location and space. Couldn’t of had a better trip (:
Peter and his partner were very patient and responsive. The place was great, unique, especially, they prepared some refreshers (stroopwafel, mint candy and wine) as welcome gift.

Peter was a very professional, succinct, and straightforward host, who offers a magical little gem in the heart of Amsterdam. I will never forget this lovely experience and highly recommend it to anyone hoping for a unique and authentic experience. Amazing!

Note: in instructions offered by Peter on his confirmation page for traveling from airport to the boat via public transit, the “turn right” instruction after exiting tram 14 is in reference to the point of view of the train, and not from your position when exiting the tram*

would recommend this as a stop in Amsterdam, Close to city centre
great transport links and very cosy whilst aboard
Het ligt op een prachtige plek in een hele fijne buurt. En heerlijk op het water met voorbij varende bootjes. Aanrader!
Uitstekend en warm aanbevolen ! Lokatie ,voorzieningen ,ontvangst een woord TOP!
Great place to stay while in Amsterdam for a quick trip. Everything was very clean and comfortable. I would definitely recommend staying here.

A lovely boat in an excellent location. Peter was so accommodating to our arrival times. When we arrived there was wine and snacks on arrival. The boat is lovely with underfloor heating so was lovely an warm. Great telly with lots of channels and the whole room was spotlessly clean. Will defenitley be staying again on our next visit
Fijn verblijf!
A great room, to be on a canal in Amsterdam m.  Priceless
In eigen land een vakantie gevoel
Joanna was super helpful. Would like to rent again if we return to Amsterdam.
Perfecte locatie in hartje Amsterdam, mooi, compleet en verzorgd appartement.

We loved staying in this apartment in the Jordaan district in Amsterdam! We stayed here with our three children and it was very comfortable, clean and beautiful apartment. Our experience with Joanna was great, and the listing was exactly as shown on the website. The location really is amazing, perfect for exploring Amsterdam. It is close to the Anne Frank House, and we walked easily to Dam Square & the Palace, the boat tours, and shopping on the Nine Streets. The tram is also fairly close which we used to the Rijkmuseum and Artis Zoo. It's not far from the train station, we walked our luggage from the train station with no problem (and we had a 7 year old). The information provided with the apartment is helpful, so is the map Joanna gave us when we arrived.  There are plenty of great restaurants near the apartment, a bakery, and a grocery store very close (and a fresh market nearby too on certain days).  We would definitely recommend this rental apartment for a wonderful stay in Amsterdam.

Joanna was very helpful and provided me with tips and ideas on where to go and what to do and see in Amsterdam. Her suggestion of the Eco boat tour was great and we very much enjoyed it! The apartment was exactly as presented on airbnb, and while I was prepared for steep stairs, let me just reiterate the fact - there are four flights of stairs from top to bottom and they are STEEP, with a very short tread for your foot to land on. I side stepped them. This apartment would not be at all suitable for the elderly or anyone with foot/knee/leg/hip issues. The neighborhood was fantastic, especially if you like to shop, and is relatively close to many of Amsterdam's points of interest. Overall, we enjoyed our stay at the Multatuli Apartment.
All went very well, I did not stay there personally, but my inlays did and they were all very pleased. The location in town is central ad pleasant, the house was comfortable and well provided.

We had a great stay here. Location was brilliant for us as we prefer quiet areas! There were loads of breakfast and lunch places within a short walk and it only took 15-20 minutes to walk into the centre. Accommodation was brilliant, nice and clean and cosy! If we come back we would stay here again! Thanks!

Peter welcomed us with some gifts for our stay!
It's lovely to get up and be on a boat in the canal, it's in a perfect location.
Everything was super clean and taken care of.
I highly recommend it if you want to spend a special night in Amsterdam. Thank you!!
Superbe endroit, très calme alors qu'on se situe juste à côté du centre. Je recommande à tous ceux qui veulent passer un moment en amoureux.

Great experience to have when visiting Amsterdam! Peter is a nice host, accommodating and friendly. We also loved the location - away from the touristy spots yet close enough to walk to the zoo and botanical gardens.
Agréable séjour dans votre bateau.
Un endroit magique pour un moment à 2 inoubliable ! je recommande

This place is beautiful.
The space is relatively small but every inch is well utilised. Top quality, thoughtful touches, very cozy, warm (underfloor heating I believe), a lovely area, and Peter and his partner are very friendly. I could not recommend this enough, it will exceed any expectations you have.

If you're thinking it can't be that great, it's a boat, you will be pleasantly surprised. It's a very comfortable space and high quality. Very comfortable bed, warm, good kitchen area with decent basics like tea and coffee (no cheap and nasty coffee here, it's all quality), fantastic shower. Both the wheel house seating area and the spot on the top of the boat outside were also nice touches for a morning coffee or evening drink before heading out.

We didn't see a lot of Peter or his partner, just a brief check in and check out, but they are both very smiley and friendly and made us feel very welcome, you can tell they're care that you have an enjoyable stay.

The only foreseeable downside is it's a bit of a walk from the central tourist area, maybe 15-20 mins though I believe you can jump on the bus from round the corner. There's everything you need nearby though and the walk in is pleasant so for us this wasn't an issue and we were extremely pleased we'd booked here rather than anywhere else.
