We had a wonderful few days at Peters place. The boat is beautiful and in a wonderful quiet spot opposite the botanical gardens. We spent happy hours sitting on deck watching the birds. And walked everywhere from the boat. A perfect mix of quiet but central! And a wonderfully cosy space inside with everything you need. Thanks Peter!

We absolutely loved our stay on Peter's houseboat. It's such a quirky and lovely space, and his hospitality was unmatched -- welcome wine and stroopwafel. Check-in and check-out was very easy, and we had a great night's sleep. Highly recommend!
Posto bellissimo se torno ad Amsterdam tornerò li

O barco é extremamente aconchegante! Possui todas as facilidades para quem vai se hospedar, como cozinha completa, jogo de toalhas e roupão, roupa de cama, tudo extremamente limpo e arrumado. Peter é um excelente anfitrião, deixou um quit de boas vindas para nós e nos ajudou muito com local para deixar as malas quando fizemos o checkout.
A experiência de hospedagem foi ótima!
My only problem with this place was that we couldn’t stay longer. Amazing place to crash after a busy day sightseeing. Binky the cat is very cute and nice too.
Really lovely atmosphere on the boat, in a nice peaceful location but not far from all the necessities.

The location is nice and quiet with a lovely view from the wheel house where we ate all our meals. Main sites were easily accessable by public transport or walking.  Plenty of space for a couple to stay. Peter the host was available if required and is full of local knowledge.
Very good location and very clean and comfortable.

I definitely recommend Peter's place.  The boat house apartment was quaint.  I had a lovely stay.  The street/canal neighborhood is very calm (no noise) and yet a <5 minute walk to a choice of nice restaurants, museums, and the zoo.  The location is ideal.  Peter was available to greet me on my arrival and graciously kept my suitcase while I did some visiting on the day of my departure.  The boat apartment has all the basics in the kitchen (salt, pepper, evoo, vinegar, honey, sugar, coffee, tea, etc).
Peter was warm, welcoming and immensely considerate. He was even nice enough to offer to come pick me up when he thought I got lost! (Which I totally did)
Such a fun experience! Peter thought of everything! I just wish we could have stayed longer!

Our stay at Peter's place was amazing. We loved this unique experience and would recommend staying here to anyone. We also loved how conveniently located the houseboat is to the city centre, there is so much to do nearby. The views from the boat are gorgeous, the terrace is so cute and everything was very comfortable. We loved it, thank you so much Peter!

Peter & Jeroen have an amazing boat/home! I would recommend simply for the experience alone. The boat is in a great location and I was able to do all of my sightseeing on foot without any issues. I would recommend the nearby Botanical Garden right across the canal.

The ship is great! I've always dreamed of staying on a canal boat in Amsterdam. I wish one day I will live on a similar one:)
Peter was super quick to respond and very pleasant to communicate with. Although our flight was delayed we didn't have any problems to check in a bit later. Everything inside was according to the description, the boat is clean, comfortable, everything works perfectly.
I was exceptionally thankful for an orthopedic pillow after a week of using a regular one during my vacation in Italy!
Tolle Stadt, tolles Hausboot, toller Gastgeber! Alles vom Feinsten und super zentral, man könnte theoretisch in die City laufen, wir kommen gerne wieder!

Geniale Lage (zentru (Hidden by Airbnb) ah aber troztdem sehr ruhig), sehr unkomplizierter, freundlicher Empfang, trotz Nähe auf dem Boot totale Diskretion, Ausstattung lässt nichts zu wünschen übrig. Würde absolut nichts ändern - wir kommen wieder!

Logement atypique, dans le centre, très propre et belle expérience.  RQ : uniquement accessible aux personnes valides. Ponton et bord du bateau étroit sans rambarde de sécurité. L'accès à la chambre par un échelle, donc il faut faire preuve d'une certaine mobilité.  Trouvé ça "fun" !
Peter thank you very much !!! We really liked it and we will be happy to recommend you !!!

Peaceful, tranquil and chilled. A wonderful place to stay and relax.
Clean, stylish and unique.
I thoroughly recommend staying here

Wow!
Don’t look for anything else in Amsterdam. This place was so much more than what we expected. All the little touches, cleanliness, everything was perfect!
We shall defiantly be using this place again.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay on Peter’s houseboat. It is a real jewel. The location was as described, in central Amsterdam, and we were able to easily get to the transportation and museum locations that we wanted to visit. The location is so picturesque that we also enjoyed staying “home” sitting in the wheelhouse and watching the local foot and river traffic pass by. Peter was a superb host and provided excellent amenities. Though in the hold of the boat, the accommodations were bright and immaculately clean. We loved the heated floor!
Alles war super & unkompliziert. Sauber, einfache Kommunikation und total hilfsbereit. Zu empfehlen!

Een hele leuke accommodatie.
Zeer netjes en schoon, alles is aanwezig een aanrader

Peters boat is a gem in a quiet but central street. Peter himself is just sweet and flexible. I was with my son (8 years) and we loved the cosy space and the rooftop terrace with nice view on the canal.
You can Eat special italian pizza around the corner at Pizza Bakkers Kerkstraat. Have brunch the next day at the Hoftuin, around the other corner.
And Peter had a great suggestion: flying above Holland with “this is Holland” in Amsterdam Noord. Take the metro on Weesperplein, 3 stops to Amsterdam Central Station. Cross the Street at the back of central station and take the (free) ferry and walk a few minutes to the left. Great experience all in all! Thanks Peter & the KeizerInn!
Perfect location in Amsterdam, and very lovely to wake up and sit on your own deck, looking over the water and park and keizersgracht. Truly recommend!

Our stay at Peter’s was wonderful. He was kind and gracious, had treats waiting for us, not to mention fabulous bathrobes! He was quick to help us drop off our luggage so we could begin wandering the city freely and had lovely tips. The area is fantastic, nothing like sitting atop a houseboat watching the sun shine and the ducks mill about the canal. Wonderful trip, highly recommended! Thank you Peter!

Be sure to stay with Peter! The park across the street has many birds to watch, the cat is friendly, and Peter is a responsive, welcoming host. We will definitely stay in this cozy houseboat again if in Amsterdam. A great spot.

Nuit parfaite ! Excellent accueil avec petites attentions dans le panier. Et quelques mots en francais pour une parfaite compréhension.
Belle péniche, confortable et propre.
On n’oubliera pas cette nuit atypique dans cette belle péniche
Had a great stay on the boat. Best way to stay in the city. Great location with easy walking and tram service into central Amsterdam.
Wonderful location, fantastic host and everything you could want for your stay. I highly recommend Peter’s boat, so snug and cosy and very clean - we had a brilliant holiday.
Great location, easily walkable to and from from almost anywhere in the city!

Very quiet area of ​​Amsterdam, walking distance of all the places to visit and good price value! If we come back to Amsterdam we will definitely book this location again! I recommend it to everyone who want to have a great experience! Thanks to Peter!

This place was awesome! Peter was fantastic! Gave us tons of directions and advice on what to do, he was quick to respond to any questions we had. The place itself is located in a good area, we walked around with no problem at all. The place was very clean, very comfortable and I’d definitely stay here again next time I visit!

Sonja and Michael were the best hosts we've ever had on air bnb. The boat is so cleverly stocked, planned and designed that it feels like you're staying in a far bigger space than it is. Bed and pillows were wonderfully comfortable and lying on the bough of the boat, in the sunshine, joining for a short while the fantastic canal community was just wonderful. We made great use of the bikes and just had the most amazing weekend. Thank you!!!

All the positive reviews posted about time spent at the Tasmania Boat house is accurate. Sonja thought of every detail to make our stay a pleasurable one. Our time spent on the boat house will not be forgotten and we can thoroughly recommend staying there.

INCREDIBLE

can't express enough gratitude for such a wonderful trip . Lovely 20 min walk along the river very easy to find . Greeted with a bottle of bubbly snacks and a breakfast For the next day . Towels and toiletries and hairdryer . Literaly everything we needed . Gorgeous weather so lots Of time Sunning up on deck . Close to everything so lots of wallinh and exploring . Can't wait to go again and stay X
Thank you sonja and Michael
What an amazing experience! Not only is the location unique, the hospitality and attention to detail really made this stay exceptional. Possibly one of the top airbnb experiences available.
The host canceled this reservation 17 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Le Tasmania est un très beau bateau, dans un si bon état que l'on penserait qu'il est neuf.
Notre cabine très confortable, est aussi belle que pratique.
Boire un verre de vin ou une bière sur le pont confortablement affalé sur des coussins en profitant du coucher de soleil est un véritable plaisir.
Sonja est une hôte formidable, elle avait tout préparé pour que notre séjour se passe au mieux : café, jus d'orange, gauffres hollandaises, céréales.... et même un bouquet de fleurs et une bouteille de cava au frais.
Pour se déplacer on avait 2 vélos à disposition.
On ne peut rien demander de mieux c'était parfait.

Si je reviens à Amsterdam ce sera au Tasmania.

Thank U Sonja

Very easy going and helpful hosts who gave us good restaurant and shopping recommendations and were always very amenable. The flat was as described - in a trendy and nice area, centrally located, spacious and clean. Not a big walk up but with very steep stairs so perhaps not so good for older people. We had a great time with our teenagers who could easily wander around the neighbourhood without any issues - thank you.

What a wonderful stay and Jo and MP were completely welcoming. The location was easy to find, within a stones throw to multiple grocery stores,and an easy walk to great shops and restaurants.

The home was well equipped for our group of 6 with the kids enjoying their freedom from parents in the top story. While we hit the hottest part of the summer, the fans they left helped cool things down at night. We will definitely stay here again next time around.

Joanna was fantastic, informative , accommodating and attentive. The location of this apartment is amazing pretty much a couple of steps from everything including train station , canals and dam square. The living space is quite large and spacious excellent for big families. Bedrooms are a great size as well. Modern, clean and stocked. Stairs were steep when we were bringing luggage up but Joanna was kind enough to put up baby gates giving us a peace of mind with our children ranging from 1 to 8.  My brothers in laws came to meet us one day and told us the location was very desirable as well. Hands down this place was a 10/10. I will definitely recommend to others.

Die Wohnung liegt perfekt im Zentrum von Amsterdam und in Laufweite vom Hauptbahnhof. Sie ist gut ausgestattet und geschmackvoll eingerichtet. Aufgrund der sehr steilen Treppenaufstiege aber nur eingeschränkt für ältere Herschaften oder Leute mit Gelenkproblemen geeignet. In der näheren Umgebung findet man alles was man für einen Kurztrip nach Amsterdam benötigt: Supermarkt, Kneipen, kleine Läden zum Shoppen und um die Ecke einen Fahrradverleih. Trotzdem ist es Abends ruhig und man gut schlafen.

We had a great experience at this apartment in Amsterdam.  Joanna was helpful and available, very pleasant and reliable.  She spent time with us after we arrived, and shared her favorite places to eat and visit.    She helped us make the best of our days there. One of her recommendations - Lof, down the street - was really fantastic.  The apartment was clean, spacious and had everything we needed, including wonderful beds and spacious bedrooms.  Something to consider is the fact that (like many homes in Amsterdam) there are stairs to climb at every level.  The neighborhood was great!  Shopping, food, markets, short walk from Central Station and picturesque as well.  It is a busy neighborhood, but was not noisy.  I highly recommend this apartment.  Should we return to Amsterdam, we would choose to say there again.

Although I made the reservation for my friends , I have received very good feedback from them. The house is located the pure center, a historical building with very good reformed inside of the house...Spacious and very clean. The two kids of my friend like it very much.
Highly recomended anyone who wants a good experience in the downtown of Amsterdam

The host was very welcoming and attended all our requests (luggage storage due to early arrival and late checkout), the house itself is located in a central location, 10 minutes walk from all the tourist attractions, and very quiet. The house included everything we could ask for. Had a great experience and would come back to this location again if we would arrive to Asmterdam again

Great location in a really nice area of Amsterdam. We stayed as a group and found the house very comfortable and well equipped. All communication was very friendly and responsive. Would definitely stay again !

This apartment was exactly what was shown in the pictures.  It was in a great neighborhood and very spacious for a group of 7 people.  Very clean too! The only negative was the super steep staircases and carrying the luggage up and down -- but we knew that ahead of time.  Joanna was a fantastic host and very accommodating (especially since we had a late arrival).  She even gave us tips and recommendations when we arrived and was very friendly.  Definitely recommend staying here if you are visiting Amsterdam!

We had a super experience overall.

Joanna and MP were out of town when we arrived, but made arrangements for a very kind neighbor to let us in.

The flat was terrific: very nicely furnished with a well-equipped kitchen. The neighborhood was excellent, with bike rental just a few doors down, and markets, shops, and restaurants nearby (recommendations for these and more provided by our hosts). The stairs are steep, as described, but were no problem for us, including my fit 78-yr-old father.

Meeting Joanna and MP upon their return, my sister mentioned that she is a primary school teacher. Our hosts offered to let us to join them in accompanying their young ones to school the next day, and ended up providing a tour of the school and the neighborhood. It was a very kind gesture and a nice chance to discuss similarities and differences between our cultures. They also arranged for early morning taxi pickups, which helped reduce any stress we might have had in doing so ourselves.

My family and I are looking forward to our next visit to Amsterdam and stay at the flat!
Absolutely unique Amsterdam experience! My parents had a great time and enjoyed your hospitality, the delicious brakfast and simply the life on the boat.

We had a great time. The boat is clean and very comfy and beautiful. A special thanks to your parents who were very kind and always welcoming.

Thank you very much Sonja, if you'll ever visit Parma we're looking forward to host you!

Francesco and Beatrice
Eine super Unterkunft,die genau so schön und gemütlich ist, wie man es der Beschreibung und den Bildern entnehmen kann! Hat uns trotz des durchwachsenen Wetters sehr gut gefallen!

Ein Traumboot. Der erste Eindruck war wirklich umwerfend. Eine wundervolle Ästhetik, Aussen wie Innen. Noch viel schöner als auf den Fotos. Und Michael war sehr sympathisch und hat Sekt, frisch gepressten Orangensaft, Brot, Butter, Marmelade, Eier, Käse u.a. bereitet. Die Bootsnachbarn sind übrigens auch sehr nett.
Toll, wie die Kinder von den Beibooten aus baden, herrliche Stimmung.
Die Tasmania ist ideal gelegen, um mit den Rädern, die übrigens dankenswerterweise frei dazu gehören, die Stadt zu erkunden. Der Jordaan (der tolle Noordermarkt) ist 8 Minuten per Rad entfernt, die "Negen Straatjes" 10, die City 12 Minuten, eigentlich ist alles perfekt zu erreichen. Das Auto kann umsonst auf dem anderen HET IJ- Ufer parken, eine free Ferry ist direkt in der Nähe. Der Bahnhof war aber aber sehr nah gelegen. Alles perfekt, wirklich alles.
Und die Ruhe auf dem Boot in der Nacht, Erholung pur. Ich komme nächstes Jahr wieder, so viel ist gewiss.
Danke Dir, liebe Sonja, für die unkomplizierte und überaus freundliche Kommunikation.
Ihr habt Euch wirklich ein Paradies in einer Traumstadt geschaffen.
Schön, dass Ihr es mit anderen teilt. Danke.

Perfect retreat for our last days of vacation.  Michael and Sonja were wonderful hosts!  We were greeted by Michael and a spread of grapes, fresh bread with jam and butter and delicious sweets.  Everything we could possibly need was provided, including fragrant shampoo and soap and a much needed comfortable bed.  Internet was excellent, loved the location and there were many maps and pamphlets for local tours.  Plus Sonja and Michael provided a wonderful list of restaurants and local information for us.  Thank you so much for everything!  We would definitely stay again if we return to Amsterdam.

Stop looking and stay here. You're going to Amsterdam, so make like the Dutch and sleep on a boat. A bedroom tucked into the bow of a boat sounds cramped and uncomfortable—but Sonja's guest room on the Tasmania was entirely the opposite. With skylights and portholes and plenty of room for your bags, the room was great.

Sonja was also a great host. We booked three nights, but a conflict came up for the first. Sonja was having a summer solstice party and was worried we wouldn't be able to sleep for the noise. She ended up offering to put us up in a hotel for that night and extended an invitation to the party. That's way more than we had any right to expect.
wij hebben er van genoten !  heel mooie locatie : rustig en dicht bij het centrum .  Wij zijn fan .

Everything about this was perfect. Location is on a quiet canal but easy walking to anything you would want to see. Peter, the host, was very quick to respond and a pleasure to meet. Everything was exactly as described and shown in the pictures. You do have to climb a steep ladder down into and up out of the space from the wheelhouse. Those with mobility issues may find that too challenging. Would highly recommend and would stay again.

Ich war mit meiner Frau, auf dem Hausboot bei Peter. Peter ist ein  echt toller Gastgeber und wer nach einem anstrengenden Tag in Amsterdam die Ruhe zum Schlafen sucht der ist genau da richtig! Zur Metro sind es nur wenige Gehminuten und sehr Zentral .Wir haben uns einfach sehr wohl gefühlt. DANKE Peter

Joanna & MP were perfect hosts, very helpful with local suggestions and assistance with transport
The apartment is very modern and comfortable and centrally located
Would definitely return
Thanks guys!
Venlig, imødekommende og hjælpsom også da vi ankom et par timer før normal check in.

We all had a great time in Amsterdam.  Three couples stayed for 4 nights in late September.  The house was wonderful.  The pictures do not do the place justice.  We all appreciated the amenities and how central the house was to all of Amsterdam.  Right next to a street full of bars, restaurants, shops, etc.  Jo was a great hostess - very responsive to our questions and was available for us during our stay.  The steps/stairs up to and in the apartment are VERY steep, so keep that in mind if you have mobility issues.  But we all thought they were charming and cool! I will definitely keep this place in mind should I return to Amsterdam.

Jo was excellent in her role at welcoming us, suggesting places to visit and generally insight to the area. Jordaan is a great place to be located because of the choice of places, on your doorstep, for eating, drinking and shopping; and well located to the centre of the city. The house suited 4 of us well and is amply equipped and homely with very comfortable beds. The steepness of the stairs was a shock but we realised this is generally a feature in many Amsterdam homes.

Tres bel appartement, assez grand pour accommoder  notre group de 8 femmes. Nous avons profité du salon et de la cuisine, très bien équipée pour faire des repas autour d'une grande table très conviviale. L'appartement est idéalement situé: à    moins de 10 minutes a pied de la Gare Central et proche du Noordermarkt en plein Jordaan, le quartier le plus animé et le plus bobo d'Amsterdam. A recommander sans aucune hésitation !(sauf pour ceux qui ont des problèmes à monter les escaliers extrêmement raides)

Joanna and Marc were wonderful hosts, making us feel like personal guests in their home from the minute they helped us in with our luggage. The apartment was light, beautiful, comfortable and well supplied.  The location was perfect for access to the train station and beautiful canals, great restaurants, etc.  My wife and I had our mothers with us and Joanna and Marc catered wonderfully to them as well. We will recommend them and we will come back.

This apartment was perfect for our group of five women enjoying a long weekend away together. It is in a lovely old house with traditional narrow and winding stairways, and it's is very well kept, with a bright and airy feel on all three floors. The kitchen was stocked with everything we needed, and Joanna was only ever a phone call (and floor) away if we needed any advice. The neighborhood of Harlemerstraat has fabulous shops, cafes and restaurants, and we were able to walk to many areas of town that interested us. Overall, we were very pleased, and I can well imagine coming back again.

Nuestra estadía fue tal como la soñamos. La casa es un encanto: diseño, estética, funcionalidad, confort, comodidad y luz. Todo perfecto. La ubicación inmejorable y el trato de Joanna sencillamente excelente.
Super recomendamos el lugar! Volveremos!!!
Gracias Joanna!!!

Certainly we've been super Happy as the house(flat WOULD not be enough) is exactly/better THAN the photos...and sometime WE All know it's not always true as PEOPLE try to MAKE them better.
The location is top, people THEY KNOW amsterdam do not need any further tips. But for the ones new in town, let me say they'd be quite lucky to spend few times over here.
In fact if i HAVE to address a negative issue it'd be just ABOUT the short TIME we spent. I THINK few days more would have been certainly appreciated

Accueil très chaleureux, plein de prévenance de notre hôte qui nous a fourni tous les renseignements nécessaires pour profiter au maximum du séjour, merci Joanna :-)
Appartement frais, lumineux, calme, spacieux, très bien meublé avec une jolie déco, propre... tout comme on aime...
Quartier charmant, bien situé, proche de la gare.
On a adoré... on y retournera.

Simply a lovely place to stay - Amsterdam is a beautiful city and this place just makes it that little bit more special. It is certainly not the cheapest but I always work on you get what you pay for! The decor as seen in the pictures and size of the rooms especially the kitchen and sitting rooms make for very easy and pleasant social areas especially if you are staying with friends or family! Like in most upstairs Amsterdam flats the stairs are steep so be warned if you are less nimble on your feet but I certainly wouldn't be put off by this just something to be aware of! The thing for us that made this one of our most enjoyable airbnb experience was the host! Jo is lovely beyond words to the extent that she leant my wife her maternity dress to go to a wedding as we were short on time... no cost, no questions, just the desire to help and be friendly... I'd argue you don't get this in even the best hotels! Would we go back? Most definitely! Thanks guys.xx
Prettig weekend in ruim appartement gunstig gelegen tov centrum.
Very cool place to stay and very close to some cool attractions such as the hermitage, zoo and botanical gardens.
This was a beautiful place. Can’t wait to come back again. Thank you for everything.

My husband I had a unique and wonderful experience staying on Peter’s houseboat.  The setting was beautiful on the canal and quiet.  Peter told us he renovated the houseboat and he took great care with providing ample space and modern design to make the space inviting and comfortable.  We only stayed two nights but wish we had stayed longer.  Peter was an excellent host and we would highly recommend a stay here for others.

An absolute gem of a place to stay. The boat itself is even more charming than the photo, the amenities are all there. From a well equipped kitchen to a veranda to sit outside and enjoy the surroundings.

Across the canal is a beautiful park with a willow tree, which adds a serene element.

Yes, the space inside the bow of the boat is tight, but it’s arranged very efficiently and is very clean and modern.

Peter was very thoughtful and helpful orienting is to some of the features of the place.

I’d stay at the KeizerInn again in a heartbeat.

Peter’s house boat made our stay in Amsterdam so special! Who can say that they slept on the canals of Amsterdam? The house boat is absolutely delightful and perfect amount of room for a couple. It is spotlessly clean and very homey and comfortable. We will definitely be back and recommend it to our friends traveling to Amsterdam!

Kleine aber gut ausgestattete Unterkunft auf einem schönen Schiff.
Tolle Lage in einer ruhigeren Gracht.
Super gelegen, man kann Amsterdam von dort aus hervorragend zu Fuß, mit der Tram oder Metro erkunden. Sehr sympathische und nette Gastgeber.
Die Unterkunft ist auf jeden Fall zu empfehlen.
Cosy and quiet location. Easy reach for all sight seeing. Great host. Would definitely recommend.

Accueil très sympathique avec quelques spécialités mises à disposition.

Logement atypique dans une cabine de péniche. Un petit espace cosy au calme est très bien équipé. Idéal pour passer quelques jour de détente à deux . Centre ville à une vingtaine de minutes à pied .
It’s a wonderful location, and the houseboat is so neat! Wish we had more time. The only thing is that there isn’t any dish washing soap to wash the dishes.

If you are looking for a magical place to stay, this is it.  We had a wonderful time staying on the ship.  Peter and his partner were so kind and helpful.  It was a great location, close to many things and also the tram.  We just so much enjoyed our stay.
Absolutely perfect location and experience to be in the canal in Amsterdam- well worth it 👍🏼
Very cosy and comfortable boat with an accommodating host. A lovely change from staying in a hotel room. Great location - walking distance to the centre/ everything you may need!

Wir hatten eine schöne Nacht und konnten bei einer top Lage super entspannen und den Abend genießen. Zentrum war in ein paar Minuten zu Fuß erreichbar und Peter hat uns gute Tipps für Amsterdam und die Heimreise gegeben. Sehr zu empfehlen :)
Excellent location, very comfortable space and really fun to stay the night on a boat.
Auch ein weiteres Mal war diese Unterkunft wieder ein schönes Erlebnis mitten im Zentrum dieser traumhaften Stadt! Das Schiff eignet sich auch zum Seele baumeln lassen ;-) Gerne wieder!
Excellent location near to restaurants, tram, major sightseeing points

Beautiful apartment in a very central fashionable location. Lots of space - we were 6 adults. It is very nicely decorated and well equipped. Although close to a busy shopping area with lots of boutique shops, it was remarkably quiet at night and we all slept very soundly. I would highly recommend it. Joanna was a perfect hostess, providing lots of information beforehand and was very helpful in organising a birthday cake in advance for my husband.

Beste Joanna en MP, nogmaals bedankt voor jullie gastvrijheid en het delen van jullie adresjes in Amsterdam. Jullie appartement is super gelegen in het authentieke en gezellige deel van de stad. Wij hebben ervan genoten!
It was a lovely stay. I booked the flat for my family when we were staying in Amsterdam for a weekend. They really loved it and told me it was very cosy.
Had an amazing time! Cute set up, everything you would need. Amazing location and great hosts! Can’t wait to tell my parents about it when they come to visit Amsterdam!
Super week-end passé sur la péniche de Peter où on y retrouve tout le confort souhaité. L'emplacement est idéal c'est calme et verdoyant ! Merci pour leur accueil et petite attention à l'arrivée

Great space in a beautiful, peaceful setting. We were Central to the trams and local things to do. I wish we could have stayed longer. It was even beautiful sitting in the cabin just watching the rain fall.
Really lovely home, with everything you need and lots of thoughtful touches. We would definitely stay again if we are in Amsterdam.

Peter's boat house was gorgeous! We had an amazing stay. It is located in a quiet and convenient neighborhood. We loved sitting on the deck at night and enjoying a cup of hot chocolate.  Peter was very kind and thoughtful. We would absolutely stay here again!

Tolle Lage, viele kleine Details, nette Atmosphäre (Begrüßungskörbchen) , super sauber.
Raum mit Küche und Bett kleiner als erwartet.
Die Freundlichkeit der beiden war besonders positiv. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Es war alles da, was man für einen Kurzurlaub braucht.
Herzlichen Dank!
Ev'rything was great!

Es war ein toller Aufenthalt, nicht zuletzt aufgrund des Quartiers. Das Appartement am Hausboot ist sehr gut durchdacht und sehr sehr sauber. Wir haben die Küche zwar kaum verwendet, aber es ist alles da was man braucht. Sogar Tee, Kaffee, Zucker und einige Getränke stehen kostenlos zur Verfügung. Als ganz toll haben wir auch das Welcome-Körbchen mit Prospekten, Naschzeug und kleinen Weinfläschchen empfunden. Einen grossen Dank an die Gastgeber!
Peter is the best!  He helped us when we needed him!  The house boat is wonderful and Amsterdam is so fun.   Have to see the spot to believe it!

Small and cozy and full of charm!!  The neighborhood is beautiful and quiet.  We loved having a terrace and a wheel house available so we could sit and enjoy the small boats cruising the canal or watch the people in the park directly across the canal from us.  We really couldn’t have asked for nicer and accommodating hosts.  Tram stop is about 3 blocks away as are shops and restaurants.
Peter and his husband were very nice and friendly. I can highly recommend their cutie boot, if you need a place to stay in Amsterdam!
Es war ein kurzer, aber sehr schöner Aufenthalt mit unserem Kind. Den Abend haben wir auf der Bootsterasse ausklingen lassen und die Umgebung war schön ruhig. Unser kleiner fand das Boot klasse ;)
Good location, accommodating host

We loved our time on Peter’s boat and were the envy of passers-by whilst we sipping beer on the deck. The accommodation is compact but is comfortable and has everything you could possibly need and more.
Peter was a wonderful host and went the extra mile in making a birthday celebration even more special.
We would definitely return to stay with Peter if we return to Amsterdam.

Peter’s place is EVERYTHING!! He was such a gracious and helpful host and his place is not only in the perfect location, but is charming and relaxing as well! When we come back to Amsterdam we will stay here again!

There is no better way to experience Amsterdam then staying on Peter's boat, set on a quiet canal with beautiful surroundings. The upper deck is perfect for eating breakfast when the sun comes up and for drinking martinis when the sun goes down. We absolutely enjoyed all of what Peter and his boat has to offer!
Marilyn and Rick

We loved our stay at Peter’s place. We had been travelling for a few weeks with a pretty busy itinerary before stopping in Amsterdam and Peters houseboat was the perfect way to spend some much needed R&R. The area was fantastic, it was a quiet but central to everything you needed. We walked everywhere with no issues but there is also public transport near by. Everything on the boat was cosy, clean and there were lots of thoughtful touches to make our stay extra comfortable. Wifi was great and really fast. We enjoyed Our stay here so much that we will stay here again the next time we are in Amsterdam. Wether you are looking for a relaxed stay or a central base to adventure out and explore Amsterdam Peter’s place is perfect and you won’t regret staying here. Thank you so much for having us!

We arrived in Amsterdam on July 22 after travelling by Riverboat from Basel. Because we were disembarking our ship midmorning, Peter graciously said we could come earlier to the bnb than advertised.
The interior of the bnb was as advertised...very tidy, and several treats awaited us there. Wine and beers. Peter gave us a comprehensive tour and told us if we had any issues, to rap on their hatch.
de keiserInn is very well located within walking distances to many of the museums or other attractions. The Hortus Botanicus was just across the canal from the bnb.
Peter offered advice re: the culture of tipping in restaurants, taxis, etc. in Amsterdam.
We enjoyed our evenings either sitting on the deck in front of the wheelhouse, or sitting in the wheelhouse. We loved watching all the boats motoring quietly along the canal all evening. By 2130, all canal activities had seized, and it was exceptionally quiet during the night.
One day, we mentioned to Peter that we had not been able to make the coffee maker work. He came and checked it out with no success, and was back within the hour with a new coffeemaker, and made us a cup of coffee straightaway.
We really enjoyed our stay!
Very quiet and nice place to stay, pleasant experience, Peter and his partner are very friendly!
Peter’s place is a tranquil haven in a lovely part of Amsterdam. It’s cosy, the perfect base from which to explore the City .

Thank you very much for the pleasent stay on your Boat.
The room on the boat was just lovely and cosy with everything you need. We got some food and drink stored when we arrived, so nice!
The location itself is just perfect. You can ether walk or take the bikes from the boat.

We spent two nights at Sonjas marvelous Houseboat. Sonja provided detailed how-to-get-there information upfront and it is only three bus stations drive from the central station. Best on arrival was that we have been welcomed with a full fridge for a first brunch including white wine.
The boat is located in a former industrial neighborhood which has great charm, is more silent and also not so "shaky" than in the typical Grachten boats. You can use two bikes to explore the city for free which is marvelous and we really appreciated that service.
The studio apartment is small due to the limited size on the boat but the design is really appealing. The interior of the complete boat is very design driven.
Best part is to have a swim in the morning, which is very cold but so refreshing.
I recommend to plan your Amsterdam stay on Sonjas boat and I will hopefully have the pleasure to spend some more nights on the Tasmania.

These 2 nights in Amsterdam were perfect ! The boat is just awesome and we just needed some bravery to go for a dip next to the pier ! Sonja was so nice and the two bikes were so useful to discover the city center with my friend. I can only recomend this room !

We loved our stay. The host was very welcoming and helpful, everything was as expected and we didn't need for anything. We would definitely stay there again, the property and location for us was perfect.
Très bon accueil. Superbe appartement . Je recommande vivement ce lieu
A fantastic, spacious, clean, and very relaxing apartment in a brilliant part of the city. We're already planning our next visit. I would highly recommend it.
Great stay in Amsterdam and will surely come back in the future. The apartment is as described, the location is fantastic and it was very easy to sort out all the details with Joanna.

We stayed at Joanna and MP's for a long weekend to celebrate my birthday and it was a brilliant weekend. I have been to Amsterdam many times and so can say quite honestly this is a fabulous, clean, well decorated and spacious apartment with everything you should possibly need in a great area for shopping, eating and drinking. The flat is also extremely close to the train station and so very easy to get to by foot.
Joanna was very welcoming and kindly allowed us a flexible check in and we were allowed to leave our bags when we checked out to collect later on in the day. Joanna is also full of ideas of places to go should you need any direction - especially places to eat!
Amsterdam is a wonderful city and staying here only enhances a wonderful experience, I would definitely recommend staying here - just be warned yes the stairs are steep but are definitely manageable just be careful with your luggage and you shouldn't have any problems at all.
Thanks Joanna we will definitely be back - the only problem will be finding a time they aren't booked up!
All good! Great location and accommodation. Host was lovely and very helpful.  Would certainly use again and recommend this venue.

We had an exceptional stay with Joanna and MP. Joanna's consistant effort prior to and during our stay was faultless. The home was everything it claimed to be and more. The level of cleanliness was a delight. Joanna had made sure the bed configuration was spot on for a family of 8. She helped us anyway she could. And was highly accessible throughout our stay had we needed support. The location was absolutely perfect for us to walk everywhere in Central Amsterdam. We walked across town to the Van Gogh and Rijk museum easily. The feel of the local neighbourhood was very cool inner city but safe. We could not recommend staying here highly enough. Excellent value for money. Money well spent.

We had a wonderful stay at Joanna and MP's apartment. It's in a terrific location, within walking distance of restaurants, groceries and shops, and the home was equipped with everything we needed. The hosts were also very helpful with recommendations for restaurants and activities prior to our arrival. We hope to return!

Nous avons reçu un mail de Sonja quelques jours avant notre arrivée qui comprenait 3 options de parking et les indications pour arriver au bateau par la suite, ne connaissant pas du tout la ville on a tout de suite été rassuré ! Ses indications étaient parfaites pour se rendre jusqu'au bateau, aucun problème !
Une fois arrivé, Sonja nous attendait sur le bateau. Sachant que nous parlions anglais c'est dans cette langue qu'elle nous a fait visiter le bateau mais elle parle français malgré tout. Nous avons donc eu droit à une visite de notre logement et de ses aménagements (ustensiles de cuisines, vélo, radio,...) ainsi qu'une explication rapide des quartiers à visiter et de comment nous y rendre.
Malheureusement nous n'avons pas recroiser Sonja lors de notre séjour mais elle avait tout prévu : un petit déjeuner dans le frigo pour les deux jours sur place et un classeur rempli d'explications et de conseils sur la ville.
Notre logement était parfait pour deux ! Super cosy, une salle de bain agréable, un lit super confortable, ... Le confort d'une maison !
Nous avons adoré notre séjour et espérons y retourner dans le futur !
een echte aanrader, heerlijke privacy, fijne verwelkoming, goede fietsen en Amsterdam op een steenworp natuurlijk !!

The neighborhood is pleasant and quiet with an interesting mix of other houseboats and apartment buildings.  Sonja provided a large loaf of wonderful fresh bread to welcome us and the coffee machine help launch our days.  The studio is very comfortable.  Michael helped move all our luggage and to sort out cell phone calls on our last morning--much appreciated.  This was a very pleasant experience.
Sonja was very welcoming and provided lots of useful information and tips in advance of my arrival.  Good location and views

Durch den freundlichen Empfang durch die Gastgeber, die liebevolle Bewirtung (frisches Brot, Milch, Käse, wunderschöne Blumen), die gute Betreuung bei den Fragen rund um Amsterdam und die möglichen Unternehmungen.
Die Unterkunft war sogar noch einen Tick schöner und spektakulärer, als aus den Fotos ersichtlich und die Lage und Nachbarschaft war ruhig und ausgesprochen freundlich.
Very quiet and lovely place right in the Centre of the City! Everything is very close! We Had a pleasant stay on the boat!
Great!!
Staying on a houseboat is the only way to go!  Such a fun, unique experience located in a lovely neighborhood.

Well home safely after our travels. We had a fantastic time at the boat, Peter was a fantastic host, the boat is actually more roomy than we first imagined, the area felt very safe and quiet at night, Dawn liked meeting the ships cat, we would definitely like to return one day. Thank you again 🏆😎

This is a really peaceful and relaxed space to stay in. Easy walking distance to the heart of the city and good tram access if walking isn't your thing! Staying on a ship with a private entrance, a wheelhouse, a terrace and occasional visits from ducks, moorhens, herons and the ship's cat is about as relaxing as you could possibly get. I loved staying here.
We truly enjoyed our stay at the houseboat and recommend it to anyone who visit Amsterdam. It was clean, great location and sweet small touches which made you feel extra welcome.

We highly recommend staying here. The boat is beautiful and well maintained. Location is perfect as it is just a short cycle from most tourist locations. There were lots of lovely touches on the boat with great amenities. On top of this Peter was very welcoming and friendly.

Peter ist sehr bemüht allen Wünschen nachzukommen. Es wurden im Vorfeld Bahntickets für uns besorgt, außerdem haben wir reichlich Tipps bzgl. Frühstück und der Umgebung erhalten. Die Unterkunft war der Wahnsinn und absolut perfekt für einen Amsterdamtrip.

Vielen Dank Peter für die Gastfreundschaft und die Überlassung deiner tollen Unterkunft
Leuk onderkomen in een woonboot. Perfecte uitvalsbasis om Amsterdam te gaan verkennen!

Amazing place and a unforgettable experience .
Cute and cozy .
Comfortable bed
Great coffee
Amazing view
What else would one want

Extremely small but efficiently laid out space. Extremely clean with great towels and tolietries included. Bed was quite comfortable. Wonderful coffee service and the wheelhouse was the perfect spot to enjoy it. Would love to come back.
Perfect location to explore Amsterdam from!

Если этот хаусбот свободен на ваши даты - бронируйте как можно быстрее!
Отличный и дружелюбный хозяин, невероятно удачное расположение - перед вами будет красивый парк, а не окна соседних домов или лодок.
Как минимум за последние 5 лет - это был мой лучший сон - очень тихо, супер удобная кровать, свежий воздух.
На лодке есть все необходимое и даже больше - кофемашина, чай, кофе, холодильник, духовка, вся необходимая посуда, чистейшая питьевая вода, которую можно пить даже из-под душа)

Отличный выбор жилья для Амстердама - все в 5 минутах ходьбы!
Спасибо!

First time staying on a boat. It was amazing occasion. Very clean, comfy bed, tasty coffee and such a quiet and peaceful surroundings. I enjoyed it fully and for sure I will be back. Peter thought about everything, from the lovely, tiny rose, red wine to the Umbrella, which we use it twice. Amazing host.
Super leuke locatie! De goed uitziende woonboot is verzorgd en gezellig ingericht.  Wij zijn goed ontvangen en hebben lekker geslapen.
The private room/kitchen/bathroom/terrasse is simply amazing. Nothing to say, appart thank you again for this lovely welcome and night at your place Peter ! We loved the experience.

Klein, aber fein. Der Platz in der Unterkunft ist optimal genutzt und perfekt für einen Kurztrip nach Amsterdam. Die Lage des Hausboots ist fantastisch, nicht weit zum Zentrum und doch super ruhig. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und kommen bestimmt wieder.

Cosy, bijou, genuine boat cabin, in a perfect location, great neighbours (Moor Hens, Ducks and Herons), quite spot, perfect watching dog walkers by the botanical gardens. Beautiful city, and Peter was an excellent host, and even helped us with printing our boarding passes.

Peter’s place is so wonderful!
It’s very private whilst being on the canal. A super romantic and convenient spot. Peter is a wonderful host. Very communicative and caring. I had a wonderful experience.

Peter’s place may be small, but it is packed full with everything you could ever want or need. Peter has fitted the space out with every attention to detail and with an eye to making his guests comfortable. Additionally, the location was fantastic! We would highly recommend this B and B.

Booked the house boat on a whim for a layover in Amsterdam less than 24 hours. It was fairly easy to get to the Location by taking the train from the airport to Central Amsterdam station and walking about 2 kilometers. The houseboat itself was exactly as advertised. It was so nice to sit on the deck sipping wine. The living area itself was a bit cramped with two people and luggage, but definitely doable for just an overnight stay. I would love to come back to Amsterdam and would stay here again!

We had a lovely stay at Multatuli house over New Year when our daughter was married in Amsterdam.    Joanna and MP made us very welcome and the apartment was all  that we could wish for.   It is in a great spot, bike shop just down the road, and supermarket just a skip away.   A great stay really comfortable with all amenities that we could have wished for.
Joanna's place is wonderful: nice neighborhood, espectacular and cozy home. She and her husband were very helpful and made our stay unforgettable! Highly advisable.

This was our second stay at the Multatuli apartment. Everything was just right once again. Joanna responded very quickly to our inquiries, was flexible with our special requests, and was perfectly organized with the details of our stay (arrival/departure times, baby bed, stair guards, etc.) Our only reticence to recommend this apartment more is that it will become even more popular and less available for us in the future! Otherwise, if this apartment matches your needs, you simply can not go wrong here.

The reception was very worm and we felt at home from the first moment. Our visit was on  a special family ceremony and we felt that Joanna was moved and showed interest and wanted to contribute to it. We arrived earlier than check in time and left our luggage to find it later in our rooms.

This is our second stay at the Multatuli apartment in Amsterdam and we were very pleased to return- it felt like home after travelling for a month around Europe.
We are a family with 2 adult children and the apartment suited all our needs. It is close to a main street with excellent restaurants, supermarkets, clothing stores and is a more upmarket area of Amsterdam. The main city centre is close by and in walking distance.
We met Joanna and MP who are very helpful, full of local knowledge and always willing to assist in any way required.
We would be more than happy to stay here again when we return to Amsterdam.

We had a lovely stay in Multatuli house. The apartment was exactly as described, with comfortable beds, a nice living room and a well equipped kitchen.
Joanna was available and responded promptly to all our questions before arrival, also was very flexibly with check-in and check-out times. In addition we were provided with recommendations for places to visit, tours to take and where to eat. All Joanna’s recommended places were very nice.
The Apartment is located in a nice neighborhood near the train and tram stations and is within easy walking distance from the Dam square.

We stayed in this apartment the last
weekend.
Joanna is a perfect host : friendly
and helpful in communication and during check in and check out.
The apartment is beautiful ,very functional….
About 10 minutes walking from the Central
Station!!! Ready upon our arrival.
Excellent cleaning.
Recommend to three young couples.
Perfect location and around services: Tram
Stop, Supermarket, Cafè,
Coffeeshop,Attractions and more.
Available for us umbrellas and kway also.

This was my fifth time in Amsterdam and i
am very happy and satisfied.
Thanks again for everything Joanna. I hope
to come back soon.
Andrea
A fantastic place to stay. Would definitely recommend.

This place is special and so enjoyable. You eat your breakfast/dinner while enjoying the canal and looking at the rain. It was really cosy, warm and clean. With so much special things that makes you feel at home.
Cute and cosy place. Well positioned and very clean. Great bed
Cool guy, cool boat!
Gemütlicher, ruhiger, zentral gelegener Ort zum Wohlfühlen, auch wenn es draussen stürmt und regnet...

Peter's ship was exactly what dreams are made of! He was very accommodating and there were so many great touches in the apartment.  It felt like we were staying at a 5 star hotel. I would definitely reccomend and we are planning on staying there again!
Peter’s place is just perfect small yet fully functional loved to have stayed longer. Convenient to local mini market Spar to get all our needs - just perfect!
Zentral und dennoch unglaublich ruhig - Mitten in der Natur, abends fährt ab und zu ein Boot vorbei. Herrlich

Ze doen er alles aan om je welkom te heten, geweldige ervaring.
Koelkast vol, verse bloemen en fruit, heerlijk Rituals pakket om te gebruiken, alles netjes en schoon. Vrienden van mij willen nu ook ;-)

Nous avons passé un merveilleux week-end sur le bateau! Sonja est une hôte investie et à l'écoute. Tout est à notre disposition sur le bateau pour ne manquer de rien ( nourriture , savon , shampoing ).
Je recommande si vous souhaitez vous déconnecter de la réalité le temps d'un week end !

Le Tasmania est un houseboat splendide où nous avons été très bien accueilli par le mari de Sonja avec quelques petites attentions comme des belles fleurs, du pain frais, du jus d'orange pour le matin... Nous avons très bien dormi et avons vraiment été comblés de ces deux nuits passés sur le Tasmania. Non loin du centre, nous avons profité des vélos mis à disposition et nous sommes bien senti permis tous ces cyclistes d'Amsterdam.
Merci beaucoup à Sonja et Michael, que je recommande vivement.

På forhånd fikk vi en detaljert beskrivelse på hvordan vi skulle finne båten. Båten ligger noe utenfor sentrum, men ikke lenger at det er mulig å gå eller sykle. Og bussen går også like utenfor kaiområdet.
Dette stedet er så mye mer enn et tilfeldig hotellrom. Vi var heldige og fikk en solfylt helg med 26 grader. Så muligheten for å sitte ute på dekk og spise frokost, og slappe av på dekk på kvelden med noe godt i glasset var helt perfekt. Rommet var rent og ryddig. Og Sonja hadde sørget for at det var litt mat og drikke til oss på rommet når vi kom fram. Vi stortrivdes på båten, og vil gjerne anbefale det til andre som vurderer tur til Amsterdam.

Brilliant short stay
Sonja was lovely and so helpful
Welcome pack of food and bubbles was great
Lovely accommodation very clean and tidy and excellent shower room
Would recommend any time

Das Hausboot ist ein Traum! Wunderschön eingerichtet und mit 20min Radweg sehr zentral! Die Räder werden sogar kostenlos bereit gestellt!
Unser Städtetrip war Dank Sonja und ihrem hausboot unvergesslich und wunderschön! Sonja ist eine spitzen Gastgeberin!!

Awesome place!! first time using Airbnb and I am glad that I choose Sonja's. She is the perfect host taking care of every detail. She recommended excelente places to go out for dinner. Her place is very well organized and very clean. The area couldn't be better. We like to be close to the center of the city but not in the middle of the tourist attractions. Waking up in the morning and looking at the serenity of the water from our window was a pleasure. I will go back to Sonia's place without hesitation.

What a wonderful place to stay! Sonja was a truly fantastic host...The boat really is the most charming magical little hideaway from all the hustle and bustle of Amsterdam city life, the location couldn't be better, which was a short 10 minute walk from the city center. The bedroom was incredibly well equipped with the most comfy bed! Couldn't recommend this place enough! Thank you for a great stay X

What a wonderful and unique air bnb experience! Lovely and cosy studio with comfy bed and very clean facilities. Sonja left us some really good recommendations and also lots of breakfast goodies :) would definitely recommend to others and would stay on the Tasmania again when visiting the beautiful city of Amsterdam :)

The Tasmania is the best airbnb we've ever stayed in! It was a truly delightful experience. The delicious treats Sonja and her husband provided were simply amazing, and the clear directions, excellent recommendations and bikes provided were wonderful. We hope we get to come back again.
We had a great stay at this airbnb. Everything was as listed. The boat itself was beautiful and very comfortable too
Our stay on the Tasmania was great and the boat is amazing! Sonja did everything to make us feel welcome, including a bottle of prosecco on arrival!

Amazing boat! The nicest around, lovely hosts who provide maps and local food knowledge. The room was clean and well equipped, with private access so you don't feel like your a burden on the hosts. Fantastic use of bikes too! I highly recommend staying here and I will definitely be returning!
Everything was as described and Sonja and Michael are great hosts. Location is spot on and only a short walk to central Amsterdam. Amenities in the room were great and we'd definitely stay again.

Sonja hat dafür gesorgt, dass man sich bei ihr sehr wohl fühlt. Die Unterkunft ist sehr sauber und ordentlich. Sonja ist sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Besonders erwähnenswert ist die zentrale Lage und die tolle Möglichkeit zwei Fahrräder rund um die Uhr zu nutzen. Ich werde die Unterkunft auf jeden Fall weiter empfehlen und sicher auch noch mal wiederkommen!

Simplement extraordinaire!!
Bateau magnifique, l'accueil de Sonja était des plus convivial et la situation parfait. Proche du centre à vélo mais suffisamment en retrait pour être au calme.
Merci Sonja pour avoir rendu notre séjour à Amsterdam inoubliable.

Esperienza unica e la consiglio a tutti, vivere Amsterdam a bordo di Tanzania è stato straordinario; la pulizia, il confort e l'originalità della sistemazione ha superato ogni aspettativa.
Amsterdam è affascinante e girarla in bicicletta è stato divertentissimo e soprattutto molto comodo.
Sonija e Michael sono sempre stati molto disponibili ed ospitali!!!!
È un vero piacere poter raccomandare questa soluzione ad amici e parenti e sicuramente rimarrá un riferimento per il prossimo viaggio ad Amsterdam.
My husband and I had a wonderful stay on the Tasmania. The boat is beautiful and the hosts were lovely. We would highly recommend this place!

The Tasmania houseboat is exactly what we were expecting and more. Quiet and scenic location that was within walking distance of the main area, a warm welcome with some food and drink provided to make us feel at home. We felt like we had a more authentic experience but was also so comfortable we often forgot we were on a boat! Would highly recommend staying here to anyone who wants something a little bit different

Everything was exactly how they described! The boat is even more gorgeous in person. It was great Sonja and Michael provide bikes so we didn't have to rent them anywhere. It was definitely a unique experience. I would definitely book with them again in the future!
Super place pour découvrir la ville, l’accueil , les vélos, le bateau... la classe ! on conseil vraiment.

The pictures and description don't actually do this fantastic house boat justice. It is beautiful and was an absolute pleasure to stay in. Sonja was really helpful on arrival but left us to it once we were settled in.  There were plenty of amenities and Sonja had put some very personal touches in place such as fresh bread, sparkling wine and milk available for us. We are very grateful for her hospitality.

Die Unterkunft war wunderschön und viel größer als es auf den Fotos gewirkt hat.Man fühlte sich nicht wie auf einem Boot sondern wie in einem Luxushotel! Der gefüllte Kühlschrank hat uns bei Ankunft so gestärkt dass wir sofort die Stadt erkunden konnten. Super waren auch die Fahrräder! So konnten wir alle Sehenswürdigkeiten abfahren und haben uns dabei gefühlt wie ein "echter Amsterdamer"  Wir hoffen wir können dort nochmals übernachten

The details of how to find it were very helpful, she met us on arrival and showed us around and was very friendly and helpful - although we didn't need any help during the stay as everything was set up already.
My boyfriend and I had a wonderful stay on the Tasmania. It's a walking distance from the city center. Sonia was a great host and we would highly recommend this place!

Die Unterkunft ist besonders. Ein modernes Hausboot, das ausstattungsmäßig keine Wünsche offen lässt. Besonders toll fanden wir die Räder, die zur Verfügung standen. Wir haben damit die komplette Stadt erkundet. Die Kommunikation mit Sonja war Bestens und wir wurden in alles Wichtige eingewiesen. Wir würden jederzeit wieder kommen!

The Tasmania was hands down one of the most beautiful and unique places we stayed at on our recent trip to Europe. It is located near a bunch of good restaurants and bars and the space was very nice and comfortable. Sonja and her husband really made us feel at home. Would highly recommend.

We stayed at sonjas boat, for two nights. It was absolutely beautiful, very unique and modern. It had everything we needed, sonja left us some bread and snacks, even food for breakfast. She gave us good information and was happy to help with anything. One thing I would say it was a fair walk to the centre. However there is a tram ten minutes down the road. Would highly recommend.

Sonja was a super welcoming & lovely host. The boat is beautiful and so peaceful. It felt so clean, fresh and secluded and yet it was only a 5 minute cab from the central station. Will definitely be returning!

Séjour fantastique sur la péniche de Sonja! La chambre est parfaitement équipée, Sonja est une hôte très attentive qui donne beaucoup de conseils de restaurants/bars. Les vélos qu'elle nous prête sont parfaits pour découvrir Amsterdam et rester dans l'ambiance de cette magnifique ville! Un grand merci!

The Houseboat Tasmania is a great for anyone looking for something special for their stay! The accommodations are perfect for two people. Beautifully designed, comfortable with functional kitchen and bathroom. The boat is situated close to public transport, within walking distance to the Center. Also getting around the city by bikes is easy and fun. Sonja was a great hostess! She had breakfast items ready in the fridge for us on our arrival, fresh fruit, even fresh flowers, tulips ofcourse :) We got great tips on places to dine. All in all, a perfect holiday and a perfect host! Can warmly recommend Sonja and houseboat Tasmania.

This is our second stay at this venue and yet again, an enjoyable experience.  This is a fantastic place to stay with very helpful hosts.  I would recommended this venue for your stay in Amsterdam.  Thanks!

An ideally appointed, clean and comfortable appartment within  a few minutes walking from the centre  of the city with all necessary appurtenances  to make one's stay memorable. Joanna and Mark are a friendly and welcoming couple  who provided us will the supplementary information to make are overal stay in Amsterdam a resounding  success.  Wholeheartedly  recommend this establishment.

I’m coming each year in the same time to Amsterdam to a different apartment,
After visiting Joanna’s' I’m sure that it’s the best apartment we used...

The host was charming, everything written is accurate and then some...
Great space! Great comfy beds and excellent Linens and towels,
Very large modern kitchen and even an nesspresso coffee machine

The area was lovely

We will defiantly be back!!!

We hebben genoten van het prachtige huis in een mooie, centrale omgeving. Het was 4 dagen lang een luxe om na het bezoeken van de vele bezienswaardigheden in dit huis te komen, te kokkerellen en gezellig samen te zijn. Het huis heeft alles wat je nodig hebt.

De eigenaars zijn zeer vriendelijk en behulpzaam.
Hier komen de 5 vriendinnen zeker nog eens terug!

L'appartement de Joanna et MP est merveilleux! Beau, grand, confortable, il est en plus extraordinairement situé, dans un quartier typique, à la fois calme et branché. L'accueil de Joanna est parfait, et attentionné jusqu'au bout (adresses dans le quartier, dépôt des valises chez elle...). On ne peut que recommander!

De verhuurder heeft steeds snel gereageerd als ik vragen had over de accomodatie.
De verhuurder dacht mee en gaf ook tips om het verblijf te veraangenamen.

The apartment was incredible in every aspect.
Dealing with Joanna in making the booking was very smooth and easy. Every communication was clear and very quick.
The apartment itself is stunning. There were 8 of us, needing 6 beds. Everything was ready for us exactly how we requested and check in couldn't have been easier.
We all felt like we were home from the first moment we walked in.
Comfortable, and spacious. Even for 8 people.

I strongly recommend this place to everyone.

Lovely home in the perfect location, a side street off of a main shopping strip. Feel like a local while talking long walks at your leisure in the neighborhood exploring all that the city has to offer. Lots of space and 2 bathrooms helped us to make our final decision!

Joanna and her husband were extremely welcoming. The apartment was spotless at our arrival and the location is ideal (walking distance to all of the major landmarks but just out of the way enough that it's appropriate for a family).  We enjoyed our time so much we even extended our stay a day (thank you again Joanna & MP for being so accommodating!).   We look forward to returning to Amsterdam and when we do, this will be our first choice for booking.

Lovely apartment in great location, walking distance of most attractions. Very steep steps especially up to 2nd floor bedroom, we were aware this would be the case but yhe stairs were steeper than we expected. Apartment clean and well equipped, more towels would have been good and a small starter / welcome pack with milk and more coffee/ tea would be nice. Overall great apartment, would visit again

The apartment is centrally located in a nice area. It contained large rooms, was clean and very well equipped. Joanna was a marvelous host, she gave us some very helpful information about the area and the town. We can definitely recommend her and the apartment warmly, and if we return to Amsterdam we will certainly stay in the apartment again.

The apartment was exactly as listed, if not even more spacious and lovely than expected - plus it's in a fantastic central location. Communication with Joanna was excellent from start to finish - she was welcoming, friendly and made us feel very at home. We would definitely stay there again and recommend it to others.

Perfect place to stay in Amsterdam. It's near everything and Joanna really help us and recommended very nice restaurant, EYE, it's really worth waiting. We would recommend to stay here if you in Amsterdam.

La casa era aún mejor que en las fotos: acogedora, muy cómoda, equipada y bien situada. Joanna nos recibió nada más llegar con buenas recomendaciones sobre la ciudad. El último día pudimos dejar las maletas sin ningún problema. Muy recomendable!

My co-workers and I made reservations last minute on the day of to stay here.  Joanna was very accommodating and was a pleasure to work with.  Unfortunately, while we were just outside of Amsterdam, our work called us back and we could not make the trip.  Joanna was so gracious and refunded a good portion of our money, even though she had to go out of her way to fit us in last minute.  She was a pleasure to deal with and quite the professional!  I will definitely stay here next time I am in Amsterdam.

Ayant été malades, donc nous n'avons pu aller chez Joanna, ce que nous regrettons nous ne pouvons laisser de message, par contre nous avons entendu que nos enfants étaient très satisfaits de leur séjour.
Salutations
Mireille Cochard

Das Appartement von Johanna ist in jeder Hinsicht ein Traum. Es ist unglaublich geschmackvoll und vollständig eingerichtet (es gab sogar Regenschirme!). Es liegt absolut zentral, wobei dennoch kein Lärm zu hören ist.
Joanna hat uns fünf Mädels sehr herzlich empfangen, uns anhand von Stadtplänen Tipps gegeben und stand auch sonst jederzeit für Fragen zur Verfügung (wobei sich nach der Top-Erklärung keine mehr ergeben haben). Auch die Empfehlung von Oranje Umbrella Tours für eine private Stadtführung war super. Wir kommen bestimmt wieder!

Beautiful space with comfortable beds and great light. We were 3 couples and it was just the right size. Perfect location for wandering in the Jordaan. Well-stocked with Nespresso pods. The stairs are a bit steep and narrow, but that's what you get in these wonderful old houses. Joanna and her husband were kind and welcoming, ready to help us get our bags upstairs and offer an orientation to the city. We would happily stay here again.

Première bonne surprise, à notre arrivée, notre hôtesse, Joanna, parle couramment le français ce qui facilite les échanges. L'appartement qui a beaucoup de cachet, est lumineux et bien entretenu. Il est situé à 7 minutes de la Gare, dans un quartier animé le jour, mais calme la nuit. Nous avons pu visiter, à pied, l'ensemble d'Amsterdam, sans problème. Nous y avons passé un excellent séjour.

Joanna's apartment is really superb. It's both cozy and comfortable while being clean and spacious. The neighbourhood it's in is very nice but also close to Central with a lot of cute shops and restaurants. Joanna herself was accomodating and made everything very easy.
We had a great time in this perfectly located, wonderfully cozy, very clean and well equipped apartment. Joanna was a great und very helpful host.  We will come back!
Lieu atypique et fort plaisant. D un coup de vélo, à proximité du centre ville.  Accueil très agréable et facilité avec toutes les attentions laissées pour nous. Adresse à retenir.
Ideal location, bikes at your disposal, quiet and fantastic people. George would say "What else ?". A top in Amsterdam.
Peter's boathouse was our little sanctuary in the middle of the busy city of Amsterdam. It is only a few minutes walk from the red light and museum districts.

Wir hatten einen tollen Aufenthalt im Hausboot von  Peter. Wir konnten flexibel an und abreisen, das war total unkompliziert, wunderbar.  Die Unterkunft war wirklich ruhig, zentral und so nah der Natur. Es ist klein, aber dafür optimal... Auf dem Deck konnten wir entspannt sitzen und genießen. Das Hausboot ist sehr geschmackvoll und hochwertig ausgebaut und eingerichtet, wir hatten eine super Zeit dort und kommen gerne wieder. Auch bei nicht so gutem Wetter kann man wunderbar im Steuerhaus auf den gemütlichen Sitzen sitzen. Duschen kann man gut und schlafen im gemütlichem Bett sowieso... also einfach sehr zu empfehlen!!!!

Peter has ticked every box in his Amsterdam canal boat. The space is clean and well-appointed, every detail perfect. The location is outstanding. The bed is soft and comfortable with good bedding and extra pillows. Matching bathrobes are a sweet surprise in the sleek bathroom. Everything you will need has been provided in the kitchen and the wheelhouse is the perfect place for coffee or wine and watching life on the canal. I would definitely stay here again, and Peter was a thoughtful, helpful host. Great value for money.
Peter was an amazing host and the place was great, and near the center of the city.
That’s very beautiful place and comfort. I had a good memories. Thanks.
A small, relaxing getaway for a romantic weekend Amsterdam
It is a super recomendable place, is very clean and is a excellent ubication

A rare experience not to miss, a boat in Amsterdam. Very cosy, warm, all amenities available, excellent calm and safe location, lovely view on a sunny day. Just a note - the access to the cabin is a bit narrow and stairs to the bedroom /bathroom are a bit steep, so not really suitable for small children.
Really lovely place to stay, close to the centre with and the museum quarter so perfect location. Peter was lovely and so is the boat 😊
We had a fantastic time and staying on the canal was so fun!

Lovely little place, cosy with everything you need for a few days away. Very clean and comfortable. Communication with Peter very good. About 20 - 30 minutes walk to rembrandt Square bars and restaurants. Would definitely recommend Peter's place and will hopefully return again
Eine wunderschöne Unterkunft. Super sauber. Peter ist bezaubernd und sehr hilfsbereit.
Such a fun experience! Peter was an excellent host, and it made our trip to Amsterdam amazing!

A lovely, characterful place for a cosy romantic stay with some lovely, thoughtful touches. The wheelhouse a great place to eat breakfast or drink wine and watch the world go by. A great location, safe and central. Peter a welcoming and generous host. Definitely a place to go back to!

What a perfect place to stay for a couple!!! It is super small but very cosy, we didn't feel like it was TOO small for us at any time and we got so comfortable and used to it, we were sad to leave. Staying on the boat is quirky and different to anywhere I've stayed before. I cannot tell you how relaxing it is to wake up in the morning, use the coffee machine that is provided (fab coffee by the way) and sit up on the top deck on the chairs and watch the boats go by on the lake. Everyone waves as they go past too!! The host is friendly and thoughtful and stay on the other end of the boat so are there if you need them, but they leave you to it and it feels very private. We visited in December so it was cold and rainy so we only saw Binkie the cat a couple of times, but he was a cutie! The boat is heated so we weren't cold at all. The bathroom and kitchen were very clean. There was even soft robes to use in the bathroom! The bed is super comfy. The TV has plenty of channels and YouTube for music. There are loads of little tourist books around the boat which are helpful to read. Botanical gardens are literally next door to the boat, nice place to visit. 10 minute walk to everything you need and all the coffeeshops. I reckon about 20 minutes to Amsterdam Central, it isn't far, I wouldn't even bother with the no14 tram as most people have advised (and I am not a walker!!).  My stay exceeded my expectations by far. My boyfriend and I loved it and will definitely be coming back to stay next year.

Eine bessere Unterkunft hätten wir nicht finden können. Das Boot ist sauber und hat alles, was das Herz begehrt. Sogar Bademäntel sind vorhanden. Die Lage des Bootes ist optimal. Es liegt ruhig, aber in 10 Minuten ist man zu Fuß in der Innenstadt.
Peter hat sich von Karin vertreten lassen. Karin ist total lieb und hat sich sehr um unser Wohl gekümmert.
Wir würden jederzeit wieder hier wohnen.
Excellent houseboat in central Amsterdam. Very unique experience, very comfortable. Warm recommendation!
Le bateau de Peter est très confortable, d’une propreté impeccable et vraiment bien situé à Amsterdam. De plus, Peter est un hôte très aimable. Nous recommandons vivement cette adresse.

Peter‘s boat is a very cozy place to stay in. Very original and very neat. He left us some dutch sweets to enjoy and books to read.
In the boat it was warm and the bathroom and kitchen very clean!
Thanks for the stay it was an incredible experience and we will definitely come back if we get the chance to. :)

We had a amazing 3 night stay in Peter's beautiful house boat, it was incredibly cozy and sparkling clean. The bed was beyond comfortable and the environment was laid back, peaceful and serene. Thank you so much for having us Peter. We will be back!

This was the best place we could have stayed whilst in Amsterdam!! It is so unique and so comfortable and cosy! And Peter is such a kind and helpful host! The location was brilliant, right next to one of the light artworks. Was so special to sit and watch the boats go by at night. But anytime of the year it would be great to stay there. It’s a lovely walking distance into the city centre and on a beautiful quiet street. Highly recommend!!
The boat is a fantastic place to stay, felt much more homely than a hotel. Peter is an amazing host with lots of extra touches!

I recommand to have once the experience to stay on a ship for few days. Peter’s one, was great. Everything was perfect ! Peter is really reactive to our request of informations concerning visiting Dam. We thank him very much. Michelle

Super endroit pour passer du temps à Amsterdam !
Le logement est parfait, propre et très bien équipé !
Le séjour dans le péniche a été parfait, les petites attentions de Peter ont été très agréables (vins, gaufres, café, thé, ...). L’emplacement est idéal et la propreté au top !
Everything was exactly like in the pictures. The boat was comfy and cozy and we would 100% visit again! Thanks for a perfect stay!

A perfect place to stay. The boat is very cosy and comfortable. Peter is also an excellent host that is very helpful and made sure we enjoyed our stay. This includes sweet gestures like helping us with our luggage to the cabin and surprising us with a thoughtful gift basket. Highly recommended!
Top top top

We stayed one night at Peters place and it was just perfect for us. Its such a cozy place with a beautiful view and super central! Everything was very clean and Peter gave us a warm welcome. We would love to come back and stay longer than this time.
Friendly host, great location, great boat, nice touches with beer, wine and other bits, highly recommended.
Compact, origineel en schone accommodatie

Die ruhige aber trotzdem zentrale Lage war einfach perfekt für uns, das Boot war sehr gemütlich, wir würden sehr gerne wieder hier übernachten und können das Boot und die Gastgeber uneingeschränkt empfehlen.

really nice place.
i really want to stay this best b&b in the world again.
Perfect for an unusual stay. Peter isvery kind, uncomplicated and generous. It's been a real pleasure!
Hôte très accueillant! Je recommande
Great location and lovely boat. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Peter was super helpful, very responsive and added little touches which made the trip even more special.

Had a lovely few days on Peter's boat. It's cosy and compact but has everything you need. It's in a great location too, away from the madness of the centre. If we return, we would stay here again without hesitating.

Had a fantastic time celebrating a birthday which was made all the more special by staying on Peter's lovely boat. I would definitely recommend it and we will be sure to book again if we go back to Amsterdam. It has everything you could need and more. It's a great location, close to the centre and Peter was very helpful with guidebooks and recommendations for places to visit.

Peter est un hôte très agréable. Il est très réactif, à l'écoute, disponible et de confiance. Le logement est très bien situé, très propre, très calme, bien équipé (avec de petites attention)....Rien à redire.
Je recommande sans hésiter et je n'hésiterai pas à y retourner.

Отличное место, чтобы почувствовать дух Амстердама. Спокойная набережная, на другом берегу ботанический сад 17 века. В каюте тепло, в рубке тоже. Мы там любили проводить вечера. От вокзала 25 минут пешком, до Национальной оперы 10 минут, до музейной площади 25 минут. Мы в восторге от 3-х дней в Амстердаме!
Geweldige ervaring , mooi rustige omgeving goede service !!
Best place to stay in Amsterdam 👍
Great stay

The boat is located in a calm side-arm gracht with good connection to the public transport and some nice restaurants in the vincinity. It is sparkling clean and has everything one needs. Check-in and -out was very easy. Thanks

De Keizerinn ligt op een ideale plek, vlak bij o.a. Carré, waar wij s avonds heen gingen. Het was echt een feestje om daarna naar de boot te lopen en daar te overnachten. Een aanrader en zeker voor herhaling vatbaar!

We had a wonderful stay in the Multatuli house, the house is very spacious for 6 people, beautifully furnished and clean! It is located in a friendly neighbourhood with a lot of shops, supermarkets, great restaurants and bars. Joanna and her husband are the perfect hosts, they gave us a lot of great recommendations for Restaurants, supermarkets etc. in the neighbourhood. We will definitely come back!
ha sido perfecto. la casa, los anfitriones y el barrio. Muy recomendable

Five of us stayed here for a week in May 2015 and found this apartment to be very comfortable. The kitchen was modern and all three beds that we used were comfortable as well. Free wifi worked. Basically the flat/apartment is as described.
Excellent location (7-8 minute walk from Central Station) in a nice "hip" part of Amsterdam. Only negatives were the VERY steep stairs. It was great to be able to leave our luggage earlier than check in time.
We hope to be back in a few years.
Thank you Jo and MP.

We (7 girls) spent a lovely weekend at Joanna's place. The location of the flat is just perfect for activities in and around Amsterdam (7 minutes walk to the central station) and is situated in the neighborhood of nice shops and cafes. Joanna was a helpful and attentive host. We can highly recommend this apartment.

This beautiful apartment is located in a central location in Amsterdam with easy access to the museums, train stations and canals. Our host, Joanna, was wonderful both in preparation for our arrival and with helping us with anything we needed while we were there. The common areas and bedrooms were all wonderful and I highly recommend this to everyone!
The apartment is perfect! Very good m located, clean and spacy. Joanna & MP are great hosts!
The house is super for 8 people and Joanna is very kind. We didn't use the kitchen but we saw that everything is provided; we enjoyed so much our stay in Amsterdam, thank you Joanna!

Wir waren bei fantastisch herzlichen Gastgebern in einer wunderschönen Wohnung untergebracht und hatten einen wirklich tollen Aufenthalt!
Joanna & MP waren sehr bemüht, alles zu erklären und Tipps für den Aufenthalt zu geben. Das Handbuch mit Hinweisen zum Haus und zur Umgebung (Restaurants, Sehenswürdigkeiten etc.) war sehr umfangreich und hilfreich.
Wir hatten alles, was wir brauchten und fühlten uns in der gut ausgestatteten Wohnung sehr wohl.
Lage und Ausstattung waren sehr gut!

Wir können die Wohnung nur empfehlen und würden jederzeit wieder buchen!

Vielen Dank an die Gastgeber für alles.

Me encantó hospedarme en la casa de Joanna :)
Es muy bonita y mejor de lo que aparece en fotos. Además, Joanna es muy amable.
