What a great apartment to stay in. Very centrally located in a great neighborhood. Joanna and MP are perfect hosts. Were kind enough to hold our luggage for us until apartment was ready and take it up the stairs for us. Joanna provided maps and recommendations which was a great help. She made sure we knew that she and MP were available for anything that we may need. The beds are so comfortable so we had no problems with sleeping. On the day of departure we had left a piece of luggage at the apartment. They were kind of enough to to put in in a taxi and it was delivered to the airport before our flight left. A big thanks for everything, we had a great time.

Joanna was a great and attentive host with lots of helpful advice. The flat was gorgeous and had tons of helpful resources for travellers. Located right off hip Harlemmerstraat. Just be aware that there's some climbing involved with narrow stairs.

We had a fantastic time at Joanna's beautiful house in Amsterdam.  The location was perfect and the house was beautiful.  You really had the feeling that you were staying somewhere special.  Joanna went above and beyond to make us feel welcome and we look forward to hopefully seeing her again soon!  thank you!
What an opportunity! Wonderful hosts, great location, beautiful house, fascinating city, and an opportunity to live in a real Dutch house!  Thank you Joanna & MP.

We were welcomed by Joanna and were shown the apparment which is beautiful and has a homely feel to it. You can arrive empty-handed because the kitchen is well stocked with all the basic needs (coffee, tea, breakfast cereals, etc.). Lovely bedrooms, all very cosy and furnished with taste.
The appartment is located in a beautiful neighbourhood with lots of restaurants, bars, shops, and supermarkets. Joanna has prepared a handbook with all the advice you need for a great stay in Amsterdam.

The apartment is fantastic, and Joanna and MP were great hosts. The space was clean and spacious, perfect for our group of 6 adults, 2 toddlers and a baby. They were very accommodating with our kids, installing a baby gate around all the stairs, and providing cribs and high-chairs. The stairs are a bit steep and narrow, but once you've got the luggage up it's not a big problem.

The neighborhood is wonderful, step one way out of the apartment and you are on a commercial street with plenty of shops, grocery stores and restaurants. Step the other way, you are walking along the beautiful canals.

This property was fantastic. Joanna and MP were gracious hosts and helped me get my bearings upon arrival. Joanna was even kind enough to make some recommendations for activities and located some local gyms I could use during my stay. The flat is only a 10 minute walk from Amsterdam's central station making it easy to travel throughout the city; nothing was more than 20 minutes away. Great shops and restaurants nearby too.  The apartment was amazing!  Lots of natural light, great furnishings and comfortable for the 3 adults on our trip. We had plenty of space to be together in common areas but could also get away for solitude and not be disturbed. Street noise was minimal and interestingly enough you can smell the smoke from the coffee shops on the next street on occasion. We cooked at least one meal per day in the well equipped kitchen. As the staircases are quite steep I would not recommend this property for someone who has mobility challenges. During our stay there was a bit of a heat wave but letting the windows stay open for air circulation along with the fans provided kept us comfortable. I would definitely stay again if I visit this beautiful city.

Joanna met us right at the apartment and showed us everything we needed to know.  The apartment was as pictured and was gorgeous, spacious, and very clean.  Wonderful location, incredibly charming! They were fabulous hosts who were happy to offer suggestions for Amsterdam. Great communication throughout. We loved Amsterdam and wished we could have stayed longer and this apartment just added to our wonderful experience!  We would love to stay here again. Highly recommended!

Wir können allen positiven Bewertungen nur zustimmen. Ein extrem bequemes Bett, überall findet man liebevoll durchdachte Details. Leider konnten wir die wunderschöne Terrasse aufgrund des Wetters nicht nutzen. Umso angenehmer war es, dass Peters Boot auch noch über eine Fußbodenheizung verfügt. Im Führerhaus hatte man einen herrlichen Ausblick aufs Wasser. Dort standen auch Wein, Kekse, Bonbons sowie Stadtpläne für uns zur Verfügung. Die Sitze waren genauso bequem wie das Bett. Peter ist unaufdringlich freundlich. Obwohl er direkt nebenan wohnt, konnte man ungestörte Privatsphäre, und trotz der zentralen Lage, Ruhe genießen. Für Fragen stand er uns aber jederzeit zur Verfügung. Es war ein rundum gelungener Aufenthalt, mit dem ein Hotelzimmer nicht mithalten kann.

Great Stay- Highly Recommend! Peter is an excellent host- our stay far exceeded our already highly  anticipated expectation. Quiet stay, not a far walk to various attractions and public transportation, all the essential amenities provided.  Thanks for making our little city stay so special!

The place to stay! I a quiet part of the center but in very easy walking distance of everywhere with traditional pubs close by. We was greeted with open arms and the hosts were as friendly as they can come. Wine and treats on arrival followed by a spotless living area and ample amenities. The ned was very cosy, the shower amazing and the seating area on the bridge of the boat lit up at night was the nicest part of out trip. We wish we could have stayed longer. Thank you both!
Very welcoming, great place to stay.
Peter was a wonderful help!

Peter went above and beyond for us, he held our bags for us both days so that we could explore amsterdam hands free and allowed us to check in to the space as soon as it was cleaned from the previous guest. I will be recommending Peters place to anyone I know who travels to amsterdam. You will not regret booking this dream boat!
Amazing place, even better than I expected!!! Would come back again!
One word: AWESOME!

Sonja houseboat has a modern vibe that comes with a little luxury and great homely touches like the Nespresso machine and breakfast spread - we also had  a lovely prosecco waiting for us! The free bikes were extensive campaign around Amsterdam - this is a worthy stay if you want to be neat water, somewhere alternative with enough cycling distance from a quiet area. :)

Der Aufenthalt auf Sonjas Hausboot war ein tolles Erlebnis. Alles auf dem Hausboot ist modern und neu. Das Zimmer ist mit Allem ausgestattet, was man für ein tolles Frühstück und mehr benötigt (Kaffeemaschine, Kühlschrank, Mikrowelle, Eier- & Wasserkocher, Milchaufschäumer, etc). Auch der Kühlschrank war für ein nettes Frühstück gefüllt. Sonja war ein super Gastgeber: nett, hilfsbereit und unkompliziert. Auch die Lage ist perfekt und mit den kostenlosen Fahrrädern, kann man Amsterdam von dort aus super erkunden.
Wir können es jedem absolut empfehlen, eine Nacht auf dem Hausboot zu verbringen.
The experience was even better than what was described online. My parents absolutely loved staying in the boat and felt really comfortable and close to the city.

We stayed 3 nights on the houseboat, and it was an absolute highlight of our trip. We loved being able to experience the boat lifestyle, and felt like locals when we would hop on the provided bikes each morning. The boat's location is tucked away so it's extremely quiet and peaceful, but in a short couple blocks you're right into the hustle and bustle. (We easily walked to/from Centraal in 20 minutes.) The space was perfect for 2 of us, comfortable bed, super cozy and no issue with staying warm. There are porthole covers and shades on the skylights so you can decide if you want the morning light to come in or not. Sonja was a perfect host. She provided a wonderful assortment of local snacks and beverages, plenty of towels and dishes. We hope to come back and stay again. Highly recommend!!!

What a beautiful boat in a really quiet peaceful haven amongst the hustle and bustle of Amsterdam. Well equipped. Clean and well designed, it is fantastic. Bikes are available, which add to the Amsterdam experience.
Traumhaft! Definitiv zu empfehlen

Wir (6 Freunde) waren vom 09.07. - 12.07.15 in Amsterdam. Die Unterkunft war perfekt gelegen, nur 10 Gehminuten zum Bahnhof und in unmittelbarer Nähe zu den Grachten, zum Jordan-Viertel, leckeren Restaurants, einem Bäcker, Fahrradverleiher usw.
Die Unterkunft war top ausgestattet mit 3 geräumigen Schlafzimmern und einer großen Wohnküche mit allem, was man zum Leben braucht.
Joanna haben wir nur kurz gesehen, da sie übers Wochenende verreiste, aber in dieser kurzen Zeit gab sie uns einige Tipps und beantwortete alle unsere Fragen.
Insgesamt war es ein perfekter Kurztripp nach Amsterdam, es hätte nicht besser sein können.

We had a fantastic week at your wonderful apartment - it's so central to everything we wanted to see - and in such a safe neighbourhood that we felt fine to give the teenagers keys and let them explore Amsterdam on their own. The apartment was a perfect size for the six of us - with comfy sitting room and good size kitchen. We didn't want to leave and would love to come visit again. I love your calm white colour pallet - very relaxing place! Thank you! Jonna

The apartment was more spacious and beautiful than expected - plus it's in a fantastic central location. Our group consisted of 6 adults and we were very comfortable. We loved the style and decor of the apartment, which was even more lovely in person.
Communication with Joanna was excellent - she was welcoming and friendly. She provided maps and recommendations which were a great help. She also made sure we knew that she and MP were available for anything that we may have needed. We were also able leave our luggage after the check-out time.
Amsterdam was cold and rainy during our stay, which is unusual for summer, but the apartment itself was perfect. We would definitely recommend it to others.
We had a wonderful stay here. Stairs are steep but typical of Dutch homes. Highly recommended. Great host. Close to lots of great shops and restaurants. Will be back.

The absolute best place to stay in Amsterdam. Very close to the central train station, bikes provided, amazing welcome with food and wine. We were able to experience Amsterdam as a local and were very pleased.

Highly recommended place to stay in Amserdam. Clean, comfortable and well-equipped studio on a "wow factor" boat and hospitable, friendly and pleasant hosts who were on hand to help.  Having the bikes was a big plus although we loved the walk from the centre to the boat.  What you see on the pictures and description is exactly what you get and I am so glad we chose Sonja's boat for out special stay in the city.

The boat was great - clean, spacious, well equipped,  and a great base to explore Amsterdam. We walked from the boat through the Jordaan area into the centre. Sonja made us very welcome - even leaving us fresh bread and other goodies. A perfect trip.

Lovely houseboat and hosts
Perfect relaxation

tres belle cabine qui est quand meme assez grand et tout y est pour petit dejeuner des personnes tres gentilles qui font beaucoup d effort pour nous comprendre car nous notre anglais est assez mauvais disons scolaire  en toute sincerite je recommande ce bateau

Lovely clean and quiet accommodations on a beautiful boat. Our only regrets were the fact that we toured the city for the majority of our stay and never really got to enjoy our accommodations. Next time.
We had a great time in Amsterdam! Loved staying on the boat and using the bikes they provided. Such an adventure! Sonja and her husband were super nice people. We'd love to go back some day.

Tout était parfait et conforme à la description.
Nous avons été accueilli de manière très sympathique par Sonja (un tout grand merci pour les petites attentions: explications de lieux à visiter, de bonnes adresses pour manger, wifi, bouteille de vin, pain frais, yaourts, bières, popcorn, raisins frais, Nespresso à volonté .... et même un bouquet de tulipes !).
Quel calme sur cette belle péniche moderne et confortable.
Deux vélos nous attendaient pour se balader et rejoindre le centre en dix minutes grace à une carte que Sonja nous avait donnée.
Nous avons pu nous relaxer au soleil sur des transats mis notre disposition.
En un mot, PARFAIT.

My stay was amazing. Sonja and her husband, Michael (hope that spelling is accurate), go above and beyond for their guests. The room and the houseboat were beautiful. It was stocked with everything just as described. Before we checked-in, a list of restaurants and favorite spots were provided along with detailed directions from several locations. We arrived via train and easily walked to the home. Furthermore, bikes were available to use around the city after check-in. The hosts were more than accommodating. We loved our time in Amsterdam and our stay on the house boat. Definitely recommend and would stay here again if/when I am in the city.

Incredible! Sonja reached out to me a week before asking our preference for drinks. I thought that was very nice. Upon check in, our room had fresh flowers, snacks and bread. It was a delight after coming in on a delayed flight and no time for dinner. The boat is amazing and it was a pleasure staying there. Hot showers! Complimentary bikes to use! Wifi! Small kitchen with fridge, coffee, microwave! Travel books and maps available to use! We will definitely be staying there again when we return to Amsterdam!

Danke erstmal Sonja für den tollen Aufenthalt. Es war alles wunderbar. Kühlschrank befüllt mit, Bier, Wein, Käse und Brot waren vorhanden. Mit frischen Blumen dekoriert. Man konnte bei Sonnenschein am Deck mit Liegestühle sonnen. Es war auch toll das wur die Fahrräder benutzen konnten. Alles insgesamt guter Eindruck!
This is a very  beautiful houseboat in a very quiet area! It is very well appointed and Sonja is so fearful and very easy to communicate with!

Es war nicht unserer erstes Mal in Amsterdam, aber unser erstes Mal auf einem Hausboot. In dem Fall war es auch noch ein ganz modernes, welches kein Wünsche für einen Kurztrip offen lässt.

Das Boot ist ruhig gelegen und dennoch nur 10-15 Gehminuten vom Zentrum entfernt. Es ist viiiel größer, als es auf den Bildern rüberkommt. Sonja und Michael waren sehr freundliche und zugleich diskret zurückhaltende Gastgeber.

Zu unserer großen Überraschung haben wir 2 nutzbare Fahrräder und einen gefüllten Kühlschrank mit lauter Köstlichkeiten (Butter, Eier, Käse, Marmelade, Smoothie, Bier, Sekt, Milch und anderen Dingen) vorgefunden. Dazu gab es noch ein echt leckeres Brot, Kaffee, Tee und andere Dinge, die den Start in das Wochenende und vor allem in den nächsten Tag perfekt gemacht haben.

Als Ankunftszeit haben wir 15:00 Uhr geschätzt und wie der Zufall es wollte, hatte es auch genau gepasst. Nach einer kurzen Einweisung (auf deutsch) konnten wir direkt in die City starten und das Stadtleben genießen.

Sehr zu empfehlen ist der Sonnenuntergang auf den zur Verfügung stehenden (gemütlichen) Stühlen auf dem Oberdeck.

Es hat uns sehr gut gefallen und wir werden in ein paar Jahren auf jeden Fall noch einmal wiederkommen!

Grüße aus Berlin
M & M´s
This is what airbnb is all about. Great experience all round.
It was WONDERful! Just amazing! x
We enjoyed the area and the boat. Sonja offers a great place for visitors. Her accommodations are perfert two people.

What an awesome way to spend your time in Amsterdam!
The boat sits about 1.4kms away from central station.
The room is a lot bigger than it looks on the pictures and the bed is super comfy. The provisions left where fantastic and Sonja is a great host!!

Si vous voulez visiter Amsterdam dans un lieu insolite et inoubliable, je vous recommande d'aller chez Sonja. Son accueil, sa gentillesse et toutes ses petites attentions vous permettront de passer un excellent séjour. De plus, la mise à disposition de deux vélos vous permettront d'arpenter Amsterdam dans les meilleures conditions!!!
Our first experience of airbnb and it definitely set the standard. Sonja thought of everything to ensure we enjoyed our stay.

Sonja is a great host!
The house boat is beautiful and in a great location. Everything you need is inside and Sonja even left us some food and drinks for breakfast and a bottle of wine
Would love to stay here again
What a beautiful place to stay during a trip to Amsterdam. Very quiet and peaceful but still a quick walk to shops/restaurants. We will definitely be back!
The Tasmania is an amazing vessel in a great location with an impressive modern interior - the hosts were really accommodating and friendly and I would very much like to have stayed longer!

Everything was according to our expections and they were high! We spent magicals moments on this houseboat. We had everything for our comfort and intimity. We strongly reccommend this studio. Spectacular it is really! Thank for sharing your dream with us!

Sonja's boat house is unique and well worth to experience especially you are one person or couples. Location is easy to find based on the guide and in the walking distance from the central station and you can take the train from airport and the walk to the house easily. There are welcome wine and some food in the refrigerator. Highly recommended to experience.
Great place!

Sonja is great generiois hospitable host
She gave us advices before even reaching amsterdam
We have found full fridge full of food and drinks
The bathroom is five star with luxeriois soups gels foams and towels

The boat is quit and beatiful

We will stay again

Regards

Accommodating and flexible hosts especially with our spontaneous visit and arrival/departure times.
The attention to detail in the room was thoughtful and welcoming.
You are in a secluded area yet easy to walk to the sights. Bikes were readily available.
It was so different from a room able to enjoy the sunrise and sunset from the deck of the boat.
Lovely time and a revisit is definitely on the todo list !!!!
If undecided do it it's great!!!
We were able to check in early and had an incredible stay. Really nice living area and shower. Champagne and bread upon arrival were a really nice touch.
Es war einfach wunderbar! Amsterdam und das Hausboot erleben zu dürfen.

This was above expectations. Very clean with welcoming wine and food! Highly recommended if you have a special celebration. Close to all amenities and public transport, which is important if you are unable to cycle. Loads of information provided, on Netherlands as well as local maps. Would highly recommend!!!!

Awesome place to stay in Amsterdam!! Would absolutely stay here again!  So fun to be on the boat! It is a little tricky getting maneuvering up/down the boat so make sure you're comfortable with that. The restaurant that was suggested, Restaurant Bak, right next door was amazing!! Can't recommend this place enough!  They even left us amazing food/snacks for our trip!
Traumhafte Unterkunft, nette Gastgeber und eine wunderschöne Stadt. Wir kommen auf jeden Fall noch einmal!

Thanks to staying on the beautiful, modern boat, my business trip experience was unique and more than great. The place has all the necessery facilities, it was clean and quiet for work/rest after a long day. I highly recommend it for leisure and business travellers.

Sonja's houseboat is incredible! The pictures dont do its justice. The room is very cozy, clean and modern. Sonja was such a superhost, she was extremely accomdating and even provided us with food and drinks! Literally 15 mins away from centraal amsterdam and bus stop is right around the corner. This is a must stay in amsterdam! Such a wonderful way to experience dutch life!

Sonja’s house boat is amazing!!! We were blown away on the accommodations she provided and the elegance of the boat. Even better than the pictures she posted. It definitely made our trip! We felt like a true local and the use of the bikes were clutch! If you are thinking about staying in Amsterdam this is definitley the way to go!

Amazing house boat! Perfect for a couple. The bikes are included and made it super easy to get around Amsterdam. The boat is also an easy walk to the bus or tram stops. Sonja is so thoughtful to leave wine, bread, cheese, grapes, and coffee. Wonderful stay, highly recommend!

The boat is in a great location close to City, bus and tram routes. It has fantastic amenities (fridge, microwave, kettle toaster etc) so you could be self contained. It is a great experience to be on  a boat overlooking the docklands of Amsterdam, the bikes were a bonus too!
Great boat. Great spot. Easy to get around and pretty close to transit. Well worth it!
Simply the best Air Bnb experience so far! We‘ll come back!
Un séjour atypique sur une péniche idéalement aménagée. Sonja avait préparé plein de petites attentions vraiment très agréables. Nous n'avons rencontré aucun désagrément, tout était parfait.

If you want an amazing experience of Amsterdam this really ticks all the boxes. From huge variety’s of coffee, to traditional breakfast and the use of bikes to get around on not to mention an encredible boat, it has all and more! Ideally located on the edge of Amsterdam making for a quiet nights sleep but an easy trip on the bikes to the centre (10mins max). You’re really looked after from the moment you sign up. 10 out of 10. We’ll definitely be back !!!!!!

The Tasmania is an unbelievably cozy, relaxing retreat after long days of exploring Amsterdam. We immediately felt at home, thanks in part to a thoughtfully stocked fridge including delicious bread, cheese, and bubbles! Coming and going was very convenient and private, whether by bus or Uber. A highlight was taking the bikes on the ferry to Amsterdam-Noord, where we visited the EYE Film Institute and Café ONS – a perfect afternoon. Such a unique and ideal Airbnb experience!

This place is incredible and Sonja & Michael were so nice! The boat is very clean & modern, and the heated floors were a nice touch with the cold November weather. The place is not far from Amsterdam Centraal, but should you take a taxi or Uber, know that you can be dropped off on the main street and then take one of several alleys straight back to the pier b/c our driver didn’t know.

After already a wonderful first stay on Sonja´s houseboat we decided to come back to Amsterdam for a relaxing weekend in Amsterdam during the festival of lights this winter. You have everything you need from coffee in the morning to a clean bathroom, a very comfortable bed with seeing the sky above you though the window when you wake up and just a great location. Only a 20minute walk until you reach the Prinsengracht. Tasty locations to eat you can have in 5-10 minutes walk. And the best is just this boat after a long day out with its relaxing atmosphere. Highly recommended!

Fantastic! Lovely hosts. Very clean and thoughtfully presented. Lots of lovely extra touches (flowers, breakfast, tea, coffee and prosecco in the fridge), a great base to explore Amsterdam and wonderful experience. Super comfy bed, nice hot shower and peaceful area.

A fabulous and unique way to stay in Amsterdam! The studio is stylish and has a mini kitchen and 10 mins walk to Haarlemstraat. A great neighbourhood vibe with cafes and restaurants nearby. Don't miss Worst charcuterie nearby. Love Amsterdam! Can't wait to go back! Sonja was friendly and gave us great travel tips as well. Thank you!

Sejour merveilleux ce bateau est un petit bijoux la déco est magnifique.A seulement 10 minutes en vélo du centre ville.L'accueil est top avec plein de petite attention (pain frais-confiture maison-jus d'orange...)Je recommande cet endroi.

Buiten was het erg koud, maar binnen merkte je daar niets van. Een goede vloerverwarming, een volle koelkast en een heerlijk warm bed met uitzicht op de televisie. En 's ochtends zagen we de reflecties van het water op het plafond. Heel sprookjesachtig!

Sonja, bedankt voor de hartelijke ontvangst!

Peter en Servane
Amazing place to stay, such a different experience of airbnb! So cosy and very homely, was nice to come back to in the cold and windy evenings! Thankyou Sonja!

I decided to take my 13 year old son away for the weekend to Amsterdam.
The main reason for our stay was to visit Anne Frank Huis, which was an emotional time but so thought provoking.
I was looking for a place to stay when I came across this spectacular house boat, I messaged Sonja through Airb&b & got a very speedy response!
Sonja messaged me all the information I required which helped me with my planning & itinerary for the whole weekend.
I worried a little about not speaking any Dutch, however there was no need as Sonja’s response was in excellent English!
We arrived late on the Friday night & Sonja gave us a very warm welcome, along with soft drinks & milk in the fridge, a fresh loaf of bread for breakfast the next morning & even fresh tulips in the studio!
Having the coffee machine was also perfect & just what was needed after our flight.
The studio was warm & welcoming with clean white bedding & clean towels in the bathroom!
We used the 2 bicycles provided to get around the city, which were an absolute bonus, we used these everyday.
We had an amazing experience staying on Tasmania & look forward to returning in the summer.
I would highly recommend booking Tasmania, as you can see we had absolutely no complaints & had the most memorable times.

Purtroppo nei giorni del nostro soggiorno il nostro host era fuori Amsterdam, quindi non lo abbiamo potuto conoscere personalmente. L'accoglienza, curata da un'amica dell'host, é stata comunque perfetta: puntuale, molto cordiale e attenta a presentare bene l'appartamento e fornirci utili informazioni per la nostra visita ad Amsterdam. L'host ci ha poi contattato piú volte per e-mail per sapere se era tutto ok.
La posizione dell'appartamento é ottima, a
5-6 minuti dalla stazione centrale (quindi molto comoda per eventuali escursioni fuori cittá) e pochi di piú per Il centro cittá. Nei nostri 5 giorni di soggiorno ci siamo sempre spostati a piedi. La zona dove si trova l'appartamento è tra le piú belle di tutta la cittá. Le foto sono molto fedeli, la casa é ampia, accogliente, pulita e perfettamente attrezzata. L'unico punto critico è rappresentato dalle scale ripidissime (si tratta però di una caratteristica tipica di moltissime abitazioni del centro storico di Amsterdam), che rendono piuttosto scomodo lo spostamento dei bagagli e possono rappresentare un impedimento grave per persone con problemi di deambulazione).

We were a party of 5 (2 adults and 3children aged 10-13). House was clean upon arrival and perfectly situated for exploring Amsterdam. The hosts were extremely welcoming and had great suggestions tailored to our group. We hope to return!

My family of five really enjoyed our stay in this apt.  The location was very good, only about a 15 minute walk from the station and close to shops and restaurants.  The apt was very clean, modern, and well equipped, beds comfortable.  Joanna and MP were great hosts - very friendly and willing to answer questions as well as provide recommendations.
Très bel appartement dans un quartier idéalement placé. Très bon accueil et serviabilité de l'hôte. Impeccable pour un séjour d'un bon nombre de voyageurs.
Rien à redire, c’était parfait, calme et à deux pas du centre.

Sonja, eine super nette Gastgeberin, hat uns einen unvergesslichen Aufenthalt auf ihrem Hausboot, der Inbegriff für Amsterdam, neben der Vielzahl an Museen, den Kanälen und den Grachtenhäuser, dem Bier und natürlich auch dem Rotlichtviertel, ermöglicht. Es war wunderbar. Der Kühlschrank war befüllt mit Bier, Sekt, Käse, Yoghurt und Brot war vorhanden. Das Zimmer war sauber und sogar mit frischen Blumen dekoriert. Für die kalten Nächte hat uns Sonja sogar eine zusätzliche Heizung zur Verfügung gestellt. Es hat uns an nichts gefehlt.

Kleiner Tipp für jene die mit dem Auto anreisen: Nutzt das Park&Ride Angebot: super einfach und für 4 Euro für 4 Tage echt günstig (liest euch aber erst den Flyer durch, wie ihr genau vorgehen musst um den vergünstigen Tarif zu erhalten (Website hidden by Airbnb) Gratis parken könnt ihr auf der Nordseite (ist aber oftmals überfüllt) und mit der kostenlosen Fähre schippert ihr dann nach Amsterdam.

Absolutely amazing host, went above and beyond to make sure our stay was extra special. The Tasmania is beautiful, spotlessly clean and has everything you need to feel right at home, it exceeded any expectations I had. Loved the free use of the bikes during our stay it allowed us to see so much of the city. Would recommend 100%.
Great hosts, but at the same time the room felt so private and was lovely and quiet in a relaxed part of the city.
Can’t wait to return!

Thank you Sonja for a lovely 2 night stay. We visited Amsterdam as a present for my partner’s birthday, so I wanted it to be extra special - staying on a boat ticked that box! The space is so unique and I’m so glad we chose it over a hotel. Sonja left us a great choice of snacks and breakfast items and the coffee machine was well-used! She also gave us loads of tips for things to see in the city and the use of the bikes is a nice additional touch (although the weather was amazing so we walked everywhere). It’s about 15 minutes walk from the train station and easy to find, there’s a bus that stops nearby as well if needed. Thank you for a lovely stay 😊
Le séjour s’est très bien passé, bateau très bien équipé et situé, je recommande!
great place!
Der Aufenthalt war sehr angenehm. Alles war ausgezeichnet von Kommunikation bis Sauberkeit. So einen Aufenthalt wünscht man sich überall :)

The boat is very cozy and beatiful. It was a unique experience to stay there. The bed was very comfortable, place was clean and bathroom was very nice. Towels, shampoo, conditioner and shower gel and even bathrobes were provided too. We also got welcome wine 🥰
I would recomment this to everyone!
Peter is simply the Best 💪🏼💪🏼💪🏼

Dieses Boot ist einen Aufenthalt auf jeden Fall wert, sehr ruhig gelegen und doch mitten in der Innenstadt.
Gegenüber des Boots ist ein kleiner Park, der die Atmosphäre sehr positiv bereichert. Man hat das Gefühl mitten in der Stadt und mitten in der Natur zu sein.
Der Ablauf mit den Gastgebern lief reibungslos und sehr freundlich.
Kaffe, Tee, Mikrowelle, Kühlschrank usw. stehen kostenlos zur Verfügung.

Ich würde immer wieder hier buchen und übernachten, tolle Erfahrung! 😊

Die Unterkunft ist klein aber großartig. Es war meine erste Hausboot Übernachtung und ich kann es jedem empfehlen. Super Lage zur Stadt und eine super schöne Umgebung. Ich würde immer wieder kommen und dort schlafen.
Gewoon doen altijd goed !

Wat een mooie plek !! Heel dicht bij het centrum maar toch rustig met een heerlijk parkje tegenover de boot waar toch genoeg te zien valt.
De boot was keurig schoon en alles wat je nodig hebt voor een prettig verblijf is er te vinden. Wij komen zeker nog eens terug.
Amazing! Perfect location and unique experience :)
very nice boat small fine and well equipped for a weekend in amsterdam. Peter is a very personable and friendly host who always has a good tip.
A lovely, unique place to spend some time in Amsterdam. The treats waiting for us were much appreciated!
Peter and Jeroen were very nice. Easy-going and kind. Also the boat was super cute and very clean. Would definitely recommend!
Top locatie, heerlijk plekje! Bijzonder om is op een boot te slapen. Peter reageert snel op je berichten en houdt zich netjes aan de afspreken. Echt heel fijn. Zou deze plek zeker aanraden.
Top locatie, heerlijk rustig en zoveel te doen in de buurt. Echt een aanrader.

Wir hatten einen wunderschönen Aufenthalt auf einem sehr idyllisch gelegenem Hausboot und können alle positiven Bewertungen nur bestätigen.
Danke für die schöne Zeit.
Ganz wundervolle Unterkunft sehr nette, lockere Gastgeber, top Kommunikation und sehr nette und ruhige Atmosphäre. Definitiv zu empfehlen!

schickes tolle Unterkunft für 2. Zentrale Lage und trotzdem total ruhig.
sehr nette Gastgeber

Alles war super! Das Boot ist sehr gemütlich und bietet alles, was man für einen Aufenthalt braucht. Kommen gerne wieder!
Danke

We had great time on Peter's place. Everything was perfect and the view on  the terrace was perfect with the park in front and the boats passing by, also the flowers and lamps and the purity of the place.
Een echte aanrader om te overnachten op deze unieke locatie! Sfeervol, gastvrij en dichtbij het centrum.
Weiter zu empfehlen

Eine wirklich außergewöhnliche Unterkunft! Super schön in einer wundervollen Umgebung.
Das nächste Mal bleiben wir auf jeden Fall länger!
Danke Peter!
Great stay and perfect Location!!
État de propreté irréprochable et conforme à la description, très calme
A very nice place to stay ! It is well-located, very cozy and clean, and Peter is always available to help if necessary.

Alles bestens!
Sehr gute Lage, netter Host und super Unterkunft!
Kann ich nur empfehlen.
Very nice place, well situated !
Tolle Lage, originelle Unterkunft, unkomplizierter und sehr freundlicher Kontakt.

Peter’s place is absolutely amazing, cannot recommend enough! If you want a unique Amsterdam experience Peter’s boat is perfect. Very clean, cozy, a wonderful terrace with views, and everything you could need for an amazing stay in Amsterdam.
Very nice , we had a lovely time ! I recommend !!
Un séjour inoubliable... Tout est parfait et très propre. Péniche très bien situé

wir waren eine Woche auf diesem fantastischen , mit viel Liebe eingerichteten Hausboot . Peter und sein Partner sind sehr nett und aufmerksam ! Es gab einen Begrüssungskorb und Kaffee war auch immer genug da.
In das Hausboot und unsere Unterkunft haben wir uns richtig verliebt! Es ist alles vorhanden was man für einen schönen Urlaub benötigt .
Die Lage ist perfekt . Mitten in der Natur und doch ist man schnell im Zentrum . Die nächste Tram ist nur ca. 3 Minuten entfernt . Man kann aber auch alles schnell zu Fuß erreichen ! Und es gibt viele Restaurants und alles was man benötigt , direkt „um die Ecke“. Es hat uns zu 100% gefallen und wir werden es ganz bestimmt nochmals buchen ! Nochmals Danke an die netten Gastgeber , wir haben uns bei euch „zu Hause“ gefühlt !
Lovely stay.
Perfect gesitueerd in een rustig gedeelte van de stad. Heel centraal en een gunstige loopafstand naar oa de Kalverstraat en de Dam. Ook Carré en Opera mooi dichtbij.
Well located, perfect for having a drink outside or on the boat. Peter is an irreproachable host !!
Lovely apartment in great location. Hosts welcoming and very helpful. Amsterdam is great
Joanna是非常贴心的房东，可以提前帮我们寄存行李，按要求准备好床铺，还在家里准备好了一切你需要的用品，并提供很多游览咨询。公寓的位置非常好，离火车站很近，去景点很方便。唯一不便之处是房子的楼梯很陡，上下搬行李不方便！

Unieke superleuke ervaring op een toplocatie! Genoten van een wijntje op ons priveterrasje. Gastvrije host, rustige omgeving, maar toch in het centrum. Leuke zaakjes op loopafstand. Echt een aanrader.

Very lovely place! Exactly like on the pictures, cute and sweet place to rest. The area around is quiet and green and also his red kitty comes by to say hello :). Just a few minutes to walk to the center. Perfect stay, we‘ll definitely come back on our next trip to Amsterdam :)

Was soll man dazu sagen? Kleine feine Unterkunft bei zwei sehr sympathischen Menschen auf einem alten zum Wohnboot umgebauten Kutter. Idealer Liegeort genau gegenüber vom botanischen Garten. Erholen, prima, Zentru (Hidden by Airbnb) ähe, nah genug und doch etwas entfernt. Einfach perfekt. Wir wollten gar nicht mehr weg.
Absolut schöne erfahrung , vorbehaltlos zu Empfehlen!!!

Description exacte .
Propriétaire a l'écoute , tres gentil, et discret .
On se sent comme chez nous.
Calme, et reposant .
Je conseil fortement

Endroit magnifique emplacement magnifique calme propre accueil chaleureux belle expérience simplement a recommander
Merci Mr Peter pour ce beau séjour
Simplement à recommander ☺️
Als Highlight unseres Urlaubes eine tolle und saubere Unterkunft mit allem was man zur Erholung braucht.
It is a cosy boat with everything you need on board. We enjoyed our stay and the views of the canal.
Séjour inoubliable chez Peter, la péniche est idéalement placée dans un environnement très sympa et calme. L'intérieur est fonctionnel et très confortable
Perfect place. If you want to have something very typical stay here!
zeer goede locatie en uitvalsbasis om Amsterdam te bezoeken

Un très bon lieu pour pas cher.
Je le recommande

Der Aufenthalt auf dem Hausboot von Peter war traumhaft schön. Das Boot bietet Platz für zwei Personen und enthält alles, was man braucht. Die Lage ist super, so dass man in 30 Min zu Fuß den Hauptbahnhof und in 15 Min den Rembrandtplein erreichen kann. Ein perfekter Ort für einen wunderschönen Städtetrip. Peter war sehr freundlich und unkompliziert und antwortete stets innerhalb kurzer Zeit auf etwaige Anfragen. Absolut zu empfehlen!

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié ce type d hébergement original idéalement situé dans la ville. Fonctionnalité ; décoration cocoon ; gentillesse des hôtes.  Tout était parfait pour passé un très agréable sejour

Le bateau de Peter est parfaitement situé dans un quartier calme, et très proche du centre ville ! Les petites attentions et le charme du logement ont suffit à nous faire passer un excellent week-end.
Très chouette endroit

Our stay on the Boat was wonderful. So cosy and with beautiful lights on the captain's deck. The hosts were very friendly and decent and the cat as well.
We would love to come back!

How can I start? This boat house is a dream! It was the best decision to spend here our last night in Amsterdam. Everything was very clean. The bed is super comfortable and warm. They also provided us with Teas, hot chocolate and a nice basket with Stoppwaffel! A wonderful experience that we would recommend everybody.
Thank you Peter and husband! You were very kind to us!
Hope to see you soon again!
Ein tolles Hausboot mitten in Amsterdam, das liebevoll und gemütlich eingerichtet ist. Die Zeit auf Peters Hausboot kann man einfach nur genießen.
Very nice, great feeling and lovely hosts. Sadly the kitchen is not usable :(

Für uns war es das erste mal auf einem Hausboot zu übernachten. Es hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Das Boot war sehr sauber und mit allen Dingen die benötigt wurden liebevoll ausgestattet. Wir haben gut geschlafen. Die la ge ist ausgezeichnet. Etwas mehr als 10 Minuten Fußweg und man ist direkt im Zentrum von Amsterdam. Um die Ecke gab es mehrere tolle Lokalitäten. Ganz klare Empfehlung.

In einem Hausboot zu übernachten, passt perfekt zu einer Reise nach Amsterdam! Es war gemütlich, grade weil ein Boot auch eher klein ist. Aber man hat ein Bad, Licht und eine kleine Küche mit Wasserkocher und Kühlschrank.
Man ist zu Fuß in ca. 15 Minuten in der Innenstadt.

Uns hat es gut gefallen und ich kann Peters Unterkunft absolut empfehlen!
Danke! :-)
Really friendly host! Great location and a special experiance. We were looked after very well. Champagne and bicylces were spectacular! Thanks!
Great location and host; the bikes were really useful for getting around the city and the studio was a lovely space to come back to at the end of a day out

Just an incredible place. By far one of the best Airbnb spots I’ve ever stayed. Can’t recommend this highly enough. Sonja is a brilliant host and the boat is spectacular. We’ll definitely be returning for our next visit to Amsterdam.
Clean and big apartment in great neighbourhood. Host was very helpfull. Could stay here again!
The host spent time with us when we arrived.

Our stay at the Multatuli residence was amazing. Joanna and MP were indeed super hosts, offering tips and recommendations to help us immerse in the Amsterdam culture. The location is great for sightseeing, as many attractions are nearby or have direct public transport connections. The apartment is beautifully decorated and the ambiance of the neighbourhood gives you a true local's experience. The kitchen is fully equipped, so having breakfast before setting out to explore is not a problem. We travelled in a group of 6 and found the Multatuli apartment to be the perfect choice for visiting Amsterdam with friends. We stayed only a couple of days, but wished we could have prolonged our trip a little longer. Thank you, Joanna and MP, for all the support and a great experience!
We had a great stay at Joanna's apartment. She met us when we arrived and gave us good tips about the city. The apartment was very nice, clean and spacious! Thank you so much for a great stay!

We've been in Amsterdam with the family for 5 days and we had a great time in Joannas Apartment!!! Joanna was very nice, everything was very clean, the kitchen equipment was perfect and we loved the location! We really felt at home there! I would definitely book it again ;-)

Magnifique maison dans le plus beau quartier de la ville.
Joanna nous a reçu avec beaucoup de gentillesse (et parle un excellent français !)
Sur ces conseils, nous avons testé le restaurant BelHamel situé à 2 pas, ce fut un excellent choix.

Je recommande cette location sans hésitation et espère pouvoir y revenir bientôt

We loved the apartment and the opportunity to enjoy an authentic Amsterdam experience. Joanna provided fantastic tips of things to do, see and eat. The apartment was well appointed and stocked, and extremely clean. Location was brilliant.

We have just returned from a wonderful long weekend in Amsterdam, staying in the Multatuli Apartment. Our host Joanna went out of her way to ensure that everything was just right for our arrival, and during our stay. The apartment is stunning, extremely well located, very comfortable and well equipped. It was great to experience staying in a Dutch city apartment, with wonderful big windows and very steep stairs, in a vibrant street and be able to feel that we had experienced a bit of the true life of Amsterdam.  We spent our days exploring this wonderful and city, and in the evenings, with Joanna's advice, we ate at some really delicious and unusual restaurants. I would highly recommend staying in this stunning apartment.

In my opinion Sonja’s space is gorgeous. It’s no surprise that it has been featured in several magazines. There were some beautiful flowers in the room when we arrived. We really appreciated the kitchen area and Sonja provided us with some breakfast things. There is a supermarket a 10 minute walk away. You can take a short bus ride to Central Station or even walk it in about 15 minutes. There is also a tram that heads south and Sonja has two bikes she will lend you. She helpfully provides guide books and umbrellas, as well as a booklet full of information. I contacted her several times on the visit and she got back to me right away. On our last night we could hear a concert going on at a local wharf since it was Easter Saturday. It didn’t bother us as we have noise canceling headphones. If it’s the kind of thing that bothers you then you should inquire about the concert schedule. The rest of the time the boat was really peaceful. I would definitely go back to Sonja’s. Staying at the Tasmania made our trip feel very special.
Die Lage von dem Hausboot,die Liebe zum Detail besonders in der Ausstattung  war bemerkenswert.
Geweldig !  Goede tips om Amsterdam te beleven

A fantastic and authentic homebase while in Amsterdam. Place was awesome and all the little touches were great. The 3 Tram is right around the corner but you could easily walk to all tourist or non tourist destinations. I would stay here again in a heartbeat.
Great!

The stay was wonderful and the boat is bigger and prettier in person. The bikes are key as they are great to drive into center city and then park and walk. Strongly recommend for a really cool experience.

This houseboat on the canal was an excellent alternative to a hotel.  It was spacious, clean, comfortable, and within walking distance of Central Station.  The host was friendly and helpful and she had nice amenities waiting for us.
Super schöne Unterkunft! Tolle Gastfreundschaft!

Clean, quiet, scenic location, 25 minute walk (with luggage) from Amsterdam Centraal Station (we're in our 50s). Also 20-25 minute stroll to Jordaan area, Anne Frank house, and another 15-20 minutes from there to Rembrandt House Museum.
So, all of Amsterdam is available on foot (or via one of the 2 bicycles Sonja offered, but which we didn't work up the nerve to use), along with a peaceful nights sleep, while staying on Tasmania.
Clear directions, prompt replies, and a binder with local tips on food and sights, as well as hints that boats make different sounds than hotels which was amusing, but useful for boat newbies.
Would happily stay again.

We had an exceptional time and staying there made our time in AMS truly one of a kind. Thoughtful touches like being very receptive over email and updating us with an earlier than expected check in time, being flexible with the checkout process, and having food on arrival were just the icing on the cake. The place was very clean and we couldn't wait to go home so that we could spend more time on the boat! Watching the sunset over the river was very special. The bikes were also a game changer and allowed us to fully explore the city efficiently. This place is an absolute must-book, don't hesitate!
Amazing house boat. A very special experience in the heart of Amsterdam.
Idéal pour visiter Amsterdam

We had the best experience staying on the Tasmania. The space was beautiful and in a good location. The special touches of fresh flowers, snacks and champagne were much appreciated! Amsterdam is magnificent and was only enhanced by staying with you. We will definitely be back!
Eine tolle Erfahrung auf einem Hausboot zu wohnen! Danke für diese Erfahrung. Wir hatten eine tolle Zeit!

This place is amazing. If you want a unique air bnb experience, look no further. This was a beautiful boat that is just outside the Amsterdam city center. It's a quick 7 min taxi or bike ( which are provided for free) to city center. And there's many other placed close by to see. Ferry is only 2-3 min away as well.
I received a bottle of wine, grapes and stroopwaffles when I arrived. Communication was great before I arrived. I used the bikes to ride (get lost) all over the city. Why get a boring room when you can stay on a boat?

Highly recommend place to stay.
Great location very peaceful and easy to catch a tram into the city.

Sonja is a welcoming host, with many special touches to the stay. 2 bikes for use were fun, a lovely breakfast for the first morning, coffee machine (for the jet lag!), soap and shampoo, and those wonderful Stroopwafels! Thank you!
Great place to stay - I highly recommend the houseboat. The hosts were lovely! Frequent trams which take you to the centre.

You absolutely cannot go wrong with Sonja's place! Everything about our stay was just lovely. We had plenty of space, and Sonja made it feel like home. We also loved the location. Amsterdam is a fantastic city, but feels very busy in many areas. It was great to experience the city during the day and come back to a quiet, cozy space at night. I would recommend this listing to anyone!

THIS IS THE ONLY PLACE TO STAY WHILE IN AMSTERDAM. Sonja was an extremely gracious host and the place is beautiful. The pictures online do not it justice. The place was clean, spacious, and great location. I hope to stay here again!!
船屋住宿条件很好，不像住在船上，设施很全，房东也准备了很多吃的，水果，酒。晚上沙发躺在甲板上很棒！

Unser Aufenthalt auf der Tasmania war perfekt :-)  Sonja ist eine tolle Gastgeberin, die einem sofort das Gefühl vermittelt, dass man herzlich willkommen ist. Im Kühlschrank warteten einige leckere Überraschungen auf uns, es standen Blumen auf dem Tisch und es war alles blitzsauber. Kurzum: ein Platz zum Wohlfühlen. Darüber hinaus ist die Tasmania ein perfekter Ausgangspunkt, um Amsterdam zu erkunden. Man ist sehr zentral, hat aber trotzdem seine Ruhe in der tollen kleinen Hafenanlage. Vielen Dank, Sonja. Wir kommen gern wieder :-)
Beautiful boat, two bicycles and a kind host. Take a swim and try Pllek nearby :-)

Sonja’s boat is fantastic. A wonderful host, amazing room and she even left us wine, bread and breakfast items.

The boat is on the edge of the city centre. But so easy to get into town on the bikes she provides or via the tram round the corner.

Highly recommended and would stay again no problem.

This boat is wonderful alternative for a hotel room and it was special feature on our amsterdamtrip.
The greeting was very nice and Sonja give us many great tips for our trip. Another nice thing was that she provided us two bikes.
Exceptional hospitality. Great communication. Lovely space. Could not have asked for a better experience.

We loved our stay aboard Tasmania, and it would have been perfectly comfortable for a much longer stay, too.  The apartment is slightly larger than an average hotel room, but Sonja thought of everything to make us feel welcome and comfortable, including snacks, wine, coffee and bicycles.  The apartment is very private and special!

This place is spectacular! We enjoyed every bit of it. The bed is super comfy, there is way more space than it seems from the photos. All the amenities were spot on. Better than most fine hotels. The location was set just outside the main tourist areas so it was easy to come and go and also escape the rif raf. Everything you need is very close by as well! Highly recommend!!

Loved staying on the houseboat!  It was a fun change of pace being out on the water and I loved having access to the bike to ride around the city.  The room was comfortable, well appointed and super cute.  I highly recommend hanging out on the houseboat!  ~Kate
This place was everything and more. They took care of us as if we were family. The bikes were great for use and the overall experience was spectacular.
Wir hatten eine absolut tolle Zeit in Amsterdam in einer wunderschönen Unterkunft!
Amazing place. You have to stay here! Just book it. So happy we did. Thanks Sonja + Michel 😘

If you are staying in Amsterdam we would highly recommend staying on a house boat and would highly recommend Sonja’s houseboat in particular! The location is convenient - close to restaurants and in a quiet and walkable part of the city. The room itself is stylish and clean. Sonja stocked the kitchen area with many complimentary goodies that were so very appreciated! She is a very nice host - a quick and thorough communicator. Our visit in Amsterdam was great and staying in the houseboat was a significant part.

A beautiful boat. Sonja and Micheal were friendly and helpful, very flexible, and not at all nosy or intrusive. Amenities were all excellent and the boat is beautiful and well furnished, the photos are all 100% accurate. Only downside is the location is a tad out of the way for central Amsterdam and travel links, but don't let that turn you off. It's worth it!

Der Aufenthalt  war großartig! Wir haben so das Gefühl bekommen wie man in Amsterdam richtig lebt! Die Tipps waren großartig und die Unterkunft und die Herzlichkeit total angenehm! Man hat sich willkommen gefühlt und konnte auf dem Boot entspannen! Man erreicht vom Boot aus alles relativ schnell und ist dafür sehr ruhig gelegen! Wellness für die Seele....immer gerne wieder! Danke Euch beiden :)
We were very happy to stay on this beautiful boat, very clean and cosy, all thumbs up!!!! exelent value for money

Beautiful place, spectacular boat, very nice host and very well organized. Sonja told us everything we needed to know about how to get to the place, where to eat and many other details that I wouldn’t have thought of asking myself and helped us a lot.

the boathouse is amazing.  look exactly like the photos.  sonja has provided accurate n prompt info so i can find the place easily.  although theres a lot to explore in ams,  u really should reserve some time to enjoy the boat.
Perfect in every way. Would return here in the near future.

We had an amazing weekend on the Tasmania. Sonja was very flexible with the checking in and out which helped us out a lot. The room is very spacious and the numerous thoughtful touches of leaving us breakfast,snacks and wine went down a treat. Location was great too. A wonderful experience if you are visiting Amsterdam.

Houseboat Tasmania was beautiful.
Sonja had fresh bread,butter,jam,grapes,pringles,beer & bubbles waiting for us when we arrived. Which was lovely.

In the shower room their was shampoo,shower gel,handwash,toilet rolls & a little hairdryer.

There was a map on the table when we arrived which was very helpful too.

It was so peaceful there at Houseboat Tasmania..we would definitely recommend it & go back ourselves as we love Amsterdam.

We walked everywhere as Tasmania was not too far from central station & it was a lovely walk if you take it through the side streets. (We used (Hidden by Airbnb) maps on our phone).

We walked back to Sloterdijk P & R as we only had small weekend cases.
We feel this was quicker than getting the bus from Tasmania-Central station-Sloterdijk P&R. It was a very straightforward route. Parking cost €42 from Friday afternoon until Monday morning.

That was an amazing unique experience , with a great location, staying on a boat in a splendid calm place like that was like a dream , Sonja was there , with fine considering caring touches , great hospitality..the bikes she offered me. The welcome drink ,coffees , tea ,fruits ,biscuits , TV with Netflix and YouTube ...the cleanliness
That was a great experience I would like to repeat for sure

This boat is amazing. Could not recommend it enough. You're right in the heart of A'dam and a stones throw away from most major tourist attractions. Nice little park across the canal for relaxing in also.

Super séjour chez peter et jeroen! Hôtes parfaits! Accueil également parfaite avec des petites attentions à l’intérieur de la péniche !
Emplacement également idéal, tout est à proximité pour visiter au mieux Amsterdam ! Ne surtout pas hésiter à réserver
Very nice place really near the center of Amsterdam. Pretty room on a pretty boat. I recommand.

The coziest place I've ever stayed at!  It's also just a few kilometers at most away from anywhere we went so it was no issue walking, which allowed us to see a lot of the city. I've you want a great and central stay, this is it.
Bien placé, très propre et cadre idyllique.
Super angenehmer Gastgeber, wunderschönes Hausboot zentral gelegen und trotzdem im Grünen. Es ist an alles gedacht und hat seinen eigenen gemütlichen Charme. Aufjedenfall empfehlenswert
Der Aufenthalt bei Peter war sehr angenehm. Das Hausboot hat alles was man braucht. Der Standort ist perfekt, ruhig aber dennoch zentral. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
Super endroit! D’une propreté exemplaire, super deco et tout le nécessaire. A deux minutes du tram. Quartier très calme et lit très confortable! Je recommande vraiment cette adresse!
Prachtige lokatie, mochten bagage laten staan en eind van de dag ophalen.
Logement au top ! Super séjour

It was very lovely to stay on a boat in Amsterdam, because what’s more Dutch than staying on a boat on a canal in Amsterdam? The view from the boat is wonderful, I would definitely book it again just to sit on the deck and to enjoy the boat life for a bit! The whole experience was great and clearly Peter has thought about how to make his guests feel at home. The place was very clean. Overall I would recommend this place to anyone who wants to stay at a unique place in Amsterdam, it made our experience unique indeed.

Absolut beautiful renovated Boat at a perfect Spot.
Super Clean and comfortable!
Peter and his Husband were very friendly and helpful, the cute red Cat is very sweet.
Cosy clean Bed, all in the Kitchen you need and a luxury Bathroom! Amazing stay! Thank you!
Le logement est très bien situé, très propre. La literie est excellente. Je recommande !
Lovely tiny and quiet place!
Thank you Peter for a great stay! I’ll come back again.
Perfect, the accommodation is really nice and near the center !! It was a pleasure to sleep there
Lovely place near the center of Amsterdam, even though very quite and peaceful, has everything you need. Peter is very helpful and always available to answer any questions!
Really charming boat and a great host, a unique experience!
This was one of the most unique places where I have been! There is no better way to experience Amsterdam with this Airbnb :)
Very nice accommodation with very good location! Absolutely recommend it!
Amazing stylish boat, clean and comfortable, very convenient location within walking distance from Amsterdam Centraal Station.

Een knusse, unieke locatie midden in de stad. Centraal gelegen, maar op een plek die zich volledig lijkt te onttrekken aan alle drukte. Leuk uitzicht vanuit de stuurhut, vriendelijke gastheren, kortom: de perfecte uitvalsbasis voor een weekend Amsterdam!

La casa es fantástica, las camas super cómodas, la decoración muy bonita.
El pequeño inconveniente eran las escaleras de acceso, demasiado empinadas. Por lo demás la estancia ha sido muy agradable y Joanna muy buena anfitriona, ayudando en todo lo necesario.

Joanna was very welcoming. The apartment is in a great location, 7 minutes walk from the Central Station. It is really well kept and looks fabulous. Everything was fine and I would definitely recommend to others.

Very welcoming host, beautiful and spacious flat, well equipped.
Located in the most charming part of Amsterdam.

We were a group of 5, and it still felt big and spacious, very clean and neat as well, would love to come back, and recommend anybody to book this flat.

We had a busy time in Amsterdam and the Flat was really fantastic. It's in a great location, 10 mins from the station, 10 mins from Anne Frank Museum and in a lovely neighbourhood with lots of good places to eat and shop. Great small supermarket (Markt) 2 mins around corner..
In terms of accommodation - we were 6 all together and it was perfect - very light and airy and great kitchen and table if you choose to cook and eat in. Beds super comfy (from Oscar (14)). Great living room to put feet up after a long day of culture. Everything immaculate. Joanna's restuarant recommendations also great and accurate. Brilliant first Air BnB experience for us as a family + granny (who was super impressed too). We will be back!
The house was spotlessly clean, fabulously located and very comfortable. The host was extremely helpful and friendly. We had a wonderful three days in Amsterdam. Thank you!

We only stayed one night en route back to London. Apartment was clean, neat and tidy. Bedrooms were very comfortable. Local information was provided and the wifi was fast.

The apartment is perfectly located with a well stocked supermarket around the corner and a wonderful bakery a short walk away.

Communication with Joanne was great as we kept her up to date with our ever changing travel plans.

Will look forward to staying for longer next time.

The listing description was accurate the place was clean, modern, nicely decorated and maintained, comfy beds and pillows, a good kitchen, two bathrooms and lots of useful information. I was there on a reunion with 4 others and we were all very happy to stay there. Shops and cafes/restaurants and supermarkets were easy to get to. Our host, Joanna contacted us before arrival sending helpful information and directions also a useful link showing places of interest on a map with details of how to get there. It was an easy walk from the railway station and Joanna came to see us and filled us in about where we wanted to go and how to get there. The accommodation was on 3 levels and the stairs were steep (like most traditional type houses in Amsterdam) which could be an issue for those with mobility problems but we were fine! ( all of us late 50's) I loved it and would come again. Highly recommended.
I would also like to thank Joanna for all her help when we found ourselves stranded in Amsterdam for two nights longer than expected because of fog at our destination airport. Joanna helped us find alternative accommodation at short notice and saved us a lot of effort and anxiety since all the hotels in Amsterdam at that time had already been booked. So thank you very much Joanna!

Zoek je een plekje om in Amsterdam dicht bij het centrum te overnachten en wil je een bijzondere ervaring erbij meenemen dan zou ik bij Peter op de boot overnachten. Een schattige/romantische woning waarbij je lekker kunt ontbijten vanuit de stuurhut.
Lovely dreamlike stay.
Séjour au top ! Rien à dire, tout était super. Nous avons même prolongé notre séjour à Amsterdam 😉
Great location, a cozy quaint spot for two people

Hartje centrum aan de Nieuwe Keizersgracht ligt deze ontzettend gezellige boot. Het is van alle gemakken voorzien: nette badkamer, fijne slaapplek en een gezellig zitje met uitkijk op de grachten. We komen hier graag eens terug!
Its at the center of Amsterdam and  walking distance from everything! And affordable 😊

Peter is a wonderful host and he has a really unique place to offer. It was clean and quiet. We had an amazing experience living in a vintage boat. The communication with the host was quick and efficient.

Recommended 10/10.

My first trip to Amsterdam was as awesome as it can get. Peter's boat is a fine stay if you like to wander the streets of Amsterdam center.

I give this a 4 star because I couldn't find a way to heat the place from 19-20 celsius to 22 at least.

have fun, enjoy your vibes.
Worth a visit. In the center of the city
Real cool place to stay for a night (or more). Location is superb and Peter is a really friendly and helpful host. The place is small but a really cool experience and definitely a tip for anybody

So nice room!
We can eat dinner next to the canal

Peter and Binkie welcomed us at the door. It was a very efficient introduction, within Covid-19 regulations.

As we entered the captain's cabin, complimentary wine and snacks upon arrival made us immediately get acquainted to this nice place.

The boat in general is a cosy, cute, clean space to have a totally different experience for a couple of nights in the middle of Amsterdam. We wish we could stay longer!

Thanks Peter!
Parfait!

Peter was incredibly flexible with our check-in, which we greatly appreciated!  The location is fantastic, and the place is a uniquely Dutch experience that we would recommend.  Peter was very nice and chatted with us a bit.
Peter a vraiment été un hôte parfait, toujours disponible et vraiment très gentil ! Le logement étais vraiment fidèle à l’annonce et très cosi, Je recommande grandement 😉
Peter is an incredibly accommodating host, with an eye for detail.  Helpful and very attentive.  The accommodation is ideal, peaceful and totally relaxing. I highly recommend.
Fijne locatie en snelle communicatie!
Super aardige en flexibele host. Unieke lokatie en ervaring. Je voelt je gewoon even lokal ipv bezoeker. Alles was netjes en compleet

Wat een super plek! Peter is ontzettend vriendelijk en reageert snel. Top locatie met mooi uitzicht. Alles wat je nodig hebt is aanwezig en de hele er wrong van op een boot slapen is onvergetelijk. Dank je wel!
Peter’s boat is amazing. I totally recommend it to anyone wanting to have a real life Amsterdam experience. Clean, comfortable and beautiful!
Peter’s place is so lovely! The set up is magical and quite comfortable. Peter is a great host. I wish I had more time in Amsterdam.
Prachtige plek om Amsterdam te ontdekken. Door de vele thuisbezorgd opties ook een prima locatie tijdens Corona. We hebben heerlijk gegeten met uitzicht op het water.
Very cosy, romantic, typical boat house. Not big but it has everything you need. Amazing location and atmosphere ! Peter is very reactive and helpful. Highly recommended!
Schommelend op de gracht in slaap vallen in het stille stadscentrum!
Heerlijk knusse plek in het achterschip van een woonboot. Veel leuke eetgelegenheden en musea in de buurt. Peter is attent en denkt graag mee voor een leuke dag in Amsterdam!
Prachtig plek op een perfecte locatie in Amsterdam. Keurig verzorgd, knusse inrichting een mooie detail. Ik zou een overnachting hier aan iedereen aanbevelen.

Heel bijzonder plekje midden in Amsterdam! De glazen kajuit biedt heerlijk uitzicht over het water en de mooie omgeving. En de knusse slaapplek is precies wat je van een woonboot mag verwachten. We komen graag nog een keertje terug!
Ik heb een heerlijke tijd gehad. De boot is gezellig en goed onderhouden. Peter is vriendelijk en reageert snel.
Great place, very clean and cozy!
Slapen op de woonboot van Peter is een aanrader. Peter is een fijne host. De locatie is mooi en ligt centraal.
Very cosy I like it feel very comfortable

Loved our
stay on Peters boat! Super cozy and in a perfect location. Perfect for a weekend getaway :)
Top locatie. Erg knus en gezellig! Voor ons was het een lekker weekendje uit. Even niet thuis zijn tijdens de lockdown. Alles is schoon en heel netjes verzorgt.
Bijzonder slapen op prachtige locatie midden in het centrum van Amsterdam. Netjes, schoon, verzorgd en sleuteloverdracht en communicatie ging perfect. Gaan graag nog een keer terug!
Rustige plek, perfecte uitvalsbasis om Amsterdam (wandelend) te ontdekken. De stuurhut als woonkamer is erg leuk. Bij zonnetje lekker zitten op het dek op om  mensen en bootjes te bekijken.
Everything is good enough. Especially the cleanness. Spent a wonderful day on the boat. Recommend
Beautiful boat house! We had a very relaxing weekend gateway. The boat had all of the amenities. It was very cozy and warm inside the boat. Highly recommended!

Peter is such a wonderful host - really deep connected person. He organised everything amazingly and helped me with local terms (curfew from 21).
The home is truly wonderful - two floors, outdoor seating & nice bathroom & decoration.

Overall I loved the experience of sleeping in the boat and had so much fun there.
Thanks again Peter for sharing your boat with me.
Fantastic place for romantic escape!
Super verblijf gehad! Erg leuke ervaring. Alles was schoon en netjes.

Really nice cozy place, super clean and easy to check-in / out!

Living area is pretty small, which was not obvious from the pictures to me.
Just truly amazing !!
Geweldig nachtjeseg gehad heel erg sfeerfvol!!
Super cozy and nice boat to spend few days in Amsterdam city centre. Excellent attention for the details. The host was super kind and I really recommend his boat for an amazing stay in Amsterdam.
Zeer leuke locatie in het centrum. Knus en lieve attenties bij binnenkomst
Mijn ouders een nachtje weg cadeau gedaan! Ze vonden het super!! Nu moet ik zelf natuurlijk niet achterblijven...

My friend and I stayed on Peters boat for two nights and it was absolutely amazing. The room is nice and clean and it was perfect for the two of us. Peter is a friendly host and the communication went smoothly. Would definitely recommend this place to anyone who is looking for a few nights in Amsterdam. 👍🏼👍🏼
Thank you so much Peter!!

While the space is small, it has everything you need with lovely and thoughtful touches! The view from the private terrace is worth the stay on its own, but bed is super comfy as well. You don't have to worry about the boat moving around, I feel like people might worry about that, but we didn't feel any moment during out whole stay. The shower was roomier than expected, and the bathroom was more spacious than others in Amsterdam!

Leuke ervaring om op een boot te slapen in de grachten van Amsterdam. Het verblijf op de boot is zeer schoon, netjes en leuk ingericht. Helemaal compleet koffietje, thee, wijntje, en een koelkast. Wifi op de boot, restaurantjes om te hoek, supermarkt dichtbij en chillen maar!
Lovely place, it has a cozy and romantic vibe. I would definitely recommend it if you want something different

This place is a gem.  It was even beyond the description and what the pics looked like. So many wonderful added touches.  The bread , cheese, oats, wine and more were all delicious!  All I can say, if this place is available, grab it! Oh, also easy walk from the train station right along the water. LOVED IT!

Amazing houseboat with use of 2 bikes! The bikes were a great way to get around Amsterdam! Lovely touches as well - we got wine and beer in the fridge and some brekkie. Great location too! Even though it rained all weekend we had the best time!
Ein tolles Hausboot in zentraler Lage. Fünf Sterne.
Book you won’t be disappointed amazing boat and lovely hosts

it's better than the pictures  make it out to be, which is crazy because the pictures make it seem amazing!    this was an amazing weekend, in an unforgettable location.   if you want to stumble around the city center at all hours of the night, this might not be your first choice.   however, if you're looking for a beautiful unforgettable experience, you've found it.  the boat is every bit as cool as you'd think.  as a lifelong professional sailor, it wasn't my first choice to spend my vacation sleeping on another ship... (lol)   but this place was immaculately clean, tons of natural light, and amazing amenities.  far enough outside the city center to be quiet and relaxing, bust just a few minutes walk from all the civilization that you may require.   I can't imagine anywhere else I'd want to stay during my next trip to Amsterdam.  if you're unsure a houseboat b&b is for you, just book it.  I promise you won't regret it.

We had an amazing experience staying at Sonja’s boat house. The place is super clean and very cozy. We enjoyed the beautiful roses and a bottle of wine, as well as every morning’s expresso and light breakfast! I had little trouble opening the door when I checked in, Sonja immediately contact neighbor to come help me. I felt extra warm and welcome with their hospitality and thoughtfulness. Highly recommended!!!!! Lovin’ this place!!! Def one of the highlight of our Amsterdam trip!

Auf alle Fälle weiter zu empfehlen, sauber und vor allem sehr freundlich. Ruhiges Quartier und nicht weit zur Stadtmitte. Tierfreundlich (Hund) und in bester Lage zu einem Hundepark.

Wir kommen auf alle Fälle ein zweites Mal, dann aber länger. 😉

It was evident from the moment we stepped foot onto the houseboat why Sonja is rated a super-host! So many special touches and absolutely perfect hospitality. The place was spotless and decorated beautifully. We were greeted with fresh bread, cheese, grapes and champagne, which all accompanied the meats we brought back from Belgium perfectly. It was the absolute best way to end our amazing trip. Nothing bad to say about this little treasure in Amsterdam.

We had a wonderful time staying on this homely and comfortable boat. Sonja gave great tips on attractions and places to eat and use of the bikes made our time in Amsterdam so much easier! highly recommend this stylish and unique place to stay.
Perfect. Just petfect! Don't even think about it... Just book it. 10/10
Lo recomiendo, y sin dudas volvería a hospedarme en el Tazmania.  Sonja es una anfitriona increíble.

This is a great place to stay for a few days checking out Amsterdam! Sonja greeted us on arrival with a warm welcome. She offered a number of recommendations - most importantly the light festival boat tour which I had written off! This was a great way to spend a few hours! The Tasmania, is warm, comfortable and quiet! I highly recommend!

Definitely better than a hotel, made our stay in Amsterdam different and special. We always look for quirky places on Airbnb and this was a great find. Lovely extra touches coffee, fresh bread and the use of bikes was an added bonus.

An experience on House Boat Tasmania is excellent and should not be missed. It’s was gravely floating on the river and being lulled to sleep by the waves and rain drops whispering on the windows. A truly magical location, close to every transport system and easy walk distance to retail heaven in Hallemerbuurt.
Go ahead and make your travel experience complete by taking the Boat, it’s truly worth the awesome experience!
An amazing experience in Amsterdam on a boat! Plus, a beautifully decorated room, friendly hosts, two bikes, a cute cat, and a bottle of red wine... It was perfect

Joanna was wonderful to work with. She even gave us advance notice of possible flight delays coming in to Amsterdam. She was always available if we needed her, but gave us our space while we were in the apartment.

The apartment itself was as advertised; warm, cozy, clean and inviting. There was a very helpful book with lots of information about the neighborhood and recommendations for restaurants, shopping, etc.

The street that the apartment is on is residential and quiet, though only a block from great shopping and more of the city's action. A perfect place!

Superbe accueil de Joanna avec toutes les explications nécessaires permettant de passer un agréable séjour. L'appartement est tout à fait conforme aux photos et à la description faite sur le site. on ne doit venir qu'avec sa valise rien d'autre, tout y est même les essuies de vaisselle, le papier we, les draps de bain, le gel douche ou shampooing.... Le logement se situe à la fois proche du centre (accès rapide à pied 10') et au calme afin de ne pas être ennuyé par les nuisances nocturnes. idéal pour une famille nombreuse ou une escapade entre amis.

My family and I had a great stay. A comfortable apartment in a fantastic neighborhood.  Lots of nice restaurants and bars in the area and a close walk to the train station.  We would absolutely recommended Joanna and her apartment.

If you come to Amsterdam, this is YOUR PLACE TO STAY! Joanna is charming, focused on her customer's needs, knowledgable, and a consummate professional. Her three level apartment is comfortable, well furnished, and PRIVATE. If you want to stay in and cook... you can! If you want to have a few friends stop by... you can!
The location cannot be beat and the neighborhood is outstanding. Convenient to organic shopping, wine, fun distractions. We WILL BE BACK.

Super schönes Appartement mit perfekter zentraler Lage.Alle Zimmer sind geschmackvoll eingerichtet und sehr sauber.Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen.
Viele Grüße aus Potsdam

Joanna was a wonderful host in her stunning apartment in the middle of the city. The apartment is very well suited for the station and many sights. For children, there are toys and DVDs and the kitchen is superbly kitted out. Perfect for a family visit. Or great for friends looking to explore the city.

What an amazing place to stay! Stylish, clean and it has everything you need. Sonja and her husband are super friendly. A lot of equipment to make a good breakfast or lunch is available, and they even filled the fridge for us with some basic ingredients. Also the shower was very lovely. We’ll definitely come back in the future!
Die Unterkunft sieht exakt so aus wie auf den Bildern. Schöne Unterkunft mit guter Lage. Wir würden auf jedenfall nochmals kommen :)

Wir haben den Aufenthalt sehr genossen. Das
Boot liegt zentral, perfekt wenn man mit dem Rad oder zu Fuß die Stadt erkunden möchte!
Sehr freundliche Gastgeberin, welche sich trotz verkehrsbedingter Verspätung alle Zeit für uns genommen hat. Nur zu empfehlen!
Perfekt bis ins Detail.

What a place. Amazing space and amenities for a short stay. The bikes are something you should embrace you can get around so much easier and made the city really accessible. Add on the hidden concert on a houseboat it’s just over the water and made our stay all the better! Thank you again Sonja we can’t wait to come back! Jon & Anna

A great place. Cool and stylish with lots of thoughtful touches from the lovely host including some great breakfast. Nice quiet location but be prepared for a walk or to use the bikes to explore the city (which really is the best way)
Such a fantastic space! A really interesting way to experience Amsterdam - and having access to the bikes was really useful!  Finishing touches and amenities were amazing.  Would highly recommend!

Sonja's Tasmania was nog veel leuker dan we verwacht hadden. Ongelooflijk mooie boot, toffe locatie. Ze had zelfs ontbijt, bubbels en versnaperingen voorzien! Ook stonden er twee fietsen tot onze beschikking, waardoor we heel snel in het midden van het centrum van Amsterdam stonden. We hebben zalig kunnen genieten van ons verblijf in Amsterdam! Een echte aanrader

Sooo nice! Amenity was great and we had a good experience in houseboat! This boat's host, Sonja, was so friendly and kind to us.
We also enjoyed cycling to Zaanse Schans by bikes which she lent.
Location was also greate! There are many good restaurants and there is no doubt in her recommendation. And we can arrive ferry station in 5 minute.

We had a great stay on the houseboat.  The accommodations were outstanding.  Location was very close to public transportation and walkable to the center city.  Especially liked all the little things that Sonja provided like beverages, snacks, etc.  Would definitely stay here again.

We had such a special stay on Sonja's fantastic boat. The boat is truly beautiful and the space so well designed and thought out. Sonja's touches (bubbles, coffee pods, delicious fresh bread, yoghurts and cheese etc) made the place so homely. The bikes available are a real plus. We were only able to stay one night, but Sonja was so flexible and understanding when we had to cancel our second night. We will most definitely be back! Thank you Sonja x
Amazing boat, great welcome, lovely finishing touches... would 110% recommend to anyone! Cosy and truly an experience in itself.

We loved this place too much! I makes us want a house boat now lol. Sonja is an excellent host and gave us everything we needed and more. We ate at a few of her suggestions for restaurants and each one was amazing. She really gives great tips!

If you're debating it, just stay here is beyond worth it! It looks even more beautiful in person.

The Tasmania is ultra neat. The studio itself is spacious, spotless, and sunny. Sonja is an amazing host. She thought of everything! So many local tips, bikes to use, a loaded Nespresso machine. The fresh bread/cheese/etc kept us fueled up the whole time.
As far as location goes, it can’t be beat. So quiet at night, but close enough to the action. It’s a lovely walk to the center, and right by the ferry.
Treat yo self. Book the boat.

Thank you Sonja! Our stay was SO lovely!Extra special touches in our studio on the boat like fresh bread,jam and butter.. beers,milk and wine in the fridge. Super helpful booklet made for us with taxi numbers and maps inside & all the info we needed about our stay! The Tasmania itself was BEAUTIFUL! So clean and modern. Pretty inside and out. The circle windows made for rays of sunlight to peak into our room in the morning! Although we were only in the studio, she gave us the most privacy you would get in an average hotel room. Lock on our door and a separate entrance/exit. Not too far from all the good stuff in the centre - definitely worth the travel :) 10/10 would stay again ...

Sonja's house boat is so beautiful! It was our favorite place to stay the whole trip - her personal touches were so thoughtful, the room was plenty spacious, and we really enjoyed staying on a boat in the water while in Amsterdam. We really got the whole experience and would recommend this place to everyone - would definitely stay here again if we return.
Лучшего хозяина и не придумать!)

Sonja and Michael were excellent hosts. Staying on the houseboat was a great experience and much better than a regular hotel!
