The accommodation was faultless, clean and beautiful. Very nice touches with flowers and foods provided.

We would not hesitate to stay again when in Amsterdam and would highly recommend.
Dormire in barca è stata un’esperienza unica. L’arredamento moderno e ricercato. Un po’ distante dal centro ma in un paese così bello un giro in bicicletta si fa più che volentieri. Consigliato
Very nice House boat very well located in Amsterdam only 10 minutes walk from the city center. The studio is ver well equipped, and the owners very attentive to their hosts.

Peter is een superhost voor een uniek verblijf in het centrum van amsterdam. Een toplocatie op een schip dat erg schoon en netjes is. Peter reageert erg snel een heeft z’n zaakjes voor de Airbnb goed voor elkaar. Gastvrij ontvangen en daarna volop kunnen genieten van de overnachtingen op deze woonboot!
fijne en schone boot! goed bereikbaar en prachtig uitzicht. Midden in Amsterdam maar heerlijk rustig geslapen. We komen zeker eens terug! :)
Uitstekend verblijf, schoon, gezellig, helemaal leuk!
Heel gaaf verblijf, midden in de stad. Leuk om iemand te verrassen op een bijzondere plek!
Helemaal super!
Super nice host and accommodation. Everything was perfect! Location couldn’t be better! Great experience to be sleeping on the boat.

Heerlijk knus kamertje op een mooi woonschip! Attente verhuurder & alles was erg netjes bij aankomst. Ook het welkomstmandje was leuk samengesteld! Zeker de moeite waard als je een dagje amsterdam zou willen doen!

Echt een super leuke plek, midden in Amsterdam. De boot ligt naast een park en aan het einde van de middag zaten we heerlijk in het zonnetje met een mooi uitzicht. Het inchecken was super makkelijk. Ondanks dat het midden in Amsterdam zit hadden was het een heerlijk rustig plekje. Echt een aanrader voor als je op een unieke plek wilt slapen!
Great experience to the city from a different perspective! Located in a nice a green area :)

Original, belle vue, super calme.
Peter est un hôte réactif
Geweldig centrale locatie en toch heerlijk rustig! Goed eten om de hoek!

Joanna's home was like a home away from home. Centrally located next to one of the hottest shopping streets in all of Amsterdam, you will find that everything you could hope to see, is within a short walk. The home itself is absolutely gorgeous. The beds are super comfortable, and the kitchen has everything one would need to prepare just about anything. Joanna was a perfect host, and provided a long list of recommendations for the surrounding area, which was amazing. We slept 7 people in the home, very comfortably. We'd highly recommend staying with in Joanna's home, if you're looking to stay in Amsterdam.

Sensational location and perfectly authentic Amsterdam feel over multiple levels. We loved the proximity to great restaurants and the Saturday market as well as all forms of transport. House was a lot of fun with the bedrooms working well with a number of people. Loved the loft area as well. Logistics were perfect as well with our hosts being available on arrival and departure and throughout as well.
Perfect location. Beautiful apartment with everything you could possibly need. Very helpful and welcoming hosts. Highly recommend!

everything was perfect, Joanna very charming and the flat super nice. We were all very happy in this place.
we wish to come again.
angélique

The was the best experience with Airbnb yet.  Joanna was fabulous!  We were going to Amsterdam for the Christmas holiday - she helped make restaurant reservations, ordered meat ahead for us, helped us get a Christmas tree, shopping recommendations, etc. etc.  When I needed extra cooking equipment, she brought it up right away.  She went totally out of her way to make us comfortable!  And, the location of the apartment couldn't have been better.  The best shopping and restaurants in Amsterdam.  Museums a short walk away.  Plus, the unit was by far the best we have stayed in.  It was exactly like the pictures ... so clean and beautiful.  The perfect size for 7 adults.  Bedrooms had plenty of space, the bathrooms were large and so clean.  We couldn't have asked for more!!  We will definitely be back.

We had a really lovely time at Multatuli. The apartment is what is says it is, airy, warm and relaxing. We loved it. The access staircases took us by surprise, but once we had conquered the 'North Face' ascent we roared with excitement and thoroughly enjoyed our time.

Multatuli is in a hip and trendy area, we developed a particular attraction to Vinnies, a very friendly and tasty cafe within 5 minutes walk.

Perfect location in an historic building but with all the modern amenities.  Living there for five days gave us a small feeling of what it must be like to live in one of the amazing canal houses in Amsterdam.  We are a family of five and there was plenty of room for all of us. The beds were comfortable, linens high quality, kitchen fully appointed and the living area very elegant. Just be aware that to access the apartment you have to go up very steep and narrow staircases.  It was not an issue for us.

Joanna
We enjoyed staying in the apartment. It was very comfortable, clean, in a great position to walk all over Amsterdam. You were very nice and a great hospitality person
I am for sure going to recommend all my friends to stay over and when I will come back to Amsterdam, I definitely want to be in the apartment again
Thanks a lot

Thank you Joanna for a wonderful stay. The apartment is beautiful and exceeded our expectations. The beds and linens are amazing and the well stocked kitchen made us feel very at home. If my friends and ever get the opportunity to return to Amsterdam you can be sure you will be the first person we contact ;) we loved your city and its people and could not have asked for a more relaxing vacation!
Thanks...Kelly, Rita, Alice and Krista

Bon acceuil de johanna qui parle très bien le français ce qui a facilité le contact ! Appartement superbe dans une maison ancienne qui a beaucoup de charme ! Ce quartier d'Amsterdam donne envie d'y passer du temps !

Everything was just as you would wish. A really nice apartment in a great area and just 5 minutes from the main rail station.

The apartment was well furnished and equipped. All we needed to buy to eat could be found within a few minutes walk of the apartment and the food shops were excellent.

Everyone we met was friendly and helpful and the bars were superb.

Further visits are required to do justice to the museums.
We enjoyed the staying in the house with almost two centuries. Parking city center walking 7 mins with many Restaurants and shops   around the corner.
Great apartment, location and most of all communication.

Nous avons loué cet appartement pour 4 couples et nous nous sommes sentis très à l'aise durant notre séjour (3 nuits), l appartement est magnifique, très bien décoré et spacieux ce qui nous a permis de prendre des petits apéros sympas dans le salon le soir avant de ressortir. Il est très bien situé par rapport au centre ville et le quartier est très sympa. A notre arrivée Joanna qui parle français nous a très bien accueilli et a pri le temps de nous expliquer le plan de la ville et du quartier avec les visites à faire, nous avons aussi pu déposé nos bagages en attendant que l appartement soit disponible.
En résumé un super séjour, et nous espérons revenir un jour dans cette magnifique ville!!!
Merci beaucoup Joanna et bises de la Corse.
Very nice appartment in an ideal position to explore Amsterdam. Warmly recommended.
Absolut empfehlenswert!
het verblijf was erg fijn! Peter reageerde snel, de boot was leuk ingericht op een goede locatie.

Geweldige en unieke overnachting op deze boot. Je hebt alles wat je nodig hebt (alleen geen kookstelletje maar bestel lekker wat of ga als het weer kan uit eten). De locatie is super. Het is bij het centrum, op loopafstand maar niet te druk. Tal van mogelijkheden voor ontbijt en koffie in de directe omgeving. Het is allemaal precies goed. Daarnaast is Peter super vriendelijk en heel snel met reacties op mijn berichten. Bedankt!

Super nice place and great location!
Definitely recommend.
Orginele plek! Super netjes en gedacht aan details. Betrouwbare en vriendelijke host.
Super, niks op aan te merken.
Fantastisch verblijf!

Wat een zee van rust! Een fijn plekje in het altijd gezellige Amsterdam. De ruimte is knus en smaakvol ingericht en van alle gemakken voorzien. Je loopt zo het centrum in, maar ook op de boot is het goed toeven.
Super
Peter’s houseboat was awesome! Exactly as pictured and super cozy and very very clean!! Peter was very responsive to us and also took us on a boat ride through the canals!

We had a great night at the KeizerInn and would definitely recommend it to others (and hope to return at some point!) loads of nice places to get food in the area and an amazing spot on top of the boat to eat, drink and wach the world go by. A perfect place to stay in Amsterdam and in such a beautiful part of the city.

Een heerlijk verblijf gehad op een fantastische lokatie op loop afstand van alles wat Amsterdam te bieden heeft. Op het dek van de boot de laatste avondzon mee kunnen pikken  terwijl de laatste bootjes voorbij varen. Een aanrader.

Thank you Peter for a fantastic and unique stay on your house boat! We absolutely loved our time there in the peaceful yet central location. Perfect to sit on the top of the boat for a drink on a sunny evening and cosy to read inside the wheel room on a rainy morning! Bed was extremely comfy and all facilities worked perfectly. Thank you!
Super wonderful experience! Very friendly and kind host. Will definitely recommend to try it out!

La estancia es maravillosa, un espacio original y único! Está cerca de todo, muy bien ubicado. También situado en un entorno bonito y muy tranquilo para descansar sin ruidos. Peter muy atento!
Súper recomendable!
Near from everything. Perfect place to discover Amsterdam !
Accueil parfait, chambre très confortable, propose avec tout le nécessaire. Super séjour !
Geweldige accommodatie

Ich habe das Boot für eine ganze Woche gebucht und habe mich dort sehr wohl gefühlt. Unter Deck gibt es einen Kleiderschrank, einen Kühlschrank mit Eisfach, eine Spüle, eine Mikrowelle, eine Senseo-Kaffeemaschine und einen Fernseher. Das WLAN an Bord ist sehr leistungsfähig! Peter stellt seinen Gästen Kaffeepads, Tee, Zucker etc. bereit und hält zur Begrüßung eine kleine Flasche Wein (Weiß und Rot) bereit. Das große Bett ist superbequem! Für 2 Personen ist das Boot sehr zu empfehlen, das "Wohnzimmer" ist auf der Brücke! An Deck warten 2 Gartensessel, so dass ihr den ganzen Tag die Sonne genießen könnt. Dann habe ich ein Fahrrad gemietet und konnte so ganz entspannt Amsterdam entdecken. Der  Liegeplatz gegenüber vom Botanischen Garten ist sehr ruhig und idyllisch. Willkommen an Bord!

This is truly one of kind place to stay in Amsterdam - unique, charming, cozy, extremely clean, well-supplied and comfortable! Great location, so close to many interesting places but also calm and safe. Peter is a wonderful host, attentive, helpful and very quick to respond to any questions. It is a place I would definitely want to stay in again!

Es ist klein aber fein.
Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und jede Minute geliebt.
Das Bett ist super die Lage ist phänomenal und der Gastgeber war super freundlich und diskret.

If you get the chance to rent this owesome place u are looking forward to an extra relaxing holiday in Amsterdam.
It is a very special place and also his owner is a very calm and nice person.
Goede gastheer, zeer goed verzorgd!
Very Nice place. Cosy and peacfull.
Die Lage ist ein Traum, gegenüber schaut man auf den botanischen Garten. Abends an Deck sitzen und das Treiben der Stadt vom Boot aus aufzusaugen macht richtig Spaß.

Wir waren drei Nächte auf dem Hausboot, welches perfekt ausgestattet ist und sich in hervorragender Lage befindet. Wir konnten alles zu Fuß erkunden, uns unkompliziert in der Nähe Räde ausleihen und verschiedene Touren machen.
Peter war ein sehr freundlicher und zuvorkommender Gastgeber. Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder.
Schoon, heel rustig en toch super centraal gelegen. Charmante boot, prachtige plek 👍🏻
A positive experience from start to finish!
Prachtige locatie. Super leuk om voor het eerst in ons leven op een boot te slapen!
very nice boat and accomodations. clean and beatiful boat! peter is a pleasure to work with. highly recommend!

What a great little spot, quiet at night, but next to everything you could need. The directions Peter gave us to arrive by public transport were flawless, the bed comfy, and the space came with everything one could need and nothing more. The shower was hot and the deck was beautiful! Hope to stay again!
Top geregeld allemaal!

Un homme super souriant, le logement était d’une propreté incroyable, pourtant je suis assez difficile niveau ménage normalement, très heureuse de ce petit week-end. Merci encore à Peter, très sympathique.
Everything was fine. Pretty cool for a short stay.
Prachtige woonboot op een prachtige locatie

Our trip was just wonderful, Peter is a very friendly guy and you got lots of privacy! The location is right in the central but nevertheless it's very quiet when you sit on the boats roof in the evening 👌
Everything was perfect 😍 beautiful place and very clean

Unvergesslicher Urlaub!
Das Hausboot liegt in einer sehr ruhigen Seitenstrasse, ist aber trotzdem enorm zentral gelegen mit Einkaufs- und Frühstücksmöglichkeiten in direkter Nähe. Besonders geliebt haben wir unseren Kaffee am Morgen (oder Biertje am Abend) auf dem Sonnendeck mit Blick auf einen kleinen Park, direkt am Hortus Botanicus.
Peter ist ein perfekter, sehr freundlicher und angenehmer Gastgeber und sein niedlicher Kater Binkie kommt gerne einmal für eine Schmuseeinheit herüber.
Absolutes Highlight und sehr zu empfehlen war eine persönliche Grachtentour mit Peter auf seinem gemütlichen Beiboot "Anneke G". Diese kann jederzeit nach Absprache mit Peter problemlos gebucht werden.
Wir waren begeistert und werden definitiv wiederkommen! Danke Peter!
Heel gezellig onderkomen!

Thanks for the stay Peter, we had such an amazing time!! The boat and space was so amazing and in a great, quiet and beautiful part of town. Peter gave us a canal tour on his personal boat and went above and beyond with his hospitality. We highly suggest going to the botanical gardens right across the canal!!

We had a lovely time on board "de keizerInn". The place is really neat, clean and Peter has decorated it with charme and special details. Everything one needs for a good rest is there and also the bed is wonderful cozy.
The boat has a perfect center place and you are everywhere within a short travel time or even walking distance.
Peter is a friendly, open and helpful host. I'd really love to come again.

Es war ein sehr schöner urlaub in einer mega schönen Location. Schlafen wie ein echter Holländer in Amsterdam. Wir würden und werden jederzeit wiederkommen.
Andi und Denise
Ideal get away calm & super cozy 💞 thanks peter!
Hebben een heerlijk weekend Amsterdam gehad,ligging van de boot is perfect en overnachten in zo een leuk knus schitterend en gezellige bootje maakte het helemaal af. Echt een aanrader.!!
Dormir sur une péniche à Amsterdam quel régal! Celle ci est très bien située,à deux pas du métro et du centre.
Posto bellissimo e perfetto sotto tono punto di vista, sconsigliato solo agli aracnofobici per via dei numerosi ragni che si aggirano fuori dalla cabina di notte
We hebben genoten, midden in de stad en hartelijk ontvangen - we voelden ons thuis!

Peter est disponible, de bons conseils, son logement est propre, tres proche du centre et des transports en commun. On y dort bien, l'environnement est agréable, et le dépaysement est top.
Merci Peter
Nice and cosy place, very central !
Leuke ervaring en een mooie plek. Peter is een goede vent.

Spent one night on Peter’s houseboat and it was perfect and very restful. Very clean. Comfortable bed. Nice spot on the canal, across from a park with a giant weeping willow. Peter seems like a sweetheart. Would definitely stay here again. 😎
Séjour insolite la péniche est de tout confort et propre

Das Hausboot liegt sehr zentral am Rande der Innenstadt in einer kleinen und ruhigen Gracht. Peter ist sehr freundlich und alle Absprachen haben problemlos funktioniert. Die Kajüte ist sehr schön und besonders lädt die kleine Terrasse auf dem Deck zum Entspannen ein. Perfekte Location für jeden der einen Städetrip macht und Amsterdam auf eine einzigartige Weise kennenlernen möchte.
It is a very charming place for a trip in Amsterdam, very cute, well localized and perfectly clean. Peter is a very nice and reactive host. Enjoy ;)
Great location! And a lovely one of a kind experience to stay on a beautiful houseboat. Can highly recommend!
We had a very nice and authentic stay in a calm but still central area of Amsterdam, very much recommended!
nous recommandons °°°

Amazing boat with a nice space in a perfect location,Sonja was a perfect host!!
Would definitely recommend.
Un endroit au top proche du centre des canaux, des vélos à notre disposition. Vraiment l'endroit idéal afin de passer un séjour inoubliable sur Amsterdam n'hésitez pas à vous rendre à cette adresse.
Net buiten de drukte van de stad maar toch dicht genoeg voor gelijk welke uitstap

We have just returned from an awesome stay on the boat! From booking to arriving, communication with Sonja was very easy and she was very helpful. The accommodation was simply perfect. The extra touches made the trip, including fresh bread, fruit, champagne and sweet treats. The coffee machine was great too. We loved relaxing on the roof of the boat on the deck chairs and the use of the bikes made our trip. Thanks so much for an awesome stay. We wish it had been longer. Rozzy and Ollie
Just perfect !!
We had a wonderfull stay at Sonjas houseboat! Will definetely be back next time we visit Amsterdam :D

This has been one of my top 3 favorite places that I have stayed with AirBnb. The Tasmania is beautiful, classy, and modern. Chilling out on the bow of the boat in the big, comfortable bean bags while the sun was shining and with a Champagne toast provided by Sonja was one of my favorite moments in Amsterdam. Sonja has truly thought of every detail and the accommodations represented that. Along with the bubbles, she provided a spread of goodies and breakfast items, beer, Nespresso pods, and tea bags, as well as Ritual toiletries for use (so wonderful-smelling). The bikes provided were also in good working order and we had a ton of fun cruising around Central City. We slept soundly on the comfortable mattress and had no issues with noise, even keeping the porthole windows open. I can't say enough wonderful things about both Sonja and the Tasmania.

We had a wonderful time on this custom-built family ship. Here, you are more than a guest, you feel part of a maritime community that has been living in the Amsterdam waterways for decades.  As landlubbers, we valued deeply the experience of living on water. What a great two nights of sleep!! The room is perfect for a couple just wanting to explore Amsterdam, especially city central. Clean, bright, skillfully stocked, this unique lodging experience is so worth it. Sonya is friendly and helpful, making us feel part of her well-docked lifestyle!

Sonja's houseboat was great, I'd absolutely recommend it. She was gracious checking us in, and had wine, snacks, and fresh bread waiting for us. The location is great for walking to all the sights, and bikes are also provided. Sonja was also quick to respond to any questions we had, and allowed us to leave our luggage after checkout.

If you wanna spend some nice days in A’dam in a stylish and lovely decorated home with a caring host - this is the place to go! We never expected houseboats to be so cosy.
It is extremely well situated- close to the train station and also the city. Sonja is an amazing host and cares more than we expected.
Best place visited, ever.
Everything was fine! My parents stayed at the boat and were pleased. Thank you! Highly recommendable.
Saubere Zimmer, gute Lage, vernünftiger Preis, außergewöhnlich
It was amazing.

We loved staying at Sonja’s place! We arrived during an unusual heat wave and so really enjoyed sitting on the deck in the very comfortable bean bag chairs. Upon arrival, we even made a picnic dinner on the deck,  of the delicious bread, cheese, fruit and wine Sonja thoughtfully provided for us. Would love to return!

Estancia maravillosa en el Tazmania...barco de Sonja !! Quién nos a ayudado mucho con sus consejos...y nos a cuidado al detalle para que estuvieramos como en casa. Sin duda recomiendo a todo el mundo que antes de ir a (Website hidden by Airbnb) ponga en contacto con Sonja para disfrutar de una gran experiencia.

Wunderbarer Kurztrip nach Amsterdam.
Die Tasmania ist absolut toll. Wir konnten flexibel einchecken und anschließend auf dem Deck entspannen. Sonja hat uns einen leckeren Wein, Brot und mehr zur Verfügung gestellt. So hatten wir Frühstück. Spitze! :)
Das Boot ist relativ zentral. Zu Fuß etwa 15min vom Hauptbahnhof entfernt. Wir hatten die kostenlosen Räder von Sonja und haben diese auch genutzt. Empfehlenswert! So sieht man sehr viel und es macht mehr Spaß als zu Fuß.
Die Unterkunft ist sauber, leise und einfach traumhaft. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
It was a very unique experience sleeping in Tasmania .
最高に楽しかったです。清潔で快適でした。思っていたより広い室内でした。ﾊﾟﾝやﾌﾙｰﾂ､飲み物が用意されていました。自転車も無料で貸してくれるのでどこまでもｻｲｸﾘﾝｸﾞしました！また宿泊したいです。

The place, was a short walk from Centraal Station, and for it being in the Jordaan you get the quite and peaceful atmosphere that the other side of Amsterdam doesn't have.

Pictures alone can't describe how spacious this place is, we were a group of 7 people (2 couples and 3 singles)
We had more than enough room and bathroom space too. The utility of 2 toilets for a large group was essential.
If you have second thoughts about booking this spot, don't, it will be taken away from frequent visitors.
Hosts were away but met as arranged by their friend for seamless transfer. Property wsscas descriptions although stairs were steeper than expected.
Amazing experience that we live like an Amsterdammer，Joanna was really warm and helpful！

Just back from a fabulous stay at multatuli.
Our group of 7 were absolutely blown away by this apartment, Pictures do not do it justice!
Very spacious, our large group were very comfortable, loads of space to relax and a nice big table for sitting down to dinner all together.
Joanna left us a folder with lots of information about nearby restaurants and shops which was great.
Everything was needed was close by, coffeeshop and bar right on the corner which has the most amazing hot chocolates! A shop across the street from there, supermarket was 5 minutes walk from the apartment and loads of bars on either side.
Dam square was only a ten minute walk from the apartment.
We absolutely loved every single thing about our stay at multatuli, it's central location, it's cosy spacious rooms, the wonderful owners who made us feel at home with bags of tea and coffee lots of cosy blankets and toiletries and all the nearby bars and restaurants which made our trip as amazing as it was!
Wish I never had to leave .. We will definitely be back.

Nicola :)
We had a great stay recently in what is a fantastic apartment in an ideal location. I wouldn't hesitate returning and very much recommend the accommodation.
Joanna met us at the house and spent quite some time describing the area attractions and recommending places to visit. We took advantage of several of her restaurant suggestions and enjoyed them all.

Hola, acabamos de volver de esta magnífica casa de Joanna & MP. Todas la fotos son verdaderas. Habitaciones grandes, camas muy cómodas. Todo muy limpio y esta en una situación perfecta. Se puede ir andando a todos los sitios de interés. Nada más salir de la casa hay dos supermercados, panaderías y muchas tiendas. Joanna nos dejó una carpeta con toda la información.  Fuimos cuatro personas mayores y dos niñas y todo fabuloso. El único inconveniente son las empinadas escaleras, pero así son todas las casa del centro de Ámsterdam.  Recomendamos esta casa. Gracias Joanna, lo hemos pasado muy bien en vuestra casa

Our family had a brilliant stay at Multatuli. Location was perfect for exploring Amsterdam, we loved Haarlemstraat and having so many lovely shops and restaurants close by. The apartment was perfect for us- spacious, light and airy- the stairs leading into it were very steep, but as long as you're prepared for them it's fine! Joanna was really helpful and check in super speedy! Would definitely recommend this apartment to any group travelling to Amsterdam!

We were welcomed by Joanna and MP on arrival and they helped us with our bags up the steep stairs. The apartment was as described beautiful, contemporary and light. It had everything we needed. The location of the apartment was superb right in the centre of Amsterdam with easy access from the Central Station and to many shops and cafes and restaurants and also just up the road from the nearest canal. However it was a lovely quiet neighbour hood at night with no street noise at all.
The information that Joanna gave us about the museums and the restaurants was extremely helpful and made our stay much easier. Joanna was also very fast to respond to any problems we had both before and during our stay.
We absolutely loved Amsterdam and will definitely be coming back again. Thank you very much for the loan of your home.

Parfaitement situé et très propre.
Johanna nous a dépanné au dernier moment et a fait en sorte que notre arrivée se fasse au mieux.

Joanna made us very welcome and also had loads of useful tips about how book to see the sights in order to avoid long queues. The apartment was excellent, everything it looked in the photos - stylish, spacious, very comfortable and with lots of crockery and cutlery which is always useful for a large party.
Lovely area with all the main sights within walking distance. It came as a bit of a surprise to learn that many of the local shops do not take cash - so be prepared for this!
Joanna was very friendly and accommodating even though we had a late arrival. The apartment was spacious, clean and great location. No complaints!
Séjour très chouette dans la ville d'Amsterdam avec un appartement exceptionel! Nous recommandons cette adresse située idéalement. Joanna a été très presente pour nous. A refaire !!
Appartement agréable et très bien situé. L'accueil était parfait et les conseils d'excellente qualité.
De boot was verwennerij, zowel de locatie als de boot zelf waren prachtig en we voelde ons in de watten gelegd. Er was eten en drinken en je voelt je echt op vakantie in eigen stad.

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay on the Tasmania. From the bottle of wine when we arrived to the helpful tips and wonderful conversation with Sonja, the Tasmania is a gem of a place to stay. You will not be disappointed.

Perfect place to stay! The boat is really nice.
Bikes at disposition.
If I have to come back I will choose the same place.
Really really nice stay in Amsterdam. The boat is extremely close to the centrum and it’s a great experience!!
Eine sehr gepflegte Unterkunft, ein schönes Willkommen und ein gefüllter Kühlschrank, so dass das Frühstücken auf dem Hausboot ohne große Einkäufe zu tätigen statt finden konnte.
Very unique, stylish and clean place, would highly recommend!
Well organised. Clean tidy, quiet and excellent value. Will be checking availability for my next trips and hope to stay again in the future.

If you have any doubts about this place, don’t. It was everything we expected and more. We really felt like locals and got the true Amsterdam experience. Sonja’s place was spotless and she stocked the room with snacks, gave us two bikes (although the weather didn’t hold up much for us to use them) and left us some recommendations for the area. 5 stars!!
Amazing place to stay and Sonja goes above and beyond to make you feel welcome! Highly recommend
You will love it!

Lieu unique au cœur d’Amsterdam, Tasmania est un vrai coup de cœur pour nous. Sonja est une hôtesse d’exception qui met tout en œuvre dès votre arrivée pour vous mettre à l’aise dans votre cocon avec de nombreuses attentions (thé, café, lait, pain frais...) et même un joli bouquet de fleurs.
Les vélos à disposition sont un vrai plus pour découvrir Amsterdam dans les moindres recoins.
Bref une adresse que nous recommandons vivement et à laquelle nous reviendrons sans hésitation!

A great spectacular place! The location of the houseboat is very central, not far away from Amsterdam Central and great restaurants. The cabin is fully equipped, with a nice bathroom and is as lovely as shown on the pictures. Sonja has been a very wonderful host and I can recommend her fully. If we would visit Amsterdam again, we will for sure look, if this spectacular houseboat will be available again. Thanks, Sonja!

The boat is a clean, quiet and beautiful place. It’s a nice time to sleep in the boat. We enjoy it. Moreover, Peter has a cute cat, Pinky, who would walking around the boat. He is so cute that we like to play with him.

The listing was exactly as described. Very clean on arrival. Excellent communication with the host before and during the stay.

Very convenient location, a short walk from the main railway station.

We had a fantastic 4 days in Amsterdam with a group of 6 friends that flew in to meet from around the world. The apartment is welcoming, central to all of Amsterdams sites and the central train station, and in a great neighboorhood. The owners were so accommodating with checkin and checkout...we really couldn't have asked for much more!

We had a wonderful time during our recent trip to Amsterdam.

Joanna and MP' s apartment was fantastic. It had lots of room, was well appointed and served our needs perfectly. It's in a great location near to shops, bars and restaurants and only a short walk to most of Amsterdams main attractions.

Joanna helped us out prior to our visit by answering our questions and booking restaurants for us. Joanna also met us at the start of our trip and was most welcoming and helpful.

We have just spent two nights in this beautiful apartment over the Kings Day celebrations , the location was fantastic and the rooms were spacious and spotless! The apartment is in easy waking distance from everything and surrounded by shops, bars and cafes. Joanne was very helpful and even printed our boarding cards! The stairs are very steep but this is to be expected in Amsterdam.
Magnifique appartement, idéalement situé (proche de tout: gare, commerces, canaux,...), nous avons passé un très bon séjour chez Joanna, rien à redire !

We could drop our luggage off before the official check-in time, which was very helpful.
Joanna was very helpful.
we loved the house (be careful with the steep stairs), it was very comfortable, good bathrooms, and great kitchen.
great neighbourhood with good shops and everything at hand.
close to Central Station (10 minute walk).
there were 5 in our group, and plenty of space in the house.
will definitely stay here again.
Regards, Joe and Amanda
Een leuk schip op een rustige maar wel centrale locatie. Een goede uitvalbasis voor een weekendje Amsterdam en anders dan anders. Een aanrader!

Bien situé et légèrement à l’écart de l’agitation du centre mais pas trop pour s’y rendre facilement à pied, nuit atypique dans une péniche ayant contribué au charme de notre week-end à Amsterdam. Peter a été disponible pour nous accueillir et nous remettre les clés du mini studio de sa péniche disposant d’une entrée indépendante.
We had an amazing time. You can explore the city even without a car or the bus. Everything is reachable by a 15min walk :)
Fijne plek. Toplocatie. Lieve host.
Alles fein. Wir kommen sicher wieder...

Number one spot in Amsterdam! You cannot beat the view.. A place to sit on the boat and watch Amsterdam go by with view of the park close by.. Place is spotless clean inside and outside.. Would recommend all to visit
leuk en net verblijf, vriendelijke gastheer!
Peter ist sehr großzügig und sein Boot ist klasse. Man sieht dass er sich viel Mühe gibt und sein Boot ihm viel bedeutet.
Nice guy, very nice place.
It is a really beautiful place to stay in Amsterdam. We really enjoyed Peters place. :)

We hebben een fijne tijd gehad op de KeizerInn. De boot ligt op een fantastische plek in de stad en dient als gunstige uitvalsbasis voor een paar dagen Amsterdam: heerlijk rustig en toch centraal. We komen er graag terug!

Posizione perfetta, leggermente fuori dal centro ma comodissima per visitare la città e   godersi un po' di tranquillità. La barca è bellissima, davvero deliziosa con un sacco di lucine e una bellissima vista sui salici del parco di fronte. Bagno spazioso, cucina attrezzata e caffè e thè a disposizione. Consigliatissima!!!

Die Unterkunft ist klein, aber sehr fein, perfekt für ein Wochenende oder einen Kurzurlaub in Amsterdam.
Es ist alles vorhanden, was man braucht, so dass man sich auch selbst versorgen kann.
Die Gracht, in der das Boot liegt, ist zentral gelegen, aber trotzdem ruhig und grün. Toll ist auch, dass man auf der kleinen Terrasse den Abend ausklingen lassen kann.
Peter ist ein toller Gastgeber. Wir wurden sehr freundlich emfangen und Peter war vorort und ansprechbar.
Wir hatten ein wunderbares Wochenende in Amsterdam, auch dank dieses tollen Quartiers!
Really thoughtful hospitality and beautiful space.
Wouldn’t want to stay anywhere else! Just wish it could have been longer
Amazing houseboat and perfect location to everything in walking distance
Eine wirklich schöne Unterkunft in ruhiger Lage, aber trotzdem zentral, sodass man alles gut erreichen kann.

This was the best AirBnB experience I've ever had. the boat is fab and Peter is a fantastic host!
Make sure you speak to him about his boat tour, truly a highlight of our trip.
5 out of 5 stars, couldn't ask for better.
船屋超级棒！来阿姆需要独特的体验。船停靠的地理位置很好步行十五分钟可以到达市中心的餐厅和景点，附近也有metro站点出行很方便。第一次住在船上的经历很特别，完全不会觉得局促，一切设施都很齐全。有厨房有浴室洗手间，Peter还准备了椅子在船仓外可以欣赏运河美景和方便吸烟者。Peter很热情很有耐心解答我的一切问题。完美的体验:)下次来阿姆一定会再选择Peter的船屋

Wir durften drei wundervolle Nächte auf dem Boot von Peter verbringen. Beim Check-in wurden wir freundlich begrüsst und konnten sogar unser Gepäck früher einstellen. Alles war wie beschrieben vorhanden, sauber und mit Liebe zum Detail eigerichtet. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen.

Peter prepared a wonderful stay for us full of little touches (wine, adapters, peppermints). We loved our stay and can’t wait to return! Everything was easily walkable; even the central station was an easy 2km walk.

Perfect location; quiet but lived in. Boat is perfect for either one person or for an intimate couple (people who don’t mind close quarters, that is)

The boat’s first mate is a cat who looks an awful lot like Van Gogh.

Stayed a week. Must make this an annual visit.

Das KeizerInn ist die perfekte Unterkunft für einen Amsterdam-Trip. Das Boot ist richtig schön, es ist alles da, was man sich wünschen kann, die Lage ist zentral, dabei ruhig, mit netten Cafés und Restaurants in der Nähe.
Check-in und -out ganz unkompliziert. Vielen Dank, Peter. Wir kommen gerne wieder.

La barca è bellissima e offre tutto l’occorrente necessario per il soggiorno, la posizione non è centralissima ma con un tram è tutto facilmente raggiungibile. Peter è davvero molto disponibile ci è venuto incontro sia con il check in che con il check out! Esperienza consigliata 😊
We had an amazing stay at Peter’s. The location is great and the houseboat is very comfortable and clean. Peter was very helpful and welcoming. We’ll definitely visit again!

Such an sweet stay! It feels very special, and very Amsterdam-y, to stay on Peter’s boat. Comfy bed, great shower and super cute living/dining area atop in the wheelhouse. Easy to access via transit or bike. Room for 2, but I highly recommend for solo travelers, as I was. It is perfect.
~ Carol

The experience of sleeping in a boat by the river was truly amazing, and
the location is perfect!
Really beautiful place to stay, close enough to the city to comfortably go for a nice out but far enough to get a good nights sleep.

Super mid-week dans la péniche de Peter !
L’endroit est cosy, très accueillant et calme !
Parfait pour un week-end en amoureux :)
Allez-y les yeux fermés, vous ne serez pas déçu !
Très bonne communication, Peter est très à l’écoute et adore aider les personnes. C’est une personne de confiance très aimable et disponible.
Truly enjoyed every moment of this experience! You will not regret booking :)
It was very nice! Well located and clean!
Great communication. Great location.
Fantastic location and a lovely room to rent for a night or two on a picturesque houseboat.
Great stay and a very cool experience! Peter was very responsive and accommodating. The houseboat is on a quiet street and is quite lovely.

Really cute and cosy end of the houseboat which was lovely to come home to. Good for a weekend as the space is a little small but really comfortable. Really nice welcoming touches like mini wine bottles, mints, things like books, chargers and hairdryer. In a quiet part of town so we got some good rest, about 25 mins walk from the tourist centre but really close to Artis/zoo and Micropia. Also easy to check in/out and good communication from Peter. Thank you!

Wonderful, well designed studio space within a custom-built houseboat,  great location in the north of Central Amsterdam, very safe and unique. Sonja was very helpful and provided many local tips for our stay.
Great AirBnB.  Good location and highly recommend.
Brilliant space, epic location, and lovely hosts.

Sonja‘s place was much better than expected. As soon as we arrived she welcomed us  with a warm smile and explained to us everything we needed to know about. There was cold champagne waiting for us in the fridge, the placed was very clean and had beautiful flowers next to our bed. We were able to enjoy two wonderful nights in the beautiful city of Amsterdam. I highly recommend Sonja‘s Boat on your next visit to Amsterdam. Thank you Sonja.
Fabulous stay at Sonja’s place loved the boat and location would be even better in summer . Recommendations of restaurants were great what a fabulous city x

Great apartment in a fantastic location in Amsterdam. We were a group of 8 and there was loads of room. Joanna was very welcoming and prompt to answer emails. Location couldn't be more perfect, less than 10 minutes walk from train station and loads of cafes and shops nearby and the Ann Frank museum was around 15 minutes walk. Highly recommend!
great stay in a beautiful flat, absolut centrally located, highly recommended

Joanna is absolutely the most welcoming, sweet and caring host we have ever encountered!  She would respond to any questions I had (via (Hidden by Airbnb) ) no matter what time I sent them.  Her visitor manual left for us is a rare treat and we took her up on 3 of her restaurant recommendations and we were not disappointed! The apartment is large, beautiful and accommodated the 6 of us girls perfectly.  her beds were so comfortable that we did not want to get up in the mornings!

Stay here. Do it. Escape the touristic chaos of central Amsterdam and feel like you’re living the good life for a few days.

The guest suite on the Tasmania is unlike anyplace I’ve ever stayed in my life. You have your own entry with keypad, so you’re free to come and go as you please. I was welcomed by a bottle of wine and an ample spread of breakfast foods, coffee, and snacks. The kitchen is well-stocked, the bathroom is tidy and modern, and the bed is very comfortable.

I honestly can’t think of a single thing negative to say about my experience. You should note that the boat is docked a bit off the beaten trail, but that’s part of the charm. After spending the day battling pedestrian, bicycle, tram, and car traffic all day, it’s lovely to come home to the silent solitude of the Tasmania at dock.

Again, I highly encourage anyone who’s on the fence about this place to just book it. It’s all the charm of Dutch boat house life with all the luxurious touches of a nice hotel. You won’t regret it.

I had been to Amsterdam several times previously, all for work for less then 30 hours on the ground.  My wife and I wanted to find a romantic spot to use as a home base to explore the city for a short 3 day trip.  This boat was exactly that.  A very private setting on the water, we enjoyed warmth of the heated floors, and the fresh bread and bubbly was a great surprise.  With it being December, we were unable to enjoy the deck, but the inside of the room is more spacious then pictures show and we did not feel cramped at all.  We can not wait to get back again and this boat will be at the top of our lists of places to stay.
Our experience at the Tasmanian was spectacular. Beautiful finish out of an awesome boat and thoughtful, above and beyond hostess. Looking so forward to going again to enjoy this amazing houseboat.

Sonja and Michael were able to greet us on arrival, their boat Tasmania is beautiful and we had a wonderful time staying there. We had a little trouble finding their dock, so if you get lost it’s behind the buildings down the second wharf on the left facing the water.

I liked my stay and had everything I needed.  Peter had good communication with me and made check-in easy.  Even though I could not enjoy the deck due to rain, the option is there.  The location is out of the hectic centrum while still being close to key museums/locations and the main bike routes.  Moreover, Peter provided a map (in a pamphlet) of the main bike routes in the welcome basket.  Recommended.

We hebben heel erg genoten van dit prachtige plekje. Een fijne plek om tot rust te komen middenin de drukte van Amsterdam. Alles is dichtbij. Complimenten voor zo'n sfeervol (inclusief kerstman!) verblijf!
Amazing place to stay, cozy, beautiful, functional and host is very nice and communicative! 100% recommended. Although it’s a fairly small boat, living in it gives the impression that’s bigger

Thank you, Peter for your extremely warm hospitality :)

It was an amazing experience for us both and we are looking forward to come back really soon!

Best regards and Merry Christmas

Very pretty and cozy boat cabin and Peter is a really nice host.
It was amazing. Won’t be the last time!

Peter a était très sympas pendant mon séjour. Le bateau est très agréable on s’y sens vraiment bien! Tout était propre ! Il est en plus situé en plein centre de la ville et vous pouvez apprécier la vue assis sur les chaises à l’extérieur c’est vraiment sympas!
Heerlijk verblijf. De locatie is echt geweldig!
Es war sehr schön
The boat is lovely, I spent the night alone so was comfy to me. Maybe for more nights and for a couple the boat might feel a little small.  But I would stay there again. It is a nice spot

Un séjour très agréable dans cette belle péniche tout confort, proche du centre ville.
Je recommande vivement !

We loved the boat stay. Better then imagined and will definitely try and come back.

Matthew & Jana
Super nice boat! Nice and quiet, few minutes from the centre. Everything was available and arranged perfectly!
Sehr gemütlich! Ein tolles Erlebnis 😊⚓️
Even though we would have loved to have more time in Amsterdam, this was a great and unique place to stay for a short trip. It is in a good location, it is cozy and Peter is a great host!
Great place and hospitality, Peter was flexible on check in time ... very cozy place
Great Host
Una experiencia increíble.  Todo salio tal cual lo pautado!. recomendable

Lo mejor de Lo Mejor , Amable, Cominicativo .
Con Ganas de regresar .

Superleuk verblijf op een prachtig schip. Een heel knusse ruimte en van alles voorzien wat je nodig hebt voor een aangenaam verblijf. In het roefje voel je je deel van de stad doordat je aan alle kanten naar buiten kan kijken.

This is an awesome air bnb and very unique. I highly recommend a stay here even if it is just to experience a night in a genuine boat house.
Peter the host is extraordinary friendly and welcoming. I think anyone who stays here will be happy about there decision.
10/10

The experience with Peter is F…ing amazing. He is excellent in everything!
I highly recommend his place, it’s simple extraordinary!!!!
Thanks for all Peter. A proper gentleman!!!
Reactiv And cool person.  A beautifull place to awake. I recommand.
My stay was exactly as described in the pictures and description. Peter you as a great host.
Supermooie locatie, vriendelijke ontvangst, goed bed en heel leuk om op een Amsterdamse woonboot te overnachten. Aanrader!
nice and unusual place to stay
It was a very unique experience. Amazing!
very good

amazing stay, such an experience. Peter is a fantastic host. Location is INCREDIBLE and so CONVENIENT, it’s close to everything, the main attractions and a ton of vintage stores. very clean, comfortable and cozy. it even has a tv. perfect for couples, we will definitely come back! don’t miss out this opportunity.

We had an amazing stay on the boat. He made us feel right at home. Peter paid attention to detail and it made our stay fantastic. P.S. the bed is SUPER comfy!!!! ❤️ we hope to return again soon for a longer stay. Thank you Peter!
Great stay, great location, good price. Will definitely come back when I am in Amsterdam.

Thanks for a lovely place to stay Peter! Things couldn't have been more straightforward and the boat is lovely inside and in a great location. Would definitely recommend to anyone looking a unique place to stay in amsterdam! 10 out of 10!

The place was absolutely fantastic! It was only 20 minute walk from the city centre and it was so nice to stay on such a beautiful boat. As a 6 foot 3 guy it felt a little small but that was all part of the charm and we loved every second of it!
Very nice stay ! Very welcoming !

Genoten van een uniek verblijf. perfecte ligging nabij het centrum. we hadden minder goed weer, zelfs storm. maar het schip ligt mooi stabiel .. aleen kraken de aanmeer touwen soms wat heftig over de reling.
Communicatie met Peter verliep soepel.
het schip is netjes en schoon . en wat fijn was het is er heerlijk warm. de vloerverwarming is erg prettig. mijn vriendin is een kou kleum en had dikke nachtkleding en Uggs mee maar ze heeft er tot mijn vreugde niets van hoeven gebruiken 😊 We zouden er zo weer heen gaan !

I stayed at Joanna and MP's apartment in May with 6 of my childhood friends. It was the perfect place for our reunion. Joanna is an absolutely fantastic host. She was very prompt when answering my questions. The directions she gave to her apartment from the station were to the T. We all came separately and no one had a problem finding the place due to the precise directions. The apartment itself is beautifully kept and she had clear instructions which is always a great. I would definitely recommend the Multatulli apartment to anyone traveling to Amsterdam in a big group.

Joanna und MP welcomed us in a very friendly way and informed us about all necessary and interesting things. If you need help during your stay, they are always there to assist.
We felt very comfortable in the apartment. It is quiet, although the busy street with a lot of nice shops, bars and restaurants is just around the corner.
The apartment is exactly as shown on the pictures, has more than you need for everyday life and feels warm and cosy.
Enjoy your stay!
Vi hadde et flott opphold hos Joannna. Hun og mannen hennes var veldig hjelpsomme. Det var en flott leilighet med en perfekt beliggenhet. Vi har ingen ting å klage på.

Joanna & MP were very attentive hosts.  They arranged for us to leave our luggage in their flat early in the day, while our flat was serviced.  While we were gone, they took our luggage up to the flat.  There were six of us and we had a lot of luggage.  The apartment was as shown on the website.  Very large kitchen/living area.  The kitchen was well appointed.  The 2 downstairs bedrooms were large and had plenty of storage. The loft bedroom was large, but because of the attic roof lines, did not have room for much storage.  The location was perfect, near Central Station, close to local markets, restaurants and just a short walk to the shopping areas of Amsterdam.  I would highly recommend this apartment, particularly if you are traveling with 4-6 people.

Joanna and MP were very gracious hosts -- letting us store our luggage after an overnight flight until the apartment was available and even helping us with the luggage up the very steep/narrow stairs
The apartment was very comfortable and in a great location. Highly recommend! The only negative was the wifi was slow --able to download email but websites/attachments were difficult.

The location of this property is just about perfect and is fitted out very nicely with everything you need .our hosts arranged for someone to meet us and help us on arrival .we will definitely return as we had a wonderful time in Amsterdam .
Big thank you to Joanna and MP.
Pete

Joanna & MP were very nice and welcoming on arrival.

Joanna sat down with us and gave us recommendations on things to do. It was easy to communicate with her. When we needed instructions on how to use the washer/dryer she offered to come and show us how (but then we figured it out ourselves).

Overall the apartment was very bright and spacious; however, since the windows were not sound proof, loud street noises - day & night- could be heard. This made the front bedroom not preferable for our daughter who is a light sleeper. Feedback from our son and daughter was that the beds in the front room and the attic were not comfortable. My wife and I, however, were comfortable in the master bedroom. The bathrooms had good shower pressure and plenty of hot water.

The apartment is in a very convenient location to restaurants, shops, etc.

We would let our friends know that this would be a good housing option if visiting Amsterdam.

My family and I had a wonderful time in Joanna's house. Joanna spent time to show us the highlights of the area around. We actually ended up visiting a market she had suggested on the Saturday and loved it.

The house was great, we couldn't have asked for a better place to finish up our time in The Netherlands.

We loved our recent stay in Joanna & MP's apartment.  From the beginning, email/text communications were prompt & pleasant.  Joanna gave us plenty of information regarding Amsterdam & the area around the apartment prior to our visit to help with our planning.  The walking directions from Central Station to the apartment were accurate & easy to follow.  Joanna was there waiting for us when we arrived to show us around the apartment.  She had a map of Amsterdam for us & helped us pinpoint several places we were interested in seeing.  The apartment is exactly as pictured, light & bright.  It has everything you need for your stay.  After coming from Paris & staying in 2 small hotel rooms, it was wonderful to be able to spread out. Both of my children wanted to know if they could live there.  My son loved having the loft room all to himself.  Although the stairs are steep (as we had expected from the description) we had no problems with them.  We would love to stay here when we are in Amsterdam again.  Thanks Joanna & MP!

The apartment and the location is just perfect, the surrounding area is beautiful with plenty of restaurants, cafes, and very close from train station.
The apartment is very nice, spacious, and well equipped.
Nice decoration.
Joanna is a very kind person, always helpful and available for any question.
Definitively I would stay again in this place.

Location, location, location - it was perfect!  Right from my initial contact with Joanna she was incredibly helpful responding to all my queries in a timely manner.  We were visiting to celebrate a significant birthday for my husband with our daughters and their partners and it was perfect - lots of space for us to not be on top of each other but also well furnished rooms for us to eat, drink and play together.  We would definitely consider returning.  The location so close to lots of bars, cafes, speciality food and drink shops as well as supermarkets made it all very easy and we spent most of our time exploring the city on foot.  We did rent bikes on our last day and that was another highlight of our trip.  On our final evening late at night I dropped by accident my mobile phone onto a flat roof at the property and was unable to retrieve it, we went a message to Joanna and Marc and first thing in the morning there it was waiting for me - just one example of their very professional service.  I can't recommend this property highly enough!  Just book it.

My family of 6 truly enjoyed our stay at Joanna and MP's apartment. The location was perfect - close to cafes, restaurants, grocery stores and shopping. The apartment was spacious and bright, beautifully decorated and equipped with everything we needed. Beds and bed linens were amazing! The canal at the end of the street was beautiful especially when lit up at night. I would definitely recommend Joanna and MP's apartment to anyone looking for a great place to stay in Amsterdam.

We had a great time staying at Joanna and MP's property.
Prior to our arrival Joanna answered all questions very promptly and once the booking was completed provided detailed info to help prepare for our stay. Since we were first timers with Airbnb, she was always patient and helpful with any questions and concerns.
The house is very centrally located and near grocery stores, restaurants, boutiques, ice cream shops, canals, and only a short walk from major sites and transportation. Couldn't have asked for a better location.
The house is impeccably clean and nicely decorated. No clutter, renovated to modern styles and ample storage space for your stay. We were two families with 3 kids between us and Joanna arranged for cots and stair gates to make our stay comfortable and safe. She provided ample warning that stairs are steep so that we were mentally prepared. If you are not traveling with large suitcases it's not an issue at all. If you are - like in our case due to the kids and a long European vacay - Joanna and MP were nice enough to help us up the stairs.
Lastly, Joanna provided a lot of guidance on what to see, where to go and where to eat during our trip - her speed of responsiveness continued during our stay.
We would return to Multatuli House in a heartbeat. And highly recommend the place.
Thanks a bunch Joanna & MP for making our stay in Amsterdam hassle free and memorable.

Everything was GREAT - the house, the location and Joanna. The house was very comfortable, clean, had everything we needed and easily accommodated 6 adults and 2 children. On arrival Joanna gave us a run down of the area and gave us some great advice on things to do and not do. The house is in a great area and close to the supermarket, cafes, restaurants and other shops. Very hip area but not in the middle of the touristy area. Joanna was very accommodating of all our requests during the stay. Would highly recommend this place. Thanks Joanna hope to be back again.

This was our family's first trip to Amsterdam and our first time using AirBnB and the experience was fantastic. The flat is easy to arrive at from the central train station and is conveniently located in a nice neighbourhood. Joanna spent more than an hour with us upon arrival giving us directions to grocery stores, restaurants, and other attractions the city has to offer. We tried for months to book advance tickets to the Anne Frank house with no luck. She advised us to try online as she was sure they release same day tickets shortly after noon. Less than an hour later she phoned us to tell us she found us tickets and she even booked them for us. Thanks to her we saved ourselves hours in a que.  The flat is well furnished with tons of extras we wouldn't have expected. If you are a larger family this suite is perfect.  Joannaand MP are wonderful hosts!

Estaba ubicado en un barrio centrico y tranquilo, pero con comecios y todo lo necesario. Para llegar a los sitios tardabamos poco incluso con niño de 3 años. La casa estupenda, de cuento, estuvimos encantados, muy bonita y muy agradable. Joana nos explico lo necesario y siempre estuvo a nuestra disposicion si la necesitabamos. Os lo recomiendo, de verdad que no lo olvidareis.
Tiene unas escaleras muy empinadas, tipicas de la zona que a los niños especialmente les encanto y un atico realmente precioso. La casa estaba provista de todo lo necesario, no echamos en falta nada. La mejor casa en la que hemos estado.
Beautiful multi-level flat in a perfect location.   Very nicely decorated and furnished.  Joanna was very good to work with and communicated well with us throughout our stay.  Highly recommended.

We had a wonderful last-minute stay at Peter’s. We so enjoyed the ambiance of the shipper’s cabin, and all the thoughtful additions Peter added to this beautifully renovated apartment. It was also comfortably warm with the floor heating. Can’t wait to come back!
Lovely lil place!
Peter has a really nice and lovelly Boat! Everithing was Perfect! Very well equiped with All we needed. Including a welcome gift pack! I strongly reccomend!
Top Lage tob Sauberkeit immer eine Reise wieder Wert

Very good stay.
Perfect location, close to the centre yet very quiet.
Everything is cosy and very clean.
Very good communication with Peter.
Thank you very much!
Very nice place for a stay in Amsterdam. Peter is very kind and gives good tips for your visit of Amsterdam. It is a unique experience to sleep in a boat in a city ! I recommend it.

Peter is great, super accommodating. The ship is lovely and perfect for a romantic trip in Amsterdam.
Everything is clean and delicate, a real cocon in the center of Amsterdam.

Agréable séjour à Amsterdam.
Charmante péniche au calme !
Merci à Peter
We loved Peter's boat! The place is not too big but its very cozy and clean. Totally recommend!

perfect place to visit Amsterdam !!
Peter is a super host !!
Staying on the boat was the perfect way to stay in Amsterdam. Peter was a fantastic host and great at communicating with us and answering all questions.

Fantastic place , hood and host!
We had a wonderful time!!
It was a beautiful stay and a beautiful birthday for me. Many thanks Peter, you are a perfect host... greetings
really good place
Great host, highly recommend.

Highly recommend this Airbnb. Location is great, tucked away from the hustle and bustle of the city but an easy walk to downtown. The tram from central station also drops you off right around the corner from the Airbnb. The boat is just as described and was clean/well stocked. Had a couple of nice days and was able to wake up with some coffee and sit up top taking in the nice park across the canal. Peter was quick to reply and check-in was a breeze.
Very nice and relaxed host. The boat is clean and very well equipped. You can go anywhere in the inner city on foot. Perfect stay. Thank you!

The boat is in a fabulous location to watch Amsterdam life go by, a wonderful time! The boat was very clean and well appointed. But the living space is very small -- perfect for one person, a squeeze with two. Be aware that you do not get the whole boat, just the rear 1/3 or so.
Lovely cosy boat grest way to experience Amsterdam. Peter the host very friendly.

Endroit insolite et sympa, en pleine nature avec le chant des canards tout en étant proche du centre, très bien équipé ! Un petit cocon avec une superbe literie et une très agréable salle de bains. Hôtes charmants

What a terrific place to stay! An oasis of calm, greenery and the meandering canal, and yet so close to historic sites, public transits, bars, restaurants in an entirely walkable neighbourhood.
We won't forget the tranquility of starting or ending the day in the wheelhouse with a 360 degree view of the canal and the surrounding park. The cabin is well equipped, comfortable, clean and Peter is always available if you have questions.
Highly recommended for your stay in Amsterdam - we won't hesitate to return.

Emplacement idéal alliant calme et proche de tout à vélos environs à 10min grand max de tout .
Péniche tout confort bien équipée et lit douillet.
Escalier un peu raide alors molo quand à la descente mais un réel bonheur d’avoir goûter au joie de la péniche .
Peter est tres arrangeant et fort sympathique.

Bref je recommande vivement !

Peter was an amazing host. Easy to communicate with, friendly, and helpful.

His house boat is adorable. His listing is accurate. He left a cute welcome basket, we had robes in the bathroom, and we thought this was one of the most comfortable beds we’ve ever slept in. Location is unbeatable!!! We spent the evenings before bed on his boat deck and it was so cozy with the twinkle lights and canal. Will absolutely recommend to others.

Peter’s boat is something truly special and made our trip to Amsterdam the best city break we have ever experienced. The boat was spotlessly clean, warm cosy and romantic, it had everything you could need and a great little coffee machine which was really appreciated (it’s the small things that make the difference!).

The location is also perfect, not being more than a kilometre or so from the central attractions but more importantly it is far away enough that evenings are really quiet and peaceful. We really enjoyed sitting on boats roof with a drink with the gentle background noise of friends meeting in the park and seeing little boats drifting past with people enjoying wine and cheese… it was like something out of a movie 😊

Peter is a great host, friendly, helpful and quietly respectful, I can’t recommend Peter and his wonderful boat stay enough. It is everything you could wish for, for a long weekend stay in the awesome city of Amsterdam.

An amazing find! We were absolutely blown away by this beautiful houseboat. It’s a short walk to the centre but so nice to escape the hustle and bustle. Sonja has thought of everything and the little touches like wine and bread made it really special. We’d definitely recommend a visit!
A unique place in the heart of Amsterdam, peaceful and warm. I highly recommend
We really enjoyed our stay on the Tasmania.

Logement aménagé à l’avant du bateau bien indépendant de la partie réservée aux propriétaires.
Emplacement calme tout en étant proche du centre ville. Les vélos prêtés lors du séjour permettent des déplacements simples et rapides.

Lovely place to stay, couldn’t recommend it more! Everything was perfect from start to finish, lovely warm welcome by Sonja herself who went through everything and was happy to help with anything we needed throughout the whole stay. Very clean and perfect location.
Hôte très accueillante et lieu remarquable, très confortable et très bien décoré !
Sonja and her husband have been perfect hosts, the room, the advice, the cosiness. I highly recommend this place for a nice disconnection. :)

Beautiful and stylish houseboat within walking distance of town. The hosts were lovely and helpful, with lots of thoughtful touches. The bicycles were very useful and the advice on local restaurants was excellent. Definitely worth it!

The Tasmania is a beautiful place to be. First, we realized, the boat is even bigger as it looks on the photos! It‘s located in a quite part of Amsterdam. It was really nice to chill out on deck or in our cosy bed. Sonja is a great host, she was very helpful and friendly. She filled up the fridge for breakfast, so we haven’t to buy something. We would come back some day :-) and got only good memories from this weekend.
Top Unterkunft - besser als erwartet und super Startpunkt für einen Amsterdam Trip

We had the greatest time on the Tasmania
Everything is super clean and cozy
Such a nice view from the outside
What a beautiful boat 😍
Heerlijk verblijf gehad, vooral als je van het water houdt een aanrader. Fietsen stonden klaar, was heel fijn.
1 woord: Geweldig!
Wir waren zum zweiten mal Gast auf der Tasmania und es war wieder total schön!

Meine Tochter und ich haben 4 wunderschöne Tage auf dem Hausboot verbracht. Die Unterkunft ist einfach perfekt. Das Studio ist sehr liebevoll und funktionell eingerichtet. Die Lage ist optimal, um von dort aus Amsterdam zu erkunden. Man kann auch die beiden Fahrräder nutzen, was auf jeden Fall ein Erlebnis ist. Den Tag Abends bei einem Glas Wein an Deck ausklingen zu lassen, ist wunderschön. Obwohl die City nicht weit entfernt ist, ist es Abend superruhig, so dass man in dem bequemen Bett wunderbar schlafen kann. Also, abschließend können wir Sonjas Unterkunft nur empfehlen... ein einmaliges Erlebnis.

prima verblijf op een speciale locatie, alle comfort en slapen op het water. Locatie is superrustig maar met het openbaar vervoer ben je snel overal waar je wil zijn in Amsterdam. Supervriendelijke host die snel reageert op vragen, makkelijk inchecken, echt niets op aan te merken.
By all means i recomend this boat to any one to have a nice experience in Amsterdam.

Very very beautiful location. We had everything that we needed and more.
The bicycles were one of the best ideas from Sonja ;)
We have nothing to complain about, everything was perfect!

Am nordwestlichen Rand des Zentrums von Amsterdam war das ein sehr inspirierendes Ferienzimmer auf Sonjas Boot.
Wir wurden mit frischen Weintrauben, leckerem Brot und Sekt im Kühlschrank sehr nett begrüßt. Das Boot so wie die Einrichtung waren genau wie in der Beschreibung und auf den Fotos. Wir waren mehr als zufrieden mit dieser Wahl.
Besonders bei den heißen Tagen im Inland war das eine perfekte Wahl in der frischen Brise des Hafens bei klarer Luft.
Vom Boot konnten wir mit den bereitgestellten Fahrrädern zu den angrenzenden Vierteln über Westerdock und Prinsenejland weiter in die Innenstadt. Schöne Viertel, die (gerade zu Corona-Zeiten) auch nicht überfüllt waren. Man merkt hier weniger vom Tourismus und ist mehr unter einheimischen - sofern das in Amsterdam überhaupt geht ;-)
Danke Sonja und Deinem Mann für die schöne Gelegenheit

Sonja ist eine großartige Gastgeberin mit einem außerordentlich stilvollen Geschmack!
Wir haben in der Unterkunft fantastische Tage verbracht, die Lage ist ideal und außergewöhnlich!
Eine klare Empfehlung!
Es war wunderbar, die Lage, die Ausstattung, die Gastfreundschaft, einfach alles perfekt!

Super schönes Hausboot, tolle Einrichtung, alles super sauber, nicht weit weg vom Zentrum und uns hat es an nix gefehlt.

Wir kommen gerne wieder.
War wirklich schön und ein Wirklich tolles Erlebnis 🙌🏻🤗
sehr sauber, gemütlich und sehr schön eingerichtet 😄  empfehlenswert!
Would 100% recommend. The rooms look exactly like the pictures!  20 min walk from central amsterdam bikes included!

I have nothing but amazing things to say about the stay we have received, Sonja boat is phenomenal! Clean and neat, it’s big enough for two people for a 3 days! I didn’t expect it to be this fabulous! I would 100% anyone to stay here, she has been a pleasure, it’s so homey! It’s comfortable!! The bed is unreal! So so comfy!! I asked for a request for my one year anniversary and it was done, I was able to check in earlier and leave later, thank you for your hospitality x
Das Hausboot ist eine unvergessliche Erfahrung. Es liegt sehr zentral und mit den Fahrrädern so schnell überall. Es war alles sehr sauber und genau wie auf den Bildern!

Amazing experience in amesterdam!
Sonja and Michael were super kind and friendly! The boat is definitely a must. We loved every day.
Eine sehr schöne und auch besondere Location, die man einfach mal gemacht haben muss. Zum Boot gab es 2 Fahrräder mit denen man innerhalb von 10 Minuten in der City war. Sehr zu empfehlen! :)
We had a great time in Amsterdam and especially on Sonja‘s amazing boat. It is really a special location in the Netherlands and I would highly recommend it!

Juste un grand merci
Séjour très agréable
Nous feront une bonne publicité
Merci
Emmanuel

Wir hatten einen super schönen Aufenthalt auf dem Hausboot, ganz tolle Gastgeber und eine Außergewöhnliche Atmosphäre an den Docks. Zudem waren zu jeder Zeit zwei Fahrräder zur Verfügung die wir auch regelmäßig genutzt haben um die Stadt zu erkunden. Sehr empfehlenswert,  Top.
Sehr empfehlenswert! Wir hatten ein sehr schönes Wochenende! Top!!!

Die Tasmania war für uns die perfekte Unterkunft in Amsterdam! Man erreicht die Innenstadt in wenigen Minuten und wir konnten trotzdem die Ruhe auf dem Boot genießen, die Anbindung an die kostenlose Fähre war auch sehr praktisch. Das Zimmer ist sehr schön und modern eingerichtet, sehr groß und es besteht die Möglichkeit auf Sitzsäcken oder Liegestühlen das Deck zu nutzen.
Wir hatten ein perfektes Wochenende in Amsterdam und haben die Zeit auf dem Boot sehr genossen!

Sonja's hospitality was so appreciated when we stayed on the Tasmania in July '21.  We were greeted with a smile, noticed the fresh flowers, and graciously accepted the Champagne, sweet treats, jams, & coffee!!!  We enjoyed all the amenities including a cozy bed, hot shower, and strong coffee.    We utilized the two bicycles and snuggled on the oversized beanbag chairs outdoors on the patio.   The hosts had a plethora of reading material about Amsterdam, the Netherlands, and the area including magazines, books, and maps. We really felt at home, safe, and welcomed during our stay.

Wir hatten wunderschöne zwei Tage auf der Tasmania. Einfach ein Traum...sehr liebevolle und stilvolle Einrichtung mit herzlichen Gastgebern! Das Ein- und Auschecken lief ebenfalls total unkompliziert. Unser persönliches Highlight war es, morgens an Deck zu frühstücken, hierfür fand man sogar Marmelade und Butter im Kühlschrank:) Alles in allem hat es uns an nichts gefehlt! Vielen Dank für dieses Erlebnis🥰
Super séjour !
Das Boot ist sehr schön und ist definitiv weiterzuempfehlen.

Es war eine außergewöhnliche Erfahrung auf diesem Hausboot zu schlafen: die Lage ist ideal, das Boot ist super sauber, schön eingerichtet und verschönert den Aufenthalt durch kleine Details (Snacks, Secco). Die zwei Fahrräder, die Sonja uns bereitgestellt hat, haben die Sightseeingtour erleichtert. Wir kommen gerne wieder!

Sonja war beim Check in dabei und hat uns alles erklärt. Sie ist extrem freundlich. Das Hausboot ist total toll, es ist sehr sauber und man ist schnell in der Innenstadt. Wir kommen auf jeden Fall wieder.

Une très belle expérience dans une très belle ville. Sonja et son époux sont sympathiques et discrets. Le bateau est très bien situé, à 20 minutes à pied, 10 minutes à vélo. Le logement est très confortable et bien équipé. Les petites attentions à notre arrivée et les vélos mis à disposition sont un vrai plus. A refaire tres vite car la ville a beaucoup de chose à offrir.

Un endroit reposant et idyllique, à deux pas du centre !
Une hôte chaleureuse et discrète.
Had a great time at this airbnb, worth every penny.

De Tasmania ligt op een mooie plek in de haven, dichtbij de stad maar geen “harde geluiden” van de stad.

De communicatie met Sonja verliep super snel, bij aankomst ben ik ontvangen door Michiel. Michiel heeft even alle ins & outs verteld m.b.t. verblijf op de Tasmania.

Je hebt twee fietsen tot je beschikking waardoor je makkelijk kunt verplaatsen door de stad.

Ik heb 5 heerlijke dagen gehad op de Tasmania, zeker voor herhaling vatbaar en dus een aanrader!!!

TOP sehr zu empfehlen!
Amsterdam ist immer eine Reise wert.
Die Tasmania ist ein Traum, top Lage, gut zu erreichen.

Sehr gemütlich, gepflegt und top ausgestattet!
We were greeted by Joanna's father-in-law and he couldn't have been more gracious. We are delightful stay and only hope one day we will be back to visit.

Thank you for making our stay in Amsterdam so enjoyable. The apartment is clean, bright, spacious and modern. The location is an easy 5 minute walk to the central train station and convenient to many neighborhoods in the city. We particularly liked walking around the Jordaan and visiting the local open-air markets. The apartment is located on a quiet street right off a lively street with shops, restaurants, bars, cafes and grocery stores.

We traveled with family, including our 2 year old son. The apartment had very safe child gates enclosing the stairs, a crib and plenty of fun toys.

We had a wonderful stay - the location and apartment were so cool.  So many great restaurants within walking distance and a bike rental just down the street.  Very easy communication and check where we received great recommendations (loved the recommended cafe for apple pie).   Kitchen had everything we needed to cook when we wanted to eat in.  The apartment was very roomy and comfortable for everyone in the family.  Thank you for a great stay!

Joanna was an incredibly easy person to deal with.She always replied quickly to any questions I had (her website with restaurant suggestions is great by the way).The house itself was exactly as described and was more than comfortable for my family and I,we were 5 but the house could easily sleep around 8/9.I would highly recommend her as a host.

The house is in a fantastic location right next to a lovely shopping area, and the weekend Markets, just off a canal. Joanna was super helpful and friendly and lives just downstairs so is there if there are any issue. The house was comfy and quite, the stairs are steep to say the least but that's town houses in Amsterdam for you. Highly recommend this place to stay and we would love to stay again.
Joanna was a perfect host, extremely accommodation and resourceful.

We loved the apartment from the first minute. Feels more like a typical Amsterdam house, with indeed very steep steps but a lot of charm. Apartment was very clean, well equipped, just felt good. Joanna has been a very helpful host and by the way speaks very nicely French. Merci !
Sonja ist sehr zuvorkommend, blieb aber höflich im Hintergrund. Kann ich immer wieder weiterempfehlen.

Wow, what an amazing place to stay. Really central, next to the ferry to the nice northern part of Amsterdam, the boat is super located. Sonja is a wonderful host. Everything went fine and we had beautiful days in the boat and in Amsterdam. Absolutely 5 stars. Thanks for everything!

An incredibly centrally located luxury apartment that I would come back to in a heartbeat! This gorgeous apartment looked amazing from the photos and was even better in person. We couldn't believe how central it was, right in all of the action in the beautiful city of Ghent! It was clean and very very cosy, we'll definitely be back at some point in the future!

I can truly recommend to go to this beautiful ship!
Sonja and her husband Michael are super cool and helpful.
The inside of the boat is amazing and especially the smell of all the wood inside together with the „ship sounds“ make it highly cozy!

•We also loved it to walk home on a jetty/dock
•even if you are so close to highly frequent places, its so silent here.
You can sit on your deck without feeling the rush of the city!
•we ordered food (via thuisbezorgd) and worked out easily.

❤️

Charming stay, we had our own little separate place on the boat. From the captain's cabin, you can have a quiet drink with a nice view of a patch of green around the Hortus and the canal.  Friendly hosts.

We highly recommend this place to stay in Amsterdam. It’s calm at night but still easy to reach. It was very clean and with love to every little detail. Thanks again for the good and fast communication.
See you soon!

It was SO worth the splurge! You won’t need for any creature comforts, and the scenic setting of the boat is spectacular.
I was just sorry I missed reading a canal ride on Peters electric boat was available for a fee. Next time💗
wonderful location and very accommodating host!

I love it! Peter was great! Helpful and responsive. I’m all about the details. They had coffee, bathrobes and even a cozy blanket to sit outside with. They had extra adapters and coffee! A really great time. I would stay again. Great place!

Heads up for anyone flying out from Amsterdam check out time travel there. It took me 5 hours to get through security so I missed my flight. And had to sleep at the airport. Nice airport but not first choice to do while on vacation. It was bummer.

We hebben een heerlijk verblijf gehad op deze prachtige plek op het water. Wat een leuk, orginele en gezellig slaapplek, met alles erop en eraan! Op goede loopafstand van het centrum en toch in alle rust. Aanrader!
Great location and such a wonderful experiences staying on the lovely boat

It was just wonderful! ❤️ A supercosy place where we felt immediately at home. Peter is such a lovley person and we hope to come back soon. From our point of view it is the most wonderful place in Amsterdam ❤️

Peter is an amazing host and his boat is amazing. He was really pacient with all my questions and was always ready to help. The description is as the pictures shows, really clean, location is great, a little piece and water is just perfect.
Absolute perfection.  The pictures don’t even do it justice.  It was clean, comfortable and a perfect location.  Highly recommend!!
Peter’s houseboat was wonderful. The space was exactly what we needed. The location was very quiet, but close to great nightlife. Would recommend and stay again.

Really lovely place and the ideal way to spend time in Amsterdam. The size was just right, the bed was incredibly comfortable and sitting out on the roof in the evenings was so nice. I’d really recommend this place.

Peter's houseboat is the ultimate place to stay in Amsterdam. Located on a quiet street near the Zoo  area, it was extremely peaceful and relaxing while still being close to areas of interest in Amsterdam. The wheelhouse was cozy but never felt cramped and the sitting area up top was wonderful for relaxing and watching the world go by. Peter was very flexible with any requests and his communication was great. Would highly recommend this airbnb and hope to stay here again.

A houseboat stay that has everything you need! It’s beautifully remodeled, with a pristine bathroom & lovely shower! The fridge, microwave and coffee were such lovely perks to all fit into a cozy stay. The terrace top to take in the views of the canal and the captains cabin to still have a view while it was a colder spring evening were the highlight for us! Peter was very welcoming, accommodating and responsive and let us drop our backpacks early before check in so we didn’t have to lug them all day!
Would %100 recommend this unique stay!
Leuke Airbnb op een top locatie, vriendelijk ontvangst en goede communicatie!

Awesome place! The location is ideal, close to the University of Amsterdam, so plenty of things to see, as well as a glimpse into the daily life of Amsterdam locals. Also a quick tram ride right into downtown, or a 20 minute walk through the beautiful neighborhoods! Staying on a canal boat made our short stay in Amsterdam incredible! Would definitely recommend and would stay here again!

Notre séjour chez Peter était parfait ! L’endroit est magnifique et très bien placé. La chambre est confortable et parfaitement aménagée ! Nous y avons trouvé tout l’équipement nécessaire, et en très bon état. Je recommande vivement et sans hésitation la chambre de Peter !
This is such a great place to stay. Peter Is a great host.

Eine unvergessliche Erfahrung!
Das süße und kleine Boot liegt seit ruhig und lädt zum entspannen mitten in der großen Stadt ein. Wer einen einzigartigen Aufenthalt in Amsterdam erleben will, sollte bei Peter nächtigen ☺️
