Netter Gastgeber - einziger Punkt: es gab keinen Wasserkocher und keinen Besen.

Wir würden immer wieder hierher kommen ☺️👍🏼
Great stay 👍🏻

Das Hausboot ist sehr gemütlich. Die Lage ist ruhig und doch zentral.
Sehr zu empfehlen.
Goed verblijd gehad

My fiancé and I absolutely loved staying here! It is such a beautiful, unique way to stay in the city, and we’ll stay here again in a heartbeat. On top of being comfortable, clean, and having everything we needed (the robes were a nice touch!), it was great to have coffee available so that we could sit on the deck in the morning and enjoy the peaceful canal. Definitely check this place out!
uuff más que una estadía, es una tremenda experiencia, el lugar está muy equipado para estar cómodo, descansar y pasarla excelente.

Great place to stay. Clam and quite but close to the city center. Staying at a houseboat in Amsterdam has real charm.
Peter is a great host. Everything was perfect and I would stay there anytime again.
Loved this spot. Everything as described and would definitely stay again when in Amsterdam
Peter is a wonderful host. Can’t imagine a more wonderful stay in Amsterdam!

Great place to stay to visit Amsterdam. Metro not too far away if you want to go out of the center. Peter is a nice guy and very reactive host when you have a question. The boat was really clean and very confortable
Peter ist ein sehr höflicher und netter Gastgeber, die Lage ist sehr zentral und wer was außergewöhnliches sucht, ist hier genau richtig.
Heerlijke plek op een mooie woonboot, dichtbij alle voorzieningen. Peter is heel vriendelijk en gastvrij!
Péniche agréable à proximité du centre et bien équipé pour passer un bon séjour. Quartier très calme avec vu sur un parc.  Nous avons pu y aller à pied en tram ou en vélo.  Nous recommandons.
Loved everything about it, very very special  place! Great location, clean & great host.  Highly recommend for a real Amsterdam experience. Thank you Peter :-)

Kleines, aber wunderbar zentral und gleichzeitig ruhig gelegenes Stübchen auf einem kauzigen Hausboot mit allem, was man für einen Kurz-Trip braucht. Perfekt zu zweit oder allein mit Kind. Sehr unkompliziert und zuverlässig, jederzeit gern wieder. Danke, Peter, für das tolle Wochenende!

Peter was a fantastic host! the place was very nice, with balcony on the boat viewing to the Kanal and park, there was everything you need, from shampoo and conditioner untill coffee and chocolate milk :-)) I recommend this place definitely

My family stayed at this wonderful and historic Amsterdam home in December and we had a wonderfull time. The home is just what it looks like on line (if not better) and it is in a fantastic location for sight seeing and shopping. The house was beautifully prepared and has every possible amenity for a great short or longer stay.

A great experience.

David

This is a lovely place.  Very well-located, and well maintained.  It is narrow and a bit dark, but that is totally in keeping with the aesthetic of Amsterdam.  Joanna and MP are very kind and reliable hosts.

We loved our stay - Joanna & MP were perfect hosts, striking the right balance between being available at the right times and being discrete, giving us our privacy at other times. Important as they live downstairs in the bottom half of the house.

The place itself is: tastfully renovated, spotlessly clean, has a spacious open plan living floor (lounge, dining and a well appointed kitchen - complete with Nespresso machine). We really appreciated the attention to detail throughout - it was our home away from home and we were all very comfortable.

The location is also brilliant - so central, we walked everywhere with ease. We had intended to get bikes 🚴 and roam around town like true locals - but we just didn't need them. Great shops nearby too, complete with an organic supermarket just around the corner.

Thanks again Joanna & MP for being so helpful and welcoming, we'd love to stay again if we're ever back in Amsterdam.

Best regards,
Nicole

Joanna is a lovely hostess, from the completely accurate directions and descriptions about distances to local businesses and the train station to her recommendations for places to eat.  The apartment is very comfortable and inviting, and the beds are amazingly comfortable.  As noted in the description, the stairs are very steep...just takes a bit of extra caution going up and down.  The location is perfect - in the Jordaan area of central Amsterdam... a 7 minute walk to the Amsterdam Centraal train station, which is great for business travelers who need to commute to work.  We will definitely be back and will rent this apartment again!

This is a wonderful apartment and of historical significance being the home of Eduard Dekker (pen name Multatuli), who was a famous Dutch author and commentator on Dutch imperialism. It is light, spacious, quirky, tastefully decorated and well equipped. It is located in a vibrant part of the city, within walking distance of everything and close to some fantastic places to eat (breakfast, lunch and dinner), all of which are listed in detail by host Joanna. Joanna welcomed us warmly and instructions about the house were delivered clearly. Look forward to a return stay one day.

Joanna and MP went above and beyond to make our trip as perfect as possible. Their home is located in the ideal location to make for a terrific holiday. Their home is spectacular with enough room to spread out and just enough coziness to make you feel comfortable. I would recommend their home to anyone I know and I would stay again upon my next trip to Amsterdam.

Great location in a very central, historic area, but still on a quiet street.  Check in was easy and quick--Joanna was there to give us a complete, very helpful, rundown of everything in the apartment. Communication prior to our arrival and throughout was excellent.  We were 4 adults and 1 teenager and the apartment was very comfortable for us. We had plenty of space. All in all, a great stay. We definitely recommend the apartment to others.

Joanna & MP you very gracious host and very kind in welcoming us to Amsterdam. Our small group enjoyed the neighborhood, the kind people, the Dutch beer and maybe a little wine and cheese. I would suggest anyone spending time in this wonderful neighborhood to get up early at least once (7 am) and walk the canals and enjoy watching Amsterdam families wake-up with parents-children walking and bicycling to school. The city and Netherlands were so much more than we thought and our stay was perfect with our host accommodations.
The beds and linens were comfortable. The kitchen was perfect for our morning breakfast and the comfortable living room was a welcome sight at the end of a full day walking the city. The books, maps and Joanna's suggestions were greatly appreciated ! The location is perfect to explore Amsterdam or catch a train or bus to explore the other cities and villages of the Netherlands.

Thank You Joanna & MP
Excellent in all respects...communication, response time, accuracy, location, furnishing, amenities. Highly recommended.
We had a great experience in Peter’s boat. It’s really cosy and perfectly placed !

Fijne ontvangst gehad van Peter, schone en mooie woonboot op een centraal gelegen plek. Konden zelfs nog even zijn strijkijzer en strijkplank lenen. Komen hier zeker nog eens terug als we weer naar Amsterdam gaan.

We spent 2 nights on Peter’s beautiful houseboat. It is situated across the canal from the Botanical Gardens and within walking distance to all the sights in Amsterdam. Sitting out on the patio both in the morning and the evening watching the boats pass by was definitely a highlight. The accommodations were very clean and comfortable. Peter was very prompt with communication and made checkin easy. This stay is a must when visiting Amsterdam.

Toda una experiencia. Dormir en el barco es fantástico. Muy equipado, con un baño genial, una cama muy cómoda (aunque con el techo muy bajo), y un espacio para comer en la cabina con vistas al canal y al parque de enfrente. Peter vive justo al lado y es rápido y servicial. Muy buen anfitrión.
Good location and a comfy bed!

Logement atypique et très cosy.
Bel emplacement avec super terrasse, quartier très vert.
Peter est un hôte sympathique et accessible.
It was absolutely lovely. I would recommend a stay to everybody :)
great location close to city center, public transport, but quiet and beautiful.  Across from a small park. boat itself is lovely, clean, and Peter is kind and thoughtful. highly recommend.

Péniche très bien placé à Amsterdam et très proche de tous les centre d'intérêt. Le vélo est conseillé pour visiter au maximum et le centre est à 5 minutes !  Peter est discret et son logement est atypique. Assez etroit mais tres pratique pour dormir et allez visiter !  Merci pour ce sejour enchanteresse.
Loved the boat!! Peter was a great host 😃
Peter was great!  Very accommodating.  The boat was wonderfully comfortable and quiet.  Could not recommend this stay enough.
A charming, restful space. We are glad we could have a little canal boat experience, and this comfortable place was a nice introduction.
Mooi en fijn verblijf, erg schoon en zeker een aanrader!

What a great find! Perfect for a couple travelling light, lovely location, Peter was always around without being intrusive. Never really felt like tourists. You do need to be able to scramble up and down a ladder though. We will definitely be back.
Best experience of living on a boat in centre of city !

This was a great place to stay. It is close to the Botanical gardens (which is a must-see in Amsterdam). It is also close to the Holocaust memorial monument which is beautiful. It was near to everything but also was not noisy and lots of trees and green despite it being lovely and central. The ship is wonderful and our host was wonderful too. We reccomend this lovely place!

It was a unique stay right across from a beautiful botanical garden. The boat was cozy and we felt right at home. It was nice to have breakfast outside in the morning. Thank you for welcoming us into your house boat Peter!
Cosy cute boat, really well located and beautifully arranged. We had a lovely time, thanks a lot!

This houseboat is a hidden gem and is one of our fondest memories from our trip to Amsterdam.  We recommend this to everyone and hope to return for a longer stay in the future,  thank you, Peter and Binky!
A fantastic place to feel good, very central but still quiet and very cozy. Highly recommended for an adventure in Amsterdam!

Samen met mijn dochter genoten van een verblijf op de KeizerInn. Wat een unieke locatie! Rustig gelegen en toch in hartje Amsterdam.
Netjes verzorgd en een goede en snelle communicatie met de gastheer.
Zeker een aanrader!

Warme en vriendelijke ontvangst
Uniek plekje om te vertoeven..
Vlakbij centrum, metro,…
Een echte aanrader..
Wij komen nog terug!
Das Hausboot hat eine sehr gute Lage. Auch die Atmosphäre ist sehr entspannt. Von der Terrasse aus hat man einen wirklich schönen Ausblick auf den gegenüberliegenden Park.
What an amazing stay with a great host! The location was perfect. Close to the tram in a quiet area. Don’t look any further~just book now! Make sure to request a canal tour….highlight of our trip.
Séjour très sympa. Le logement correspondait parfaitement à nos attentes. Lieu calme et dépaysant. Peter est très discret et très disponible à nos besoins. Merci à bientôt
Everything was excellent!

We really enjoyed our 4 nights at Peters Boot. Peter is very welcoming. The ckeck in and check out was very uncomplicatet. Nice to sit on the deck and enjoy the canal feeling. The nights were quiet. Everything was perfect for us.

Lovely place with a lovely host. Sitting on top of the boat in the morning or evening sun is beautiful!
Peter was super nice and helped us with everything.
If you like a cozy boat room in Amsterdam, this is the perfect place to stay.

This was such a unique and amazing stay for us. The house boat was charming, clean, cozy, and in an amazing location walkable to anywhere in Amsterdam. Peter was an amazing host. He was very kind and took us on the most amazing canal tour that we will remember fondly.

A little slice of peace in a bustling city. You can run all over Amsterdam but instantly switch to feeling things are a different speed here. A quiet a street, a peaceful stretch of canal, and a small park across the bank. It was nice.

Peter simply couldn’t have been a more accessible and proactive communicator. Only a short stay but worth it for the experience.

The apartment is perfect! Contact with owner - great. The flat was quiet, clean, comfortable - we had everything we needed there (clean towels, shampoo, etc) and it's quite well located, not so far from the center (next to apt is the bus and tram stop). For a first time in Amsterdam and using Airbnb, it was definitely a good experience!:) Positive recomendation!

Thanks for a perfect place to stay!
The apartment is enormous, nicely and newly furnished, especially the living room which is really a distraction on your way to explore the city :) Another good and not so frequent in Amsterdam thing in my opinion is good heating system, which was very useful in February. The kitchen has more than you can need. The hosts also kindly left us some food, tea and spices here.
We didn't happen to meet Felice in person, but her sister welcomed us and gave us extra keys. Also Felice's guide was quite helpful ;)
Felice and Chris's place is perfect whatever the company is: friends, a couple or a family.
Hope we didn't caused any trouble to our nice hosts :) Thanks, guys!

We stayed in Felice's apartment for two nights in March. It is the most conveniently located apartment. It really is 5 minutes from Rai station (which is the direct link to Schiphol airport) by the no.4 tram which stops right outside the apartment. The same no.4 tram takes you to the heart of the city in 20 minutes. It was only 15 minutes from the Paradiso music venue where we went. It is perfect.

The apartment itself is amazing. It really does look like a show house, Felice's taste & design is amazing. The bedrooms are large and spacious with clean linens. The kitchen has every utensil you can need. The bathroom is spectacular. The central heating is also really good and heats the house very quickly. The pictures better portray my words.

We met her wonderful sister who showed us where everything was. The town (De Pijp) also felt very safe and is very pleasant. Communication with Felice was also great and she is very understanding to help resolve any issues.

This really is a wonderful apartment and is where I wish to stay again when I return to visit Amsterdam.

Thank you for a wonderful stay.
Jay

We stayed at this apparent for the Easter weekend and we couldn't have asked for more. The apartment was beautifully clean and very comfortable it had everything you could have wanted. The location is great with some lovely local bars and restaurants, the  tram stopped right outside the apartment making it really easy to get into the centre. Would definitely recommend staying here, it was brilliant!

Thanks to Felice I am looking back to a very enjoyable first AirBnB experience. Felice has proven to be a welcoming and caring host. She is very prompt and accurate in her communication and knows how to show you the way around in the neigbourhood. Her appartment is even better than in the pictures. It is neat, cosy, well equiped, spacious and situated in one of the nicest parts of Amsterdam close to the city center. I hope It will be available again during my next trip to Amsterdam.

Well the pictures are just what you can expect and when you arrive it’s absolutely stunning from the outside and it just gets better inside.. great space and facilities , lovely welcome gifts coffee, wine and snacks left for us on arrival. And greeted by host .
Great location only 10mins walk form the centre , 2 stops on the tram or you can use the bikes provided. Would Well recommend to others and would stay there again .. Mike Watson MBE
Très agréable chambre hors du commun.

Quiet location, gorgeous boat, which is around 20min walking distance from city centre.
Host Sonja was really helpful with everything and recommend nice places were to eat. She allowed us to stay longer as there were no guests arriving, which was highly appreciated as our flight was late in the evening. Will recommend to everyone, thanks again Sonja !
Joanna and MP are kind and attentive hosts who offer a spacious apartment in their home. Everything we needed was  provided and the location is excellent. Highly recommended.

You are going to LOVE this home.  First of all the location is awesome.  Everything is in walking distance - the train station, tram station, bars, restaurants, shops, grocery stores.  The interior of the home is lovely, clean, spacious, and super comfortable.  The bedrooms are large with plenty of spaces to hang and store your clothes.  The beds are large, clean, and comfortable.  The bathrooms, shower, and tub are also quite spacious.  We especially liked having a removable hand-wand type shower head, and the hot water comes on immediately without any wait.  The kitchen has everything you need including a large refrigerator/freezer, large sink, dishwasher, clothes washer, coffee maker, dishes, glasses, utensils, and large kitchen table.  At the end of a long travel day, it was so nice to come back to a home with a spacious kitchen and large, comfortable living room.  It was so much better than a hotel.  The owners are amazing.  During the several months before our trip, anytime I had questions, the owners readily responded via email to help with our planning.  For example, we wanted help with tickets to the Anne Frank House, and they helped us get tickets online.  Also, during the months before our trip they helped us line up activities.  Also, my daughter brought an infant (my granddaughter) and the owners provided (at no extra charge) a baby crib, high chair, baby sleeping bag, and they even guarded the stairs with child barriers.  Having the baby comfortable made a huge difference for us.  The owners also allowed us to check in early when our flight arrived during the morning.  The owners were present during our trip to answer all of our questions. There were so many nice touches with this home.  The views are also very nice.  We plan on staying again and again.

The apartment is in the perfect location, in an historic house, with great light and relaxed atmosphere.  Joanna and Mark are easy and caring hosts. Since we were arriving on Mother's Day, we had asked if there could be flowers waiting and the bouquet was divine.  As well, my mother's walker lost a screw and Mark rummaged around and found one. Without that, she may not have walked the kilometers we walked around the exquisite canals.  A guide who picked us up at the house, noted that the stairs aren't as steep as many. Indeed, with the exception of one short section, they were do-able for my 80 year old parents.  Two grocery stores and many delis are within 2 blocks and we couldn't resist a daily fix of some great Portuguese tarts in a tiny store around the corner.

The apartment and location are like a piece of paradise
Very clean with all of the amenities and very centrally located
The pictures do not do it justice as it was much better seeing the place in person
If I could have given more stars I definitely would have
Our flight was delayed by more than 6 hours and Joanna and MP communicated with us during the flight delay ordeal
They were both very gracious hosts and were anxious to let us know where we could eat as well as get provisions during our stay
If you have the opportunity to stay at their place do it!!
My wife and I have travelled a lot and stayed at many places but this by far was one of the best.
Again we thank Joanna and MP for such a wonderful place to stay

If you’re looking for somewhere unique to stay in Amsterdam this is the place to book. Amazing location, the bikes are so handy to get to and from the city, the boat is really close to the ferry’s too. Couldn’t ask for anything better. 5 stars ⭐️

Sonja was was extremely communicative and shared lots of thoughtful knowledge about restaurants in the area.  She was very open and kind to changes that we made.  The boat is even more stunning in person.   The added bikes were great for helping to immerse ourselves in the culture of Amsterdam.  Thank you for sharing your beautiful boat!

This boat was really wonderful and beautiful. It was warm and comfortable. A very special experience. There are 2 bikes available for free which make a lot easier to know Amsterdam. The boat is not in the city center, but it's not far either and you can reach it in 10-15 minutes with the bikes. Central Station is quite closer.  I highly recommend stay at this boat.

Absolutely wonderful spot! Such a dream to spend my time in Amsterdam on a boat! The host, provides you with bikes to get around the city and I couldn’t be more thankful ! I’ve been to Amsterdam twice before but it’s a brand new city when you experience it by bike! Even in the icy cold it was such a pleasant experience. Thank you to Sonja and her lovely partner for making their space so perfect and luxurious. The complimentary wine and biscuits didn’t go unnoticed ! The boat was nice and warm even in the cold weather!
10/10 would recommend to any couple or pair wanting to visit Amsterdam, it’s a must!

The Tasmania was one of the most unique places we’ve ever stayed in and we loved it. The boat house was comfortable, cozy, and had everything we needed. Sonja and Michiel were amazing hosts and they made our stay very pleasant, not to mention they’re very helpful with great suggestion on what to do in the city. The location couldn’t be better. Sonja offered their bikes and we were able to ride around town and that was an amazing experience. We will definitely stay there again. ☺️😎🥰

Dieses Hausboot ist definitiv eine Reise wert.
Eine sehr schöne Erfahrung und super nette Gastgeber.
Sonja is een gastvrije en flexibele hostess. Ze reageert snel op berichtjes wat prettig werkt!

Aboard the Tasmania you will enter a magical world, well welcomed and pampered. You will find everything you need to make your holiday unforgettable and endless... Because it will always remain in your heart❤️

Well what a wonderful base to explore Amsterdam. I am so glad we found this houseboat because it really made our holiday extra special.
We were originally supposed to stay back in October but Covid delayed things slightly. Sonja was very understanding and accomodating when we needed to change the booking.
We really appreciated the wine and coffee on arrival.
The boat itself was a perfect size for us and was modern and immaculately clean.
It was easy to get in and out of the boat and was very peaceful. We were grateful for the opportunity to use the bikes but we preferred to walk (averaging 30000 steps a day!!!!)
Would definitely recommended.

The perfect stay.
The boat was as beautiful as the pictures show it to be. There are some lovely restaurants and cafes nearby and the centre is only a 30minute walk away.
Michael was kind and thoughtful throughout, and we felt totally safe and secure the entire stay.
Many thanks, once again.
Michael and Lani.

Wir hatten einen sehr schönen Aufenthalt und haben uns,  umgeben von der stilvollen Einrichtung des Boots , sehr wohl gefühlt. Praktisch war für uns , dass wir die Fahrräder zur Erkundung der Stadt nutzen konnten , so waren wir nicht auf Bus und Bahn angewiesen . Da die Unterkunft nahe an der kostenlosen Fähre zur NDSM - Werft liegt haben wir das tolle Straat Museum ( Street art) schon am frühen Morgen besucht. Eine tolle Erfahrung und zu dieser Zeit nicht so überfüllt.
Amazing location , a unique experience.,  very comfortable and clean. The host (Sonja and Micheal) are  very welcoming and so helpful.

We had a brilliant stay - thank you so much for having us Sonja. Good communication, very friendly hosts, and the boat was just fantastic. Very well presented, clean, well equipped kitchen and bathroom, and being able to use the bikes and top deck were really bonuses.
Only a 30 minute walk into central Amsterdam, or a 10 minute bus ride. Close to a supermarket and the bus stop is less than a 5 minute walk from the boat.
Highly recommend staying here!
What else can be said ? Perfect stay, great location, several small attentions from the owner, great littery, don’t hesitate, just book !

Wonderful location, wonderful hosts, wonderful stay ! We highly recommend

Thank you again Sonja and Michael

Absolutely amazing place to stay! Everything was so well thought out and the little personal touches really made the trip! Sonja was a very helpful host and offered recommendations and gave helpful instructions as well. We were so sad we had to leave but will definitely be looking here first if we ever come back.

Wir waren 3 Tage auf der Tasmania und haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt ! Das Boot ist wunderschön und hat eine super Lage um Amsterdam zu erkunden. Wir sind zu Fuß ca. 30 min bis zum Zentrum gegangen .
Mit einem Wein ( Sonjas Willkommensgruss ) in der Hand haben wir den Sonnenuntergang auf dem Deck genossen . Wir kommen gerne wieder :-)

Fantastic accommodation in the city centre! Central station is only a 10-15 minute cycle away. Sonja was incredobly accommodating and the property was WOW! We came super late and she still took the time to wait up for us and walk us through everything. She was also readily available to answer any other queries. Absolutely fabulous, will definitely return!

Wir können dieses tolle Hausboot nur empfehlen!
Sonja und Michiel sind gute Gastgeber und es hat uns an nichts gefehlt.
Wer Amsterdam besuchen möchte, sollte unbedingt die Gelegenheit nutzen und sich durch die sanften Bewerbungen eines Hausbootes in den Schlaf wiegen lassen. Eine super Erfahrung!
Definitely a great experience.

Sonja est une hôtesse parfaite !
Elle vous accueille en toute simplicité dans cette magnifique péniche. La chambre est bien séparée des parties habitables ce qui vous permet d'aller et venir sans déranger. La chambre est magnifique, ce séjour en péniche est dépaysant. La literie est si confortable, la lumière au matin féerique, et les petits mets gourmands laissés par Sonja sont délicieux. Nous recommandons à tous !
Our stay was perfect! The experience on Sonja’s boat was very pleasent and I really recommend it.
Wir haben unser verlängertes Wochenende in Amsterdam bei Sonja auf dem Hausboot verbracht und uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Wir kommen gerne wieder.
Situation idylique, parking payant à 10 min à pied, séjour dépaysant et original. Vraiment idéal pour un séjour en amoureux.
Michael and Sonja have a wonderful boat. Fantastic and unique accommodation.  Highly recommend.

This is the most unique Airbnb we've stayed in.    It was super quiet at night since it is in the harbor. In the morning there maybe some birds and ferry making noise. It is 2 min walk to the nearest ferry station. The shower works well and is tall enough for my husband who is 6'5". The bed is comfy and also long enough. WiFi speeds are high so zoom is no problem. The port windows all have coverings so it stays dark in the morning. There was a nice restaurant Bak very nearby. The bikes were a bit old so we didn't use them. There is no AC so it can get a bit hot in the morning (would keep a window open). It was a 5 min car ride / 20 min walk to the Central station so super convenient. No kitchens are allowed in Amsterdam rentals, there's a mini fridge and sink and all the equipment for coffee making. We would stay here again.
We had a great time at Sonja's place. We highly recommend!!
Très bon séjour ! Cosy.
Sonja is amazing and so is the Tasmania! A perfect stay with a perfect host! Thanks so much Sonja!
Kaffee, Getränke sind ein netter Zusatz Service. Alles in allem sehr zu empfehlen . Die Lage ist gut, die Anbindung an den Busverkehr auch, mal ist schnell im Centrum
Appartement incroyable, allez y

The Tasmania is a delightful & unique stay in Amsterdam. The space is beautiful! We had such restful sleep with the cool breezes coming in the portals, the lulling sounds of the harbor, & the shimmering reflection of the water on the ceiling inside. Michael & Sonja have these genius discs to place inside each port window to block the dock lights & morning sun. We left them open just enough for the breeze and ambient light so we didnt trip on our way to the w/c. Just be mindful if you have a lot of luggage like we did. We did find space to stow them out of the way, though. There arent many restaurants nearby but you can easily walk a few blocks to a cafe or catch the bus to Centraal Station. Once there, the whole city opens up to you. Get yourself a city card for your transportation & other perks all over the area.
Nice place to stay for several days. Pretty convenient location, not far away from the railway station. The host is pleasant and polite. We were glad to stay here!

Een stukje hemel op aarde en een hele leuk ervaring. Het was heerlijk om elke avond af te sluiten door nog even op het dek te gaan zitten. En de fietsen waren ook een godsgeschenk in een stad als Amsterdam. Aanrader!
Absolut empfehlenswert

If you’re looking for a unique place to stay, this is the place to go. This houseboat is lovely, clean and great value for money. Was lovely to sit up on the deck in the sunshine and great communication with Sonja who is an amazing host❤️ can’t wait to come back x
Wir hatten 2 wunderschöne Tage auf dem Boot. Sonja ist sehr nett freundlich. Es ist alles wie angegeben. Es war ein toller Aufenthalt, den wir sicher wiederholen werden.
Such a unique & beautiful place ! Sonja was so accomodating and the boat has everything you’d need. Very easy to get to and being able to use the bikes made exploring Amsterdam so much fun !
just a magical place :-) perfect
The stay was absolutely beautiful! Was a great place to relax, loved that it was on the water! Plenty of space, super cute and clean. Host was extremely nice and communicative!

I and my husband enjoyed staying at Oliver's apartment. He was abroad but his friend was so kind as to tell us all the not-too-touristic spots and activities we could enjoy. The house is located a little distant from the city centre, with a balcony facing a HUGE park so it's ideal for a cozy Amsterdam experience.

The reservation process was fast; he was helpful and responsive.

We were unlucky that there was a construction outside so the heating was out of order, but out of that, it was a pleasant accommodation.

The apartment was big and nice and had everything what we needed. We don't met the owners but when I spoke with Oliver he was so kind and nice that I was sorry that we wont met(they where on holiday). They arrange friend to show us apartment and give us tips for city and traveling and everything. Oliver called us from Indonesia that is everything OK(great, not ?! :) ) Amsterdam is great great city. It was perfect choice this apartment and we recommend it to everyone :) (sorry for my poor english)

Oliver and Kim are polite and great persons and they are great hosts.
The apartment was very clean and exactly as shown in the Airbnb website. Its was warm and pleasant apartment.
We sure recommend them to anyone who want to travel to Amsterdam.
Everthing in the appartment was great. And also the organisation with a friend of Oliver who gave us the key worked excellent.

The apartment was very clean and comfortable. The view from the balcony was amazing. Everything went smooth. Oliver and his girlfriend warmly welcomed us and gave us a special Holland snack. Oliver provided us some information on what to do on King's Day. They were very nice and I would definitely recommend this apartment to other travelers.

Oliver and Kim were really friendly and helpful upon receiving us on the day we arrived even though it was so early in the morning.  It's a nice and quiet apartment that's next to the beautiful Rembrandt park that's so good for strolling!  The apartment is warm and cosy.  We hope to meet these two again :)

This was my first Airbnb experience, and it couldn't have gone better. The apartment was just as pictured, and we were so lucky because Felice responded quickly to all my questions before our trip and when we arrived. We arrived early in the morning with no place to put our luggage and she was kind enough to let us check in early to drop off our things.

It was easy to find, and just one train ride into Amsterdam from the airport (it's one of the easiest ways to get in) + tram to her apartment. It didn't take very long to get there maybe 20 minutes travel time, not including wait time or not knowing where to buy tickets or how to get to the train station in the airport, so depending on when the next train or tram arrives, and how long it takes to actually get your bearings to know where to take the train or tram, it could take about an hour, we also went to try to change money so it took us longer.. etc.

All in all it was a wonderful stay, Felice was super helpful, and the house is very clean, and orderly, and made us feel like we were locals, which we wanted, to get that feeling of being apart of the city. I would definitely stay here again!

There is also a great terrace up top and, a nice bath, if you want to relax at the end of the day. Very beautiful indeed.

Felice, thank you soo much for our great stay at yours!
It was a wonderful time (although it was very short).
Thanks for all your tips and your helpfulness! :)
Nice lovely apartment in an excelent location!!

Just had a wonderful staying at Felice's house!
The appartment is perfect!
Book it right away, you will not regret it!
Really good location close to the city center by tram!
Felice was really conveniant on the check in and check out!

Great place to stay. Modern and comfortable apartment in a very good area with parking. We did not miss anything and Felice is an excellent and very flexible host. Will try to book again for our next visit in Amsterdam.

Absolutely wonderful house that we really felt at home in. Really comfortable bed and amazing kitchen while also being So close to the tram station which means it only takes 10-15 minutes to get into town. We had a wonderful time and really just wish we had another week there :)

What a great place to stay! Lovely apartment in a lovely neighbourhood just outside of the city centre. A lot of tram and bus options that get you into the centre within 10-15 mins.

Now living abroad, I was visiting my former hometown and needed my own place to call "home" for a couple of days. This was exactly what I needed... Comfortable, spacious and very nicely decorated. It doesn't get much closer to home than this!

Right from the start, great and clear communication with Felice, the host.

Highly recommended!

Great time in Felice's flat, a very beautiful and warmly place not far from the center of amsterdam (few minutes with tramway). Felice welcome us very well in this luxurious apartment (terrace, appliances, space, big beds...). To renew without hesitation. Nils

Dit appartement is ruim, vol licht en voorzien van alle comfort. De tramhalte voor de deur zorgt ervoor dat je in een wip in het hart van Amsterdam bent. Je bent op wandelafstand van de hippe Oud Zuid buurt van Amsterdam. Echt leuk!
De afspraken rond in- en uitchecken werden perfect opgevolgd. De foto's op Airbnb geven een correcte afspiegeling van de logeerplek.
Everything was great! Chris was very welcoming, It was super easy to get into town, and we had a great weekend! The photos are very accurate.

Fabulous clean, comfortable and well-equipped apartment, within easy access of central Amsterdam and public transport links.
We stayed here when visiting family in Amsterdam, and it was perfect for us as we could walk to everything.
If you want to visit tourist attractions you can either walk into the city centre or catch a tram. Or hire a bike.
Felice was very welcoming and provided great suggestions for places to eat and to shop for essentials and treats nearby. Very easy check in and check out.
We would definitely stay here again.
Felice and her husband were super felixaeble. The house was amazing super cozy for our needs. They were really good host, really recommend their house!
Great location, just as described.  Wonderful stay.

Joanna is a great help.  The airline lost our luggage and she arranged to get it back.  The apartment is exactly as described and in a wonderful p!ace.  We walked every where.  The kitchen has enough dishes and lots of pans and pans and a grocery store is nearby.  We cooked almost every day.  The museums are within walking distance.  The apartment is very comfortable for a family.

Thank you to Joanna and MP for a wonderful stay in Amsterdam! We loved our home away from home and the location was great. The house guide book was very helpful for local restaurants and activities. We tried as many as we could and loved them all. Can't wait to come back!
have an awesome stay at joanna and marks place! perfect location in the city, very clean with very nice furniture. joanna was extremely helpful. definitely would stay again!

We had a great stay at Joanna and MP's place. It was a beautiful home with everything you needed for a comfortable stay - and more. It was convenient for getting around the city and Joanna's sightseeing tips were really helpful - even our anti-museum teenager enjoyed Het Grachtenhuis!
Beautiful house, spacious, comfortable, with helpful hosts.

Wonderful and very helpful hosts, great apartment- cozy, stylish and very well equipped...located in a great neighborhood- close to the center and yet feels very domestic
We had wonderful time- for us it was a great opportunity to gather our kids (ages 26, 22, 17 and 12) and spend time together indoor and outdoors
We highly recommend Joanna and MP’s place and look forward to coming back - hopefully soon

These were awesome accommodations for our  trip to Amsterdam!  The apartment was the perfect base for our explorations in the city and also to gather together, socialize and recoup after a long day.  Not only was the modern pleasing and comfortable but we had everything we needed to enjoy our stay.  Our hosts were attentive and extremely informative.  We got great recommendations from Joanna for activities and restaurants and it helped make the difference between what could have been a trip filled with awkward tourist traps to a thrilling week immersed in the jumping Jordaan neighborhood.  Groceries right down the street, numerous restaurants,  bakeries,  it’s a prime location.
Excellent Air B&B. It actually surpassed my expectations and I would stay there again in a heartbeat. Joanna and MP were courteous, friendly and perfect hosts. A+
Very clean and open home on a quiet street that is right next to a bustling street with anything you’d ever need. Perfect location.
Wonderful basecamp for exploring Amsterdam. Great neighborhood and wonderful hospitality.
Great location! Joanna was very helpful. We loved the apartment!

My family and I absolutely loved our stay at Joanna and MP's place. Before we even arrived in Amsterdam, Joanna arranged for us to have a Christmas tree in the apartment as we were there over the holidays. She greeted us immediately upon arrival and walked us through the listing and gave us recommendations of her favorite things to do/see/eat in Amsterdam. The listing is beautiful, clean, well appointed and has a lot of natural light. It is located in an ideal area for eating, shopping and getting around, while not feeling touristy. Highly recommend Joanna & MP's listing!!

This home is in an excellent location. It is traditional Amsterdam, with great amenities, in a contemporary space, with wonderful bed linens and towels. This was a super comfortable destination for our family. The host is excellent, she goes above and beyond with communication and tips.

Perfect location. Steps from a wonderful shopping street, the Harlem restaurant. Nice living space well furnished with the most comfortable beds ever- and I’m picky. Communication with the host was outstanding and they provided a lot of local information and tips. The kitchen was very well supplied with all the dishes, glasses, tea cups etc. we could need, and there were spices, salt and pepper, olive oil etc. for our use which is always helpful when you’re traveling and we appreciated it very much. Not that we had a use for most of these things, as the restaurants in the area we’re close by and outstanding. The apartment does have steep stairs but after one or two climbs I was grateful for the exercise and loved being up on high floors. Each bedroom has its own charm and privacy. It was nice to know the hosts lived in the same building in case we needed anything, but they supplied us with enough information that we did not need to communicate throughout the week.
The place was snug and warm and that even supply umbrellas which we did use a bit. All of us really enjoyed staying here and would stay here again. Thanks Joanna and MP!
Fab place in a fab location. Highly recommend!!!

The location was hard to beat. The Hosts were great at communicating and had wonderful recommendations. My family and I had a wonderful stay. The stairs are a little steep, but that is typical in the older buildings. Would definitely stay here again.

Our stay at Joyce's apartment was really great. It is conveniently located close to the city centre (5 minutes by tram to Museumplein) and near wonderful Vondelpark. The apartment is comfortable and cosy but price is quite reasonable. It is a perfect base for those who travel on a budget and want to live near the city centre. Joyce was helpful and nice, gave us useful tips for Amsterdam exploration and let us have a late check-out.
Highly recommended!

Our stay at Joyce's apartment was delightful. It's a beautiful apartment and was a great space for myself and my friend. It's a lovely area of Amsterdam and really easy to get to. It's Very close to a tram stop and also right next to the park. Joyce was very helpful, giving us direct and detailed directions from the airport and very flexible with our check in and out time which helped us greatly! Would definitely stay there again!
Highly recommended. Friendly, helpful, nice place in a nice quite street, close to the Vondelpark, nice cafes, just 2 minutes to get to the tram, comfortable, cosy - just go for it.

We're happy to stay in the comfortable and conveniently located apartment. Our journey was good thanks to the atmosphere of your home the same.
Thank owner for patience.
Очень рекомендуем для семейного отдыха. Отличное расположение, очень комфортно, стильно, по голландски. Уютно для вечерних посиделок. Радушные хозяева.

The location was amazing - there are grocery stores, cafes and restaurants just minutes from the front door, nearby transportation a short walk away and a park for the kids just around the corner, The home itself had a beautiful, modern, full kitchen and 3 spacious bedrooms - very relaxing decor!  Joanna was a wonderful host, she gave us some great tips on sightseeing, shopping and dining.  We are spoiled for anywhere else and can't wait to return!

Joanna and MP's place was exactly how you see it in the pictures. The description was to a tee. Joanna was also very helpful prior to our arrival. I really appreciated Joanna's quick email responses to all my questions. Great location to most everything. It was also a quite street and we felt very safe. I travel to alot of rentals and I really appreciated the extra condiments that were left behind. Especially if you plan to eat at least one of your meals at home. It was cozy and quant too. Steps are narrow and steep as Joanna points out, but you really dont realize that until you get their a little hard to adjust to. However after going up and down a couple of times you get the hang of it, key is to go up and down, slow and steady. Other than that everything was great.
I highly recommend staying at Joanna and MP's place. If we visit Amsterdam again , I would love to stay here again.
Super nice hostess/host in very comfortable flat in one of the nicest neighborhood in Amsterdam.

Joanna and MP's place is located in a great neighbourhood in Amsterdam. We really enjoyed shopping at the local food shops and being able to walk to many places we wanted to visit. The apartment is really stylish and in an historic building. We slept well on the comfortable beds and there was plenty of space for the family to hang out together. Joanna also gave us some great tips on making the most of our visit.

We loved our stay at Joanna’s. It is a wonderful location for a family.
Great neighborhood and
Wonderful tips on places to go and things to do.
We will return again!

Wow, what a wonderful place to stay in Amsterdam!  Comfortable, pretty, and an amazing location that was both quiet and close to everything.  We had a magical vacation in this apartment and didn't want to leave.  Joanna gave us many helpful tips and communication was great throughout.  We would love to stay here again and highly recommend it.

We spent a weekend in Amsterdam at Joyce's. We were welcomed by Joyce on arrival. Very friendly and welcoming host. The apartment is located in the old south in a quiet neighborhood, very close to the vondelpark. A 10-15 minute tram ride takes you into the heart of Amsterdam. Apartment is a typical old-amsterdam house, very charming character, and lovingly decorated (She lives there!!) !

Me and my girlfriend had a great stay at Joyce's. Perfectly located near Vondelpark its a great spot for experiencing the city. Moreover having breakfast in the garden is always a good start. Joyce is a great host giving lots of useful information. Highly recommended!

Joyce's apartment was absolutely incredible. We loved every minute of our five day stay in Amsterdam. The location was a great spot. We hired bikes for four days and every day we rode the close by park which is a beautiful attraction in itself. Would not hesitate in staying here again. Thanks Joyce!

Joyce has a lovely apartment and has been a great host. She was very helpful and gave us information about the city, places to go, etc., and was caring about us during our stay in Ámsterdam. I strongly recommend the appartment to other visitors.

My husband and I had a fantastic stay at Joyce's apartment.  It's in a great location with lots to do right on the doorstep.  Joyce was very attentive and kept in regular contact with us.  The apartment and the large garden were perfect for our weekend stay.

It was a real satisfaction to discover a little bit of Amsterdam and to be at Joyce's apartment. It is a real cosy home. No words to express our good feelings about Joyce and her tender reception. We arrived at her flat and she was waiting us with a hot tee, a clean and warm home, some advices about the city and a lovely breakfast box. The location was a great spot. We strongly recomend her to all airbnb fellows.

Best wishes Luciana and Ulisses

Joyce welcomed us very warmly and gave us useful advice for exploring the city of Amsterdam. She explained everything to us regarding the appartment.

The appartment is quite old but it has its own style which makes you feel home. The bathroom is very small but ok for some days. All in all everything was very good, we recommend staying at Joyce's appartment.
Nous avons passé un séjour très agréable dans cet appartement cosy! Notre hôte Joyce a été très agréable et nous a renseigné sur les  choses a faire! Vraiment très bien à renouveler!

Joyce est à l'écoute des demandes ce que nous avons beaucoup apprécié. Petites attentions délicates (gateaux, thé, café).
L'appartement est agréable et le jardin un plus.
La salle d'eau est en revanche moyenne (petit lave-mains, pas de lavabo, bain de pied assuré aux alentours des WC).
Appartement bien placé au regard des transports en commun, loueurs de vélo et commerces.

we really felt home in joyce beautiful apartment; her flat is full of a lot sweet details - we enjoyed coming back, every single day. her little garden was amazing too, we had good breakfasts in the sun. the flat is located in a very nice, quiet area of amsterdam, the vondelpark is close by. whenever we needed any help, joyce was there to give us advice - when we arrived the first day she waited with coffee, tea and beer to welcome us. one day we may come back... :)

Dear Joyce
Thank you very much for your warm welcome
We had a wonderful stay in Amsterdam
We enjoyed your flat, the garden and the area..and felt like at home
All the best
Rémy and Hisako

Joyce was a wonderful host! Already before arrival, she was very helpful providing us with some information in advance and replying within shortest time possible to our Email requests :-)
Upon arrival, we immediately felt welcome and enjoyed some cookies and coffee with Joyce, while she was giving us a lot of useful advices with regards to lovely restaurants or things to do and see in Amsterdam!
We had a great stay and look forward to meet Joyce again soon!

Fresh, stylish and clean ground floor apartment with a nice backyard for eating or writing in peace. Perfect calm space for 1 or 2 people who want a restful and relaxing haven in a big city. Nearby Hoofddorpplein is an easy neighborhood to find everything you need, with lots of restaurants and places to watch the world go by (try van Mechelen, or sit by the canal at Gent aan de Schinkel), bakeries and little stores. Just a few minutes from lovely Vondelpark. In about 25 minutes you can stroll through the park all the way to the Rijksmuseum or Stedelijk, even!

The apartment was lovely, just like the pictures, and well located. We love to walk so we walked to every area and we found this manageable. The tram and bus stop is close by and the services are excellent.
Joyce was very helpful and met us at the apartment for check in with tea and coffee. She gave us a bit of information on the area with maps and recommendations etc and sent further emails with tips and maps. We couldn't have asked for a better host.
All towels, hair dryer, some toiletries, milk, fruit were provided for our use which is great when, like us, you only travel with hand luggage.
It was a very nice experience and we would definitely stay again and recommend it to our friends.

Thank you very much :)

Joyce was really kind and welcoming person, she picked me at the airport when I arrived and gave me many tips for my weekend ! her house was charming and like the pictures we can see on the website, I recommend her house for a great weekend with friends or lover !
Joyce made us feel incredibly welcome from the moment we arrived. The apartment was wonderful and we loved the neighbourhood !

The apartment was clean and exactly like in the pictures. And even tho our hosts weren't there until the end Oliver messaged us to make sure everything was okay and they left lots of info and even yummy biscuits. The apartment was beautiful, in the right location and our hosts were a really awesome pair. We would definitely stay again!
The stay was very good. The apartment is beautiful and is located in a very good area. The hosts were very helpful and accommodating. I would definitely recommend staying at this place.

Such a cute apartment in a great location! We walked everywhere.  Yes the stairs are steep, so make sure you and those in your party are able to negotiate steep stairways. But overall -the apartment is wonderful. Joanna was quick to respond to questions and made sure the check-in process went smoothly. I highly recommend this darling apartment for an Amsterdam stay.

Great apartment (more like a house in the sky) for a family vacation. Close to Central Station, sights (we walked everywhere) and great neighbourhood to explore and feel like a local. Joanna provides excellent information on  restaurants, shopping and things to do. Enjoy!

Great location and  great space for our family of 6. The Dutch stairs ,steep and narrow, really help build up the muscles in our legs and helped with our walking. Apartment is  bright, cheerful and quite spacious.

Beautiful, clean, well-decorated apartment in a great location. We are a family of five with teenagers. We had room to spread out, to have our own space and room to be together. Joanna and MP were excellent hosts- friendly, helpful, and available for recommendations to dining and navigating the city. An excellent experience.
네덜란드 집의 특성상 엄청 가파른 계단을 짐과 함께 올라야한다는 부담감도 있었지만 숙소에서 지내는 동안에는 불편함이 없었던 것 같습니다. 쌀쌀한 날씨에도 따듯하게 난방을 켜놓고 잘 수 있는 것은 너무 좋았습니다.

Excellent experience!  This apartment is spacious, clean, well-equipped and quiet.  Beds were super comfortable with nice linens.  Our family of four (including two teenagers) felt like we had everything that we needed.  As others noted, the stairs are narrow but not problematic. The apartment is in a great area of the city with many wonderful cafes and attractions nearby. Joanna was an absolute pleasure to work with  prior to and during our stay - very accessible, kind, and helpful.  We followed the recommendations in her guidebook closely and found it much more useful than our Fodor's travel guide-especially with restaurant recommendations.  We would definitely stay here again when returning to Amsterdam.

First of all thank you to Joanna who spent some time when she first met us explaining the neighborhood and the best museums to visit.  She was spot on with the recommendation to head to Zandvoort beach for the day by train and we had a wonderful beachside dinner at the restaurant Vooges, which she also recommended.  We loved the area where the apartment is, very central and full of tasty bakeries such as Petit Gateau and Bake my Day.  Her list of recommended restaurants/sights is also wonderful and we had a tasty lunch at Belchamel one day.  I would say the Anne Frank and Van Gogh museums are a must.  The apartment was clean, sunny and spacious for our family of 6.  Joanna and MP being downstairs helps to guarantee that any questions you may have will be answered responsively!  We highly recommend staying here! Thank you to Joanna and MP!

Awesome house in a very cool area. Live like a true local. We stayed here two years ago and loved it. We loved it again. Joanna is so helpful and responsive. The house is light, very clean with beautiful touches. Thank you! We will be back!!

Joanna & MP’s property was perfect for a family stay!  The three roomy bedrooms had more that enough space for my party of four. The extra large living room and kitchen spaces were also very roomy with more than enough space for everyone to spread out. Location was also very good; within easy walking distance to Centraal Station. The neighborhood was beautiful at the edge of the picturesque Jordaan district. Around the corner is the fantastic  Haarlemmerstraat shopping district. Lots of amazing shops, grocery stores, and restaurants; it was like a city within a city.  Finally, setting-up  everything up with Joanna was very easy, everything from booking, bedroom setups, questions, and check-in/out was efficient and seamless. When I return to Amsterdam I wouldn't hesitate to stay again!

We had a wonderful stay at the apartment which was lovely and spacious for our family of 4 adults.  Being able to walk to/from Centraal Station was very convenient, especially when we arrived by train and also when we took a day trip outside of Amsterdam. Joanna was extremely helpful and gave us great suggestions for our first visit to Amsterdam. We would love to return!

Oliver's place was really lovely.  It was exactly as he had explained in his description,  it was large and had absolutely everything needed from a fully equipped kitchen to washing machine.  It was cosy and warm on cooler days, and on warmer days it was nice to sit on the balcony and look out at the park . Even though we never met Oliver, he organised for a friend to meet us and let us in. Oliver had left some lovely Dutch goodies for us on arrival. He also was very diligent with checking in on us via email during our stay to ensure we had all we needed. Would absolutely recommend Oliver's place.
Oliver is a great host. The apartment is calm and has a great view on Amsterdam. Oliver and his cute pug has perefctly took care of us. Thanks  !

Joyce was a wonderful host, very attentive and helpful. She welcomed us with a coffee and took time to show us her apartment and ask what we would like to do in Amsterdam. She gave us lots of information and ideas of things to do, which for first timers to Amsterdam was great.
The apartment was light and spacious, in a very nice neighbourhood and only a short tram ride into the centre.

Joyce was a lovely host and we enjoyed our stay a lot. The location was perfect with a supermarket around the corner and with the vondelpark at only 5 minutes of walking. House had everything and was clean. Would definitely consider booking it again.

Joyce war eine sehr nette Gastgeberin. Freundlich, unkompliziert und flexibel. Die Wohnung hat genau dem entsprochen was ich erwartet habe und ich hatte zwei wunderbare Tage in Amsterdam. Sehr angenehm waren auch der Garten und die Nähe zum gemütlichen Vondelpark.

This was actually our first experience of using Air BnB and it couldn't have gone any better.  We enjoyed a fantastic long weekend in Joyce's apartment in Amsterdam.  Joyce was a great host - she responded quickly, gave us detailed information and provided us with everything we needed in the apartment.  The apartment is exactly as you see on the pictures and the location was perfect.  We felt like we were Amsterdam residents which I think is so much better than staying in a hotel.  If we return to Amsterdam we would definitely try and stay again.  Joyce even sent a cuff link back to me that I accidentally left in the apartment.  Thank you Joyce!
Great place, clean well organized and had everything we need it to have an amazing trip. Definitely would go back!

The place was lovely, just as pictured. There was lots of natural light and a nice backyard garden. It's in a nice quiet residential neighborhood with restaurants, cafes, and supermarkets nearby. Very close to Vondelpark, which you can walk through (~25 min) to get to the city center. Joyce was very welcoming and provided us with a lot of information about things to do in Amsterdam.

Joyce was super-friendly and welcoming on arrival. We had been provided with ample information about how to get there. The apartment was just as it was presented on airbnb. It was very tastefully decorated with a very comfy bed and a relaxing sofa. Everything was clean and homely, the kitchen was nice. Joyce's sunny garden is also lovely, full of colour. The area itself is one of my favourites; peaceful, relaxed, near a park, with many nice cafes, supermarket and a superb ('Soto') pizzeria within a minute's walking distance of the apartment. There is also a tram line very nearby.

We had a very nice stay at Joyce's apartment, there were two of us. The apartment looks the same as in photos and the backyard terrace is lovely. Joyce sent us good instructions and info regarding the area with tips on restaurants etc. and everything went smoothly with check-in and departure.
I would definitely recommend staying at Joyce's Old South Lovely Garden Apartment, especially if you are a couple who like to spend time also outside the more crowded touristic areas. The neighbourhood had lots of nice restaurants and a very nice local feeling to it, and Vondelpark is very close. Also the tram ride to the center is very easy and convenient and quick - so, all in all, a perfect stay!

Joyce’s warm hospitality and lovely apartment made a very pleasant surprise.
The apartment looks exactly like on photos: high ceilings, smart design, enough space, green garden with flowers and place to relax after a long walk in the city, all of the above create a unique atmosphere. And you really feel very welcome.
The location is very good for those who are tired of noisy crowds of tourists, very residential and calm area, but at the same time within a walking distance from the lively city.
Additionally, Joyce is a wonderful host. She provided a lot of useful info in advance, left her recommendations of the places to visit and hidden gems.
Overall, it is an excellent value for money. Highly recommended and I'm sure we will be back again.
P.S. Oh, and we survived the most severe July storm ever recorded in the Netherlands!

Oliver is a great host.
We loved the place. It is beatiful as the pictures, very confortable and clean.
Spotless clean place in an amazing section of Amsterdam . Renting this appartment gives you the feel of being a local. The hosts understand true hospitality and are genuine nice people.

5 Stars all around! This is a fantastic place to stay! Do yourself a favor and book now. The location is so convenient to the train and all the sites. The apartment is wonderful for families traveling or couples traveling together. The hosts are WONDERFUL and make every effort to make sure you are having a wonderful stay. We stayed for one week and were able to take advantage of the neighborhood which has a wonderful market, close shopping and restaurants, ​and many places to sit outside and enjoy Amsterdam. It is also very easy to arrive by train and walk to the apartment. We highly recommend this place!

A wonderful apartment in a brilliant location! We had a fabulous stay and it offered everything my family and I were looking for. Joanna’s recommendations from bike hire to museums were also excellent! Thank you! We hope to return.
Oliver was nothing but helpful, and the apartment was perfect! I really like the balcony's view at night. It's really really calming and the air is just beautiful!
Host Joyce was so lovely. Apartment as described.
We had a great stay at Joyce's apartment. It looked exactly like the photos on Airbnb, it's well-located and Joyce is a very friendly and nice host. Highly recommended.

Joyce Wohnung entspricht den Fotos und ist einfach schön. Vor allem der kleine Garten ist toll. Sie liegt in einer ruhigen Straße. Einkaufsmöglichkeiten, tolle Restaurants und Cafés und die Tramhaltestelle sind gleich um die Ecke. Sie ist ein idealer Ausgangspunkt um Amsterdam zu erkunden.

Joyce was a lovely hostess, unfortunately was out of the country during our stay. She gave great directions to the apartment, made it very easy to find. Left a lovely bouquet of flowers as well. She left brochures of the museums . She was kind enough to arrange for a taxi to pick us up the morning we left, and followed up to make sure it all worked out .
The apartment was spacious. With the large windows and access to outdoor space it felt very roomy . Everything worked although we couldn't read Dutch so figuring the microwave was a challenge. We managed to use the clothes washer without problems.
Would definitely recommend this apartment . Mile and a half from Rijks Museum and Van Gogh museum, a lovely walk , great quiet neighborhood. grocery store and wine store around the corner. convenient and very accessible to the tram .

Gorgeous apartment and location that felt both designer and swanky yet also homely. We had a great stay and Joyce was a charming host who helped with all practicalities - she made you feel like nothing was too much trouble for her to help you with. Little touches about the apartment - the coffee machine, the gold fish, the garden, the very very comfy bed - made this a really great place to stay. It is about 20 minutes walk to museum district through the Vondelpark which is right on your doorstep, or an 8 minute very pleasant bicycle ride. There is a bike rental place a 3 minute walk from Joyce's front door, and some fantastic restaurants in that neighbourhood too - we LOVED Indonesian restaurant 'Blauw'. The flat is on a safe, quiet street which makes you feel like a real, local Amsterdammer. It's a convenient location for travel to and from airport as its the right side of town so not too pricey for a taxi (and there is an easy bus). Joyce made sure everything we would want was there ready for us; loads of fluffy white towels, soap, coffee, tea and milk, directions and tourist information pack etc. This would be a particularly nice place to visit in summer for use of the garden, but even though it was winter we couldn't resist sitting outside for coffee.

This is my first time in Amsterdam during the winter and also my first time using Airbnb in Amsterdam, although I've been there many times previously. I needed a place for a long weekend that is located close to my local friends' place that is clean and comfortable. Joyce's place ticked all the right boxes and the listing is accurate. Joyce was very welcoming, being there at the place when I arrived and when I departed.

Something to note is that there is a very nice looking garden that I think would be very nice to use in summer (as you can see from the photos in the listing). In addition, there are two negatives that one should be aware of: (i) the bathroom is relatively small for my taste; and (ii) I did note the neighbours coming in and going out during the night time and in the morning.

Overall, I still recommend this place.

Wir hatten eine wundervolle Zeit! Die Wohnung ist wunderschön, man fühlt sich auf Anhieb heimisch! Joyce hat uns viele Tipps gegeben und uns persönlich die Unterkunft gezeigt! Wir sind sehr sehr zufrieden und planen schon jetzt unsere nächste Reise nach Amsterdam, wo wir erneut bei Joyce wohnen möchten!

Very nice appartment in a typical Amsterdam neighbourhood. Jessica was very nice and gave us all the important information when we arrived. We immediately fell like at home in the very cozy appartment. So, overall can absolutely recommend the place with all the advantages.
One pleasant host, who took care of us! She set of our news during the stay and did not hesitate to show herself available for all our questions. Thanks to you very much Joyce!

We love the apartment a lot! It was clean and facilities were complete. Joyce is a particular host I wish to recommend to everyone as she is extremely patient and generous in sharing her knowledge and resources with us. Her kind offer of bread in welcoming us has touched our hearts.

We hope to see you again Joyce !

Der Aufenthalt bei Joyce war super. Top Unterkunft und Top Gastgeberin.
Die Unterkunft ist sehr schön eingerichtet und war sehr sauber.
Joyce hat uns alles Wichtige im Detail erklärt und uns sogar noch mit dem Parkticket geholfen.
Auch die Lage der Unterkunft ist super. In die Stadt braucht man zu Fuß ca. 15-20 min.
Fazit: Top!
Joyce was a great host place was in a great spot close to park. Apartment was great nice little backyard for having breakfast overall great stay would stay there again

Great location, easy tram ride from central station.  Wine store and grocery store just around the corner.  Very comfortable space, felt right at home.  Quiet neighbourhood with some great restaurants within an easy walk.

appartamento molto grande, ben organizzato e attrezzato di tutto.
Joyce è stata molto disponibile con noi.
The place is just beautiful, we have a lovely weekend here. Joyce was wonderful accomodating our early check in. Great location near lots of great restaurants and cafes. Really highly recommend!
Loved it! Wonderful stay:-)
The floor is very old and toilet not not so comfortable to used

Joyce was a great host and was extremely proactive in terms of making sure we felt at home away from home. She left some nice treats for us and indications to local restaurants and amusements. The Apartment is cosy and well located, some 10 minutes away from the city centre on the tram or a beautiful 25 minutes walk through the park. The place is undergoing renovation so there are some minor bits and bobs that need improvement, besides that it’s a perfect place for your next visit to Amsterdam.
Clean and the best location house. 20 min walk to city center.

This is the ideal apartment for an Amsterdam getaway. The apartment is located in a quiet neighborhood but there are so many fantastic little places around as well. We rented bikes from just around the corner and that was really convenient.

The apartmemt is really spacious with all the necessary amenities. If you are looking to explore Amsterdam while staying in a little home away from home, this apartment is perfect!

Magnífico apartamento, grande y con jardín. Quizás esté un poco lejos del centro pero muy bien comunicado por transporte público aunque si te gusta andar puedes dar un agradable paseo de 40 mins hasta el centro. La parada del autobús del aeropuerto también está al lado del apartamento. Joyce nos atendió muy bien y siempre muy atenta. Nos dejó una botella de vino y unos waffles de bienvenida. Sin duda si vuelvo a Amsterdam repetiré :)
房間非常美麗！房東還會提供景點,讓我們有個美好的假期！
My stay at Joyce’s apartment was wonderful! The place is clean, spacious and close to public transport, as well as supermarkets and cafés. Highly recommended!
Really nice apartment with everything you need. The little touches like extra towels, shampoo, wine and cakes really made you feel at home.
Joyce was a great host and the apartment was  lovely place to stay. Easy to get to and well located.

The perfect place for a couple to stay for a romantic getaway, beautiful stylish apartment situated in a quiet hip area just out of the hustle and bustle. It is in an amazing location; just 20/25 mins from the city centre by tram and the tram stop is just down the road. There is also lots in the area with winery and supermarket round the corner. There are a great number of restaurants close by which serve amazing food and Joyce was brilliant at sharing her knowledge and tips about where to visit. I would absolutely stay again.

Joyce has been very available and we truly felt welcome in her apartment.  The location is perfect, with everything you need nearby and the tramway on the next street. The apartment is clean and beautiful. The only disturbances are the noises of upstairs neighbors and those of the radiators. Those are very minors and didn't really affect the quality of our stay.

Hi,
my wife an I had really beautiful days in Amsterdam. Joyce' apartment is well located, either you take a bus to the center ( 15 min) or you walk ( 35-40 min) and enjoy the park or the streets with the amazing buildings. Joyce is a wonderful host and her apartment has everything what you need and in addition it has very tasteful furniture. Joyce welcomed us with coffee, juice and cookies. She even put flowers in the living room and sleeping room. She prepared helpful information and shared a map, where her personal favorite places of the city where marked. So we tried a lot of her recommendations and had the best apple pie in the city. We totally recommend her apartment and Joyce as host. Just perfect. Always again :)

BR
Rudolf
we had a fantastic holiday from start to finish, apartment was just perfect we would definitely book again
Very good contact and high flexibility. I recommend Joyce’s apartment.

Stay at Joyce's place was an outstanding experience - both the apartment itself and Joyce's hospitality deserve the highest mark!

Communication was smooth and friendly, Joyce was very helpful with everything we needed. Thank you, can't wait to come to Amsterdam again.

Un ami et moi-même nous sommes rendu à Amsterdam et logions dans l’appartement de Joyce. L’appartement est vraiment agréable et cosy et dispose de toutes les commodités possibles (sauf micro ondes et grille pain). L’appartement était vraiment propre et entretenu (la salle de bain à été refaite à neuve). Il est situé à 15/20 mn du centre ville en tram et permet de passé des nuits au calme.
Joyce est une honte formidable qui a été de très bons conseils, et nous a toujours répondu très rapidement!
This place is really amazing! Great space and fun location for seeing different parts of Amsterdam.

When we entered the flat, we were really impressed by the welcoming atmosphere! The flat was lovely, in a quiet and beautiful street with lovely pubs around. Public transport to the city center is also near and you can reach the center in a few minutes. We had a great vacation thanks Joyce!
A tastefully decorated, comfortable, authentically Dutch apartment in a great neighborhood in Amsterdam. I was able to eat lunch outside in the garden a few times which was so nice.

We thoroughly enjoyed staying at Joanna's and MP's airbnb.  It is a gorgeous, spacious apartment in a great location --walkable to just about everything.  We would absolutely recommend this airbnb to friends.

Joanna and MP were life savers. After a host completely pulled a "no show" last minute, I had no where to put three guests that were coming to visit. Although Joanna and MP were not completely ready to accept guests, they worked so hard in about 5 hours to finish the final touches so my guests could stay, and very happily and comfortably. They were wonderful hosts, the location is perfect, the space is beautiful, large and clean. 5 stars all around. We all really appreciate rescuing us!! What an awesome location and beautiful apartment to stay in Amsterdam, topped off by the best hosts you could possibly hope for. First the location is absolutely the perfect launching point to tour Amsterdam, located within the Center City on a quiet street one block from the shopping district and one block from a nice canal surrounded by restaurants and an outdoor market open a few days per week. If you are coming from the train station the walk is only about 7 minutes, so it's a very convenient trip from and to the airport. The apartment has upscale touches throughout and was the perfect space for our family of four. The living room has a door which adds privacy to the apartment and allows for a two bedroom configuration at night, with plenty of space in both rooms. The bathroom is very spaceous and the shower is a real highlight with upscale fixtures and a beautiful tub if you prefer to take a bath.

The apartment is beautiful and reason alone to stay here but the real topper is being in the same building with such amazing hosts. Joanna and Marc-Peter are unbelievably nice and attentive and really made our stay in Amsterdam memorable. They provided great restaurant suggestions, let us know about museums that weren't on our list, gave us the inside scoop on the best tours, bike shops and shopping districts and made us feel like we were old friends visiting for a few days. Absolutely one of the best BNB experiences we've had to date and we would highly recommend staying here when you visit this amazing city. Joanna and Marc-Peter, thanks for a wonderful experience and for sharing your home with us for a few days.
Great Apartment and perfect Location. Friendly and hospitable.

Joanna and MP's flat is truly wonderful. They are tremendously gifted hosts who have created an elegant, spotlessly clean, stylish apartment in an  awesome location. The apartment is fantastic! Great location, walkable to everything in town. I would definitely recommend to anyone going to Amsterdam. Joanna was extremely helpful with local tourist activities also. Perfect English for anyone with concerns on this. Thank you Jo!

I am staying more than 200 nights per year out of my home, which makes me maybe a bit more critical than some other people. And, sindce Ivan and his wife rent out their places as professionals I/we expect the same standards as I would expect from any hotel, especially since the prices or this flat are also quiet high.

Ivan and his wife were friendly upon our arrival, therefore nothing to complain. And, that the steirs are extremly steep to reach the flat isnot their failure, but typically for Amsterdam. Also the surroundings of the flat and the location fitted our need very well.

On the first view the masterbedroom is very nice and big, and also the second bedroom on top is fine. But, fore sure this is not a flat for 6 adults, because the quality and the space in the connecting room is inaccepptable. The whole interior provides is lower IKEA standard, just installed to people, who stay only a few days. The whole craftsmanship of the items/cabinets installed is of poor quality and should be enhanced a lot

All this points would not have led us down, if the flat would have been clean and neat. But, we found so many unpleasent details, which in a hotel would have let me leave the building immedeately.

We found dirty cutlery, broken cabinets, a bedcover with huge dirt stains, a freezer part totally frozen, dust, broken hangers, a unsuitable showerhead et. al..., which for me/us is just not acceptable and understandable at all!

It is a different story if somebody lives in an flat, and just rents out a room, as the original idea of airbnb was. But, if you earn you living from it, than you should also lift up your standards as you can expect in a professional business.

I have rented similar places from professional providers in other cities, and until know we had allways very pleasant experiences. And, I trust Ivan and his wife can also provid the same, if they are really up to it.

Sorry, but personally, after our experiences, I would not recommend this place to our friends, even we enjoyed our time in Amsterdam very much.
