Ivan's apartment is very spacious, conveniently located to bus stop and central, and nicely decorated. However, the toilet seat was broken (unhinged/detached), which is quite dangerous. When we told Ivan about it. he said it would be fixed when we left. Not really appreciated for the amount we paid ($1600+). Additionally, the bath tub was dirty and when asked, he said it was permanent stains. My mother bleached it and it got a little better.

We were met my Sol who was a warm and welcoming host. Our children appreciated the basket of treats she had provided. The property is up three steep sets of stairs that we found charmingly Dutch rather than a drawback. There was loads of space for the 6 of us - parents and 4 young adults - although the size of two of the beds in the loft space is perhaps better suited to younger children. The bathroom is almost bigger than some of the whole apartments we have stayed in in other cities. It was spotlessly clean but a little jaded - likely from the impact of a frequent stream of visitors. The location was superb for walking to most attractions and the tram nearby for those further afield such as Anne Frank House. The neighborhood is pretty and a nice mix of residential houses and eateries. A small Spar supermarket is a 3 minute walk. The apartment perhaps best caters for guests who intend to eat out quite a bit as the cooking facilities are restricted due to fire restrictions. This is well described in the property description. Sol explained that it is rare to find properties in Amsterdam that accommodate more than 4 guests as all properties for more than 4 must register as hotels and hence have very sensitive smoke alarm systems wired to the fire station. We ate a lot of baguettes, cheese, cold meat, deli foods and (surprisingly good) microwave meals as a result. Sink plugs are not supplied which posed an issue when wanting to do the dishes; however, Sol promptly resolved this the next day by providing a bucket for the sink, washing equipment and tea towels. Her customer service was excellent. The shower was consistently hot, beds comfy and internet generally good (although patchy at peak times). This property was the most expensive of our month-long European trip but it seems that is the price you have to pay in Amsterdam. Overall a positive experience - gracias Ivan and Sol.

Appartement bien situé et mignon dans son ensemble mais malheureusement nous l’avons reçu dans un état déplorable, ustensiles de cusine pas nettoyé et encore avec des restes, baignoire grasse et pas propre, cuvette des toilettes qui s’enleve, lavabo bouché après un jour et draps de lit pas 100% propre avec des tâches.
It is an authentic Amsterdam house in a very good location. Communication with Ivan was very easy.

The first thing you will see is a long vertical stairs so you have to be careful when going up with your luggage; then you'll think that you have arrived but noo you have another stairs, fewer steps but carved so imagine going up with two luggages. The bathroom needs an upgrade for sure, toilet seat was broken and the tub was dirty. The window in the kitchen doesn't close with any locks or anything and you cannot do any toast since the host said that it may trigger the alarm. In my opinion it was a bit too expensive since the apartment was much smaller than we expected since it looked bigger on the photos.
Otherwise, Ivan's wife was very welcoming and she explained everything. The location of the apartment was pretty fine since we were in walking distance maybe 20mins from centre but there are also some bars around the apartment which are very convenient when you need to relax.
the kitchen wasnt clean and i missed the balkony very much but de location is beautiful.

Thank you for a cheerful weekend stay! Airy apartment full of light.. Nice location, not too far from the center. Easy access from the airport. Restaurants and shops nearby. Beware of the steep stairs ☺️ It would be even better if the host would provide some basic toiletries (hand soap, shampoo).

Logement idéalement situé à proximité du Nemo et du centre ville. Facile d'accès et stationnement de courte durée juste devant pour décharger. Il faut ensuite garer la voiture au parc P+R à l'entrée de la ville très avantageux (10€ pour 2 jours sous réserve de revenir en transports en commun (AR en tram à 5 € pour 2)). Décor agréable et belle vue. Restaurant sympa pour le déjeuner au pieds de l'immeuble.
Neanmoins, environnement bruyant la nuit et literie très molle...
Attention, on ne peut pas cuisiner en raison des détecteurs incendie.
Salle de bain qui nécessite un rafraîchissement ( abattant de toilette cassé sans doute depuis plusieurs visites).
Communication avec Ivan un peu tardive mais finallement sans problème.
Exellent séjour au final.

There were 6 of us in the apartment, we all fit nicely although the third bedroom with twin beds is a landing you pass through to the other double, this is fine if all get on but not a lot of privacy.
However the location of the apartment was excellent, it was clean and comfortable!! Lots of steep steps!!
We will certainly be returning!!

Centrally located with a 10 min walk from the station, 10 from dam square, 10 from the Jordaan.

The tram stop in front of the apartment is very convenient with multiple trams heading to the central station and downtown to the center and the other areas around the city.

Place is perfect and I highly recommend it
Fantastic apartment central to where we needed to go. Exactly like the pictures and greeting etc was very warm, informative and welcoming. Will be staying again
The host canceled this reservation 137 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

This was our very first Airbnb and we had such a great stay at Christa & Yvon's listing! We were checked in by Rogier who was very helpful, friendly and informative. Everything was perfect, it was very central only 1 street across and we found everything. Trams are also right outside the door. The listing was exactly like the photos, the bed was also very comfortable and really nice coffee which was a plus. Would defiantly recommend here and would stay again! Thank you!

Stayed for 4 amazing nights at Amsterdam. Christa & Yvon met us right on the arrival, got a lot of city exploring tips from them. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED place to stay. Definitely staying againg when going to AMS again.
Pavel and Galina/Belarus
Christa was very responsive and provided thorough instructions, so communication was never a problem. Her place is cozy and is in a great location, would definitely recommend!

Ray was very welcoming and helpful. The room is very modern and spacious and is excellently located so you can reach any attraction of Amsterdam in a short walk.
We really enjoyed our stay at Ray's B&B and we definitely recommend it!
The apartment was exactly like the photos, the area was perfect for walking everywhere, and Ray was a great host! I would definitely stay here again. Highly recommend!

Ray was great!  Thanks so much!  A beautiful apartment in a great part of Amsterdam.  Nice private quarters with your own entrance.  Very modern and cozy.  This is a great part of Amsterdam to stay in - walkable to everything we wanted to do.  Thanks again Ray!

This place is on one of the nicest side-streets, close to the center and great restaurants, cafes and shops. The room is large, airy and comfortable--though be aware that the double bed is two beds pushed together. Ray is a terrific host, very attentive and helpful, and he also happens to run the cafe downstairs and restaurant across the street, both of which are hopping with activity most nights.

We looked for a long time to find just the right place to stay for a week in Amsterdam. This was it.
i just thought he was great and incredibly helpfull.

A very comfortable and well-appointed apartment centrally located.
Ray is a very friendly, welcoming yet unobtrusive host. It was our first experience of an AirBnB lodging and on the basis of our stay with Ray we have recommended his apartment and the website to many others.

Great room!  Extremely private and just like having your own flat in Amsterdam.  Ray provided and excellent breakfast every morning at a time that works for you.  Would highly recommend and would definitely stay there again!

Wir waren drei Nächte im B+B zu Gast und fanden das Zimmer sehr schön + sauber . Das Frühstück war gut und die Lage ist Klasse . Mitten im Zentrum , tolle Geschäfte , was natürlich auch mit Straßenlärm verbunden ist ( sehr spät und sehr früh ) . So ist das eben mittendrin im Geschehen . Ray ist ein freundlicher und hilfsbereiter Gastgeber . Wir finden das B+B 9 Straatjes empfehlenswert .
Perfect lcation, Perfect for couples who want romance. Both Christa and Yvon are there for you to have a perfect trip.
Tolle Lage, nette Umgebung, perfekte Kommunikation mit Ivan, wundervolles Cafe im Erdgeschoss!!!Sehr zu empfehlen!!

This is a great apartment. Great location. A lot going on near it. Walkable to pretty much anywhere in the city. Fit 6 comfortably. All in all we had a great time and it was a great place. Highly recommended. We also got some great tips from Ivan’s wife.
Super lejlighed, hvis diverse små ting især omkring badeværelse og køkken bliver udbedret.

We really liked this flat. It fit six of us just fine. It’s located in a good spot, with several good restaurants right next door, and about a 15 walk from the train station. So, you need to walk a bit or catch an Uber to get to the main sites, but really not that far at all. And of course Amsterdam is amazing.

The flat is well equipped, and the master bedroom is really nice. Very steep stairs which were not a problem for us but could be for some.

We would have liked an extra set of keys to make it easier for several groups going off on their own, but we worked around it.

Overall, a great experience and I would recommend this flat. Thanks Ivan.

Not quite what we expected. Kitchen facilities and crockery were a bit scarce.We were little afraid to cook with all the warns about setting off the fire alarms. No plugs in any sink....hard to wash up. No laundry facilities ...we didn't note that before arriving. Every other Airbnb has had them. Otherwise great location. Resturants near by are very (Website hidden by Airbnb) it a little noisey at night. Easy walk to most attractions.
Zustand der Wohnung könnte besser sein. In der Kücke fehlen Lappen so wie Abtrocknungstücher. Sehr steile Treppen, für ältere Leute nicht geeignet
Clean and comfortable accommodations in great central location

Todo muy bien, Ivan fue muy atento. La pasamos increíble. 😉


Gracias

great location and great host!
the only downside is an insufficient level of maintenance
We had a great time at this apartment. Really good location, comfortable bed with clean bedding, and spacious. Highly recommended.
Spacious, stylish apartment. Great location. Provided a small recommendation binder for food, bikes, etc. Nice and friendly host. Arrived quickly, within 10 min of me calling.
Great location and very spacious!

Ivan's place is in a great location, that's walkable to all of Amsterdam best spots, but also quiet when it's time to turn in.

Ivan was a wonderful host, who was flexible about check-in time and made sure we understood all of the apartments eccentricities before he left us to it. If I'm ever in Amsterdam again with a group, I would certainly look to book Ivan's apartment again.

Would recommend this Airbnb for anyone traveling through Amsterdam with a group! Airbnb is nice and cozy and for the price it's hard to beat. Ivan was great when we checked in but we missed him on the way out. 10/10

The location of this flat is amazing.
The stairs are very very steep, so make sure you can handle that. We had a good stay but the conversation between the host and me was lacking. I texted multiple questions without him answering at all

l'atout principal de cet appartement est son emplacement qui est très proche du centre ville.
le brunch au pied de l'immeuble est aussi très sympa
en ce qui concerne l'appartement c'est très basique mais suffisant si vous comptez ne pas y passer trop de temps...

This is my 3rd Airbnb in Amsterdam.  The location was great-- near some great bars, restaurants, and a gym.  The master bedroom is huge.  The one disappointment was the bathroom.  As others have mentioned, the shower needs some major attention--especially since it serves as the bathroom for 6 people...
Ivan’s Home was cute and quaint with the charm of the Netherlands. There was a ton of space and there were cute bakeries nearby.
The host canceled this reservation 30 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

I was unable to make the trip so only my two daughters went. It was obviously more room than they needed but they texted me pictures and this...😍😍😍😍😍😍 as soon as they arrived at the apartment. Ivan met them there and texted me to let me know they arrived. His communication and accommodation was great. Hopefully will be back again with a larger group.
Perfect location and spacious!

Good location, lovely neighborhood, very close to bus stop.
Very clean house. The only thing, one of the bedrooms doesn't have a self entrance, you need to pass through another one to get in.

We really loved staying here, place is really nice and spacious. Kitchen appliances are quite limited but a nice area with big table. Bathroom is lovely and beds very comfy. Location is quite good only 15-20 min walk to the centre and fab cafe just downstairs. Would definitely come again, thanks so much!
Cool place! Nice host!

Great location, very welcoming host.

If you are sleeping in the upstairs room bring an eye mask as the fire exit sign above the window is very bright!
A very clean apartment in a perfect location within the city. Ivan is a fantastic host and is very quick to respond to any queries. All who are able to stay here are very lucky!

The apartment is amazing, well equipped and comfortable.

As mentioned in description the apartment doesn’t offer cooking space and has limited “social areas” beyond the three bedrooms and dining room table - fine if you’re only there to explore the city.

Would note the extremely steep stairs to enter building, not suitable for anyone not very mobile.

All in all, apartment was very suitable for what we needed for 3 nights. Would definitely return.
Ottima posizione, ambienti funzionali e spaziosi. Casa su due piani, attenzione alle scale: molto strette e ripide.

The location is great. It's close to central station (15 minute walk or 10 minute bus ride). It's two small blocks away from a grocery store, one of the best breakfast cafes in town literally downstairs (Bakers and Roasters), and a number of restaurants within a short block. It's a quiet area, away from the main tourist drag. We did hear the other family staying in the building like they were walking up the stairs to our unit, but that only happened when they came back.

The property description is accurate. It's up a very steep flight of stairs to the apartment door, then another steep flight to the unit. There's an additional set of steep stairs to the upper floor.

The sleeping arrangement for our group (three adults and 2 young kids) worked out very well. The upstairs beds were uncomfortable.

With the lower floor room being a bedroom, the kitchen table is the only place that is common area.

The bathroom seems newly renovated and is very spacious and nice. There isn't a bathroom upstairs, so getting up in the middle of the night to go down the steep stairs to the bathroom took some getting used to.

Overall it was a great place. The steep stairs with little kids and uncomfortable beds were the worst parts, but outweighed by the location.

Ivan was a great host. He was prompt to respond and very quick to meet us when my friend forgot something after checking out. The location is excellent; great neighborhood that’s very central and has lovely restaurants nearby. There is not any way to cook in the apartment which was a bit tricky for breakfast. Also the toilet seat was broken which was a little dangerous as a few times people fell off. Otherwise our stay was great!

The room was clean,Ray was great and the bed was comfortable. Rays place was very well located and is walking distance to almost everything.
We would recommend it and defiantly stay there again.

Ray was the perfect host and his apartment was amazing! Very modern, very clean and perfectly located.
Ray was extreemly helpful and put together the most amazing breakfasts for us each morning.
The location of his apartment coudln't be any better for us. With so much fantastic food and shopping around, it's hard to go wrong.

We hope to travel back to Amsterdam one day, when we do we will be booking to stay at B & B de 9 Straatjes again.

Thank you Ray.

Ray and his apartment are awesome. The room is beautifully decorated and in the heart of the 9x9. Best pillows I have ever slept on. Raybrings you breakfast every morning and could not be more accommodating. When he found out that we didn't like bread and meat for breakfast, he went out and we had fruit and yogurt the next day. He changed our towels midway through the 4 day stay and gave us access to his laundry. The restaurant that he own downstairs has a great 3 course pre fixe.  I am a big fan and wolf recommend his place to anyone

A perfect place and location for your trip to Amsterdam. The BnB is very clean, modern and comfortable above a flower shop on a small street close to everything. We did not meet Ray as he was on holiday, but he was still easily reachable, and he put us in contact with Stefano. Stefano met us and let us in earlier than our check in time which was very helpful and served us tasty breads, meats and cheese in the morning along with any type of coffee you would like and juice. I would definitely recommend this place. I just wished it was available on our second stop to the city.

Very good location, close to the centre, about 15/20 minutes to walk or 2 stops on the 22 bus from central station. Apartment was spacious and as described.  The stairs are steep and some might find this a problem.  Great breakfast place downstairs (Bakers and Roosters), so the no cooking rule was not a problem.  Ivan was very quick to respond to our messages and was very helpful.

Great apartment and outstanding location
Ivan was an excellent host
Great value, very spacious. Ivan is very clear about the kitchen facilities so we knew what to expect! We'd recommend Ivan place very highly!!!

The apartment is close to the centre and we were able to walk everywhere we wanted to visit, including the central station for arrival and departure.  It was clean and comfortable and exactly as advertised. Be prepared for 3 steep staircases, but that’s par for the course in Amsterdam! The only cooking is by microwave as advertised, but that didn’t cause us any problems. The bakery round the corner is fantastic and the cafes and bars next door are great.
En casa típica. No tiene salón pero es muy amplio un dormitorio. Zona agradable y cerca del centro. Se echa a faltar cocina, al solo tener microondas resulta complicado cocinar

apartamento muito

.

Geweldig verblijf, mooi ingerichte en grote ruimtes, met aandacht voor kleine details, ‘s nachts rustig genoeg om goed te kunnen slapen  en overdags centraal genoeg om volop van Amsterdam te kunnen genieten.
Great location close to Centrum but with local feel. All necessary amenities close by. Really comfortable apartment and very clean.
Très bien, rien à dire.
Eine sehr schöne, saubere und geräumige Unterkunft, in einer guten, zentralen Lage.

Ivan’s apartment is a great space in a brilliant location - a short walk into the centre and the local bars and cafes were great. Ivan responded quickly to any queries we had. We’d definitely stay again!

An amazing spacious apartment which was in a perfect location about 15mins walk from the Station. Stairs were a challange but got plenty of excersise from them and cafe downstairs serves amazing breakfasts and brunches
Sehr zentral. Gemütliche, weiche Betten. Riesiges Badezimmer. Gerne wieder

Location couldn’t have been better: small but comprehensive Spar Supermarket just across the road, fantastic bakery downstairs (de Bakers Van Oost, great for breakfast), lovely little local workman’s cafe (Koffiehuis ‘T Keldertje) with friendly welcoming staff and patrons and other local restaurants that we enjoyed.

House is also very easy walking distance to city centre and added bonus of being less than one block away from Mike’s Bikes where you can hire bikes or take a guided bike tour.

The house itself amply accommodated us (2 teenagers and two adult couples). It is a traditional Dutch house overlooking canal and really made you feel like a local.

Of note is that there are absolutely no cooking facilities- just a kettle, filter coffee machine and microwave. However, the quality of local bread, cold meats etc made breakfast and lunch “at home” quite easy.

Nice flat
•supermarket
•bars and restaurants
•close to train station
•best bakery
....
Great location and great communication with host
Great accommodation and location. Ivan has made my first experience of air bnb a positive one!!

We were greeted by Franklin who was nice enough to wait for us since we were a bit late coming from Central Station. The flat is awesome, typical dutch house with really nice touches. Super comfy beds, location is too and beautiful canal views from the window. Thank you so much!

Ivan's place is in a great location just outside the central city. It's a 20 minute walk from Amsterdam Centraal Station. It's about a 15-20 minute walk to get to many of the central sites like the Red Light District and Daam Square. It's far enough out that things quiet down in the evening. The neighbourhood is very nice, with a breakfast/brunch restaurant at the bottom of the building and a few cafes very close as well. The place is very clean, the beds are very comfortable, the bathroom is big for the size of the flat. We rented bikes for the duration of our trip which made it very easy to get around to pretty much all parts of the city in 5-10 minutes.

This apartment looks just like the pictures if not better in real life. The hosts were more than accommodating between the hand-drawn map of local favorites, accessibility, and communication. In hindsight I only wish we'd stayed longer.

The apartment is clean and spacious and the bed is comfortable. The view is gorgeous and you're central to everything.

Christa & Yvon's hospitality was brilliant! We couldn't of had more friendly people to welcome us on our arrival. They were helpful right from the point of booking until the day we checked out. I would 100% recommend staying here, the house was clean and in an excellent location! I would definitely come back to stay here!

Wir waren super zufrieden! Das Zimmer ist sehr geschmackvoll und modern gestaltet. Das Bett ist schön groß und sehr bequem. Die Fenster sind neu. Das Frühstück war lecker und reichlich. Ray war ein guter Gastgeber! Wir können dieses Zimmer nur empfehlen.

The room is spacious, clean and comfortable, and in a perfect location for exploring Amsterdam.  The breakfasts are generous and kept us trekking all morning.  Ray's restaurant across the street, Lust, is first-rate.  A lively neighborhood.  We would definately rent again.

The Appartement is right in the middle of the 9straatjes, a lovely area of Amsterdam. The Appartement is very nice furnished, clean and cosy. Breakfast was served to the room and was very delicious with fresh orange Juice, fresh Rolls and sunday Omelette. Raymond was very friendly and helpful. To sum it up, we had a Great Stay in Amsterdam Tranks to Raymond and his Appartement.

Wonderful stay in this cute and cosy studio apartment. Communication and check in were all perfect and the personal tips were fantastic (just wish I had time to use them - I'll have to come back!). Highly recommend this apartment.

We (my partner and I) stayed at Christa and Yvon's place for 5 days and loved it. The size of the apartment is perfect for two people and equipped with basics in the kitchen and bathroom. They are wonderful hosts - respond to messages and requests instantly and make you feel very comfortable and at home. Highly recommend this place, especially if you are a couple and want to explore and spend time in central Amsterdam - all the interesting sights and sounds are a within a 10-15 minute walk including museums, the famous red-light district, canal cruises, quirky shops and good brands, lots of bakeries and bars and restaurants, and the Central station. It is very safe, and although the apartment is on a street that is quite lively during the day, it is quiet in the apartment itself.
The stairs are very steep and narrow.

Location is perfect! With in walking distance of the central train station, and close to all the major attractions. Check in was super easy, and Christa & Yvon provide many helpful suggestions for your stay in Amsterdam. Would definitely stay here again on our next trip to this wonderful city.

This place was perfect for getting a taste of Amsterdam. It was very central to everything - maximum 15 minutes walk to most places of interest. Very clean and comfortable, and Christa and Yvon were very helpful and kind hosts. Would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking to stay somewhere affordable in central Amsterdam.

Very nice room in a typical Amsterdam's house. Completely independent it's well located for both visiting and shopping.
Delightfull breakfast; thanks Raymond!

The B&B is located in the city center (9 Straatjes area), just around the corner from a canal.  It's close to the tram, flower market, and shopping area.  We stayed in a large bedroom with a very nice, modern shower.  Raymond was such a good host.  He delivered an excellent breakfast to our room each day.  We appreciated his helpfulness.  We would strongly recommend this B&B to anyone.

We had a great stay at Raymond's place! The room was clean, spacious and had an incredible shower.

It was also very easy to come and go thanks to its own private entrance. The building is located on a lovely street in one of the most fashionable parts of town, walking distance from everywhere. Breakfast each morning was excellent too, with fresh juice, coffee, croissants, meat and cheese. Just fantastic all-around!! Would highly recommend.
Magnifique ! Un très beau séjour! L'appartement est impeccable, bien situé avec de grandes fenêtres!!!

Très bel endroit, plein de charme et très bien placé. En plein cœur du quartier des canaux et à proximité de tous les sites à visiter. Tout le confort souhaité et des petit déjeuners conséquents. Très bonne adresse!
Het was een leuk appartement met fijne faciliteiten, en gewenst speciaal ontbijt werd mooi op tijd geleverd.

THE best place in town. I actually am taking a risk by not keeping it to myself ;) But Raymond is very welcoming, discrete, flexible, and the breakfast every morning is jus fabulous ! It is exactly like the pictures, comfortable, big rooms, clean, very modern.
The location is so cute, full of trendy boutiques and nice things to see. Very convenient to get anywhere from there.
I will be back Raymond !! ;)
Thanks again !

Nous avons eu la surprise et l'immense plaisir d'être "surclassés" dans un autre appartement de Raymond, un loft superbe (bnb xl) dans le même immeuble !!!!
Le quartier est un des plus agréables d'Amsterdam (quartier des 9 rues): cafés bruns et boutiques d'alimentation rapide à 2 pas, quartier du Jordaan 1 à 2 canaux plus loin, centre historique à moins de 10 minutes à pied...
L'appartement était parfait, au delà de toutes espérances, avec mobilier design, cheminée à l'éthanol, balcon ET terrasse, lit king size, douche à l'italienne... aucun reproche !
Et Raymond vous chouchoute avec des petits déj' livrés en chambre à l'heure que vous conviendrez, service très professionnel !
FA-BU-LEUX !!!

We arrived slightly late due to airport delays but were greeted by the wonderful staff at Cafe Doffer next door with our key (they also do great evening meals and wine!) The room was lovely with a nice shower and set in a smaller side street away from noise.

Very close to the centre which we comfortably walked to and from each day, not more than 10-15 minutes from Dam square, the Rijksmuseum, Heineken Factory and Central Station.

Raymond was great and brought up a lovely breakfast to us each morning. Would highly recommend and may even be returning in the summer!

Michael & Amberley x

I loved my air b&b experience in raymond's place. He was a perfect host. The place is great, clean, modern. Great bathroom.
Perfect neighborhood, I could not have been happier. And since I travel to Amsterdam fairly regularly, I will probably stay at de 9 straatjes again..
Astrid
everything was lovely and just as expected. thanks

The apartment was wonderfully set in walking distance of everything and if you needed to go further then the tram stop was just outside. The tram staff were very friendly and helped you get where you needed to be. Thank you Roger for meeting us out the front! Fab map that was drawn and given to us. All brilliant and would highly recommend xx

Great place! It was very central and super clean. Loved the unique touches and tasteful decors (adored the pink toilet paper :)). Beautiful bright light from the windows since it was a corner unit, which in Amsterdam is quite rare. The drapes are heavy and thick in case you want to keep the room dark for sleeping in. You can hear the tram from the unit and some street live, but since we also live in the city, it didn't bother us at all. The staircase to the unit is very narrow and there's no lift, so fair warning to guests who tend to pack heavy :)
The host canceled this reservation 60 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.
Great place, great service... I will definetly come back and recommend it.

This was a perfect location; central in Amsterdam and walking distance to Centraal Station and many points of interest. The apartment is cute, very clean and check in was easy. They provided a detailed map with local restaurant recommendations, which was so helpful. Christa and Yvon are great hosts. Thank you both (and Roger!)!
hi

We really enjoyed our stay. The apartment is a short 5 minute walk from Central Station, right along one of the main streets.

The location is perfect for walking to all the local sights. The museums are a 15 minute walk, but if this is too far, you could hop on the tram which stops right in front of the apartment.

There are plenty of good places to eat, and Christa will provide you a map with all of her favorites.

The apartment is clean and spacious. Comfortable bed. Nice shower. Good wifi. There is a small kitchen (although we did not use it). We did, however, make frequent use of the coffee maker. Not quite espresso, but an automatic machine that uses packets of coffee to make good coffee. There is a microwave to heat up leftovers.

One note: as described, the stairs are very steep and narrow. It's difficult to bring one suitcase at a time, and you need to use the hand rails. Not for those who are handicapped or have bad knees or hips.
If you wanna be near the city center this is the perfect place to be!

This is by far the best accommodation location I've had in all my trips to Amsterdam! Super close to everything and amazing and comfortable vibe! Would 100% recommend this to anyone looking st a central apartment in Amsterdam!
What's nice about this place is the location. The nice view onto the street from the lounge was an added benefit. Can easily recommend this place.

Very convenient location, one tram stop from Amsterdam central station to the front door. We bought a 48-hours Amsterdam City Card, ride the tram to everywhere, it save a lot of our energy to explore the city.

Apartamento maravilloso! Ubicado cerca de todo! Tiene todo lo que puedas llegar a necesitar! Destaco la cama que es muy confortable! Los anfitriones son muy profesionales y muy amables! Lo recomiendo absolutamente! Esperamos volver ! Muchas gracias! Dayana y Fernando !

Location, location, location for all you want to do in Amsterdam.
The apt was very clean and comfortable, but no air conditioning if you need that.
Love the updated bathroom.
Communication and meet and great for check was a nice personal touch.

This is a great place to stay, good space for six people and easy to get around. Very close to the maritime and science museum.
Breakfast at Bakers and Roasters next door was fabulous!

Nice apartment in a walking distance to everything in Amsterdam!  Perfect size for a family of 4 or 5.  Ivan is a great host.  One thing to be aware: the steps leading to the apartment are somewhat steep and there are 46 of them.
Great location!

Un casa preciosa cerca de la estación de tren. La ubicación esta bien ya que puedes llegar andando a todas las zonas turísticas. En la cocina solo se dispone de un microondas para cocinar. Todo limpio y ordenado. El recibimiento por parte de Ivan muy puntual. Lo recomiendo!

6 of us stayed at Ivan’s flat and it was great! All the beds were very comfortable and there is a delicious brunch place and bar literally a 20 second walk away. The bathroom was huge and had a nice shower and sinks. It was exactly what we needed, the master bedroom is huge as well. Highly recommend for group of 6!

Ivan's Airbnb was perfectly located near some very nice cafes and bars. Right below the house was a Kiwi owned cafe which had the most amazing food... The location was perfect for us, as it was just outside of the very busy noisy areas, but close enough to walk to and enjoy all the things that Amsterdam has to offer. The house was nice and modern, although some of the beds were a bit dated and could use some upgrading, but they were totally fine for what we needed. Plenty of room, clean and very cute place. Ivan was the perfect host and helped us anytime we had questions or requests. He has a great laid back personality and is a pleasure to communicate with. Overall, its a great place if you are look for a spacious place to stay in Amsterdam and you want to have the authentic experience. I highly recommend this Airbnb.
Super séjour super emplacement

Der Standort ist ideal, nicht mittendrin der Stadt, somit ruhig in der Nacht, und tagsüber alles sehr nahe. Steile Treppen zu laufen gehört zu Amsterdam, so eben auch hier. War aber nicht störend. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und können die Wohnung wärmsten empfehlen.

Ivan’s home was a good choice. It is located less than 10 mins drive from the center of attraction. Ivan was very responsive and stayed up late to great us.
The home is as described. Clean cozy and affordable. The kitchen doesn’t have a stove but perhaps Ivan has an alternative that I didn’t inquire of. The only exception to this place are the very narrow and lengthy stairs to the apartment, if you have heavy luggage be prepared for a workout.

Perfect spot! Within walking distance of many of the sightseeing attractions but out of the busy spot sector. The cafe below is a great spot to hangout! The space was clean and fit our party of 6 perfectly. Would recommend!!
Amazing location ,spotlessly clean ,lovely warm apartment too ,flawless check in ,absolutely perfect in every way,already booking our next trip to Ivan’s apartment ❤️
Great place. No problems what so ever. Bring your own soap&shampoo etc.
The host was available for an questions, gave us some good tips on the city. Would definitely stay there again

Hermosa habitacion con baño privado en Amsterdam. Muy amplia, limpia y agradable. El dueño nos trajo todas las mañanas un desayuno abundante a la habitacion. Muy cordial y amable.
Definitivamente lo recomendamos!!!

This apartment is in a great location for walking into the city centre and many local museums etc. It was quite noisy at night and very early in the mornings in the bedrooms over the street - pub downstairs, reversing lorries and ENDLESS ambulances! The property comfortably accommodated 5 of us for three nights. We were a little disappointed the smoke alarm meant we couldn't cook or even make some toast! Agree with previous warnings about the stairs, but they seem to be the norm in Amsterdam. And we found the beds comfortable though the mattresses did like to slither off the base!
Ivan's place was perfect for my crew of five. Close to transit to take us to Centraal, walkable to NEMO and other destinations, comfortable and cozy. Thanks Ivan!

The location of this home was great and the breakfast restaurant underneath was superb. The room my husband and I slept in was very comfortable and seemed clean as well as the bathroom. However, the upstairs carpet was very dirty and the full bed upstairs had a spring coming through the mattress and was very uncomfortable for our other friends. We also saw mice numerous times throughout the stay. The host didn’t answer me about how to check until about 15 minutes before check in time so we had no idea how we were to get inside the building. I tried to send a private message discussing our issues with the house and received no response. Keep this in mind when booking as I don’t think it’s worth the price he’s charging.
Loved this place amazing central location surrounded by great bars restaurants and within walking distance of everything !!
Great flat and good location near the station and city centre.

Alles wie beschrieben! Top Lage & tolles Kaffeehaus zum Frühstücken gleich im Haus & nette Bar an der Ecke! Supermarkt auch nicht weit entfernt! Der Stiegenaufgang zur Wohnung ist ganz schön steil, aber das steht ja in der Beschreibung! Alles TOP und wir kommen gerne wieder!!!

Ivan's apartment is amazing, beautifullydone up, super comfortable and can accommodate 6 people very comfortably. The location is perfect, you can walk to the city center in about 10minutes also since Amsterdam is such a bike friendly city you won't need to walk much.

Very charming apartment. Walking distance to centre of Amsterdam. In a quite location so you'll get a great night sleep. Beds were all really comfy and apartment was very clean  . Would definitely stay  again. I wouldn't recommend this apartment if you don't like walking far as it w as about 15-20min walk to centre of city.

It was 3 couple going to Amsterdam for a long weekend and, after much research we decided to stay at Ivan's place.
The apartment is nice but it has to be noticed that this is not a 3 bedroom apartment as the 2 upstairs rooms are connected with no indipendent access which means low privacy.
It is also worth to notice that the place is about 20 minutes walk from the central station and not 10 as advertised. The house is clean and it would have been nice to have some decent towels instead of 6 (quite small ones) for shawering and an extra small one to dry your hands. The area the apartment is located in is nice and quite with some local restaurants and pubs nearby.
The check in was fine as Ivan was waiting there for us. I am not sure it was worth the €150 per night per couple we spent for it.

We were burglarized!  The apartment was completely ransacked. Apartment is on the third floor and we had it locked up tight everytime we left.  There was no sign of forced entry.  Someone used a key to enter the apartment.  The apartment next door was also burglarized and they felt that someone had also used a key to enter their apartment as well. There is a security camera in the stairwell leading to the apartments. The camera would have captured images of the burglar, but Ivan has not provided video footage to the police for the investigation. There are two police reports filed with the Amsterdam police for the night of Novemb (Phone number hidden by Airbnb) if anyone wants more imformation. Additionally, we were travelling with my elderly Father.  He was so upset by the robbery that he had a medical emergency and had to be hospitalized.  I must caution anyone using Airbnb to remember that owners do not change the locks or access codes to properties between quests like hotels do.  My Father is okay for now, but the remainder of my time in Europe after the theft was in and out of Hospitals and Doctors offices.  We now have thousands of dollars of medical expenses as well as the loss of thousands of dollars of our stuff taken form Kadijksplein 16.
Very Nice place, would recommend! Thanks Ivan!

Had a great time in Amsterdam while staying at Ivan's. Couldn't ask for a better location as everything we needed was within walking distance. The apartment was spacious enough for 6 people. Everything was clean and welcoming. Checking in and out was a breeze. Will be visiting Amsterdam again soon and would definitely consider Ivan's place next time as well.
Eine wirklich tolle Unterkunft in einer großartigen Lage mit der besten Frühstückslocation im Haus - perfekt um Amsterdam zu erobern -
Great location friendly host
Great apartment and host. Very clean. Cafe below is amazing for brunch! Would definitely stay again.

Ivan war beim Empfang sehr flexibel, herzlichen Dank!
Die Anreise ist sehr unkompliziert, die Lage der Wohnung ist sehr gut und mit direktem Busanschluss vor der Türe.
Die Wohnung ist wie beschrieben und völlig ok.
6 Personen finden bequem Platz.
Die Einzelbett sind eher schmal.

Great place if you’re only carrying a small amount of luggage as it is up a narrow staircase.

The main shower didn’t work, so we had to use the handheld shower.

Other than that the apartment was great, it was a 23 minute walk into dam square, but we took an Uber for €4.

Thanks!
Great location!

Este hombre no es serio y no tiene palabra. Nos dijo uno de sus empleados que podríamos dejar las maletas hasta las cuatro y finalmente no nos dejó y, en vez de disculparse, nos trataron con desprecio y muy mala educación. Muy poco recomendable. Colchones muy malos y viejos. Menaje de cocina muy sucio.
Beautiful location, fantastic place for brunch just below.

La casa tiene toda la esencia de Amsterdam, es preciosa y la suite presidencial es una maravilla, tiene hasta Netflix.. la ubicación es un poco alejada del centro a cambio sales del bullicio de la ciudad, 15 min andando tanto de la estación central como del centro. Muy recomendable alquilar una bici en cuanto lleguéis porque las distancias se hacen muy cortas y se disfruta mucho de la ciudad. Con Ivan muy buena comunicación y muy amable, habla español y nos dio buenas recomendaciones. Por poner una pega, las camas podrían mejorar, son muy blandas pero para 3 o 4 noches esta bien.
Everything was Great!
Hübsche, freundlich eingerichtete Wohnung in guter Lage. Die Ausstattung war für unsere Bedürfnisse ausreichend, es hat nichts gefehlt. Danke für den netten Empfang und die guten Tipps.
Pretty and cozy apartment, just a few minutes from the center away, everything necessary was there, very clean!
Perfect stay, many thanks!

Very nicely located apartment, taking 15/20 mins to walk to Amsterdam centre. The area itself is very nice with a cafe below and a cafe/bar next to it. There is a Spar across the canal (3 min walk).
The apartment was very nice and clean, check in went smoothly and all house rules were explained to us. The only slight downside to it is that due to it being at the top of a tall, thin building is that it does get very hot at night, but with the 30+ degree heat all weekend this can only be expected - Ivan provided fans for this anyway.
Awesome apartment in the center of Amsterdam. One of the best Airbnbs in Amsterdam when it comes to location, style and money-performance-ratio.
Good location, flat is only for slipping. On the first floor is very good Breakfast restaurant.
Fijne locatie en rustig verblijf
Cosy, spacious and clean appartment in the city center!
Super appartement plutôt bien situé, à 10-15 minutes du centre à pied nous avons passer un très bon séjour.

Very steep three flights of stairs to carry up (Website hidden by Airbnb) elevator.  But this 70 year old lady made it up and down just fine!  Great restaurant right next door and a lovely bar that we were able to sit outside at night and enjoy the cool weather.  Walking distance to everything we wanted to see. Ivan was a great host and great communicator.
Good place

what a lovely stay, and what wonderful hosts!

we arrived very late due to delays in our flights, and Yvon still stayed up to let us in, took the time to greet us in person and was wonderfully kind and friendly! we were made to feel right at home.

the place itself is so cute too! beautiful, clean and had literally everything we needed and was very close to where we needed to be! we'd certainly love to stay there again and highly recommend LA Vie En Rose to anyone staying in Amsterdam!

The apartment was amazing. In the best location, nice and quite and a stone throw from dam square.
The inside was exactly as the picture show.
The hosts were so helpful and would deffenetly stay here again
👍👍👍

I loved staying here and felt immediately at home.  Christa and Yvon were very friendly and gracious and went out of their way to welcome me and check on me frequently.  I hope to stay here next time I stay in stunning Amsterdam.
The host canceled this reservation 8 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

First Class Cleanliness and Hospitality! One of the best Airbnb's I have stayed at. Christa and Yvon make you feel at home in their home. They make it easy to really discover Amsterdam. I would repeat!!!
Really loved this place, great location!  Thank you!  :)
Perfect location and fabulous hosts.. Would have no problems recommending this property to friends and family..

The apartment is absolutely gorgeous, and looks just like the pictures. The stairs are very steep, but we were told multiple times about them, so they were no surprise at all.

Sebastiaan checked us in on time and gave us great instructions of things to do and fantastic places to eat throughout the city. Everything recommend was perfect!

Thanks you!

Fantastic stay in a great location!  The house looked just like the pictures, if not better.  Nice living area, good size bathroom, and kitchenette to make some light meals. A coffee maker, coffee, milk and sugar are all provided by the host.  The house had a ton of natural light with large windows in every area of the house that could be opened.  I sat and enjoyed a cup a coffee and a glass of wine every morning and afternoon on the windowsill and people watched.  The location was perfect - Dam Square, Jordaan, Central station are all within a short walking distance.  Great bars and restaurants very close as well. The wifi worked great, the bed was super comfortable, house was clean, and host was super responsive to all messages/requests leading up to and during out stay. Sebastian was on time when meeting us at the property and did a very thorough tour and explanation of the property, things to do, and even had a great had drawn map of places to check out.  You can't go wrong with this place.

My husband and I had a great final stay for our honeymoon at Christa and Yvon's apartment. The place is beautifully decorated and has everything you will need.
Yvon was so gracious at explaining everything we needed to know about the place and all the best places in Amsterdam to eat and see. We really felt welcome!
We would love to come back again in the future!

Alix and Mike

Muy buena ubicación, a solo unas cuadras de la estación de trenes Amsterdam centraal, con lo que se puede llegar caminando. A metros del palacio real, y del red light district. Como todo edificio típico de Amsterdam, la escalera de acceso empinada y angosta, pero con valijas grandes y todo, es posible llegar al segundo piso. El departamento vale definitivamente el esfuerzo. A demás de ser tal cual se presenta, nos recibió Sebastian con un plano de la ciudad y recomendaciones sobre ue hacer, donde comer etc. Siempre a disposición y excelente trato. 100% recomendable. Nuestra primera opción si llegamos a volver a esta ciudad
The location is perfect, walking distance to everything in old Amsterdam. Sebastian was great during check-in and very knowledgable.

Als je een leuk verblijf zoekt in hartje Amsterdam dan is dit zeker een aanrader! Perfect gelegen want veel leuke hotspots zijn op loopafstand. Ik ben zeer goed ontvangen geweest door Sebastiaan, de kamer is top, mooi ingericht! Ondanks dat je in een drukke straat verblijft heb ik geen last gehad van nachtlawaai. Dus ik zou dit zeker aanraden aan vrienden en familie :)!

La ubicación es perfecta dentro de Amsterdam, super accesible a todos los puntos destacados de la ciudad a pie. La habitación es tal cual como se ve en las fotos y el desayuno fue maravilloso, algo en lo que realmente se noto el esfuerzo de Raymond el anfitrión.
Realmente lo pasamos genial, recomiendo este lugar

Raymond's place was fantastic! The bed was very comfortable, the shower and bathroom were nice, and we had enough space for two people. We also loved the street we live on. The apartment was above a nice local restaurant/bar, there were nice shops along the street, and we were close to everything.  And of course, Raymond was extremely friendly and brought us breakfast every morning. We felt extremely welcome and we loved our visit to Amsterdam.

The apartment is gorgeous and in a great location, but the street number was not clear in the AirBnB directions and we had a little bit hard of a time to find the place. Ray is a great host, but we had some miscommunication about our arrival,but after texting we got it all cleared up.
Breakfast was delicious, and we loved our stay. We would definitely stay here again.

This is our first airbnb experience and we loved it.
Bright and large bedroom where we spent 3 nights end June 2015 on a romantic escape.
Canal at each end of the street. Lovely neighborhood close to everything with public transportation, and walking distance as we liked to stroll on these long summer days.
Even though directly on the street nights were quiet with windows closed.

Raymond was an excellent host. The apartment is really great, the location is spectacular, and Raymond's restaurant and bar is awesome (definitely go grab a drink there and grab a bite). He also provided us with a lovely breakfast of bread, cheese, meat and croissants each morning. It's got the full  independence to come and go as you need that we love about airB&B with a little bit of the feel of a real Bed and Breakfast.

Awesome place! First of all, Raymond was such a gentleman when I arrived with my 16-year old daughter: he took my heavy bag and carried it up the 2 sets of stairs. The room, with separate toilet outside the room (but all private), was spacious, clean, light (keep the curtains closed on a hot sunny day!) and very comfortable. My daughter loved the large (rain-)shower. There is a small fridge (to put in your own drinks and/or food), a hot water kettle to make tea or soup and a Nespresso coffee machine - tea bags, coffee cups, sugar & milk is available. Great service! We loved sitting in the large open windows at night and the breakfasts were perfect for us...
The location is wonderful: it is set in 1 of the 9 streets ('negen straatjes') which is 1 of my favourite areas of Amsterdam. The restaurant next door is open from morning to late at night and the menu looked good and not expensive (we did not eat here, definitely next time). It was quiet during the night.
From here you are only a 5 minute walk from the Anne Frank Museum, the Dam (so also the large downtown shopping streets) and 15 minutes to Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum and the red light district. Since you are downtown, it is great to walk everywhere, each street and bridge offers you the real Amsterdam views, feel & experience.
Be sure to go on a water bike!
I suggest you look no further and stay with Raymond - it'll feel like your home away from home :)

Our host Raymond was welcoming and made us feel at home and the continental breakfast he serves is top quality. The room is perfect for a couple of days or a week or two. It is spacious, light and what we loved about the room is that you can sit on the window ledge and look out onto the street watching the hustle and bustle of shoppers. The location is perfect, its is situated in a really cosmopolitan area with fantastic boutiques shops, great restaurants and walking distance to all the tourists sites. Highly recommended for couples.
Brilliant location, amazing apartment and lovely hosts! We would stay again!

This place was beyond amazing, and if I am ever back in Amsterdam this is where I would stay. They had everything you need to know about Amsterdam, where to eat, what to do, what to see .. Everything! The place was clean, and in a very central area !!
Sebastian was a great host and explained everything wonderfully. The apartment was comfortable, bright and convenient.

Después de haber viajado 8 horas en auto, luego de que DB nos cancelara el viaje entren por desperfectos técnicos provocados por una tormenta el día anterior, la llegada al departamento fue una caricia al alma. Christa e Ivon estaban de vacaciones, pero Sebastian nos recibió muy amablemente, y hasta nos invitó un café. Nos dio mapas, y nos marcó los puntos más resonantes de la ciudad, lugares donde comer, donde tomar merienda, donde hacer compras a precios económicos, etc. La ubicación es súper céntrica, a 15 minutos caminando a la estación central de trenes, y a tan solo 5 minutos de la plaza Dam. Cuando nos retiramos, Sebastian esperó con nosotros en la calle, con las valijas, hasta que viniera el taxi a buscarnos, taxi que él mismo pidió, bajo la lluvia, y de madrugada. Superhost!

This place was amazing. Great location, very spacious apartment. It had everything a travelor needs. Very helpful hosts, they even stocked the apartment with brochures and literature about Amsterdam and a hand drawn map of the area. 10/10 would recommend this place and would stay again when we return.

My friend and I had a lovely experience at La Vie en Rose! Located right in the city's center, we were no more than 10 minute walk from many of Amsterdam's attractions. The apartment itself was clean and spacious and the bed was very large and comfy! Christa and Yvon's brother, Sebastian was there to welcome me, and gave a very detailed explanation of the apartment and recommended nearby neighborhoods and restaurants. We felt very welcome and would love to stay at La Vie en Rose again in the future!
Location perfetta, appartamento bello e confortevole. Ottimo soggiorno!

Christa and Yvon's place is amazing. Everything was easy and as described/pictured from the start. It's very easy to access the apartment from the airport using the train and either walking from Central Station, taking a quick cab or taking the tram that stops literally out front of their building. Check in was easy and I appreciated having some flexibility on timing. Sebestiaan helped me with my bag, got me settled and gave me a ton of helpful hints on what to do while in Amsterdam. He was also very quick to respond in the days leading up to my arrival.

The apartment is amazing and just as pictured, so cute and cozy. I wish I could have stayed longer. It is in a great location near restaurants, shopping, and many of the major tourist attractions. The tram is right out front but honestly most things were within a short walk. I would definitely stay here again and recommend to all!
Real Amsterdam feeling, we loved it. Please mind, that the stairs a really steep, but this seems normal in Amsterdam.

The apartment was great. The location is amazing and it is just over a great cafe which serves amazing brunch. The stairs are steep, which were not a problem for us, however people with restricted mobility should be aware of this. The master bedroom is big and spatious, the beds were comfortable and the street on which the apartment is located is pretty quiet compared to the rest of Amsterdam. All in all, we were satisfied.
Waren rundum zufrieden! Danke Ivan!

Raymond was friendly and accommodating. The location is great and the apartment is lovely and as pictured. Great large windows give a lot of light but the street is quiet at night so no problems with sleeping. I would just note that there seems to be two beds that are pushed together and made up to be one very large bed. Included breakfast was a nice bonus!

Fantastic location in a vibrant neighborhood, easy access to lots of attractions. Spacious room - loved the bed, windows and shower. Our host Raymond was friendly and pleasant. We enjoyed the delicious spread of croissants, jam, and charcuterie he prepared for breakfast. Overall I was very happy with our choice!

Raymond ist ein wunderbarer Gastgeber !!! Mit seinem tollen Frühstück hat er für den perfekten Start in den Tag gesorgt.
Es gab jeden Tag etwas anderes Besonders neben leckerem Käse und Wurst gab es Obstsalat, Muffins, Croissants....Saft und Kaffee ....
Das Appartement liegt in einem tollen Viertel -l 9 streets - super zentral mit vielen kleinen Boutiquen , Bars und Caffees. Es ist sehr stylish , alles harmoniert.Tolles Bad und extra Toilette, ganz alleine zu nutzen.
Und ganz wichtig: ein richtig großes sehr gemütliches Bett!!!
Kleiner Kühlschrank und Kaffeemaschine alles da !
Perfekt!! Wir kommen ganz bestimmt mal wieder in die Traumstadt Amsterdam und dann zu Raymond !!
Hele leuke buurt, midden in het centrum van Amsterdam. Hele leuke winkeltjes in de buurt, centraal om alles hotspots in Amsterdam te ontdekken. Raymonds ontvangst is hartelijk.

Great location easily accessible by public transport. Raymond was very helpful in getting our bags up the super steep stairs. The flat is light and airy with a very comfortable bed. Breakfast at home was a nice way to start the day. Bring earplugs if you are a light sleeper as there is bar directly under the apartment that parties until 3 am. We had a lovely time and hope to come back to explore more. Thanks Raymond!
Mooi appartement, prima locatie. Goede service. 'n aanrader

Everything was fantastic. The location is very nice and close to everything. The room is clean and cosy. Raymond is a really good host and his breakfast is tasty and fullfilling. We are definitely going back next time.

This is the 1st booking I've made with Airbnb. First impressions.......... If Raymond is anything to go by I'll be using Airbnb a lot more.

Raymond met us and showed us to our room. He is a really nice, friendly guy. The accommodation was exactly as shown in the pictures and as described and was perfect for our stay. It is an excellent location with pretty much everything we wanted within walking distance.

The accommodation is above a bar and so if the windows are open the noise of the bar goes on into the early hours so if you're a light sleeper, bring ear plugs.

If you're coming to Amsterdam and looking at this then I would definitely recommend Raymond and say book it.

I didn't get a chance to meet with Raymond upon my arrival, but was able to retrieve the keys without any issues.  The apartment is located in a great area of Amsterdam and many shops and restaurants are just a short distance away.  Raymond was very considerate and made sure that everything was up to my satisfaction during my stay.  The apartment itself is very clean and spacious, would definitely stay here again.
Chambre spacieuse et agréable très bien située le centre d’Amsterdam. Acceuil sympathique et petit déjeuner copieux servi dans la chambre. Une adresse à recommander.

O melhor local em que já me hospedei na Europa. O anfitrião foi muito prestativo, as acomodações são muito boas e o café da manhã preparado pelo anfitrião é ótimo. Localização de fácil e acesso muito próxima ao museu da Anne Frank em bairro maravilhoso. Recomendo!

The apartment was just as advertised. Very nicely renovated and spacious for being Amsterdam. The location is prime Amsterdam in a lively street with nice stores, restaurants and cafés. Your are right in the lovely canal district - de Grachtengordel! All you need - be it sightseeing or shopping - is within walking distance. Great value for money - highly recommended!

The location is unbeatable!  Amsterdam is a great city for walking and this location makes it even easier.  We walked most of the time during our 4-night stay as most sights/restaurants were within 10-15 minute walk away.  The apartment itself is as shown in the pictures - well appointed and clean.  Hot shower was very nice, good water pressure.  The stairs were a bit narrow but we were fine.  Also as mentioned by other travellers, Raymond brought breakfast every morning - a really nice touch!  Coffee and tea were in room also.

The location was as described, in the heart of "The 9 Streets".

Upon arrival, we collected the key from Raymond, who was working in neighbouring restaurant.

The room, which was spotless, was on the 2nd floor up two very steep flights of stairs.

The bed had a medium-soft foam mattress.

Towels, hand wash and shower gel were provided for the bathroom.

Half a dozen Nespresso machine compatible capsules were provided for the in-room Nespresso machine. We used ours so that we had coffee to accompany the meat, cheese and bread tray which Raymond supplied for breakfast each day.

Tips/caveats:
Light sleepers might need earplugs due to the noise from the street outside (bar clientele at night, dray cart deliveries from 7am).
Similarly, those easily disturbed by ambient light should consider a sleep mask, as the street lights shine brightly through the curtains at night.
Locatie van de B&B is perfect, middenin de 9 straatjes.
Very welcoming...a pleasant experience

Everything was ok.
When We arrived Raymond wasn't at home but he left the keys in the bar next to the b&b.
The appartment is really nice. You have a nespresso so u can have a hot drink anymoment.
It's really near for the principal atractions.
The breakfast was amazing!
Highly recomended!
Hope to come again
Prachtige locatie, fijne verzorgde bediening.  Dank u wel Raymond.

We really enjoyed our stay at Raymond's. He was so sweet to take our luggage up the steep flight of stairs and to bring us realist each morning. The location was outstanding to walk to everything or to public transportation. I would recommend his place. But I would also piggyback on others comments about earplugs since the bar directly below went until 3-4 in the morning. With earplugs I didn't hear a thing.

Raymond was a very good host, he was available to meet us and show us the room and delivered breakfast each day at the time we requested. He was easy to contact in person or by SMS and always responded. The room was very clean and contemporary with good faciliies. It's in the 9 Streets which is a great area with independent shops and bars. We were very pleased with B & B de 9 Straatjes and will be happy to stay here again.

Studio is perfect and at great location, we just walked to every attraction.
Raymond is friendly and responded to all our queries immediately. He brought us breakfast at requested time every morning. Highly recommended.

Five of us spent a long weekend enjoying Amsterdam while using Ivan's apartment as a base. Nothing really to complain about, the space is clean and cozy, location is great (didn't use any public transport except of the boats ;)) and the breakfast place downstairs was out all-time morning favourite.
Recommended!

Great place to stay 10 mins from centre
Would recommend
Appartement propre et confortable, idéal pour un week-end à 5-6, bien placé et conforme à nos attentes dans un quartier calme !
Spacious for 4 people, great location.
Great stay and location. Only a short walk into town and lots of shops and restaurants around to visit

This place is perfect. We were family of five. Parents and three teens. Bakers and Roasters downstairs was perfect for breakfast. The apartment is super location, clean and Ivan very communicative in check in etc.

Only thing to note is limited cooking facilities. Basically only a microwave and kettle. No hob/oven for fire reasons.
Great place to stay in Amsterdam ! Ivan was really reactive, it was easy to get the information.

Ivan was very helpful and came to greet us at the property on arrival.
Apartment was very clean and tidy.
Apartment is also in a great location perfect for walking around the city.
Ivan was good thanks Ivan

Very nice Airbnb. Very well decorated and close enough to central Amsterdam. Would definitely return and would recommend to anyone.
Just be aware there are very steep stairs to get to the apartment (very common in Dutch homes).
Todo bien
Perfect

Brilliant apartment for a long weekend! The area was a 20 min walk into the centre and Ubers were cheap enough if you needed. There is a Spar a 4 min walk from the apartment. An amazing cafe underneath called Bakers and Roasters (do not miss out - add yourself to the waiting list in the morning). Main bedroom was stunning with a lot of mirrors, a TV and chairs. The bathroom was lovely, clean and modern. Main shower head needs to be fixed and hand held hose was only available. Kitchen/sitting area was small but not needed as we were out and about but had enough chairs/crockery/cups etc. Definitely recommend for a friend's trip rather than couple due to the lay out of one of the rooms but it was perfect for us.  One of my favourite places I've stayed with Airbnb, would definitely come back!
I was so sad to miss out due to covid. Ivan was great and helped my friends check in without me. They were all very happy with the accommodation. Excellent value and lovely area.

Ivan’s apartment was perfect for our girls trip to Amsterdam. The photos don’t do it justice - it’s a lovely apartment!
The location is about 20/25 minutes walk to central Amsterdam and we really enjoyed the walk in each day. There is an amazing brunch spot underneath the apartment - it’s very popular so you can join a virtual queue from upstairs and head down when a spot opens up.
As other reviews say, the stairs are steep - but this is typical in Amsterdam!
Would definitely recommend to friends looking for a place to stay!
Great Flat. It was very comfortable  for 5 of us traveling. Awesome location close to train station, tons of good pubs and restaurants in walking distance.
Appartamento molto confortevole ,posizione eccellente !!

Ivan was a perfect host. He met us late in the night to hand over his keys and it was no issue for him at all. The apartment is a lovely space and the beds are extremely comfortable. The location is brilliant with plenty of bars and cafes to have a refreshment in the sun. I would highly recommend Ivan and his place.

Ivan’s accommodation was totally as described - spacious and clean, Ivan is a great host that maintained good communication and I will hopefully be back.

Thanks

Great spot in a local and quiet neighbourhood of Amsterdam away from the touristy areas but close enough to the popular tourist spots. Many shops and restaurants around the area for quick access to meals out. Just a note there is no elevator to the apartment and the stairs are steep to get the apartment (similar to many apartments in Amsterdam).

Wonderful stay at Ivan’s place in East. Loved the breakfast spot on the street level, as well as its proximity to the zoo and oosterpark!

Wonderful option!
Excellent place, excellent address, almost everything was at a walk distance! I'd like to thank you for the great staying at your place, everything run quite smoothly and as expected, if not beyond!

Raymond est un hôte adorable . Il travaille dans un restaurant , la porte à coté de son B&B, ce qui le rend très disponible .Il nous a livré chaque matin un délicieux petit déjeuner à l'heure que nous souhaitions . L'appartement est adorable, chaleureux , cosy et très confortable . (totalement conforme aux photos présentées sur le site ) Joliment décoré, il est largement éclairé par 3 immenses fenêtres et le lit est extrêmement confortable . A notre disposition cafetière Nespresso et bouilloire avec thés et tisanes . L'emplacement est parfait pour partir découvrir Amsterdam . De plus le quartier est très vivant , il y a de nombreux restaurant et cafés bruns autour de l'appartement ainsi que de très jolies boutiques .
Je recommanderai chaleureusement ce logement, et y reviendrait .
Excelente alojamiento! Muy buen desayuno y muy amable el anfitrión.

Perfect location with an easy 10 minute walk from the station and close to the nicest areas and shops in Amsterdam. Apartment is well equiped and stylishly decorated. Great welcome with heaps of local information and excellent communication prior to our arrival. First rate Airbnb hosts.
Lovely apartment, thanks for having us!

We absolutely loved our stay! We will definitely be back. The location was easy to find and great for walking to all the sights. Sebastian was very accommodating and provided great recommendations. Only drawback would be if you are not good with stairs. They added to the charm for us. We would recommend this place to anyone!

El departamento es precioso, tiene cada detalle cuidado y preparado. Es un lugar muy céntrico y accesible de muchos medios. Fueron muy amables todos y el lugar nos encantó. Las gradas de ingreso son un tanto pesadas, pero es algo que lo puedes llevar.

Fantastic location, trams are just right outside but we mainly just walked to most places. Giant grocery store nearby for all your needs as well as charming restaurants/drinking spots in the nearby Spui area. Clean place overall and friendly welcome.

Side note: Might want to pack lightly as getting up and down with heavy luggage is not a good idea.

Everything went fine at Christa & Yvon's house. The flat is very comfortable and nice. The position is perfect to visit Amsterdam and it is located just a few minutes from the train station.
Sebastian is a very good guest and he was always available to give advice.
Super recommended!

Great location very central. Everything in walking distance. Great looking place and super clean. Cons: pricey, very steep long stairs so getting your luggage up is quite terrifying and an effort. The water shower took some time to give out hot water / maintain the hot water.  Other than that, great place if you can afford it.

Richtig schön eingerichtete Wohnung und sehr großzügig gehalten.
Die Kommunikation mit Ivan war einfach und hat super geklappt.
Die Wohnung liegt relativ zentral. Es sind nur ein paar Gehminuten zum Hauptbahnhof.
Hat man die Fenster offen, ist es doch etwas laut da ein Cafe direkt davor Frühstück serviert.
Ansonsten hatten wir einen rundum gelungen Aufenthalt.

can't beat the location and value.  Ivan was very professional.   fyi the steep steps are no joke so plan accordingly but we folded a nice big wheeled stroller and carried it up and down every day so it is doable.

Great location. Main bedroom is great. The other two are very small and connected. The beds in the upstairs rooms are really uncomfortable. The
Stairs up to and within the flat are very steep.

We Loved this place as it was not in the center but easily accessible by bike (which we rented and it was epic).  The best part for us was also Orloff just beside and all the nice people around.  The flat had steep stairs which we enjoyed and should be expected in a top floor older building.  We travelled with two teens and they also loved it.  Bed is comfy, very airy, quiet and authentic.  The shower does not drain, so if you like long shower, this ain’t possible here (when we were there). It was not an issue for us.  We did quick showers.  We would come back.  Thanks Ivan for the easy communication and check in.

Apartment was really nice in a fantastic central location. Expected the shower to be fully operational but that was not possible as only the handheld attachment worked. The shower also flooded everytime we used it. Poor communication from the host when we asked about certain things in the apartment.
Great stay while visiting Amsterdam, Ivan was very helpful when we had a problem and quickly helped resolve it. Would recommend.
Nice stay. Easy check-in, good communication, a little bit hot on the upper floor.
Nice flat, very well located and comfortable. The brunch restaurant near the flat is delicious. Ivan is reactive and very helpful. I recommand!
Nice apartment and great for a family. once you make it up the staircase it's very comfortable and spacious

Bel appartement, plutôt bien situé (environ 15min à pieds du centre).
Gros bémol : il n’y a pas de plaque de cuisson ni de four, seulement un micro-onde!
L’eau dans la douche s’évacue mal et la salle de bain devient vite une piscine.
Attention avec vos valises dans les escaliers très exigus!
Ivan a été arrangeant pour nous laisser les clés le plus tôt possible, en attendant nous avons pu laisser nos valises dans les consignes à la gare (7 ou 11€ selon la taille des casiers).
Nous recommandons!
NB : literie confortable et présence de ventilateurs!!
Cosy place and good location. Very close the central and the street is very calm. Ivan is always online to help.
We had a wonderful stay at Ivan’s. The property was clean and spacious, and there was plenty of space for 6 of us. The location was fab, and we had a fantastic time in Amsterdam. Would stay again!
The apartment was spacious and clean and conveniently close to the centre of the city (about 15 min walk). Ivan was a great host and very helpful.
Great accommodation, lovely area and great helpful host.

We had a great stay in Amsterdam. The location of the apartment is great, probably a 15 minute walk to central station and the centre of town. The coffee shop on the ground floor is amazing, great coffee and amazing food, we ate breakfast there every morning. The Italian restaurant right around the corner is amazing as well. We would highly recommend the apartment and would happily stay there again.
Lovely accommodation and great location.
Fantastic location and very good value! Ivan was really helpful and friendly and the view from the apartment is beautiful.

Raymond's place is awesome!
Perfect location in a quiet and cool neighbourhood with nice shops, cool bars, cafes and restaurants. It's 15 min walking from the very centre; located in the best area in Amsterdam in my opinion, it's the perfect place to visit the city on a morning stroll and you can easily reach museums from there.
The room is really beautiful, nicely furnished, neat and clean, bed is super comfy, every morning Raymond brought us breakfast, he is really nice!
Thanks for everything definitely recommended!
Raymond hat uns sehr freundlich begrüßt und es erwartete uns ein hervoragendes sauberes Appartement inmitten des Herzens von Amsterdam.

It was a really great week end! We were 3 people. The apartment is really lovely and not so far from the city center.
Kelly and Henk are really nice! they did everything they could to make our weekend pleasant.
I recommend them! :-)

Kelly's a great host! She left us a lot of funny notes with information about the apartment. The apartment is very interesting and unusual. Located just a few minutes walk from the tram. You will not regret if you book this apartment! :-)

We really enjoyed our stay in La Vie en Rose!
Location - excellent (within walking distance to central station and tram stop outside)
Apartment - has good facilities (we loved using the coffee machine every morning!), clean, tidy, stylish and spacious.
Host - very friendly and welcoming. They great gave tips and showed us different places on their map. Prior to our arrival they offered information on how to travel to the apartment. They were very helpful!
I have no problem recommending this apartment. I couldn't fault it!
Awesome stay in a wonderful place
Christa & Yvons place was so amazing !! I would definitely stay here every time I come back to Amsterdam.

Sebastian was a great professional, he is very nice, he gave us very practical information.
the apartment was like in the photos; that is incredible. It was clean and super well located.
I really recommend it!

A lovely apartment with everything you could need from arriving off a flight. A short walk to the train station or right next to the trans. The apartment has a great view of the main street which is nice to observe when having a break from all the sightseeing! Sebastiaan gave us a lovely welcome and kept us informed about checking in as he needed to adjust the time. The tips he gave us about the area were excellent and kind of him to share this information. We had a late flight back on the day we were checking out and Sebastiaan was very kind in letting us stay longer. We would definitely stay here again. Thank you very much.

We really enjoyed our stay at the apartment.  The location was absolutely fantastic, walking distance to everything.  The apartment was stylish.  The hosts (especially Sebastiaan) were super welcoming!

This place is located super conveniently between Jordaan, Dam Square and the Central station. It's only a 7 minute walk from the station to the Airbnb and there are tons of things to do around it. We were greeted and welcomed upon check in and got a lot of useful tips and recommendations. They're not kidding about the steep steps, but hey, Amsterdam... We highly recommend staying here for a cozy and pleasant stay in Amsterdam.

La atencion fue inmejorable, Ivon estuvo permanentemente a nuestra disposición, ayudándonos en todo. Es la mejor anfitriona que he conocido, en el lugar habia mucha información util armada por ella. Realmente hizo nuestra estadia muy comoda. El deptaramento esta en el centro, a dos cuadras de todo y tiene todo lo necesario para pasar unas vacaciones comodas. Muy recomendable!
Good place in the center, friendly hosts. It's pretty clean, but shabby. The apartments did not match that on the photos, maybe was other apartments
Excellent place to stay. Very central. Christa and Yvon went out of their way to give us local information to really get the best out of Amsterdam in such a short time frame. Loved it!

Where do I start on this amazing apartment. It took no time to recognise why this AirBnB is rated among the top ten in Amsterdam! A great location to start with....we had no issues walking to the apartment from Amsterdam Central and from here could readily explore the best of Amsterdam.... with great advice and suggestions. We were greeted by Yvonne who was so personable and helpful, making us both feel very comfortable in the apartment. A very tastefully furnished space was balanced  creatively with artefacts and paintings. The double glazed windows made the busy life outside a 'non issue' in terms of a quiet/peaceful night's sleep on what I would have to say is the most comfortable bed I've had the pleasure to sleep in! A 10/10 from us!
We stay for 6 days in amazing place and prime location! Warm and very nice host made our trip just perfect!
Great location, very clean, everything we could want. Amsterdam is a great city!

The apartment is in a great location, so handy to Central and attractions.
Spacious living and dining, the bed was comfortable and bathroom amenities were good.
The stairs are very steep, carrying suitcases up and down was difficult, however you only do that on arrival and departure so it’s not too concerning, considering the apartment is well worth the climb.

Christa&Yvon,
Has the more beatifull apartment in Ámsterdam. The location is great, really near of the train station and dam Square. They are very helpful whit the guests. We really enjoy our stayed in her home.
Thanks you
