The place was as described. Be aware of the stairs, but it's worth it. The owners were quite helpful and fun to meet. Great location for transit.

What a fabulous apartment this is. So close to the Dam Square and so comfortable. The bed is to die for and the apartment itself is beautiful. Christa and Yvon are very communicative and are always quick to respond. We will definitely be back.

Christina and Yvon’s place was perfect for our visit to Amsterdam. It was a short walk from the train station and we were easily able to walk to the popular sites. The apartment was clean and we had plenty of space to relax. Christina and Yvon were wonderful with making sure we got in okay and had everything we needed.

Christa's and Yvon's place is in the perfect spot in central Amsterdam. We were definitely able to walk here from the central station when we arrived in Amsterdam even with a few pieces of luggage. The room was exactly as described and depicted in the picture. You won't be disappointed with staying here.

Mycket bra boende med ett rymligt och fräscht rum i relativt gammalt och charmigt hus. Inget saknades. Väldigt centralt på liten gata med småbutiker. Värden Raymond var fantastisk - trevlig och tillmötesgående. God frukost på rummet. Nästa gång vi åker till Amsterdam kommer vi att försöka bo hos Raymond igen.

This place is in a great location.  Felt very safe.   Our host were extremely responsive to every request.  The bed was great.  Very comfortable. Highly recommend this unit to others.  Only word of caution is the 2 flights of stairs going to the room.  Large luggage can be difficult.
My husband and I had a lovely stay at Christa and Yvon's place. The location is fantastic and the apartment is very comfortable and quiet. Highly recommend

Amazing apartment so close to everything. Heaps of information was provided to us for all of the local attractions which made finding everything really easy. We loved the apartment and would recommend it to anyone looking to stay in the heart of Amsterdam
Great place in great location.
amazing location and cute home
Great space, location and communication. Fantastic stay.
The suite is outstanding. Perfect location and one of the best beds I’ve slept on. Highly recommended if you want to experience a genuine home in Amsterdam

Recently we traveled to Amsterdam and after searching hotels, we decided to look at airbnb options. We are very happy we did. We chose La Vie En Rose and couldn't have been happier. This second floor apartment is centrally located and very convenient for exploring the city. It is walking distance to the train station where you can catch not only the train but a bus or a ferry. A very active tram line is literally right outside the door to the apartment.

There is no need to rent a bike when all of these options exist so close. Very often choosing to walk, we found ourselves a mere two blocks from the canal and restaurants, coffee shops, cheese shops, and a very large grocery store are just a few blocks away.

Staying in an airbnb allows you to feel like a resident. There was privacy but it was comforting knowing that the owners were just upstairs. Using (Hidden by Airbnb) was a very convenient way to communicate with Yvon and Christa if needed and they were very responsive to our inquiries. The apartment was quite spacious for our needs and nicely decorated. Everything was there including shampoo, body soap, even deordorant! The bed was comfy, there was lots of light and a fan (no air conditioning ) it was quite comfortable.

The stairs to the apartment are quite steep, as usual for canal houses, but were manageable. I would not recommend large or heavy suitcases which could make climbing a challenge.

We were worried about the Nuki locking device on the front and apartment doors. This system utilizes your smartphone to lock and unlock the doors. It becomes less daunting once you get the hang of it. It also requires some patience for the phone to 'talk' to the electronic door but for those who aren't use to it, it was a bit intimidating at first. The owners have installed a camera and I think they are able to 'see' if you are having problems and open the door for you... at least we think they did for us the first time we used it.

We would highly recommend La Vie En Rose.

We really liked the apartment:) it's perfect to rent it, especially if you travel with the young company;) we felt
that we are in Amsterdam right after we got into the apartment. There was a great view from the roof so we felt like we shouldn't go to the city. Coffee shop is right behind the conour:) everything was clean and nice and I am Sure that we the service is much better than in some hotels. I will recommended

Kelli and Henk's apartment is a charming space with a great view in a very convenient location in Amsterdam.  They were very friendly hosts and explained the apartment very well.  A great view from the balcony and a cozy space await, so if you're looking for a weekend in Amsterdam send the booking request now :).

Kelli and Henk were great hosts! Their apartment was spacious for our family of four.  We loved the tropical feel of the place and all the plants. It had a wonderful vibe full of happiness and creativity. The apartment was in a cool part of town away from the tourists but close enough to everything.  We loved exploring the area and found everyone to be really friendly.  I would really recommend staying here.    At certain times we wished that our hosts would pop back early so we could hang out with them!  Ha Ha hopefully next time as we would stay here again for sure.

We had a great time in Amsterdam and in Kelli's apartment! We loved all those figures in dining room, ukuleles and flowers in living room, and of course the terrace! Kelli and Henk helped us a lot by leaving many notes describing everything in the apartment. They really took care of everything. Great hosts, great apartment!

Even with the pictures, it's impossible to imagine how this flat is wonderful !!! We was four students in here, all of us dream of a similar house in the future !! Great atmosphere, so much little details, very good music. I take some pictures during this week end, and when I come back in my country, fistly, I showed all the picture of the flat to my friends and after !! haha ! Incredible !
Thanks for all Henk and Kelli ! You gave us a life lesson by sharing your home.

Kelli and Henk were a perfect host for us and the ambiente of their home was just awesome! We loved the apartment with all its details and my kids especially enjoyed the roof balcony. It was very comfy and we felt at home at this place. The house also isn't far from the city centre. We would come here again!

We never met the host, but the  email communication was great and they left all instructions on how to use everything from the stereo to the kitchen. It was in a quiet neighbourhood, not that far from the centre. The apt was clean, funky, fun with lots of quirky things around. We loved it and the hosts made sure everything was taken care of, even a basket of bread and cookies and orange juice. Great hosts.

Kelli and Henk are really great hosts! They have an amazing flat, really beautiful, quiet and with all you can need (even the breakfast!) My friends and I spent a great time in Amsterdam, thank you very much for all :-)

Such a brilliant stay! Thank you so much to our hosts for making us feel so welcomed and for thinking of everything! We really appreciated all the help with the parking situation and the directions into Amsterdam centre. The additional information of where to go came in handy! A really comfortable stay in a very unique home. Thank you again.

We rented kelli's & Henk's flat for one weekend. Contact via email was always friendly and everything worked out just fine. The flat is big enough for four people. And if you prefer a cosy warm and truly interesting aparment then absoluty right here.
Supermarket and tramstation are just around the corner.
We are defintily looking forward to our next stay in Amsterdam at kelli's and Henk's flat.
We absolutely loved staying here.   Beautiful, clean, and quiet.  Henk and Kelli were quick to respond to all inquiries and very flexible.   Loved having coffee on the deck each morning.

Kelli and Henk were great hosts, they made it all very easy and stress free and provided their own little touches such as notes around the apartment to let us know where everything was. The apartment is in a quiet neighbourhood in great location half way between the airport and central Amsterdam, it's cosy and peaceful and full of character. It was the perfect base for our weekend in Amsterdam.

Kelli was a fantastic host. She left really awesome snacks, maps, and coupons for us. There were cute, handy notes all around the house to help us find things. We had a couple questions during our stay and she was very quick to respond to my emails. In addition to being a great host, the house was absolutely wonderful. Best airbnb I've stayed at! It was so cool, interesting, and comfortable! The rooftop is amazing even when it's cold out. I highly recommend staying here!
Raymond's place is perfect. Perfect location, amenities, breakfast, check in, communication. The bed was so comfy! Everything was literally super near.

Raymond gave me a warm welcome when I arrived.  The apartment was exactly as described in the listing and photos.  It was self-contained, clean, warm, comfortable, contemporary and quiet, with a modern shower room and WC.  It was in a fantastic location with scenic canals, interesting shops and good restaurants & eateries nearby.  Raymond provided a generous breakfast each morning and was a great host.  I'd definitely stay here again.

Très bonne situation dans la ville.
Chambre, Salle d'eau, Toilettes rénovés avec goût et matériaux de qualité.
Ensemble très propre et confortable.
Très bon accueil de Raymond, très disponible, puisque dans le café-restaurant mitoyen: mise à disposition de la chambre dès notre arrivée le matin et garde de notre valise jusqu'au soir, le dernier jour.
Très copieux petit déjeuner dans la chambre, apporté par Raymond, à l'heure convenue.
Nous recommandons vivement cette adresse pour une escapade à Amsterdam.
C'est une adresse que nous recommandons sans hésitation

I was the guest of Raymond during 2 nights. The appartment was lovely and well equiped ( Queen size bed, good shower..) ! Breakfast was complete and Raymond was charming ! I highly recommended this host !
Landlord is friendly and prepared breakfast every morning for us, it was a very amazing experience living there. Next time I'll also choose to live there.

Hôte très sympathique.
Très belle chambre, lit très confortable, salle de bain et douche modernes et bien agencées.
Petit déjeuner complet, délicieux, renouvelé chaque jour.
Parfaitement bien situé dans la ville, à proximité de tous les trams, à côté de Leidesplein où on trouve une grande animation et des restaurants variés.
A recommander chaudement.

Séjour très agréable à Amsterdam. Dés notre arrivée à la gare centrale vers 11h, nous avions fait le choix de rejoindre tranquillement notre logement à pied. Vers 11h30, Raymond, sur place et très dynamique, nous présentait, notre chambre "Amstellodamoise" à l'étage, spacieuse, lumineuse et très propre. A noter des sanitaires modernes et des toilettes rien que pour nous.
A l'heure choisie la veille, Raymond apporte le copieux petit-déjeuner dans la chambre et nous pouvons dire qu'il est très complet : fromage, charcuterie, viennoiseries, jus de fruit, etc..
Tout au long de ce séjour, nous avons apprécié l'emplacement de ce logement, au milieu de belles petites boutiques, dans un quartier très agréable et qui pourtant reste très calme. Aucun bruit le soir. Et surtout, il est situé au maximum à 30 minutes à pied de tout ce qui est intéressant à voir à Amsterdam pour un séjour de 5 jours : musées, jardins/parcs, églises, port, marchés/commerces, etc. . Bref l'idéal.
A noter que Raymond est très aimable et est aussi un excellent cuisinier. Ne ratez pas un diner dans son restaurant.

We loved Raymond's apartment!  It is a private apartment in a perfect location!!  Anne Frank House/Museum, Tulip Museum and Cheese Museum are only 10 minute walk from there.  The room is very spacious.  My adult daughter and I had to share a bed, but as it is a king size bed, we were very comfortable.  Raymond brought us breakfast (bread, cheese, ham, jam and juice) every morning.  He was also very kind to bring our heavy suitcase up and down the steep stairs.  He kept our suitcases for several hours and called a cab for us on the day we left.  He was a wonderful host, and I highly recommend his apartment to anyone who is coming to Amsterdam!!

My friend and I enjoyed a lovely stay at B&B de 9 Straatjes. The room was up three flights of steep stairs (no lift access) and was very clean, including a kettle, fridge and microwave. There was one large double bed and a reading nook (with books and board games). The walk-in shower was in the bedroom and we had use of a private bathroom. The room would be ideal for couples.

The room is located above Raymond's bar, which can be noisy until the early hours (we stayed on a Friday and Saturday night and could hear people talking, but not music). How disruptive guests might find this will vary for each individual, but earplugs were thoughtfully provided should these be needed. The room felt safe and secure, and it is located only a short walk from the restaurants and bars of Leidseplein. We weren't too far from the train station in one direction, or the museum quarter in the other.

Raymond is a lovely host. When we met, my friend and I agreed our preferred breakfast time with him and the following morning he brought us bread, cheese, meat, jam and juice. He was very accommodating in bringing us breakfast at 7.00am as requested. He recommended places to visit and made sure we felt at home.

Raymond is a super nice guy! the apartment is beautiful and big, you have place for everything and quite accessorized with coffee machine, fridge , great shower and a lovely king size bed that was really comfy.
the apartment located on a lovely street in a great neighborhood, next to a nice coffee place and a famous cheese store.
i will definitely go back there when im visiting Amsterdam again.

Raymond was an amazing host! The listing was exactly as he stated and we found it to be even better than expected! The house was clean and fully stocked with everything we could need. We had access to laundry and when our phone charger adapter didn't work, Raymond let us borrow his. He was very helpful and friendly and left us to ourselves. We were brought a delicious breakfast by him every morning to top everything off! The house is in a really great neighborhood, with great restaurants, bars and a nice grocery store right around the corner. We will definitely be coming back and referring our friends to this same house with Raymond!

This was a fantastic place to stay - perfect location, spacious and comfortable room and a really friendly and helpful host who kindly carried our very heavy suitcase up all of the stairs for us! Breakfast was lovely and was nice to have it brought up to our room. Would definitely recommend this B and B.

Raymond was a good host. He greeted us on arrival and carried our bags up the two flights of spiral staircase to our room. The location is great as you can easily walk to all of the major attractions in central Amsterdam. The room was very clean and the bed very comfortable. I would recommend Raymond's B&B for anyone wishing to explore the attractions of Amsterdam.
Good spot and Raymond was easy to talk with and very nice.
Fantastic location, large clean mini apartment with fantastic breakfasts. Can't wait to stay here again!
The room was really cozy and spacious. The location is perfect as it is in the center of Amsterdam. Perfect place to stay in order to visit the city and enjoy the nightlife

Thankyou Raymond for providing great accommodation as listed. The unit was clean & comfortable, with a great breakfast. Dinning in your cafe underneath was very enjoyable. We would highly recommend your Bnb. John

We absolutely loved Kelli's place. There is a really lovely feel to the place and it is filled with character, interesting trinkets and decorative items. The apartment is in a good location - we walked everywhere but it is also close to a tram stop. Kelli was very welcoming and reassuring when we were running late for check in as our train was delayed. Thoroughly recommend this place.

Kelli and Henk's apartment was the absolute perfect base for our stay in Amsterdam, I would absolutely recommend it to anyone. It's spacious (except the bathroom!), full of life, comfortable, a real joy to come home to. We loved sitting on the roof terrace morning or evening, listening to their extensive playlists, and one tired night we even watched a movie on the very comfy couches. There was a basket of food and information left which takes the stress out of the first morning. There was a supermarket and bike rental very close, we rented bikes and loved the ride through Vondelpark into the city each day. We bumped into the neighbour a couple of times too- she was lovely.
I'd recommend you ask in advance how to use the oven as we couldn't figure it out and had to message Henk. Also note that in the downstairs sleeping area (if there are 3-4 of you) there's no blinds so you may be woken by the sun.
Other than this, there was helpful notes everywhere and Kelli and Henk were both very quick to reply, so even if you do have problems they're great hosts. We were both so sad to leave this oasis, and such a great city, it could only have been better if Malcolm the dachshund came as part of the package!
Thank you for having us in your wonderful home, Kelli and Henk.

We had an amazing weekend in Amsterdam, a lot thanks to Kelli and Henk and their fantastic apartment.
Everything was clean, cosy and very welcoming. Henk and Kelli left us maps, cupons and phonenumbers and we could not have stayed at a better place.
I hope to stay here every time I come to Amsterdam.

We've been there twice now, which says it all really. Despite being horribly late, everything went well with the keys.   The communication was superb and instant. We don't have to say much more, except we love your place and would love to come back next year ☺ thx for everything Kelli & Henk. Many hugs Lucy & Seb

The tree house was awesome!! Staying in this place was an incredible experience.. An amazing atmosphere where you discover new things every time..Apart from visiting this beautifull city you will enjoy being in this place as well.
Thanks Kelly and Henk for sharing it !!!! We had an incredible time there.. We will never forget!!

Kelli is an amazing guest. Her house is perfect for a relaxing stay in Amsterdam. Everything is in perfect order and having a roof terrace and a terrace on the kitchen really expands the house outside, where trees literally are wrapping the building. It's 40 minutes walk from the city center or 20 with bus/trams. It is conveniently located near a lot of shops. I will come back there next year for sure!
Great location, super hosts, very nice apartment:)
Wonderful location with easy access to public transportation.  All aspects of the stay were as we expected, only small note that if you have trouble climbing stairs this could cause a problems.
Great private apartment in the center of town. Hosts were very helpful and responsive.

We had a great time in Amsterdam and our hosts Christi and Yvon were very sweet and took the time to tell us all of their favorite places and what not to miss.  The apartment is very close to everything and you are in the midst of the action. The windows really block the noise — which was great at night.  We can’t wait to go back and stay again.

This is one of the most beautifully appointed places that you could ever stay in. It is very stylishly decorated, and has more amenities than you can believe. The taste in decoration is absolutely flawless! The living room / kitchen area, the bedroom area, and the bathroom are huge! The bed is amazingly comfortable, and I never wanted to get up! the kitchen area is large, has a small refrigerator, a stove top, a microwave, and espresso maker with complimentary coffee pods, and creamer provided in the refrigerator. I could stayed here for a long time, it was bigger than my first 3 apartments! 6 beautiful Windows let in light on two sides, and they open wide for a bustling street View, but were double paned so you can lock out all sound if desired. All lights are on dimmers so you can control how much you want in the evening.

The location of this apartment is very Central, very close to Dam Square. It only took us a few minutes to walk to the apartment from Amsterdam Centraal Station. In fact, while there are trams everywhere, we were so Central that we did not need to take one, and spent our entire vacation on foot. We walked to the Jordaan (& the Anne Frank House), the Red Light District, Leidseplein, & Museumplein (van Gogh museum, Rijksmuseum, & more).

The hosts live above, but the apartment is so well insulated that other than a few very slight creaks, you were not aware that there were others in the building. They were also very helpful with tips of places to go in the area (although we had our trip pretty well planned), and directed us to a wonderful nearby restaurant to have breakfast at our last day.

I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking to stay in Amsterdam. The only thing that is a slight drawback is the stairs, which are very steep. As long as your bags are not too big, or you can wear them as a backpack, and you do not have mobiity issues, you should have no problems.
Terrific location, close to everything, lovely accommodations, friendly and helpful hosts

This apartment is a gem. Unbeatable location. Delightful airy apartment with beautiful light. Very responsive, highly organised hosts. Excellent processes and facilities. The tram to the key sites is literally outside the front door. All other sites were easily walkable. Christa and Yvon were respectful, helpful and obliging hosts. I really can’t fault our experience - even the highly efficient smart lock process.  A word of warning, the stairs are of the typical Dutch variety, that is very steep. Worth remembering if you have large luggage. Thank you Christa and Yvon. It was great.

Christa & Yvon’s apartment was lovely and in a perfect location for exploring Amsterdam. Enjoyed the extra touches in the apartment and decorated very nice. The bed was extra comfortable! I didn’t get to meet Christa or Yvon but the check in via app was a breeze and they were responsive to messages when I had any questions. Would stay here again!
Stylish apartment in a great location.
I had a lovely time and would happily come back. Great space and very comfortable with a great location near to everything.
Fantastic place. Great location
Very nice apartment and in an excellent location. Access is via a Smartphone and we did experience some problems with that causing us to lower our rating.

It was so awesome that we got to meet Kelli and Henk upon our arrival. They gave us loads of information like where to dine, and several places of interest to visit. On top of that, they were really fun loving and humorous.

The apartment is situated in a pretty convenient location, with several eateries and small stores just around the corner. It is perhaps one of the most interesting Airbnb apartment we have stayed in (super artsy and incredibly cosy).

Overall, I would recommend this place!

Henk and Kelli were very friendly from the moment they kindly agreed to let us stay at their apartment. They maintained contact with us right up until we arrived, and even left us some handy tips and recommendations upon our arrival (not to mention a lovely breakfast basket). A fantastic apartment and two fantastic people - we had a great time and would highly recommend them.

The apartment is very beautiful, full of interesting objects from all around the world. It's cozy, comfortable and looks exactly as described. It's really clean and functional, especially thanks to the host's genius idea to leave permanent explanatory notes all around the house. The bathroom is a little small but practical.
Many means of transportation at walking distance can get you all around Amsterdam (max 20 min to central station by bus).
Unfortunately I didn't meet Kelli in person (because I arrived later than my friends who picked up the keys from her) but she was very nice and available to provide us all needed information.
Absolutely recommended!

Wow what an amazing house with fantastic character and comfort. Kelli's instructions were excellent and the notes around the house were so helpful we didn't want for anything. Picking up the keys was hassle free and the directions were perfect. Little details like fresh towels and sweets to the lovely basket of essential items made us feel very welcome. The house was lovely and clean and the neighbours were welcoming and kind, as we didn't meet our hosts.
You can walk into the centre (once you get your bearings) but if you don't fancy that you can hop on a tram just around the corner, we did both.
This wasn't our first trip to Amsterdam or our first Airbnb experience and would recommend both.
Thank you so much Kelli and Henke x
Es un lugar muy agradable, tranquilo y cerca del transporte público y el centro

Kelli and Henk are great hosts. The apartment  is an experience itself. It casts you under its spell the very first minute you walk through the door. It's located in a quiet neighborhood, near public transportation, many stores and markets. It's 40 minutes walking to Amsterdam center. Of you are not so keen on walking, you can easily take TER. I highly recommend this place!

Nous avons passé quatre jours à Amsterdam Chez Kelli et Henk. L'appartement est très agréable à vivre. Fonctionnel et décoré avec amour.
Le quartier n'est pas central mais très sympathique. Deux parcs sont à proximité et les tramways desservent rapidement les autres quartiers.
A notre arrivée, Henk a su se montrer patient et super sympa alors que nous étions en retard (train raté suite à un blocage dans un ascenseur #loose) et flexible quant à l'heure de départ. C'est un logement que nous recommandons chaleureusement

Kelli and Henk's home is a really amazing place to stay in Amsterdam. The location is great, close to the centre and Vondelpark with good value bike rental nearby. The decor and atmosphere in the apartment is incredible, so thoughtfully and beautifully decorated. Though interaction with them during our stay was minimal, they were very pleasant hosts, with good communication before arrival and offering great flexibility to us in terms of checking in and out. All in all, I can't recommend Kelli & Henk's place enough, the perfect accommodation for a trip to Amsterdam!

Уютная, чистая, вся в цветах и интересных вещах квартира с отличной фонотекой!! Хозяева отзывчивые, очень гостеприимные. Расположение удобное: 20 мин пешком до центра, все рядом в пешей доступности. Прекрасный вид с мансарды и крыши!!!

Una casa muy acogedora, y a la vez peculiar. Buena ubicación, ideal para usar bicicleta. Hemos estado cuatro en el apartamento y hemos descansado muy a gusto. El apartamento tiene espacio de sobra y una terraza muy chula.

An incredibly comfortable set up with beautiful balconies, and a fantastic music, art and pot plant collection made this the most homely, interesting and inspiring Airbnb experience my friends and I had ever had. We felt so lucky to have stumbled upon such a gem.
lovely place! a great space. we had a nice weekend. terrace was nice place to chill out.

Kelli & Henk’s apartment is gorgeous, not only is it aesthetically pleasing but it is also spacious, stylish and very much fit for purpose. We were staying in Amsterdam for a week and we always felt as though we were at a home away from home whilst here. The location was perfect (a 2 min walk from a tram), the area felt safe and the local amenities were more than satisfactory during our stay. This apartment has so much character and we couldn’t have been happier with our stay. Kelli & Henk replied to all of our messages almost straight away - no question was too obscure but really, we barely needed to speak to them as it was all so perfect. I would thoroughly recommend fellow travellers to stay here, especially if you want that home away from home feel.
Un super appartement très original. Correspond parfaitement à la description. Propre avec une très belle terrasse. Pas loin du centre ville. On le conseil à tous le monde!

Such a brilliant apartment. Exactly as described and so nice it was hard to tear myself away. Can't thank Kelli and Henk enough for the thought they've put into making guests feel welcome. The apartment has everything you could need and the roof terraces are really lovely. Really appreciated the local tips and recommendations. The location is particularly well-served by public transport - though there are a couple of bike rental places round the corner. Really hope to be back.
Kelli is a great host. Always available and kind. The house is very nice, close to the park and other services. Very good experience.

Just got back from our trip to Amsterdam and had such an amazing time at Kelli’s place! The photographs are very accurate but it was still bigger than we had expected and spacious! The apartment is beautiful and full of natural light, it’s also filled to the brim with trinkets and collectibles that make the place a home and there’s something new you notice each day - it was like living in a miniature art gallery for 5 days. Along with the interior, the exterior of the apartment is also breathtaking and such a good use of limited space! There’s a small balcony downstairs and a larger terrace upstairs connected to the bedroom. The larger terrace has access to a ladder which leads onto the roof of the apartments and a bench. Unfortunately we weren’t able to sit up there during our stay because of the weather. When we arrived Kelli & Henk had left us a guidebook and messages all over the apartment which helped massively, especially when it came to using the lights (we never managed to figure out where the kitchen light switch was though). They also left us a sweet message welcoming us! In the guidebook they included pages upon pages of places to visit, and even had a picture of their remote and how to use it, although they don’t have any TV channels just a DVD Player and computer.

Despite how nice the apartment was we did run into a few small issues on our trip, the first being a late check-in. We were scheduled to check in between 10am-11am and I received a message prior to advise the downstairs neighbour would be letting us in, however the neighbour was not home when we arrived. I called Henk who resolved the issue quickly by calling her and after waiting 10 minutes she arrived. Monique, the neighbour, was very accommodating and even helped us unlock the front door as it was a bit tricky and confusing.

The second issue was cleanliness. This apartment was rated very highly for it’s cleanliness so it was a bit disappointing when we got there and realised the shower plug had a clump of dark hair in it,
which was quite unavoidable to touch as the shower itself is very small; and our bed sheets were actually stained yellow in one section. Unsure what the stain was and the sheets smelled fresh but if the sheets are stained it’s not a good look! Couldn’t take the sheets off either as the base duvet was also yellow. Apart from those two cleanliness issues the rest of the apartment was very tidy and for the most part dusted everywhere, there was a small orange stain on the beige fluffy floor-sofa but this was barely noticeable.

Aside from cleanliness the only other issue was noise/the layout of the apartment in general. What I mean by layout is that, like most other homes in The Netherlands, the stairs & ladders in the property are extremely narrow and there’s plenty of them. Kelli’s apartment is on the top floor so having to carry a heavy suitcase up very narrow stairs, 3 times, is exhausting and the ladder to the bedroom is potentially lethal (make sure you take your time, or go down on your bum like I did lol). There’s also no curtains or blinds in the apartment (apart from the bedroom) and plenty of windows, so when we’d have a shower we’d have to keep the bathroom door open while we quickly leapt to the ladder and climbed it, before getting dressed upstairs with the blinds closed.

You get used to the noise after the 1st/2nd night, but on the first night we woke up so many times because any noise sounds like it’s coming from inside the apartment, mainly due to the fact the bedroom door leads out into the hallway for the rest of the building, which isn’t the host’s fault of course, just the way it’s been built!

Overall it was a great experience and the location was also very convenient, with a tram stop & coffeeshop 2 minutes away :)
Would 1000% recommend this apartment for your trip, I’ve already sent the link to a few friends and it’s definitely worthwhile.

Kelli and Henk have a wonderful apartment, full of art, books, plants, and good vibes. They have little helpful notes throughout, to help guide you with lights, etc.
It was a mostly quiet neighborhood with a tram stop very near the apartment. Great walking neighborhood with a few good restaurant/bars close to the apartment.
Lovely place to come back to and relax in after a day of exploring Amsterdam!
The host canceled this reservation 13 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Absolutely beautiful, very comfortable. Very close to everything, restaurants, groceries and the train/bus a very short walk away. We loved it, Kelli and Henk are wonderful host, we felt very welcomed into their lovely home.
Great communication and where available anytime. They left detailed information on how to operate some things and locations of restaurants and many other places to see.
Highly recommend and would love to stay again.

L'appartement de Kelli et Henk est tout à fait conforme aux photos (il est même plus grand en vrai) et décoré de façon vraiment originale.
Comme dit dans d'autres commentaires, il n'est pas central mais il est vraiment très bien desservi en transports en commun donc ce n'est pas un souci.
Kelli et Henk sont des hôtes prévenants qui font tout pour que vous vous sentiez à l'aise : il y a même un panier avec le petit déjeuner et du houmous à disposition ! Et plein de petits mots partout dans l'appartement pour vous permettre de vous y retrouver.
Nous recommandons donc cet appartement ! :-)
Great location and clean.  Would absolutely stay here again.

Enjoyed our stay. The place is sparkling clean and right in the centre of Amsterdam & walking distance to city central station .  Host was thoughtful and left us with Tourist guidebooks. Be prepared to carry your luggage 2 stairs if you have big suitcases- can be little tiresome. But the house is beautiful, peaceful and Overall a comfortable stay.
Raymond was a very nice person. He helped to lift our suitcase upstairs and brought breakfast to our room every morning. The room was clean, spacious and well-equipped. I had a great time there.

This is our 1st try on Airbnb and it’s way better than I expected. The whole process was so smooth that it beat having to stay at a hotel. The place was accurately described and we felt very comfortable staying there. The location is impeccable with direct access to tram services right in front of the apartment that reaches most corners of Amsterdam.

One thing to take note that it can be challenging climbing up the stairs as it’s really narrow and steep. But that’s the characteristic of the houses in Amsterdam and we found it as an interesting experience instead.

Try it and you will not regret. :)

Cute little apartment in good location. Lots of stairs and above a bar but we knew that before check in. Check in is using a phone app in which u need to download ahead of time and always have your phone on you and charged which caused us some issues as we were travelling before arrived but it worked out ok. We had large luggage so getting it up and down the extremely narrow and steep stairs was a hassle but overall the location is great.

Perfectly located, quick responses from the owners, lovely home, access to all your favourite tourists spots, although the trams operate outside, the windows are well glazed and you can’t hear a thing. Would definatley recommend!!!

Great location, good amount of space for two people. The bluetooth phone app for accessing the building and unit worked well. The stairs are steep, as mentioned clearly in the listing, but were not an issue. Our only complaint would be that the water pressure in the shower was very poor.
Great place in a fantastic location!
Had a great time on our trip, the flat is perfectly located in the center of town and very easy access into the place. Highly recommendable

Nestled perfectly in the heart of Amsterdam. My friend and I truly enjoyed the experience the city and this flat provided. It was walkable everywhere. The space is stylish and roomy and I really enjoyed the smart home features and key-less entry!
Great appartment,  very central. Quick response from the owners.

Christa & Yvon's place is very comfortable, stylish, and centrally located.  They have decorated the place in a very modern and clean way that also feels very homey and comfortable.  The small kitchen with refrigerator suited our needs while we were there.  The bed was extremely soft and comfortable (much appreciated as this was the last stop on a 2 week vacation).  The location is great, and was right between our two favorite neighborhoods for food/walking around (Jordaan and the RLD).  We also enjoyed people watching from the window of the apartment.  Highly recommend their place!

Christa & Yvon’s stylish space is in a great location for checking out all of Amsterdam. While their apartment is situated on a tram line with easy access to central station and many nice restaurants nearby, it was surprisingly quiet inside the apartment.
It was a great experience and I highly recommend.

I am so happy that I chose to stay at Christa and Yvons apartment in Amsterdam! It was my first time there and it could not have been a better location. We were able to walk to every attraction/ place that we wanted to go. Not too far from the any of the major attractions, only about a 10 minute walk to the Anne Frank house.

The apartment itself was really beautiful, comfortable, and clean. The bed was comfortable amazingly, none of the noise from the street was able to penetrate the windows.

Christa and Yvon have a really strict policy for visitors and substances. If you plan to have visitors or want a 420 friendly place, be respectful and do not stay here. For us, this place was perfect!

Book this place if it is available! Location, comfort and cleanliness are top notch. Only issue we had was with the Nuki system but the quick responses of Christa and Yvon will solve any issues you may have. Highly recommended!

Очень красивая квартира, удобное расположение. Christa & Yvon были очень общительны, помогали во всем.

Обратите внимание - в доме крутая лестница и слабый напор воды.

Christa and Yvon are excellent hosts. They were great with communication and extremely helpful when required. The apartment is in a fabulous location close to Amsterdam centrum and the central station and there are many cafes and restaurants in the immediate neighbourhood. We had a great meal at Humphreys and a little Thai restaurant both only metres away. The stairs are steep and require having your wits about you ;). The apartment is Immaculate, spacious, stylish and remarkably quiet despite its location. Thank you for your warm hospitality, Christa and Yvon.

The apartment was in the perfect location, walkable to most places we wanted to go in Amsterdam, and we felt safe in the building.
The amenities were great - the kitchen had a jug, coffee machine, stove and fridge.
Christa & Yvon were incredibly helpful.
Would definitely stay here again.

Lovely apartment, in a brilliant location (very central) with beautiful views from the window. Very well equipped, stylish interior. The bed is extremely comfy! The bathroom was clean, spacious and well equipped. Christa & Yvon were excellent hosts, and we felt very at home.

Kelli was incredibly communicative and a wonderful host! The apartment is absolutely gorgeous and super conveniently located. I highly recommend staying here and would love to stay here again the next time I visit!!

We have a wonderfull experience in Lotte's Appartement. The location of appartement is great near by P+R Olympstadion and Wandelpark; When we arrived, we found a charming appartement with a nice garden and beers offered in the fridge !
Lotte and her boyfriend were welcoming and we highly recommend to stay at their place to feel confortable in the city of Amsterdam.

Lotte's apartment is a great place to relax and explore Amsterdam. It's in a nice quiet neighborhood right next to a canal and has a beautiful, private backyard. There are plenty of stores and restaurants within walking distance and there is easy access to tram #2, which means that you can get to both Leidseplein and Centraal station quickly and conveniently. The interior of the apartment is comfortable and the Auping bed is terrific. Lotte's Mom handled the check-in and was friendly and knowledgeable. Lotte was there at check-out, and she was also very nice. This is a great place that is highly recommended!

Nice, clean apartment and really enjoyed staying here. We rented out bicycles but it is also within walking distance of the tram and the bus. The apartment is slightly further out of the city than we expected however it is a lovely cycle into the city. Supermarket close by and a lovely cafe at the top of the road. Nice area with a view of the canal. We had no issues with the apartment and would recommend it to people visiting Amsterdam.

Great and accommodating host. Beautiful and spacious flat.
I highly recommend it!

We really enjoyed our stay in Lotte's apartment. It was beautifully presented and had everything we needed for our stay. There was even a bottle of wine in the fridge to welcome us! The location was great; quiet and conveniently located for local shops and the tram into the centre of Amsterdam. Communication was excellent before and after we booked and Lotte was very sympathetic and accommodating towards the needs of our disabled daughter who uses a wheelchair. I can strongly recommend this apartment and host for your stay in lovely Amsterdam. Thank you for a lovely holiday ; )

Très jolie maison bien située au bord d'un canal, tramway et commerces à proximité, trés joliment meublée avec un petit jardin très agréable. Quartier calme.
Excellent accueil de Lotte et de ses deux chats très drôles. A recommander.
Very nice home well located on the edge of a canal, tram and shops nearby, very nicely furnished with a nice small garden. Quiet area. Excellent reception of Lotte and her two very funny cats. Recommend.
Très bon appartement, propre, bien situé,  propriétaire très sympathiques ,  les deux chats aussi,  très bon séjour.

I stayed at Lotte for 5 days and loved it.  The apartment was everything she said it would be, very comfortable.  And her two kitties were such good company and very sweet.  The neighborhood is friendly with lots of amenities and great grocery store, Keens.  Lotte was very helpful and kind when I had questions.  I would definitely stay here again.  The area is not touristy, but real working people of Amsterdam. But very easy to access the center.

Nous avons passé un agréable séjour dans cet appartement très bien situé à quelques pas du tram. Merci encore à Lotte pour son accueil et sa sympathie.
Big up aux deux chats.
Accueil chaleureux, maison propre et équipée, bonne organisation. A conseiller.
Nice apartment in a quiet location. Good if you like cats!
Lotte’s space was absolutely perfect, such a gorgeous home! Communication was flawless and the AirBnB exceeded all of our expectations. We hope to be back again soon!
Great apartment with two amazing cats! The communication was easy, the apartment is big and cosy! Thanks a lot, Lotte!
Immer wieder gerne!
All was great!

La casa és molt bonica. La comunicació amb la Lottie molt bona. Per nosaltres, amb tres nens ens va resultar una mica lluny del centre.
En general força bé.

Lotte is a phenomenal host. If you’re traveling to Amsterdam with children this location is a no brainer. Great location walking distance to lots of groceries and restaurants and public transportation to get around the city.
Nicely decorated, spacious and clean room. All the essentials for a great stay. Wonderful neighborhood with lots of small shops and restaurants. Walking distance to anywhere in the city :)

Stayed here with my sister for a weekend. The room is spacious, clean, and nicely decorated, just like in the photos. We were very comfortable and loved the neighbourhood. Raymond was easy to get in touch with to arrange our arrival, and we found him friendly and welcoming.
Beautiful place, very nice shower and bathroom. Nice location. Great service (good breakfast is served by Raymond at the time you want). Everything as expected.

Great spot, location couldn't be better. Easy to walk everywhere .
The room is spacious and comfy.
Good breakfast as well.

Mi experiencia en casa de Raymond ha sido muy buena!!!
Es una habitación preciosa,comoda muy amplia y llena de luz.
Raymond nos subía cada mañana,un desayuno fantástico,y completo.
Volveré!!!
Kamer was super,goed gelegen in 9 straatjes en toch geen lawaaihinder. Raymond was attent ivm ontbijt, hield rekening met onze wensen. aanrader!

Raymond was a welcoming host! He greeted us in our room with a couple of cold glasses of Heineken. Our accommodation was perfect: great location in the heart of de negen straatjes and within easy walking distance to the museum district, Vondel Park, Red Light District and Central Train Station. Comfy king-size bed, lots of windows overlooking a quaint little street,  great lighting, nicely updated shower and toilet. Breakfast was generous and brought to our room each morning, and Raymond's restaurant beneath the suite - De Doffer - offers great food and wine. De Doffer is a happening place on weekends and locals like to revel there till wee hours of the morning so something to think about if you're planning a weekend stay. We would definitely recommend Raymond and B&B de 9 Straatjes!
We stayed here for the second time and had a great stay. Raymond is very accommodating and this is a great location. Thank You
The breakfast was great and the room was wonderful. Well located and beautiful. However the streets were loud throughout the night so the windows needed to remain closed.

Top locatie! Fijne kamer en badkamer! Lekker ontbijt!
Voor de lichte slapers misschien wat rumoerig. Hoort er een beetje bij op deze locatie.
Zouden het meteen weer boeken!

Raymond was a wonderful host. Provided a magnificent place in the center of old Amsterdam. We had wonderful breakfast, provided by Raymond. You couldn't ask for nicer place to stay in a prettier city.
The reservation was canceled 66 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Wow....we can not thank theses guys enough! We stayed in their beautiful apartment which was clean and spacious and very local to Centraal Station and Dam square!
Communication from our hosts was quick and helpful!
We had a wonderful time only made more special by staying at this apartment!! Anyone who stays here will not be disappointed!!xx

This space is the best kept secret of Amsterdam! The location is perfect and hosts are super helpful and quick to respond to any questions. I hope to have the chance to visit Amsterdam again and say at the La Vie En Rose!

We had a wonderful staying at La vie en Rose! Very quick replying from the host, very kind. The apartment was lovely in every single part, super cleaned. I would definitely recommend it to who’s looking for a romantic, cleaned and private apartment in Amsterdam !
Central location, you can reach every museums without any public transport or if you like to , there’s a tram just in front of the house that takes you everywhere.
We will come back!
Thank you Christa and Yvon!

Christa & Yvon’s place is the heart of Amsterdam and I could not wish to stay in a better location!
The flat is clean and has everything I needed!
They are very good hosts and I would definitely stay in their flat again!
Erika UK

It was great. The apartment was lovely! We will come back for sure. The location was perfect and we really felt like at our home. Only remark I would say is thatsometimes the NUKI application to open the front door was a bit slow, but at the end it was working of course, which was the important afterall.

La vie en Rose is situated very well in Amsterdam, Central. From the location it is possible to walk to many of Amsterdam's most popular places.
We thought the bedding was extremely comfortable in the unit and there was a huge shower. A nice kitchenette with a good quality coffee system and theres a small fridge and a microwave, range top and enough to cook if one wanted to.
The living and sitting room is spacious and the windows afford brilliant lighting throughout.
We stayed on 2nd floor and so anyone contemplating staying here must recognize that the narrow and very steep stairs will require fitness and agility to get luggage up and down, which wasn't too bad for me and I am 50 with bad knees.
A unique aspect of La Vie en Rose is the Nuki keyless entry which we operated via Bluetooth from an app on our phone.
All in all we did enjoy our stay and were glad to have a nice home to call our own after much time spent walking around Amsterdam's interesting
streets.
Brilliant!

The apartment is very stylish and comfortable. The bed is extremely comfortable. Great location and minimal street noise considering its smack bang in the centre.
Will be booking again for next year - I think that says it all!!
Great apartment, sparkly clean, excellent location and stocked with Tea, Coffee and Milk. Bed was more comfortable than my own!
We loved this spot!! Very clean, excellent location, and super helpful hosts! Thanks for a lovely stay!
The suite is in a fantastic location, is beautifully decorated and peacefully quiet. A lovelyhaven in a busy city

It was a great unit. Lots of windows and light in the unit. It's very easy to walk around from where you stay. Breakfast was a simple affair, a perfect start before going out to explore the city. It is located directly above a popular restaurant, but if the noise bothers you, you can just shut the windows. Raymond was a good host, checking in every morning and confirming the next day's breakfast timing.
Raymond was a great host who made sure our stay went smoothly-- including bringing us breakfast! Great, modern apartment in a great location.
Quartier idéal pour tout faire à pieds, 10mn de la gare et des musées. Propre, chic, pratique (café, thé, frigo...). Petit dej royal!
Raymond was a fantastic host, helpful, attentive and gracious. The location of the house was perfect, the room was spacious and quiet, and the breakfast tasty and filling. Thank you!

This was an excellent location for exploring the city on foot. Raymond supplied us with the information we needed to get around the city then back to the airport. We did have problems with directions to the apartment because a construction project had rerouted traffic during our visit.
It's also a plus that there's a great pub next door.

This is a beautiful apartment in a great location. Wonderful large windows, great space, very tastefully designed. The lighting alone won us over. We had a great stay and a very nice base for exploring Amsterdam. Everything went perfect process-wise (check-in, check-out, communication with Raymond).

Perfectly situated in a quartier with lots of small and interesting shops, cafés and restaurants. The room is really comfortable, spacious and full of light. Raymond gave us a wonderful welcome and brought us delicious breakfasts each morning. I will definitely come back!
Raymond's place was lovely! Very spacious, clean and private. We walked everywhere we went and the neighborhood was great! Thank you Raymond!
Great host, had a very pleasant time,  he is very kind and the breakfast is fantastic. Thank you Raymond!
Great location, very friendly host, good communication and nice breakfast!
The host canceled this reservation 29 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Raymond è stato molto preciso, ha comunicato tempestivamente con noi ed è stato estremamente gentile. Il suo monolocale è arredato con essenzialità e pulizia, la posizione è perfetta, il miglior luogo dove partire e tornare alla sera, ottimi ristoranti vicini e locali dove passare la serata, fuori dallo scontato chiasso turistico.

This was a great apartment within walking distance to everything.
The apartment was well equipped with a modern shower room. Raymond supplied a great breakfast every day and was. Wet accommodating. He let us keep our luggage in the apartment after checkout as we had a late flight.
Can't wait to return to Amsterdam.

Raymond's place is beautiful, the location perfect.
The apartment is modern yet cozy with a very comfortable bed and a spacious bathroom. Raymond went out of his way to make our stay comfortable and enjoyable, giving us a delicious breakfast and nespresso coffee to start our day.

We had a wonderful time here! We loved the room, the location, the vibe and the bar downstairs! Beautiful area and walking distance to everything! Our host was great and really helpful! Will definitely go back!

Raymond's apartment was the perfect space for our weekend in Amsterdam! Within walking distance of all the attractions. The apartment was very spacious with lots of storage. Bedroom was well equipped with large comfy bed, tea/coffee making facilities. Large shower room just off the bedroom. Bathroom separate. Washing machine/dryer available. Raymond was the perfect host, and provided a lovely breakfast both mornings! All-in-all, this place was perfect for us and we will definitely be back when we visit Amsterdam again!
Awesome location, great host, would recommend and return lots, perfect for two people and great breakfast every morning. Couldn't ask for more. thanks

Raymond is a really nice and uncomplicated host, so we directly felt welcome at his place.
The apartment is very close to the center and in my opinion located in one of the most beautiful areas of Amsterdam. The apartment itself is clean, bright.
The old building combines very beatifully with the modern furniture and decoration.
I can definitely recommend this place to anyone!
a nice place

Raymond's place was perfect. The location was ideal in a great neighborhood with close proximity to most major sites. The provided breakfast was thoughtful and delicious. Would definitely recommend to others and would go back again myself!

Superbe séjour. Appartement très bien situé et équipé. Très propre et fonctionnel. Petit déjeuner très copieux, frais et varié. Excellent séjour. Nous recommandrons l'endroit et reviendrons lors de notre prochain séjour à Amsterdam.

Das Zimmer von Raymond ist genial!
Mit dem Fahrrad ist man im nu im Stadtinnern und auch in den umliegenden Strassen ist einiges los. Raymond ist sehr gastfreundlich und unkompliziert. Wir hätten uns für unsere Reise keine bessere Unterkunft vorstellen können.
Great location, lovely home made breakfast. Raymond was easy to contact and very welcoming. Would definitely stay again!

Stylish, lovely, cozy, sparkling clean apartment in a perfect location!  Easy to walk everywhere we wanted to go - Anne Frank House, the museums, 9 streets, a canal cruise and walking tour with local guides, etc!  Just minutes to restaurants and shops and the central train station. Very comfortable bed, a lovely sitting area, and a cute kitchenette with nice coffee and tea provided. Our hosts were very welcoming and willing to help make our stay wonderful. Highly recommend!

The apartment was beautiful, and had a nice view of some of Amsterdam's buildings. The living room/kitchen area was quite big, and the bedroom/bathroom area was comfortable and cute. I would definitely stay there again!
A clean and stylish apartment.  I enjoyed my stay very much

Two great things about this place:
1) the location is outstanding—right in the heart of Amsterdam and yet safe and quiet
2) easy, responsive hosts

I recommend staying here.

La Vie en Rose is a lovely, spacious apartment in an ideal location for a weekend in Amsterdam - right in the heart of the city and in close walking-distance to so much.  The place has more Dutch charm than a hotel and everything you need for a memorable stay. Christa & Yvon were a pleasure to deal with and the easy self check-in and door locking system was  very handy! Would definitely return here if/when I come to Amsterdam again!
Amazing place,the door system make it smooth and easy!
Such a lovely place! The location is perfect and the hosts were vey quick to respond and communicate. Must stay!

Great accomodation in a perfect location. The amenities were great and we were made to feel welcome. The communication on check in and during our stay was great! We look forward to staying again if we make it back to Amsterdam!

Christa & Yvon's place is very central and also away from the main street traffic. Lots of restaurants nearby to explore from. We really enjoyed our stay as there was lots of space and light in the apartment. The only thing you need to be aware of is that there are 35 steep steps to climb to get to the 2nd-floor apartment. They are narrow so if you have heavy luggage, just be careful. Other than that we really enjoyed our stay.
This was our first time to visit Amsterdam and the facilities were everything offered and the suggestions and tips greatly appreciated!
Good Location

The place was clean, with a very good bed and excellent shower. The gentle rocking of the house and the birds by the water complimented the floating house experience, heating and Air condition working perfectly. Location was good in a quiet neighborhood with lots of transportation options to the major parts of the city.

But the best was Diewert. On our second day my wife suffered an accident and broke her ankle. This completly destroyed our holidays. However Diewert was very helpful and accomodating: told me where to find open drugstores, got some extra info from the hospital that I needed for my insurance, helped us order some food since my wife couldn't walk around, lent me his bike so I could run some errands, booked our taxi when I found a flight back home, among many other smal things. This attitude helped smooth the situation we found ourselves in.

We hope to go back to Amsterdam and experience the city properly with no accidents. Hopefully Diewert will be a part of that experience once again.

This is a really nice, clean, quiet and well managed room in a houseboat about a 20 minute walk from the city center. Our host was kind enough to recommend some fantastic restaurants (we especially enjoyed Noordwest) and my partner and I felt both a warm welcome and a sense of privacy. The room itself felt more like a hotel room than a room in a houseboat (not sure what we expected), but the water right outside the window was a nice amenity.  There is a reasonably priced minibar, which was nice to have given that the location is a bit of a walk from commercial areas.  All in all a great experience.

We had a wonderful stay in Amsterdam. Communication was great with Raymond with an easy check in and check out. The apartment is located in a great shopping district surrounded by boutique stores and restaurants within walking distance, including the cafe right below. The apartment itself had a fantastic shower and and very comfy bed along with all the usual amenities.

On ne voulait pas rentrer ! Mais il a malheureusement bien fallu.

Nous avons passé un super moment dans cette chambre bien agréable et confortable, en plus d'être favorablement située (10 minutes à pied pour le Jordaan, 10 de plus pour le centre-ville !). Nous choisirons le même endroit si nous avons la chance de revenir à Amsterdam !

N'oublions pas de préciser que Diewert est adorable et saura vous conseiller restaurants et bars si vous êtes en manque d'inspiration.

The apartment was very comfortable, it has everything you need in it. The location is very good, so you can reach the most attractions in a few minutes. The only negative point is, that it can be really loud outside at night. So if you want to sleep while the windows are open it will be very loud. But all in all it was a great stay :) Christa und yvon are very kind and will help you if you have any questions.
Great place in a very convenient location. The hosts live upstairs and are quick to respond and solve problems. They're very nice and so is the place.
Great central location, sparkling clean and stylish accommodation with wonderfully comfortable bed. Christa and Yvon were very helpful and welcoming hosts!
A perfectly located apartment with local food and attractions a short walk away. The apartment is very spacious and homely. Christa and Yvon are great hosts, would definitely recommend!
Good location.  Clean. Not much place to sit.

Great apartment in central Amsterdam. We had difficulty with the front door lock on arrival because we did not have Wi-Fi on our phone yet. ( Just arrived in Europe that day)  Otherwise fantastic place.  Christa and Yvon are extremely nice.   We ended up buying are SIM card from extremely nice man just around the corner in a small shop  India Jason alleyway. Actually the manager or owner of the small restaurant next to the apt was also extremely kind.  😄

Easy access to building through the app eliminated need for a key. This was awesome! Near city centre and near tram. Everything needed in walking or tram distance.

Steep stairs! Bring light narrow bags.
Wonderful host who was warm and welcoming. Great location, stylish apartment and would recommend staying here.

This is the perfect place for a couple. The position is amazing you can walk to everything and the space had everything we needed. We found the bed very comfortable and the perfect size, after 6 weeks of travel it was amazing! There’s not much in the way of kitchen facilities, just enough for 2 people to get by. This didn’t worry us, as we had what we needed to make breakfast & the coffee machine was fabulous & very much appreciated.

I loved this flat! The location is perfect to walk anywhere.  It is relatively an easy check in...make sure you accept both invitations otherwise you won’t be able to open the door (my mistake).  Christa was fast to let me in as soon as I texted her! Love this feature!!  Also, the stairs are a bit intimidating... be prepared! I highly recommend this place!! :)

Whilst this place is clean, the bed is very soft and the rules were just too over the top for us. As an older couple but still very fit we were not told of the 3 sets of the ladder like stairs. Entering the building with luggage is very difficult. The camera surveillance made us feel really uncomfortable and the street setting was very noisy with trams and cars being constant. Be careful as even with 30 days notice they do not accept cancellations, so we paid for 2 nights even though we did not sleep there. Plus they allow no friends, family anyone but yourself in the building and there is no entrance area to wait for colleagues or family other than the street. They did have coffee and tea, but nothing else. Very impersonal and we had the feeling we were being watched all the time. Not a fan sorry.

We had a great time.  Property is exceptionally well located close to downtown, canals and transportation. Very comfortable living.  Yes, stairs are a little steep but as expected in Amsterdam.  Highly recommend Christa and Yvon’s place.

Fantastic place, very good location, very clean and spaciuos apartment!
Thank you, Christa to your hospitality! Really recommend this place!
Best location to stay in Amsterdam. Had a fantastic experience.
Perfect apartment for a citytrip. Christa and Yvon are very friendly and helpful in every way. We absolutely recommend this apartment.

We enjoyed our stay at Christa & Yvon’s Place, it is very clean and central. There is traffic noise, but with windows closed you hardly notice it, and it wasn’t a problem. We appreciated the fan as it was warm at night.

As mentioned in other reviews the stairs are steep and would be a problem if mobility was an issue, but we actually enjoyed the stairs and found them fun.

Communication was very good also. I would recommend.
A beautiful, clean and cosy place to stay right in the heart of Amsterdam. We rightly recommend Christa & Yvon's place .

My advice to travelers coming to Amsterdam: STAY HERE. Seriously. This apartment was amazing. The location was very easy to get to from the central station by walking with luggage and the apartment itself was beautiful! Super clean, stylish, and had the most amazing windows all around with natural light. There isn’t a kitchen, but there is a fridge for storing food. Christa and Yvon were super responsive also which made me feel comfortable when trying to figure out the smart lock app system (which ended up being great!). 10/10 would stay here again or recommend to friends. Very steep narrow stairs to get to the apartment (like many homes in Amsterdam) so would not recommend if you have mobility concerns.

Christa & Yvon's apartment is located in a super convenient location. We were able to walk to most sites and restaurants from the apartment. When we didn't feel like walking, the light rail stop is a minute away from the apartment. The apartment itself is very bright and airy. The bed is very comfortable, and the shower is quite large. Christa & Yvon were also super quick to respond to all of our messages. We had a fantastic stay!
We loved this place. It's close to everything. The trams stop is right outside the place. The stairs are sure steep, better pack light ;)

This apartment was excellent! We loved the location, so close to many attractions and restaurants and with the tram connection right outside!
Christa and Yvon were fantastic at replying to our enquires very quickly and gave some great suggestions for places to visit. They are great hosts! I would highly recommend this apartment.

Christa & Yvon’s place was perfectly centered in the heart of Amsterdam. The steep staircase to the apartment made you feel like a local. They were so prompt with their responses and very through in their communication. Would highly recommend!

Christa was really helpful with local tips and recommendations to restaurants. Lovely, stylish apartment in a fantastic location. Access can be a little tricky with steep stairs but this is typical in Amsterdam. We really enjoyed our stay and would recommend.
Very central location. Lovely place with everything you could need. Thoughtful touches and very stylish place. The hosts were easy, open and quick to communicate when needed.
Perfect location and very clean. We loved our stay!

This is a gorgeous flat, perfect location, close to train station, markets and food. The space itself is clean, perfect amenities and comfortable. I would recommend this flat 100%. Thank you to Yvonne and christa for allowing us to stay

Perfect place to stay. The room was great very clean, comfy bed and a nice large shower. Had everything we needed for our stay even had games and books. Breakfast was a lovley touch and enjoyed it every morning. The room Was a short walk from the centre but for me this was better as i prefered the streets around the canals as quiter and much more scenic. Would stay again if we ever go back :).
Raymond was a perfect host, very attentive and pleasant.
Un très beau studio, très clair. Emplacement parfait pour découvrir Amsterdam. Un quartier très agréable. Hôte très agréable et accommodant. Un peu bruyant parfois le soir.

Ich hatte im Vorfeld eh schon die wunderbaren Bewertungen über Raymond gelesen und unser Aufenthalt hat alles bestätigt. Super Lage, super netter Gastgeber, sehr unkompliziert... hatten unsere Koffer noch vor dem Check-in und nach dem Check-out bei ihm! Ging auf wünsche beim Frühstück ein, sehr sauber, Bett super bequem.... es gibt nichts zu meckern also bucht und viel Spaß!!!
Great location in Amsterdam. Everything as described in the ad. Lots for breakfast, you won't starve at this B&B. Great Host.

Raymond is a great host, very friendly and welcoming. The room is wonderful, large with your own bathroom and tea and coffee making facilities. Raymond's breakfasts were delicious too! Great location, close enough to walk almost everywhere and close to public transport. Would definitely stay again, thanks Raymond!
Absolutely loved staying here for a quick trip to Amsterdam, would definitely recommend.
Très jolie chambre au centre d'Amsterdam. Très propre. Raymond est un hôte agréable et pro! Merci pour les petits déjeuners riches et complets.
Très bonne adresse bien située pour tout visiter à pieds ou via tram à proximité

The bed & breakfast is already located in our favorite part of Amsterdam and the room is even better than the photos. It's light and spacious, with plenty of chairs, a reading nook (with lots of city guides and even board games), tv, washing machine and a great shower. By the way the bed is very comfortable and larger than average.

One review mentions the shower not having a door, which is true. But it is nicely situated and you can not see who ever is in there unless you specifically go in there. So if you are comfortable enough to share a bed with someone you would be comfortable enough to shower in there. I also have to add the blow dryer has four different heads! My hair always needs a lot of work, so I was very happy to discover that.

The breakfast was fresh and plenty. We finished the whole tray both days we stayed, but then regretted a little because it is actually a lot of food! There is a boiler and coffee machine in the room. The little kitchen area has the coffee, creamer, sugar, sweetener, a few types of tea and enough cups of your teas and coffee. There is also a mini fridge you can fill yourself.

Raymond was very nice to us. We arrived late and wanted to check out a little late because we were in Amsterdam for an event which ran all night. He was very nice about it, very helpful and kind.

I would highly recommend Raymond's place.

Wir hatten ein großartiges Wochenende in Amsterdam. Raymond ist sein sehr netter und unkomplizierter Gastegeber, der ein fantastisches Frühstück direkt ins Apartment bringt. Das Apartment ist sehr großzügig und toll ausgestattet und liegt im Herzen von Amsterdam. Von dort aus kann man tolle Restaurants, Bars und viele Sehenswürdigkeiten zu Fuß erreichen! Immer wieder gerne!!!

This property is right in the heart of Amsterdam ideally located to all of interest to tourists. The double bed is actually 2 singles pushed together with 2 single quilts not a double. This point is not made clear & made a great difference to our stay. Crockery & cutlery are available but no sink or running water. The site states no cooking facilities which is accurate. We did not meet our hosts check in is managed remotely from an app. Very secure property.
nice house,nice experience
What a beautiful place to stay, right in the heart of Amsterdam.  The hosts made everything so easy. Would stay here again next time.  Loved the bright, airy space and comfortable bed
What a great location!  A lovely place to stay with very attentive hosts.

We loved staying at La Vie En Rose, Christa and Yvon's place! They made it very easy to find with the check-in details, and we loved the automatic locking entry! We had fun taking the stairs, although a bit steep, they never held us back! The flat was so clean, modern, and trendy! We loved staying in the heart of the city and being able to open the big windows and look out on the cafes! The bed was very comfortable, and the bathroom was plenty big for both of us! We would definitely recommend La Vie En Rose to anyone staying in Amsterdam!
Great location in the heart of central Amsterdam.  Close to central station and an easy walk or tram to all the sights!

Christa’s place was great for a quick trip to Amsterdam. The location is ideal as you are in a central area and walking distance to a lot of the tourist attractions. I certainly would recommend this place to those who are looking to stay in a central location. Do keep in mind the stairs are steep- it will be tricky with large luggage.
Great location and communication with Christa & Yvon. Perfect for a weekend break to Amsterdam.

Hervorragende Unterkunft! Genialer Standort! Top Gastgeber!

Auf jedenfall werden wir wieder kommen!

This space was in a very convenient location and check in with the Nuki lock system was super simple. The space was very small and the bathroom was not up to my standards from a cleanliness perspective.
Excellent location, easy access to tram network and local attractions, yet quiet and peaceful, nice touch with the scented towels and app door tech.

Highly recommended.
The most important parts: the apartment is clean, the bed is comfy, and above all the location is fantastic!
Climbing the steep stair to the second floor was a bit challenging at the beginning but after all, not a big deal

My husband and I absolutely loved staying at Christa and Yvon’s place. We unfortunately couldn’t make it until a day later than originally planned, but they were so communicative and made sure that once we got to Amsterdam we found their place and had everything we needed. Our trip was short, but so sweet thanks to the amazing location of the apartment. It was so clean and also very spacious. I loved looking out the big beautiful windows at the hustle and bustle of the city too. The bed was extremely comfortable and even though you’re right in the heart of the city, the apartment is very quiet. We would love to come back and stay for longer next time, such a great spot!
Great home in Amsterdam, a short walk to Amsterdam Central. We had a long layover and this was a perfect place to stay! The home is cozy and perfectly equiped for travelers.

Really great place in the center of Amsterdam. Really loved it!
Coffee every morning was really a nice touch! Also the convenience of not having keys to carry with their digital locks is truly amazing!
This is a great place!

Just back from a weekend at Christa & Yvons place, the apartment is perfect exactly how it looks in the pictures and Christa was always contactable and swift to respond. The apartment was spotless and had very comfortable beds

Excellent location around 5 minute walk from central station with lots of nice cafes and small supermarkets close by.

Can’t recommend this place enough great base for exploring Amsterdam.

Thanks again!!

Jill x
Amazing apartment in the ideal spot for exploring Amsterdam centre. Walking distance of the station and right in the middle of everything! Would 100% stay here again, we loved it! Thank you!
Great location, in the middle of everthing, pictures reflects what you will have, clean, comfartable bed, very quite apartment even being in the heart of the city..

Christa and Yvon’s ace was perfect for our short trip in Amsterdam. The space was the perfect size and location for my husband and I and it had just about everything we could need for a comfortable stay. Thanks again! We had a great time!
Brilliant place! Super helpful hosts and couldn’t have had a better weekend. Location is superb!
It was an absolutely perfect place to start off our honeymoon. I would most definitely book it again. Thank you!!

The apartment was very clean and cosy and in a perfect central location. The bed is just gorgeous! We needed to contact our hosts with a small problem when we first arrived and they immediately responded and helped to sort things very quickly. Can’t fault anything! We loved our stay - thank you
A great place in a great location. A short trip from Central station and many sights and restaurants. The place was clean and stylish, with great views. Would stay there again!

This is a great place to spend some time at while in Amsterdam. It's cosy, clean, comfortable and offers the ideal private retreat. It's on walking distance from a Bagles & Beans, a Turkish bakery and a bus stop to the city centre and Westerpark. It was my first time ever on a houseboat and I can say it was an excellent experience! Such a delight to wake up to the soft sound of ducklings and little boats rippling the water.
Diewert is a charming, welcoming, easy-going and open host. He made us feel welcome and at ease. His kids are absolutely adorable! Would definitely stay here again.

Voor de Nederlandse bezoekers van Amsterdam: zeker een plek om hier te verblijven! Prachtig plekje met genoeg privacy en een heel welkom gevoel.

Diewert is a great host, very friendly and helpful!

The apartment was clean, neat and elegant and we were really happy to experience life on a boat house and drink our morning coffee at Diewert's beautiful house yard.

Moreover the house is located very close to the city centre and it's really enjoyable to ride the bike around this area!

All in all my friend and I were very satisfied with our choice and would love to stay there again on our next trip to Amsterdam!

We really enjoyed our stay on the Van Der Horst family’s houseboat in Amsterdam. It’s located on a quiet little street and canal but there are lots of places in the neighbourhood to get your meals and a bakery if you just want to pick up something to take back for breakfast. Access to our room was very easy and we could come and go without disturbing the family. The room was just the right size for the two of us with a big window that let in lots of light and with all the conveniences of home. The bathroom was sleek and modern. They have a beautiful little patio area on the dockside where you can sit out if you wish. We did a lot of walking but there was access to transportation close by.
Diewert was very welcoming and had lots of great suggestions both for places to eat and for things to do. He directed us to Winkel’s for appeltarte. We hadn’t heard of Winkel’s before but we’d love to have one here!! It was market day (Monday) so it was fun to browse through the wide variety of market stalls and then stop for a treat. We took a short ride on the bus to the Rijksmuseum, which is open to the public again and well worth a visit. Diewert and his lovely family made us feel very welcome and we would certainly look for a vacancy on their houseboat if we return to Amsterdam. We would highly recommend it to others.

Diewert is an excellent host and very accommodating. We had a fabulous stay on the houseboat, which was very clean, cozy and private. The location was perfect for walking into the center of Amsterdam and I would definitely recommend it to friends and family. Thank you for a memorable stay!
