Diewert is a really good host.My boyfriend and me totally recommend the boathouse. It was lovely waking up with the feeling being on a houseboat. The interior was all new and the bed really good. Everything was pretty close so we walked most of the times. We will definitely stay there again!

I had the best time at Diewert's place. He and his family are the perfect hosts ever. The room has a separate entrance and there is a very nice and brand new bathroom inside. In that way I was completely independent. The location is very convenient and one can easily find tram connections toward the center and central station. Additionally staying in a houseboat is such a great experience that you would never find anywhere else! I highly recommend Diewert house for an amazing journey in Amsterdam.

Great place to have a private dutch feeling. Clean room, comfortable bed and nice breakfast. Thanks Raymond for the stay. Big plus extra for the
option to store our luggage until we had our flight back.

Superlocatie, supergastgezin, superstad! Wat kan een mens nog meer wensen,
Bedankt Dieuwert voor het zeer aangename verblijf

We had a very comfortable and enjoyable stay with Diewert!

He was very helpful and replied quickly to all our queries, before and after arrival.

The house boat was spotlessly clean, conveniently located with good in-room facilities similar to a hotel room experience.

I would recommend to visitors to Amsterdam.

What a treat. A great way to stay in Amsterdam-on a houseboat. Diewert and Wielke and their family are so friendly, welcoming and helpful. The area and neighborhood is very nice and near enough to the action - though peaceful and quiet. I loved waking up on the water. I'd highly recommend this experience.

My boyfriend and I went to Amsterdam for a romantic getaway. We wanted the houseboat feeling, which we definitly got with Diwert. The room had averything you would wan from a hotel room; a Nespresso coffee maker, a minibar (with very nice prices, and a very nice bath room. It was light and spanking clean and our dirty coffee cups were cleaned every day.

Diewert and his familiy were very welcoming and gave great advice about the nearby restaurants (they even booked us tables). He had also helped us to rent bicykles that were waiting for us in the garden when we arrived.

The location was perfect, a five minutes bike ride from Anne Frank Huis and a ten minutes ride from everything else. If you are looking for a friendly, nice and quite but central place to stay, this is it!
Great place, neat, tidy and cosy! Also very original, being on a houseboat. Diewert was very nice also in arranging a children's bed for us. Definetely recommended!

Great find. On the water in
beautiful and convenient neighbood. Lovely hosts.
Just off the touristy parts, so it's quiet, but very close to everything. Check-in was super easy, and the apartment itself was clean and well laid-out.

I stayed at this place for a week, and everything about it was so nice. Before the check-in, the host kindly explained how to use their smart door locks and how to get there. The check-in was very smooth and easy, thanks to the smart door locks and the perfect location of the place (close to the main station and there is a tram station right in front of the place). During the stay, Christa and Yvon were very kind. Once I had to ask a question at late night and the reply was quick and kind. The room is big. The greatest thing about this place, in my opinion, is the wide windows. You can enjoy the lively view, sitting at a cosy sofa. I highly recommend this place and I will for sure choose this same place if I go to Amsterdam again.

We stayed a week in the Christa`s & Yvon´s apartment which was great. The apt is nicely decorated, very chic, cozy and clean, with useful informations provided from Christa and Yvon and on a perfect location in the center of Amsterdam- close to the Central Railway Station and a few walking min from the Dam Square. Most of the sites and places of interest are on walking distance as well numerous restaurants, bars, shops...and also the tram station is in the front of the building if needed.
We enjoyed staying in the apt and its neighbourhood very much and felt like at home. The stairs leading to the apt are narrow and steep like in most older Ams buildings, so for the bigger luggage which we had a little bit challenging, but also no problem! For a longer stay it would be handy to have a kitchen sink, but we organised ourselves and it was no problem. Christa and Yvon were very friendly, helpfull and all our communication were smooth. I would definitely like to stay again in La Vie En Rose when I come to Amsterdam.
This place was perfect for what we needed. Check in was super simple and we were even able to check in early which was so wonderful. Christa & Yvon were easy to communicate with and great hosts!
Great location! Easy checkin and access to apartment
Great room. Can be noisy at night because of the liveliness of the neighborhood. super close to all of Amsterdam's sights so very walkable. Loved it!

Amazing location in the heart of 9 streets, nearby beautiful little shops. Raymond was a great host who made checking in a breeze. Apartment is as reflected in the photos, it's fully private with its own shower, and toilets. Raymond's daily breakfast was a cherry on top of the deal. Apartment is 2 steep flights on the second floor.

Would be happy to come back!

Raymond was a very kind host.  Terrific breakfast each morning.  Clean, well equipped room.  This is a great location if you like to be in a central spot, within walking distance to all the central attractions.  The bar below is noisy well into the night--we found that using the fan provided in the room was a great way to cover the noise from below.
Fantastic location and great host! Couldn't have asked for more and I would highly recommend staying here! :)

We had a great stay at this B&B. The location is perfect if you want to explore the city. It can be a little bit noisy at night but if you close the window it's fine :-) Ray is a wonderful host and the breakfast is perfect for a good start in the day!
Geweldige locatie midden in de Jordaan en Negen Straatjes. Royaal ontbijt met elke dag nieuwe variaties. Ruime lichte kamer. Goede douche. Nespresso machine en waterkoker aanwezig!
Très bon air bnb, qui nous a permis de découvrir Amsterdam. Nous avons tous fais à pieds, logement agréable, propre et moderne. Situé à proximité de centre ville, de canaux ou de tram.

Raymond's place was just out of the centre. It was fantastic for exploring and right on a tram line. It was so convenient for meals and shopping in the hip community.
There is a steep staircase which didn't bother us at all but something to keep in mind if you have difficulty with stairs.

Amazing, fabulous room. Raymond is a gracious host.... and his room is simply perfect. We fell madly in love with Amsterdam and could have stayed for a long, long time. We hope to go back again and will absolutely stay here.
A Perfect stay in the very heart of Amsterdam!! Thank you.

The place was great! It was centrally located, and we were able to walk everywhere we went. Breakfast each morning was delivered to the door,  I and was delicious. Raymond was a wonderful host who went above and beyond to make sure we had everything we needed.

A nice, quaint and stylish space close to everything in Amsterdam. We walked almost everywhere and nothing was farther than a 20-30 minute walk. Check in was very easy and Christa and Yvon were very responsive to all of our questions. Would highly recommend this space!

The house boat is a lovely place, and we really enjoyed staying there. It's a room on the second floor of the boat, with its own bathroom and entrance. A very private space! It's in a very quiet and peaceful residential area 10-15 minutes from central Amsterdam on a bike. It was very clean and newly decorated, and the place was cleaned while we were out during the day!

Diewert's place is just perfect! Living in a houseboat for a few days is a unique experience. The room was extremely nice and clean, everything as described.
The neighborhood is quite and very close to bus\tram.
Plus, Diewert is a really helpful host. I can truly recommend this place.

Diewert's "bed, no breakfast" was a perfect experience for my husband and I. The room was a good size, and was well-appointed with storage, hangers, linens, a mini-bar and lovely bathroom. The neighborhood was in a very convenient, walkable location. My husband and I enjoy running, and this houseboat was close to a great park for running, which made our stay even that much more enjoyable.

We expected to arrive in the early evening on our first dat, and had emailed Diewert those plans. Our plans shifted, though, and we found ourselves ahead of schedule, and let Diewert know. He replied immediately that his wife would be available to let us in our room and gave us the access code.

Upon arrival, Diewert's wife greeted us and showed us around. They had bikes for rent, and a bulletin board full of recommendations from previous guests.

The room is simple and lovely with whitewashed floors and white walls. Although it is in a city neighborhood, it's a short walk to the busier streets, and therefore felt very peaceful and calm after the hustle and bustle of the city. There were some really cool neighborhood cats and a beautiful rooster (! No worries, didn't crow!)

There's outdoor patio space, which we used one night, and Diewert provided us with some plates and forks for our salads.

Amsterdam was our 4th stop in a 2 week trip to Europe, and I'm glad we chose Diewert's houseboat over a hotel room. It was the perfect ending to our trip.

Eine tolle Möglichkeit in Amsterdam super zu wohnen. Mit einem kleinen Spaziergang ist man in der "Innenstadt". Tolle kleine Miniwohnung an der es einem für einen Stadttrip an nix fehlt. Ein toller Service vom Gastgeber Diewert und seiner Familie mit vielen Tips, die unseren Urlaub verschönert haben. Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder in das wahrscheinlich kleinste Hotelzimmer von Amsterdam und haben unseren 5 Tages Trip nach Amsterdam sehr genossen.

Weitere Infos in Kurzform:
Sehr sauber und das Zimmer wurde täglich gesäubert wenn wir unterwegs waren, der Kaffee lecker und auch immer in ausreichender Menge vorhanden, sowohl mit dem Bus als als auch mit häufiger fahrenden Tram erreichbar, Fahrräder sind zusätzlich mietbar für einen geringen Preis, in der Umgebung kann man super frühstücken oder sich auf dem Weg in die Stadt schnell was vom Bäcker holen, ruhige Umgebung vor allem wenn man nicht den Trubel direkt vor dem Zimmer haben möchte.
Angenehme, sehr saubere Unterkunft in einer ruhigen und doch stadtnahen Umgebung. Freundlicher unkomplizierter Gastgeber. Wir haben es genossen.

„Our Houseboat“ was a very quiet place in just 15 min walking distance to the centre. The neighbourhood was also very quiet and secure. The owners named us a very good restaurant where we had a fantastic dinner in a very special atmosphere. We felt more like locals than tourist in this cosy place.

Stayed at Diewert's place for 2 nights.
Diewert and his wife are very friendly.
House boat location was perpect. The neighborhood is quite and very close to tram and bus.
It's in a very quiet and safe area.
We really enjoyed on houseboat.

La maison Houseboat de Diewert est située dans un endroit très calme et proche du centre ville. Accueil très sympathique, chambre très bien aménagée avec une jolie salle d'eau. On y dort très bien. A recommander.

Raymond's place is located in a very safe neighborhood. It is also located in the 9 streets known for their pubs, cafes and boutiques. The top-floor room was clean, large and airy, and is above the pub that Raymond owns. At night, you can hear the noise from the pub. Close the windows and the noise is much more subdued.

A delicious breakfast of croissants, bread, cheese, meats, juice and coffee is brought up to us every morning, which was a nice surprise!!

Like all the houses in Amsterdam, the stairs are very narrow, shallow and steep. For this reason, I would not recommend this place for the elderly or if you have a problem with climbing stairs. I counted 34 steps. Thank goodness, Raymond's son carried our luggage up and down for us.

At other airbnb's, shampoo, conditioner and body soap were provided. A suggestion for Raymond would be that they do the same. Buy extra large bottles of shampoo, conditioner and body soap so that it will be unlikely that your guests will steal these. Also provide small tubes of toothpaste. But again, this is only a suggestion.

Raymond's place is also very near to Anne Frank's house (book online 4 months in advance) and a few other places of interest.

I will definitely come back here to stay at Raymond's place again.

Raymond's place is fantastic! Clean, awesome location and breakfast each morning was included.  Very walkable location and Raymond provided great directions from the airport.  As many other reviews noted, there is a bar downstairs so it can get loud at night but helps to close the windows and put the fan on or join in and have a beer downstairs :) Narrow, spiral-like staircase so make sure to pack light unless you are like us and can carry our large luggage anywhere. Thanks Raymond and we can't wait to visit again soon!
This apartment is in an amazing neighborhood and is spacious and super comfortable. The free breakfast brought to your door each day was extremely generous. Would definitely stay here again.

A beautiful and comfortable space in an amazing location!  Raymond's place is super convenient and in a wonderful, walkable neighborhood, located close to the major attractions and with a wide selection of restaurants close by.  The room is large and has everything you need for a comfortable stay.  It is a steep climb up the stairs, but Raymond helped with the big suitcase, so all was good.  Breakfast is delicious and enormous...enough to pack along for a snack during the day.  We wish we could have stayed longer.

super emplacement proche de tout a Amsterdam, hôte charmant, chambre très propre et décorée avec goût, petit déjeuner super copieux et bon.
La seule petite remarque serait que le soir comme il y a un café en dessous c'est un peu bruyant.

Amazing location. Still walkable to many sites (Rijksmuseum, Anne Frank house, red light district, Dams square) but out of the busier tourist areas. Very comfortable bed and there is a lot of reference information in the room. Raymond provided a generous breakfast every morning and even went out of his way to bring us orange juice and champagne on my husbands birthday.
Raymond was an amazing host and gave us the perfect place to stay. Perfect location and a truly enjoyable visit. Would definitely recommend and stay here again.
Très jolie chambre au centre d'Amsterdam. A proximité des canaux et des sites à visiter. Raymond est un hôte agréable et super gentil!

Raymond is amazing and his hospitality is impeccable. Breakfast is delicious, as well as his cafe, cafe du doffer, downstairs. He went above and beyond to make sure my roomie, Emily's, birthday was extra special. He also catered to other special needs with ease.

The apartment is modern, clean, and charming. Location is perfect. Very short walk to everything and is very safe. Love it! Highly recommended.

Ellen and Emily
Great location. Close to everything. Great room.

Es hat uns sehr gut gefallen,es war gross und sehr sauber. Raymond hat uns sehr freundlich empfangen und servierte uns ein lekkeres Frühstück was den ganzen Tag anhielt😃
Besonders gut gefallen hat uns die centrale Lage, es ist alles zu Fuss erreichbar.
Wir kommen gerne wieder.

We loved our stay at raymond's apartment especially the location. It is very central and close to everything that the pretty jordaan area has to offer. Plenty of restaurants around. Special thanks for the early checkin and the lovely breakfast that was served to us! The apartment made us like amsterdam even more.

Chambre très agréable, aménagée avec goût. Raymond vous prépare un super petit déjeuner. C est un hôte très disponible qui vous permet de profiter pleinement de votre (Website hidden by Airbnb) situation est parfaite près des canaux et pour visiter tous les coins d Amsterdam.  J y retournerais avec plaisir.

Raymond's apartment was roomy and comfortable with all the facilities needed for an enjoyable visit.  It was conveniently located for sightseeing and for restaurants.  An excellent breakfast was provided.  WiFi was great and the TV had several English channels.  Raymond provided good travel directions.

Diewert's houseboat room is really confortable. It has all facilities: wifi, TV, coffee machine, safe-deposit box...
Diewert is a really nice host. He is very helpful and thoughful. He offered us their bikes for rent, he explained us the best places to visit and gave us some tips.
We expected to share our stay in Amsterdam with a local family, but the room is separate from the house. As Diewert said it's a "mini-hotel". The room is cleaned everyday. For all of you who are looking for a private stay in a really confrotable room, this is your place!

This place is a gem. Originally Diewert made arrangements for me to leave my bags super early but my plans changed and he accommodated my changes without hesitation. I did not get to meet Diewert personally because I'm a only in the room to sleep kinda person and my trip was short but he checked in with me via text and even sent his friendly neighbor over to be his local ambassador information guide. The place is pristine white, the bath modern and clean. Fall asleep to the sounds of gentle water flowing and the  occasional  quacking of ducks or were they swans? My experience with the Dutch locals was marvelous as a first timer in Amsterdam and Diewert's bnb added to my warm happy experience. Btw- he has an nespresso machine which I've never used before but am thinking of buying one myself now after this experience.

It's a cute houseboat in a quite but central location. Our room was nice and clean. Diewert was very friendly and helpful. He made our stay as uncomplicated ad possible although we did not meet in person by very informative emails and sending a friend who welcomed us.
Thanks a lot - I hope to stay again at your swimming mini hotel soon!

My husband and I absolutely fell in love with Amsterdam, and staying in Diewert and family's houseboat was one of many reasons.  After quite a long flight delay, Diewert was still very welcoming us into his home. The houseboat is spectacular! Very clean, comfortable, warm, quiet, and the boat literally rocks you to sleep at night. The safe in the room was an added bonus, and even better the stocked mini fridge after a long day of exploring Amsterdam!  Diewert gave us many recommendations while in Amsterdam, many which we took advantage of.  And follow his direction when he says go to Winkel to have apple pie, it is amazing! :) The option of the cheap bike rental that is offered as well is a must!  We had a blast riding around Amsterdam with the locals!  We will be back, and hopefully staying with Diewert and family. I will also recommend staying here to anyone, and will recommend this to my friends in the states coming in the spring.
La maison se situe sur l'eau.. Notre hôte nous a tout expliqué lors de notre arrivée.. Il nous a donné des adresses de restaurant, etc.. L'entre de notre chambre est privatisée avec un code..
Super séjour à Amsterdam, très bon accueil de la part des propriétaires. On vous recommande cette adresse.

This was an absolutely amazing experience! The space was beautiful, in the perfect location and before we even arrived. Diewert and his family made us feel right at home. We were welcomed with maps, guidebooks, recommendations and everything else we would possibly need for a fabulous vacation.
Diewert fût très accuillant avec nous. Il nous a donné plein de conseils pour visiter Amsterdam. La chambre est très propre et le logement est très bien situé.
Schönes Zimmer, liebevoll eingerichtet, tolles  Bad, nette, herzliche Gastgeber, super Lage
Die Beschreibung der Unterkunft war sehr genau und wir haben uns sehr wohl dort gefühlt.

Das Hausboot hat eine gute Anbindungen an die öffentlichen Verkehrmittel und ist schön ausgestattet. Der Raum wirkt auf den Fotos größer , ist aber vollkommene ausreichend für zwei Personen. Der Vermietet war sehr nett und alles lief wunderbar entspannt ab. Auch würde täglich geputzt plus frische Handtücher. Alles in allem ein sehr entspannter Aufenthalt.

We had a really great experience at Diewert's houseboat in Amsterdam. The location was great, can easily walk to everywhere in the city. The place itself was nice, clean and had everything you need for a comfortable stay. Diewert himself is really friendly and made us feel very welcome - you'll have maps to the city and he gave us great suggestions on places to eat around the area. All in all an amazing stay and hope to be back again!
Nice, cozy, neat, call, private. Not too far from city center with great public Transport. Nice Restaurants within reach by foot. 1*

- Het was een prettig verblijf op een goede en rustige locatie,
(het centrum is prima te belopen)
- Het verblijf was netjes en schoon.
- Eindelijk een minibar met normale prijzen!
- Gelegenheid om de auto in een garage te kunnen parkeren.
(stukken goedkoper en veiliger dan parkeerplaatsen op straat)
- Een zeer relaxte en flexibele verhuurder!
- Toegang tot verblijf met een code, geen sleutels die je kwijt kan
raken!

Kortom, wij raden het iedereen aan!

Me and my partner stayed in Diewerts guest room for a long weekend and we were so pleased with the room and the area of Amsterdam it was situated. We had complete privacy during our stay and Diewert was a fantastic host! He made sure we had directions from the airport and included maps and brochures in our room to use during our stay. He was on hand for any help or questions we needed to ask. We would recommend staying here to anyone visiting Amsterdam and we would use it for future visits too! The room is very clean and Diewert cleaned it during our visit too which was very kind of him. The location itself is perfect for anyone wanting to visit Amsterdam as it is only 10 mins away by bus from the local attractions. The bed is very comfy too! Thank you again to Diewert and his family for being the perfect hosts! I am sure we will visit again!

De kamer was netjes, modern en goed verzorgd. Het was leuk dat de toegang en badkamer gescheiden was van de rest van de woonboot. Op die manier konden we zelf zien wanneer we wouden toekomen en moesten we hun niet savonds laat storen. De kamer is vlakbij het centrum gelegen (te voet nog goed te doen) en in een rustige buurt. Met andere woorden ideaal om Amsterdam te verkennen, een aanrader!

The houseboat is very clean and the bed extremely comfortable
We enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam even though the weather was very bad
We would consider going again in summertime
The host was very welcoming and had a good explanation of the area. The place was very cozy and not to far away from central. Thumbs up! :)
Die Vermieter waren sehr herzlich und hilfsbereit. Die Unterkunft war sehr neu, sauber und gemütlich und ruhig

A wonderful host who was available to offer tips and advice. The place was perfect with a cosy, clean room with modern finishes. Bikes were available which made it very convenient to get around. The location is central already but even better to experience Amsterdam on bikes.

J'ai beaucoup apprécié mon sejour dans ce joli logement "houseboat". La chambre est belle et propre. Les équipements sont design et de qualité. L'habitation est en 'proche périphérie ' du centre ville. Idéal pour se ressourcer après une journée dynamique dans Amsterdam. La ligne de bus est directe pour amener à la centrale station. Seulement 10 minutes. Diewert est tres sympa ainsi que sa famille. Bref cette expérience etait très enrichissante. Je recommande!

Really a great place to stay! The room is nice and clean (maybe a little bit smaller than it looks on the photos, but that's really not important), the bed is super comfortable and the neighbourhood is quiet. The location is very good too: there are two bus stops within 3-4 min walk, both going to the train station in less than 10 min (we had our flight back at 8 am and managed to get to the airport in about 35 min). There is also a tram that goes to the museum quarter and Anna Frank's house is 15 min away by foot. We spent most of our time exploring the city, so we didn't see our host a lot, but Diewert was always very quick to reply to the messages and his wife was very welcoming when we arrived. There is also a folder with a lot of useful info and maps in the room!

Accueil chez lui autour d'un café, renseignements très utiles pour le séjour. La chambre correspondait au descriptif. Quartier extrêmement calme bien que pas très loin du centre.
Diewert s'est très gentiment occupé de la réservation du taxi pour l'aéroport.

Great! So attain give and approaching. As well as approachable. He anticipated our stay and asked a week prior about our details. Information about the stay in Amsterdam and what to do was given, too.

We loved staying on the houseboat! It wasn't far to walk to restaurants and get around and we felt very comfortable. It was fun to see the ducks and birds outside the window. Diewert and his family were so sweet and we appreciated his introduction and recommendations. His houseboat and neighborhood made us want to pack up everything and move to Amsterdam! Thanks for the great stay.

Had a fantastic stay! Diewert is a warm and friendly host, with great recommendations and suggestions for our stay. A truly unique location - better than any hotel. We wish we had stayed longer and can't wait to return.

Diewert was a fantastic host, great communication and flexible about our arrival and was so helpful once we'd arrived recommending bars and restaurants and he even did some laundry for us which was very nice of him.

The boat is beautiful and in a quiet part of Amsterdam, 10-15 mins walk from the best bits of the city and 30 mins from the Red Light District and surrounding attractions. There was also space for our bikes in his garden.

The room is beautiful and bright and it was spotlessly clean too. We'd definitely return.

We had an amazing time on Diewert's houseboat! The room was very modern, comfortable, and spotlessly clean. It was delightful to be on a real Amsterdam houseboat and watch the ducks and herons on the canal outside our window. The private entrance was also very nice! The location was quite convenient for walking around the city and Diewert was very friendly and welcoming with lots of great tips. We would definitely stay again.

La chambre est conforme à la description, propre, pas de surprise. Drap et serviette sont compris,le mini-bar est pratique, et la terrasse bien sympa. Quartier vraiment calme, en 10mn à vélo du centre.
Merci encore diewert pour l'agréable séjour

Lovely stay at this apartment. A perfect location for strolling around Amsterdam. The bed was amazingly comfortable. The apartment was very clean too. Definitely recommend this place for a weekend get away.

Great location and hosts are easy to reach by phone.
A few things to keep in mind:
The place is called bed & breakfast but they don't provide breakfast.
There is no sink in the kitchenette so you need to use the washroom sink.
There is no microwave.
The water pressure in the shower is very low and it takes time to get hot water.
The chandelier in the main room works inconsistently which can be a real pain. Hopefully this will be fixed.
The fireplace is fake (lights only).
The heater did not work on our last day.

The rest is great and it is very centrally located. They provide coffee pods and sugar.
Perfect location, great hosts

We booked this apartment last year and we found it to be absolutely great so on our return we rebooked for this year. Spacious, well decorated and perfect location.  Christa & Yvon are great hosts and lightning quick responses.
The place was very clean and very convenient!  Thank you!
Nice suite with a pretty aspect.  Very centrally located.  Two flights of steep narrow stairs to the suite.
Brilliant location and lovely hosts
Great location close to the tram stop and the center of town

Central , clean . Nice decoration
Everything you c an expect in Amsterdam

Christa & Yvon were wonderful hosts and were quick to respond to our questions. Nice roomy stylish apartment. Their place is within a 15 minute walk to Centraal Station and a 10 minute walk to the Anne Frank House. The building is on a busy street with a tram-line, but the comfortable bedroom is in back away from the noise with lots of curtains for privacy. Nice bathroom, roomy shower with plenty of hot water and a towel warmer. Large, easy to use TV, fridge for beer. This place worked well as our base in Amsterdam. Thanks C&Y.
Beautiful place right in the center of the city. Great hosts. Would love to stay here again!

Everything was great, we really enjoyed our stay there!
The location is amazing which makes exploring amsterdam so easy. The self check in is pretty simple. They made sure we‘re enjoying our time!
Thanks again!
Super cute and pretty place to stay. Very central. Thanks for flexible check in / check out times!

We had a “couple”-weekend in Amsterdam and everything with the apartment was perfect.
We arrived very late but it was still possible to check-in.
Christa & Yvon were very helpful in case of any questions!

The location of the apartment is really perfect. Everything we had planned, we could reach within walking distance.

So thank you very much to Christa & Yvon for the great weekend!

We will come back definitely!

Best Regards,

Hoang

Eigentlich hatten wir ein Hausboot gemietet. Glück für und musste dies zu unserer Zeit in die Reparatur. Sonst hätten wir nie dieses tolle Apartment erleben dürfen.

Nachdem man den versteckten Eingang gefunden hat, eröffnet sich ein Apartment mit dem gewissen extra. Durchdachte Raumplanung, extravagante Möbel, Zimmer mit Kamin, viel Licht und massig Komfort.
Es war alles da was man braucht, sehr sauber und wirkte überhaupt nicht abgewohnt oder unangenehm. Wie gesagt toller Geschmack und viel liebe zum Detail.
Wenn wir Fragen hatten wurden diese umgehend zu unserer vollen Zufriedenheit beantwortet und die extra Tipps waren Gold wert.
Danke nochmals das wir bei Euch wohnen durften.

The owners are very nice and always ready to help. Easy to contact and they answered almost immediately. The room is located exactly at the center of Amsterdam and the tram station is in front of the building, which make your life more comfortable. The room is also nice and clean. We were happy having been there:).

Wir haben die Unterkunft zu zweit für 2 Nächte gebucht. Die Unterkunft ist ordentlich, schön und sauber.. Die Lage ist perfekt man ist mitten drin aber es war trotzdem ruhig. Christa & Yvon waren sehr nett und immer zu erreichen, bei allen Fragen und Problemchen waren sie direkt zur Stelle. Gerne weiter zu empfehlen!

Appartement bien situé , bonne communication . Un peu déçu par le manque de climatisation lors des fortes chaleurs ainsi que les travaux dans les escaliers rendant la descente très dangereuse . Néanmoins , l'appartement est très propre et très bien situé

Fantastic location in the heart of Amsterdam, you can reach nearly every point of interest by foot. Great apartment, please be aware of the very steep steps, but after all, there is nothing to complain about. We were informed very well by our hosts about check-in, and they also provided any information possible, so it's a good idea to book this apartment

Very nice place, very central, clean. Well organised, communicative hosts. They really go out of their way to make sure things work. Recommended. Check in was easy and the descriptions of everything accurate. Would stay there again.
Nice Appartement, near to everything you need. Would come again.
Great location, a large space for Amsterdam standards, quick and easy communication!

Eine sehr schöne, gemütliche und saubere Unterkunft!
Trotz erschwerter, pandemiebedingter Auflagen waren Kommunikation, Check-In und Check-Out nicht nur kontaktlos, sondern auch vollkommen komplikationslos.

Hallo, bevor ihr das bucht müsst ihr über einiges Bescheid wissen.
Die Treppen in das Apartment sind 90 grad steil und nicht einfach, gerade für schwerer Menschen keine Chance. Dazu kam es öfter vor das die Besitzer bei uns im Apartment waren. Was überhaupt nicht geht. Das ist ein Eingriff in meine Privatsphäre!!!! Die Lage ist inordnung nur hört mal alles durch die Wende.
Freunde und Familie zu Besuch sind auch nicht erwünscht.
Lovely apartment in the centre! Very spacious and lovely host’s!

A perfect location and a wonderful design of the apartment have created a special atmosphere of our vacation . We have received what we would like and more spending time in Amsterdam. Big thanks Christa and Yvon for your attention:) very clean, very cozy and a wonderful view !
Lovely accommodation, clean rooms and near of the central of amsterdam. I can recommend it !
Sono stato benissimo, ambiente accogliente e silenzioso, situato a due passi dal centro e dalla stazione. Tornerò volentieri in questa casa! Grazie
Sfeervol ingericht op een toplocatie
Perfect apartment in a perfect city, perfectly situated. Lovely guest and very simple automated access procedure. Bravo!
Really nice apartment in a very good location to enjoy and explore Amsterdam ! Christa and Yvon are very nice and helpful

La camera si trova in una posizione ottimale, tra i canali della zona centrale della città, ma lontano dalle zone troppo affollate.
Raymond è gentile e disponibile, oltre a portarci deliziose colazioni ai nostri orari preferiti, ci ha tenuto i bagagli a lungo sia prima del check in che dopo il check out.
Very nice place in 9 streets.  Raymond was helpful and we loved our stay.
Super el sitio, de lo mejor, limpieza espectacular, buena ubicación, amabilidad y el desayuno excelente. Recomendaría a cualquiera
Raymond was very friendly and the unit was in a great area. We hope the bed bug infestation is resolved so other visitors can enjoy the apartment.

Das Apartment entsprach der Beschreibung und den Fotos. Wir haben uns sofort sehr wohl gefühlt.
Raymond nahm uns sehr freundlich in Empfang und hat sogar unsere beiden Koffer in das zweite Stockwerk getragen !!
Im Erdgeschoss des Nachbargebäudes ist ein Café. Da die Gäste teilweise auch draußen sitzen, muss man auch am späten Abend mit etwas Geräuschkulisse rechnen.
Das Appartement liegt im Jordan Viertel. Ein sehr schöner Stadtteil, in dem es sehr viele, kleine interessante, teils kuriose Geschäfte gibt. Ebenso finden sich zahlreiche, individuell eingerichtete, gemütliche Cafés und Restaurants. Mit der Tram ist man von "Spui"aus in wenigen Minuten an der Central Station.
Alles in allem hat alles prima gepasst.

C'est un très agréable studio proche du centre ville, Raymond est très agréable
Nous recommandons ce logement

Raymond's place is located directly in the center of Amsterdam but a little off the main tourist areas. Therefore its still easy to reach anything worthwhile on foot while avoiding most of the traffic. We never used the train for anything since it was so easy to reach anything by foot and while Raymond recommends taking the train from the central station, we easily reached his place in less than half an hour by walking.
The flat is modern and luxurious and made us feel at home the minute we walked in.
Raymond was great host who offered us any help we needed and brought us a superb breakfast to our room every morning at a time of our choosing.
We highly recommend staying with Raymond on your next trip to Amsterdam, we are definitively booking with Raymond again. :)

great location for all popular sights and also in a neighborhood to get a feel for "everyday" Amsterdam.
Tram stop is a short walk
Breakfast provided by Raymond is a definite perk.
Das Quartier ist so günstig gelegen, dass wir alles zu Fuß machen konnten. Raymond ist ein freundlicher Gastgeber, Frühstück kam pünktlich ans Bett. alles ist super
Raymond’s apt was great! It’s the perfect location and Raymond was very easy to communicate with. The apartment is exactly as advertised.
Great apartment and great host! Very welcoming service, would book again:)
Great Flat, very central. Had a great weekend.

Amazing place in the heart of Amsterdam.

Close to both the trainstation, the trams and the city center. It was a beautiful apartment, with lots of privacy and everything we needed. Christa and Yvon were great hosts (with cute dogs), and we loved to stay there.

10/10, we would stay there again!
Location was perfect, we walked basically everywhere or took the tram right outside the door when we couldn’t. Very comfortable, would stay again!
We had a really great time. The apartment is so beautiful und was very clean! Christa and Yvon are so kindhearted and always there to help!
Very nice and clean unit in the middle of the city.  Easy access to trams, central station, and all things.  Hosts were very good and communicative during the stay.

Zeer comfortabel appartement midden in de leukste stad van de wereld. We hebben geen last gehad van het geluid op straat, mede ook omdat de cafe's om middernacht sluiten. Het appartement is ruim, schoon, heel licht en comfortabel.

Absolutely perfect location and very good communication. I needed an earlier check in and ladies did their best to get the room ready for me as soon as possible. Definitely a good choice for your Amsterdam visit.

Das Apartment ist super schön eingerichtet, offen, hell und gemütlich.
Die Lage ist sehr zentral und man kann alles fußläufig erreichen.
Sollte man sich jedoch selbst verpflegen wollen, so gibt es leider keine richtige Kücheneinrichtung.
Die Kommunikation mit den Gastgeberinnen war ausgesprochen freundlich und schnell.
Wir kommen gerne wieder!

The suite is comfortable and the communication was quick. Hosts went out of their way to ensure I was able to do an early check in. Adjacent to several canals, Ann Frank house, De Wallen and many museums in close proximity. Easy access to unit via app or code. Would recommend for a true experience in the heart of beautiful Amsterdam!
We enjoyed our stay in this lovely appartment, perfectly suited to explore Amsterdam.

Diewert is een geweldige host. We hebben leuke tips gekregen over plekjes in Amsterdam: waar te gaan eten, de lekkerste appeltaart van de stad en dingen die we zeker moesten gaan zien.
Slapen op een woonboot en met de fiets de Amsterdam verkennen. te Een echte lokale ervaring!

Diewert and his family were very welcoming and very helpful. The room was clean, had everything required for our stay and is well kept.  It is as described and is close to public transport for getting in and out of town. We would recommend this accommodation and would happily stay there again. Dank U Wel Diewert. Kevin and Emily (UK)

Raymond is a very friendly and easy going host. There’s everything you need in the apartment and the breakfast was nice and definitely enough for half the day. The location couldn’t be better. You’re right in the middle of where you see and feel Amsterdam and it’s lovely people. Definitely would come back again
非常好的住宿，位置很好找，就在一个酒吧和一个花店中间，三楼，有一大面窗户，这才是古典荷兰住宅该有的样子。设施一应俱全，每天早晨Remond还会问几点吃早餐，并买好了端到楼上来。温馨舒适复古现代。非常喜欢，非常推荐！
Good location. Nice accomodation
Great place. Thanks
We spent 3 nights in the B&B ; it was perfect. Very clean, very nice place, and a very good (and copious) breakfast. Many thanks to Raymond for his kindness and hospitality, be sure we'll come back !

Raymond is a fantastic host and went above and beyond to make sure we  had a comfortable stay. The apartment is comfortable, clean and stylish and is very well located. I can't recommend this flat highly enough!
Excellent location in the city center. awesome accommodation with a wonderful host.

Raymond was a fantastic host who exceeded all expectations. There was someone available to speak to if needed and he brought us a freshly baked breakfast each morning.
The location is great. A short walk to most places but not right in the heart of the noisy areas.
Все соответствует описанию!Отличный завтрак которого и на обед хватит))Все удобства в пешей доступности!

Wow!  Possibly the best location in the entire city.  The immediate surroundings feel incredibly local and community driven.  The whole city is at your fingertips yet where Raymond’s place is located, big businesses are kept at bay.  Raymond and his restaurant were a highlight on a lengthy European visit. Simply put, you would be making a mistake by not staying here.
Raymond is a wonderful host. Great place to be and amazing breakfast

Bonjour, nous avons passé un agréable séjour chez Raymond qui est un hôte accueillant et attentionné. Petits déjeuners variés et copieux. Seul bémol situé au dessus d'un bar restaurant avec du bruit en début de nuit

Wir hatten einen tollen Aufenthalt zu dritt (2 Erwachsene + Kleinkind) und es war alles einfach spitze. Der Frühstücksservice war super und dank der zentralen Lage konnten wir Amsterdam problemlos zu Fuß erkunden! Danke an Raymond!

Casa Pulita e posizionata in un quartiere tranquillo di Amsterdam. L'alloggio è molto bello con tre finestre che affacciano sulla strada. Letto comodo, doccia ampia e spaziosa e servizio di colazione in camera. Consigliata.

Raymond's place is in the middle of 9 straatjes, the most beautiful part of the Amsterdam Grachten area with plenty of nice shops and cafés. We came there for kings day and there are partys on the street everywhere. Keep that in mind when you want to celebrate - Raymond runs the bar downstairs and it plays loud music during the festival weekend. So it might get hard to catch a lot of sleep.

He is a wonderful host with a lovely breakfast served whenever you want it and great advise for good restaurants (go to Daalder!). The room is spacious and equipped with everything a traveller needs (fridge, coffee machine, Lonely Planet, huge comfortable bed...) We would definitely come back!
Increíble lugar!!! Es una habitación super amplia y moderna. La ubicación es excelente.  Ray es un excelente anfitrión, siempre al servicio del huésped.  Inmejorable! ! Seguro volveremos!

Lovely comfortable and spotless room. Quiet location within walking distance from many things to do. Diewert was a great host and welcomed me on a rainy evening with a map of the city and some great recommendations for things to do. Highly recommended.
Easy check in, cozy and tasteful apartment. Recommended

Stylish apartment in an excellent location. Great shower, seating, fridge etc made it feel like home. Speedy check-in/out and great communication. Perfect for a visit to the arty Jordaan area or Amsterdam in general.

What a great space! The rooms were spacious, stylish and very clean! I’d lie in bed before rising, and listen to neighborhood wake; the bikes rolling down the cobblestone, the foreign voices as occasional travelers passed below, the late morning sounds of the waking cafe. Beautiful and peaceful!

And while the cafe/bar was open late, it wasn’t a bother and we never had trouble falling asleep, even with the windows wide open!
Raymond's place is very modern, comfortable and in the best location. Raymond himself is lovely and I would highly recommend his place to anyone traveling to Amsterdam

Die Unterkunft ist schön gross und sauber. Die Lage ist super. Alles gut zu Fuss erreichbar. Raymond ist ei toller und Sympathischer Gastgeber. Frühstück wird jeden Morgen aufs Zimmer gebracht.
Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden jeder zeit wieder kommen.

Corinne
Great location! Beautiful place!

Raymond's place was absolutely perfect! It is very clean, comfortable and functional space. The bed was very comfortable. It is in the perfect location as you are in a very nice quieter area but still within walking distance of most major attractions. Raymond is very kind and hospitable. We will definitely stay again in the future!

My friend & I spent 5 days at Raymond’s place in Amsterdam & can honestly say it was probably one of the best, if not the best one we stayed at during our 6 week , 6 country trip. It’s a very stylish, comfortable room, with a very nice modern bathroom overlooking a really nice street. One slightly negative thing is that Raymond’s restaurant next door can be a little noisy late at night ....not always, just sometimes. On the positive side we had two delicious meals (Website hidden by Airbnb) is De Doffer. Raymond provided huge breakfasts in the morning which we loved. He’s very quick to respond to any problems & is more than willing to give helpful tips on what to do & see in beautiful Amsterdam. We have no hesitation in highly recommending Raymond’s place to anyone planning a visit to Amsterdam.

Great location.  Very comfortable and clean apartment.  Very close to central station and the tram stops right out front.  Close to many wonderful restaurants and a grocery just down the street.  In the middle of it all.  Wonderful, friendly hosts.  This was our third stay at La vi en Rose and I highly recommend it.
We enjoyed our stay in the apartment. We loved the location directly in the city center and the flair of the old Amsterdam house. We would definetly come back, but it could have been a bit tidier.
Prime spot in Amsterdam. Beautiful room. Great hosts. Thank you!
BEST location!! Excellent communication and facilities.
Supermooie kamer met alles op en aan! Zeer rustig en goed gelegen. Gastheer en -vrouw zijn heel behulpzaam en vriendelijk. Hun tips voor het eten en de to do's waren ook top. Een absolute aanrader!
Raymond is a great host - very friendly and helpful. The room is in a beautiful location and was very cozy. We had a wonderful stay and I would definitely recommend this to anyone.
Amazing place. Beautiful on the inside and the breakfast every morning is a great touch. The location is within walking distance to all major destinations. One of the best Airbnb’s I’ve stayed at!
Tolle Lage. Schöne Wohnung.  Immer wieder

The location was superb in a very pedestrian friendly part of town that is super close to the city center. Cars are restricted from driving down the small streets during peak hours, which is an added bonus. We loved the windows, which can be opened fully and do a really good job of drowning out the noise from the bar at night when closed. The big fan and a pair of earplugs helped, too. We loved the breakfast spread and he brought up milk for my coffee the next day. We did have some trouble with the WiFi, but I always suggest getting a Tep for travel as a backup, because it happens to the best of us. Would definitely stay again.
The place is amazing, location and breakfast were great! We unfortunately didn't get to meet Raymond but all of his staff at the restaurant next door were very friendly and helpful.
This place is really amazing. The location is perfect! The breakfast is a big perk, it’s very delicious. The host is super genuine and hospitable. Will definitely be staying here next time around !

Vandaag terug gekomen van 4 dagen Amsterdam en we verbleven bij Raymond.. We hebben echt een geweldig weekend gehad. Alles tot in de puntjes verzorgd. Elke ochtend een ontbijtje op het tijdstip dat wij het graag wilde hebben. En elke dag variatie in het ontbijt.
De accommodatie is geweldig van alle gemakken voorzien, het is schoon en netjes.. Echt een aanrader om hier te verblijven midden in het centrum van Amsterdam.. Alles op loopafstand.

Lovely third floor private room with beautiful shower and private toilet in a stellar location.  Easy walking to shops or cafes and restaurants nearby.  First r example, we walked to Anne Frank House, Westerkerk, Rijksmuseum. Cafe right downstairs. Breakfast was more than enough and some days put some in the fridge for a snack later.  Would stay again and recommend.
Great location,  good space. And breakfast every morning was a nice touch! Raymond was an excellent host. Would highly recommend.

Raymond’s place was absolutely perfect,  first off check in could not have been easier. His breakfast was great and the view and location of the house could not have been more perfect. It was everything I expected and more!

Amsterdam was geweldig zeker mede door toedoen van deze kamer en verhuurder. Geweldige locatie. Top kamer en met een heerlijk ontbijt. Absoluut een aanrader voor iedereen die Amsterdam wil ontdekken. Alles op loop afstand

Lovely modern apartment in an amazing location (5 mins walk from the centre of Amsterdam)

Breakfast was delivered to the room at our chosen time which was a lovely touch.

Raymond was a great host and allowed us to store our bags before check in and after check out.

We would definitely stay here again.
Expect loud noise from bar/restaurant below.

We we welcomed by Diewert's lovely wife and children.  The houseboat was exactly as described . We really like the neighborhood.  It was quiet and had lots of trees.   Diewert had bikes that we could rent for a small fee which was very helpful!

Diewert's place is awesome! Clean, good size, and great vibes. Him and his family were great to us. Gave us some recommendations on places to go and communication was easy/quick if we needed anything. I would highly recommend this place and can't wait to come back and stay again! Thanks Diewert! Cheers
Diewert was very accommodating with finding the best way to the location and the providing everything from information on the city and amenities that were unexpected but very much appreciated.

We are so happy to have booked Diewert's room - it was just like we had hoped it would be! We were there for 2 nights to explore Amsterdam for the first time, and it was perfect for that! We were welcomed by Diewert as soon as we arrived, and he gave us loads of tips for places to go, and we loved every recommended place we went! We felt very much at home in the room, it's very cozy and the area in which it is located feels safe and is quiet, but you only need to walk five minutes to find cute little cafes, bars and restaurants and feel you are right in the middle of busy Amsterdam!
It was also very clean and nicely furnished, with a really modern bathroom. Of course, also, sleeping on a houseboat isn't something you get everywhere!
To sum it up, we 100% recommend this place!
My girlfriend and I had a fantastic stay at the boat house. Diewert was a very responsive and welcoming host who gave us lots of tips and recommendations every step of the way.

Prachtige kamer in inderdaad een rustige buurt. Toch ben je vrij snel in het centrum van Amsterdam. Wij hebben dit weekend gecombineerd met een optreden in de North Sea Jazz Club, wat op loopafstand is.

Diewert hebben we niet gezien, maar alles was goed geregeld met een codeslot. Verder was het contact via sms/mail prima.

Een aanrader voor een weekendje Amsterdam!
great experience in Amsterdam

Diewert was a very nice person. Right when we arrived he Managed his time to meet us. The boathouse is like you see in the fotos. Everything was very clean. The houseboat is in a very quiet neighbourhood and about 2km I guess away from the city Centre. You got 5 miniutes Walk away a coffeshop, supermarket and 2 bus/train Station which connects you to the centraal station. Otherwise if you walk to the centre you would be in about 20-30 minutes there ... But we got lost a few times walking to the inner City because we didn't had a clue about the way and structures of Amsterdam.
So I really recommend Diewert and his houseboat.
Kind Regards

Super Apartment, gute Lage! Straßenbahn vor der Tür. Sehr freundlich. Sehr sauber!
Sehr zu empfehlen!
Try not to be offensive

My wife and I really liked the space. Great location,  not too loud at night, and was great for the times I stayed in and listened to people going about their lives outside. I was unfortunately sick when I had arrived and had to stay in a lot during the trip. Not a problem at this place. Raymond was really nice and provided great hospitality. His breakfasts were amazing! Would stay here again if we get a chance to come back.

The apartment ist situated in the centrum of Amsteram in a nice quartier with many little shops and cafes and restaurants. The Apartment was clean, everything was on place, we enjoyed the cafe machine.

Raymond responded always quick to our questions and was always interested in making our stay as comfortable as possible but without being intrusive.
Fantastic spot in Amsterdam with gorgeous windows looking out onto the street, a large comfortable bed and a giant shower - what more could you want? Would absolutely recommend!
Raymond’s property is ideally located for visiting Amsterdam ( e.g. 10 min walk to Anne Frank’s);  he is welcoming and communicates clearly

Great location. Clean, updated. Raymond will go out of his way to make sure you have everything you need. Great guy. The breakfast is typical European ( variety of meat, cheeses, breads,  jam, butter). Sometimes juice or smoothie or yogurt.  Always way too much.  I would definitely stay here again.

It is an amazing apartment located a few blocks from the center, the bed is really good and the breakfast is delicious, it's a second floor via stairs but I think in Asterdam they are all like this. I will come back here if I ever visit Amsterdam again.

The B&B 9 Straatjes is stylish and comfortable. We enjoyed every minute! Yes, there is some noise from the restaurant in the street - even with the windows shut - but that didn‘t bother us really...The bed is extremly comfortable so we got good sleep! The 9 Straatjes is the perfect area for a City trip to Amsterdam - my mother and me loved it! Thank you!

This apartment was very clean, well located and had good internet. Check in and check out were easy. The breakfast was big. The bed was also very comfortable. We woke up to a drilling noise at 7:45 am on both days but it didn’t last too long. Overall this was one of the best Airbnb’s I have stayed at.
Recommendable!

This is the perfect location for anyone wanting to explore picturesque Amsterdam. Raymond's staff at De Doffer were so hospitable - from bringing us a delicious breakfast of breads, meat, cheese, coffee, and orange juice every morning at our requested time, to allowing us to store our bags before our evening train - they truly were amazing. Raymond was very communicative and answered all my questions prior to arrival. We were in walking distance to the Anne Frank house and the Van Gough museum, as well as wonderful shopping, drinking, and eating. I would definitely stay here if I returned!
Absolutely wonderful stay! Prime location, room was very spacious, and shower and toilet were separate which is great if traveling with friends. Definitely recommend!
Nous avons passé un super week-end à Amsterdam. L’appartement est joli, propre et très bien placé ! Nous le recommandons vivement
Notre hôte nous a très bien accueilli. Ils sont chaleureux et serviable. Le logement est à l'identique des photos mise sur le site.

The photo looked very much like the actual AirBnb. Everything was as expected, with no surprises. Diewert greeted us and helped my friend up the stairs with her luggage. He also had a local map and helped identify restaurants, bars, and places of interest based on our interests! We had a wonderful experience. The AirBnB is centrally located and within walking distance of everything. We had an excellent time and would stay here again.
The studio is very nice, like a hotel room. Near the city. The view on the canals is nice. it was really good to wake up with birds's song.

Although we did not manage to meet Diewert in person, he was very accommodating from inquiries to booking, arriving and upon leaving he is always quick to responds which enhanced our stay in his cosy and clean houseboat! Clean bathroom, good supply of the basics including hair dryer, location is perfect, quiet and secure neighborhood, and also a reasonable bike hire. Thank you for the lovely experience in your houseboat! The only downside is the tiny window in the bathroom without any curtain/blinds ~ I would definitely come and stay in your houseboat again if im going to Amsterdam in Spring! Hopefully to see you by then!
Mooie kamer, goede locatie.

A lovely place to stay in a great location. Fantastic breakfast at our chosen time, lasted us all day. Raymond is a very obliging host. The restaurant/bar downstairs was a godsend on the first evening.

Ficamos 03 dias em Amsterdam e nossa estadia no quarto de Diewert foi excelente. Da estação central de Amsterdam conseguimos chegar rapidamente de ônibus até a casa de Diewert e fomos recepcionados conforme combinado. Conseguimos deixar nossas malas às 11 horas da manhã! O quarto estava bem limpo e a localização é realmente muito tranquila, segura e agradável. Durante nossa estadia, fomos surpeendidos positivamente com a arrumação do quarto durante nossa (Website hidden by Airbnb) certeza recomendamos Diewert como anfitrião.

Our 1st Airbnb experience was all that we imagined & highly recommended if you still want to be walking distance to the center but not in the middle of the hustle & bustle. The room was lovely & waking up beside the ducks and water was what we were looking for. We met Diewert & his wife briefly but they were generous in offering any help that we needed. We can't wait to come back again & try their 2nd place & come in the spring/summer time

Diewert was a great host, super helpful - he showed us what was what and gave us loads of really good tips on where to go in the city, where to eat etc - in fact the food hall he suggested we try turned out to be really amazing, so that was much appreciated!

The room itself is cosy and comfortable and the bathroom is absolutely fantastic. Absolutely nothing I could have asked for better and I'd stay on the houseboat again for sure!

Diewert is a fine gentleman, and a very accommodating host. Meeting him was very pleasant and he took as much time as we needed to explain places he would recommend that we visit and also to us around the accommodation. Everything we needed was there, and Diewert was very keen to assist us with anything whenever we needed it, even though he was at work. I can have no complaints about Diewert or his accommodation, and I would recommend him without hesitation.

Thanks Diewert

Le studio de Diewert est superbe, conforme aux photos et l'accueil est chaleureux.
A quelques pas du studio, il y a plein de petits commerces, la situation géographique est top. Il est possible en marchand 30 min d'être dans l'hyper centre. Le quartier "Jordan" est tout prêt et vaut vraiment le détour.

Je conseille vivement le studio de Diewert, c'est un excellent rapport qualité-prix.

La chambre est très agréable, fidèle à la description et très bien équipée. Quel bonheur, aussi, de voir l'eau le matin au réveil! Quartier calme et situé à 10 min à pieds du quartier du Jordaan, un plaisir!
Diewert nous a accueilli très chaleureusement et nous a super bien conseillé sur les endroits à ne pas rater!
Très bon week-end à Amsterdam, aussi grâce au confort de cette si jolie maison flottante!

Diewert and his wife were extremely welcoming and kind. The location was a perfect quiet area, with perfect distance to the hustle and bustle of the centre. The room was exactly what we needed and I cant thank Diewert enough for his help with our stay.

Chambre telle que décrite dans l'annonce et au calme.
Un hôte tout simplement charmant.
Il nous a conseillé de supers lieux un peu sortis des lieux touristiques cités dans tous les guides.
Vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermés.
Merci pour tout Diewert, je vous ai laissé un mot dans votre carnet ;-)

Happy new year !
Emilie

Diewert and Wieke were exceptional hosts, The day we arrived it was still very early and we had to wait until 2pm to be able to use the room, which wasn't a problem because we were eager to see the city right away, but Wieke was very friendly and welcoming and let us leave the suitcases at their house so that we could easily go explore the city. She helped us a lot recommending places following our interests and explaining how the city works and where the good restaurants are. The location was close to cafés where we eat breakfast and trams that lead to the city in no time, walking to the city was also an option that we liked since you saw a lot of the Amsterdam lifestyle and the nice canals and architecture. The room itself was smaller than we expected, but it was very clean and we felt very comfortable, warm and safe. The bathroom was also perfect, being someone very clingy about them I was very pleased. We loved the mini bar which had affordable prices. Water for example, was always a good thing to have with you walking around Amsterdam. All in all Amsterdam was a great experience, Diewert and Wieke were very nice hosts, and talking to them was very enjoyable and interesting. Thank you for all your help, and hopefully we'll see you soon! Hillary & Stefan

Soluzione ottimale per visitare la città, nel centro medievale e a un passo dal fantastico quartiere di Jordaan! Letto veramente comodo, stanza molto luminosa, bagno grande. Ci siamo trovati benissimo!

overall great stay. the location was amazing right on top of central Amsterdam and dam square with a tram station located as close as possible. the place itself was also very nice, clean and accommodating.
Great place to stay in Amsterdam! Very close to all the action and dining options.

Great location, feels like you're living in the heart of Amsterdam. Raymond is very hospitable and attentive. The apartment is cosy, very clean, full of light and warm. All is comfortable and good working. Deep thanks to Raymond for the opportunity to feel great with less efforts!

Raymond, and his place are truly wonderful in every way. Raymond was welcoming, thoughtful (even bringing our bags up the stairs for us!), and the breakfast was huge and delicious! The location is lovely perfect, and Raymond’s bar/restaurant downstairs was a lovely spot for a nightcap after a day of sightseeing. Highly recommend, and hope to come back someday! Also, the bed is super comfortable!

The location of this Airbnb is fantastic! We were able to check in with no problems. The stairs are steep with luggage, but that is to be expected. The space is modern with big windows, a big king size bed, a nice shower, and plenty of space for one bedroom.  There was also a washer and dryer, so we ended up doing one quick load of laundry. (Hopefully that was okay!) There is WiFi, and the location is fantastic; we came in easily from Amsterdam Centraal, and we were able to walk all around the city from here. Finally, Raymond brought us breakfast both mornings we were here, which was an amazing bonus and wayyy more food than we would need (I wish I had brought little bags to stash it in for the day). It was great. A friend recommended this place to me, and I will recommend it to others.

All was very perfect! We enjoy the journey. The room is very beatiful and comfortable just close to the center. The bonus is really the breakfast! Delicious and directly bring in our room. Thank you very much Raymond! We recommend!
Jérôme and Nathalie

Chambre impeccable, vue sur les jolies rues du quartier. Ce logement à tout pour plaire ! Le petit déjeuner apporté par Raymond est très copieux. Rien à redire, nous gardons cette adresse pour nos prochains séjour à Amsterdam !

Prachtige ruimte midden in het centrum van Amsterdam.
Inclusief goed verzorgd ontbijt.
Top gastheer!
Voor herhaling vatbaar.

Raymond's apartment is amazing! The pictures do not do the apartment justice. It is beautiful, well stocked, and in an amazing location. The view of the street below from the windows is so charming. Raymond even brought us breakfast in the morning which was so nice and unexpected. Check-in/check-out was a breeze and Raymond's restaurant below the apartment had delicious food. Highly recommend!
Nothing to complain about. Everything was great! Thank you

A 5 minutos andando de la plaza central puedes encontrar está casa, con cama muy grande y cómoda, con baño privado y lo más importante, el desayuno que te ofrece Raymond.

recomendable 100%
Lovely place to stay! Location was perfect and the room was really nice and comfortable. Raymond is an awesome host as well, and we loved the breakfast that was provided daily.
Logement bien situé au centre d Amsterdam.  La chambre est spacieuse et lumineuse. Le petit-déjeuner  "copieux "servi en chambre est appréciable :) Bonne adresse!
Fantastic location in the heart of the canal district, beautiful and stylish apartment,  breakfast was delicious and Raymond is truly an amazing host!
An absolute masterpiece in how to host an air bnb (Website hidden by Airbnb) was just right.and raymand was an excellent host.

Aanrader. Gezellig onderkomen op een toplocatie
Heerlijk ontbijt
Great location. Very clean, and Raymond was very kind. He carried our bags upstairs for us which was greatly appreciated.

Sehr gutes Preis Leistungsverhältnis in einer Top Gegend (alle Sehenswürdigkeiten zu Fuß erreichbar). Kann ich nur weiter empfehlen. Das Frühstück was es jeden Tag umsonst dazu gibt war ebenfalls top.
Falls wir noch einmal nach Amsterdam fahren wird zuerst wieder nach diesem Appartement geguckt.
The flat is in a fantastic location. Everything was super easy and convenient.  Would come back again.
Raymond’s place is perfect. The location is fantastic - we walked basically everywhere we wanted to go. Check-in and out was a breeze and the place was very clean and just as expected.
Awesome place. Great host. Very clean and private. Raymond helped me carry my luggage up the stairs and it felt like a hotel on the inside. Best neighborhood too.  can’t wait to stay again
Let me assure you  this is the place you want to stay in Amsterdam.

Raymond est un hôte attentionné. Petit dèj généreux. Emplacement optimum pour visiter la ville.
Adresse recommandée!!!
Raymond's apartment was lovely and a nice space. It is above a bar which was noisy on our first night until the early hours. It is in a really good location for Southern Amsterdam.
Very good location and nice apartment
Great communication with hosts, great location and lovely apartment.

Host very welcoming and nice !
Thanks for everything !

Very pleasant stay in this boathouse !
The room is perfect : clean, quiet with a beautiful view. The coffee machine is a nice touch and the bed is comfy.
The host is also very nice and full of advice.
Good localisation, We recommand !

Had a nice stay at Diewerts place. The houseboat is close to Jordaan and an easy 10 minute bus ride into the city centre. Didn't meet Diewert himself but his wife took care of us when we arrived. Room was clean but very small and felt more like a standard hotel room compared to the unique houseboat experience we were expecting. The houseboat is situated on a small canal facing a huge brick wall, was a real let down for the price we paid.
A tick off the list but not what we were expecting

Absolutely wonderful houseboat in a nice area. Diewert was at the house on our arrival, willing to offer advice and help whenever we needed.

The room added to a fantastic weekend birthday break.

We loved our stay on Diewert's houseboat!!! Everything was set up perfectly for our stay and the accomodations were lovely. Arrival and departure were simple and we loved having the access code to enter the apartment, versus having to keep track of a key! On the evening we arrived, Diewert greeted us and offered ideas for where to eat. We loved the suggested Foodhallen, which had a variety of different vendors and food options. Diewert graciously offered to coordinate our cab to the airport on our last day! Due to an accident, the scheduled cab was delayed and Diewert was quick to coordinate a replacement. This was such an appreciated gesture. If ever back in Amsterdam, we will be quick to book this houseboat room!! Thanks again, Diewert and family, for the wonderful experience!!
We has a nice stay at Diewert's house boat. Diewert was helpful with tips and informations. The appartement is very clean. We recommend this host

Diewert was an excellent host! Although we arrived an hour later than expectet, Diewert greeted us very hospitable, showed us the space, gave us a map and tips where to go and what to do to enjoy our trip the most.

Diewert was very helpful and friendly throughout the booking process and when we arrived his wife greeted us. She gave us information on the area, the local attractions and places of interest. The apartment was very clean, well presented and in a great area that was very accessible to the centre. I would definitely recommend his listing to people looking to stay in a quiet and safe area.
Rustig gelegen, goed verzorgde kamer. Mooie badkamer en erg vriendelijke en behulpzame verhuurders. Dichtbij openbaar vervoer, supermarkt, restaurant en barretjes.

Amsterdam was AWESOME! Diewert was extremely helpful, and was even tentative when I became ill during my stay. Location was perfect, and close to anything you would need. Diewert even helped hold our bags until our flight. A+++++

The houseboat is one of the memorable experience in Amsterdam.  The room is clean and  nicely furnished.  Diewert is very friendly and helpful. He was even equipped the room with snack and drink in a reasonable price.  This is absolutely the boatel setting. The location is great.  Highly recommend it to everyone to Amsterdam.

everything perfect!!!!!!
wonderful week-end in amsterdam
The space was small but very clean in a quiet neighborhood.
I really enjoyed my stay. It is a nice tidy place to stay and it is close to the town centre. Diewert is very friendly and helpful. Highly recommend it to everyone.

Awesome host and super nice and cozy houseboat. Diewert and his family were extremely friendly and welcoming. As our flight arrived late at night, Diewert had provided us with very clear details on how to access to the houseboat before our arrival so that the whole check-in was very smooth. The local bikes rental made our stay extra convenient. The interior was in great set-up and all the amenities were of high quality. There were a thick folder and a board full of useful museum and sightseeing information and restaurant recommendations which were apparently a great effort of the host. It was definitely a short but sweet stay for us and we enjoyed it so much.

The houseboat is a nice place. Perfect to stay in Amsterdam for a few days! It looked like in the pictures and was clean. We enjoyed our stay very much!
The neighborhood was nice and calm, not much happening but Diewert's place is really close from the center by walk.
I really recommend this apartment!
Our room was great and in a quite part of town. It was very clean and cozy. I loved that they had bikes that we were able to rent to ride around the city .

We have just completed a lovely stay with Diewert and his family. They all made us so welcome and could not do enough for us. The apartment is just as shown and was spotless. Everything you could need was supplied, with possible exception of English breakfast tea, but then we're weird like that and so usually bring our own, I wouldn't expect that from any host outside of UK or Ireland! There were wonderful touches such as a board where our hosts and previous guests had left recommendations. Diewert also arranged a taxi for us back to the airport on our departure day that just took any stress out if the start of the journey home. A wonderful base to tour this lovely city.
Alles bestens!

Wonderful houseboat in a great location. Diewert is a great host and provided some fantastic recommendations. Made us feel more like we were locals living in Amsterdam rather than tourists. Highly recommend this place.

We recently spent six nights at Diewert's "bed-no-breakfast" ... it was a wonderful resting place between our trips around Amsterdam. We bought a four-day bus-trolley-metro pass which gave us great freedom to roam the city. Everything about the houseboat is really nice ... clean and modern ... nice bedroom, spiffy bathroom, nice garden for relaxing outside. I'm sure you will be hearing from some of our friends ... many of them envied us this houseboat adventure!

Nous avons passés 2 nuits dans le "house boat" de Diewert, la chambre est petite mais propre et fontionnelle. Avec vue sur l'eau et les canards c'est parfait si vous aimez le calme! Nous avons pu tout faire a pied, Jordaan se situe a environ 10min. De plus la facilité du check in est tres appreciable. Tres bon sejour!

We had a great time and a nice stay in Amsterdam! My husband and I traveled to Europe for our 1 year anniversary and we loved every minute. The houseboat was as described. Very clean and modern! Plenty of snacks available for an extremely reasonable fee! Diewart made us feel very welcome and told us tons of restaurants and areas to visit which was very helpful! He was here to welcome us right away. His recommendation to go to Winkel's for Apple pie was his best suggestion - most memorable dessert of the trip!  The apartment is a decent walk to the main attractions, but I certainly didn't mind it and we were able to see different parts of the city that way! defonitely recommend - very reasonable price for a nice space.

No stress accommodation. Clean, great central location, host easy to get in touch with and breakfast in the morning was a great touch.
Thanks again Raymond

Location is really good @ the 9 streets with all shopping, specialty stores and cafés. It is in the canal district. The room is great for 2 persons, with wide, comfy bed. Lovely breakfast, different each morning. We also enjoyed the coffee maker and electric kettle in the room. Raymond was a great host. We definitely recommend this apartment.

I can’t recommend Raymond enough. Me and my Girlfriend stayed here for a couple nights and it was fantastic. Raymond was a great host. Raymond allowed for us to drop our bags a little early prior to checking in. Raymond provides a huge breakfast every morning that was truely Dutch (chocolate sprinkles). Cable, WiFi, hot shower, clean room with a unique view of the street. It was our favorite place we stayed on our Europe Trip!!

We stayed here for three nights and found the value for money great! The information on location provided by Raymond before arrival was excellent and the place is located in a beautiful street. You get to walk in and out of a door at the side of a flower shop which is a beautiful way to start your day. The bed was super comfy and the place was clean and tidy. We found there were more amenities than expected and didn't want for anything. The breakfast delivered to your door by Raymond at a time of your choosing is a wonderful addition to your stay and we enjoyed the food provided every morning. The tram is a 5 minute walk away, the metro is a 15 minute walk and most tourist attractions are a 15-25 minute walk if you have good weather. We would stay here again and recommend it without hesitation.
Really recommend this place. Spacious, clean and with breakfast every morning, you can’t get better than that. Great value for money too.

Reichhaltiges und abwechslungsreiches Frühstück wird ins Zimmer geliefert. Raymond ist ein freundlicher Gastgeber mit der richtigen Mischung von Hilfsbereitschaft und Zurückhaltung. Wegen der zentralen Lage braucht man eigentlich kein Nahverkehrsticket.
Verlässt man das Haus, steht man mitten im Amsterdamer Stadtleben.
Nachts am besten mitfeiern!
Einfach super, gutes Frühstück, welches aufs Zimmer gebracht wird. Top Lage im Herzen von Amsterdam. Raymond ist der perfekte Host, jederzeit gerne wieder.

My friend and I really enjoyed staying at Raymond's place during our recent trip to Amsterdam.  He was a thoughtful and gracious host and the room was super cute and comfortable.  We couldn't have asked for a better location!! Definitely recommend you stay here on your trip to Amsterdam! :)
Lovely, handy spot to get aroumd Amsterdam. Enjoyed our stay, lovely appartment. Hope to come back to Amsterdam again.

Excelente departamento. Amplio, cómodo y con muchas ventanas que brindan una excelente claridad. Tal cual lo que se observa en las fotografías.
A pocos minutos a pie de la plaza Dam y demás atracciones turísticas.
Raymond fue muy atento, nunca tuvimos problemas y él nos traía hasta la habitación el desayuno todas las mañanas a la hora que le indiquémos. Muy recomendable.
Ótima hospitalidade e localização top!

Raymond's place it's perfect!! Super location, clean and spacious, cool and comfortable.
He was very friendly, the b&b is near transport, restaurants and supermarket. The breakfast it's perfect for a big day, you have cofee machine or tea, mini fridge, tv, etc. Great choice to stay in Amsterdam.
Clean and stylish room. Really enjoyed the breakfast. Loved the area felt like a community rather than really touristy part of the city.
Great location, fantastic breakfast,  very clean, comfortable and Raymond was friendly and helpful but gave us space! I would definitely return

We were completely impressed with Raymond and his space from the moment we walked in to the moment we left.  He is an extremely thoughtful host who has thought of everything.  Breakfast was an amazing perk that we weren't even expecting and it kept us going all day.  The location was perfect too.  I would not hesitate to recommend Raymond's space and would definitely stay there again should we ever go back.
Great location, wonderful place, breakfast was a big plus. And Raymond was responsive and helpful. A great host.

Raymond was a awesome host. This was the last stop of our 3 week vacation and I have to say it was the best. When we first arrived he carried our luggage to our room.
He provided a terrific breakfast for us during our stay. Very friendly and accommodating. We fell in love with Amsterdam and this airbnb was in the perfect location for us. Restaurants, shops, sightseeing, and convenient local Tram service to get you anywhere you desire to go.
Thank You Raymond!! We hope to revisit soon.
Great central spot in Amsterdam

This is a fantastic accommodation! Great location, spacious room, tasty baked goods, meat & cheese for breakfast and very comfortable bed! However, there is a very busy, popular cafe/bar directly below the apartment which stays noisy until 2am so if you are going to bed before then and are a light sleeper, bring earplugs.

Its a really great place to stay in if you are going to Amsterdam. The room is big, so is the bed, it has a private bathroom perfectly clean and confortable, the breakfast its perfect, and the best part is the location, everything is near to the apartment. Raymond was so friendly and kind with us. We really recommend it.

Location-location-location !!! It is absolutely great . At the heart of the “9 streets” district ( shopping and restaurants) walking distance from trams, downtown, Frank House , canals, cafes, Spui area) etc.
Raymond was a great host and very accommodating. Would stay there again !

Raymond's apartment is in the most perfect and beautiful location location. The apartment is modern and spotlessly clean and very well set out. It is also quite spacious with everything you could possibly want. I would have no hesitation in staying there again
