Raymond’s place is in a great location! He was very nice and accommodating. Breakfast was great and the Heinekens in the fridge were a nice touch!

Fantastic location, great bed, shower and breakfast ( and host).
I usually can’t sleep the first night in a new place but this bed and pillows were so comfortable. Great big windows in a gorgeous building. Across the street is a killer cheese and charcuterie shop and also a wine shop.
Ray brought these massive breakfasts of fresh bread, meats and cheese in the morning that simply couldn’t be finished.
He was a sweet ambassador for his country.

Raymond is a fantastic host! He communicates very well! Raymond provided us breakfast in the mornings. The location of the apartment is very central! We were within walking distance to everything. I would highly recommend staying here!
Great room in fantastic location. Raymond is really friendly and helpful. Only one minor point is the noise from the cafe De Doffer below but a good set of earplugs will do the trick.

Extremely friendly, helpful, and very well organized. Room was clean tidy, comfortable, cozy and in a quiet neighborhood that was walking distance to everything. Great place to come home to after a day of exploring.

We had a wonderful stay on Diewert's place - being on a houseboat really added a bit of authenticity to our stay in Amsterdam. He and his family were welcoming and very helpful. They are also very responsive before and during the trip!

They had a lot of wonderful recommendations of things to do nearby, including Winkel's delicious apple pie! The room was clean and well-appointed. The Nespresso machine with complimentary coffee and tea was nice, and they also have a convenient mini-bar with reasonable prices. The location is great, around 15 minutes from the center and about 5-10 minutes from the Jordaan - a neighborhood with a lot of great restaurants/shops. It's also easy to get to by bus from Centraal Train Station. I highly recommend staying here in Amsterdam !
Hat alles super geklappt und die Wohnung war schön.

This AirBnB is perfect! The location is near some of the cooler parts of Amsterdam, not totally overrun by tourist traps. Loads of good food around the area and Christa & Yvon had put together some suggestions through this app that ended up being great. Right in front of a tram station as well so getting around is super simple. Check in was a breeze, would recommend anyone stay here during a trip to the city.
A very good location and a much better host!

Very Nice place. In the center, short distance to all interesting spots. We recommend!
Thanks again Christian and Yvon

This place was just perfect for our short trip (3 nights). The description was accurate and it was in perfect condition. Check-in and check-out were super easy. And the electronic key was too. Location was THE BEST! Amenities as well... just the perfect size for 2 people. We're thankful to have found this gem and also for the speedy response to our messages.

This place is walking distance to all the major attractions and also to several locations to get your daily COVID test done in the mornings. (During our stay, it was a requirement to have a COVID negative result to get into museums, excursions, tours and restaurants. These results are only valid 24 hours, so we had to test daily).
We would definitely stay here again, if we are back in Amsterdam!

Nice View 👍🏻
No elevator and the stairs are tired.

I highly recommend you to stay in Christa & Ivons apartment!
The flat ist located in the center of Amsterdam and you can reach everything by foot in a couple of minutes.
The hosts provided us a fully equipped & clean apartment.
Checking in and out is super comfortable.
We will definitely book again for our next trip to Amsterdam!!!

Christa & Yvon's apartment was located perfectly for us to explore Amsterdam. Unfortunately, our stay was not what we expected due to Covid restrictions that went into place right before we arrived that closed everything in the city at 5pm, so we spent far more time at the apartment than we had initially expected. The space was very clean and comfortable, you can tell that they care about the unit! It would have been perfect had we been out and about as planned, but it was definitely lacking in some things we would have liked to have once we had to spend more time there. The "kitchen" area is very basic - just a microwave and a few plates and utensils and the only water access was in the bathroom. The apartment was also relatively cold even when we turned the heat up. But, the location can't be beat and under normal travel circumstances, this is a wonderful place to stay and I would definitely recommend.
Raymond’s place was great! Awesome location and clean. I will add though during the summer the place got extremely hot.

Safe and scenic area of Amsterdam with nice communication host. Very noisy at night over bar with street tables outside. Steep,
steep stairs with any luggage to carry. Good bed and modern bathroom areas. Coffee machine and small refrigerator too.
Raymond was a great host and the apartment was the perfect for a few days in Amsterdam.  The location was perfect and easy to walk to everything in the city.

Good location for touring Amsterdam.  It is above a fabulous restaurant so there is some noise but once storm windows closed/ or fan on,  it's not an issue. Raymond delivers a great breakfast to get your day started.  Room upstairs,  no lift but Raymond helps with the luggage.

Couldn’t ask for a better place to stay at.
Pleasant hospitality. Amazing apt. Great location!!
This is a great place.  Great location, great breakfast, nicely designed and very clean.
Location was wonderful and the hosts were very friendly.
Raymond’s place was awesome! The space was clean and the bed was so comfy! The breakfast in the morning was a nice start to the day!

Cool place
Great location
Breakfast is a huge plus
Special thanks to Anouk

Wow! What’s not to love about this bnb? Location is accessible to everything. We walked about a quarter or so mile and you can access the tram. So many stores/ restaurants like a stone throw away. Space is big enough for a couple or family of four. I would definitely recommend this bnb to anybody. It has stairs but not as steep as other apartments. Not a problem with us. We felt at home right away. I would want to come back to this bnb if i ever come back to Amsterdam in the future.

Had such a wonderful stay at Raymond’s place! The neighbourhood is full of wonderfully little shops and cafes. Just below is a great little cafe and bar called the cafe du doffer! Lovely selection of craft beers. Very walkable and close to all the major touristy destinations. Highly recommend!
Terrific room in a great location. Fantastic breakfast supplied every morning. Perfect for us.

Raymond’s place is amazing, is the best place to stay in Amsterdam. Location is perfect, close to all the main sites to visit.
Breakfast was delicious and Raymond is a great host.
Thanks for a great stay Raymond, we loved the apartment and we couldn’t have wished for a better location. If ever visiting in Amsterdam we will definitely stay again!
Great location - 2 bridges from the tram. Easy walk even with luggage. Anything you need he will help you find the answer

Great location.
Helpful and friendly
Great location. Good breakfast. Very clean.

Modern apartment in the middle of Amsterdam center. Easy to walk from central station, nearby tram station, and located in the shopping and restaurant area the 9th Streets (9 Straatjes). Apartment is having a high hygiene level and modern toilet, shower and bedroom. Well prepared breakfast which is provided on the agreed time aligned with the host of the bed & breakfast. During midnight there isn't a lot of noise during the Saturday and Sunday night.

Overall highly recommended for booking a stay during the weekend or during a city trip.
Superlocatie in 9 straatjes. Heel gastvrij, prima ontbijt. Echt aan te bevelen!
Very nice place to stay, good location and really good breakfast
Todo perfecto!
Son excelente anfitriones, son accesible y están a toda hora a disposición en ayudarte

We had a great 3 night stay here, location was perfect and walking distance to good restaurants and key attractions like the Anne Frank museum. The living room area was spacious and a great place to relax after a long day of day walking around. Christa and Yvon were also extremely quick to reply and made sure we had everything we needed. Thanks again for the lovely rose and beer ;)
a wonderfully located apartment that is within walking distance to everything you need in the city. amazing communication. we thoroughly enjoyed our stay!

The location and coziness of the apartment was great! My fiancée and I were able to spend Christmas time here and we couldn't have asked for a better spot in the heart of Amsterdam! The apartment has a charm that has a home like feel with the great view of the street but very quiet and peaceful inside. The fire place gave the living room a nice touch especially to hang our stocking for Christmas!
Super place!
这里真的是一个十分好的住宿，我在这里度过美好的周末。我必须承认这里是我住过的最好的airbnb。房东十分热情而且给了我很多tips。咖啡很可爱，浴室也很方便。房东在说明里楼梯确实很抖，但这就是荷兰的特色！我真的很喜欢住在这里的一切。我强烈推荐这个温馨的地方！！
Great location, clean place- has everything you would need for a city break! Definitely recommend!!

L’appartement est proche de tout, très bien décoré, Christa & Yvon répondent rapidement aux messages
Je recommande 🙂

A fantastic location near the train station and central Amsterdam, there's so much to see and do here. The apartment itself is as advertised, felt spacious for its size, and was really cozy for me and my small dog. Would definitely stay here again.

La Vie En Rose was everything as described. Fantastic location and absolutely lovely inside with everything you could need. Tasteful decor, clean and a pleasure to live in.
Communication was great and check in/out easy and stress free. Wonderful hosts, who were very welcoming and helpful. Highly recommended property.
Great location and beautiful space
We had such a great time at our Airbnb. It was a great location to walk to everything and it was nice and quiet up in our room. Would most definitely recommend to anyone staying in Amsterdam!

A lovely place to stay! For sure the stairs are steep and narrow and you will take your luggage up slowly and one bag at a time. But being aged 80 & 75 did not stop us from being able to negotiate this challenge. Once you do, you are treated to a bright, airy and spacious space. The kitchen consists only of a toaster, coffee pot (Nespresso), microwave & small fridge due to BnB regulations, but there are so many small cafes & restaurants in easy walking distance to the flat, getting something to eat is no problem.

The apartment is a minute's walk from a tram line and a 10-minute walk from Amsterdam Central Station, making the use of public transport to get around very easy.

Christa was very responsive to any text we sent and very helpful when we had a few problems getting into the apartment at first. The apartment is quiet once you are inside. The shower is lovely and the toilet, sink & shower are separated by walls that come half-way out, allowing for more than one person to use the bathroom at the same time.

Of special note is the comforter. Instead of one large comforter that covers the entire bed, there are two separate comforters that overlap in the middle. This means that each person has their own comforter. My husband is a restless sleeper who winds up on the top of the covers, forcing me to pull them from underneath him so I have a cover over me. What a joy it was to be able to pull a comforter over me without the physical struggle or waking him up. It may seem like a small thing to some travelers, but for me it was one of the nicest touches I've ever experienced at a BnB.

We would return here any time in the future without any hesitation.
The apartment is prettily furnished and is very well situated.

Located close to everything we wanted to see and do, this studio was a great choice. Check-in was easy to follow and the electronic key system easy to use. Stairs are steep and narrow but nothing too difficult to manage.
Amazing place in the best location possible and such a beautiful place to stay. The owners were very helpful and communicative, it couldn’t have been better.
A wonderful apartment and great hosts! Would love to return again in the future!

What a lovely stay!

We came to Amsterdam to do some exploring and wanted somewhere central where everything was really easy to get to and we got exactly that. Loads within walking distance and for anything that wasn’t we either had a tram station less than a minute away or the train station which was really close.
The apartment was clean and lovely and fit all our requirements and more.

Christs and Yvon checked in on us via message to check we’d managed to work the door out (which was really straight forward) and then left us to our own devices which was really nice.

We’ll be staying again!

This is a great place to stay when visiting Amsterdam! Centrally located, super easy access to train station, trams, bike rentals, etc. Right by the canals and everything you need to enjoy your stay! Would definitely recommend staying here with Christa and Yvon.

Excellent communication from the hosts, very easy check-in experience, and very clean and tidy Airbnb. Great location as well, within walking distance of most of the inner city and very close to a street car station as well. Would definitely recommend!

The location of this place is amazing. One tram stop from Central Station and within easy transport to many of the places you’d want to see. The bed is comfy, hot water plentiful, and a great shower. The whole unit is small, but welcome to Amsterdam! The front room feels spacious with a great view of nearby traditional Amsterdam houses. It did feel a bit chilly some nights. The 40 steps up to the unit are very steep with short runs, so if you are not fairly fit, or your suitcases are very heavy, this will take some effort. All in all, worth it. We had a great time.
We found a couple of fantastic restaurants close by, an Italian called Momenti and a little further away was The Good Companion, an excellent fish restaurant. We would recommend both.

Wonderful location, centrally located and steps away from the tram. Christa is very pleasant to work with! Decor is beautiful and the view from the flat is amazing. Be prepared to walk up/down narrow steps, but it’s all worth it.

Christa is good hostess , Nice and helpful person

Thanks for everything. The apartment is very nice and comfortable, communication with the host was easy and the key was given to the person in charge of cleaning the apartment

🙏🏻🌷
Charming place and the bed was very comfortable!
Overall good experience, would recommend it :)
Beautifully appointed. Super convenient location. Attentive hosts

We had a great time here.Very quiet cosy spot. Room is exactly as photos. Clean and comfortable. Location great. Bus to central only 2 min walk. Easy and pretty walk to center of Amsterdam. Cafe's nearby.

Diewert and his family were excellent hosts during our stay in Amsterdam. The room was great for us, clean, cozy, and in easy biking distance from everything. Diewert even has great bikes ready for you to rent so you can experience Amsterdam like a local, and he set up our transfer back to the airport on our last day. Great place, great host.

Prima kamer voor een weekendje in Amsterdam.. prachtig en rustige gelegen in de buurt van de Jordaan en het Centrum. Wij hebben uitstekend geslapen en hadden en heel vriendelijke host.. wat een fijn weekendje!!- heel bedankt, Diewert

Diewert was a great host, and the houseboat is awesome! He did a great job on it, and it's like staying in a 4-star hotel. :) The location is excellent, and I didn't need to use the bicycles he had on hand, as it's just a few block walk to the streetcar that will take you to Central Station, or to the 10, which circles the city.

The neighborhood is super quiet, but there are cafe's, lots of different restaurants, etc, just a few blocks away.

I'll stay there again!

Great stay! The room is really nice. Separate entrance so you can come and go as you please. Diewert (the owner) is very responsive and replies very quickly to any messages. It is only a short walk into town- gives you chance to see some more of the city as well.

The room is perfect if you‘re looking for a nice placeto stay in a quiet location, but still near the center of the city. Raymond is an outstanding and verry kind host and we can definitely recommend him and his appartment.
Raymond's place is peferect for staying a few days in Amsterdam. Great location, not too noisy at night and even has breakfast included.

Large room w many extras in a sought after location. Raymond (host) was very friendly, fast communicator and supplied tasty breakfast to our room at our desired time. A most enjoyable time and would stay here again.

Wow! The place was clean, the perfect location, check in was easy, and you got to schedule a breakfast delivery every morning! We were so thankful to be in such an amazing AirBNB! Do not hesitate to book this place! Bed is comfortable and the shower was excellent! You cannot pick a better area of town to stay in! Thank you so much, Raymond!

Only recommendation (definitely not a complaint), you can occasionally hear loud people on the street below at night, you are in a city and that is to be expected. We brought ear plugs and would recommend this to other light sleepers if you stay here.
This place is as advertised. A great location with a very helpful host.

Apartamento impecable en el centro de Amsterdam. Espacioso, baño limpio, cama grande y encima con servicio de desayuno a la habitación por parte de Raymond que no nos lo esperábamos. Además esta en una zona tranquila. Me guardo este alojamiento para un futuro.

Thank you Raymond!

Raymond’s place is literally a jem among the streets and canals of Amsterdam. Located in the city centre, I really suggest it to everyone, because of the stylish apartament and hospitality of the host. The room is wide and the bathroom very large with a huge shower. 5 stars!

The apartment was very nice and the bed was very comfortable. Raymond's place was centrally located and walking distance to the main attractions in Amsterdam. He was very accommodating allowing us to drop our luggage before check in time. He provided a delicious breakfast as well. I will recommend his place for your next stay in Amsterdam.
Highly recommended! Perfectly located and Raymond was very welcoming!
Lovely place, Raymond was very friendly, and brought breakfast up to the room at requested time!

The room was spacious and very comfortable to stay in. Great location surrounded by the canals, cute boutique shops and cafes. Steep 2 floor walk up but Raymond was very kind to help with my luggage at check in. Good, fresh breakfast every morning. I would definitely stay here again on my next visit to Amsterdam!

My brother and I really enjoyed our stay on the houseboat. It was easy to get around to all the sites using the rental bikes. The room was clean and just enough space for two people. We would definitely return!

Christa and Yvon’s place was amazing! It’s a quick walk from Amsterdam Centraal (main train station) and very centrally located within the city, excellent location! The apartment is up a very steep set of stairs (which is common of these buildings) but keep it in mind. The self check in/checkout process was effortless, Christa’s instructions were very clear and descriptive. She also left a nice set of local recommendations and maps in the unit, which was very thoughtful. Everything about the apartment is comfortable, clean, and beautiful (lots of nice big windows), and the kitchenette was well stocked with coffee/stroopwafels. I had a great stay, would definitely stay again!

We had a very good stay in Raymond's place! Cozy room on a cozy but still busy street, but away from loud noise. Raymond was an amazing host the entire time and provided us with nice breakfast every morning in the room. Would recommend to anyone.
Well worth a visit, would recommend.  Thanks Raymond.
Beautiful apartment in a very stylish chic area. The room is spacious and perfect for a weekend getaway. Good shower, clean bathroom and a good nespresso machine with lots of capsules!
Great looking and fantastically located place. Breakfast was very nice as well.

There are so many wonderful and well-deserved reviews of Raymond's space so I will briefly support others' comments--gracious host (helps with taking your suitcase up some pretty steep steps!), provides a lovely breakfast that he personally brings to your room (I ended up making some sandwiches with what I couldn't eat in the morning), the location is absolutely ideal (I walked everywhere/didn't need to take public transportation), and the space was absolutely lovely. Some people have commented that it was noisy on the street, but I was there at the end of February and I was not bothered at all.

What I will say that was important to me was the check in time. So many spaces won't allow people to check in until late but if you have a morning arrival, it's hard to walk around with luggage. Raymond did offer a drop-off of luggage until it was time to check in. The room is one of the cleanest, nicest air bnb accommodations I have stayed in. If it's your first time to Amsterdam (it was for me), I preferred to walk to his place rather than taking a bus (sort of confusing if you're new) which only took about 20-25 minutes. There is no doubt I would stay here again! Thank you, Raymond.

We can fully recommend this apartment and Raymond’s service. Surprising fresh breakfast every morning served onto the apartment. Perfect price / performance ratio. Location of Raymond s place in the middle of the Grachts and close to Jordan and museums.

Can’t fault! Amazing location walking distance to everything, nice street as well safe and friendly environment! Clean room and bathroom! Comfy bed, lovely views from window. Host was amazing, very friendly and breakfast was delivered to your room in the mornings at any requested time. Nice bar/ restaurant down stairs, would definitely recommend a stay if coming to Amsterdam!

Absolutely stunning air bnb! Location was just outside of the busy tourist area which made getting to and from really easy and it meant you weren't kept awake by the hustle and bustle of the night life! The room was much bigger than expected and the bed was to die for! The room was advertised with a shared bathroom but the bathroom and shower were in the room and did not have to share which was a massive bonus we weren't expecting!
Raymond brought breakfast up every morning and left outside room as requested which was more than enough to get you going for the day.
The room was spacious and clean and had all the amenities you need for a stay here. I will and already have recommended this place to family and friends and will be coming back! I would give more than 6l5 stars if possible :)

The B&B is very central and easy to find. The room is awesome and looks very new and everything was clean. The break first was nothing special but very delicious and a good start in the day.
Cheers Kai
Very friedly host who even got us breakfast in the morning. Recommended!

Raymond est très accueillant, travaille dans le restaurant situé juste en dessous de l'appartement et vous amène le petit déjeuner dans la chambre le matin :)
Un studio idéalement placé, au calme et lumineux. Idéal !
Zentral gelegen, sehr sauber freundlicher Kontakt.
Sehr gerne wieder!
Die Lage ist top, man geht vor die Tür und ist mitten im schönsten Viertel Amsterdams. Das Bett ist sehr groß und bequem! Insgesamt ist die Unterkunft ausgezeichnet.

It’s a clean and beautiful room. The fact there’s a florist shop right in front the entrance makes everything prettier.
The breakfast is so good, with orange juice, croissants, jelly, bread and cold meat.
The room is big with the shower inside and the WC is outside the room but private.
I would like to come back some time. :)

Superb apartment, light, bright and airy and so well placed, you can easily travel everywhere you need to in Amsterdam. You have everything you need and the hosts are super helpful, providing loads of information and ready to provide any help you may need. Thoroughly recommend, we had a wonderful, comfortable holiday, perfect.

Pros:
- Great location
- Has basic kitchen supplies, coffee, stroop waffles
- Check-in is easy

Cons:
- Steep and narrow stairs as warned and they can be quite difficult.
- Squeaky and noisy floors since it’s an old building
- No AC
- Electric outlets are in very strange places
- Bathroom is a bit old and the sink smells
Great location but we didnt get breakfast  altough it was included

This wonderful apartment could not be more perfectly located - especially for first time visitors to Amsterdam like myself.

Check in was a breeze - all done via emails and keypad locks. The stairs are quite steep and very narrow (as they warn in their email and as is very much the custom here). Be advised!

Inside is a gloriously beautiful one bedroom apartment that is walking distance from the Central Station with the tram lines literally out your front door.

I had the trip of my life - filled with tremendous food, gorgeous sights and new friends. This home base made it all the better.

If you’re looking for the perfect place for your first time (or your return visit) then you can not wish for anything more than this hidden gem. I give it and Christa and Yvon all the thumbs up and 5-star reviews that there are in the world and the skies above!

The apartment is big and beautiful, and especially the living room is very stylish. Kitchen is doable for a few days, but note that there is no kitchen sink and you have to do the dishes in the bathroom sink. Location is perfectly central and a short walk from the central train station. The stairs up to the apartment are very steep and troublesome if you have a large&heavy suitcase like I did, but shouldn't be a problem with smaller luggage. Even being so central, the windows are nice and soundproof so it's easy to get a good night's sleep. I would stay here again.
El lugar está perfectamente ubicado y es amplio y luminoso. Es sencillamente perfecto para 2 personas. Absolutamente recomendable
A great place to stay in the dam!

Although the stairs are extremely steep making it difficult to haul luggage up and down, the apartment itself was super cute! The living room area is very spacious and the abundance of windows brought in so much natural light! Bed was also pretty comfy. We met Christa & Yvon as they live on the floor above and they were nice. Do not stay here if you think you will be making a lot of noise as there is another tenant who lives below and everyone likes it extra quiet. The Nuki mobile lock system was also rather finicky for us, but ended up getting the job done. Overall, very central location and we had a great time in Amsterdam- thank you!
Everything was perfect, thanks to Christa & Yvon for being perfect hosts. I can definitely recommend.
A lovely flat in a convenient location (short walk to Centraal Station). The apartment was clean, light, and welcoming. The hosts communicated well and were great.
Het appartement is super netjes ! Wij hadden een leuk verblijf, mede door de super centrale ligging met top OV aansluiting. Perfect stay voor 2 personen :)
We had a great stay, great location, beautiful apartment! Christa was very communicative throughout

This apartment was perfect for our 12 nights’ stay in Amsterdam. Its location very close to the Central station (about 5-10 mins walk) was a relief for us with heavy luggages. Located centrally, we could conveniently walk to most parts of Amsterdam. Access to the apartment was easy and secure with the Nuki app, and instructions were clear. The place was clean and bed was comfortable. The lovely living room was the highlight of the apartment for me. It was spacious and a rarity for an Airbnb in Amsterdam. The windows were amazing for people watching. Christa & Yvon checks in on our well-being via messages without invading our privacy. Christa & Yvon recommended a steak place which was delicious. I would recommend this apartment to anyone looking for a place to stay in Amsterdam. To Christa & Yvon: I will be back!

We had a nice stay in Christa & Yvons Appartement. Location is super and Everything was as described. Easy check-in and Check-out and possibility of luggage storage nearby.
Only downside was that temperature gets very hot in the Appartement already early in the morning as the sun shines in (our stay was in August, during really hot summer days...).
Still, we enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam.

I cannot say enough about our stay at Christa & Yvon’s. It made our five day Amsterdam holiday a hit! One train ride from the airport in a 10 minute walk and you are right in the center of the action. Not only is it centrally located but it is stylish and cozy as well.
My initial intention was to buy rail passes for my wife and I so we could get around the city. It turned out not to be necessary as almost everything was in walking distance. And even when not the rail system is steps away. Restaurants, shops ,everything are right on the doorstep. If you too want a truly magical Amsterdam getaway do not hesitate to book their accommodation!
The location is nice. The bed is perfect. But the old building problem that the wooden floor make so much noise that has to be super careful while walking. Other wise the apartment is perfect
Good space in a great central location

Great Location and nice apartment.
host helped us out through the stay and was always easy to contact if needed
Appreciative on the immediate response to all my concerns and questions

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here. Easy walking distance to the train station and lots of great restaurants. Easy to get the tram to everywhere you’d want to go.  Don’t take a lot of luggage, especially big luggage…the stairs are steep and narrow…but worth the trek.

We loved everything about our stay. Diewert was so friendly and helpful, from giving us ideas on places to see and great places to eat. He even arranged transport for us to go to the airport. Our accommodation  was spotlessly clean and drinks and snacks were available in the fridge. We would not hesitant to recommend this place to anyone.

The houseboat was a perfect size for our short time in Amsterdam. We loved the location, it was a nice quiet neighborhood and not too far walking distance from the things we wanted to see.  The hosts were very nice and even made a reservation for our first dinner in town. The patio was very nice to sit outside with the flowers.

I can recommend Raymond and this Airbnb to everyone who wants to have a nice stay in Amsterdam.
The room is fantastic and Raymond does everything to make you feel comfortable.
There was a great diversified breakfast every morning so you won‘t have to leave with an empty stomach.
The best thing about everything is that the room is located just next to the center of Amsterdam. You can reach everything by foot if you want. The shopping street and all the museums, like the Van Gogh and Rijksmuseum, are just a footstep away. It was like a 10-15 minute walk to the Museums and on the way you could explore all the little streets that are on the way.
To put it in a nutshell, we will definitely come back and suggest everyone to try this place out if you plan to go to Amsterdam.

Thank you for the nice stay Raymond.
Très propre et bien situé dans Amsterdam centre

Nous avons été ravis de notre séjour chez Raymond, un hôte très sympathique, prévenant et discret. La chambre et les sanitaires sont très propres. Nous avions tout à notre disposition : théière, cafetière, micro-ondes, vaisselle, frigo, TV, essuies, savons, sèche-cheveux, machines à laver, séchoir, ... sans parler du  petit déjeuner particulièrement copieux. La chambre est idéalement située dans le centre, juste à côté des canaux, et à proximité de tous les endroits à visiter. Le seul petit bémol concerne le bruit nocturne émanant de la terrasse du café-restaurant situé à côté. Nous recommandons vivement ce B & B et y retournerons avec plaisir.

This place is in a great area and Raymond is an excellent host. The breakfast is large portion and filling, a perfect start to your day. The location is close to everything you need to get to as things are hardly that far in the center. The windows keep all sound out as the restaurant can get a little loud but as soon as you close the windows it's nice and quiet.
Nice little apartment in a great location.

This was definitely a memorable experience. The location of the apartment was more then perfect as you literally had everything that you can think of within a walking distance. The apartment is so well equipped, cozy and fresh breakfast was amazing. Raymond the host accommodated our check in to suit our needs, which was great.

Chambre / Appartement agréable, avec un petit déjeuner déposé sur le palier.
Nous conseillons !!
Had a great stay !!!

This was our second time we booked the Room and it was just as great as the first time. :) we would not have booked a second time if we did not feel that Raymond was a great host. The room was clean as always, it is located in the best place possible and you can reach anywhere by foot in a couple of minutes. We enjoyed our stay very much and will definitely come back again.

Nice large room though a little cluttered (two tv screens for some reason, maybe one was broken & this was temporary?). Good blackout blinds and curtains, but if the windows are open the noise level from the street is spectacular so bear this in mind. It’s the downside of being in such a good location 😊 Nice large bed (I found it very comfortable but my partner thought it was too soft). The pillows though were far too thin. A fridge in the room was very handy but there were some previously opened packets of meat for breakfast which I found off putting. All in all a positive experience but some points to improve.

Raymond è davvero un ottimo host.
Siamo stati un weekend e il soggiorno è stato molto piacevole.
Todo hermoso, el bar incluido
Alloggio molto carino, consigliato
Great location, close distance to mostly all  attractions, museums, bars, restaurants.  very vibrant part of the city. This place is a gem.

chambre très agréable
petit déjeuner très copieux et varié,amené à la chambre tous les matin.
très bien situé pour visiter Amsterdam.
un peu bruyant le soir avec le bar en bas

Great Airbnb in a fantastic location. Situated in a pretty side street in the heart of the ‘9 straatjes’ district. There are steep stairs to get up to the flat, but Raymond met us and helped to carry the bags up. Being in a bustling location there is noise from the street but it didn’t disturb us much.  We hadn’t realised that we’d be experiencing the crazy festivities of king’s day’ - wow, they certainly know how to party in Amsterdam! The flat had everything we needed and Raymond provided a huge breakfast each day - very generous! A great stay, we would recommend!

Everything was great. After walking the canal areas I can tell you that this is a great location where you can walk North to Central station or anywhere in that area to catch trains or trans. You can also head South to museum area and higher end shopping. The room was large with plenty of room allowing for a local lifestyle. As some have said the area can be noisy from below restaurant and shops but it comes with the territory being in a central location. Highly recommend and will stay there again.
Très bon week-end à Amsterdam dans l'appartement de Raymond, qui est très bien situé ! Literie confortable et chambre agréable !
Nice, clean apartment in walking distance to basically everything in Amsterdam. Located at a quiet and not very crowded area.
We really enjoyed this confortable place, very well located for visiting the city. The breakfast is a plus to ease your live. To recommend !

My fiancé and I stay there for 2 days for a trip. Very nice place, with a beautiful spot with a view. Super cleaned and organized.
The breakfast was delicious 🥰
If we go back to Amsterdam we’ll book this apartment again.

Can’t recommend enough! Amazing location and space. Breakfast was fantastic, delivered to the door every morning.
Raymond is an excellent host.
Great host, nice breakfast, just keepin mind that the café can get very busy at night
Super cool place in an amazing location, with breakfast included! Everything was great!
If you’re lucky to find this place available, you are in for a treaty. Ray is a great host. The breakfast is awesome.

A hospedagem em Raymond foi perfeita! Estava em lua de mel com minha esposa e não poderia ter sido melhor! Todos os dias com aquele café da manhã maravilhoso que Ray nos trazia! Comunicação muito fácil e muito atencioso! A cama perfeita para descansarmos e o chuveiro muito bom também! Não temos o que reclamar, somente agradecer ao Ray pela estadia!
nos pareció una excelente opción , muy agusto el lugar , lo recomendamos totalmente. habitación linda y limpia . todo ok .regresariamos sin duda .
Perfect location in the middle of Amsterdam. Stylish, tasteful and cosy. Everything there you might need and breakfast included is amazing - Raymond is a great host - thank you, we’ll come again!
Very convenient location, spacious, clean and bright, breakfasts were ample. I wouldn't hesitate booking here again the next time I visit Amsterdam. Highly recommend.

Our stay with Raymond was amazing! Our flight got in early morning and he allowed us to check in a little early as the place was ready. Really nice breakfast delivered to the room and the place is in the lovely 9 steers area so lots of cool bars around (including his just downstairs). Really clean place with everything you need. Would highly recommend. Thank you Raymond, we loved it! Xxx

Eu e meu namorado passamos 2 noites nas instalações do Ray e foi tudo ótimo! Espaço bom e agradável, localização ótima e o café da manhã oferecido é excelente e completo! Nós super recomendamos o airbnb do Ray ao passar por Amsterdã!

b&b is gelegen op een toplocatie! vrij rustig (enkel café den Doffer van Ray wat lawaaierig bij open raam (maar niet bij gesloten ramen)), ín 1 vd 9 straatjes, vlak bij bruisende Den Dam en De Wallen
Kleine frigo, microwave en kookplaatje en haardroger aanwezig! super

ontbijt is continentaal.

Raymond’s place is great. Amazing location near tons of cool areas/attractions but not too touristy feeling. The apartment itself is very comfortable with lots of space and a great bed. Breakfast each morning was a lifesaver. Highly recommend.
Alles absolut prima! Sehr gerne wieder.

Sehr zentral gelegen. Viel Sehenswürdigkeiten gut und schnell zu Fuß erreichbar. Kaum Verkehrslärm in der Straße aber es kann im Sommer  etwas laut werden von den umliegenden Cafés. Dann einfach Fenster schließen. Raymond hat uns immer leckeres Frühstück von seinem Café The Doffer gebracht.
Preis Leistung Top. Mitten in Amsterdam. Wir konnten alles zu Fuß erreichen. Tolles Frühstück am Morgen. Wir hatten eine tolle Zeit.
There is no negative point. Thanks for hospitality

L’appartement de Raymond est très bien situé. A proximité de tous les centres d’interêt, il est possible de tout faire à pied.
Le logement est propre et fonctionnel.
Le lit est confortable et le petit déjeuner (copieux) est très appréciable !
Je recommande à 100%

Le séjour chez Raymond s’est très bien déroulé, idéalement situé et à proximité à pieds de tous les lieux d’intérêts d’Amsterdam.
Grand lit, mou, une grande douche, des rideaux occultants, un ventilateur, wc séparés. Appartement très sympa et avec une vue sur une jolie rue

In a great location, really nice bed and shower. Raymond brought us breakfast each morning, and the room is right above his cafe which is also great! It does get a bit noisy at night but that’s to be expected in the city center on a busy street.

We stayed at Ray’s place in Amsterdam in August 22. The location was great, the Negen Straatjes area is lovely and well placed, in close walking distance to the city centre, the museum quarter, Vondelpark, Anne Franks House (you need to book before you go, we didn’t). The room has all you need, and De Doffer bar downstairs is great for a few drinks amongst the locals. Ray was really helpful,  allowing us drop our bags in early and leave them after check out, until we picked up later for our flight. The breakfast was a bonus, and a great start to the day. We couldn’t fault it.

Welcoming hosts, perfect location (actual walking distance from the center, as well as metro and many trams / lots of shops around), great apartment: quiet and with all facilities you can need. Big, comfortable bed. Thanks to Ainsley and Jan willem for this perfect family stay in Amsterdam!

This is the perfect location to explore Amsterdam! The houseboat is on a beautiful tree lined walkway along a canal. Efficient and modern, the apartment is just right for two. Appreciated all the restaurant and sightseeing  recommendations and the access of rental bikes. We would definitely stay here again! Thanks for a wonderful visit!

Wonderful stay in Amsterdam. We loved being on a house boat and this is a wonderful quiet part of town. You can also bike anywhere in about 15 minutes! We will definitely be staying here again. Wonderful family too! Thanks for letting us stay!

Staying on a houseboat in Amsterdam topped off our experience. The room was clean and modern. It was great to have our own entrance and space, and having a code rather than a key to the front door was great for us. Having a safe in the room was also a great bonus.
The area was quiet and felt safe as we walked home at night. The houseboat is a short walk to the bus stop, and then a short bus ride to the main areas.
Diewert was very quick to respond and was very helpful. Unfortunately he was on holiday while we were there but his friend was just as helpful and provided us with the information we needed before our arrival to make everything easy.
I would definitely recommend this place to anyone travelling to Amsterdam!

This place was just wonderful. It's not very big but exactly what we needed for a few nights in Amsterdam. It's just on the outside of the city center so I felt like we were less like tourists. But in a 15 min walk or 5 min bike ride, you were in the heart of everything. We walked/biked to the Anne Frank house, Dam square, Van Gogh and Rijksmuseum very easily. Diewert had a fully stocked mini bar, and you just left payment on the desk. There were brochures, books and maps on Amsterdam and all of the sights. Also many restaurant recommendations. We didn't get to meet Diewert as he was on holiday but his neighbor Lizzy gave us all of the info we needed. And she held our bags for us on the last day because we were not leaving until later. Also, there are bikes for rent, $12.50 per bike per day. I would highly recommend taking advantage of this. Overall, it was a wonderful stay in s great location.
We loved our stay at Diewert's houseboat and felt very comfortable and at home.

Staying with Diewert in Amsterdam is a breeze. The place was perfect for the stay, central to everything I wanted. He was away for the stay but his friend Lizzy was fantastic at checking us in and getting us settled, and making herself available if we had any questions. Diewert had a mini bar set up which was ideal as you dont want to always dash out for a glass of wine when you get in. Highly recommend staying with Diewert.

Petite chambre coquette sur un houseboat dans un quartier calme un peu à l écart du centre mais avec une accessibilité très facile environ 35 minutes de la gare centrale à pied, 15 minutes en bus.
La chambre était propre et conforme à la description et aux photos
L acceuil tres chaleureux, nos hôtes ont répondu à nos questions et nos demandes
Ce qui a rendu notre séjour très agréable dans cette magnifique vole qu est Amsterdam

The host was great! The apartment is set up much like a nice hotel room complete with minibar. The space is bright, with a huge picture window. The location is a bit of a challenge. It's a 25 minute walk to the center, but there are plenty of restaurants and bars along the way. The host has bikes you can rent, so you can get around. It's a beautiful space in a slightly out of the way location.

Bon accueil à l'heure de notre convenance
Logement conforme à la description. Tres confortable et propre. Situe proche d'un arrêt de bus avec accès en centre ville. Envie d'y retourner...
Had a great time in Amsterdam. Loved this little houseboat. Could walk everywhere. The place was very clean and we were made very welcome. Would highly recommend

This is a lovely little space in a quiet area, but just a short walk from Jordaan and the city centre. Diewert made sure there was somebody at the property to meet us and show us around. He had so many tips for us on things to do and places to see, we could easily have spent an entire week! Thanks to him, we also now know THE BEST place to have appeltaart. :)

Loved the place! Great location and we were able to walk everywhere around Amsterdam. It was quiet and clean the whole time in a friendly and safe neighborhood. Perfect Amsterdam houseboat experience. Diewert and his wife made things so easy to check in and were always available for questions and provided great recommendations! If we get a chance to return we would love to stay here again. Thank you!
The location was perfect. Central but quiet. We had a fantastic time in Amsterdam and loved this location.

Excelente ciudad, perfecto lugar.
Diewert una persona muy simpática que nos ha ayudado en todo. El lugar muy cómodo. En perfectas condiciones, nos ha dejado bicicletas la heladera con productos.
Nada que decir. Super recomendable

Super accueil et vraiment magnifique endroit! La chambre était exactement comme décrite et convient parfaitement pour un weekend prolongé. Nous avons vraiment passé un très bon moment et nous recommandons vivement ce logement.

Diewert was an excellent host. He was very helpful and gave us GREAT recommendations. He also facilitated some rental bikes which we recommend you get no matter where you are in Amsterdam.

The location is a 10 min bike ride to the middle of the city. It is not in the busy part of town which is nice because it's quiet and the surrounding restaurants aren't touristy.

The place it self is great - it's definitely a house that happens to be a boat not the other way around, so don't worry about it being rocky or too tiny. It felt like a tasteful, homey hotel room.
Very nice location and central, bicycles available. Diewert has a lot of good tipps

The houseboat is a nice place (everything was very clean and new - and even has an outdoor area to relax) in a great location (It was easy to go for anywhere in Amsterdam from there, besides that, very safe and calm). We didn't meet Diewert when we arrived, but his wife, Wieke, was very friendly with us and helped us with tips and explanations about the place and the neighborhood. And when needed (before, during and after), the communication was very fast.

We enjoyed our stay.

What a fantastic place to stay! 30 minutes walk from the centre and easy to find via taxi from the airport.

Diewert was on hand to welcome us and spent some time pointing out the must see places.

With free wi-fi, nespresso machine, towels and air con, the room was immaculate and has a great view out onto the canal.

I can't wait to return! Thank you Diewert :)

I cannot rave enough about this place and Diewert. We had been traveling in Europe for a month staying at several AirBnb's, this was my favorite We were late in arriving because our luggage did not make it. It was kind of nerve racking being in another country with limited ways of contacting the airline if our bags were going to be delivered as stated. Diewert said "You guys enjoy Amsterdam and I will take care of the luggage. It will be in your room once you arrive back." He called and emailed the airline and as promised our luggage was delivered straight to our room! He even went that extra step and gave my husband brand new socks since he did not have for the next day! The place was perfect as well. Clean, modern and a mini bar with super reasonable prices. I cant wait to come back to Amsterdam!

Diewert and family amazing hosts didn't get too see them but they answered very quickly and made us feel welcome there was no problems with communication and even gave some good suggestions. The place itself was clean and tidy and is only about 10 minute bus ride too Amsterdam central.  Overall great place would recommend
The neighborhood was quiet, which was a nice break from the typical noisy streets. The room was clean.  The host was friendly.  I would stay here again.
Was fabulous, close to lots of shops and cafes. Used Uber without any problems. Wish we could have stayed longer!

Fantastic location! Quiet residential area on a canal but within 30 mins walk of the centre and with lots of nice parks, cafes and restaurants nearby. The room was clean, well fitted and comfortable; perfect for a short stay. The host was friendly and available to give lots of tips on where to go and what to see. We will be back!

Our Stay was perfect! we didn't meet our host as they were away with the family but the house boat was perfect everything we needed great location very quiet and within walking distance to everything and very clean with everything we needed we would love to stay again. Highly recommended!!

Paul&Trish

Staying two nights at Diewert's bed no breakfast was a great experience!
He was very communicative since the 1st moment, he helped us to get the room as soon as possible so we can head to explore Amsterdam ASAP. The room is clean, water view, quiet, and comfy bed!

Thanks for everything Diewert, It was a pleasure meeting you and Boaz, your son. Hope to come visit again soon!

Perfect place to stay when exploring Amsterdam. Lovely clean warm and comfortable accommodation with lots of thoughtful touches - rental bikes, guide books, maps and delicious coffee. Thoroughly recommend, we'll be coming back!

Thank you for such an amazing break! We loved Amsterdam and spent hours exploring! Your wonderful boatel was the perfect place to relax! And the best was so comfortable.  The area was perfect, friendly with lots a near by places to eat, drink & visit. Lots of tourist info and suggestions

This place is really great - it's in a quiet neighborhood just outside the main canal belt, and it's very easy to get and out of the central city by walking or taking bus 21. It's the perfect combination of convenient and relaxing. The room has its own private entrance and is separate from the house. The host is very communicative and has good suggestions of things to do and see.

The location is great and only a short walk to many of the places we wanted to see and close to public transportation too! Diewert was very accommodating and friendly and gave us suggestions of where to go. We loved our stay on the houseboat.
Had a great stay in the apartment

This cosy, easily accessible little flat on Prinsengracht is well placed for all Amsterdam attractions with tram stops in two directions close by. Good shopping, bars and restaurants are plentiful in the immediate vicinity and Liesbeth is a charming and helpful host. The flat is clean and tidy and has a lovely little garden which would be a quiet retreat in the warmer weather. There is no noise at all inside the flat and the beds were very comfortable. I'd like to go back in summer!

Liesbeth was extremely responsive and easy to connect with. Arrival was smooth, instructions for using the apartment were clear and everything was neat and tidy when we arrived.  Apartment is probably best for a couple, but fold-out couch worked just fine for two of us to each have our own bed.  Location is peaceful, but just a short walk from Rembrandtplein and central Amsterdam. Would definitely visit again.

We had a great stay in this lovely canal side apartment. Liesbeth is a very welcoming and relaxed host. The apartment is in an ideal location in easy walking distance to the main galleries and museums, as well as lots of nice cafes and shops (including an excellent record store). We would certainly stay here again.
Apartment is in a good location but appliances and unit is a bit old.
Very nice spot in Amsterdam. Liesbeth was really helpfull. I recommand staying there.
My stay at Liesbeth was perfect. The location is really nice in a quiet neighborhood, close from the city center. The apartment is very fonctional and perfectly clean.
Great place to stay, would recommend a slightly larger tv for the rainy nights.
A great location for all the sights. A friendly welcome and everything you need for a good stay.
Great Location, very cosy place
Very nice location and kind host

I loved staying in this flat, great location, quiet street, beautiful private little garden that gets evening sun. I lived here for a whole month and Liesbeth has been the perfect host. Very friendly and helpful, and the place was beautifully clean. Lots of clean sheets and towels provided. Thoroughly recommend staying here.
Wonderful host and location was excellent! I highly recommend
Even better than described. Clean, cozy, and perfectly located. Liesbeth is very helpful and welcoming. I wouldn't stay anywhere else in Amsterdam.

We had a wonderful stay at Jan and Ainsley's!  The pictures accurately describe their home...sunny, spacious for two, immaculate, quiet, comfortable/ spacious bed, a fully functioning kitchen with a dishwasher and wash machine in the bathroom! Jan was extremely organized. He had guides laid out for city walking and sight seeing, treats and beverages to welcome us and a very detailed manual on how to run the wash machine, dishwasher,etc. He also gave helpful recommendations on restaurants and bars/cafe to check out. After our 10 day stay, we felt like we lived there and were very sad to leave! We can't recommend this apartment or these hosts highly enough. Thanks for everything Jan and Ainsley!  We hope to come back in the summer some year and would definitely consider staying at your home again. Happy 2011!
Really great place to stay. The host is super nice and the location is awesome if you're planning to go to a lot of museums!
Great place with great service!

Our stay with Diewert was wonderful the place was beautiful and had everything you need for a short stay. The location was wonderful and it was easy to get everywhere we wanted to by walking or with public transport. Would recommend this place if you want to do a lot of sightseeing and need a comfortable place to sleep after a long day.
Very central, the host was very nice introducing the neighbourhood and the main attractions of the city. The room and the bathroom are cosy. It is perfect for two people.
Très jolie chambre proche du centre d'Amsterdam. Hôtes très accueillant et logements confortable ! Parfait pour un week-end !
Very friendly hosts with lots of good recommendations for restaurants and what to do & see in the city.
The place was perfect. We'd definitely recommend it to our friends. If we're in town again we'll look into staying here. I loved the mini bar options during my late night snack craves.

Cozy room on a nice houseboat in a good location. We've had a great time in Diewert's apartment and enjoyed a real Amterdam-experience. Bikes are for rent at the room for a fair price and pubic transport is only a few minutes away. Great bathroom and comfortable bed. Protipp: If you want to get some food, a beer or great coffee walk to the Huge de Grootplein-roundabout for many options or even further south to De Clercqstraat for more wonderful places.
100% recommendation if you want to enjoy Amsterdam :)

Diewert's apartment on the house boat is a quaint little room good for couples looking for some place quiet in a bustling city like Amsterdam. He was very friendly and offered some great tips for places to eat and sights to see. The transit stops weren't the closest, but the city is very walkable and we never felt too far from anything.
This place is great!  Ride bikes easily to city center!
Great place and Diewert is a very friendly host! Would definitely recommend.

This place is great! Very clean and tidy. Doesn't even feel like your in a houseboat at all. Private room with a private entrance. The owner offers bike rental, which makes it easier to rent than from a big company. I'd recommend getting a bike to tour the city!

Diewert was polite and discreet throughout our stay.
Four days in Amsterdam and each day was a pleasure to return all'houseboat.
Environment small but very comfortable, cozy and a beautiful new bathroom. Great location for public transport, bus stops nearby and good transport links. Great WiFi always available and powerful.
In addition, sleep in a houseboat on an Amsterdam canal with swans and geese in the early morning to say good morning it was a wonderful experience!
Again many thanks!
Everything was perfect! Diewert was very kind and helpfull! The Apartment is on a houseboat and it's about 15 - 20 min. by foot from the city!  Anytime again :)
It was a really nice experience to live like a local. Nice host and they are very good people. Just enjoy your stay at Diewert's "boatel"!
Diewerts place is amazing!! Private and tranquil! !!! Close to the city centre!!! Easy to find!! Diewert is really friendly host, helpful and informative! !!! Can't recommend this place enough!!!!!!
Diewert and his wife are lovely hosts. The apartment is cute and clean and easily accessible by public transport. We really enjoyed our stay and would stay with Diewert again any time!

A very tidy and cosy room with nice view located in a quiet neighbourhood. Few minutes walk away from two different bus stops, either 18 or 21. Helpful and friendly host, will definitely recommend this to anyone traveling to Amsterdam. Thank you Diewert! :)

Nice and cosy place in a quiet neighbourhood but within walking distance to the centre. Host flexible with he check in which was great as our flight got delayed and very friendly. Had a great stay and would recommend!
Lovely house-boat within walking distance of city centre and close to some great bars/restaurants and bus/tram stops.
Great place

My goal in looking for apartments in Amsterdam was a) to feel as though I *actually* lived there, and b) to be able to walk to all of the sights and sounds that Amsterdam has to offer (i.e., not just the city center)--and, for five all-too-short nights, this well-appointed, cozy apartment exceeded my expectations. What can I say? Great location just north of Le Pijp neighborhood (great restaurants, open air market, etc.) and east of the museums (Van Gogh, Rijk, etc.), and just south of everything else (walking distance along picturesque canal streets), this was literally everything I could have wanted in my accommodations. It also had great "extras," like washing machine, bathtub, and a very well-furnished kitchen for all you cooks out there. Impeccably clean, bright and cheery, with window-views to the towers of the Rijkmuseum and a beautiful canal below and vases with fresh tulips--well, you throw in a couple bottles of "welcome" wine and snacks, and I really could not have been more pleased!

I spent five incredible days mapping out all-day walks to various parts of the city, and I rarely retraced my steps. To come home to Jan's place at night and enjoy an exceedingly comfortable and peaceful night's rest was icing on the cake. (I also highly recommend the nearby coffee at nearby Two for Joy or De Koffie Salon--I miss them so much already...) I unfortunately didn't get to meet the owner (Jan), but he was very prompt in responding to every one of my e-mail inquiries, and even arranged to have his brother meet us at the apartment when we got there.

In sum, perfect location, perfect lodging, great host.
Lovely, clean place! Diewert was a perfect host! So helpful, kind, thoughtful, and accomadating! Made us feel so welcome.

Das Hausboot ist super sauber und hat alles was man braucht. Wir kamen gut ohne jegliche Verkehrsmittel aus, und haben den Weg ins Zentrum für einen ausgedehnten Spaziergang genutzt.
Diewert und seine Frau waren super freundlich und hilfsbereit.
Great place to stay and a great host! Would definitely visit again in the future.

Diewert was a great host! Very helpful with advice and tips. Gave us a couple of excellent eating choices and thanks to him we now know that we like Indonesian food! The room on his houseboat was just as discribed and pitcured, very clean and modern. Great shower with great water pressure and nice hot water. The neighborhood was a nice place to relax after a day in the hustle of the central part of Amsterdam. Room was well stocked and had everything we needed. Very comfortable bed!
Our room was clean and nice. Diewert and his family were kind. We had a good time!

A gorgeous little houseboat, perfect for a getaway! Bed was very comfy and the whole place was extremely clean. My husband and I loved using the bikes to cycle around Amsterdam, to see all it has to offer. Thanks Diewert for a great stay!

Diewert's apartment was fantastic. Everything in the apartment was very new and was quite clean upon our arrival. The bed is comfortable, and he stocks the room with free tea/coffee as well as a small mini bar. Location is about a 15 min walk to downtown. This apartment has been one of the best airbnbs I have stayed in,
Lovely clean space, quiet neighbourhood but a nice walk into the busier areas, great host great recommendations! Foodhallen was great :) thankyou diewert !!

Lovely clean bright room to stay, free wifi, comfy beds, good clean shower and toilet. Lovely quiet safe area to stay. Diewert was very helpful and quick at responding to my questions before my arrival in Amsterdam. Highly recommend.
Great place - check out Cafe Winkel for the apple pie and a pint!
Amsterdam is a beautiful city and Diewert's houseboat is the perfect spot to stay.  It is lovely and in a brilliant location.  Diewert is an exceptional host.  We honestly didn't want to leave!

Diewert was a great host. The house boat was amazing. The room was clean, decent wifi, and a very comfy bed. The location was just right, not too far from all the tourist spots, but far enough from the hustle and bustle of the city to enjoy a quite walk. Probably the biggest advice I could give is to make sure to rent the bicycles from Diewert. We made the mistake of trying to walk the first day and quickly realised that wasn't the most efficient option. Thankfully Diewert had some bicycles on hand to save the day. When we come back, we will definitely try to stay here again. Thank you Diewert!

Brilliant stay. Highly recommended. Diewert was so helpful in giving us local information and was brilliant at communicating with us before and during our stay. You are nice and close to all transport you could need to get into the centre of Amsterdam, but there are plenty of local attractions, bars, restaurants that are within walking distance. Would definitely stay here again.
Diewert place was comfortable and well-stocked with coffee, tea, a mini-bar, snacks, and a safe. He was very friendly and offered lots of advice (with a map) on places to go!

All in all staying here was just perfect. We were close enough to walk into the city centre or we could catch transport in. The room was enough for myself and my friend. Diewert was very friendly and helpful through out our stay. His family were also lovely.

The houseboat is a romantic and relaxing concept, perfect for couples. No need to take towels and bedsheet. We don't hear the noise outside the room and note that the neighborhood is calm. Moreover the hosts are very helpful.
We recomand it.
A beautiful clean room. 30 minute walk into the centre of town with lots of bars and cafes along the way.

This place is cozy, close to things and has all the amenities that you could possibly need. Diewert even had contact solution, which was perfect! Someone came to clean up during the day and make the bed, which was nice but surprising. The neighborhood is close to things. You can't walk across the street for coffee but it's just a short walk to find anything. Diewert had great suggestions and we especially loved Foodhallen! Thank you so much!

We had a fantastic time, very easy to get around Amsterdam on foot, and this place was central enough while still being peaceful at night. We felt very welcomed and had great communication. Would definitely stay again!
Very clean and Cosy room. Close to museums and Anne Frank's house.  Diewert was a very helpful and communicative host.
Lovely apartment, nice quiet area and a very friendly and helpful host.

The house boat was perfectly fine. With Diewert's help we fund it very easily. It's about a 25 minutes walk from the central station but you can also take the bus within 10 minutes.
The apartment is similar like on the pictures: bright, clean and cosy. Diewert is super nice and very helpful. He writes back very fast and detailed.
It was a very nice stay and I would recommend him everytime.

Diewert's place is clean and modern; the perfect Amsterdam houseboat experience. It's on a quiet canal, but still very close to the city center and lots of great restaurants. We rented bikes from Diewert and biked all around Amsterdam, and his place has a cork board full of ideas from tours to restaurants. I would highly recommend staying here!

This was one of my favorite Air bnb's I have stayed in. I loved the neighborhood and the room. The bed was incredibly comfortable. The garden is adorable. Rental bikes are right in the yard. Diewert and his wife are extremely sweet and very helpful.

Le séjour dans la chambre louée par Diewert et sa famille s'est très bien passé. L'entrée se fait par une porte indépendante. La vie sur une péniche amarrée permet une expérience authentique lorsque l'on est à Amsterdam. Café et thé sont offerts à volonté ; un mini bar payant est aussi mis à disposition. Diewert a été très disponible via les messages électronique suis et nous avons été reçus par son épouse très sympathique ! Vous trouverez auprès d'eux une carte de la ville et des conseils pour dîner dans le quartier. La péniche se situe près du Jordaan un quartier calme mais connecté à 10 min de tous les spots d'Amsterdam. La literie est très bonne ; la chambre cosy et les équipements en très bon état.
Je recommande fortement ce logement pour qui veut retrouver la quiétude après des journées frénétiques dans Amsterdam.

This room on the upper floor of a houseboat is comfortable and perfect for one or two people wanting a quiet sanctuary from which to explore Amsterdam. A lovely outdoor patio area is a great spot for relaxation, but we were so busy seeing Amsterdam and visiting restaurants Diewert suggested that we didn't have as much time to enjoy it as I would have wished. The room is well appointed, modern, and very clean, and it is an easy walk of 10-15 minutes to be in the center of Amsterdam. Deiwert is the perfect host: friendly, available, knowledgeable, and ready with answers and suggestions should you want them. Nice place!!

Nice week-end in Amsterdam in Diewert Houseboat.

Original place to be. Good public transportation connexions with city center & central train station.
Really cool studio in a house boat. Within walking/biking distance of central Amsterdam, but in a quiet residential area. Really enjoyed staying here.
Sleeping on boat was incredible. The place is calm and not So far from center. I recomended it.

Jan Willem and Ainsley were great hosts, very welcoming and their apartment is absolutely fantastic!

The apartment was spotlessly clean and had every facility we could have wanted, including a Nespresso coffee maker! The small balcony just off the kitchen was a great great sun trap in the day and cool in the evening, a great place to chill. The best thing about their place though was the sofa! It really is a comfy as it looks in the photo's!!

The location was also ideal for us as it was nice and peaceful but still within minutes of the hustle of the city centre. There are good local shops and a street market only minutes away.

All in all, a great experience and we would recommend Jan Willem and Ainsley's place to anyone considering Amsterdam.

We had wonderful time staying at Jan's apartment. His place was perfectly clean and had one of the comfiest couch ever!!! He prepared us a very useful list of restaurants and places to go see so we never ended up going to a wrong place to eat! The location was also awesome. Close to everywhere-a tram station, a shopping area and a restaurant street. We really liked that it was not located in the dead center of the sightseeing area which could have been loud and crowed. So if you stay at this place, you definitely can see and feel how Amsterdam people actually live and enjoy their time :)

Although we had a litlle time to get to know Jan better he was really helpful and accomodating person. His appartment was great, very well situated for our purposes, at quiet location, 15 min to Central station and 15 min to RAI center. The appartment is very bright and neat with all equipment for a shorter or longer stay. I can higly reccomend it and would book it again without any hesitation in the case of the another journey to Amsterdam.

Jan is one of the most thoughtful and delightful hosts... he was so helpful, and made sure we had everything we needed to relax and maximize our holiday.  We absolutely LOVED the apartment!  It was impeccably clean, well organized, spacious, comfortable and quiet with beautiful views of Amsterdam.  The neighborhood is amazing, with wonderful cafes, bars, restaurants and shops right outside your doorstep.  We discovered so much more to love in Amsterdam staying at Jan's place, and look forward to our return.  Dank u wel, Jan!

We recently stayed at this apartment, we had a great stay, it could not have been better!
Sometimes apartments looks nicer on picture than in reality, this apartment is even nicer in reality! The apartment is very comfortable, perfectly clean, well equipped for cooking, we did not miss anything. We instantly felt at home and the risk about staying at this apartment is that you feel so comfortable that you prefer to stay in, it happened to us a couple of evenings.:)
Our only complaint is that the weather gods were not too kind on us during our stay!:)
We were not able to get to know Jan W or Ainsley but they have been most helpful through email and the detailed instructions they left in the apartment. It was also very kind of them to leave a welcome gift.
We will recommend this apartment to anyone planning on visiting Amsterdam. Checking out this apartment? Do not hesitate to send an enquiry!

We were very happy with this apartment and the host. The building is new, and the apartment was very clean, pretty, comfortable, and had all of the kitchen appliances and utensils you could ever want. The view is great and the location is excellent in a quiet area very close to several tram stops.

We are really very grateful to Jan - we had wonderful time in Amsterdam in this apt! Very cosy, clean, comfortable, spacious, and  really helpful and nice neighbours next door. And of course the location is really one of the best possible - no tourists around, calm but next to the cultural center of the city, many good restaurants - what else one could wish?

Jan's apartment was perfect for our stay.  It's situated close to most things, and easy to get to from the Tram- lines 4 and 25 drop you steps from the door.  Tram 4 also takes you directly to the RAI (which is where I had to go  for a conference)- very convenient.  Jan takes immaculate care of his apartment, and I recommend it to anyone wanting a comfortable place to stay that is clean and well cared for.

We had a great time in Amsterdam, it was a fun place for new year and a great place to visit. Our trip was made so much better by staying in a fantastic apartment, it was close to transport, museums, markets and only a short tram ride to Dam Square. It was just as pictured, a bright, spacious apartment with clean and modern facilities. The hosts added an extra sense of comfort with there generosity and helpful information that allowed us to get the most of the apartment and out of our time in the Netherlands. My wife and I recommend Jan highly he and his partner made a real effort to make us feel at home and give us all the tips we needed. Thanks Jan for the wonderful place

A really large and well-cared for apartment in Amsterdam (with a lift!) in a good part of town.  Never got to meet our hosts but they were very helpful and provided us with lots of info. about the surrounding area.  Definitely stay here and have no regrets.

Wow! We decided to stay over the weekend on a business trip in the Netherlands. Jan's penthouse was great. Clean, spacious and perfect location. While you are a 10minute walk to the center of the center, you enjoy a local area far away from tourists. Jan has been a fantastic host from fast email responses to giving us a full list of the best restaurant and cafés in the area. The condo is also well deserved by Tram and bus.

I would book there again without hesitation. Thanks Jan!
Schönes kleines Zimmer! Unkompliziert und alles da was man braucht.

Diewert's place was beautiful! Very quiet neighborhood, yet close to everything! Very clean and it was great to rent bikes! We loved staying there and would definitely come back if we are in Amsterdam again!

Located in a beautiful, quiet neighborhood, this is a clean and very comfortable place to stay! The pictures and information are very accurate and Diewert is a gracious host who takes the time to answer any questions and offer local recommendations. We would absolutely stay here again when visiting Amsterdam!

Diewert's place is very lovely. Clean and well taken care of and in a great location. The bed was very comfy and the shower had great pressure. The bikes in the courtyard were perfect for exploring the city. Communication with Diewert was easy. I would definitely stay here again.

A lovely room and bathroom on a houseboat-perfect for a stay in Amsterdam. A little expensive but then we did get the use of two bicycles for the weekend which allowed us to see a lot more of Amsterdam than we would have by walking. Super helpful hosts and really great location. Would thoroughly recommend.

Margot's apartment is a fabulous base for your Amsterdam vacation.  The location is fantastic - so central, and just down the street from adorable Nieumarkt Square.  The apartment was spotless, comfortable, and exactly what we were looking for in a home-away-from-home. Margot was a wonderful host - she was very responsive and easy to communicate with before our arrival, and made sure that everything was comfortable for us during our stay, including recommendations for site, bike rentals, etc. nearby.  I sincerely hope to stay here again the next time I'm in Amsterdam, and I would definitely recommend the flat to anyone looking for a comfortable stay in a beautiful city!

Margot has a wonderful apartment in a very very central location in Amsterdam. Though it is central it is still very quite - next a beautiful canal. Just ideal for a couple. The apartment is spotless- really with everything you need. Margot was extremely kind and attentative.
Would not hestiate going back again. Highly recommend.

Room was exactly as described, clean, tidy, warm in a great location. Room had all the utensils and utilities that were essential to a good stay. Very good breakfast was included in the deal. Would recommend!

Bright loft is a very modern apartment. VERY CLEAN, WIFI available, nice small balcony, well equipped specially the kitchen.
In the centre of Amsterdam, big super market is 3 min walking.
if in business trip so RAI is 15 min or less by tram, city center (Dam Square) the same less than 15 min by tram.
i didn't meet Jan, he was traveling out of country during my stay but from our corespondent he is a very nice man.
We travel to Amsterdam visiting IBC exhibition every year, next year first place I will look for is Jan's apartment.

Just came back from a week in Jan's splendid loft apartment. We found the flat just as described, bright, clean and comfortable. Quiet bedroom, big lounge and eating area. Wi-Fi works like a dream. Within walking distance to the main museums and within 10-15 mins by tram to the RAI Conference centre (if like us) you're on a business trip.
We didn't meet Jan, but he had left instructions which were more than enough to get us started in Amsterdam. We enjoyed some of the good restaurants he had suggested.
Highly recommended.
Great location, cosy and comfortable place and a very friendly house host, what else can you expect??

Grand appartement trés lumineux, trés confortable, wifi excellent.
quartier et voisins calmes. Cuisine bien équipée.
Situation trés centrale avec les principaux lieux touristiques et restaurants à moins de 15-20 minutes à pied. Que vouloir de plus ?
Une adresse en or !

L'appartamento è veramente carino, arredato molto bene, buon gusto, e pulito.
E' situato in una zona centrale, quindi una posizione molto comoda.
Margot è stata molto gentile, e ci ha fornito una colazione molto ricca.
Lo consiglierò ai miei amici che vorranno venire ad Amsterdam.

Tout simplement tip top !
Margot est très agréable. Le petit appartement est bien isolé par rapport à sa Maison.
Le petit déjeuner est super, l'appart est situé en plein centre, à 12 minutes de la gare et à 15 minutes à pied de tout ce que vous pourrez avoir envie de visiter.

Margot was an extremely nice host, even though we just saw her twice in the 4 days we spent in Amsterdam, we really felt at home when she was there.

The apartment is very well located (5 - 10) minutes away from the centrum, red light neighborhood, etc. in a really quiet street. Everything is practically new, the apartment is really clean and really comfortable for a couple. When we arrived to B&B Mondriaan Amsterdam Margot had ham, cheese, bread, fruits there for us for the days we were going to spend, she even brought us more bread a couple of days later as she thought we might need more for breakfast.

I will definitely reccommend B&B Mondriaan Amsterdam to my friends and people that are going to Amsterdam.

We had a fantastic stay at B&B Mondriaan Amsterdam.

The apartment is perfectly located right in the centre of old Amsterdam. It is spotlessly clean and has everything you need for your stay. The breakfast is fantastic with lots of choice and variety and the kitchen well stocked should you wish to cook. There is also a book of all local attractions and things to do which is helpful.

I would not hesitate to recommend staying at this apartment. Margot and her family were very welcoming when we arrived and accomodated a late check out as we had an afternoon flight which was fantastic as meant we didnt have to take our luggae with us for the last day.

Margot was a fantastic host! She was very responsive prior to our trip and warmly welcomed us upon arrival, even though we got in a few hours later than expected due to a flight delay.
