The apartment was just as great as our host. Clean and fully furnished with everything we needed during our stay (including a great breakfast spread). The location was quiet, but still very close to many restaurants and sites.

We would not hesitate to book again! Thanks Margot!
Very good apartment. Thanks Margot. Very nice place. I and my wife very happy stay in Margot home.  Very testy breakfast, very cozy apartment. My next stay in Amsterdam will be in this home

Diewert's place is a very appealing place to stay. And, if you like quiet, this is perfect. As I told Diewert, this room is like a cozy little nest for you at the end of a touring day. A great escape from the buzz of the day and the city.
Even though this is off the beaten path, it's very convenient to tram service. Bikes are also available for rent from Diewert (which you must do - it gets you around town quickly and easily) and walking is always an option too; plus, it allows you to really see the city.
If you need anything, Diewert will be sure you have it, all you have to do is ask. I lacked nothing staying here.
There's so much I loved about staying here, some of which included:
- Diewert's recommendations/suggestions
- Available bikes
- Keyless entry
- Peace and quiet
- Location
- Cleanliness and comfort
After a few days, Diewert's place will feel like your own home.

The room (+bath) has a dedicated entry with keyless entry so access is painless.  It's pretty cool to be on a houseboat, though it's so still that you mostly can't tell without looking out the window).  The room is clean and comfortable, the area is quiet and residential - close to city center and quite accessible by bike and transit.  Diewert is helpful with tips about the city.

Diewert is a fantastic and attentive host.  From the moment we booked the room, he kept in touch and provided all the information we needed to ensure a comfortable stay.  The room is quiet and peacefully located in his waterside home where you wake to a dawn chorus of ducks and other river birds.  You are only five minutes walk from Westerstraat, where there are a variety shops and quality restaurants - and apple pie at Winkel - the best in Amsterdam apparently although you may have to queue such is its reputation!  From there, you traverse the canals and on into the centre of town.  Everywhere is accessible by foot, cycle, boat, pedallo, pedicab, etc: whatever takes your fancy.  Diewert is great at providing suggestions and local information.  All in all a  wonderful stay and we are already looking forward to going back to Amsterdam.
Great location, great room, great hostess!! Totally recommend

Unfortunately not a good experience. I arrived to find the place not at all clean especially the bathroom.. I messaged Diewert who said it must have been used since being cleaned and that he'd sort it when he finished work that evening so we couldn't actually use the place till late that first night which was pretty inconvenient. But anyway we were perfectly nice about it, these things happen but then the next morning we got up to make coffee only to find the water container full of mould and one of the glasses had sticky brown stuff in it.
I wasn't going to detail this because I assumed it was an unfortunate one off experience but I did request a refund through the resolution centre for 1 out of the 3 nights which seemed a fair and reasonable request. But Diewert never responded which is very odd, I can't imagine that this is the experience he would want his guests to have.

Diewert's place was exactly as pictured.  Neat and clean.  Maps, dining and activity suggestions were offered.  Diewert provided a fan for me, as I tend to be hot and the AC was off for the season.  Most people would have found the temperature very comfortable.  He offered to bring us any dishes we needed, as we bought a few things for breakfast.  The neighbourhood was very quiet, and we were able to walk to all the major attractions.

Très bel accueil de Diewert !
super bien placé, au calme et très propre

merci beaucoup

Jan was the best host ever, although I didnt meet him. The apartment was very clean with everything you need in there. Jan was also kind enough to leave drinks in thr fridge and also some snacks. Very nice location thats close to everything. Will definately stay there again.
Thanks Jan

Me and my wife had a wonderful time in this apartment, and the overall experience well exceeded our expectations! It is well taken care of and is exactly as on the pictures. Nice area of the centre - good supermarket as well as trams are nearby. The hosts are extremely helpful and friendly, they helped us greatly on all matters in which we needed assistance. It was also reassuring that the neighbour opposite our door was there if we needed some help with something. Wifi worked perfectly, and so were all other appliances. It was also great to have an elevator in the building :) Thumbs up Jan Willem!

Jan Willem's spacious, elegant and comfortable penthouse apartment leaves absolutely nothing to be desired : centrally located but quiet, spotlessly clean, with beautiful views, elevator access, a small balcony, good Wi-Fi and cable TV, a good shower, washing machine and nice neighbours: what more can you ask for ? It's a house that immediately feels like a home. Jan Willem is an experienced AirBNB'er and an excellent communicator,  who had prepared a usefully detailed, written description of the apartment, the neighborhood and the city. As a regular visitor to Amsterdam, I will most definitely stay there again.

Jan Willem's place is fantastic. It is beautifully designed and furnished, has a well-appointed kitchen, a lovely dining area and an extremely comfortable bed, and even a small balcony. There is a separate toilet and bathroom (with an actual bath), and the apartment is excellently located in a picturesque residential neighborhood within walking (or tram) distance of the center of the city and commanding a lovely view out over the rooftops to the turrets of the Rijksmuseum.

Jan Willem left us a pile of books and information about Amsterdam, along with an assortment of other goodies, and some drinks in the fridge, and was, by all measures, the most gracious of hosts.

Definitely our home away from home in Amsterdam. Highly recommended!

Fantastic apartment close to the great attractions in Amsterdam and the RAI Conference centre. Jan's advice on places to eat and visit helped a lot on my visit to this beautiful city. I highly recommend it and thanks Jan for your help.
Jan's appartment is really nice and spacefull. We found a bottle of wine and stuffs to eat when we arrive, than Jan left for us, which was really nice form him. We recommand this apartment!

This Amsterdam apartment left us speechless for it's great location, clever design and a special welcoming atmosphere, created by our hosts. A few steps from one of the numerous canals and just a few minutes from the nearest AH supermarket - what else could you wish for? You leave the place and get immersed into the rythm of this wonderful city with the first breath of fresh air. And a nice bonus to the roof floor apartment - the elevator))). The flat has a wow view of the city - in stormy weather we spent a few leisurely hours beside the grand windows just observing the neighbourhood and "the great beyond" - Rijks museum and some other landmarks. The living area is full of light, space and peace, with a few tasteful splashes of color and character here and there it tells you a lot about it's owners - active guys with interesting life and a great sense of humor. Many thanks for the welcome supply of drinks, biscuits and a city guide - came in very handy and unexpected. The other things are just perfect - everything is clean, convenient and in order. We wish this lovely place a long and interesting record of guests and all the best to our dear hosts.

Roman and Viktoriya

We had an AMAZING time, thanks to this beautiful cozy apartment we felt 'at home away from home'!

As soon as we arrived (very early in the morning) Jan gave us a warm friendly welcome, showed us around the apartment and gave us great tips, info & some sight-seeing ideas.

The apartment was the perfect size for my partner & I.
Great kitchen with everything you would ever need.
Beautiful bedroom, good large bed, big windows, tv/dvd & warm in the winter.
Well designed bathroom with washing machine, big bath & shower.
But by far the spacious living room was our favourite place to relax on the couch, dine and enjoy the view from the large windows.
It was great to have fast Wifi, and central heating throughout the home too.

We watched the New Year fireworks from the living room and it was wonderful.

The location is perfect, nice and quiet yet a small walk into the main town, shopping & restaurants. Its close to trams and taxi stations, public transport to help you get around or to & from the airport.

We highly recommend this apartment & i hope to be back again soon! :)

***** Five stars!

Diewert was a great host with quick communication and was very accommodating with our needs of dropping bags off prior to check in. Nice quiet location but with the use of the bikes he has on site this made getting anywhere in Amsterdam very easy for us. Thanks for a great experience.
Place was nice & clean. In a good area, walking distance to downtown! Would recommend!
Toller Aufenthalt mit super Tipps vom Gastgeber. Wir würden wieder hinfahren :-)
The host canceled this reservation the day before arrival. This is an automated posting.

A cozy, well-appointed room in a houseboat on one of Amsterdam’s canals belonging to two people who are friendly
and helpful (but not intrusive). Thanks to their advice, our stay was full of wonderful discoveries, including one of Amsterdam’s best Rijsttafel restaurants and the last days of a major exhibit at the Hermitage Amsterdam complete with a new Rembrandt! We look forward to returning to Amsterdam and this AIrbnb soon!

Good value, easy to get around, good communication with the host. Not the most central area where you have restaurants / cafes lined outside the door but in a family-oriented residential neighbourhood. Room was smaller than expected (but that's europe!) and there's a large concrete wall the window looks out to on the canal; however overall still good value for your money in Amsterdam. Save your money on overpriced hotels, stay here and use that money for good food + shopping instead!
The host canceled this reservation 12 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.
The host canceled this reservation 44 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Diewert's house proved to be more hassle than other Airbnbs I have stayed. I had to sign a contract a month before we arrived. These contracts were so strict and even allowed the host full access to the apartment to come and go at any time during our stay. All I can say, is that it felt overdone and unnecessary.
House was very clean and modern. It was like a small hotel room.
The host canceled this reservation 19 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.
Prima in orde.

My husband and I had a great time at Diewert’s place. It was in a great location just a short walk or bike ride to restaurants and cafes. We enjoyed the rental bikes provided and they made getting around Amsterdam easy. The room was spotless, comfortable, and quiet. We would love to stay here again if we return to Amsterdam.

A really unique experience! Diewert’s houseboat is clean and in a location that’s not too far of a walking distance to restaurants, shops, and the central city canals. We almost forgot we were on a houseboat at times because it was so stable and cozy.
The location is central and convenience to walk to the shopping areas as well as tourist place.

Lovely little hotel room on the first floor of a private houseboat. Be aware that you stay just in the hotel room, not the boat. Very clean and convenient though. Not sure whether I was in contact with Diewert, the owner or some company who does the turnarounds. For sure not a one-to-one host experience, but super professional ;-)
Het was een goed gelegen en verzorgde kamer dichtbij het centrum.

Our stay in Amsterdam was perfect! Diewert welcomed us giving nice tips to visit the city; he is super kind and polite and communication with him was really good!The location is great and close to the centre; we could also rent his two bikes :) The house boat was a really nice experience...and you can also have a cup of coffee or tea for breakfast! We can highly recommend Diewert’s house!
I highly recommend staying at Diewert’s houseboat. The place is clean and lovely, in a great location, and the hosts are kind and accommodating.

This houseboat stay was great!! It’s in a cute little location a bit away from the city but the city is not hard to get to by bus. The room was a little smaller than expected but it was the perfect size for me and my friend. Everything about the stay and communication was great, except for the fact that our place was still being cleaned past our check in time. Overall a highly recommended place.
Great interior setup. Beautiful boathouse that's sparkling clean. Warm hospitality from the host and approximately 30 min walk from central Amsterdam.
Very nice place and location. Perfect for a short stay in Amsterdam.
nice place to stay, thanks for accommodating us

Great place to stay!  Off the beaten path a bit- which is great if you appreciate quiet.  And still easy to get to a local market, great restaurants, and downtown without too my h trouble.  Right on the canal with privacy.  And with quacking ducks to wake you up in the morning.

Awesome place to stay in A'dam.  Rent a bike from Diewert for 12 euro and explore the city.  It's all accessible from this location.  Wake up to the sounds of ducks along the canal outside and beautiful water views.  Bed super comfortable.  Wifi is slow, however.  Super friendly hosts willing to give local tips and advice, etc.  Highly recommend.
The place was really nice, very great for a weekend
A nice quiet place close to the center of Amsterdam.
Great room in a boat house with total privacy. Excellent location. They let us use thier bicycles and amazing sauna! Friendly hosts.

Très bon accueil chez Diewert , quartier très accessible pour se rendre dans le centre , endroit très calme , seul bémol la chambre un peu petite pour le prix et la vue peu dégagée . À part ça rien à dire !
Diewert est très disponible et très réactif et à su nous conseiller de bonnes adresses !
Very nice houseboat.

Gute Lage der Unterkunft, mittendrin und doch ruhig. Mit dem Fahrrad ist das Zentrum in ca 10 min erreichbar.
Nette Cafés in der Nähe + Supermarkt.

Diewert's house boat is very clean and in a leafy neighborhood where people live. It is an upstairs room with a bathroom and can fit one to two people. There were children playing in a nearby square and grocery stores and non-touristy restaurants nearby. This was refreshing as we found that central Amsterdam felt more oriented toward businesses, tourists and Airbnb rentals. We were able to get to the house boat easily from the central train station on the tram. The highlight of the trip was renting bicycles from Diewert for the day and then cycling around the city to our various destinations. I recommend this rental for your stay in Amsterdam.
Excellent location, beautiful apartment! Diewert made checking in and out very easy. 5/5

Convenient location. Walking distance to the city center.
Small but cozy and quiet place for two.

Everything is nice. You are in a good
Location. You’re facing a wall with water and you can not use the patio as it may feel in the photo. But you do have a room and a nice clean shower. The space is perfect for 1 or 2 small people. Diewert is very kind and helpful.
Room with new bathroom on houseboat outside Amsterdam.  Short walk to greocery store and a couple tram/bus stops so easy to get anywhere.
Fantastic place, Diewert was very friendly and gave some fantastic recommendations!
Very nice place. Tidy room. Quiet area. Beautiful landscapes. Near bus stop and metro and centrum.

Modern bathroom, perfectly clean space, with air conditioner, heater, and mini fridge. The garden is totally magical and includes an outdoor couch which was a great place to hang out. Great neighborhood and really close to everything in town, especially by bicycle. Note that this is a bedroom and bathroom with its own entrance and you will not have access to the rest of the houseboat- no living room or patio on the canal. Host is very responsive, we had such a great time staying here! Fulfilled a lifelong dream of mine to stay in a houseboat in Amsterdam! Thank you!!
Diewert and his wife were very kind, shared tips about the city and answered quickly. A cozy garden and houseboat close to the neighbourhoods we liked the most.
Easy access. Comfortable and quiet  space. Very clean.

Our stay was wonderful and relaxing. We used public transportation and it was only a short walk to our stop. Our bed was comfortable and I loved having a refrigerator in our room. The cute and quaint patio was perfect for unwinding after a day of seeing the sites! I would highly recommend staying here again.
we were very happy with Diewerts place, easy to find, easy to get into the centre from, nice area, clean room, happy with everything
Beautiful location on the river and close to the town centre  by walking. The room is secure and Diewert is a friendly and helpful host who responds quickly to any questions.
Solid place to sleep - no access to common areas and bit cramped on space, so heads up.
Lovely room, great location!
We had a lovely stay at Diewert's place, the accommodation was very modern, clean and well equipped. Ideal for a short stay in Amsterdam. Quiet location not too far from the centre.
We had a very pleasant stay at Diewert’s Airbnb. They were very warm and helpful hosts and would 100% recommend them to friends.

Pros: Location, owner’s hospitality, cleanliness, and you get to sleep on a boat.

Cons: This property is managed by Bnbmanager like many AirBnB’s in Amsterdam and I had a terrible experience with them. My check-in was at 8pm and I didn’t get into the place until 11:30pm. Not responsive, terrible communication. Wish the owner would handle the management of this room, it would be a much better experience.
Great place to stay in Amsterdam
Great location, clean, and hosts are nice.
This canal home is in a great location. Very peaceful and very clean.

We had a lovely time at the boat house, off a pretty street, nice and quiet and easily accessible for central Amsterdam.
Spotlessly clean and private.
Was hoping for a better view riverside.
A few more finishing touches such as milk for tea and larger tea cups etc.
Overall a lovely experience.
Great place to stay
Place was really clean and shiny. Great place to stay for Quick and even longer Amsterdam stay🙂!
Great location and very clean.

Die Unterkunft ist sehr zentral gelegen. Für zwei Personen ist die Wohnung vollkommen ausreichend. Alles ist sehr sauber.  Der Gastgeber wohnt unten im Hausboot und ist jederzeit erreichbar. Man ist in wenigen Gehminuten in der Innenstadt. Ob Shopping, einkaufen.....mit Fahrrad,  Bahn, zu Fuss ist alles sehr leicht und schnell erreichen. Amsterdam ist voll mit wunderschönen kleinen Cafés und Restaurants, Shoppingmöglichkeiten gibt es ohne Ende! Eine Grachtentour/Bustour ist sehr zu empfehlen. Es findet jeden Tag irgendwo ein Markt oder Flohmarkt statt. Man bräuchte Wochen um alles zu sehen......ich kann es wirklich nur weiter empfehlen.

Lovely flat on the second floor of a houseboat. Separate entrance is nice. Location-wise, plan to borrow the bikes for their fee. It’s so nice to be able to bike around the city to see more in a day than walking.
Very convenient location!
Cute room, and we enjoyed our stay. The room is smaller than the pictures make it look. Additionally, it seems that there is housekeeping with this room.
Small, very clean, in centre and close to everything
Saubere , zentrale Unterkunft.
Nice and clean place. Would’ve been better if the owner listed out exactly how the canal would be. It’s just a wall with a canal.

Diewert is a great host. Very nice and probably our favorite host we’ve had. The room is nice and it’s cool that it sits on a boat in the canal. Diewert has a great set up and you get a feel for what it’s like to live in Amsterdam. The location is a quick walk to a lot of great spots we liked it a lot. Highly recommended for couple or individuals.
Clean space close to market made our trip very nice

The most comfortable bed & lovely & clean place.
We asked for mugs, cutlery, plates & bowls as there wasn’t any & they were there for us when we got back 😊

Superbe petit logement pour un week-end ! 30 min à pieds du centre ville mais accès en tram. Vous pouvez vous garer sur place à 6€ l’heure et c’est gratuit le dimanche de 12h à 00h. Juste faire attention à la petite fenêtre de la salle de bain qui est partiellement filmée, elle donne sur l’extérieur face à la douche. C’était très propre avec une jolie décoration, on s’y sent bien. Avec les beaux jours, on pourrait profiter de la jolie terrasse enluminée. Diewart est un hôte très agréable avec qui nous avons correspondu facilement. Le rapport qualité prix est très bon, tant sur l’originalité du lieu, sa propreté, son agencement. L’emplacement est un peu excentré, ce qui ne nous a posé aucun problème car nous marchons beaucoup mais c’est une information a connaître. La literie est bonne, hygiène de douche à dispo, serviettes également. Super logement atypique, on vous le conseille !

It's a really nice place to stay with beautiful canal view.The place is close to the City center 10-15mins by bus.
Neatly kept well maintained property.
Would recommend this place to anyone who likes a quite place with a view. Thanks Diewert
Un point de chute sympa, dans un quartier calme, proche du centre et des musées en transports en commun.

We were very comfortable staying at Diewert's houseboat. It is a nice sized room with a modern bathroom, queen bed (hard to find in many places at a reasonable price!) on the second floor of their home with a separate entrance, so there are stairs outside to get to the room. You can hear the water in the canal at night and the parakeets outside in the morning. Very serene and quiet, albeit a little further out from the city center, but close enough to public transport.  We enjoyed meeting Diewert and would definitely stay at his home again.
Le logement était super! Propre et bien situé. Je recommande!

This was our first time using AirBnB, and frankly we couldn't have been more pleased.
Margot was a great host, welcomed us with wine, food for breakfast and of course a variety of information on Amsterdam.
The apartment is very comfortable, location is great.
I would definitely recommend this to anyone planning on visiting Amsterdam.

Thank you Margot again!,

Regards,

D

Margot's flat was perfect.  It made for a great home base in Amsterdam.   The flat was very clean, modern and Margot was so generous to provide breakfast items (cheese, meat, juice, milk) for our stay.  I would recommend this flat to our friends and family without a doubt and will look to stay here in our future trips.  The flat has a private entry, is well furnished and is close to the city center and train station.
Brilliant location, lovely apartment.  Very clean and tidy with a well stocked fridge for breakfasts in the morning.  Our own entrance so we could come and go as we like.  Would highly recommend!

I suggest to everyone margot. She's a great host and she's very kind. The apartment is beautiful, clean and you'll never find a better place in Amsterdam.

Suggerisco a chiunque Margot! E' davvero una belissima persona e soprattuto gentile. L'appartamento è stupendo, pulitissimo e non potete trovare un posto migliore in tutta Amsterdam.
Per colazione poi Margot ha curato ogni dettaglio: frutta, pane, marmellata, formaggio...e vino!

This is really the perfect Airbnb experience - a flat right in the centre of the town that feels like staying with a friend. Margot is a wonderfully hospitable host who thinks of everything including fresh flowers and candles. Couldn't recommend it more highly.

Was a great stay in a perfect location. Close to the centre and redlight, but still quiet.

The flat is perfectly equipped and Margot even supplied food and coffee. It is very clean as well.

Margot’s Studio is great. Very well located, within a walking distance from the main attractions in Amsterdam, but in a very quiet area. When we arrived Margot had left a lot of food (including local) that we used during our stay for breakfast (and quite a breakfast!). The studio is equipped with everything so that you can prepare your meals.
The communication with Margot was perfect. She gave us all the details to get to the studio from the station. The check-in was very good, she explained us all about the studio and left us some maps and recommended places to see. Margot is very nice and kind. We hope we can stay in Margot’s studio next time we are in Amsterdam.

Hoewel we gewoon in Amsterdam wonen, is dat sinds een paar jaar niet meer in hartje binnenstad. We wilden weer even een weekendje binnenstad, zonder kinderen, net als vroeger en dat is gelukt! Een heerlijk appartement op een ideale lokatie. Brandschoon, perfect formaat en van alle gemakken voorzien. Ik zou het iedereen aanraden hier te gaan logeren als je een echt Amsterdamgevoel wil krijgen.

studio idéal pour deux personnes, dans un quartier calme a deux pas de l'hyper centre d'Amsterdam. décorer avec gout. le petit déjeuner et très copieux, fruits et fleures sont au rendez vous.
Nous n'avons pas eu la chance de rencontrer Margot qui était en voyage mais on fils Joris a était très accueillant. nous y retournerons avec plaisirs

Margot was an amazing host. She was very welcoming and had lots of information read for us to get to know the area. The apartment is well situated and was very close to all the local tourist areas. The apartment was super functional. Margot leaves you some things to enjoy for breakfast. Overall my experience was amazing! I would highly recommend to anyone interested in staying.

Margot's place is really beautiful. It's very big with a great bathroom and kitchen area, everything is modern and clean. But the location is even better! Very central and you have a picturesque canal on your doorstep. Stay here!

Merci à Margot pour son accueil et ses bons conseils.
Nous avons passé un très agréable séjour, l'appartement est très bien situé pour découvrir Amsterdam le temps d'un week end.

If you like to stay in a clean, cozy and artistic place, then go to Margot's BB. She is very helpful and has so many books and guides not to miss anything in the City. Rent a bike and feel like another Amsterdammer getting lost all over the channels.
The best corner in Central Amsterdammmmm!

This comfortable ground floor apartment is perfectly located to explore Amsterdam. The location close to the Central Station is very convenient, yet it far enough from the station to be in a lovely area. Margot was so kind and obliging; my long-haul flight arrived early in the morning and she was happy for me to check in straight away rather than the 4pm specified on the website (with no extra charge). She had filled the fridge with provisions for breakfast which were more than I needed for my 5 days, had fresh fruit and a bottle of organic wine on the table, and a vase of fresh flowers in the living area. It really did feel like coming home each night. I would definitely stay here again.

We stayed in Margot's aparment for a week. It was nice and clean as expected. Location was also great, we could visit most of Amsterdam by foot from it. Also Margot was a great host and she made us feel like at home.

Very convenient location, on a quiet corner, lovely canal out front, yet close to some very nice neighborhood eats , (including Cafe Gerrit van Beeren, and Il Sogno, and in den Waag cafe )
Minutes to the trams and therefore ...everthing !
Margot is a lovely, thoughtful host - food ,drinks and snacks to get you started. If we can get back to Amsterdam we wouldn't look for any other place to stay .

Margot's apartment is very well situated to explore the delights of Amsterdam. It is very comfortable and the breakfast items & Dutch treats that she supplies were fantastic & tasty.
We totally enjoyed our stay in this clean & comfortable apartment.

We could not have asked for a better, more convenient place to stay in Amsterdam! It was perfectly located, incredibly clean, and full of wonderful details! From a fridge full of essentials, to fresh flowers, to a wonderful bottle of wine - Margot really prides herself in her B & B! Furthermore, she is genuinely sweet and concerned with making sure your experience is a positive one, in a wonderfully friendly and unobtrusive way! We loved our stay in Amsterdam, and would recommend the cozy studio to anyone!

Margot's apartment was ideal. Perfectly kept in a great location, we had a great stay. Our only regret is that we coundn't spend more time. Margot was very helpful and kind enough to leave our fridge stocked full of breakfast provisions! A great host i would reccomend Margot's apartment to anyone!

We just had an overnight connection in Amsterdam and Margot's place was perfect.  Easy to get to from the airport/train station on foot, right in the middle of everything, very comfortable, clean, and equipped with books, magazines, music, kitchen equipement, food for breakfast, info...anything we could have asked for.  Margot was a very considerate host, even leaving extra treats and a bottle of wine (which unfortunately we don't drink, but THANK YOU!)  We will definitely be back.

My husband and I stayed at Margot's B&B for two night and could not have been happier with the experience. The location is amazing, a short walk from the train station and located on a quiet canal street. The bed, linen, and pillows are super comfortable and the shower is nice and hot with good water pressure. Margot had a great variety of food for breakfast and even left a bottle of wine for us to drink. Her son, Joris, let us into the apartment early in the day while Margot was at work and we were so thankful to be able to drop off our bags and start sight-seeing. I cannot recommend Margot's B&B enough! We will definitely stay again on a future visit to Amsterdam!

Exceeded every expectation we had. Ground floor in a good neighborhood ten minute walk from the Central Station. Very good sized for Amsterdam with a really nice, incredibly stocked kitchen that had eggs, cheese, meats, wine and other delicacies waiting for us. Also it was stocked with all the cooking utensils imaginable. Our kitchen at home is not that well stocked...The thoughtfulness that went into the apartment was extraordinary.
Margot was wonderful, a warm host in every way.
You would be lucky to get this apartment and we will certainly book again if we return.
The only complaint I have seems to be a Dutch tradition of having two small beds placed together rather than large beds for two. Not very romantic. I wish there was some way to lock the beds together so snugglers did not fall into the crack. We ended up staying an extra night at a hotel and that was the situation there too.
It was the nicest rental I have ever had and I am now up to 59 countries.

I had a great time at margots place. she is a lovely host and cares about everything in detail. very cosy and clean place in the middle of the center. trustfull contact, hope to see u again :) regards, franzi!

we had a great time at B&B Mondriaan, great location right in the center. the appartment is very nice, including a great breakfast, modern style with own entrance for full privacy. we enjoyed the appartment and Margot's hospitality a lot and will definitely come back on our next visit!

Even after a few stays through AirB&B, I'm still skeptical about it all, but really with a place like this, there is no reason to be.

Margot's place is wonderful and I would highly recommend. It is very centrally located (we never took public transport throughout the weekend) but it is located on a quiet residential street - best of both sides really. The apartment is clean, nicely decorated and very homey. We really appreaciated Margot's flexibility to check us in early and check out late, and of course the delicious snacks she included!

Would absolutely stay again - and would recommend others too!

Jan Willem's flat in Amsterdam is FANTASTIC! First, he is extremely organized so you will get excellent instructions on arriving at the flat, restaurants, and any other tips you require. This was my first Air BnB experience and I am so grateful it went well. Don't worry about a thing because if you plan something with Jan Willem, it is a done deal. Very easy to communicate with and truly wonderful host. I can't say enough about this flat and the city of Amsterdam. First visit there and it was great, everyone speaks English and are very polite and driven society. Hoping you have as good a time as we did. Cheers!
Everything was just GREAT! Location, apartment and the host himself! Highly recommended!

This was our first experience using Airbnb so I must say we had a wonderful time in Amsterdam and were very fortunate to stay at Jan Willem's place! The apartment is perfect, good location, with a lovely view, even better than in the pictures. Everything was very neat and organized and, although sadly we haven't met in person, from our e-mail communication alone I can tell Jan Willem is a really nice person.

Completely recommend this place and we would surely stay there again next time!

Best regards,
Victor and Roberta.

We had an ideal time staying in this Amsterdam loft apartment.  The apartment had everything we needed.  The location was perfect and Jan Willem's restaurant recommendations were spot on!  Every meal out was incredibly delicious.  On a trip to Amsterdam there is no place better to stay!
UN Accueil fantastique par Margot et ses enfants ... Des personnes sympa et arrangeantes ...

Awesome stay at Margot's place !! So well located and cute flat. The breakfast and the baby bed were more than welcome. If you're looking for a nice place to stay in Amsterdam, we warmly recommend Margot's place. Teddy, Constance & Achille

We stayed at Margot's place for one night and it was all perfect! The appartment is large and cosy, well equipped. Margot left us a variety of tasty products for breakfast/lunch. The appartment is in a few minute walking distance from the central station and main sightseeings in old town, in the same time the area is very quiet. I will definately choose Margot's appartment once again when visiting Amsterdam the next time.

We had a wonderful stay at B & B Mondriaan Amsterdam. The apartment is locally very central but also very quiet. Everything in Amsterdam is easily within reach.
The service from Margot and her family was outstanding. There was everything you could ask for. Big breakfast and Internet.
I warmly recommend to anyone going to Amsterdam.

I really want to thank Margot for her warm welcome. We arrived late in the evening at 10 pm and she was waiting for us. The apartment is very well located.
We had a wonderful breakfast. The room, the bathroom and the kitchen are clean.
I clearly recommend it.

Margot is awesome! She is such a great host and made sure we felt at home. It is on a sleepy canal street but very close to all of the action.  She had treats and a fridge full of essentials waiting for us.  We loved it so much we are coming back to stay again in 3 months.

Nous avons passé un magnifique séjour dans le studio de Margot qui correspond en tous points au descriptif de l'annonce. Il est idéalement situé et très bien équipé, très propre, très calme et très lumineux. Margot est une hôte charmante, disponible et arrangeante qui maîtrise parfaitement la langue de Molière ce qui est un plus pour la bonne compréhension des rites et coutumes locaux!
Nous retournons avec plaisir chez Margot et recommandons cette adresse aux voyageurs Airbnb ainsi qu'à nos amis.

Margot is a fabulous host, her place is lovely, comfortable and an absolute joy to stay in.  And, the location couldn't be more ideal.  It's hard to believe you could find a better room, a more accommodating host or a more convenient location.  Stay here if it's available!

merci encore a margot pour sa gentillesse.Appartement parfait propre jolie agreable la literie est merveilleuse j ai rarement eu un lit aussi confortable seul bemol les lits sont 2 lits simples accoles pour faire un grand lit Petit dej parfait fleurs fraiches vu sur le canal quartier en plein centre mais calme SUPERRRRR

Margot nous a accueilli remarquablement. Elle est présente si besoin, et ne demande qu'à communiquer. Son appartement est très agréable et très bien équipé, très propre, et Margot a pris soin de nous donner très largement de la nourriture pour nos petits déjeuners. Vraiment, on peut y aller les yeux fermés, à recommander à tous, et à tous âges. Un petit plus, son français est excellent !!!
Merci encore Margot, nous reviendrons avec plaisir vous voir, et vous enverrons nos amis s'ils souhaitent visiter Amsterdam.

Bonjour,
nous vous recommandons fortement ce joli petit studio en bord de canal..non seulement il est très bien situé mais nous avons été aussi très bien accueilli par (Website hidden by Airbnb) la documentation aux petits détails qui font ces petits +..où l'on se sent plus vite chez soi !
Sans compter que Margot est très accueillante !

Me and my girlfriend had 2 days in Amsterdam at B&B Mondriaan, the apartament was very clean and confortable and well positioned moreover Margot was very helpfull with us. The place is simple to reach from the central station.
Good price/quality ratio!!!!

Margot's apartment is wonderful - spacious, comfortable and with everything you need.  The breakfast was a very nice touch.  It was just perfect for a 3 night stay in the centre of Amsterdam (everything is within walking distance from the apartment).  The next time I come to Amsterdam I hope I can stay here again!

Our stay at Margot's flat was really great.
From the very beginning Margot has been very quick to answer our messages. It is easy to walk from Amsterdam Centraal station to the apartment and since Margot lives upstairs it was very convenient to get the keys and give them back at the end.
The place itself is located in a quiet and charming street along a canal, at walking distance to the Red Light District.
Inside, the kitchen and the bathroom are brand new. It is very clean and well decorated with a personal touch: fresh flowers, candles, Easter chocolates... so quickly feel at home.
We truly appreciated the fact that Margot had prepared everything for the breakfast : eggs, fresh bread, tea and butter, milk etc. in the fridge.
The place is spacious : we spent 3 nights, and as a couple we've never felt squeezed.
We highly recommend Margot's flat and would not hesitate to go back if we have the opportunity.

Margot was an amazing host and accommodated our last minute plans to visit Amsterdam with her prompt communication. Being personally interested in design, it was her modernist style apartment and furniture that originally attracted me to her advertisement on air bnb however, upon arrival I was even more impressed by the location and setting of her converted ground floor apartment along a canal in central Amsterdam which offers a very quaint and local feel to your stay.
My sister and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam and this was largely due to our encounter with Margot who was friendly and helpful offering us numerous tips on local design spots to visit.
A generously stocked kitchen was another unexpected bonus that makes Margot's apartment such a great place to stay in and one I would happily recommend to all.

My daughter and I spent a lovely weekend in a sunny Amsterdam. Margot was very helpful and gave us advise as to the best places to go.  This was a haven of peace to stay in after busy days exploring the city.  Would definately go back.  many thanks

Adresse idéale,surtout pour ceux qui arrivent á " Amsterdam Centraal Station" car
à 10 mn á pieds et très facile á trouver dans un quartier calme du centre ville.
L'appt est très bien aménagé , lits confortables,coin cuisine bien équipé,et salle de bain avec douche de plein pied, tous les critères parfaits pour visiter Amsterdam confortablement.
Margot est très accueillante
et très arrangeante avec les horaires du check in /out.

Studio très agréable et idéalement situé au coeur d'Amsterdam. Petit déjeuner bien copieux, idéal pour attaquer une grande journée de ballade le long des canaux et un très bon accueil pour ne rien gâcher.

Gezellige, zeer nette complete studio. Goede prijs kwaliteit verhouding.
Margot is erg aardig en zeer behulpzaam. Locatie is prefect. Rustig en toch maar 5 minuten lopen van de Nieuwmarkt.

Margot's ground floor studio apartment is in the perfect location- close to everything but very quiet. The furniture and fittings are modern and stylish and the wifi is fast. Margot is the perfect hostess- generous in every way. She seems to know exactly what your needs are and has them covered or makes brilliant suggestions. Thank you Margot!

B & B Mondriaan suited the two of us very well for our two night stay and we would have liked to stay for longer. The flat is clean and well equipped with modern furniture and fittings. Margot was there to welcome us (she lives up above) and was very friendly. There were fresh fruit and flowers on the table. The flat is close to the city centre but away from the crowds and overlooks a quiet canal. We dropped off our luggage then drove to the 'Park & Ride', about 15 minutes away and a tram ride back, to leave the car. Parking in the centre is expensive. We could walk to most places within half an hour or less. Watch out for the bicycles! Thanks Margot!
L'appartamento è bello e pulito. Margot è una persona molto accogliente e gentile. La  colazione era ottima e abbondante. Sicuramente prenoteremo questo alloggio in futuro. Lo raccomaniamo vivamente.

Diewert was so lovely and his house boat is just precious! It was so much fun getting to stay on the boat and feel like a local. The location was very convenient and the space was spotless and very nice! Definitely recommend staying here! You don’t be disappointed.

Clean cosy modern. Small
Space but really good location and has everything you could need. The house boat is situated on the canal and is a really beautiful part of Amsterdam. Highly recommend for something a little different.
Great location on a very pretty houseboat

Overall satisfied, a small room sufficient for 2 persons. A little dissapointment with the windows view to a big wall. Daily room cleaning even with long stay. Room is on the second floor accessible by staircase only, be careful if you have large baggage. Nearest public transport is a bus station. Would need to walk further away for a tram station. Bed provided are in twin beds joined together.

God service.
Gode tips.
Punktlighet og hjelpsomhet.
Lån sykklene det er verdt det!

Very clean and modern room. Very comfortable for two people. It is a 30ish minute walk from Centraal station which makes it an easy walk from most anything but comfortably separated from the tourist hordes. Luggage storage preceding check-in was available for 5€ per bag at the property manager's office about 10 minutes walk from the houseboat. Diewert was a great host and was very responsive with our few questions.

Ceci était notre premier séjour à Amsterdam.
Très bel appartement, bien situé, on peut tout faire à pieds!
Bon accueil, voisinage extrêmement agréable.
Nous avons passé une semaine parfaite et très relaxante.

What a nice experience for out first visit to Amsterdam.
Very nice apartment, good location, you can do everything on foot!
Welcome, extremely pleasant neighborhood.
We spent a perfect week and very relaxing.

Thank you again!

Quiet neighborhood, great host. The house was amazingly confortable, furnished, complete, a perfect stay, the host provided us with every small detail that made us feel at home. I could spend 400 words to describe everything in details, however I can summarize I've never dealt with someone as careful and detail-focused as Jan. The experience he provided us was unvaluable.

A great apartment so convenient to all the Museums and Jan does a great job in supplying a folder of relevant information and recommendations for everything from dining to how much Taxi to airport would cost. I highly recommend both Jan and this apartment if you want a home from home in Amsterdam.

Beautiful apartment, cozy and clean, with a nice little balcony with great view. It has everything you need! Located in a great area, few minutes walk from leidsplein and rembrantsplein. jan- great host, kind and hospitable
We loved Amsterdam and if we go back to the city, we would like to stay again in jan appartment. We still have wonderful memories about the week in Amsterdam and this apartment. Thank you so much!

Unser Aufenthalt war in allen Aspekten perfekt. Das Appartment entsprach vollständig der Beschreibung. Hervorzuheben sind die hilfreichen Tips, die netten und hilfsbereiten Nachbarn und die ideale Lage des Appartments. Gerne werden wir wiederkommen.

Все было просто великолепно! Хозяева очень доброжелательные, все организовано с умом и большим вкусом. Расположение квартиры нам очень понравилось - магазины, остановки транспорта - все рядом, ночью очень спокойно, кровать супер комфортабельная. Везде чисто. Хозяев мы не встретили, но связь с ними через почту быстрая. Кухня оборудована прекрасно, все приборы работают, очень удобно, что есть стиральная машинка. Наличие лифта - это привилегия в Амстердаме. Очень хорошие соседи, которые нам много помогали. Большое спасибо хозяевам за все, и тоже за бутылку вина и еду, которую они оставили для нас!
Very nice location and cosy apartment. Very clean and comfortable. Thanks to super host Jan and the helpful neighbour we had a great short break in Amsterdam.

We stayed in Jan Willems apartments in February for 10 nights.
That was one of the best places we ever stayed through airbnb. it is really spacious, with an excellent layout. Everything is modern and clean. location and transportation is perfect. In addition there is a lift in the house, which is a tremendous advantage compared to the majority of other places with the steep and narrow stairs.

enjoyed every minute there and very much recommend it

Minha esposa e eu ficamos por 30 dias no flat do Jan, um verdadeiro super host! A comunicação com Jan foi sempre clara e objetiva.
A escolha não poderia ter sido melhor! Adoramos. Difícil foi partir! Amsterdam fica ainda mais interessante e charmosa vista das grandes janelas do Bright Loft.
O flat é muito confortável e totalmente equipado. Tem tudo que você precisa funcionando perfeitamente. A internet é veloz e nunca, eu disse nunca, nem mesmo por um minuto, notamos interrupção no serviço. Tem uma mesa ótima para trabalhar e isso era importante pra mim.
A vista da cidade é incrível. Só isso já vale a escolha, acredite... é mágico.
Mas não é só isso... A localização é perfeita. Você está perto de tudo, inclusive do De Pijp, um bairro perfeito para explorar. Inclusive de noite.
Apesar de estar perto de tudo o local é silencioso.
Transporte? Pode escolher. Há todas as opção aos seus pés! Tram, taxi, e barco. O Tram #4 será seu amigo.
A maravilhosa rede de Supermercado Albert Heijn tem uma loja distante apenas 5 minutos de caminhada do flat.
O pacote ainda vem com vizinhos amáveis, simpáticos e prestativos.
Tem ainda o Café Kale com o autógrafo do Mick Jagger na parede e funcionários sorridentes, o que não é lá muito comum em Amsterdam.
Poderia sim, escrever muito mais! A escolha deste local foi determinante na grande experiência de viagem que tivemos, porém, é melhor parar por aqui. Se não, você acaba perdendo a reserva lendo um texto muito longo como este...

We stayed at Jan's place for 7 nights. The place is lovely, clean and spacious. Perfect location, just close to everywhere and walking distance to Heineken Museum.

We didn't meet Jan in person, but everything was well organised and Jan had been very informative and taking care of us to make sure we were doing fine, that's very sweet! I am also impressed with a very handy and detailed house manual.

I had great time staying at Jan's place as well as Amsterdam. I love every bit of this apartment and highly recommend to anyone who is going to Amsterdam!

Everything was great - we loved both the apartment and the neighborhood! The apartment could hardly be more comfortable- everything is there for you and it is furnished and put together quite beautifully. it is also a great location- quiet, safe, great local restaurants and still incredibly convenient to all the major sights. These guys are wonderful hosts!

We enjoyed our stay.  The loft's location is within walking distance to museums, restaurants and canal bus stops.  The loft is light and spacious.  The kitchen has everything needed to cook breakfast and quick dinner.  We liked the Expresso coffee maker and availability of the washer to do our laundry.  We didn't meet Jan-Willem but he left a bottle of wine on the table to welcome us.  His neighbor Leo was very nice and accommodating when we had to check in late in the evening.

Jan-Willem’s apartment in de Pijp, provided a wonderful home base from which to explore Amsterdam.  Large windows overlooking the city provide breathtaking sunset views and his home is beautiful, inviting, and comfortable. The balcony proved a peaceful spot for enjoying morning coffee. Jan-Willem is a wonderful host who provided us with all the amenities needed to make our stay terrific, including wine, snacks, coffee and tea, maps, city information and even bicycles.   He went out of his way to help us feel at home.  We will surely stay at Jan-Willem’s when we next visit Amsterdam!

Excellent value, great location, friendly host and beautiful apartment. What more could you ask for!
We spent 10 days in Amsterdam and Jan-Willem’s home made our trip even more pleasant. The apartment is strategically located and within walking distance to most of the tourist attractions. Albert Cuyp Market was our daily stop for breakfast. It was winter in Amsterdam during our trip but Jan-Willems’s apartment kept us cozy and warm.
Jan-Willem’s apartment is very well decorated and has all the facilities we needed. It's evident how much thought he has put in his apartment to make his guests comfortable.
Overall truly a great apartment. If it's within your budget, there is no reason to think twice. Thanks again Jan-Willem for your awesome apartment.
Great place in a nice location. All amenities and the style of the apartment truly make you feel at home. We stayed for a week and found everything terrific. Highly recommended!

I would like to thank JW for the hospitality and the amazing apartment !!! The apartment is large, clean and furnished .. just bring clothes and enjoy the vacation. The location of the apartment in the city center and transportation is very close, there is a super market right in front of the apartment, restaurants, shopping and more. I certainly enjoyed it and will probably return !!!!! Thanks JW

Jan-Willem's place is a palace in the sky. The views were incredible and the amenities were lovely. Not only did he provide detailed instructions on how to use the foreign appliances but also listed out all the best restaurants, museums and hot spots around town. 5 stars. Would love to return!

By far the best Airbnb we've ever stayed in in Amsterdam - and we've stayed in many. The flat itself is fantastic. A large, open, very light living room with huge windows revealing wonderful sky-scapes. Very quiet.  Great amenities. Everything you could want in the kitchen. Large TV with Netflix. Good Wifi. All of this in a stylish, high-end interior; but best of all, the flat has a very welcoming, homely feeling. It's just a great place to hang out and feel at home. There is also a lift - very unusual in Amsterdam. Pleasant, helpful neighbours. Great communication with Jan Willem. The location is brilliant - on the edge of the Pijp with countless eateries and cafes and within walking distance of the major museums, Leidseplein etc, although public transport connections are also very good.

My fiancé and I stayed here while bringing in the New Year in Amsterdam. The location was central – we could walk to markets, shopping, restaurants, museums, etc. Getting an Uber was quick and easy. We could get to many local hot spots in a matter of 10-15 minutes. The apartment is located just off a canal. It was very romantic!

The entire experience from booking the apartment, the months leading up to our stay, and our arrival/departure were seamless because of the extent to which our host went to provide an exceptional experience.

The apartment was the perfect getaway! From the moment we booked in October, our host, Jan-Willem, was incredibly involved, responsive, and had amazing etiquette and follow through. He made sure all our questions were answered and went above and beyond to give us tips and recommendations on what to do; he even provided websites and material on different events/places we could attend for the NYE festivities. We were sent instructions on how to use appliances and other tips and tricks in a very detailed manual for the apartment. It included everything! From things to do, restaurants, what to watch out for, etc. Jan-Willem’s neighbor, Leo, greeted us upon arrival, gave us the key, showed us around, told us what was in the area, and said he was available for any questions should we have them. He was so nice!

The inside of the apartment was trendy, Feng Shui, spotless and everything had its place! The pictures don’t even capture the unique essence of this apartment. Every detail from the decorations, to the organization, the design/lay-out, the cleanliness, the fresh sheets and towels, the appliances including washer/dryer – they even provided a bottle of red wine, the most delicious caramel cookie wafers, and some salty treats to welcome us! Honestly, it was perfect!

I highly recommend this place and if in Amsterdam again, I will definitely find my way back here again! Thanks for an incredible experience!

Jan-Willem was a great host. He was very helpful and friendly! The communication in advance was very uncomplicated and he provided us a manual with all important information.
As we arrived, he welcomed us and showed us everything and answered all our questions. The apartment itself was perfect. It offers a lot of space and a great view. In addition to that it was clean and central.
During our day in Amsterdam we really felt at home, therefore many thanks for this experience!
Fantastic host and place!

Great location!
Great apartment & hospitality!
Highly recommended!
Beautiful apartment close to the Heineken experience. Great location, super clean and lots of helpful info in the guide book! Thank you Jan Willem, we definitely recommend.
Great location. Great host.
Top, accueil parfait!

Jan’s place was perfect. Jan greeted us at his place. Went over a few things regarding the house and Amsterdam.  washer and dryer were a nice perk!!Jan’s place is exactly as shown on AirBnB. Very convenient to everything. Waking distance to many of Amsterdams attractions, museums, Shops, Restaurants and what became our favorite coffee shop, Katsu. Really kool market less than 10min Walk on the other side of the canal.

The apartment was really well located, 10/15 minutes from quality restaurants, cafes and coffee shops. There was a Lidl and Dutch supermarket just round the corner. Jan-Willem was a great host and very professionally organised, with a house manual containing all information for the house as well as suggestions for nearby food and drink on hand. The apartment was truly beautiful, with a great view of the city from the lounge area and a nice roof-top view from the terrace. The house had all coffee, tea, washing machine, tumble dryer, hair dryer and dishwasher amenities etc. There was strong WiFi and Netflix and amazon prime on the smart tv in the lounge. We absolutely loved our stay here and would highly recommend to all!

Jan willem’s place was great during our stay in February. Our family of three was visiting for business and found location was great with all amenities and a vibrant center close by. The house is fully equipped for anything a short or long term traveler might need as its someone’s house and not a company running Airbnb apartments. So you get a stylish,centrally located all inclusive heaven for your trip. Won our hearts and will be visiting again 🙂

Great host, great appartment. Very central located.
We definetly do recommend Jan-Willem and his appartment.
Great apartment, awesome host and a wonderful location. The place is also very much remote work friendly. Highly recommended!

great place, very close to a happening area but also quiet and calm. has an elevator which is quite rare! the place is on the 5th floor with amazing windows that keep the appartment well lit. Jan also left some great reading material to guide us and was very supportive.

The place is in the best location. I stayed during a lockdown and it was the best possible place, it has a little balcony for morning coffee, big windows to see the city, comfortable furniture, biiig living room and kitchen with all essentials and more! The flat is right by the canal across a supermarket and next to a gym. It’s less than 5 min from a station with trams and buses, it’s got an elevator and not to mention that the host checked in to see how I was, especially during covid times, it was a wonderful stay.

I can't say enough good things about my stay here at Jan-Willem's place!

First off, the apartment is lovely and very well thought out. The large windows catch a lot of sunlight throughout the day, and the patio off the kitchen is a great place to sip some coffee or tea in the morning light. I often found myself staring out the windows across old Amsterdam rooftops and into that trademark Netherlands sky that seems to stretch on and on across the flat landscape.

I did some remote work here during my stay and the setup was perfect, with a nice desk and chair, high-speed internet, and lots of outlets. The bathroom and shower felt new, clean with good water pressure. The bed was comfy and the kitchen had everything I needed to cook a solid meal.

The location is prime, on the border of the De Pijp neighborhood and the city center, both within walking distance. A daily outdoor market was right across the canal to De Pijp, and Cafe Kale was a great spot to get a drink and a bite.

Count yourself lucky if you've stumbled across this gem of a place. I felt so at home here I didn't want to leave :) Thanks Jan-Willem, I hope to return some day!

All are advantages to choosing to travel to Amsterdam!

Nothing better than staying in this house so centrally! Just around the corner you will find the tram. Either 16 or 24 lines will leave you in the Dam or meet you at central station! Although if you want to get the maximum just have to walk down any of its streets and soak up its traditions.

Meet The Flower Market, will spend the canals where you will find the Boat House (very original), many Coffeshop and will know the narrow and busy streets of the Barrio Rojo.Muchos museums to choose, my favorite house of Anne Frank, a penalty have been only two days.

Cornelia is very friendly and always has been concerned about our comfort, a charming woman!
We prepared a little guide with very good instructions!
So if the next time points where is the w.c. to find it cost us, we think that did not correspond to your home, an adventure!

I do not think about it and if I have to repeat (I hope within a few years old) it would return to the same place but with less baggage if carefully with the stairs ... lol typical in any city building to which the Spanish are not used.

Cornelie thank you very much for everything, we have been at home.
Fabulous place in a peaceful yet convenient location.

Stayed at Diewerts place for 3 nights with a friend, thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The Airbnb is located at a nice distance from the main centre without being too far, only a tram ride or 2 away. Diewert is quick to respond to any queries and offers a nice arraignment of recommendations.
Good appartment / good location near to the center / very quite room I recommande
Nice and quiet place. There are Canal Views, but also there is a big wall next to the canals. Don't expect the colorful houses like inside the city.
Had a lovely stay with a friend in Amsterdam. We were able to rent bikes from Diewart at a very good price and the apartment was well presented and comfortable!

Diewert and his family were really welcoming and always will to help. The room is perfect for couples looking for a few days away. The host recommended a bakery that everyone staying there needs to try ! Highly recommend this airbnb !

We stayed at Margot's suite for three nights. She was very accommodating as we arrived a little early. It was no problem. Also, she was able to store our luggage when we checked out so we could still walk around before we joined our bus tour. We really enjoyed our stay. The fridge was stocked with items for breakfast, the suite was very clean, and the bed was comfortable. The location was perfect! Just a short walk from Centraal Station and close to all the action of Amsterdam. Yet it was very quiet. It felt like a home away from home. Thank you Margot for a wonderful stay! We would love to come to Amsterdam and stay with you again.
Très bonne accueil de Margot. Endroit calme et très central. Appartement très complet. Déjeuner en suffisance. A recommander.

Apartamento muy recomendable para visitar Amsterdam, es muy centrico , muy limpio y Margot la anfitriona es muy (Website hidden by Airbnb) tuviese que volver a Amsterdam no me importaria nada volver a repetir.
Felicidades Margot por tu apartamento!!!!

Nice apartment in one of the more beautiful parts of town. Margot was an excellent host, quick in getting back to me and helpful with both check in and check out. I can definitely recommend this place!

We had a lovely stay in this beautiful apartment in Amsterdam. The apartment was so close to   everything and just the perfect place for our short stay after at a conference in Leiden. The breakfast goodies, eggs, cheese and more helped our day get started like we were home. Would stay at the same place next time in the Neatherlands This was the best place I have stayed so far.  The place was just lovely and wonderful to come back too after a Rainy day. We had plenty of food to make a nice dinner.
Another wonderful experience at Margot's.  The weather didn't cooperate for most of the time but we had a great time.  Definitely recommend staying at Margot's when you visit Amsterdam.

We stayed two nights in this B&B which is situated 10 minutes by foot from the central rail sation in Amsterdam. Despite its proximity to the town centre it is calm and peaceful. Margot met us at the door and immediately made us feel welcome. Initially there were to be just two of us but Margot kindly agreed to having our daughter join us in the apartment, sleeping on the convertible sofa.
The fridge was very well-stocked with food and drink for breakfast.
Thanks to Margot's advice we were able to find a nearby bike rental shop and explored Amsterdam on our bikes, which saved getting sore feet!
We had a great first time in Amsterdam and warmly recommend this apartment.
We had a great time in Margot's beautiful canal side flat. It was close to everything and came with a yummy breakfast in the fully stocked kitchen.

This is a wonderful studio - very clean, updated, comfy bed, nice shower, quiet, WiFi, easy kitchen to cook in, close to the train station. Goodies left in the 'frig for delicious breakfasts. We were so happy to spend our time in Amsterdam in Margot's place. Can't recommend it highly enough - if you can book this great spot, do it!

Great location, very convenient, 3-4 mins walk from city center. Margot is a great host, very helpful and attentive! Breakfast was very delicious, whatever u might wish (fruits, flakes, ham&cheese even wine!!). Room is very neat and cozy, very clean, right next to canal, u will definitely feel Amsterdam atmosphere in it. Apartment is definitely recommend!

Last week I spent a wonderful weekend wth my boyfriend in B&B Mondriaan.  Margot's house is in a pefect position, near the station and the main important place of interest in Amsterdam but in a very quiet street. Moreover, the accomodation is lovely, the brackfast abundant (with sweet and salty food) and Margot is a very kind host, she allow us to check in before and check out after the expected time.  I really reccomed this accomodation for a pleasent stay in Amsterdam!

We had a wonderful two nights in Margot's apartment. Situated on a picturesque street just a few minutes walk from the bustle and bars, it was a lovely peaceful spot to retreat to at the end of a busy day. The beds were really comfortable and the breakfast bits and coffee  were very much appreciated. It was lovely to have a space to ourselves and being left to get on and enjoy our holiday like it was a home from home. A great and reasonably priced place for anyone wanting a base in the heart of Amsterdam!

Le studio est idéalement situé au cœur d'Amsterdam, très propre et lumineux. Margot est charmante, elle nous a accueilli parfaitement.
Ce sont de petits détails qui augmentent le confort (petit déjeuner, wifi, documentations... ). Je recommande vivement.
Merci encore.

Le studio de Margot est situé dans le centre à moins de 10 minutes à pied de la gare.
Idéal pour visiter Amsterdam le temps d'un week-end.
Margot vous accueille y chaleureusement.
Vous vous y sentirez bien :-)
Outstanding place, wonderful treats for breakfast, and a gracious host.
Merci à Margot pour cet accueil chaleureux! L'appartement est idéalement situé (10-15 minutes de la gare centrale à pieds) dans un coin très calme d'Amsterdam. Il est parfait pour un couple!
Margot was an amazing host with a lovely studio right in the heart of Amsterdam. It was convenient and the beds were very comfortable. Everything you need for a stay in Amsterdam!

We really enjoyed our stay and wished it could have been longer! The location is great - very central, short walk from the train station, but on a quieter side street away from the most intense crowds. The apartment was spacious, clean, modern, and well provisioned, including multiple breakfast options and some Dutch goodies. In our brief chats with Margot and (I think) her son, both were very friendly and hospitable.

Margot was the perfect host. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in her cozy modern studio. It was spacious, clean, well-appointed, and on a quaint tree-lined road. Margot was there to greet us and filled the apartment with local snacks and a variety of breakfast items. She was so nice and helpful. We really can't recommend her enough. We would stay there again in a heartbeat!
Bel endroit, appart sympa. Proche de toutes commodités et pourtant si calme. Toutes les conditions sont réunis pour apprécier Amsterdam après une journée de visite.

My girlfriend and I absolutely loved staying the night at Margot's!

Location: We were only there for one night as we had a wedding to attend farther away from Amsterdam central but wanted to explore central for one night at least. Margot's place is very central!

Apartment: The apartment was very tidy and clean, including towels. Beds were quite comfortable and I truly felt we had everything available to us.

Overall: Margot was helpful in many ways!
- We were able to check in early
- She helped us to find bike rentals nearby
- Couple of Heineken's and petit-breakfast and bread/coffee available for us in the fridge
- Fast internet
- Held onto our luggage the next day so we could explore the city a little longer

If you're going to Amsterdam - don't pass this one up!

Mondriaan B&B is a great place to stay in Amsterdam. This is a quiet neighbourhood with a beautiful tree-lined canal. All the sights are very close by but you can leave the crowds behind when you get home. The weather was fantastic so Margot gave us some extra chairs so we could sit outside our front door, amongst the plant pots, in the sun.
The apartment itself is clean and well decorated, the bed is especially comfortable! Margot is a friendly hostess, we appreciated the fresh flowers. We especially liked the large and varied breakfast that was left for us, thanks again Margot!
We come to Amsterdam regularly and certainly would like to stay here again.

Margo's flat is really nice, very clean, also has extra touches like fresh flowers plus interesting guide & history books. She is a very accommodating host worked with our early arrival, let us bring our bags ahead of time. The breakfast foods were plentiful, we even had treats. The location is great too. We plan to stay there again in a couple of weeks. Super! Thanks Margot, Eric & Ilse

Nous avons été très bien accueillis par Margot qui a su être très arrangeante.
Diverses petites attentions (bouteille de vin, fruits, sucreries...) nous ont ravi à notre arrivée. Le petit déjeuné était très bon et en quantité.

Le studio est à deux pas de la gare et du centre tout en se trouvant au bord d'un canal dans une rue très calme. Il très bien équipé (cuisine complète, chaine HiFi, Wifi), moderne, propre, bien décoré et possède une literie de très très bonne qualité.

Un grand MERCI à Margot.

For a nice experience I recommend this beautiful, little room on a (Website hidden by Airbnb) has a nice white painted Wood Floor and a cosy little garden with a Sauna!! New and nice bathroom and it is calm and quite in a good area... If you need anything,you are going to be helped in no time!!! I will come back!😊

The Apartment near Museumplein was the perfect weekend getaway. Great location, right by tram and museums. The apartment is beautiful with lots of natural light and high ceilings. Cornélie was very helpful and was waiting for us when we arrived.

Cornelie was great from the moment I first got in contact making sure that our stay was as comfortable as could be, first class service. Icing on the cake was a bottle of Prosecco left in the fridge, I had mentioned to Cornelie that it was my wife’s 40th birthday so thought this was a really nice touch.
The apartment itself is very homely with everything needed for an enjoyable stay and located 8-10 minutes by Tram to Dam Square and Central Station made it perfect for us. Would really recommend this apartment to anyone looking to stay in Amsterdam, has everything you need for an enjoyable break.
Great host, great spot, great city. Just too bad it wasn’t a queen bed like announced but beside that, all good!
Das Hausboot ist sehr schön, sauber und zentral! Der Gastgeber und seine Frau sind super freundlich und es wird sich um alles gekümmert. Gerne wieder!
Klein en comfortabel verblijf met alle benodigdheden. Het is zoals de beschrijving en ook de sauna was super relax!

La posizione è eccellente, tranquilla ma centrale, comodo per scoprire la città. Il soggiorno è stato bello! Margot è molto gentile ed accogliente. Ti fa sentire a casa. Ciò che fornisce per la colazione è olandese, gustoso e in buona quantità! Non è possibile regolare autonomamente il riscaldamento.

Our Second AB&B experience and it was truly wonderful  Margot is a lovely host with a beautiful studio on a quiet canal that is a 3 minute walk to all of the " amsterdam action" but its so peaceful and quiet there.  The space is fitted out with everything you could need and Margot stocked the fridge with all the fixing for breakfast for our stay,  Meats, eggs, cheeses, bread, coffee, tea, milk and even stoopwaffles.  When we come back B&B MONDRIAAN will be our stop!

This lovely space far exceeded my expectations. It was absolutely charming and in an amazingly charming area right on the canal. We could walk to most of the local sights. Margo's special touches such as the lovely wine and breakfast made this the most memorable stay. You will be quite fortunate if you can reserve this place!

Margots Appartment is superb! It is centrally located but very quiet Ground Floor Appartment in a charming old building. Clean and practical, the two separate beds are really comfy (though i wasn't sure in the beginning as they are not the broadest beds and quite soft, but we slept very well) There is really everything you need, including fresh fruit and flowers, and Margot is a very well organized and reliable host. Thanks very much Margot!

This was our second time staying at Margot's flat. We felt right at home & the flat was again very clean and welcoming with fresh flowers. Breakfast , snacks were plentiful. Margot goes the extra mile to provide traditional Dutch specialties. We're recommending friends & family to stay here when visiting Amsterdam. Loved the neighborhood too.

Margot was very sweet and met us right at the apartment. (She lives upstairs which is great!)   The apartment is exactly as she describes and suited our needs very well.  The bed was perfectly comfortable.  We did look for an extra blanket but did not find one.  You may wish to ask her about that if you stay on colder nights.  Hot water was plentiful. The food she provided was so awesome!  We took advantage of nearly every offering she had there.  Coffee, tea, home made jam and delicious cheese.  Oh, and those dang waffle cookies were amazing. Yes, we were little piggies and ate every single one.  The only 'issue' we encountered was a bit of noise.  Margot's front door is connected to the AirBnB apartment and you will hear the sound of footsteps coming down the stairs and exiting/entering the front door.  Footsteps above are also heard.  As for external noise, you will hear the sound of music lessons from the music teacher who is a neighbor. This can be nice, like when we heard a choir singing! But we also heard 'Twinkle Twinkle Little Star' played by 8 year olds on violin over, and over and over.  But that was just on one occasion and really quite comical.  Don't let this deter you from renting her space.  I just wanted future guests to know of this.  All in all, the stay was just great. Good location and easy walking distance to the train station.  Our favorite part of our stay was grabbing two chairs and sitting outside of the French doors and enjoying a glass of wine.  Thank you, Margot!

This flat is fantastic!  It is very clean and tidy, a good size and included plenty of choices for breakfast.  It is on a lovely quiet canal but is still convenient to Central Station.  Margot was a very nice host and was understanding and patient when my flight was delayed and I was several hours late arriving and had to call her because I got lost on the way!  I highly recommend staying here.
Muy bien.Excelente locacion
Margot and her family prove to be wonderfull host.

Dear Margot,

What a great stay at your beautiful home! You gave me everything and more I could of asked for... Breakfast, wine, great location.

Your place is very new and has all the modern amenities we look for. I would recommend any guest looking to stay in Central Amsterdam to consider Margot`s home.

Hope to be back soon.

Thank you

Edward

Cornelie has a b-e-a-u-t-i-f-u-l place! It was bright and sunshiny and was the perfect little quiet haven in a busy city. Her apartment is very near to a tram line running right into central station and it is just around the corner from Vondel park which was perfect for a relaxing stroll.
The house was spotless when we arrived and Cornelie welcomed us to explore and make ourselves comfortable in her home! She was lovely to chat with and gave us great suggestions for places to eat and for cheaper parking then at the street meters!

Location, location, location... great! We stayed in Cornelies' apartment for our first 3 nights in Amsterdam in early June. We wish we had stayed there the full week. Her apartment was very comfortable with all the amenities that you will need. It is close to the Van Gogh Museum, the Rijks Museum, Albert Cuyp Market, a public swimming pool, Vondel Park, grocery store, restaurants, tram stops.....really an ideal location. You can sit out on the back balcony & enjoy the garden, birds, rooftops, stars and peace & quiet. Stairs up to the apartment are steep, but manageable.(I have a hip replacement & was able to make the climb carefully). My husband & I enjoyed our stay very much. We felt safe & secure. Ask Cornelie for local maps as well as directions to access her computer. She left some very helpful notes in the apartment for us to read and refer to. Cornelie was very accommodating and her niece, also named Cornelie was a great help. A good find. Thank you
Lovely apartment in great location! The apartment was very bright, clean and quiet. Cornelie was a perfect host. The entire experience definitely exceeded our expectations. Highly recommended.

Fabulous apartment with a perfect location. We couldn't have imagined a better place to stay in Amsterdam. Cornelie was delightful and very helpful. We will definitely stay here again if/when we return to visit Amsterdam! Thank you Cornelie!!!

If you get the chance to stay at Cornelie's, DO NOT PASS IT UP!!! Cornelie is the perfect host. My wife and I stayed at her apartment on our honeymoon and we could not have had a better time. She was extremely helpful getting us there (she even left us a bottle of wine). Every recommendation she made was spot on. Her apartment is amazing: clean, comfortable, full stocked with appliances and the location cannot be beat. It is centrally located and in a quiet neighborhood. The tram drops you off and picks you up practically on the front doorstep with a direct route to everything a guest would want to visit. I only hope it is available again the next time we go!!! Thanks for everything Cornelie!

Cornelie's house is absolutely beautiful, spacious and extremely clean! The pictures that she posted is an accurate reflection of what her wonderful apartment looks like. Just love the decor of her home, and the feeling of a home away from home!

Location wise, the apartment is a short 5 to 10 min tram ride to the central train station and within walking distance to the famous albert cuyp street market which has plenty of fresh fruits and local produce. The neighbourhood is also safe, so even if one goes home late at night, there is no need to worry at all.

Lastly, Cornelie was also very helpful in providing lots of guidebooks and tips. I would definitely stay here again when I'm back in Amsterdam!

Our best Airbnb experience yet! Cornelie was very communicative and responsive and the apartment was beautiful and very well located in a nice and safe area of Amsterdam, close to museums and the lovely Vondelpark. Thank you!

Une studio tres propre, avec la climatisation poissante. Un peu etroit, especialement en SDB. Le porte de douche ne se ferme pas fiablement (des gouttelettes et  une flaque au sol). Assez loin de centre ville (il faut  toujours utiliser le bus).
