Thank you so much for the hospitality. We enjoyed our stay. Diewert was very nice and told us if we need any help we could ask him everything. I recommend this place. 😊
Die Unterkunft war wie beschrieben und ordentlich. Das einzige negative war, das wir vor der Unterkunft standen (es hat geregnet) und wegen dem Tür-Code nach telefonieren mussten.

Das Appartment ist klein, aber vollkommen ausreichend für zwei Personen. Es war sehr sauber und gut gepflegt. Man erreicht innerhalb von ca. 5min einen Supermarkt und Restaurants. Man hat eine funktionierende Klimaanlage, einen Föhn im Bad, Handtücher, Bettwäsche, einen Wasserkocher und eine günstige Minibar inklusive. Wir haben Diewert nicht kennengelernt und die Kommunikation war etwas schwierig, weil man oft lange auf eine Antwort warten musste oder keine Antwort bekommen hat. Allerdings haben wir rechtzeitig den Code zur Tür bekommen und konnten dann selbstständig einchecken, also hat am Ende doch alles Wichtige geklappt.  Die Übernachtungen waren für amsterdamer Verhältnisse sehr günstig, deshalb sind wir insgesamt sehr zufrieden! :)
We enjoyed staying in Diewerts Appartment and would definetly come back. Everything is clean and the neighbourhood is very nice!
Cozy place!

Super chambre, un petit cocon au dessus de l’eau on a adoré passer notre séjour à Amsterdam ici. Localisation très pratique, surtout si on loue des vélos ! Le Airbnb est très calme, la déco mignonne. C’est originale de dormir dans une maison sur l’eau 😊
Je recommanderai !
Very nice!
Der Aufenthalt war sehr schön und es war für alles gesorgt. Allerdings dauert es relativ lange bis man eine Antwort bekommt und in die Stadt dauert es zu Fuß rund 30 min.

Tolles, hochwertig ausgestattetes Hausboot mit sehr netten Vermietern. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt und wären am liebsten länger geblieben, wäre die Unterkunft nicht schon ausgebucht gewesen. Dafür hat Diewert uns netterweise ein Hotelzimmer vermittelt. Danke schön!
PS: einziges Manko an der Lage des Boots: man schaut aus dem Fenster zwar auf den Kanal, allerdings dann direkt auf eine große Betonwand.

The room is in a nice quiet area.  Steep steps up to the room.  Then use a key code to let yourself in. The bedroom view is not the best - looking out onto a huge grey wall.  The bedroom is small and functional.  A mini fridge with water, chocolate and fizzies.  A coffee and tea maker is also there, a tv and radio.

A wonderful location! Ok a very quiet private street, so it’s not a place for partying. But it is a great location if you like walking and discovering the city! Close to all the highlights of Amsterdam! We loved also wandering the streets and enjoying the atmosphere. The room is small but we only needed it for sleeping so it was quite perfect! Very clean, simple, and safe. We felt safe walking the area even late at night.

Others have complained of the view- no it’s not on one of the story-book canals, there is an industrial wall but it had plants and yellow flowers, we saw gorgeous sunsets and there were ducks And heron daily to see. Falling asleep with the window open and hearing the water and rain was gorgeous!
We had an amazing stay at the house boat. Perfect location, close to all the hotspots in walking distance. Ask the owner for some tips, he knows some awesome spots! :-)

its was perfect for what we were looking for. The Airbnb has lots of options with restaurants and coffeeshop around it so you can easily walk anywhere. the check in was easy and the family was very welcoming. thanks for everything!!!
très bon séjour
Excellent stay, hassle free, very clean and has everything you will need.

We enjoyed our stay in this not huge room with bath. It didnt really feel like a houseboat, but was interesting to experience. We didnt mind the "wall view" at all and always had breakfast at "coffee and juices" less than a 10 minute walk away. We didnt get to meet Diewert, but did reach him immediately when we had to. Thanks again.

Nice area, friendly hosts. Comfortable bed, smaller than looks in pictures but large enough for sleeping.  Very little area for your stuff.  Think putting you suitcase on a chair and living out of it.
Everything was perfect.

Die Unterkunft war super. Sie ist kleiner als es auf den Bildern aussieht, dennoch komplett ausreichend für uns. Die Unterkunft enthält eine kleine Sauna, die der Gastgeber auf Anfrage gerne für euch vorbereitet. Es dauert ein bisschen mit der Kommunikation/Antworten, es hat trotzdem alles geklappt.
Zu Fuß braucht man 20-30 Minuten in die Stadt.
Es ist fast flächendeckend Share Now oder Elektro Roller fahren möglich.

Danke das wir eure Gäste sein durften! :)
Clean, quiet location in a safe neighbourhood, close to the center and Jordaan.
Zeer verzorgde kamer op toplocatie. Rustige omgeving op fietsafstand van het centrum. Diewert is een zeer aangename gastheer. Alles netjes en voldoende beschikbaar.

Das Hausboot von diewert ist ein perfekter Rückzugsort für einen Wochenendausflug. Es ist alles sauber und gemütlich. Die Kommunikation ist etwas schwierig. Parkplätze bucht man am besten online in dem Parkhaus in der Nähe Q-Park (20€/Tag), da die Parkplätze auf der Straße wesentlich teurer sind.
Ich würde diese Unterkunft jedem weiter empfehlen!

Super stay at Diewerts! For me, it was perfectly close and yet separated from the big hype streets. The hosts gave good local tips and we enjoyed their sauna! The room is comfortable but not spacious. Anyway, one don’t really come to Amsterdam to stay home all day ;)
Endroit bien situé, le cadre est très sympathique et calme ! Idéal pour découvrir la ville le temps d’un week end

Diewert went above and beyond to accommodate my friend and I during our stay. His space is perfect - we loved the sounds and feeling of being on the water. For all the people complaining about the view of the wall - just want to clarify it has lovely greenery growing on it and the ducks and swans swimming by our window were such a joy. I would 100% stay again. Great water pressure, wonderful lighting too.

Logement bien agencé et très bien desservît. Nous avons pu tout faire à pied c’était super. Nous avons passer un excellent séjour malgré la tempête folle.
Merci beaucoup. Nous reviendrons avec plaisir.

Lovely stay in a boathouse. The room appears larger in the photo, but is it a lovely place nonetheless. The area is a 30 min walk from city centre and just a short tram ride. Diewert was very polite and accommodating.
Great
Très bon séjour, la chambre est très bien situé et Diewert est très accueillant aucun problème je recommande.

Had a great stay in Amsterdam. Diewerts was a wonderful host. We were well received on arrival and Diewerts was very willing to share experiences with great eateries and sights. The room was perfect and the location even more so. The warmest recommendations from here!!
Great. Was very quiet. Will come again.

Chambre très propre et fonctionnelle dans une maison-bateau au sein d'un quartier très calme.
Cependant il faudra s'attendre à marcher pour se rendre dans le centre (mais cela peut faire l'objet de très belles balades avant d'arriver au coeur de la capitale et de son agitation).

Lovely little air bnb - the location was a little further from the centre but we actually quite enjoyed this as we got to see more of Amsterdam on our cycles to and from destinations! Great recommendation from Diewert on our final day about apple cake for breakfast from Wiedel - a local cafe, which made our stay even better!

Thank you, Diewert!
excellent place, very comfortable, connected to bus lines, Diewert is very friendly

Amazing place for couples or someone traveling in pair. It was very easy to communicate with the host which made sure everything was prepared for us when we arrived. The location of the room was in good walking distance from the centraal station, around 30 minutes, with public transport alternatives close by. I would highly recommend Diewerts place for anyone visiting Amsterdam.

Emplacement de rêve à 2 pas du centre. Chambre très agréable et joliment décorée. Avoir du café à disposition est très appréciable. Notre hôte est très sympathique.
Tout était parfait!

Great stay in a quiet location. Not that close to everything but bikes are provided. We were allowed to check-in early which was nice. Room was clean. If you are going to be out late, he does lock the property gates, so make sure you know how to open the gate.

Everything was perfect!
Great location if you are in Amsterdam for a few days.
Ein toller Ort - sehr ruhig und trotzdem nicht weit vom Zentrum - alles da was es braucht - sehr freundlicher Gastgeber, der viele tolle Tipps weitergibt - einfach nur zu empfehlen!

100%
The host is amazing with everything!!!
Reception, tips and always available to help. The house and the area are very quiet. We recommend :)

Perfect apartment: open space, design, plenty of sunlight, TV and DVD player, coffee machine, dishwasher, washing machine, bathtub, etc.
Perfect location: 5-10min to museums, park, bike rental, tram stop, grocery shopping, etc.
Perfect host: Cornelie was extremely helpful starting from the first email. The guide book to her apartment and to Amsterdam she left us was also extremely useful. Thank you for everything, Cornelie !

Cornelie's apartment was perfect for our group of 2 couples. The communication was smooth. Cornelie even left us some maps, guides and tips for eating out. Location is perfect - the center is within walking distance and Van Gogh's Museum is even closer.

My first Airbnb experience: Cornèlie and her apartment are wonderful! The location is perfect and she also provides you with everything you could possilby need. The price is very fair. I will def. book it again when I will come back to Amsterdam. Thanks for everything Cornèlie!

Cornelie made our stay and communication as smooth as it could be, and was very loyal to our numerous change of plans - which was more than generous of her!
The apartment was beautiful, very clean, cozy and welcoming! Exactly what we needed for peaceful rest after long walks around the city, and it felt like home away from home in a quiet and 'respectable' area of the city :)
The place was lovely and the location was perfect.

Cornelie was great, same as her apartment. We had great time, and after exploring Amsterdam, we had home away from home, and it was great feeling. Apartment was clean, location is superb, all in all everything was great, and we would definatelly come again. Thank you Cornelie!

Cornélie's apartment is perfect for a few days in Amsterdam. The location is great: very convenient and central and also a very nice neighbourghood with great restaurants that Cornélie had recommended. The place feels very "Amsterdam" with the high ceilings, steep staircase, terrasse with a table and chairs with a view on beautiful gardens. A really nice atmosphere. You immediately feel at home and Cornélie does everything to help that.  We really recommend Cornélie's place.

We have had with 4 Person wonderful days in Amsterdam, near the Museums plein in Cornelies Appartment. It is a short way to van Gogh museum and Rijksmuseum. I would return back every time to Cornelies Appartment, if i plan to stay in Amsterdam. Thanks very mutch to Cornelie. Ralph
Cornelie's apartment is exactly as stated and reviewed; comfortable, cozy and brilliantly located.  We unhesitatingly recommend it for visitors to Amsterdam.

We stayed 8 days at Cornelie's Apartment at Museimplein and would not have changed one thing besides staying longer if possible. The apartment was spotlessly clean, well equipped and comfortable. We were greeted by Cornelie who had fresh flowers and cold proseco waiting for us. We used the incredible location as a jumping off point each day to explore a different part of the city and also Haalem and Zandvoort Beach. The tram stop steps away fostered ease in getting around the city. We enjoyed different restaurants in the neighborhood each day by taking a walk in a different direction from the day before. The neighborhood is clean, safe and friendly. Sephatipark was nearby and was the perfect place for our Sunday picnic.

We used the well appointed kitchen for breakfasts and and a couple of evening meals. Cornelie was helpful during our stay with check ins to make sure we had everything we needed for our comfort. Having the computer and printer was highly convenient for making museum reservations online and printing tickets. It was a relief to leave the laptop at home! Thank you Cornelie for sharing your home and making this a most memorable vacation!

Cornelie was the perfect host with loads of great tips about nice restaurants and fun things to do. Her apartment is beautiful and is located in a nice part of town - close to all major attractions and cute little bars. I would recommend this place to everyone.

This was the perfect apartment for three friends and I to spend our first weekend in Amsterdam.  We could not have been more comfortable, and we wish we could have enjoyed a longer stay!  I highly recommend.
Cornelie's apartment is great.  We were very comfortable and everything went smooth. Location is the best.  Thanks for having me and my family.
Très bel appartement spacieux, très bien situé et hôte super gentille :)
Home sweet Amsterdam! Margot was absolutely wonderful. She made us feel right at home. Whatever we needed, she was accommodating. She supplied breakfast essentials which was such a bonus!

Great apartment, sunny and spacious, with laundry, internet and everything else you might need.  On the 16/24 tramline and close to lots of trams and buses (including a bus to Schipol)  near Museumplein.  Cornelie was very easy to communicate with and left a packet with all the information needed for the apartment and the area.  Recommended!

We thoroughly enjoyed our short stay at Margot's accommodation. It was a warm haven from the raging storm outside. We loved the breakfast provisions left and used them for a delicious breakfast, thank you. Margot's communication was good and her studio flat was centrally located. We wished we could have stayed for longer.
Splendid apartment - just what was needed. Great location, a quiet and leafy canal. Margot was a very easy hoste.

Great location - walking distance to shops, restaurants and center city. Hosts were very communicative and accessible if needed (yet, not intrusive). Amsterdam is a terrific walking city. Walk from this location 10-15 minutes & you are there! Nice Amsterdam neighborhood.
Need to know: The room is quite tiny. Your view is of a concrete wall overlooking the canal. Plumbing is excellent. Comfy Bed! Have Fun!

Wir sind super zufrieden. Alles war sauber und man erreicht alle Sehenswürdigkeiten in Amsterdam schnell. Optimal für einen Wochenendausflug.

Diewert ist sehr freundlich und hatte viele Empfehlungen für unseren Aufenthalt.

Danke!

What a perfect little visit.

The room is impecable, the distance to the centre is great...the bus or a tram available.

I SEARCHED looking to see what was wrong with the place, it seemed too good. The ONE thing, no coffee cups...and if that is the level of petty...you know you're in for a great stay!! The host even emailed while I stayed goving recommendations for tour trips and places to eat.

I WILL be staying again.

Also, I stayed alone...but it would perfectly fit a couple who are looking at exploring and having the MOST comfy bed to come back to!

A* and I anticipate asking if I can move in!

Superbe séjour chez Diewert. La péniche est superbe, l'intérieur suffisant pour deux personnes avec une belle salle de bain, un frigo et une vue sur l'eau mais côté mur.
Une place de parking très pratique est disponible si besoin.
Je recommande sans hésitations que ce soit pour le logement qui est à proximité des bus et trams ; et à une vingtaine de minutes du centre mais également pour la disponibilité et gentillesse de Diewert !

Diewert a été très gentil et à l’écoute pour répondre à nos questions et nous donner de bonnes adresses ! Quartier calme et proche des canaux, à 30 minutes du centre, idéal pour découvrir la ville à pieds (nous avons tout fait à pieds de la chambre) ! Parfait pour un week end à deux !
Amazing place and great experience.
Very good

We did not spend too much time in the place as we were exploring Amsterdam, but when we were there it was a perfect and quiet place to sleep! The air conditioning was great for the warm nights and the bathroom was recently upgraded. Diewert was extremely communicative and helpful. Would highly recommend for folks traveling thru Amsterdam!
Great room with an amazing location in a very nice and quiet neighborhood. Our hosts were amazing and very helpful. I highly recommend it!

Krásné místo, v klidné ale dobře dostupné lokalitě. Jediné co trochu kazí krásu ubytování je výhled na betonovou zeď.
Majitel příjemný, komunikativní.
Skvěle
thank you for letting us in your home.

This rental is ideal. Close to many tourist opportunities, peaceful, beautiful area. Small, but not unexpectedly so. Just as pictured, and possibly the most comfortable bed of any rental I’ve ever slept in. Diewert was so friendly - would definitely rent again!

This cute little house boat room is a perfect home base for your exploration. It’s exactly as pictured and the free coffee and tea made it very homey. There is a perfect little yoga studio just down the street which helps relax you after all the walking. 10/10 would recommend!
The place was very clean and quiet. Area was close to bars and shops. Host was very accommodating.
Diewert is a very nice and helpful host. The accommodation is very well located, close to the Jordaan disctrict, practical and clean. We spent very pleasant days here.

Perfect home, location and price. Diewert and his wife were extremely helpful from the moment we booked the bnb which made this stay even more enjoyable! the host was above and beyond helpful by sending us an itinerary of things that he thought we would enjoy doing around Amsterdam along with allowing us to check out later.

Perfect.

Diewert’s house boat was adorable. He offered some light refreshments to purchase in the fridge, which were very convenient! The accommodations were clean and very comfortable. The air conditioner was cold, which we LOVED! We rented bikes from Bike City, a 15 min walk from Diewert’s place. We also rented a boat from Canal Motor Boats, which was a 15 min bike ride from the house. Renting the bike and the boat were conveniently located close enough to the house boat and made the trip even better. You will really enjoy staying at Diewert’s place!

It a was a perfect stay in this apartment , top accomdotion just in the centre of the city.
And the host ( Cornelie ) was allways ready to help and worried about our accomodation .
It was my AIRBNB first experiencie , and really loved it!!

Beautiful apartment, great location.  We had a short visit with our 2-year old son and Cornelie's apartment was wonderful for him and at the same time a lovely place for us to enjoy.  Cornelie was very welcoming and we felt at home right away.  Perfect airbnb experience, highly recommended.

For our first experience on airbnb, Cornélie was really a perfect host. Very friendly, and concerned about our well-being all along our stay. The house was just the same as the owner, perfect, with a lot of space, nice kitchen with all the furniture you need and situated in a very quiet area.

Very clean and quirky apartment with great connections to central Amsterdam (it's 10 minutes tops on the train). Cornelie was a perfect host, the house was very clean and beds very comfy. Would definitely stay here again. Thanks a lot Cornelie, nice to meet you!

My husband, baby son and I had an absolutely lovely stay in Cornelie's apartment. Cornelie met us and showed us around her beautiful home, so we knew how everything worked. She also left us with a great guide to the apartment, the area it was in, Amsterdam and beyond, which was fantastic (particularly the local restaurant recommendations). The apartment is spacious, light, airy and very clean. For us, it was in a fabulous location- a very short stroll from Museumplein, shopping and great cafes and restaurants. And then a very short tram ride to anything else we wanted to do. We could not have asked for a better place to stay or a nicer host. We thoroughly recommend it.

We stayed for 11 days at Cornelie's apartment and enjoyed our stay very much. It's a  spacious cozy apartment in a perfect location. Cornelie was very friendly and helpful. The written guide she prepared covered all our needs. The equipment (kitchen, laundry. internet etc.) was  sufficient for us. We highly recommend staying there.

My sister and I had a great 2 nights at this apartment with our husbands. Cornelie met us with a welcoming cup of coffee and explained everything to us and was available for us to contact her during our stay.  The location was great, out of the busy area but we were able to walk everywhere.  The stairs were steep up to the apartment but we knew to expect them and we managed.  Well worth the effort.  We loved  Amsterdam and would have liked to stay longer. I drew the short straw and had to sleep in the top bunk, but I have to say that I slept very well! Cornelie did say, however, that another bed could be made up if required. All in all, we can definitely recommend Cornelie's apartment and appreciated the wine and nibbles that she left for us.  Cheers!  Chris & Trish, Australia.
Fantastic place on the water, close to the action and we’ll maintained. Our host was awesome and was super flexible with our last minute changes. :)
Beautiful place; comfortable, clean and the perfect place to stay. Diewert was incredibly welcoming and made us feel like we were at home! Would highly recommend this place to anyone.

Lovely place!! The  room is super comfortable and it’s very close by to everything you need! I rented a bike very close by to their place for the days I stayed there and had an amazing time! On my last day, my flight was only at night so Diewert and his wife were kind enough to let me storage my suitcase in their house till I needed to go to the airport, that way I was free the explore a bit more of the city! 100% recommend the place! Had a lovely time!
Mooie accomodatie, uitstekende service en goeie ligging om de stad te bezoeken.
Really clean and comfortable room on the water. Hosts were very accommodating, would definitely stay here again!
Everything was great.
Diewert was very kind and nice, which made me feel very safe to stay in this airbnb. Would definitely come back to stay again if i’m ever in Amsterdam!

A very cute place to stay. Diewert was very communicative and accommodating. Close to Westerpark and many city sites and otherwise close to a tram or bus to get there.

Room was clean and air conditioned with fast reliable wifi. If you have multiple suitcases it might be a bit snug. We were there during one of the hottest days on record so this may not be all the time but there were quite a few mosquitos that ended up inside. There’s also a cute patio space in front of the houseboat but not on the water side.

The only way to get to the room is from a metal staircase from outside which goes over water, so if you have mobility issues you’ll want to be careful.

Overall very charming and very comfortable.

SIMPLESMENTE INCRÍVEL! aquela vontade de quero mais. Muito acessível a comunicação, localização fácil (eu e meu noivo conseguimos fazer tudo andando - cerca de 25 minutos para o centro onde tem tudo), mercado por perto! a vista do quarto é linda e o jardim um agradável ambiente para (Website hidden by Airbnb) certeza indicaria!
Alles Top 👍. Gerne wieder

We enjoyed our stay. However there were a few mishaps such as an open wine bottle in the fridge and cigarette butts in the yard which made it seem like the cleaning was done in a hurry. Unfortunately there was no toilet paper when we arrived but Diewert took care of it within a few hours. Apart from that the bikes that were promised in the description were not accessible. However the room was pretty and it’s relatively close to the city center.
Zeer mooi plekje, waar je rustig kunt slapen. Alles is erg netjes en schoon. Dieuwert is vriendelijk.

Margot was great, very welcoming and available if needed. The location is very good, on a quiet canal very close to Neumarket ... but with very little traffic (bikes, people or cars). The block seemed to be all residential with a pre-school next door. Loved seeing all the little kids being dropped off by parents in the morning. The unit itself is very clean and comfortable with everything you need. Fruit, cheese, meats, yogurts, breads and bottle of wine were there for guest along with coffee, milk  and teas. Our only negative is the bed(s), two small single beds, kind of lumpy. But that's it. Would love to go back ... especially if new bed ;-)

Me and my wife had a very nice and easy stay in Margots place. It was very convenient for us that we could check in and out at hours which suited us and our traveling plans. Margots place had all which was needed including a nice breakfast. We can only recommend the place which is very centrally located in Amsterdam.

Margot was very helpful. The apartment was well appointed, VERY central in the city so perfect for walking and sightseeing. Breakfast was good, with plenty of Dutch cheese. Neighbourhood was very picturesque and quiet. Beautiful.
Would highly recommend this apartment

My stay at Margot's was restful & cozy. From her warm welcome, to the yummy breakfast she provided, to the immaculately clean and well appointed living space filled with travel books... I enjoyed every moment. Overall I had a grand time in Amsterdam and having such a centrally located apartment that was so warm and cozy definitely added to the experience. If you go to Amsterdam and want to stay in the inner canal ring (within walking distance to Amsterdam's main attractions)... Check out Margot's place!

This listing and the reviews before mine are 100% accurate - great location, spotless and well cared for apartment and a very friendly host Margot - who did indeed provide goodies for a yummy breakfast. I would definitely come back to this apartment in the future.

Lots of character and warmth gives this place a genuine home-from-home feel.

Deze plek is een goed bewaard geheim in hartje Amsterdam. Alleen maar positieve punten: je bent in geen tijd te voet van het station naar het appartement, geen gedoe met trams of dure taxi's. Vorige recensies vertelden het ook al maar het is echt waar: de locatie is perfect. Pal in 't centrum en toch ENORM rustig. Bovendien is Margot heel behulpzaam maar niet opdringerig. Je krijgt alle privacy die je wilt. Verder is het appartement perfect in orde en proper. Wij komen hier zeker terug!

Margot was a wonderful host. She made us feel welcomed instantly and went out of her way to make her flat feel like our home. We loved coming back to her b&b every night. Margot answers any questions you have, and even accommodated our late check in!

Bottom line: her b&b is clean, warm, cozy, welcoming, and in a WONDERFUL location. I would stay here all over again and I will be recommending this location to my friends!

We had a brilliant stay in Margot's place. It's very central yet down such a quiet side street that we were never disturbed. It was toasty warm in a cold January, and perfectly situated. We could walk pretty much anywhere!

The breakfast was delicious - I could have eaten a ton of the cheese!

Absolutely lovely ground-floor studio conveniently located near metro. Host did everything to make us feel welcome, "above and beyond," and was incredibly flexible and easy to communicate with. Bed was very comfortable, apartment was very clean, and everything we needed was provided.
As described, great location on quiet street. Separate entrance to fully equipped and stocked apartment. Margot met us at the door and provided a nice bottle of wine.

Margot est une hôte parfaite! C'est la seconde fois que nous venons et n'hésiterons ni à revenir, ni à recommander ce logement qui est très propre, très bien équipé et très calme.
Tout est parfait!

Nous avons passé un super week-end grâce à Margot! La description du studio correspond parfaitement. Il est idéalement situé, proche de la gare et du centre ville, grand et très calme. Très propre , merveilleusement bien décoré et bien équipé. Lit très confortable. Nous avons plus qu'aprécié le petit déjeuner que Margot nous a laissé! Très arrangeante en ce qui concerne les heures d'arrivée et de départ! Merci encore pour tout. Je recommande vivement!

Wat zeker pluspunten zijn: er waren heel veel boeken met informatie over Amsterdam, heel netjes, goed bed, goede ingrediënten voor een lekker ontbijt, goede thee en wafeltjes, een goede ligging (we hebben alles te voet kunnen doen) en een vriendelijke gastvrouw (en zoon)! Het was een zeer aangename ervaring, zeker een aanrader! Het was leuk om zo Amsterdam te kunnen ontdekken.

The studio is exactly as shown on the pictures. It was spacious, very clean (better in most hotels) and in addition to that, you feel like at home. Margot was very nice and welcomed us warmly by showing us the studio and all related details. Everything was prepared in the minutest detail; we really loved it. The district is central but very calm and located in the front of those wonderful canals.

We really enjoyed our stay at Margot’s studio. We think having the breakfast included (with yummy cheese) is definitely a plus.
We certainly recommend Margot as a host and the studio.

Margot ist eine sehr herzliche Gastgeberin! Tolles Appartment in sehr zentraler, aber zugleich ruhiger Lage direkt an einer Gracht, mit Wohn- und Schlafbereich und sehr gut ausgestatteter Küchenzeile. Der Kühlschrank war für das Frühstück gut gefüllt und sogar ein Flasche Rotwein stand zur Begrüßung bereit. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und können dies von ganzem Herzen empfehlen.
My boyfriend and me had a wonderful stay at Margot's place - it was beautiful, clean, organised, well located and all what we had hoped for. We will definitly be back.

Margot is very good at being a host.
She thinks of everything. Besides being in a great location. It also has a lot of room to move around for s studio. And she makes sure your stocked with everything you need.

Her directions are perfect. I would highly recommend her place for single travelers or couples. I enjoyed my time there.

We arrived quite late on Friday and yet margot was the perfect host, welcoming us through the door of our ground floor self contained studio apartment. Beautifully stylish, clean, warm and cosy. Food provided for breakfast along with a lovely bottle of wine. Flat incredibly close to the centre of Amsterdam and metro but quiet with picturesque view of canal just outside. Thoroughly recommend to anyone.

Very comfortable and well situated B&B, highly recommended. Only small quibble was that we rather expected that 3 days breakfast would mean that, but all the food provided at the start was expected to last the entire stay. Milk ran out on first morning and we assumed it would be replaced but it wasnt.  We coukd, I'm sure, have asked for more, but didn't like to, and there is a local supermarket. But this is a small issue, it is otherwise lovely and peaceful

Très bon séjour chez Margot : l'appartement est très bien situé, proche de la gare et du centre ville (10 minutes à pied), non loin des musées (30 minutes à pied) et malgré tout au calme. Il est spacieux, lumineux et très propre. Margot est une hôte accueillante et arrangeante pour l'arrivée et le départ. Merci pour ce bon séjour.

Liebe Margot,
wir haben eine schöne Zeit hier verbracht. Alles war zu unserer Zufriedenheit: Das Appartement, das Wetter und die Menschen hier in Amsterdam.
Wir danken für Ihre Gastfreundschaft und kommen gerne wieder.
Sabine + Dieter aus
Bergheim bei Köln

Margo deserves "two thumbs up" for providing my wife and I with everything we could ever ask for during our three night stay in her very special apartment. She even provided eggs, cheese, milk, bread, coffee, etc. for breakfast. We felt right at home at this beautiful, heart of Amsterdam apartment. We will stay here again (if the apartment is not already booked) next time we visit Amsterdam.


Thank you Margo!

Appartement idéalement situé, charmant et très calme. Excellent accueil et Margot parle français( ce qui est un plus) Elle a pu nous nous conseiller et nous donner des explications ! Nous avons visiter Amsterdam, sommes allés au Keukenhof, à Delft et La Haye, nous avons passer un très agréable séjour.
Nous recommanderons cet appartement à notre entourage et y retournerons sans problème.

Margot was very available to greet us whenever we would arrive.  We could easily walk there from the Central Station and it was in a lovely quiet street beside a canal and close to many interesting places.  the room was clean and cosy with its own entrance and everything we needed and even a bottle of wine!  We felt very lucky to stay there!

Notre séjour fut parfait en tout point ! Merci encore à Margot ainsi qu' à un de ses fils pour leur accueil, leur attention, nous nous sommes sentis presque comme en famille, l'independance en plus !
L'appartement est tel qu'il est décrit dans l'annonce : propreté impeccable, spacieux et moderne. Il se situe dans un quartier calme est trés agreable, proche du coeur de ville mais aussi de la gare ce qui est trés pratique.
Si nous devions revenir c'est chez Margot que nous y irions sans aucune hesitation.

Our stay at the B&BMondriaan was just about perfect.  Margot gabe us a warm welcome and was very helpful in giving us information about the city and answered our questions.  The apartment was everything we read about/hoped it would be - and more.  It was well stocked with breakfast food, some sweets and even included a wonderful bottle of wine!  The flat itself was roomy, clean, modern and well stocked.  The location could not have been more perfect - on a lovely and quiet canal but only a 5 minute walk to the train station and the heart of town, with many shops and restaurants only a block or two away.  We could walk to all the sights and hot spots of the inner city. I highly recommend staying at Margot's cute and comfy apartment when you visit Amsterdam.

Margot was a wonderful host, giving us most valuable information on little out of the way places to visit apart from all the touristy hot spots.  Our fridge was always stocked with a plentiful range of fresh fruit, cheese, meats, home made jams, eggs and bread.  The apartment was exactly as shown on the website.  Fresh linen and towels were kept in a cupboard that you could use as needed.  A totally wonderful experience was hade for our 7 day stay.  The apartment is on a lovely tree lined one way street and canal.  It was very quiet and only a 5 minute walk to the hub of the city centre.
We had a lovely time staying at Margots, it was in a great location and had everything we needed for our stay. The apartment was very welcoming and made us feel at home. Would highly recommend

What a fantastic apartment!  So easy to get to from the train station and in such an ideal location. Nice quiet street on a canal and on the ground floor too. Loved walking around the corner to the ever changing market area where we bought local produce to take back and cook in the well equipped kitchen. Margot was very welcoming,  and more than happy to help in any way if needed.  Margot had lots of books and a great collection of cds to listen to while we enjoyed the cheese and wine left for us upon our arrival! Can't wait to come back again and comes with our highest recommendation. Thanks Margot. Craig and Susan Marinus, Australia.

Rien à redire, c'était parfait : l'appartement correspond exactement à la description (spacieux, bien équipé, ...), très calme et parfaitement bien situé pour la ville d'Amsterdam. Les heures d'arrivée et de départ ont été arrangées avec beaucoup de souplesse de la part de Cornélie, et nous n'avons manqué d'aucune information, Cornélie ayant patiemment répondu à toutes nos questions d'ordre organisationnel.
Si je retourne à Amsterdam, je sais déjà où loger ;-)), idéal non?
Valérie / Belgique

This apartment was everything you could want when looking for a place on Airbnb. Great neighborhood location, clean good size apartment, all the amenities of your apartment at home. Cornelie made it quick and easy for my wife and I to access the apartment and provided great directions from the airport and useful information of nearby places. I would definitely recommend and will look for this listing again next time visiting Amsterdam.
Our stay at Cornelie's was just perfect! The apartment is both beautiful and cosy, well located and Cornelie is doing every thing to make you enjoy your time in Amsterdam! Thanks :)

Het appartement van Cornélie.......EEN AANRADER !
Heel centraal gelegen bij het museumplein, perfect om oud Zuid met gezellige restaurantjes en cafeetjes te verkennen. Super gezellig ingericht MET heerlijk warme houtkachel !!!!
Wij hebben genoten (ook van Cornélie).....wij komen zeker nog eens terug !

Margot was there to greet us and answered all our questions. She recommended a restaurant which was excellent. There was a good variety of fresh food for our breakfast for the three days we were in Amsterdam.
The studio apartment is in an excellent location, close to the Markt, train station and restaurants/bars/cafes.

She really went out of her way to make us feel welcome. She was not there due to work pressure, but we was received by her son. He took us to our room and explained everything from where to find what. Extras like snacks , fresh fruit ,a bottle wine awaits us . Wi-Fi free.
The list description was accurate and was within our expectations.
Location excellent and next to a canal.
Later that evening she pop in to introduce herself and was adamant that if we need anything else we must ask.
There was even a file with detail on Amsterdam place to visit, maps etc
We had a great stay at Margots place. Great apartment, so close to everything.  We would definitely stay here again.

All of the previous reviews are very accurate.  Margot is a wonderful host and the apartment is exactly as described.  Very clean and located in a quiet neighborhood with excellent proximity to all the sites in Amsterdam.  It's easy to find and only a ten minute walk from Central Station.  Highly recommended.

Great stay and amazing, quiet location! The space is very small, especially the shower, but great for one person or two small people. The view overlooks the river but also theres a huge concrete wall. You are only staying in a small private room on the houseboat, not the entire houseboat! Great walking distance to shops and restaurants in a local neighborhood, and very close to the tourist areas!
Peaceful & relaxing

Cornelie's house is perfect for who want to spend a wonderful time in Amsterdam with all comforts that a family house can give: four people are a good number for stay in the house.
The house is perfect and there isn't nothing wrong.
We had a special time in Amsterdam!

My husband and I absolutely LOVED staying at Cornélie's apartment! Not only is it beautifully decorated, spacious, and entirely comfortable, but it is located just a stone's throw from Museumplein, which holds the Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum, and Stedelijk Museum as well as the concert hall (Concertgebouw). Transportation to and from the airport was super easy via bus and the city itself is very walkable. Cornélie is a dream hostess and even invited us for a friendly coffee before our departure, a wonderful way to end our stay. We couldn't have asked for more!

Cornelie appartment is great, 5 minutes by foot to museum plein and 1 min from  tram/bus stops. The decoration is nice , the neighboorhood is quite calm, we only can hear the tram from the street. Cornelie is very friendly and easy to communicate. The beds are good, the kitchen is fully equiped, the bathroom is spacious. I really recommend this appartment.

The apartment was fantastic, only five minutes away from the museums and with excellent connections by tram to train station. Cornelie was so friendly and helpful with everything and had a great guide for the area with great information. We had an amazing stay there.

El piso de Cornelie anda muy bien. La ubicación es perfecta, acogedor, todo funciona y ella es una anfitriona muy amable y preocupada de todos los detalles. Estuvimos 5 días, y nos ayudó en todo, con una carpeta llena de instrucciones para la casa, lugares recomendables, etc. Incluso nos dejó juguetes para mi hijo de dos años. Sin duda recomiendo el piso. Todo muy bien!
Gracias Cornelie!
We had a great stay at Cornelie's apartment. Everything was perfect: cosy and spacy design, top location, very friendly and helpful contact. We hope that we can one time return to Cornelie's place.

Cornélies apartment was perfect for our stay in Amsterdam. Beautiful apartment with a nice view, cozy neighborhood and a very helpful and kind host. I will definitely book with Cornélie, if her apartment is available next time I'm in Amsterdam.

Appartement bien situé et chaleureux, très typique et bien aménager.
le cadre est bien et dépaysant.
Situé à 10 mn du centre d'Amsterdam à pied et proche d'une station de tramway.
Pour se garer il y a le parking de l'olympique stadium à 3 stations de tramway.

We hebben een super tijd gehad in Amsterdam! Leuk (netjes/schoon) huis, gezellig ingericht en van alle gemakken voorzien. Het is net of je even een local bent, erg leuk! Prima communicatie en we konden de sleutel bij de buurvrouw ophalen die ook erg vriendelijk was. Er stond in het huis, heel lief, een flesje wijn op ons te wachten voor mijn vriend z'n verjaardag. Cornélie bood ons ook nog aan dat we een nachtje extra konden blijven, omdat ze zelf toch pas de volgende dag thuiskwam. Heel attent :) Mijn vriend is erg lang, dus bed en dekbed waren wat krap met z'n tweeën maar voor een weekend goed te doen. Wel vroeg wakker, omdat slaapkamer vrij licht is en wij dat niet gewend zijn. 's Nachts verder erg rustig in de omgeving ondanks dat je zo dicht bij het centrum zit en de buren ook niet gehoord :) De buurt is geweldig! Albert Cuyp en Rijksmuseum op steenworp afstand en centrum is ook goed te lopen! We hebben de auto in P&R gezet, dat ging ook goed, hoewel ik van Cornélie begreep dat dat niet altijd lukt (vol of erg druk...), dus we hebben mazzel gehad. Het espresso apparaat op de foto staat er niet, die is voor privé gebruik denk ik. Maar al met al een heerlijk weekendje!
Je remercie Cornélie de nous avoir permis de passer un superbe séjour à Amsterdam grace à son appartement très agréable et parfaitement situé. J'espère pouvoir y revenir prochainement.
Nice place! We lived there for three days! Really enjoy! Cornelie did not forget to ask us about our feelings even she is also in a trip! Thanks Cornelie!
Excellent place, excellent location. Had a dream week in amsterdam at cornelies place.

Very nice place and a perfect location for our stay in Amsterdam. It was very comfortable and cozy. The neighborhood is nice and quiet, but easily accessible by foot and public transportation to all major attractions in the city. Cornelie was an excellent host and made the whole process a breeze. Would definitely recommend!

Cornelie's place exceeded our already high expectations. The locations couldn't have been more perfect, especially since some of our main interests were visiting museums and biking around Vondelpark. The apartment itself had everything we needed, and it was very comfortable and quiet. Cornelie left some very helpful information, I would add "Bazar Amsterdam" to her list of great restaurants nearby.
Our kids, 11 and 15, were happy in the room with the bunk, the older was happy to in the loft which is high enough to feel like a private space.
Communication was easy and fast and Cornelie's friend Sula who met us at the beginning and end was lovely and very helpful. Even the upstairs neighbor gave us a cherished tip on an event not to miss while we were in town.
We highly recommend!

A comfortable appartment in a great location with really easy access to all the main attractions in Amsterdam.
We had a great time and enjoyed staying at Cornelie's place - thank you!

Staying at Cornelie's place really enhanced our overall experience in Amsterdam. She is a gracious host and made the airbnb process very simple. She was always quick with communication and provided great recommendations for restaurants, shopping and sightseeing in the city.
She has a great attention to detail and really makes sure guests are well cared for.
Her home is comfortable, clean and in a beautiful neighbourhood.
If we're ever back in Amsterdam we will definitely stay here again.
Highly recommended!

We enjoyed our stay at Cornelie's apartment.
It is centrally located, the nieghbourhood is nice and safe, and the bakery downstrais is great.
The apartment was comfortable, clean and cornelie was very hospitable and helpfull.
Thanks for everything, and we are happy to reccomend.

Amazing stay, Cornelie is a very nice and caring host and her apartment is even better that expected: clean, cosy and very well located, only a few minutes walk from the heart of the city. I definitely suggest it to everyone!

Cornelie is a great host, very welcoming and full of good intentions.
Its apartment is perfectly located for exploring the city on foot.
The neighborhood is a quiet area surrounded by greenery, a lovely place to stay.

Barrio (Website hidden by Airbnb) casa cuenta con todas las comodidades. Detalle de bienvenida! Amplia información sobre Amsterdam. Hora de entrada y salida adaptada a nuestras necesidades. Pudimos disfrutar del apartamento ampliamente.

It was such a wonderful surprise to see the hospitality and the trust with a personal appartment. It's beautiful on the inside and makes you feel like you live there. Cornelie provided us with everything we need, even washing mashine, maps, snacks... The hosts have watm heartedly welcomed us. The balcony has a view on a beautiful quiet inside place, the bed is huge and soft and the appartment overall is just situated in the most sophisticated and safe neighborhoods close to the city by walking distance. All museums are very close. I would recommend this to any one considering you will not regret it. Made my experience of amsterdam alot more special with a feeling that i lived there. Again want to thank Cornelie.
Cornelie is very kind and her house is just like a home for us... we feel like an amsterdamer... very cool house and near to populer places... also its very easy to arrive from schipol...

We absolutely enjoyed our stay at Margot's! The location is great and walking distance to almost everything. She left us delicious cheese and bread for breakfast which was so nice! The space was charming and we were extremely comfortable. I would recommend to everyone!

Hi the apartement was perfect - as well as the descritpion, and the loation is perfect - ner MuseumPlein, connceted with Tram Lines ; Cornelie left us every detail and accurate advices - it was perfect for us.

Our host Cornelie is lovely we enjoyed a wonderful stay.  Her  home is warm and welcoming and she was so very helpful in getting us grounded in her area and in Amsterdam.  The area was ideal a walk from all the major museums and easy on/off Trams and a safe beautiful neighborhood.

Everything was perfect!!
Location , cleaness, and convenience!!
Especially Cornelie is so helpful and kind.
I wanna stay here again at my next visit.
Absolutely no problems, Cornelie was very organized and set everything up for us which made us feel very welcome and prepared :)
We felt very warmly welcomed. Nice apartment in a very good location. Clean and safe. Just a perfect place to stay in Amsterdam.

What a great time we had at Corneile's. A really beautiful appartment everything was just perfect. David Cornelie's son welcomed us and showed us the lay out. Very close to the centre with the bonus of being in a beautiful residential area, leafy and so safe. The outside balcony is a little oasis perfect for relaxing glass of wine. Lovely local bars and the bakery across the street is sublime. I can't recommend this appartment highly enough. A home from home. My first Airbnb experience how lucky were we to have found Corneile. Thank you.

The apartment was perfect for us, well-appointed and as described. the location is fantastic, perfect for the Museums and the de Pijp and south Amsterdam areas and with some very good restaurant options on Albert Cuyp Straat. Cornelie showed great care in making sure we were aware of how to get to the flat and in arranging for us to get the keys. I would have no hesitation in recommending the apartment for anyone wishing to spend some time in a great city. All in all, a great weekend. Thank you Cornelie...!

Cornelie apartment is wonderful, warmhearted and perfectly located. We had a magical weekend. I highly recommand her lovely home :)
Cornelie is a perfect host, delicate and attentive. She welcomed us with a bottle of fresh cava and tipical biscuits. She left us excellent advices to discover the town (café, restaurants, ...) and, as we had a problem with the Thalys train and couldnt' arrive the day expected, she refunded us part of the stay.
Thank you so much Cornelie!
Everything was perfect, thank you so much Cornelie !
Cornelie's welcome was really nice. Her apartment is a great place for a stay in Amsterdam. The place is clean, nice and the location is very convenient.

We spend 5 days on Cornelie's home, which is a very nice and cozy place. Even Cornelie was travelling, she left a delicious  wine on the fridge and some cookies that we could enjoy when got there. And also her friend Sabine gave us all support that we needed during our stay.

We all had a great time staying at Cornelie's apartment. It is in a great location, the facilities are fantastic, and making arrangements to collect keys and getting public transport directions to the apartment from the airport was very straightforward. Cornelie is a great host and her welcome pack and recommendations for local shops restaurants etc excellent. Many thanks.

Super Accueil avec boissons et attentions pour l'arrivée. Description de l'appartement tout à fait correspondante. Quartier bien situé et connections avec le centre par les transports en commun tout à fait faciles. Calme la soirée et ambiance sécurisante. Bref, un super endroit pour découvrir la ville. Seul (petit) bémol: l'isolation thermique est celle d'un vieil appartement de charme et les nuits sont fraîches au printemps.

I stayed at Cornélie's apartment for two nights with my family whilst we visited Amsterdam for a wedding.
Her apartment is gorgeous... the photographs don't do it justice! We loved the character of the place, and at the same time how homely it was. We found it clean, well presented and very comfortable. The beds are great and there is plenty of space!
The location is great, easy to get to and there's a very nice bakery across the road that does excellent breakfast.
Cornélie is a brilliant host and was extremely helpful prior to our visit, providing us with accurate directions, and details that we needed. During our stay, Cornélie arranged for a friend to show us around the apartment, and he kept in touch throughout our stay to see if we needed anything. The price for the apartment was amazing and I'm so pleased I took this option rather than a hotel!
We had a fantastic time, and I'm very grateful that I was able to stay! Highly recommended.

Diewert's place was excellent, in terms of location, size, cleanliness, and amenities.  It sure was cool to be on a houseboat.  It was also super easy to communicate with Diewert and get quick replies and helpful infos.  We will certainly consider staying at this place again when in Amsterdam the next time.

Location was ideal and close to city center. This was a perfect getaway from the busy touristy parts of Amsterdam. The house was so clean, calm and serene. The garden was a nice treat! The hosts couldn’t have been better.
We really enjoyed staying on a houseboat!
Clean, tidy, air-conditioned room on a houseboat - perfect Amsterdam feeling :)
My  stay here was great lovely family very helpful and the place was clean and in a great location
super séjour le logement est très agréable.
Belle chambre idéalement placé
Diewert was a great host- gave all the recommendations that were local and top notch. The house is perfect for capturing the amsterdam vibes. Will definitely would want to come back. Thank you!

Cornelie apartment is situated in the museum quarter which is a minutes walk to museum square. It is served well by trams and buses. We walked to dam square in approx 30 mins. The apartment Is large and spacious and well equipped. Cornelie even left us with welcome food gifts which certainly added to our experience. Her place is clean and, as it is her home, has everything you would require. we were welcomed by her friends who gave us a warm welcome and showed us around the apartment. Cornelie's hospitality was exceptional and she even provided us with a tablet and guide book to borrow for our duration. It was a home away from home and we can't fault the apartment or Cornelie's hospitality and we would definitely look to stay here again. Highly recommend this place and it has certainly been the best Airbnb experience we have had.

Excellent location, particularly if you enjoy museums. Nice, bright, clean comfortable apartment. Her restaurant recommendations were terrific, and she was kind enough to leave us a few snacks and beverages. Sweet touch. Cornelie was out of the country, but a friend met us, and both she and he reached out to make sure we were comfortable during our stay. It truly was perfect from start to finish. I would recommend her lovely apartment to other travelers.

Fantastisch leuk appartementje op wandelafstand van het centrum. Leuk ingericht, alle comfort aanwezig en rustig gelegen.
Contact verliep vlot en aangenaam.
Wij hebben er van genoten! Het is een aanrader.

We had a wonderful stay here and would highly recommend it to others. Thank you to Cornelie, Sabine and Benno for making us feel so welcome and providing us with a lovely, comfortable and excellent place to rest. We hope you liked our gift from Sheffield as a thank you for our stay.

我們是從香港來的訪客。
很好的房東及房子。交通便利。房子如形容的一樣很舒適。我們很喜歡。
We are tourists from Hong Kong.
Very good host and apartment. And it's location is good.
Apartment as described very cozy and comfortable. We really like this apartment.

Nos encantó la casa de Cornélie. Las fotografías no hacen justicia del todo: la cas es mucho mejor, incluyendo una deliciosa terraza llena de plantas . Muy espaciosa, muy cómoda y muy bien equipada, sin contar el pequeño regalo de bienvenida: cervezas y galletas de dos tipos!
Nos acogió unos amigos de Cornelia ( ya lo sabíamos, nos había puesto al corriente de que esta fuera de la ciudad) y lo hicieron muy bien, explicándonos las cuatro cosas de la casa.
En cuanto a la ubicación del apartamento, lo encontramos inmejorable: suficiente lejos del bullicio del centro de Ámsterdam y a la vez suficientemente cerca para volver al mediodía a descansar. A dos pasos del Albert Cuyppmarkt donde encontrar de todo...y claro está a 5 minutos del museo pelón con los grandes museos de la ciudad.
En resumen, nuestra primera deprime cía con airbnb...y una de las nuestras mejores experiencias alquilando un apartamento en una ciudad. Gracias Cornélie, fue una delicia estar en tu casa durante estos 4 días, de verdad!

We loved our stay. Cornelie's home is very lovely and comfortable. We could not have asked for a better experience. She has a little deck off the second bedroom that we enjoyed with coffee or a drink. Location was extremely convenient for walking or connecting to public transportation. Cornelie was truly an outstanding host and made our stay enjoyable. We are a family of 3 and found this listing to be a perfect fit for our family.

Fits best for cultural and sightseeing trips. Good communication with host. We were surprised with nice  accessories for the end-of-year celebration.  Very comfortable stay, already considering a "come-back".

The apartment is really good! We were a family of four and we had everything we needed. Public transportation is available in the corner (easy commuting to the Central Station and downtown). Cornelie and Benno were really nice and supported us during the whole staying. Wonderful time in Amsterdam!

This was one of our best Airbnb experiences. The apartment was exactly as described and ideally located for us as we wanted to be slightly away from the madding crowds that make the more central areas tricky with small children. Cornelie was great with comms before our arrival and advised on a free place to park our car. Her nephew checked us in and we were really pleased with how well equipped the apartment was!

Great place in a superb location. Try the Corner Bakery across the street. It's superb! Easy access to tram/bus. Museums are around the corner and many major sites are walking distance. Cornelie is a great, communicative host. Definitely recommend.
Great apartment in a superb location.
perfect place and hospitality

This was a lovely, spacious apartment which was homely and very comfortable. It had everything (and more) that we needed for a long stay. It was a great location, right next to the Rijksmeum, Van Gough Museum and the Stedelijk Museum. Consequently, it was well connected by public transport and made travelling around the capital easier. We were delighted with the personal touches - wine, waffles and fresh flowers were provided as a welcome gift. Furthermore, the bedrooms looked out onto the back gardens and it was lovely having breakfast on the balcony. Excellent communication with the host and, overall, thoroughly recommended.
We had a great trip. The location is fantastic. You get a real insight into living in Amsterdam away from the tourist traps but close to everything that matters. We would definitely go back again.

Un accueil parfait une propreté irréprochable et une situation idéale que demander de plus !!
Nous reviendrons chez Cornelie sans hésiter
Check-in and location were great and Cornelie was a very nice host - she even left us a bottle of champagne in the fridge for New Years Eve.

We loved our stay at Cornelie’s home. Well equipped, comfortable and well located. It was like staying at a friends home. It is a beautiful space and our daughter loved the high bed. A very authentic Amsterdam experience. Recommended.

Cornelie’s house is the perfect spot to spend a few days in Amsterdam! The apartment is super cosy, stylish and perfectly located, just a couple of minutes away from the lovely Rijksmuseum. It’s equiped with all the conveniences to make us feel at home.
Both Cornelie and Femke were always very welcoming and friendly!
We definitely recommend Cornelie’s apartment for anyone who wants to discover the beauties of Amsterdam.

Le logement correspond exactement à la description. Bien situé dans un quartier calme. L'équipement est très fonctionnel et il est relativement agréable d'y passer quelques jours. Margot à fait en sorte que nous nous y sentions comme chez nous et elle n'a pas hésité à nous conseiller pour la visite dans le centre.

Das wunderschöne Appartment liegt nur wenige Gehminuten vom Centrum in einer ruhigen Wohngegend. Größe, Ausstattung und Sauberkeit sind hervorragend. Margot ist eine tolle Gastgeberin. Bei unserer Ankunft haben wir bereits einen fürs Frühstück bestückten Kühlschrank und diverse kleine Aufmerksamkeiten vorgefunden. Insgesamt ist mir auch nichts negativ aufgefallen, so dass ich Margots Appartment jedem empfehlen würde, der einen guten Ausgangspunkt sucht, um Amsterdam zu erkunden.

This was the best apartment we have used. Location was perfect and it was during Sail Amsterdam as a bonus! Margot was extremely helpful and the apartment was well stocked and comfortable. Thank you for offering your apartment!

Margot's apartment felt like home and I could easily stay for a much longer time.  She is a delightful person and her apartment is perfectly appointed.  The breakfast food, fruit and coffees were carefully chosen and most welcome.  Her previous guests' reviews also tell the story.
Margot was a great host. She was there to meet my girlfriend and I even though we were late and the airbnb was as described. Would stay with Margot again.

We had a wonderful stay at Margot's apartment. We were met by her son in an early arrival and promptly accommodated which was very helpful after a long flight. The pantry was well-stocked with a variety of delicious food for breakfast and a nice bottle of wine as a welcome. margot stopped by after work to greet us and go over details and answer any questions. She is a gracious, friendly host as is her son Joris. The apartment is comfortable, great bed, and the location is wonderful for getting to restaurants, the fun Nieumarket area and to the metro. The neighborhood is very quiet but the action is nearby. We will definitely stay with Margot again in a future visit. Thanks to Margot and Joris for a wonderful stay! Bill and Chris from northern California

Vous ne pouvez rêvez mieux en matière d'expérience avec airbnb! Margot à le sens de l'accueil, souriante et chaleureuse, elle s'adapte aux contraintes horaires. Elle nous a gâtée pour le petit déjeuner et son studio, en plus d'être pratique est tres propre! Vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermes et profiter d'Amsterdam l'esprit tranquille!

Me and my two friends spent 4 days in Amsterdam in September. We had a wonderful time at Margot's apartment!
Great location - very close to everything, but at the same time located on a quiet street. Just 10 min walk to the Central Train station.
Apartment is very clean and cozy , it was big enough for 3 people.
Margot was very helpful providing us with tourist information, she recommended really good restaurant in the area.
In the fridge we had everything for breakfast - few different kinds of cheese and ham, milk, eggs, cereal, jam, eggs, bread and butter.
Everything was organic!
Margot even treated us with a bottle of red wine!
If I come back to Amsterdam, I will definitely stay at this place again.
Thank you Margot!

A wonderful place to stay-- Cornélie's apartment is comfortable and charming, with plenty of space and lovely views off of the balcony. The apartment is in an ideal location, quiet and residential but a very short walk to the museum quarter or De Pijp. We were greeted by Femke, who was friendly and helpful, and she and Cornélie stayed in touch during the trip. A true gem-- highly recommended!
A comfortable and well equipped apartment in the elegant Museum Quarter. Cornelie was excellent to communicate with and the whole process was simple and efficient.

Our stay at Cornélie's couldn't be better. The apartment is very spacious and organized and fit perfectly for our needs. It's located in a great area, quiet, super close to Van Gogh museum and walking distance from supermarkets, cafes and public transport.
Cornélie's was super kind and considerate since our first contact. Her apartment is definetly a great option for a trip to Amsterdam.
Thank you again Cornélie.

The place was in a perfect location, next to the popular museums as well as walking distance to many restaurants and bars. The tram stop is not even 5 minutes walk that will get you to Amsterdam Central and closer into the middle of the city.

Was able to do laundry, cook your own food if you wanted, and had comfortable beds. Having the toilet separate from the shower was also a plus.

Would definitely recommend to people when staying in Amsterdam. Host even left us a New Years card as well as some drinks to celebrate.

We absolutely loved our time at this flat. It's beautiful, comfortable, roomy, and a Great kitchen. We had everything we needed and enjoyed having such a nice place to come back to after being out all day. Its a great location, it only took a few minutes by bus or metro to get to the center. We will most definitely look this place up again on our next visit to Amsterdam. The trip was terrific and the apartment had a large part in making it so. Helping me to confirm my decision to move to Amsterdam.

We stayed one night in the Blue room and two nights in the yellow room, which is right across the hall. We love Amsterdam and this place has great location! Less than a ten minute walk from the train station and with very nice hosts! We only met Gordon but he was very nice and gave us suggestions on places to visit as well. The blue room is smaller but we liked it more. It was street side with windows overlooking the street, which gave it some of that Amsterdam charm! We saw a car pulling a trailer with a piano and its pianist playing as it drove by! The yellow room, although bigger, didn’t have much of a view out the back balcony. It also had an awkwardly squeaky bed ;) I would hands down recommend this place to anyone, one of our favorite places we have stayed at!
Great hosts! Very friendly and the place is in a great location. We had a very pleasant stay.
Great hosts and excellent location to stay! Would highly recommend to everyone who is visiting Amsterdam. Thanks.

It was a great flat/apartment. Absolutely beautiful and very upscale. Jessica was very helpful - especially with bringing up the luggage - the stairs (ladder) is a challenge - but that is Amsterdam - we got used to them.  Good location. Markets/stores - and close to trams and train.
Fantastic location, the space was exactly as we expected. The breakfast supplies and snacks were a great addition. Thanks for a wonderful stay.

This house, this location and especially this host, Margot, were absolutely fantastic!  This is the best experience I've ever had with Airbnb and a rental and I've stayed at some great ones.  This was just the best.  From day one, Margot was helpful with my reservation and with making plans.  Detailed directions to her home and great communication made our arrival seamless!  The apartment was just perfect...adorable, comfortable and GREAT location.  Margot was an exquisite host putting out fresh flowers, stocking the fridge for breakfasts, getting us towels...just awesome!  I really can't say enough good about this rental.  When we visit Amsterdam again, I will HOPE to stay at Margot's place :-)

Staying with Margot is awesome! The place is clean and Margot gave us information on everything we needed to explore Amsterdam, she even provided us with snacks and breakfast! The place is a great size for 2people. Its a great location and easy to walk everywhere. we had a short trip but it was very well spent. I would love to stay here again in the future.

We had a wonderful time at this beautiful place. Margot was the best host we've ever had, providing us with breakfast materials, a bottle of wine and more. The apartment was extremely comfortable and warm and close to all of the places we wanted to see. We highly recommend!!!

Margot's communications were always timely and friendly .  Her son met us at the apartment and was very helpful answering our transit questions.  We loved the apartment and location.  We were so busy we really appreciated the well stocked kitchen for breakfast!
Very good location in quiet old center of Amsterdam. We will come back next year.

She has a nice place which is only a short walk from Central Station. She was kind enough to provide makings for breakfast and to suggest places for eating out. She made our stay in Amsterdam more enjoyable and we would recommend it to anyone visiting that area.

Margot was very friendly and check in went smoothly. My husband and I stayed there for only two nights as part of our honeymoon. The location is in a nice neighborhood, close to everything and we really appreciated all of the breakfast items Margot provided. The only small complaint we have is that the walls are very thin and we could hear footsteps and noises from upstairs where Margot lives very early in the morning waking us both up both mornings. Besides that, we had a great stay in Amsterdam.

Margot was a fantastic host. Good and prompt communication, flexible and attentive. The apartment exceeded expectations. Comfy bed, great bathroom, excellent location and the breakfast/wine provided was such a thoughtful touch. Margot was even so kind as to provide Xmas goodies. Can't recommend her place highly enough.

nous avons été très bien accueilli par Margot qui nous avait préparé de gentils attention . Le studio est très beau , très propre et bien agencé . Il est idéalement placé dans un quartier calme et très proche a pied du centre ville .Nous  y reviendrons avec plaisir .

Margot was lovely and charming, she made all the necessary arrangements for our (very early!) check in time, and let us check out late as we requested. the studio was exactly as described - centrally located, warm, comfortable, and ,argot made sure that we have some food waiting for us. it was a great place to have our vacation at and we will definitely go back there.

Nous avons passé un weekend de st-valentin juste fantastique grâce à Margot. L'appartement est proche du red light district et de Dam Square ce qui est très plaisant à vélo pour faire les magasins et pour manger.

Nous la remercions tout particulièrement de sa flexibilité pour les heures d'arrivés et de départ. Cela nous a permis de ne pas avoir nos valises avec nous en ville.

Margot is a great host. She is very friendly and provided a warm welcome on the day of my arrival. She is also very flexible and would assists whenever possible.

The house is quite near to the main transportation centre, Amsterdam Centraal - only a MRT station away. Although the house is very near to the happening areas, such as the red light district, it is very quiet at any time.

I would recommend Margot's property to anyone visiting Amsterdam.

A nossa estadia na casa da Margot foi fantástica.
Lugar simpático, casa com todas as comodidades necessárias e conforto.
As bolachinhas, o vinho e a seleção de CD´s deram um toque de charme à nossa estadia.
Obrigada.
Esperamos poder voltar.
Ni e Cristiano

Margot nous a très bien reçu. Son acceuil à été chaleureux et elle nous a mis à l'aise dès notre arrivée. L'appartement était rempli de délicates attentions. On ne peut que se sentir comme chez soi avec un tel acceuil !
L'appartement est d'ailleurs très bien situé, au bord d'un canal dans une rue calme tout en étant au coeur de la ville et à 5min à pied du centre très animé. C'est une adresse à garder bien précieusement pour un prochain séjour à Amsterdam et que je recommande à tous ! ;)

Jessica is the kind of woman you would like to meet when you arrive in Amsterdam : welcoming, smiley and open-minded.
For our first experience with AirBnB, we were very enjoyed.
Her apartment is full furnished and very clean. The ambiance is very sweet and the homestage is a little arty and natural : it feels good at the first minutes you're inside.
It's a pleasure to cook in the open kitchen and to lay in the confortable sweet bedroom.
The bathroom, as the rest of the apartment, is renovated with good look.
As well, it's a very sunny place and you can enjoy it with the little balcony over the street.
Jessica's apartment is rewarded after climbing the traditional stairs of Amsterdam... Don't be drunk ! ;-)
Idealy located in a shopping street (with many groceries, supermarkets, bakeries and bars), and easy to access from Centraal Station, you will feel like at home... Or more !
We will come back with pleasure in this place : thanks Jessica xxx
Anthony & Philippe

Jessica left her flat very clean and it is a lovely light spacious apartment. The kitchen is well equipped with a proper cooker which is often not the case in Amsterdam.We
cooked a meal on 1 of our nights, with Dutch andTurkish
supermarkets really close to the apartment,it was very easy to conjure up a tasty (Website hidden by Airbnb) is only a five min walk to the station and then just 1 stop to central station,yet it feels well away from the tourist areas. The only downside is the steep narrow stairs to the 2nd floor,not for elderly!

It's a comfortable apartment. Clean and cosy. Very well designed, nice kitchen. The neighborhood is perfect, not too noisy not too quiet. Stores, restaurants, pubs are very very closed . A big open-market is there. Very lively place. Downtown by walking is a little bit hard (I love to walk in Amsterdam) but can be done (by bike can be perfect). It's closer to the Botanical garden and the zoo, a very nice area too.
It's 5 minutes walk to the Muiderpoort station from where you can take the train directly to Schiphol Airport or Amsterdam Centraal. Yes the stairs are narrow, but it's so common in Amsterdam that it didn't bothered us.

Jessica was a great host from the very beginning. She replied right after I contacted her, was opened and friendly. Her place is exactly what it appears to be and more! Awesome huge comfy bed, spacious lights living room with a nice couch for a couple to take a nap :) the street is very close from train station and has couple of stores that are opened after 7 p.m. A tram gets you to downtown in 10-15 min and walking around the neighborhood is simply wonderful. It was my first stay in Amsterdam and thanks to Jessica it was even more fun!

We had a really great time. Jessica's flat was super! It was very clean, light, spacious and had a lovely balcony overlooking the main street. Jessica was there to greet us and even left us a bottle of wine to start our holiday. She left a list of recommendations for the neighbourhood; which is a vibrant area full of nice cafes and bars. The flat is 5min walk to Muiderpoort train station, which is 1 stop from Amsterdam central. However, we enjoyed the half hour stroll into the centre or 10 minutes on a bike (hired locally). We would definitely stay here again and recommend it to anyone wanting a pleasant base for exploring Amsterdam.

I had a wonderful stay at Jessica's beautiful home. The apartment is even nicer than I expected and I had everything I needed. Equipped with dishwasher, large range double-oven, lovely bath and separate shower, double aspect balconies. Jessica made me feel very welcome, leaving me a bottle of wine and something to eat. Jessica was very knowledgeable about the area and left a great selection of maps and guides to help me out and full written information about the flat and the local area. The location is ideal; one train stop away from Central Station (5 minutes), the airport half an hour in the other direction. Also accessible by foot and tram (I bought an unlimited 3 day ticket which allowed access to all trains, trams and buses, including airport transfer, which made getting around really easy). There are bakeries, restaurants, parks, coffee shops etc locally and a supermarket opposite the apartment. One thing to note; the stairs are - as is traditional in Amsterdam - very steep, and so may not be suitable for somebody with mobility issues. Jessica was quick to respond, easily contactable through phone or SMS and flexible re. arrival and departure, kindly allowing me to leave my bags at the apartment on my final day. I wouldn't hesitate to book Jessica's place again. Lovely experience!

Thanks for a really lovely apartment. Very comfortable. All the thinks you need in a very convenient location.  Very clean and tidy. And quite. Stairs are narrow and steep like in many Amsterdam houses.

What a gorgeous apartment! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Jessica met us for check in and explained everything we needed to know about the apartment. We loved that there were so many small grocery stores right on the same street. It was both a quiet apartment and in a desirable area. We would stay here again and again!

Margot was waiting for My girlfriend and I when we arrived and made us feel very welcome and pointed us in the right direction for things to see and do. The apartment was perfect and overall we had a fantastic 3 days in Amsterdam because the location and self sufficiency of the accommodation. I would highly recommend this Margot and her place and hope she has availability next time we return!

Thank you again to Jessica, the place was exactly as described and listed. The location was convenient, close to tram and train station. Jessica even decorated the place with fresh tulips and chocolate easter bunny to welcome us for the easter weekend! The stairs are steep, but jessica helped us with luggages! Very lovely and cozy!

Jessica's place was very nice and cozy. Everything was described well and the place was clean upon our arrival. We were greeted by her friend (as Jessica was away) who did a great job giving us a tour.

The neighborhood is nice and has some cool spots to eat, drink and do groceries. ~20 min by bicycle to the city center, but a very enjoyable ride. We wish we had more than 3 days to spend there.

Jessica is a conscientious host who provided us with helpful information as well as comfortable environment for us to settle in. The location is very close to trendy restaurants, pubs, cafés and supermarkets and within a short walking distance to trams. We enjoyed our time in Amsterdam and this definitely helped.
The host canceled this reservation 127 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Jessica's apartment has spoiled me for my future Airbnb bookings. It was a wonderful, quiet, relaxing space in a vibrant, neighborhood of good restaurants, welcoming bars, unique shops and friendly locals. Jessica's mother was my host and was very helpful in many ways - a real highlight of my stay.

I went to Amsterdam to do some writing and it was a perfect place for that. Sitting at the large table, looking out over the beautiful street scene, with fruit and vegetable stands lining the sidewalks across from me was more than I could have hoped for. Her apartment was totally functional with everything I needed - a rainforest shower, a giant soaking tub, a comfortable bed, front and rear balconies, and a stylish, modern kitchen. Plus a really strong, fast internet connection. I will definitely book there again.

Margot has been a most gracious host. Her apartment is at a beautiful spot where two canals meet, close to the city center and within walking distance to most everything in Central Amsterdam. The apartment is on the ground floor but it is very quiet, bright, and private. Margot made sure the fridge was full of goodies, which was a nice touch.  I had a most enjoyable time at Margotś place; highly recommended.

This apartment is wonderful.  Quiet at night, close to all the sights, safe for going out at night and 15 minute walk to the train station.  The fridge is full when you arrive with all kinds of goodies, cookies as well as chocolate, a bottle of wine too.  We love Margot and would recommend her place to everyone.  It is perfect!  If Margot ever decides not to rent out her apartment anymore we will be heart broken and never return to  Amsterdam!
We had a very pleasant stay. The room is clean and contains everything you could possibly need. Breakfast was delish.
The listing description was very accurate. We loved this studio and would recommend it to anyone . Margot was home to greet us and give us a short orientation to the apt. And the city
Beautiful city, beautiful location and perfect accommodation
