What a delight!  Margot made everything perfect.....from the first minute we arrived.  We were lost, tired and more than a little cranky on the walk from the train station. But, thankfully Margot left a well- stocked fridge with lovely cheeses, meats and bread...and after a quick lunch, and a glass of wine we were re-energized, cheerful, and off exploring.  The suite is very comfortable, very well equipped, and very well situated.....and we walked everywhere!  Amazingly, the noise and crowds are so close but our location was VERY quiet, residential and even located on a canal! Even on a Saturday night, it was peaceful. Margot was so lovely, so flexible, and very accommodating our request of a late check-out.  Should I even mention her homemade apricot jam?

Margot was a amazing host! She added so many special details to the place to make it extra comfortable and nice. It exceeded all expectations! Very quiet neighborhood but still close to the action and many sights! Had a wonderful time there!
Margot is amazing. The place is amazing. Please don't give it a second thought, this place is legit!

Margot is a lovely host. She was there to welcome us when we arrived. The apartment is  perfectly placed in a quiet pretty canal street just a short walk from the busy centre. The apartment is nicely furnished, very comfortable and well equipped with everything you might need. The fridge was full of lovely things for our breakfasts and snacks and plenty of tea and coffee. I would definitely recommend Margot's apartment if you are looking for somewhere to stay in Amsterdam.

Unser Aufenthalt in Amsterdam war wunderbar. Das haben wir besonders Margot mit dieser schönen modernen und gepflegten Unterkunft zu verdanken. Die Lage ist optimal: ruhig gelegen und trotzdem nur wenige Gehminuten vom historischen Zentrum und auch  von den modernen Bauten der Docks (eye Filmmuseum, Bibliothek, Nemo...) entfernt. Margot ist eine tolle Gastgeberin. Im Kühlschrank findet man alles für ein gesundes und leckeres Frühstück. Man wird mit Wein Obst, Gebäck und frischen Blumen begrüßt. Das Bücherregal ist mit guter Reiselektüre bestückt. Kleine Kärtchen im Regal sind Hinweise auf wirklich gute Restaurants. Die Kommunikation vor und während der Reise war sehr gut. Margot gab uns einen prima Tipp zum Parken (Oosterdok!) und war für alle Fragen offen. Wir können diese Unterkunft unbedingt weiterempfehlen!

Margot was most welcoming and a great communicator before and during our stay.  Preparation is terrific, the apartment is beautifully presented, tasteful and comfortable.  Everything has been carefully thought out for a comfortable stay. The kitchen is very well equipped with all one might need for preparation and cooking. The spaces are light and flexible. The apartment is perfectly located for walking to the main hubs, station, galleries and sites.  It is in a quiet neighbourhood, just steps away from cafes, shops and market with other markets easy to get to.  Amsterdam has much to offer and this place is a perfect place to land after a long trip or a day out exploring.  We were touched by the inclusion of provisions to get started and some flowers.  There is attention to the design of everything in this place!
Most excellent host. We would definitely stay with her each time we come back to this city.

Margot made check in very easy. Our train was arriving earlier than the listed check in time, but Margot had no problem with us dropping our bags off. Turns out the apartment was ready, and we could check in as soon as we arrived. Lovely apartment and we really enjoyed cooking breakfast with the excellent food Margot supplied. The location was perfect. We walked everywhere. Very safe area. We would highly recommend this Airbnb.

Thanks for the fantastic stay at your Mondriaan place in Amsterdam. The location was excellent in the heart of the city and it was great to come back to a beautiful quiet refuge each day. Gracious hostess. I would highly recommend your place.
Belva

Margot really has a gift of hospitality. This lovely lady treated us like her friends. She provided us with plenty of food for breakfast and a bottle of wine. Because we were on a cruise ship for two weeks and needed to do laundry, she even did laundry for us. She also helped us with taxi arrangement to the train station. Her house is at a perfect location near Amsterdam  Central Rail  station where you can get on the train or bus easily. Also the apartment is on the first floor so we didn't have to manage a narrow winding stair case. Since we a seniors, we really appreciated the ground floor setup. We would go back to her place and recommend her place to vacationers who a looking for a nice place to stay.

Margot was wonderful! Her place is a cute studio with plenty of space. We found it to be clean and as described. She included cheeses and meats for breakfast and snacking. We had very relaxed mornings here before hitting the pavement each day for exploring.
We were able to walk everywhere we wanted to go and found her neighborhood to be quiet and safe!
B&B is as described. Location was excellent. Easy walking distance to attractions. Very close to restaurants. Margot, an attentive hostess.

Margot graciously accommodated our arrival time even though our plans changed a few times. The apartment is lovely, with a fully equipped kitchen. It was great to be able to go to the market and cook a few meals when we did not want to eat in a restaurant. The bed is soft, which will work for people who like soft beds. Quiet neighborhood right on one of the canals and only a short walk from the train station. All in all we had a wonderful visit and appreciate all that Margot did to make it a memorable trip to Amsterdam.

Margot 's Studio is ideal for a couple & really well equipped for a comfortable stay . The location is excellent being both very central but also really quiet - we walked virtually everywhere , enjoying the local atmosphere & sights . Some lovely bars and restaurants within very easy walking distance of the New Market area .
Lovely thoughtful touches included flowers , fruit , a bottle of wine and sweet waffles- as well as breakfast ingredients for our stay . Communication with Margot was excellent throughout .
As per other reviewers comments, our only minor criticism was that the mattresses were soft & this didn't suit us personally . All in all a highly recommended host & apartment.

We spend three wonderful days in Margots b&b. It's just as nice as it looks in pictures! The location is perfect. 10min walk from the station and never more than 30 min to reach any point in the city center! Still it's very quiet and the bed is ever so comfy! (Well, we like the softer mattress!) when we arrived the fridge was fully stocked and and we could enjoy a nice meal without leaving the house! The house is very clean and spacious. It's been a wonderful stay and I wishMargot all the best! Thank you!

Marc and Andre
A perfect base for exploring the city - in a quiet canal-side location yet a short distance from all the city's attractions. The flat is clean, cosy and well-equipped - we would highly recommend it.

Margot's place was very comfortable and central while being far enough off the beaten path to be rather quiet. Margot is a very gracious host and was very generous with her time! She gave great pointers for what to do while in Amsterdam, and the flat was filled with more information about the city than we could imagine. The flat itself was really cozy and warm, and the kitchen was well-equipped and well-stocked. This is without a doubt where we will stay on future trips to the city.

L'accueil, le logement, le séjour...tout était PARFAIT
Emplacement, tranquillité, propreté, équipement, confort...tout est au rendez-vous, et Margot, qui excelle en Français, (langue qu'elle enseigne dans les lycées et collèges Amstellodamois) a su nous apporter de nombreux conseils, et nous a réservé un accueil tout simplement parfait.
Un très grand plaisir pour ce long week end de découverte de la ville.
Nous recommandons vivement.
Brigitte et François

Le studio est très propre.
L'emplacement est à la fois proche de tout et calme
Margot est très accueillante
Je recommande ce studio pour un séjour à Amsterdam

The apartment was such a wonderful treat!  Nestled in the canals, it is immaculate and stocked with great local cheeses and other delicious food.  We slept comfortably and appreciated all the sightseeing resources readily available.  Margot was warm and a wonderful host...don't miss out on this fantastic place!

We loved staying here.  A great location on the best street in Amsterdam. Comfortable, safe and the breakfasts were yummy.  Great grocery store and cheese store across the street. Actually, all kinds of stores but the cheese is the best I have ever tasted.  Gordon was helpful and cheerful dispite having a bad cold.  I really like the way the place was set up.  Our room was on a separate floor where we had privacy and we did not feel like we were intruding.  The yellow room is bigger but you do not have the fun street view that the blue room has.  A great deal.  Thanks so much.
The reservation was canceled 3 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Everything have been perfect. This appartment is amazing!
Thank you for all.

This place was absolutely perfect! The space is even better than the photos - incredibly clean, great space, wonderful decor. Awesome balcony off of the living area. Bright rooms. Jessica was an amazing host - communicating with us immediately if I had any questions about the neighborhood or getting around. I will recommend her place to any friends that visit Amsterdam! Thank you, Jessica! :)
Wonderful place for a wonderful trip with my boyfriend !

Jessica place is absolutely wonderful. Close to public transit and in a nice locality. The apartment absolutely charming. Me and my wife stayed there for three nights and had a great time. Recommended.

Best Regards,
Pankaj dutt.

I highly recommend Jessica's place! It is a beautiful apartment located in the fabulous, diverse east of Amsterdam (Oost) close to public transport, supermarkets, bars, cafes and restaurants. It was beautifully clean and has a really well stocked kitchen. A fabulous airbnb!!
stay at the top top top, see you soon maybe
Einfach super! Es ist ein Fehler es nicht zu buchen. Es hat alles gepasst. Ich liebe es :-)

My & my boyfriend stayed over a long weekend in this room and we both loved it. It is very charming and comfortable. Situated in a nice and central area, supermarket across the street, 10 minutes walk from the central station. The breakfast was lovely and the bed extremely comfortable.

Thank you guys again for having us, we'll be back for sure!

This has been the best apartment I have rented on this site!
The host was extra nice and extra helpful. She had stocked the fridge and pantry with goodies for us to use from A to Z.
She was helpful on anything we needed or wanted to know.
The apartment is a walkable distance from everything you need in Amsterdam
We will for sure return to Margot's!!!

We had a great stay.  Shower works great, mattress was firm (we thought), and a good location.  We walked to and from Central Station in 10 minutes and it was easy to walk around the city.  There was a nice coffee shop around the corner and the kitchen was stocked with plenty of breakfast items, cookies and a bottle of wine.  Communication with Margot was easy.  Area is quiet at night.  We would stay here again.

My boyfriend and I visited Amsterdam for my 30th birthday and Margot was a wonderful host.

The room was big and bright with comfortable beds. All the amenities were there (bread, milk, juice, meat, cheese and bread) and it was a great central location with a 10-15min walk into town.

Highly recommended for a visit. :)
Great location in Amsterdam on a quiet canal. Very nice cozy place to return at the end of the day.

Ho soggiornato ad Amsterdam per 4 giorni e incontrare Margot è stata una vera fortuna! L'alloggio è così come appare, la descrizione rispecchia perfettamente l'ambiente. Accogliente, confortevole, pulito e vicinissimo a tutti i punti di interesse, dista soli 10 min dalla stazione centrale. Margot è molto disponibile e fornisce tutte le informazioni utili per visitare la città. Fornisce anche tutto il necessario per la prima colazione, latte, caffè, the, pane, burro, uova, marmellata, prosciutto e formaggio.
La casa inoltre, dispone di tutti gli elettrodomestici più utili, asciugacapelli, bollitore, forno microonde ecc..
Il mio giudizio, dunque, è molto positivo.

Accueil chaleureux (dans un français impeccable), souplesse et disponibilité pour les horaires d'arrivée et de départ. Le studio est parfaitement équipé, propre et exactement conforme à la description. En bonus, des guides, des plans et de délicieuses spécialités locales mis à disposition par Margot. Un hébergement à recommander sans hésitation !

Paisible et central , dans un lieu qui symbolise tout le charme de la ville !!!
Un accueil charmant et une venue attentionnée !
N 'hésitez pas !

Margot was exceptional and the apartment was just perfect. Great location, facilities and very comfortable. After a long trip Margot was waiting for us with an incredible breakfast and was available at all time for us. I strongly recommend to book her apartment. Our stay was great and would come back for sure in case we visit Amsterdam again.
Great apartment, great location, great host. Ticked every box we needed ticking for our weekend break and one or two more besides. We would heartily recommend.
I highly recommend Margot's BnB for its great location! It's in a quiet but close to where all the action is.
everything was perfect! thank you.

Margot's apartment is perfect. It's centralized. Walking distance to literally everything. It's clean and comfortable. We definitely enjoyed our stay. She replies really quickly and has great communication.
Jessica is a great host, who is thoughtful about her guests and very available. Her home is very beautiful and comfortable, perfect after long walks in the streets of Amsterdam!

Amazing appartement, stunning interior and everything that you would need! Loved the location a wonderful mix of new businesses and long-standing local restaurants and shops. Very close to multiple transport links, Jessica is a great host and the bed is super comfy! Luna is also very cute.
Jessica's place was fantastic. She is in a super cute neighborhood that is very accesible to all major sights. Her cat is the cutest and the place is comfortable and stylish.

Jessica’s place was great - clean, spacious with plenty of amenities and is conveniently located. It is accessible by many trams and train station is just two blocks away. There is also a grocery store Albert Heijn right around the block which made it very convenient. Keep in mind that there are steep stairs leading to the apartment, but not at all a problem for young travelers. Very much recommended!

Jess's place is amazing. So close to multiple points of public transport and a quick ride gets you to everything you need. The neighbourhood is so cute and quiet, perfect for a late night stroll or a breakfast at one of the many cafes. Jess was quick to respond and checked in on us during our stay. The place is exactly like the photos, clean and perfect for what we needed. And because this is a home, you have everything you could need in the kitchen. The only thing people need to remember is this is a home and I was a little reluctant at first to stay in a home as all the other airbnb were rentals, but there is no worry.
The WiFi was so fast and the towels were so soft which was a really nice touch!! All in all, 100% would recommend.
Nous avons passé un agréable séjour, merci Jessica 😊
Een mooie stijlvolle ruimte, op een praktische locatie in Amsterdam.

Fun, comfortable and quiet flat in a vibrant part of the city - great local bars, shops and restaurants, and 10 mins tram-ride from the centre. Felt right at home - although Jessica was right about the steepness of the stairs! We would definitely recommend staying here.
very beautiful Apartment for our vacation in Amsterdam. It's nearby the central and got a supermarket across the street. We had a wonderful stay with Luna and would definitely come again :)
Spacious apartment, lively neighborhood, sweetest kitty!
Apartment liegt in einem sehr schönen und einheimisch belebtem Viertel. Die Wohnung war sehr sauber und ist sehr gut ausgestattet.
Lovely appartement with a very reliable and professional host. We really enjoyed our time here. Luna was also really cute and easy to handle.

Siamo stati a casa di Jessica per 4 notti, la casa è molto bella e pulita, Luna è una gatta dolcissima. La posizione è un po’ fuori dal centro ma comunque comoda con i mezzi in quanti si trova vicina alla stazione di Muiderpoort. Unica nota negativa sono le tipiche scale “olandesi”, scomode se non si è abituati ma per fortuna l’appartamento è al secondo piano. In ogni caso alloggio consigliatissimo, Jessica e i suoi genitori sono stati molto disponibili.

Our stay here was just lovely! The appartement is very nice, spacious and tidy and has all the amenities you could think of. Jessica is super sweet and very responsive, it was a true pleasure staying here. Would definitely recommend!

Perfect accommodation right in the center of Amsterdam. From the central train station it is only a 5 Minutes walk to get there. Rijk is very nice and takes care of everything. He gave me some tips what to see and what's around. The house is only a 5 - 10 minute walk to many attractions. Located in a quiet area at a canal nearby one of the most beautiful parts of the city called Jordaan. The room is nice and has shower and toilet. Everything was very clean.  You can take your breakfast in a large and nice kitchen with large windows and morning sun overlooking one of the most beautiful canals of Amsterdam. For a relaxing stay in Amsterdam, I can recommend Rijks Place.
Super appartement. Idéalement situé. Margot a été très accueillante et nous a rempli le frigo a notre arrivee. Une bouteille de vin et un bouquet de fleurs nous attendaient. Une adresse a recommander
Margot was a lovely host and the apartment is close to everything in Amsterdam!

Margot's apartment had everything we needed, and the location could not have been better. She went out of her way to assist us in enjoying Amsterdam, including warning us about the Kamikaze bike riders. We highly recommend her apartment to all.
Great apartment and location in Amsterdam, and Margot was a very welcoming host. Would definitely recommend.

The Blue Room was perfect for our short stay in the city! Gordon was friendly and helpful offering us guidebooks, wifi and was really accomodating to our timetable on our last day. It was great to have a tasty breakfast included and the fridge and coffee machine in the room were really useful. Their place is in a great location with lovely vintage clothes stores and cafes nearby and it's a really nice walk to get there from the central station. The room itself was lovely and bright, very clean, with a nice view of the street and fresh air through two big windows that opened fully.

The whole stay was brilliant and I very much recommend Gordan and Amy's!

Abbiamo trascorso tre notti nella stanza blu. Era tutto molto pulito e ordinato. Non abbiamo conosciuto Amy poichè lavorava, ma Gordon è stato molto gentile e disponibile a darci consigli utili per la nostra permanenza ad Amsterdam. Ci ha anche messo in contatto con lo chef italiano del ristorante dove lavora Amy.
Esperienza assolutamente piacevole e da consigliare. Grazie Gordon

Riks' is a wonderful place to stay in Amsterdam. He is an excellent host offering helpful tips and information. The room was very comfortable and convenient with a private show within the room. The location is quite close to the central train station and night life. An excellent experience!

I can tell you that this is probably the best option if you are going to stay in Amsterdam for a couple of days. Gordon is a great guy and the room is cosy, clean and quiet. Also, you will be in central station in 10 minutes (walking distance), so don't need to bother about public transportation. Very nice place! Totally worth it!
Really nice place in awesome location! Breakfasts were very substantial. Gordon was very nice and helpful! Price is very reasonable.We like this place!

It's an unusual but very agreeable set up. About 10 minutes walk from Central Station they live over a shop. There are two self contained rooms on the first floor which share a toilet and shower between them. Gordon and Amy live on the floor above so although you know where they are there's a level of independence which was nice since I was exhausted.

The room is a good size and comes complete with everything you'd need for a short stay including fridge. The fruit and Danish pastries I got for breakfast were perfect to keep you going until brunch. I'm sure there are shinier places in Amsterdam but I liked it, it was comfortable and that's what matters most to me.

Among all the offers on airbnb for Amsterdam we really chose a perfect place: a well sized room, warm and quiet, near to all attractions and a breakfast that was more than enough. As from the 2nd day on we were the only guests they offered us to use one room for each person (mother and son) without extra charge. We were absolutely indipendent to come or go.
Wonderful, polite and very welcoming hosts. They make you feel right at home. Very good communication and speedy response :)

The location is absolutely the best! A very tempting chocolate store right a cross the street...Marqt, organic food market just a few hundred meters away and all the vintage shops and delicious restaurants right there...
The downside is the noise of the lively street coming through the single glass windows...These hosts were so sweet! I felt very welcome during my stay.

This is a great place to stay in Amsterdam with an excellent location, and nice view. Amsterdam is such a beautiful city and it was great to walk around. The apartment is really close to the supermarket and train station as well. The street can be a but noisy at night but I just wore earplugs and it was fine. We were made to feel very welcome and comfortable.
This flat is in a good location for walking around the city.  The host's were very nice.

Este cuarto es todo lo que necesitas y más, es un cuarto situado en un primer piso , el lugar es muy céntrico y los alrededores tranquilos y seguros , a pasos de el tienen supermercados, panaderías, lavaderos y otros lugares de interés. Esta muy cercano a la estación central ! Además el cuarto es muy limpio y ordenado cómodo y acogedor, y Gordon y Amy se portaron muy bien con nosotros  además de guiarnos en la ciudad , todos los días nos ordenaban el cuarto y nos dejaban preparado un espectacular desayuno, sin duda era exquisito !!!!! Este departamento es muy recomendable disfrutamos mucho de nuestra estadía en en cuarto azul. Muchas gracias por todo Gordon y Amy !! Saludos Nissi y Matías desde Argentina!!

We had a wonderful stay at Gordon & Amy's !
The room was very clean, we were totally independent, hosts were super nice, and very helpful.
finally, the location is really great, perfectly situated, it's central and in a really cool street with nice shops and bars. it's very closed to the central station, so practical !
Nice room, perfectly located in the centre with a nice little patio. The hosts are very nice as well. You can come and go whenever you want. We had a great stay!

Few minutes by walk from the Central Station, the location was perfect: the supermarket just in front of the apartment and the street  is full of shops, cafès, pubs and restaurants. I booked for the blue (smallest) room and Gordon welcome me and my friend in the big yellow room, this was really appreciated. I spent a very amazing time in Amsterdam and the Gordon and Amy's B&B was a sthe cherry on the cake. Thank you for your kindness Gordon!

Superbe location et près des restos-bars-épiceries. Ne ratez pas la fromagerie au coin de la rue :). Petit-déjeuner à la chambre très pratique et excellent. Merci à Gordon pour ses petites attentions. Hôte serviable. Cependant n'oubliez pas les bouchons d'oreilles car la rue est plutôt passante de jour et de nuit. Amsterdam est fantastique, découvrez la ville à partir de cette chambre! Guy-Antoine et Joanie, Québec. Avril 2013.

Très bon emplacement à Amsterdam pour ce B&B situé à 20 mns à pied de la gare.
Nous avons apprécié les deux jours de séjour à Amsterdam et avons pu profiter pleinement de la ville à partir de ce logement.
le logement est correct mais manque un peu de décoration.
Par contre nous avons beaucoup apprécié le petit déjeuner.

Margot's place is close to everything.
A nice canal flows by just outside the window, it is just off the main canals.
The host is very helpful with check in and explaining everything.
I highly recommend this room, it provides a local feel with everything we needed to make our stay comfortable.

The location of Margot's studio is absolutely perfect for someone new to Amsterdam that wants to get a flavor of the city. On a quiet block along a beautiful waterway with a 5 minute walk to bustling restaurants, "coffeeshops", red light district, or whatever your adventurous spirit desires. Not to mention, the actual studio is nothing less than fantastic along with a gracious and thoughtful host. Look forward to my next trip to Amsterdam as I know exactly where I'll be staying!

We were very impressed, Margot answered all our questions prior to arrival and greeted us with a warm welcome and intro to the apartment.
Within easy walking distance of central station and canal cruise departures.
We would definitely recommend!!

Margot was welcming and friendly. Everything was in the fridge to get us started. The supermarket, restaurants and bars were close. We walked easily with baggage to Amsterdam centraal. You could scaresly do better.
We are grateful.

monolocale ampio e comodo, vicinissimo alla stazione e al centro, collegato bene anche ai mezzi pubblici ( stazione della metro vicina)
margot gentilissima e disponibile, sarà a disposizione per ogni dubbio e per qualsiasi cosa, assolutamente consigliato !
Sehr schöne zentral gelegene Wohnung mit einer sehr freundlichen Gastgeberin. Zentral gelegen, ideal für alle die Amsterdam erleben möchten. Nur zu empfehlen!

Margo's place is great, close to the centre part of Amsterdam. The Flat is large and roomy with everything you need for a great stay.  Margot was very responsive if we needed anything.  She is a very nice lady and also did a bag of washing for us as we were going on a River Cruise straight after our stay at her flat.  It is walking distance to River Boat terminals only 10-15min.    Great coffee shop just around the corner 'Black Gold' if you like your coffee.

Riks is a great host. We had a wonderful time at his place in A'dam and would like to visit him again - and soon! The breakfast was nice, rooms were clean and the price is OK.

The location of Riks B&B is really lovely - I cant imagine how better it could be... If looking for a warm and cosy place to stay, dont look further :-)

Do you want a 5-star experience in the heart of the Centrum? A 10-min walk from central rail service from airport? A fully functional efficiency to make your meals, should you wish?  A beautifully arranged spacious room? This is a perfect living space, and you do not even have to climb stairs like you do in other Europe Airbnb's.  Need we say more?  This is worth every Euro you spend. Thank you, Margot for everything, including your reception and super, cheery personality.  We hope to stay with you again. 5-Stars--bravo!

Very easy to get to from the airport. The appartement is centraly located at walking distance to all tourist attractions, Super! No public transportation required to visit Amsterdam. Very comfortable bed and well equipped appartement. Very safe environment. Margot welcomed us with a bottle of wine, cheese, cold cuts and other goodies! I strongly recommend this appartement to anyone who intends to visit Amsterdam.

Denis & Diane
Very nice and clean apartment with everything you need and at a prime location with so many stash in the fridge and even a bottle of red wine and some snacks 💃🏻🍷 would definitely stay here again
Perfect in every way, from walking distance from train station to comfy beds and huge breakfasts. We walked to all museaums. Local restaurants are so good! We were pleasantly surprised.

I would highly recommend Margot's place for a stay in Amsterdam - the apartment is clean and has everything you would need.  Margot was great to work with and very responsive, and even provided a bottle of wine, cookies, and breakfast foods.  The location is good, it's on a very quiet street right outside of City Center.  The only comment I have is that when you arrive you may want to avoid walking from Centraal Station to the apartment as the walk is through the busiest part of the city and is a little chaotic if you aren't sure where you're going.  Otherwise we were extremely happy with our stay!

This is like having a studio apartment with a private entrance as well as cooking facilities.  Margot provides food for you to make your own breakfasfs or even lunch.  She gives you complete privacy.  It is quite modern, sparkling clean, with almost everything you need including hairdryer, electrical adaptors, coffe maker, toaster and more.  It is very close to everything including Centraal Station and the red light district, all within a easy walking distance.  Stay here, you will be extremely glad you did.
Margot è un'ottima padrona di casa, gentile e ospitale. Il suo appartamento è vicino al centro della città e molto comodo per qualsiasi spostamento urbano.

Really nice apartment right on a quiet canal yet close to the action, nice residential street, 3-4 min walk to metro, 10-15 min to Central Station.
Apartment was clean, plenty of space for 2. Comfortable bed, full kitchen.
Margot checked on us a couple of times and offered some local tips on activities for us.
Recommend and will stay again if available when next in Amsterdam.

El lugar es impecable,Mrgot nos espero,nos dio la bienvenida y nos mostro ek departamento.Noa dejo la heladera repleta de alimentos para eldesyuno,huevos,jamon,queso mermeladas,manteca,pan,biscochos,jugos de naranja,realmente increible.El departamento esta muy bien hubicado,a unas cuadras del barrio rojo,del centro y de la estacion de trenes,puedes hacer todo a pie,realmente recomendable.ojala pueda volver pronto!!!!no encontre nada negativo para marcar.

Le logement de Margot est idéalement situé dans un quartier très calme proche de la gare centrale et du centre ville. Il est très coquet et très bien équipé. On s'y sent très bien ! Le petit déjeuner est très copieux agrémenté de délicieuses confitures "maison".
Si je devais retourner à Amsterdam, je sélectionnerais ce logement sans hésitation.
Merci à Margot pour son chaleureux accueil même tardif !

The apartment was exactly as described and Margot was an outstanding host.  The kitchen was fully equipped with lots of thoughtful extras like breakfast fixings,  light snacks and the bed was comfortable.  The location was also perfect for our needs. Thank you Margot.

Thanks Margot for the awesome responses. Margot is very helpful in arranging the checked in. It only take 5-7 minutes walk (with 2 large suitcase). The place is very tidy, clean, and huge. It is also walking distance to tram station. 10-15 mins walk to Amsterdam Central. Margot is very thoughtful she even prepare milk, orange juice, some cold meats, bread, etc for our breakfast. And also I will never forget the wine + fruit she prepare as we arrived. Another thing that impress me is the CD player with so many options and we picked Mozart to accompany us when we are at home. Would really recommend this place to anyone that want to spend their days in Amstersam. Thank you once again Margot for, it's an awesome first Airbnb experience for us.

It was a nice and small room. Very comfy. The place is very central and near to the station, various restaurants and shops. Prinzengracht is only 20 metres away. Very nice and caring host and good Danish for breakfast. Haarlemmerdijk is a really cool and lively street. Strongly recommended!
Lovely room in  a great location

we had a great stay at gordon's and amy's house. it has a very good location, a supermarket across the street, it's very close to the prinzengracht and about 5-10 minutes walk from the central station...
the room was clean, you get fresh towels and breakfast! The hosts are really nice!

Gordon and Amy were great hosts! They freshened up our room on a daily basis and provided us with a satisfying continental breakfast. It was the complete B and B experience! They are super easy going and accommodating. I would definitely recommend their place! Thanks again!

Gordon is a fantastic host. Very warm and welcoming. He even insisted on helping us carry our heavy luggage up the stairs. Breakfast is provided, its a simple fare consisting of croissant, milk and orange juice but its a nice touch. =)

Location of the apartment is very near the centraal station and is convenient to places everywhere. You can get around pretty easily with a bicycle or walking. One thing to take note is that since the apartment is on the second level so it can be quite noisy in the night.

The blue room is the perfect little place to stay in this amazing city. Great location, very central on a lovely street with anything you might ask for. Gorgon and Amy are simply awesome hosts, very friendly and easy going. A delight!

La verdad que sin palabras para describir la estadia en lo de Gordon!
Muy bien ubicado, super confortable, total independencia, baños funcionales y un desayuno que termina de cerrar una semana increible..

muchas gracias por todo, mas que recomendable la estadia!
saludos!

We spent 3 nights at Gordon and Amy's place. Everything was perfect : easy to find, clean and it's a very good location in the city. Gordon and Amy are friendly and accommodating.
We really enjoyed our time there.

Thanks

Pauline & Flo

the best place I have visited! large and clean room located near the railway station. Gordon was really kind, explaining everything very kindly, and we couldn't see Amy, but she served us every breakfast and room cleaning. Moreover, a big market in front of the house was just great. Just the best

Fantastic accommodation, and "superlocated" is an understatement. For the weary traveler it was super indeed, as we were able to find the place in less than five minutes after departing the Central Station.

The location was superb, in that it was very central, easy to find and had a great view of the canal. Even though the front of the building faced the hustle and bustle of the streets below, the back of the building where our room was was incredibly private and quiet.

The room was tastefully designed, with incredible attention to detail. Not only do you have your own toilet and sink, but you have a nice shower as well, which comes in handy after a long day of biking.

Though the house rules state no smoking, 420 lovers can relax in knowing that there are plenty of decent coffee shops just right around the corner from the front door. As well, there are some great restaurants located on the street behind. We personally enjoyed Le Grotte, for its friendly staff and patio that allowed for plenty of people watching.

Riks, as a host was great. Probably the best B&B experience we've had, in that he's hassle free and allows you to make your own breakfast in the kitchen which is open until noon (which can be handy for travellers that come from a far distance). He takes pride in his space, and you can definitely tell. We will unabashedly recommend this place to any of our friends who need a place to stay in Amsterdam.

I really enjoyed my stay with Riks. He was an excellent host and I enjoyed chatting with him. His house is in a perfect location, convenient yet quiet. It's close to the center of the city, train station, tram lines, and major attractions, and is situated on a scenic canal street that has all of the flavor of old Amsterdam. His breakfast room has a great view of the canal and street below, which I enjoyed. As with all older houses in the city the stairs are rather steep, which was a bit unnerving to me, but I took them slowly and didn't have any problems getting up and down. All in all, staying at Riks was a very pleasant experience and I would definitely reccomend him as a host.

Ricks is a super nice guy, who has the coolest place to stay in Amsterdam. It is special to stay here because it is a real canal house and also just 3 minute walk to the central station. ,Location,Location,Location rooms are tidy and ensuite.

Riks is a very good and nice host. We had a great time there. Overall a very pleasant stay. The breadfast area is so comfy and you can see the nice canel view there. The location is very good, bascially only 5 minutes walk from central station. A little bit downside is you need to walk up stairs with your laguage, but the bed is very comfy.

Riks' B&B is the best place to stay in Amsterdam! His B&B is only a couple minutes walk from Central Station and is really easy to find.

Riks is really friendly and welcoming and makes his place feel like home. The kitchen is really big and you can sit by the windows and watch the people and boats float past on the canal. Also the breakfast food was really tasty with plenty of options.

You have a lot of privacy at Riks' place. There is no pressure to talk to any of the other guests or Riks. Although, once you meet Riks you would wanna have a yarn coz he is really awesome!

We haven't stayed at many B&B's before as they can vary in the level of peace and privacy but at the same time, a hotel room can feel quite sterile. Riks has taken a lot of care when renovating and decorating his place so along with his brilliant hosting, his place is the funkiest pad in Amsterdam!

Riks place is awesome, close to all amenities yet quiet during the night when you rest. Safe neighborhood, walking distance to shopping and entertainment. Riks provided great hospitality and made us feel comfortable during our stay. As a traveller from Toronto, Canada; we highly recommend Riks place and would definitely stay there again if we ever decided to go back to Amsterdam.

~Thanks again Rik
Nous avons passe un super séjour chez Riks: accueil sympa, on se sent "comme chez soi", excellente situation. Nous conseillons cette adresse.

Останавливались в Blue Room на 3 ночи. Понравилось месторасположение - удобно добираться до вокзала, оживленная торговая улица, очень интересно из окна наблюдать за жизнью города. В номере есть все необходимое. Завтраки достаточные, чтобы насытиться, вкусные булочки. Приветливый хозяин. Скромно, но удобно и не дорого. Рекомендую это жилье!
The place is very central but quiet. Margot is very nice and accommodating.The apartment was very well equipped, clean, and we received a surprising amount of groceries to get us going.

If you find this apartment available book it without any second thought. The apartment is perfect: Great location (3 minutes walking from Nieuwmarkt and ~10 minutes from Centraal Station), yet in a quiet neighbourhood and it has a private entrance. The decoration is very tasteful, the space is sparkling clean and very well equipped. Margot is a loving host, the check in and check out processes were seamless and she responded to our messages promptly. It goes without saying that I will try booking this apartment again next time.
Margot is the ultimate host and her space is an elegant oasis in the most lovely area of Amsterdam

Margot est juste adorable, pleine d attention pour ses hôtes et disponible
Appartement très cosy, propre et bien équipé et surtout très bien situé et au calme.
Petit déjeuner copieux
Un séjour inoubliable : nous vous conseillons de venir découvrir Amsterdam en vous installant chez Margot on s y sent chez soi.
Good location. Great hospitality. Clean and spacious. Great place to stay in Amsterdam. No television was a bonus!!

Wir haben uns bei Margot sehr wohlgefühlt. Besonders ihre Gastfreundschaft hat unsere Erwartungen übertroffen. Der Kühlschrank war mit leckeren Köstlichenkeiten fürs Frühstück gefüllt. Daneben gab es leckere Kekse, Obst, etc. Es war überhaupt kein Problem das Appartement schon mittags zu beziehen und am Abreisetag erst spät nachmittags auszuchecken. Alles war sehr unkompliziert. Die Lage ist genial, alles ist gut zu Fuß zu erreichen, es gibt tolle Restaurants um die Ecke. Trotz der zentralen Lage ist es sehr ruhig. Wir kommen wieder.....
Marianne und Barbara
We really enjoyed our time in Amsterdam and staying at Margot's place was big part of that experience. Well located, clean and funcional. Would definitely book it again.

Margot’s place is just as pictured and in a beautiful little street right on a canal. It’s about a 5-10 minute walk from everything and ended up being a great location for my friends and I. Loved staying here- highly recommend!

Margot's place was a quaint and lovely flat right along a canal in the heart of Amsterdam. A short walk to all the hustle and bustle but on a quiet street, it was a wonderful and quintessential Amsterdam experience. Her place was very cute, and she provided us with excellent essentials including breads, wine, and eggs and also had wonderful recommendations. We would certainly love to stay here again!
Very convenient spot. The breakfast food Margot included was a very nice touch and made it feel more like home.
Nice breakfast was stocked.  Great location for Amsterdam tourists!
Perfekte Lage und eine sehr unkomplizierte Kommunikation mit Margot. Auch das Abstellen der Koffe am Abreisetag war kein Problem. Das Appartment ist sehr zu empfehlen!

The studio is on the ground floor with quick access from the street. The space was beautiful and tasteful and we really enjoyed it. Margot was very welcoming and answered our questions. The studio was equipped with enough food for breakfast every day of our stay—meats, cheeses, eggs, and ingredients for toast. Margot even supplied us with a bottle of red wine, a big vase of fresh tulips, and some stroopwafels. The studio also has a really excellent location, near the big city life but on a quiet street with lots of nice little eating places nearby. It can be a little tricky as the red light district is pretty close to the west side, but we still got around fine. The NEMO science museum is a 10 minute walk, the Artis Royal about 20, and the Rijksmuseum about 40. Would highly recommend this place.

Wir konnten auf Anhieb das Appartement finden, checkin und checkout waren flexibel, kleine feine Wohnung mit guter Austattung (Fernseher fehlte)und hervorragender Lage, gute Reiseführer vorhanden, kleine Aufmerksamkeiten von Margot (Blumen, trad. Kekse und Fl. Wein)

Where do I begin to even describe how amazing of a host Margot is. She was so accommodating with our crazy and unexpected early arrival. So easy to communicate with. Margot's flat is adorable and charming. It is located very close to all the action, but tucked away enough to be quiet at night. We could not believe the plethora of snacks and treats. She went above and beyond with little cookie treats, bottle of wine, coffee, cereal and so on. Great variety of music to chill to in the apartment at the end of a long day. Margot made a number of excellent recommendations for architectural delights around the city and beyond. She was so knowledgeable and really helped us narrow down what sights to see. Fortunately we did get a glimpse of her cat, Funky, before we left. We enjoyed this stay thoroughly! Probably one of our best airbnb experiences yet. From the bottom of our heart...thank you margot!!!

Die Wohnung ist sehr zentral, sauber und gepflegt.
Super genaue Angaben wo sich die Wohnung befindet.
Der Kühlschrank war für das Frühstück gefüllt ( Danke Margot ).
Unkomplizierte, freundliche abwicklung.

Margot er frábær gestgjafi sem lætur manni líða eins og heima hjá sér. Staðsetning er góð, rólegt umhverfi, en stutt á alla staði, eins og t.d. Kína hverfið og niður í miðbæ. Mæli með þessum stað og hvað er hægt að hugsa sér betra en að það bíði manns rauðvínsflaska og morgunmatur við komuna :)

This a relatively central BnB but in quiet neighbourhood. Margot was a very good host and no problems meeting our unusual check in requirements. We recommend this BnB to other travellers.


excellent excellent

This place was absolutely perfect. Fantastic location! Close to everything yet just off the path enough to be very quiet. Greeted with a bottle of wine and there were foods provided for snacks and breakfast, tea and coffee. Margot was  a great communicator and very friendly and personable. She provided great flexibility of options for our check in. Highly recommended!
Très bien situé, accueil impeccable.
Excellent choix quant à la localisation, lacommunication et la bienveillance de l’hôtesse

Riks is lovely and the location couldn't be better.

He puts on a generous breakfast- and yes the view from the kitchen to the canal is even more amazing than it looks.

Dear Riks, thank you for your kind hospitality. We were truly happy at your place. Everything was so convenient, tidy and comfortable. Location near Central Station was perfect so we were able to experience the most of beautiful Amsterdam just walking. Having quality breakfast ingredients helped us feel at home.
We will recommend this address to our friends, for its comfort, lovely location,practicality and price.
We would love to visit again.
Best regards and thank you,
Sanja and Boro Starcevic (just returned to Los Angeles after spending 2 nights at Riks place and cruising the city)
Riks was great, having breakfast available was very convenient and his place was in a great location.  Overall a very good stay.

Riks is a wonderful host and the location, only a short 5 min stroll from Central Station, is ideal.  His place is about 20 feet outside the main tourist area of the city so you are close to the action yet are able to enjoy some peace and quiet and see how the locals live.  The rooms all face the back of the house so there is no noise.  Riks graciously made his kitchen available to us and it has a beautiful view overlooking a canal.  Every morning there was fresh bread, meats, cheese, eggs, milk, juice and coffee available to us to prepare at our leisure.   Riks met us upon our arrival but because of his schedule we rarely saw him, so it almost felt like we were in our own home.   We couldn't have asked for a better host, or a better location.  Riks even made it a point to get up at 4am to see us off as we had an early flight.  I highly recommend staying at Riks place.

Riks place is a traditional guest house on one of the canals in Amsterdam. The area is really nice in Jordaan, it's a very quaint area filled with designer shops, restaraunts, and is really pretty to walk around. It's just a short walk to the old town where many revellers are, the red light district etc, but the area is very quiet.

The room was okay, our only complaint was the bathroom and toilet made it a little uncomfortable, it's hard to describe but they were quite cramped and opened right onto the bedroom. The heating was not working and one night it was a little cold. The kitchen & living space are nice, we didn't try the breakfast, but I'm sure it's good.

Riks was a nice host, he helped us find our way, and the whole process was quite smooth.

Riks is a really pleasant person and a great host. The B&B is at a very convenient location, just a five minute walk from the Central station. Its in a quiet yet exciting neighborhood with all the major attractions close by and a beautiful view of the canal. The rooms are comfortable, cozy and tidy and Riks checks on you once in a while to make sure everyone s comfortable.

You will appreciate your stay at Riks' b-n-b. It is clean, comfortable, and super located 5 minutes from Central Station, trams, and right on the Brouwersgracht canal. Plenty of breakfast options--cereals, bread, spreads, juices, and eggs to cook if you like--in a big kitchen with a view over the canal. Riks is friendly, helpful, and runs an organized and efficient b-n-b. I stayed in a private room with private bath and all was clean plus the bed (plus linens and comforter) was cozy and comfortable. If you are looking for clean, comfortable, cozy, well-organized and reliable, book here. Bikes to rent are very close with two options right in the neighborhood. Canal tours take off 5 minutes away, right at Central Station. Trams 2 &5 (very nearby) take you right through the heart of A'dam, straight to the Rijksmuseum neighborhood. Need other trams? from Central Station, 5 min. away! Highly recommended.

Riks was a good host, and has a wonderful place in the heart of Amsterdam!  Great location, very comfortable rooms and a wonderful breakfast with coffee and toast I will miss.  It was a great experience, and worth the money.  Thanks Riks!

Lovely, quiet, nicely-situated apartment with everything you need to be comfortable and many thoughtful touches. Only a couple minutes from Nieuwmarkt Square with lots of cafes and shops, but on a very peaceful side street. Loved staying there!

The location is excellent, with most areas of interest within walking distance, yet it is quiet and peaceful at night. Margot is a wonderful host! The apartment is very clean and compete with all the amenities you may need, including delicious breakfast items. I highly recommend Margot and her charming place to stay while you savor Amsterdam.

Location was excellent, and Margot was welcoming and very friendly.  Breakfast supplied was plentiful, and the suite was sparkling clean.  The bed was also comfortable.  Would recommend this property as good value and location.

This is my second stay at Margot's studio, and it is a great spot. Close to hustling, bustling Amsterdam, but off the main street so it's quiet and peaceful. An easy 10 minute walk from the train station. The kitchen is well stocked and we really enjoyed the treats she left for us. We arrived late, and she was very accommodating about being  there to greet us. Lots of information available in the apartment. Will stay again if we're every back!

Geweldig verblijf gehad bij Margot. Heel mooi en rustig straatje vlakbij de grote drukte . Margot bejegent haar gasten op een vriendelijke wijze en haar jam smaakt heerlijk. Ziet er allemaal heel verzorgd en schoon uit. Extra gordijnen en een radio / tv zou het plaatje compleet maken.

The studio is tucked away in a  lovely quiet spot,  but it is just a 5-minute walk to a bustling city block full of cafes and a grocery store as well as being an easy walk to the Central Station and most of the key sites for tourists.   Margot was extremely helpful, gave detailed information, and included some lovely touches like flowers, fruit and a bottle of wine, (to name just a few) which we greatly appreciated.   After a full day exploring, we enjoyed sitting outside by the blooming flowers and the canal, enjoying the quietude.  The kitchen is very well equipped  so we didn't have to eat out all the time.  This idyllic spot greatly contributed to our enjoyable time in Amsterdam.
Tell all your family and friends.  It's in the heart of Amsterdam and Margot is a wonderful host with lots of extras, cheese, wine and cookies. Highly recommended and can't wait for my next visit.

Margot’s place is a gem in the city! It was spacious for two of us (friends) and centrally located. There were fresh flowers and fresh food in the kitchen to get us through late night snacking needs. Margot was very responsive and flexible as our flights were delayed. Sitting by the canal (chairs provided!) after long days sightseeing was magical. The apartment is on a sleepy street- but 5 minutes walk to anything and everything. Would definitely stay again. Thanks for making this memorial trip even more special.
Great place and great location, Margot was wonderful to work with!

Five stars for this studio.
Loved everything about it.
Margot was lovely and attention to detail was perfect.
Great location, space and amenities.
Don’t hesitate to book here.

Margot's place is small but perfectly formed, with a cosy seating area as well as a dining area, cooking area and sleeping area - all in one studio. The bathroom was modern and had a good shower. We were delighted to be treated to lots of breakfast food, as well as fresh coffee and wine. The flowers and candles (and some 70s music) added that special touch. The location is very central, but also very quiet, situated on a peaceful canal and side street where you can also sit out. Margot was very warm and friendly and keen to help in any way. One of the best Airbnbs we have stayed at, and we highly recommend it.
We highly recommend this place
Margot’s apartment was a great place for two of us to spend a weekend in Amsterdam! Very convenient and wonderfully decorated to match the name. Margot herself was very helpful as well!
Margot's place is conveniently located in the center of Amsterdam, close to nightlife, restaurants and pubs.  I definitely recommend staying here!

This was our third stop in Europe and by far the greatest. We had fresh eggs, bread, cheese, meat, and all the amenities you could ask for. The room has its own entrance and you can walk to anything in town. I would highly recommend this place.

Value for money, you can’t find a nicer rental in the City. The location is perfect walking distance to virtually everything the city has to offer (including proximity to the station), and the added amenities available upon arrival (food, wine) are such a wonderful touch. When you consider cost of breakfast for two daily, the cost of the room became an even greater value for us, along with not needing taxis or rental bikes or the metro go get anywhere. Highly recommended!
Fabulous place to stay, recommended

Margot was so so kind! I took my son for a fun trip and unfortunately ran into some snags with our flights. She kept up with me from the US and different time zones and even personally greeted us when we arrived at 0500 am on a Sunday! I felt so bad y wake her but she still made us feel so welcomed. Her location is perfect and I loved the kitchen and the treats left plus a French Press coffee maker :)
I would highly recommend this property and hope to return soon!

Margot was such a generous host! She was extremely easy to communicate with & very understanding of a delayed schedule. She went above and beyond for us with getting our sons crib set up etc. I can’t wait to come back and stay with her again! She provides coffee & stocks the fridge with some breakfast foods. We had a wonderful time thanks to her!

We had a lovely stay! The location is amazing, walking distance to all of the attractions yet nice and quiet. Margot allowed us to check in early which was really nice. The breakfast food was a nice touch and saved us some money and time. Amazing cheese! There were also plenty of Amsterdam guidebooks is the apartment to help us find things to do. I would definely recommend staying here, you get to stay on a canal without a high price.

Margot’s apartment is absolutely perfect, it’s is a great location, beautiful neighborhood, very stylish apartment, comfortable, warm and bright with everything you’d need for a wonderful stay.
Definitely a 5 Star experience that we loved and we are looking forward to returning hopefully very soon.
Thank you

Great location.
Good apartment with all your needs.

Very Recommended

Margot’s place is exceptionally well situated, in a quiet residential street just minutes walk from the city centre. She is an incredibly welcoming host and gave us excellent recommendations, including Eetcafe Van Beeren, a brilliant local gastropub. We’d love to stay again!

The location could not be better. Just 2/3 minutes walk from the Nieuwmkt metro station, it literally allows you to travel across the city without any hassle. You can easily walk to most of the attractions in the city centre also.

Margot is an excellent host. It felt like we were visiting a friend or relative. She volunteered to do our laundry in her own home. The various small touches were excellent. At the same time she was totally unobtrusive despite staying in the same building.

The apartment is exactly as shown in the pictures here. I would recommend it to everyone visiting Amsterdam.
It’s just like the pictures. Perfect spot to stay in Amsterdam

Stayed at Margot’s place for a weekend in Amsterdam and our trip was a dream because we were so central to everything! Location can’t be beat, and Margot is a great host. We had everything we needed plus more (wine and snacks provided during our stay). Highly recommended
Very good location. Clean and we found everything we needed in the flat. Margot is a great host.

A nivel general el alojamiento es estupendo.
A nuestra llegada Margot nos dejo en la nevera todo lo necesario para el desayuno en los días de estancia(huevo,jamón,queso,pan,mermelada...)
El hecho de que no tuviese televisión (al menos para que hiciese ruido o conectar un USB para ver una película por la noche) ha sido algo incómodo. Por lo demás todo correcto!

Studio très confortable et vraiment très bien situé. Nous avons visité tout Amsterdam à pied, c’était vraiment parfait. Merci à Margot pour son accueil et la réactivité dans ses réponses. Le studio est conforme aux photos et très agréable.

We had a 3-night stay and Margot's place was perfect. All the main attractions were within 30 minutes walk and it was a great place to come back and refresh before dinner. Margot was very accommodating and would fully recommend!
The place was clean and there was food available. In addition, the location was fantastic and close to any place in the center

Appartement très propre et très fonctionnel. Très bien situé pour le tout à pied et en plus dans une rue très calme au bord d'un canal. Nous y avons passé un excellent séjour dans cette magnifique ville. Margot est très sympathique et accueillante, un plaisir de discuter avec elle dans un français parfait. Elle nous avait laissé des attentions très appréciées à notre arrivée. On recommande vivement. Encore merci Margot

Quiet, secluded and comfortable apartment just away from the bustle of the centre, but close enough to walk to the main sites.
Margot was really friendly and helpful with advice, check-in and out.

Margot's place is very well located.  15 minute walk from Station and 5 minute walk from busy new market and red light district.  A close by hop on hop off stop for Gassan Diamonds.  Quiet and peaceful area although close to the hustle and bustle of old Amsterdam.  The apartment is spacious and clean.  Bed comfortable (2 single beds pushed together). The breakfast goodies comes in very handy.  Local information received from Margo was very helpful.  Highly recommended, will be back.  Thank you Margo for a wonderful stay!
Perfect place in the heart of Amsterdam! I would definitely go back to this beautiful studio.

This apartment is one of the best AirBnb I have ever stayed.
If you are looking for a cozy, clean and comfortable place on a perfect location no need to look more, this is the place.
The apartment is perfect for a couple who wants to explore Amsterdam, even though is on a central location, it’s very quiet for a good night of sleep.
Margot is a perfect host, very polite and ready to help you in whatever you need.
On top of all you get everything you need for a good breakfast.
From now on this will be my home way from home whenever I am in Amsterdam.
Thank you Margot!

Had a great time staying here with really friendly hosts!
Perfect location and Gordon was really helpful in giving us some tips around town. I would recommend their place to all my friends!!

Great location, great amenities, great size.  It was easy. This place had everything we needed to stay in Amsterdam.  Gordon was very nice and helpful. There are 2 rooms separated by a huge shower and a toilet. We stayed in the blue room and we were right on the street. Keeping the windows open  felt like you were living there.  We were able to walk to everything. As we are 2 girls in our 20s, we felt very safe doing this (it looked safer than staying at a hostel  closer).

We had wonderful stay here. Great location which we found close enough to everything, with most things a short walk and for anything further afield a short bike ride. Gordon and Amy were excellent hosts providing a more than generous breakfast.
We loved the room and its view over the street below. Although sharing the floor with the other room it is very private.
We would definitely stay there again.

Our stay here was great! We stayed in the blue room which had a great view over the street, but when the other guests left we were also allowed to use the yellow room, and it was very nice to have the whole floor to ourselves. They provided plenty of food for breakfasts and it was nice to have a coffee pot in the room. Everything is located close and there are also buses and tram stops nearby which were so helpful for us! Amy and Gordon were both very friendly and we were able to make it out to the restaurant where Amy works and chat!
We loved this room! It was nice, bright, convenient, and had yummy breakfast treats. Gordon was very friendly and attentive. I highly recommend this room!

Not bad, Not great.  We had booked the blue room but, since we were the only people staying, Gordon gave us the choice of which we'd like to stay in.  I did check out both rooms, the biggest difference between them is size. We ended up sleeping in the yellow room, which is the bigger and has a balcony off double glass doors and faces the back of the house.  The blue room is smaller and faces the street with two windows.  It is very quiet at night with windows closed.  The beds in both rooms are fairly uncomfortable, in my opinion, very hard.  This detail is the most important to me and I did not feel as though my expectations were met.  Both rooms share a shower and bathroom.  Both were acceptably clean.  The shower room would be nearly impossible to change in without getting your clothing wet (the entire closet-sized room is the shower), so you would have to enter the common space hallway in your towel to get to your room for privacy.  No one else was staying at the time we were, so that wasn't an issue for us, but I can imagine it might be awkward if the space is truly being shared.  The sinks, however, are not shared- each bedroom had its own in sort of an odd placement in the corner.  There are no lights near the sink/mirror, so doing any makeup was difficult.  No towel bars near the sink.  A few cheap upgrades I think could improve the comfort of these rooms quite a bit.  The fridge was kept well stocked during our visit and the pastries and coffee for breakfast were nice.  This place is also in a great location.  If I were staying in Amsterdam again, I would seek out a more comfortable bed before considering staying here again.

A small but cozy room (the blue room). Great location. Right on the street but not too noisy. Fast internet. Gordon was very nice and brought up my baggage. Also very comfortable to have microwave and kettle right in the room, especially for tea junkies like myself.
Very comfortable and full of foods and drinks.  Also very clean.

Amy and Gordon's place is so far the best place we've stayed. First, the loation is amazing, just 10 minutes from the train station in a very lively and safe neighbourhood. As you come into the room, you pass through the tipical stairs of the Amsterdam architecture, which make feel the mood of the city. Inside the room you find more that you were asking for, delicious pastry, fresh juice and every element required for an excelent stay. They even clean your room for you every day!
Though we didn't get to meet Amy, as she was sick, Gordon introduced us to the space and answered every one of our questions, in a super friendly way, he is just a great host.
We made the right choice with Gordon and Amy's place.

Period of stay -- Three nights from 09/10/2013
Location -- Very good. You can walk to the train station (12 to 15 minutes) and city centre (less than 10 minutes)
Room -- The room we stay in was big and comfortable. Equipped with coffer maker and plenty of food for breakfast. Pastry, muffin, coffee, tea, milk, cereal, jam, butter, yoghurt, banana.......
Bathroom and toilet -- Bathroom and toilet are separated. Bathroom is big and shower is good. Toilet is clean.
Security and safety -- Very good
Owner -- Excellent! Very quick in replying your email. Friendly and helpful!

Great location, nice room overlooking busy street, kind of noisy at night (Saturday, but not so much Sunday), but we expected that. We wanted to be centrally-located, and this was a good spot for that. Gordon was really friendly, and generous with breakfast pastries. Would stay here again - thanks Gordon!
RIks was great.  Easy to communicate with and the flat in a great location and  was very comfortable.

Myself and husband had a wonderful time at RiKs.  He was a wonderful host welcoming us into his apartment and providing us with information and places to visit in Amsterdam.  At the last minute we had to change locations and Riks was very accommodating.  If ever visiting Amsterdam again, I will look for Riks.
Super great location. Riks was awesome. Helped us in any way he could. We rented bikes and never had to take train entire 4 days. Fantastic value for the superb location. Thanks  again!!

Riks and his place were AMAZING.
The entire canal house in Riks and one can tell he put a lot of time, love and money into renovating and the place.
Also, the location is PERFECT.
Get off of the Central Train Station and walk literally 5 - 10 mins (depending how fast you walk) to Riks canal side house.
Let me tell you, when your backpacking through Europe, being this close to the Station is a life and money saver.
Next time I'm in Amsterdam I would absolutely, 100% stay here again if Riks is still opening his beautiful place up to the world!

I enjoyed my stay at Riks place. He greeted us and gave us a key to our room and to the front door. Each morning, we cooked eggs that Riks provided. He also provided cheese, meats, bread, and coffee and tea for breakfast. The location is great. I would recommend it to a friend.
Staying with Riks was great! The B&B is perfectly located, and has a fantastic view. I miss having breakfast overlooking the canals! Riks is a wonderful host.

Riks was a good host with a very nice house, close to central station and Jordaan, which I like most in Amsterdam. Riks breakfast was very good and the place at the big window with a view to Brouwersgracht is beautiful.

I found Riks to be very friendly and unintrusivie. Everything is very relaxed, no morning regiment for breakfast. If your breakfast is at 8 a.m. or at 11 a.m. it is a non issue. The location is ideal for walking and biking. Most things are within walking distance, the rest by bike. Riks gives excellent directions and is very accommodating. My room was cozy and it was very nice having my own toilet and shower. Hope to stay again in the future!
WM

Excelente ubicacion en amsterdam, linda habitacion, comoda, muy buen desayuno, limpian la habitacion todos los dias y amy y gordon te dan liberyad para que puedas disfrutar de la ciudad y del hospedaje sin inconvenientes, todos los dias nos daban jugo, cafe, te, yogurt, panes saborizados, leche, fruta y todo impecable, el wc a pesar que es compartido con la otra habitacion siempre esta super limpio, realmente recomiendo este lugar para ir a dormir en amsterdam.
Staying at Amy's BnB was really cosy. The location is perfect for exploring the city. Delicious breakfast. We would definitely stay there again!

Loved my stay at Gordon & Amy's! It's a quaint and homely room in a fantastic location in town, away from the overly touristy spots but not too far away from the city centre. To top things off, the breakfast pastries, milk, yoghurt and fresh fruit juices were very much appreciated and a really thoughtful perk of staying here. Highly recommended!

It was very nice, thank you.
Gordon and Amy are helpful and the place is very well located.
The bed is very comfortable!

My favourite BnB stay in Europe so far! Love the neighbourhood, lots of cafes and quaint shops, plus a supermarket just 10m away. The rooms are on the 2nd floor, but even with heavy luggages it is not an issue as Gordon welcomed us in warmly and helped us with the luggages up the narrow staircase. As we arrived on a weekday and the other room was available, Gordon generously opened the entire floor to myself and my dad, so we had a room each! Appreciate that the breakfast table was replenished everyday, it consisted of coffee, tea, bread, pastries, jam, fruits, along with milk, orange juice and yoghurt in the fridge, and even a microwave oven. I wouldn't choose anywhere else to stay if I visit Amsterdam again :)
This is a decent place to stay, and the location is great. Can't complain for what we paid. Thanks!
I would definitely recommend staying here. The apartment is in a very cute area and very central to the rest of the city! Gordon is a great host and very helpful!

Gordon let us check in early on a cold rainy day, which was much appreciated. He let us have the larger yellow room as there was no one booked in for it. We really appreciated the pastries, yoghurt, fruit, tea etc provided every day. It was convenient to have a kettle, fridge, and sink in the room; however it was a bit inconvenient not having a sink in the toilet and the shower itself is also a separate room. It is located about 15mins from the main station but we found the walk manageable with our luggage. It was also easy to walk to the main shopping streets, Dam square, and a nice 30min stroll to the museum area. Thanks Gordon and Amy!
We felt very comfortable at this b'n'b and we even got an upgrade as the bigger room was not occupied! Very nice and friendly location! we will definitely come again!

Very much glad to live in this cosy room for couple of days.
The host is kind and host us well!
Really recommend to stay in this quiet and comfortable place.

This was our first Airbnb experience and it couldn't have been better. The location was perfect. Gordon was very welcoming and helpful. Everything was great. I'd highly recommend Sleep at Amy's and would stay again.

We liked very much staying with Gordon and Amy. He is very nice (we didint meet Amy). We were suposed to stay at the blue room, but he gave us the bigest room the yellow one ! A very good upgrade :)
We had everything that we needat the room and it is good located.
Thanks for everything ! Next time we want to go to your restaurant !
We had a great time staying at this B'n B.' It was wonderfully located and was extremely comfortable, and it was so nice to have breakfast provided. I definitely recommend it!

Riks was very welcoming and we liked the place a lot.  The room was small but attractive and comfortable, and the bed and shower were good.  The big kitchen overlooking the canal is great.  The location is indeed super.  We would definitely stay there again and recommend it.

Staying with riks was great!the b&b is very central and you can explore amsterdam easily on foot.we enjoyed the nice comfortable bed with many blankets and pillows,the breakfast and the great view!just recommendable!thank you riks!!

we had a perfect time at riks' apartment, he was a very nice host for us.
this apartment is a wonderful location for some days in the centre of amsterdam. if possible we would return there again. thanks!
Riks' home is very well decorated and extremely well located.  Close to everything, yet quiet and not "touristy."  Highly recommended.

This charming and cozy B&B is perfectly located - on a relatively quiet street but only a 5 min walk from the train station and the centre of the city.  We stayed here with our extended family (10 in total) and the spacious kitchen was the perfect place for us to have a leisurely breakfast, and a drink at the end of the day, while watching the boats float by on the canal below.  The breakfast was generous and delicious.  Everything was perfect!

Riks was a fantastic host and his apartment was just as incredible. The entire place was beautifully decorated and the stunning views of the canal when sitting in the lounge room made it seem like we were living in a movie. The breakfast served every morning is absolutely delicious and the apartment is in a great location - just walking distance to the centre of town. We would both definitely stay in Rik's B&B again and would highly recommend it to everyone else!
Riks was a friendly, helpful and efficient host. The house couldn't be in a better location. Highly recommended!
If you want to fill like at home I will recommend superlovated B&B and his host Riks Emmen.

we had a great time at Riks' house!  really easy to reach from Central Station (it is at just few minutes walk distance),  it is a very nice place to spend a few days holiday in. there is also a fantastic view on the Canal from the stilish kitchen and you can spend hours there looking outside. I would highly reccomend this place, i will definitely go back.

Just the best you would ever imagine. The room was perfectly clean, big, and well furnished. The location couldn't be better, close to everything, I didn't have to use public transportation at any point.  Riks was adorable and the breakfast very good. If I ever go back to Amsterdam I will stay there and nowhere else. Thank you Riks! :)
Exceptionally convenient and clean. Riks is an accommodating and generous host.

Rik's place was a real treasure. Great location, clean rooms in authentic setting and very private. Rik was very welcoming but also respectful of privacy of all  guests. Ample breakfast was  provided. Thanks for a wonderful experience Ric. We hope to be back and for mich longer. Paul and Karen

We had a wonderful stay at Riks. He was very nice and helped us as to where it would be nice to go that was not the normal for turist pace to go and it was great.
We would recomand him to others go to Amsterdam.
Great house, really nice rooms. Everything was fine. We loved the huge kitchen and the big breakfast table. Wonderful place to stay in Amsterdam. And it is central, too.

Awesome flat, awesome dude, nothing left to say.
Just perfect. Thank you Riks!

Great location. Five minute walk from train station. Walking distance to nearly all attractions. Room was spacious and clean.

Riks was a pleasant host. Only regret is we were so busy seeing the sights, we spent little time in the house talking with Riks. We will be back next year and plan on booking with Riks again.

Amsterdam is a unique city, the locals were very helpful and we enjoyed talking with them.

Staying at CanalHouse B&B with Riks was a wonderful two days. Perfectly located close to Central Station and in the center of Amsterdam it was very easy to get everywhere I needed to be while in Amsterdam.

My room was perfect with a great bed, wonderful linens and beautiful light from the windows. The self serve breakfast made it easy to start my day and be on time to my appointments in Amsterdam.

I will definitely be adding this to my list as my go-to spot when in Amsterdam!

Location was fantastic - very close to Centraal station and within walking distance of lots of places most tourists would likely go and see.  would certainly recommend staying in the Jordaan area, it's very picturesque, with loads of character, great bars and restaurants. Riks was a very pleasant host!

Riks was a very welcoming, friendly and respectable host. The B&B and the rooms were perfect; in fact, better than I could have hoped for. Location wise, it was so convenient. I had a heavy suitcase and a large carry on bag and it was an easy and doable walk to and from Central Station. Whether this is your first time in Amsterdam or nth time, this will not disappoint. This will be my go to place of stay for future trips.

The place is really nice and the location is great. Riks was an excellent host who looks after every detail to make your stay comfortable. I would definitely recommend it if you are visiting Amsterdam.
Amy's BnB is a lovely place in a really nice part of town! We only stayed for 3 day but going back to the BnB after a rainy day out was always nice :)

Amy and Gordon provide a super cosy room in walking distance from the city centre. We enjoyed the blue room and the tasty little breakfast they offer every day. Towels, sheets and everything was clean and we would love to stay there again some day in the future. Thanks again, Amy and Gordon!

(+)
close to the central station and very close to the old town with the canals (grachten), great shopping street in front of the door, room simple but clean, good bed, wash basin in the room, refrigirator, host provides for coffee and tea and little breakfast goodies like muffins and joghurt, Gordon supportive regarding arrival procedures

(-)
gets a bit cold in the evening/night since heating did not provide much heat during this time, shared shower and toilette, a bit loud due to busy shopping street outside of the window, only for people who can climb steep steps to the first floor

overall: good value for the price, Gordon is a friendly host and respects your privacy
Great experience, nice and clean place, great location. Best choice.

I liked Gordon and Amy's B&B,it was simple and cute.
The location was perfect, very central and in a good walking distance from the main station,and Gordon had been very nice.
I can recommend It!

Fantastic location, 5 minutes from the central station, 10 minutes walk to Dam Square etc. Lovely cute room, and Gordon and Amy really look after you. I would definitely recommend for a relaxed and carefree stay in central Amsterdam.

Highly recommended. We Enjoy our stay. The room is clean. The host provided fresh fruit and bread everyday. Location is easy access. About 10min walking to amsterdam centraal station. Supermarket right opp the apartment.
Lovely people, clean and simple room with nice breakfast things, perfect location and good price. What more could you want!

I booked three nights (Apr 6-9) at Sleep at Amy's because its close distance to Amsterdam Centraal (according to Airbnb listing). As it turned out, it is very close and located in a perfect location to go anywhere by foot. Grocery store is across the road, plus so many other shops and restaurants. The street where Sleep at Amy's located is a shopping street. Gordon was very welcoming. The Blue Room where we stayed was clean and had all the convenience (sink, fridge, microwave, kettle, coffee maker, and dining sets). The fridge is always filled with your necessities (milk, juice, and yoghurt) plus danish pastries and bananas. The internet worked perfectly. We have no complains what so ever. Highly recommended.
Thank you Gordon and Amy.
Everithing was perfect! The location is the best, and in the room you have all you need... Thank you very much!!
Welcoming hosts, furnished room and yummy breakfast included. It's a perfect spot to discover Amsterdam !
