We really enjoyed our 2-night stay at the blue room. We liked the room with a view on a typically shopping street, without being  embarrassed by the noise on the street. I'll surely recommend this place!

Stayed at Gordon and Amy's house during King's day. We can join the celebration right upon coming out from the house. Location never been better and room is really clean and nice. The bread, fruit and coffee provided everyday for breakfast was delicious. Most importantly, we were welcomed by Gordon right on time and we were so glad and thankful to have stayed at Gordon's place. Really appreciate it and great experience. Highly recommended!

Amy and Gordon were fantastic, they messaged us a few days early to check when we were landing. When we arrived Gordon was waiting and upgraded us to a different room which was awesome. The yellow room was spacious and the breakfast and coffee provided was great. We would definitely stay there again.

L'appartement de Gordon et Amy est extrêmement bien localisé.
Au sein du quartier Jordan, il y a une ambiance bobo, avec de nombreuses petites boutiques, des marchés, une ambiance calme. Donc quartier agréable.
Près de la gare, en face d'un supermarché, et d'un glacier, donc emplacement pratique.
Merci pour les cronuts au petit déjeuner:)
Chambre conforme à la photo.
Le partage de la salle de bain-wc sur le palier hors de la chambre a été ok.

Great place to stay at for a long week-end. Perfect situation, nice room, very clean. Microwave, fridge, coffee machine, boiler... everything at your disposition. We had our breakfast in the room, with fresh fruit and viennoiseries provided every afternoon by our hosts. The shower and toilets are to be shared with the other room but ok. We had a great time in Amsterdam! Thanks!

Our stay with Gordon and Amy was pleasant and comfortable. We never really interacted with our hosts except for the initial meeting. The room was comfortable and the location was great. It was nice to have a microwave and refrigerator in the room! Gordon allowed us to spread out and that was nice. The only thing that was not so good was the weather! It rained for much of the time! We still enjoyed the city!

Amsterdam is a beautiful city, and staying at Gordon and Amy's made it even more wonderful! Central location, delicious pastry, and a warm welcome - could not have asked for more and hope to be back soon.

I stayed at Amy's house for a weekend and it was great !
The room is very nice and look like in the pictures, clean and comftarble, the hosted were very welcome and nice.
and also the location is very good and close to everyting in Amsterdam!
thank you !
Has a great stay at Riks. Fantastic location on the canal and good sized room.
We had a great stay at Rikks! Beautiful central location right on the canal.  You will enjoy the city and the room.
Riks´ apartment ist beautiful an very well located. It´s very close to the main station. Riks was a pleasant host! We definite recommend!

Very good location, near to the Central station. The building is facing the canal which gives a nice view over the common room. Rooms are big & comfortable, appreciate the private bathroom & toilet. Everything is clean & tidy. Breakfast is good too.

Great place in an excellent location
Had a terrific weekend!

My partner and I spent 4 nights in this lovely apartment. In the coolest street. So close and accessible to the whole if Amsterdam.  The lovely breakfast supplies left fresh everyday were much appreciated.

Riks was so accommodating, I arrived late & yet he made sure he was there to welcome me. Also loved the way that he has set up the place, good breakfast, lots of choice & opportunity to meet others, nice room, easy location, Usual Dutch stairs ( never take large bags)  & with Great Host. Hope you enjoy as much as I did. ( &   the after service amazing - left items returned to Australia !!!!!)

Incredible location! I feel I saw a different Amsterdam than the usual tourist, and I am thankful for that. Riks hostel was neat, clean and had everything I was looking for. The room was a bit small, but perfectly functional and comfortable. The common area was great and I had a great breakfast every morning. Strongly recommend to everyone. Riks himself is a gracious host who is always smiling!

Riks was a wonderful host, both kind an accommodating. Check in was easy and informative. The location was wonderful and centrally located great for experiencing  all aspects of Amsterdam, and its proximity to the Central Train station made transportation a breeze.
What a great place to stay! Of all of our Airbnb experiences, this one felt most like a true BnB. Wonderful location and Gordon and Amy are great hosts.

Gordon was friendly in welcoming us. Nice and clean room. I like the location cos it's near centraal, the main train station, as I had an early train out. I think that it's a very nice walk from the attractions but it can be a little long if you don't like walking. The neighborhood is lively and very convenient with many eateries and supermarkets.
We didn't get a chance to meet Amy but Gordon was very friendly. The we loved the location, we were able to walk to all our destinations.

I lost my wallet in Amsterdam, but we had already checked out. We went back to Gordon and he really helped us a lot. I appreciated that very much. Without his help, I cannot imagine how I could handle this disaster.
Gordon is very friendly and the room is cozy. I strongly recommend his room as your trip to Amsterdam!

We loved our stay at Amy's Blue Room!!
Perfect little space in an excellent neighborhood.
Gordon greeted us and we got along well immediately. He was warm, friendly, very relaxed and helpful with suggestions for our stay.
We met Amy briefly and she too was very warm and friendly.
We had a little coffee maker and fridge, with fresh pastries, coffee, fruit, juice and yogurt replenished each day. Starting the day with fresh coffee, while watching the street come alive below, was a joy in itself.
Also there is a store across the street with everything you need and great shops, cafés and coffeeshops all around.
It will be our first pick for accommodations when we return to Amsterdam!
Great location, helpful host, cosy and with style decorated B&B and excellent service from Riks.

An absolutely wonderful place to stay. Central and incredibly convenient!
Riks was a fabulous host-explaining the area and giving advice on where to visit etc.
Thank you for an amazing holiday!!
Great Locatio & great host! Breakfast is provided everyday is within walking distance to many attractions! Will surely return to the next time!

Excellent séjour , Riks est très sympathique et accueillant , son appart idéalement situé , très bien décoré, calme en ce mois de février .
La literie est très bonne vraiment !
S il faut tout dire, juste un bémol alors, nous aurions aimé avoir le choix au petit déjeuner avec du beurre et non de la margarine ;-) et avoir le temps de dire au revoir et à une prochaine

I booked this for my daughter and the review below is her own. However, I can also say that I contacted Riks about the booking and I found him very helpful.

Riks place was lovely, very central but away from the noise, 10 minute walk from central station itself if you take your time, lovely canals to walk along side and some restaurants close by. Rik himself was so nice, I was out most of the time but when I arrived he showed me places around to go on the map including 9 roads of Vintage shops which is right up my alley, he also set up the Wifi on my Laptop straight away and was generally welcoming to me. Breakfast is there each morning till around 12, I didn’t have any but it looked nice. The place was very cosy, you can come and go as you please, or people also seemed to stay in and just chat to Rik. There are books left around for reading, and some little things to make it slightly easier (there was a hairdryer outside my room!) No real complaints, slight problem was that I was on the top floor and the Wifi wasn’t the best at times.

I had a great time staying at Riks Place. The room is small, but well appointed and all that I needed. The shower is nice and hot. The breakfast/kitchen area is lovely and very well done. I enjoyed my toast and coffee there quite a bit. The location can't be beat. This was my first time to Amsterdam and being so close to the train station made getting there super easy by foot. You're right in the middle of the old section, so if you're there as a tourist like me, it's very convenient to all the sites. I rented a bike around the corner and I was really feeling the Dutch vibe. Had a chat with Riks over breakfast one day, he's a nice guy, and easy going. I'd definitely stay there again.
It is a hidden treasure at the most happening spots of Amsterdam. Highly recommend for those need some quiet and decent place to retreat themselves after an exciting trip.

Ricks, it was really nice to meet you. Thank you for all your recommendations.I have had an amazing time in this apartment as it's close location to central part of Amsterdam, but at the same time very quiet. Very comfortable bed and soft pillow. Yummy breakfast. I will stay again, for sure. :)

Best decision! A really pleasant B&B! We stayed five nights - and had a perfect place to stay in Amsterdam. Close to the mainstation and close to (nearly) every hotspot in town. Important: It's very quiet and our bed was absolutely comfortable. Five stars for being able having breakfast (self-service) until 11.30 am in the beautiful kitchen with the red refridgerator ;-) And six of five stars for the really, really pleasant host Riks!!!

We had an enjoyable 4 days in Amsterdam, and Riks was a kind and considerate host. The only drawback, which we should perhaps have foreseen, was the stairs, which closely resembled the north face of the Eiger, and there is no lift. I am 70 and not in the best of health, and I wonder whether the steep stairs/no lift might be clarified. Had I know I don't think we would have stayed there. But breakfast was generous, and the location thoroughly convenient.
It was one of the nicest places, where we stayed. Best location! Breakfast was wonderful served and very good! I would definitely recommend to stay at this wonderful hotel!!!

Riks was very friendly and helpful (and helped me with my bag and made me a nice cup of tea when I arrived sopping wet from the rain)!  Excellent location (once you got your bearings) and a great and plentiful supply for breakfast.  There are a few flights of quite steep stairs which I didn't find a problem (it was my daily exercise) but something you would want to take into consideration if your mobility is an issue.
We had a very good time in Amsterdam.  Riks was very kind and gave us all the instructions we needed to move through the city.
Thank you for a perfect weekend in Amsterdam.

Location location !!! The rooms are a little bit
Small but the location is grate. The atmosphere
Is wonderful. Breakfast around the big table white
Other gusts changing experience .....we loved it
Dorette and Benjamin

Actually more than we expected. Great neighborhood and close to everything.
Riks is a very personable guy, and very helpful. Accommodations were clean and comfortable, with plenty of tasty foods available in the kitchen. Fellow boarders were high caliber and I had many interesting conversations with them.

This B&B was AMAZING. The location could literally not be better -- so close to the train station, right on a beautiful canal. The room itself is definitely tiny, but the bed is so so comfortable, and the bathroom is well done for the tiny space. Being able to open the windows and get a breeze was awesome.

The shared kitchen in the B&B is great -- love the setup and the provided food for breakfast was fantastic. Bread for toast or sandwiches, granola and yogurt, orange juice, hard boiled eggs, coffee, etc. Being able to sit at the table or at the window seat overlooking the canal and eat breakfast was so relaxing and a great way to start each day.

Overall, this experience was fantastic and so much nicer than hotels I've stayed at in Amsterdam.

excelent host, excelent location, the absolute best in central amsterdam
strongly recommended :-)

Riks is essentially an Air bnb rockstar. The room was exactly as it was described and pictured. Riks place is a true Bed and Breakfast in probably the best location in the city for a really good price. We will be staying there again in less than a month on our way back to the states. Totally looking forward to it!!

The location of the house couldn't of been better, located in a very charming neighborhood close to central station.  The house has a great view of the canal.  Riks was very nice and helpful.  The room was very small and wifi was a bit spotty.  Overall, you can't beat the location.  You won't be in your room very much anyways with so much to see!

This is a perfectly located, great place for exploring Amsterdam. It's a 5 minute walk to the Centraal train station in the beautiful, old Jordaan neighborhood. The house is on a canal and you have a great view from the kitchen, which is tastefully decorated and a good place to meet some of the other guests. The house is close to everything you need to see in Amsterdam, but far enough from the crowded tourist streets.
Internet was a bit spotty on the 3rd floor and the toilet is super-tiny, but overall this is truly a wonderful location, nice clean and quiet.
Ricks was an awesome host, who greeted us and gave us some useful tips and recommendations.
I enjoyed a short but pleasant stay (I was meeting friends elsewhere). I would recommend for anyone looking for a clean, comfortable and convenient stay in central Amsterdam.

We loved staying at Riks' place! The location was excellent, he was friendly, relaxed and very informative. The stairs are mental, as a few other reviews mention, but fairly typical to Amsterdam. I would definitely stay here again.
Amazing location and fantastic host! Thank you very much for lovely stay!

I really enjoyed my stay at Rick's B&B in Amsterdam. The room was clean with a good comfortable bed. The breakfast room was great with a nice view of the Brouwers Canal. And Rick provided a very friendly welcome at the start of my 3 day stay.

Riks was wonderful and made me feel welcome in his home. The airline lost my luggage and Riks helped me to have the bags delivered and was very sympathetic to the situation. The breakfast is lovely and you can't beat the location. Thanks for a great stay Riks!

Accueil très PRO par Riks à mon arrivée.
Chambre petite mais conforme aux photos
Un peu de rangements dans la chambre et la salle de bain seraient bienvenus.
Emplacement super le long d'un très beau canal à 5' DE LA GARE.
Petit déjeuner très bien
FAbulous beyond fabulous!

Riks is a very cheerful and gracious host. He provided us enough information in 5 minutes to help avoid some touristy pitfalls and make the best of our trip. Not to mention carrying my heavy suitcase all the way upstairs! The room is squeaky clean, quiet, with a comfortable bed. The breakfast supplies are ample, and provided in a very cozy space. Awesome.

Riks is a very inviting and gracious host. We were beyond satisfied with our room and access to his beautiful and stocked kitchen in the morning. The location is a dream. Riks is polite and considerate; he certainly made us feel welcome in Amsterdam.

Riks' place is perfect. The location is unbelievable - literally a 3 minute walk from Central Station, and also at the top of Jordaan, near the "9 streets" which I think is Amsterdam's nicest area.

He's very welcoming and approachable, and answers any questions you may have. The room and bed was clean with an ensuite bath and shower, and WIFI worked fine. Plus you can help yourself to a great breakfast selection and fresh coffee. Overall, really good value for money. Would happily go back.

Riks made me very welcome and carried my case upstairs. He explained where things were and how things worked. The location was perfect, only a 5 minutes walk from the station but on a lovely quiet and picturesque canal.

Riks is a perfect host! He welcomed us when we arrived at his house and gave us all the information we needed for our stay.
The room was very nice, exactly as shown in the pictures on the ad. It is quite small, but for a weekend it is more than enough.
The apartment is in a great neighborhood, right next to the Central Station (departure of cruises is 5 minutes' walk, plenty of restaurants next to the apartment, bike rental around the corner).
A perfect stay in Amsterdam!

Fantastic location and everything as described. Very comfortable stay. Riks was great in welcoming me in and helping me get oriented with a ton of suggestions on where to go and what to do (even though it was late at night! Appreciate it!).

Seriously the neighborhood is perfect (Jordaans) and less then ten min walk to Centraal train station. Highly recommend and will definitely consider for my next trip to Amsterdam. Thanks Riks!
房東非常的熱心 位置非常的便利

I totally fell in love with the host and his place! It was really nice and cozy and i love the breakfast spread that Riks prepared every morning. The bed and pillow hugs you so comfortably that I find myself dreading to get out of it! haha.. The location was superb! words can't describe it. All i can say is, its walking distance from EVERYTHING YOU WANT AND NEED! Plus, the host is hot so thats a plus if you stay here! hahaha.. Riks really made our stay a pleasurable one. I highly recommend anyone who's travelling to Amsterdam to check this place out!

Apartment was in a great location and in good shape. Had to climb stairs up to get to the room but it was well worth it as the room and toilet was clean and sufficiently roomy. Breakfast was provided and the spread was excellent- coffee juice tea toast, eggs, meats and cheese; definitely felt like a hotel spread and we were spoilt for choice in the mornings!

Riks was very nice and explained us which nice places (restaurant, bar...) we should go. The room is quite small but its very pratical with shower and toilets. We had a great time, Riks' place is 5 minutes walk from the central station.

Riks was an awesome host from the moment I arrived, admittedly very late in the evening. He was friendly, relaxed and warm, and gave me so much information about my first time in Amsterdam.

The room was cozy, and I have to marvel at how quiet the general house stayed, even with other guests present on my floor. The shower was great, the bed was firm but comfortable, and I really liked the room. It fit the bill perfectly for someone traveling by themselves, and stayed very warm even though it was snowing outside.

The location is perfect for exploring Amsterdam. It's both near Central Station -- with easy access by walking or tram to all the touristy activities, but also on the edge of a neighborhood with more of real Dutch feel. I found some great bars and restaurants within walking distance that were packed with locals, a great sign.
Had a great time at Riks - the B&B was excellent. Host was a helpful guy and the room was comfortable and breakfasts were delicious. Definitely recommend it.
Perfect location. Friendly and helpful host. Both our room and the breakfast were quite ok. Thank you!
I bought 4 nights here for my son. My son RAVED about the place. Riks is sweet and helpful and the B&B is clean an in the perfect location!

Margot’s place was fantastic! It was easily walkable to all the major attractions but super quiet at night. Margot was very responsive and was very friendly. Loved the wine and food upon check in for our staff. Highly recommend.
If you visit Amsterdam, This is the place you will stay. Just the BEST. Quick Clean Close that all you need.
Great location. Great host who provided nice extras like fresh fruits and a bottle of wine on arrival. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

The BEST Airbnb we’ve ever stayed at! It was such a great find for the price and the location. It looked exactly like it did in the photos and exceeded all of our expectations. Margot was very helpful and quick to respond when we had train problems postponing our arrival time.  If you get the chance, definitely stay here!!

Une situation exceptionnelle tout en étant au calme. Un lieu très charmant, joliment décoré. Une hôte adorable et pleine d'attention. Vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermés. Mille mercis à Margot, nous avons passé un super séjour.
Great location, very nice place and excellent host.

Todo estuvo genial.  Margot nos espero personalmente y fue muy cálida al recibirnos. Fue muy fácil llegar al dto. La ubicación está muy bien. Cerca de todo y en un lugar tranquilo para descansar. Estaba todo muy limpio. Margot dejó todo lo necesario para el desayuno y cosas muy ricas!!! Muy cómodo ya que estábamos con un bebé y hasta tenía cuna para el. Lo súper recomiendo!
Great location!!!!  Quiet side street close to the heart of Amsterdam. Restaurants and grocery very close. Highly recommended.

We stayed with Margot for a few days whilst in Amsterdam and we will definitely be returning! The apartment is situated in the perfect location, in walking distance of everything but also on a quiet street out of the way of the hustle and bustle. The apartment itself is lovely and spacious, clean and has all the facilities; small kitchenette, fridge, microwave, kettle and tea & coffee. Margot was a very kind and a welcoming host and she let us borrow her printer to print some tickets and also our boarding passes which was very helpful. The apartment has its own door to enter and exit which was handy and we felt free to come and go at any point, which was nice. The breakfast that is provided doesn’t have a lot of choice, bread, butter, jam and then cheese and meats. Being from England this is not the sort of breakfast we have, but this wasn't a big issue as we ate out everyday. There is also a bookshelf with lots of ideas of how to spend your time in Amsterdam and also best places to eat which we found helpful. Overall would highly recommend this apartment!

Schönes, sehr zentral gelegenes und zweckmässig eingerichtetes Studio. Es hat alles was man braucht und war sehr sauber. Auch die Betten waren sehr bequem. Margot ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Als Aufmerksamkeit war auch eine feine Falsche Wein für uns bereit. Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt sehr genossen und können die Unterkunft allen nur sehr empfehlen.
Margot was a great host and we enjoyed to stay at her place very very much. Nice location, spacious and very clean apartment.

This studio can’t be beat. Location is amazing;close to everything yet private area. Beautiful garden by front door;spacious;easy to have friends over for dinner, and very clean. Ground level private entrance was a great plus

Margot’s place is located in an amazing spot. Close to central station, markets and cafes. A perfect starting point for visiting Amsterdam! Warm, clean and spacious inside. Perfect for a couple travelling with a baby. Would highly recommend this place.

Good location from Amsterdam Centraal Train Station, approx. 10-12 minutes walk. Quite spacious accommodation, clean, nice touches with food on hand for us ... milk, coffee, tea, orange juice, eggs, bread, butter, cheese, muesli. It is directly opposite a Canal, but it would seem that the Canal on this street has been undergoing reconstruction and renewal since October 2018. Perhaps don’t expect Canal views too soon. (as at September 2019). Quiet neighbourhood, away from the hustle and bustle. Private ground floor accommodation.

Margot’s place was well located, stylishly presented and clean. Comfortable beds, great breakfast and other provisions awaiting us on arrival which was much appreciated. Margot responded very promptly to any questions. Excellent Wi-fi, no problems at all with the amenities or the apartment and we would highly recommend it.
Convenient space for 2 people. Great/beautiful location conveniently located by the metro so accessible to most of the city

Margot is a wonderful hostess! She has anticipated most of your needs, gives great instructions and responds promptly. Her unit is conveniently located, super clean and well furnished.  We highly recommend Margot's place when you are in Amsterdam!

Margot's place is well located - 1 km from the train station.   Five minutes from newmarket square with grocer and restaurants.  Best of all is her place is in a quiet area - not a peep of any noise at night.  The breakfast provided was good  - eggs,  a variety of sliced cheeses, ham, bread, fruit and a bottle of wine.   Just be aware that (Hidden by Airbnb) directions may off by a couple doors, just check the door number that Margot gives you.   She was there to greet us and explain everything for the appartment.
The place was a great location. Riks was a great source of information.  Will definitely go back.
Super place pour séjourner, très bien placé, déjeuner très bon, hôte très accueillant  ! ;) je recommande vivement ce B&B

Great room perfectly located in the heart of Amsterdam. Riks is very helpful and a great host, he indicated some nice places to visit and was there when needed, really appreciated that.

Having a (very!) full breakfast with such a view on the Canals was uniquely amazing.

I can only recommend this room for a weekend in Amsterdam!

The are of the house is perfect! Very very close to the Amsterdam Centraal Station. House is very beautiful and cozy. The kitchen was nicest ever! I really enjoyed the breakfast especially eggs!!!!:) the only downside is that the room is too small for two people. I can barely move around after my suitcase is open. But overall i had a great time at his house. Someone who is looking for the closest, pretty and cozy house, this is your place.

Very nice traditional house, where you can feel and prove the atmosphere of Amsterdam. Very clean room with modern (and recently renovated) bathroom and toilet, very good coffee in the morning and plenty of choice for breakfast. Warm welcome upon arrival and if help needed, Riks is always there.

Riks place was beautiful. I loved the room. It has lots of light, although the window does face someone's patio. No problem- just draw the drapes closed when you want privacy. It was really helpful having breakfast items available and I had a wonderful chat with the other guests. The location is really close to the train station which is nice when you're new to the city. Riks was kind and helpful, pointing out places to go. I enjoyed my stay.

Riks is a very nice guy. He helped us with the luggage and gave us indications about things that we can do.
The place was very comfortable and near of the central station, it was easy to move from there.

Great location & view from the kitchen, very central, but still quiet (we slept very well). Room is small - but it had all we needed & a lot of light. Short distance from the train station & to any place in town. Riks explained everything to us - nice host!

Montréal, Canada , mai 2015
Le B& B chez Riks est superbe.
L'emplacement est idéal.
Près de la gare centrale ( pratique pour l'aéroport).
Riks est très gentil et communicatif. Il répond très rapidement aux questions à tout moment.
Le B&B est très joli.
Notre chambre ėtait petite et très propre.
Le petit déjeuner est parfait! Il y a de tout, juste à se servir.
Nous recommandons le B& B à tous et reviendrons à notre prochaine visite, c'est certain.
Merci Riks de ton accueil.
Trang& Patrick
Super great place to stay, a bit on the small size, but it only makes the stay more cozy.
Absolutely great location. Friendly and thorough welcome by Jane on Riks behalf. Wonderful "help-yourself" breakfast. Thank- you very much.

Excellent place to stay in Amsterdam! Located very centrally but still quiet. Riks was busy so there was Jane who welcomed me very friendly and took the time to explain me all the important places to visit in Amsterdam and gave me useful recommendations. Also nice contact with other guests staying there.

Riks made us feel very welcome. The place is centrally located and it was convenient getting around the city.

The breakfast selection was great and it allowed us to get a quick start to our day to explore the city.

We were also able to experience what it's like to live in a dutch style home.

We would definitely stay here again!
Excellent host , central location ,apartment had everything we needed (apart from maybe more breakfast things ) really clean apartment

Fabulous location, easy walk to everything centrally located. Considerate host, allowing a much later checkout. The apartment was clean, modern and well appointed.  Margot’s personal touches were very much appreciated.

A nice, clean studio apartment in a pleasant residential area - only a few minutes walk to the bars and restaurants in the Centrum yet far enough away to be quiet. Pleasant sitting area, kitchenette equipped with everything you'd need and comfortable beds. Margot exceeded expectations by providing plenty of provisions for breakfast as well as a bottle of wine for our enjoyment, along with snacks. Wouldn't hesitate in booking with Margot again.

Margot’s place was exceptionally beautiful, well-appointed and comfortable. She provided ample breakfast items and we discovered Stroopwaffles, a must-have delicacy in Holland, thanks to her. The check-in and check-out were a breeze, and Margot was available to answer any queries that we had. The best part about the apartment was that it was walking distance to everything! No matter where we went, we were always able to walk back to the apartment with great ease. We would definitely recommend this place to everyone.
A great quirky space away from the hustle and bustle (a nice walk away). Everything you need for a self catering stay with plenty of room compared to a hotel. Great host communication :-)

Super Unterkunft! Wer das Glück hat Amsterdam zu besuchen und hier freie Kapazitäten sieht, dann sollte man sofort zuschlagen!
Top Lage, toller Gastgeber

Margot is a very nice hostess , she greeted me and showed me the house when I had arrived. The house is in center of Amsterdam and close to the central station. The flat is small but it has everything you need. I have spent a very nice few days there.

We both enjoyed our stay at Margot’s place. The apartment was conveniently close to everything and a walk to all of the sites and museums. Not far from Central train station either. Having breakfast food stocked up too was very convenient.

My husband and I spent 3 nights at Mondrian B&B: the location is perfect, near both to the train station and the centre af Amsterdam.
The flat is very nice furnished, you can find everything you need, and even more, and is absolutely clean. Breakfast was great, everything of good quality and not the cheapest you can find somewhere.
Margot - and her son, who welcomed us - are very charming and helpful, we had a wonderful stay, just...too short!

The place was very clean, well appointed, along a small canal in a very quiet part of the city yet very close to cafés, restaurants and museums.
Margot was very responsive and made sure that everything was ok.
A great place to stay that I truly recommend.

Margot was so warm and friendly. Her place is an easy walk to the center and a very rare ground floor unit in a city filled with steep stairs. She met us for a late check-in with no issues and made things easy for us during a busy work trip. Thank you, Margot!
Margot’s apartment is just lovely, clean and welcoming. The canal is under repair so it is not as pictured but it’s a great location and Margot is a gracious host.

Location parfait, emplacement parfait et Margot parfaite également ! Le studio était très propre, très agréable et vraiment bien situé ! Margot était très disponible et serviable et nous a rempli le réfrigérateur pour les petits-déjeuners avec que des bonnes choses. Je recommande !!!!
Great studio in a great location with an equally great host!
Excellent accueil, studio très agréable et parfaitement situé

Perfection in an Air Bnb world.

I book lots of places on my travels but few come with the personal touches this studio flat does. Really nice to arrive with a stocked fridge! Margot really has thought of everything - plus she's lovely company.

The location itself is perfect for Amsterdam in my opinion - all the attractions are equidistant with a really calm atmosphere at all hours. We didn't need any public transport. Plus I much prefer this part of town to the wider, more populated length of canals leading up to the Rijksmuseum.

Highly recommended - I'd love to return sometime.
Very lovely Studio in city centre with Margot as a fantastic host! Clean rooms, great welcoming, breakfast and coffee and flexible check out. Recommending the Studio for your visit in Amsterdam!

Had an amazing stay at this beautiful studio. Its just 10min wall from amsterdam central station and all the happening shops, restaurants and cafe are within 5min distance, yet it has a very quiet and peaceful surrounding. I would definitly recommend this to anyone tracelling to Amsterdam.

We had an excellent 2 week stay with Margot. The flat had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Margot supplied us with all we could want for a Dutch  breakfast. She also left a bottle of wine and some lovely Dutch biscuits and homemade jam.The flat is near everything and within walking distance to sights and museums. Margot is very personable and was happy to answer questions and make suggestions. We would be very happy to stay there again.
The location is fantastic. Down a quiet street but within a short walk you are right in the middle of the busy city.

Lovely beautiful and clean apartment only 10 mins walk from the train station. Was very peaceful at night despite being so central and able to walk everywhere. Very comfortable beds. Margot left for breakfast cereal, eggs, ham, bread, cheese and delicious home made jam. Extras provided was wine, fruit and stroop waffles. We walked and cycled everywhere.

Everything about Margot's place...five stars, from start to finish!  What a wonderful hostess and very attractive accommodations, in a terrific location.  What a great surprise to have all of the various breakfast items available in the kitchen area.  A very perfect stay, both quiet and comfortable!

Die Lage war für und perfekt und wir konnten alles zu Fuß erkunden.
Das Apartment ist gut eingerichtet, sauber und bequem und der volle Kühlschrank hat uns sehr erfreut. :)

Margot’s place is incredibly convenient especially on our last day with heavy luggage, being on the ground floor was a relief.

The area is quiet and so easy to get to from the station. The whole stay was no stress, thanks Margot!
Great stay! Would love to stay again sometime. Really great location, was accessible to any point of the city.

Margot ‘s place exceeded our expectations. It is indeed very close to Central Station we walked there easily in just a few minutes. Margot was available after just one knock on the door the place was clean and we were surprised to see Stroop waffles and a bottle of wine refrigerator was stocked with nice cheeses and meats and we had milk and juice in the refrigerator for our breakfast the next morning. It was good that we could make coffee in the room before we headed out each day. Also we appreciated a nice selection of books to browse and music to play at our leisure. There were several maps of the area that helped a lot to fill in the blanks from what we brought with us. We would stay there again for sure.

Stop scrolling through different places in Amsterdam and book this one now while it’s still available. The location is perfect—close to things you want to see but on a quiet side street. Margo supplied us with food for our breakfasts which was so helpful as we got adjusted to shops. This is an excellent place.

Margot’s place was very comfortable.  We slept well on the bed. She had cheeses and ham, juice, milk, butter, fruit in the fridge. It was a 10-15 minute walk to the train station. She was a great host. Would stay again.

Our stay in Dorine's Appartment was wonderfull ! The appartment is quite close from the city center as expected : 15min by foot ! You have a very nice view of the Artis Zoo from the living room (it's very nice to wake up and see camels!). Also Dorine is a very nice host and her mother too :) Last point :there's plenty of space in this very nice and old appartment, a very good thing for a group of 5-6!!

Great hospitality, location and overall a very easy and comfortable stay. Your privacy is respected and the place is very clean. The hosts provide a locals insight into to area alongside general tourist information. Fully functional accommodation with breakfast provided. Highly recommended as a better alternative to hostel stay.

We had a great time at Amy's bnb! Gordon greeted us for check in and explained everything and afterwards we were given complete privacy. Rooms were cleaned, fresh towels provided, and a very yummy and satisfying breakfast was replenished every day! Location is also very convenient and was walking distance from any place we wanted to visit. Only negative is that it could get quite loud at night as the room overlooks the street...but it does come with a nice view! Also, it can get quite hot in the summer, which cannot be helped. Gordon and Amy were very flexible with our check-in time and check-out times, however, which made it much more convenient for our travels.

Gordon and Amy provide a great space to stay. We were lucky to have the yellow room and it was very spacious, with doors opening to a small patio. Great to cool down after a day wandering the canals. They provided a wonderful breakfast each morning & nothing was a bother. The location is handy to the train station and the street itself had supermarkets, food places, shopping - perfect really!
Great location!! Just few blocks from the center..the breakfast was abundant..They allowed us leave the luggage and stay longer in the apartment..very recommendable!
Great stay at Amy's B&b! Accommodations were great and the location was on point!! Thanks again!
Gordon and Amy were very receptive and helpful during our stay. The location is great, its possible to go all main spots on foot.

This was our first experience with airbnb and it couldnt have been any better. Gordon was a great host, he helped us with all the questions we had and was very helpful. The room was perfectly located in the center of the city and very cozy, the breakfast provided was delicious. So all in all we highly enjoyed staying at Gordon and Amys BnB and strongly recommend it to everybody!

Gordon was really forthcoming in helping us right from the time we arrived.  The apartment is located at haarlemdijk  which is a stones throw away from central station, dam square & the red light district. This makes it ideal as a b&b. No disturbance from the host's made for two comfortable nights in Amsterdam. Ideal for a budget b&b
Gordon was so friendly. He made our stay in Amsterdam very comfortable. It was really nice staying there for two nights.

Gordon and Amy were very good hosts and the room was as described.

The place was easy to get to and was a short walk from the central train station. Gordon was there to greet us and show us the room and give us advice on what to do.

The room was a short walk from the Anne Frank house, Dam Square, red light district, and the room overlooked a nice active shopping street.

There was clean linen, as well as a breakfast provided every day (bananas, danishes, croissants, yoghurt, juice and milk). The place was very private and the bathroom and toilet was shared with their other room on Airbnb facing the back. Amy and Gordon live upstairs.

We'd recommend Amy and Gordon for anyone visiting Amsterdam.
Good and economic place to stay in downtown, essential comfort, very good breakfast, host available and very nice, don’t expect a 4 star hotel but good for few days to spend in the center.

The room is very nice！Just as the pic the host have shown us！Great location，nice cozy room，very nice breakfast with yogurt，juice,bread,banana!The most important is the host are very nice!
If I come here next time,definitely I will choose here!:)
The appartment is very nice, very central, clean, comfortable and private. We had a great time at Amsterdam! Thanks for hosting us!

Gordon was a friendly host upon our arrival and very available if we needed him during our stay (we didn't, but based on his responsiveness before our arrival I trust he would have been!). Gordon cleaned our room and provided fresh fruit and baked goods daily. The apartment is in a convenient & interesting neighbourhood and although the room opens to a busy street it was very quiet with the windows closed and we slept well. However, with the windows closed it got a bit stuffy even with the fan going. All in all, as advertised and a pleasant experience!

My stay at Gordon and Amy's Blue Room was everything I needed for a few nights' stay during a conference. Gordon provided helpful information about finding their place, and was there to meet me and show me around. The room was excellent for the price - comfortable bed, a clothes rail, table, fridge, sink, coffee, breakfast snacks and wifi. The toilet and shower were also very clean and well maintained.

The area is really nice - only 5 minutes walk to the very heart of Amsterdam, but far enough removed from the tourist shops and bars that there is no trouble having a good night's sleep.

We had a great stay at this B&B. It is in an excellent location for exploring the city and so easy to walk to centraal station. The blue room is great. A small table with coffee maker and kettle, fridge, microwave, sink. The shared shower and toilet are clean. The windows open onto a very cool street. Breakfast was very appreciated. I would recommend this place.
Bel quartiere, descrizione precisa e accoglienza cordiale e disponibile, ci hanno lasciato portare i bagagli alle 9 di mattina anche se la camera era pronta solo dalle 12.

My wife and I stayed at Gordon & Amy's blue room for 2 nights in September. it was great!
The room was clean and tidy. Thr shower and toilet are shared, were also clean and good. Gordon gave us our own keys, and the room is separate from the rest of the house, so it didn't feel like entering someone else's apartment. We loved the big windows to the street (tough it's kinda noisy during the day). The location in good, a few minutes walk from the central station and the city-center. Gordon was really nice to us :)

Gordon and Amy's place was just as pictured. Room was a bit noisy with the windows open, as it is street facing. However, this didn't bother us, as we're used to city noise. Breakfast was wonderful (yogurts, coffee/tea and pastries daily) and there's a private sink in the room. Toilet and shower are separate and shared with the other room, which was never an issue. Only criticism is that the shower could use a bit of a cleaning. Otherwise, it was sufficient for the rate.

The place is nice and as in the photo advertised. Easy to find, about 15-20 min walk from train station. If you have big luggages might be a bit tired. We got 2 big luggages, 1 big & 1 medium size. Gordon helped us to carry it upstair (small & steep). Some yogurts, banana, orange juice, milk and danish was provided in the room. Good to start your days with that. Bathroom & toilet are separated and it is okay condition. We might come back with our kids, they could stay in another opposite room (listed as yellow room) Thanks Gordon & Amy we have a nice stay there.
Gordon welcomed us very kindly. Breakfast was provided every morning and we could leave our luggage until the evening of our departure.

The most important the room is exactly as pictured, and the location is great! 15 minutes from the Central Station, in Haarlen neighborhood which have a lot stores. The locations allowed us to walk to all Jordaan area and really near of others areas of the city. Gordon is very nice and helpful! The wonderful breakfast have iogurts, orange juice, milk, fruit, some pasteries, and you can make the cofee or tea. The room also have fridge, microwaves. The are a shared shower and toilet which was never an issue, always clean, in the room we have the sink. Nice place to stay a couple of days in Amsterdam!!

Gordon welcomed us warmly and gave us a nice introduction to the area and the flat. Apart from the initial welcome, we didn't spend any time with Gordon or Amy apart from to say goodbye and thank you for a really lovely stay. It was nice to stay in a place which was central, with unintrusive but friendly landlords.

Riks was awesome...really nice and won to Earth, as well as, being very helpful.

The room is quite small, but fit me fine. Has Pvt BR and shower...lacks circulating air and storage space to put your luggage (so you walk over to circumnavigate the room).

What can I say more about this place...WELL ITS LOCATION IS PROBABLY ITS BEST SELLING POINT. (Right up on the Singel, with quick access to Central Station, Royal Palace Museum, and other parts of Central Amsterdam).

El anfitrión estaba esperando nuestra llegada, tal como habíamos acordado. Nos dio las indicaciones precisas para manejarnos en la casa y en la ciudad. Con buen criterio indicó zonas y lugares. Nos ayudó con las maletas por las escaleras y con los de la compañía de taxis. Todo bien
everything its ok , the place very clean and comfortable

Riks was very welcoming, informative and helpful on our arrival. The location was topnotch, the rooms clean and tidy and nicely decorated. We loved being right on the Brouwer Canal and looking out at it from the kitchen windows. Riks provided a more than adequate breakfast choice in pleasant surroundings. Our only real negative was the small room - hardly enough space in which to store our luggage - and the steep hike up three flights of stairs which for a couple of oldies, one of us anyway, was a grind. In future we would request a bigger room on a lower level but certainly recommend Rik's and would stay there again given the conditions mentioned.  Cheers Riks!

The house is in the best possible location from my point of view, which I didn't even fully appreciate until I got there. I walked everywhere with no problems and yet it was peaceful and quiet. It is a few steps from the main train station so that you don't have to carry your luggage very far. A five minute walk will take you to the thick of the center of town. Twenty minutes and you are at the art museums.

The rooms were not large, which is not surprising in a canal house, but self-sufficient and clean, modern, and neat. Riks was very friendly and willing to spend the time to help a newcomer find his way around town.

Anyway I can't imagine a better choice to stay, at least for me. Thank you, Riks.
Absolutely breathtaking city with equally hospitable hosts and inhabitants. Excellent housing and service. Definitely coming back

We had a really lovely experience staying at Rik's place. It's a nice, warm and safe neighbourhood to be around!
Both the weekend market and the centraal station is just 5 mins walk away.
A huge variety of breakfast is also made available for us to choose from and we are often spoilt for choices!
Would love to be back at Rik's place the next time we visit Amsterdam!

The location is the highlight of this place.  I walked everywhere!  And it's situated on such a cute street overlooking the canal.  Riks was great, greeted me when I arrived, gave me all the info I needed...very efficient!  Yes, the room is small.  I didn't mind it at all, especially with the cold weather, I felt like the room heated up faster.  I personally wouldn't recommend for 2 or more people unless if you're really comfortable being in each other's space.  The breakfast setup was amazing!  I was able to make myself a delicious sandwich every morning.  If you're looking for more of a "local" experience in Amsterdam in a very central location, I would highly recommend Rik's place.

Riks made my trip to Amsterdam smooth and comfortable. Riks is a great guy who I enjoyed talking with, and who made me feel very welcome. He balances this with allowing you your privacy and personal space.

Riks was very easy to communicate with and provides very good directions to travel the short distance from Amsterdam Centraal to his beautiful home on the canals. The location is fantastic, close enough to everything, but outside of the tourist grind. There are plenty of good restaurant and cafe choices nearby, and Riks was very helpful to make recommendations.

As some have noted the rooms are small and the stairs are steep, but I found room quite well lit with large windows and the bed to be quite comfortable. The stairs are standard canal house stairs-- people with mobility issues should consider other ground floor options or large properties with a lift. The bedroom was private with en suite bath. There was a large chair/ mini sofa in the room to read or relax. Note that the room I stayed in does not have a desk, but Riks offered the use of the kitchen table.

Riks kitchen is top notch and the self service breakfast was a great way to start the day. I would definitely stay at Riks beautiful home again.

Great experience at Rik's place. The room was clean and comfortable, fantastic location in the heart of Amsterdam. Breakfast is a simple (bread, jam, cereal etc) and really nice touch. Rik was very helpful and made me feel welcome. Highly recommend.
Nice and cozy room, awesome location and a very welcoming host :)
Very welcoming nice host nice room

We spent 4 days at Riks lovely Gracht side house. He is a nice host and took his time to give us some insider information on what to see and where to go offside the beaten tourist tracks. Even our late night check in at 11:00 pm was no problem. The spacious kitchen was perfect to prepare ourselves for roaming Amsterdam's streets. Rooms are rather small, thus best for singles and couples.

Riks was a splendid host and has a wonderful home in a great location. He was very helpful on arrival and then left us to our own devices. We had a great time and would highly recommend riks as a place to stay in the heart of amsterdam. 10/10

Canalhouse B&B est très bien situé dans le centre historique d'Amsterdam, à proximité immédiate de la gare centrale. La chambre est cependant très calme, agréablement décorée et bien équipée comme décrit. La cuisine où l'on prend les  petits-déjeuners est conviviale avec une belle vue sur le Brouwersgracht. Riks m'a accueilli à l'heure convenue et m'a fourni toutes les informations utiles pour un agréable séjour.

Well located and great host. This is a real B&B. Riks was super pleasant and welcoming. He met me on my arrival, gave the quick rundown of the key, breakfast and location, and then left me to my own devices. Room was just what was need for coming and going, and the self serve breakfast of bread, meats and cheeses made for a convenient start to the day.

Riks was very kind to take my booking at the very last minute as my travel plans were disrupted due to the Brussels Bombings. Riks was very nice and his b&b is in an amazing house on a beautiful quiet canal. It is a short 5 minute walk to central station and 10 minute walk to Dam Square.

We had a great 4 day travel in Amsterdam and the only reason was not only the beautiful city. Riks welcomed us very well and we were like in our own place. Location is more than great,that's so important because you can come in the middle of the day,1-2 hour rest and go again. After funny and useful conversations with Riks,ı feel like ı have a friend in Amsterdam:).I will certainly come again in Amsterdam and i will stay here again.

The location of Riks place is excellent, within walking distance to all of city centre. The room was clean and looked exactly like in the photos, although it was quite chilly and there was some draft from the window. We experienced some lack of communication before arriving, apparently due to technical issues, which caused a misunderstanding in the booking price. This was solved once we arrived and met face to face but it would definitely have been better to hear from Riks shortly after we had done the booking. Breakfast was definitely sufficient and a very big plus. All in all it was a pleasant stay and Riks was very friendly and informative.

Riks is a perfect host: we were made to feel at home from the moment he opened the front door, without being intrusive, always respecting our privacy. The house is lovely, absolute brilliant location. The room was on the small side for 2 persons, but it had everything we needed and it was quiet and peaceful despite being in the middle of town. We will definitely be back. Thanks Riks en tot ziens!
We arrived an hour earlier but there was no problem, Riks met us, made us some coffee while he finished preparing our room.

Ricks est un hote tres accueillant.
Son appartement en bord de canal et les petits déjeunés le matin sont tres appréciés!!! J'y retourne dans un mois et je n'hesiterai une seconde pour reserver une chambre à nouveau !

Riks consiguió que me sintiera muy bien en casa. El espacio es muy acogedor, típicamente de Ámsterdam con muchos escalones, pero con encanto. Tiene una ubicación privilegiada, cercana a la Estación Central, y a la vez en el borde de Jordaan que es una zona muy bonita de Ámsterdam.

Riks was a very friendly host and made me feel welcome on my first airbnb experience!!
The room in the beautiful traditional dutch house was very nice, tidy and had everything it needed.
Also the breakfast was good :) the whole athmosphere at Riks apartment was wonderful and really suited the Amsterdam vibe!
I'll be back :)
Fantastic stay. Room as described and 5 min from Amsterdam Centraal. Great location for exploring all of Amsterdam and surroundings. Breakfast every morning was excellent. Thank you!
The location couldn't be better!

We spent 4 days at Riks house and it was a nice house directly at the channels. Also it is quite close to the train station. The room was nice and clean. The whole area is also great for walking by foot.

I had a great (Email hidden by Airbnb) munication was easy. Location excellent and Riks is on hand to ask for local guidance if needed. Bed was comfy and room is small and cozy. And don't forget the complimentary breakfast. Dankewell Riks!
Couldn't have asked for a better location. Everything was clean and the room was what it was said to be. I would stay here again

Nos encantó la estancia en casa de Gordon&Amy. A 15min andando de la EstacionCentraal,todo super limpio y total intimidad para los húespedes sin olvidar mencionar el estupendo desayuno que cada dia te dejan en la habitacion. Altamente recomedable!!

Great location, good breakfast; there are microvawe, kettle, coffee -machine. Gordon is very hospitable owner, the communication was very smooth and fast, and he helped to carry our baggage on steep stairs. Recommended!
Great!

Gordon est un hôte très gentil. La chambre était niquel et le petit déjeuner vraiment top tous les matins. La chambre est vraiment bien placée, en plein centre d'Amsterdam et proche de la gare centrale. Le séjour fut très agréable!

Gordon was such a friendly host. The room was great, had more than everything you need. I was so shocked at the breakfast! Was a really nice unexpected extra. The bed was so comfortable, room was clean and the location was fantastic. I have told everyone about it and I will definitely be staying again.
After checkout, Gordon also allowed me to keep my luggage in the other room as no one was staying in it rather than dragging it round with me on my last day.

Gordon and Amy were the perfect hosts. We didn't see Amy on our visit but Gordon was very warm and welcoming. Great location if you want to see the main sites of inner Amsterdam. Our room immediately looked over a main shopping street that wasn't too noisy at night. 100% would recommend.

Gordon and Amy were great and very understanding hosts. I actually made a mistake in booking their room and forgot to book one night but they were understanding and let me stay the extra night at a reasonable cost

The room was great and exactly as described in the listing. The beds were really comfortable and the view from the room is really cool. The location is fantastic and just a few minutes walk from Amsterdam Centraal on a street with lots of shops and restaurants.
Coffee, tea, juice, milk, and food are provided. Cleaning is done every day.

The shower and toilet are shared with their other room but I has no problem with them and they were very clean.

Overall, I had a fantastic time staying with them. Highly recommend

Gordon was very welcoming when we first arrived. He told us all we needed to know about the apartment and gave us great description of the neighborhood. He even provided us with tourist books and maps!

The experience was really good.
The room was small but cosy and had everything needed, bedroom, small washing basin, table with chairs and a fridge with juice, milk and an essential breakfast.
We only had the pleasure to meet Gordon, since we've stayed in Amsterdam for only two days we hadn't the chance to know Amy. He has been very nice for waiting for us for our late arrival and still gaving us a lot of informations about the room, surroundings and city.
The room has been cleaned every morning and most importantly without a fixed time so we had the chance to sleep freely late.

About the neighborhood:
The Jordaan area is very quiet and relaxing, not so busy in the morning and has a lot of "facilities" like supermarkets, bars, fashion shops and cofeeshops, just 10 minutes of slow walk from the city centre, perfect for a budget visit.

Will contact for shure for the next visit!

Thanks for having us! Clean and comfortable and super location! The Danishes, tea and juice were delicious. Would highly recommend to all, best location and good value for money. Would stay there again in. Heartbeat!
Fueron muy amables, nos dieron informacion, la habitacion estaba limpia, muy bien ubicada, el desayuno muy correcto. Todo muy bien.

Gordon definitely made us feel welcome the minute we checked in. He even offered us to use the big room since we were the only guest at that time. The room is very clean and very comfortable bed. And they clean it everyday.He even provided us with free breakfast and some drinks. The room has all the utilities you need. The location was perfect. Nearby restaurants, cafe, shops and grocery stores.

Dorine is a very nice and kind host! My friends and I were lucky to stay at her apartment. We enjoyed our holidays in Amsterdam and our stay at Dorine’s apartment! It is good old-stylized and spacious apartment, highly comfortable for a group of 5-6. It has a well equipped kitchen with a big table and highly comfortable living room where you can relax or just chilling with your friends all together. Indeed you can feel there like at home and find everything you need for comfortable staying.
It is located in a beautiful area and indeed with a nice view from the living room (view of the Artis Zoo). It is quite close to the big grocery store, tram stop, bike rental and to the city center as well, so it was easy for us to reach any place without any problems.
Sincerely recommend and would like to stay there again.
Thank you, Dorine!

hello travelers,

my name is philipp, i'm 23 years old and i stayed at dorine's apartment for silvester with 6 friends. we had enough space, everything was clean, well furnitured and worked perfectly fine.

we never met dorine during our stay, but her mother showed us everything when we checked in and all the other stuff we could easily look up in the nice email dorine sent me a few days before our arrival.

also all the other communication with dorine was no problem at all. she always responded very fast and friendly on emails, calls or messages.

all in all we had a very, very nice time visiting amsterdam!!!

greez and best wishes from vienna :D

Dorine nos ofreció su casa tal cuál aparece en las fotos. Su madre nos recibió cuando llegamos y nos explicó todo en detalle con mucha amabilidad. La casa es muy amplia, y el barrio es muy tranquilo y agradable. Hay un tranvía que para muy cerca, y en 15 minutos paseando alcanzas el centro de la ciudad. Ideal para una familia con niños.

I stayed at Dorines Apartments with 5 friends and we had a very nice time.
There is everything you need and it was much bigger than we've expected. It also is very clean and central.
All in all there was nothing we could complain about :)

It was a really great time! The apartment was huge and fully equipped! It was placed in the heart of Amsterdam in a quiet neighborhood- about 10 min to the close centrum. I had great sms and email contact with Dorine although I didn't meet her personally. I recommend the apartment to all, who want to visit Amsterdam with their friends and family.

It was perfect! I was in Amsterdam with somes friends , everything you need was here . The house is well located ! You can see some animals from the house. Monkeys are very cool , at 7 am , they will be your new  clocks! Nothing to say , perfect!

Dorine was very helpfull with giving tips and suggestions around Amsterdam; she is very nice. The Apartment is amazing. A lot of space. We absolutly didnt Miss anything at all. Was a great stay. The communication was quick, i am really glad  to have found this place to stay.
The host canceled this reservation 14 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.
The host canceled this reservation 2 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

Nous avons passé 5 jours chez Dorine et nous en sommes très content! L’appartement est très spacieux et joliment décoré. Il situé en face du zoo donc très pratique pour tout faire à pied. Merci à la maman de Dorine pour nous avoir aussi bien accueilli.

We were five girls staying at Dorine’s and we had an amazing time! Located right across from the zoo with view to the camels from the balcony! The place is very spacious with all the amnesties you need - would love to come visit again!

Beautiful apartment
Great location
Dorine gave lots of great tips for the area too!

Dorine was a wonderful place to stay. The host was quick to reply and very helpful as was her mother who we met to get the keys.We were a party of 4 and there was a lot of space to move around with a large kitchen and beautiful living room with a great view looking out towards the zoo seeing the camels. Lovely power shower, all beds where comfortable (although it did get cold in the evening). Being in the middle of the city meant getting around was easy. Felt very homey, I highly recommend this anyone! We all loved it!

Dorine's apartment was lovely!  She was an excellent host, answering all questions very quickly and providing information and recommendations.  The apartment was spacious and very comfortable.  The location is very good with easy access to public transportation.   We very much enjoyed the large windows and the little balcony area.

This flat is just awesome. It is really close to the city center, especially by bike but also on foot. In the area there are a lot of delicious restaurants for breakfast lunch and dinner. It's quite big and offers a lot of space to live in. The furniture is really cosy and invites for a happy stay. For our stay there was not really anything noteworthy to complain about.

Great location. Very close to Amsterdam central station but quiet and on a picturesque canal. I never met Riks but Jasper was there to meet me, explain the set up and answer my questions. The room is not big big but was very comfortable and suitable for my needs.

Gordon and Amy were very welcoming even though we arrived quite late in the evening and the room was very good with a great location and we never used public transport once as we walked everywhere in Amsterdam. They are a credit to airbnb and would stay with them again. Breakfast was lovely and we would not wish for anything more.
Amy's place is awesome. The room was clean and well equipped with the essentials. The location is also near the city center which makes walking possible to almost all the tourist attractions!

Our stay at Gordon and Amy´s was very nice.
the room is as described and shown, very comfortable.
The location could not be better, especially when arriving by train.
And every day you get new bread, bananas and even yoghurt.

Just a very pleasant stay. Thanks very much

Un bon accueil dans un quartier très agréable à quelques minutes à pied du centre ville et des principaux sites touristiques. Le quartier est très agréable et le logement facilement trouvable. La fenêtre donnant sur une rue passante, la chambre est cependant un peu bruyante.
ABSOLUTELY LOVED RIKS BNB! PERFECT LOCATION!
Great place, actually the second time I have stayed with Riks and will return next time in AMS as well! Room is a bit tiny with no storage but the location makes up for it!
Fantastic central location in Amsterdam. Lovely kitchen & relaxed atmosphere

Perfect location for seeing everything Amsterdam has to offer! Everything was in walking distance from here (including the central train station) and the street is quiet at night. The room was clean and a decent size for a canal house B&B. Jasper was very helpful when we arrived, as well as recommended an amazing restaurant to eat dinner at on our last night. I would highly recommend and hope to be able to stay again!

The place was near the main locations we wanted to visit.

Really enjoyed the open kitchen as well, as we could make our own breakfast while interacting with the other guests

I truly enjoyed my stay at Riks's place and would definitely go back if i had the chance! The appartement and room were clean and cozy, Riks was friendly and welcoming, and the location was spot on!
I definitely recommand it!
Perfect location! Small room, beautiful kitchen.

The perfect location to visit Amsterdam! Really good experience in this beautiful house, which is very nice and unique on his style. Very clean and well equipped. In one of the most beautiful aerea , near to everything but far from caotic centre. Riks is a very nice and kind person, and makes you feel like at home. Hope to have the chance to come back to his house, it has kidnapped a piece of our heart. Thank you Rik's , we enjoyed and appreciated yr house.

We were only able to meet Gordon during our trip but he made us feel quite welcome! They had put a note on the door to help us find the place, which was very sweet. We weren't actually able to stay in this particular room cause it was occupied but we got a much larger room which was lovely!
Gordon left us breakfast in our rooms every morning and the entire atmosphere of the room made us feel very comfy and at home. The room was cleaned every day as well.
The place was in quite a good neighbourhood and its close to both the central station (10mins) and other tram stops, which made our traveling so much easier.
All in all, awesome hosts and lovely rooms!
We would love to stay here again if we come back to Amsterdam!

We spent three fabulous days at Gordon and Amy´s place.
The bedroom is as shown in the pictures, really cozy and comfortable with a great view to the city.
The flat is well located, very close to the train station and lots of tourists spots. The neighburhood is really nice full of shops, supermarkets and bars.

We didn´t meet Amy but Gordon was a great host, who kindly gave us useful information and maps and a fun board game to play at night.
Every day, they gave us clean towels and a big, fresh and delicious breakfast (fruit, pastries, jam, milk, yogurt, orange juice, coffee and tea), which helped us start our days in such low temperatures.
We will definetely go back to Amy and Gordon´s place if we come back to Amsterdam. We are really grateful for their kindness and hospitality.

Pasamos tres días fabulosos en el departamento de Amy y Gordon.
La habitación es tal cual se ve en las fotos, muy acogedora y con una hermosa vista a la ciudad.
El departamento está muy bien ubicado, cerca de la estación de tren y muchas atracciones. El barrio es muy lindo y cuenta con bares y supermercados.
No conocimos a Amy pero Gordon fue un excelente anfitrión, quien nos brindó mapas, información útil y un juego de mesa.
Todos los días, recibíamos toallas limpias y un gran, fresco y delicioso desayuno (frutas, mermeladas, pastelería, leche, jugo de naranjas, yogur, café y te) que nos ayudaba a empezar el día a tan bajas temperaturas.
Recomendamos este estupendo lugar!!!
Estamos realmente agradecidos por la amabilidad y hospitalidad de Amy y Gordon.

La habitación es calida,  amplia y muy comoda.  Gordon nos recibió y nos dio las indicaciones que necesitabamos.  La ubicación es excelente.  Ambos,  Gordon y Amy,  fueron muy amables y cordiales.  Los muffins del desayuno son una delicia.  Lo recomendamos y si volvemos a Amsterdam esta sería la primera opcion. Gracias Gordon y Amy!

Gordon was welcoming....since we have been to Amsterdam numerous times, we did not need to ask for advice on getting around, etc.  That being said, the room was small and very sparse with no (Website hidden by Airbnb) shelves to put things on, just a small table.  The bed was mediocre.  Breakfast was a coffee pot and kettle and a few pre-packaged store pastries and some drink in the frig.  The toilet and shower, shared, are in the hall.

Très bon accueil, Gordon avait bien expliqué et décrit le chemin!
Des attentions qui nous ont touchées!! très bon quartier d'Amsterdam proche des transports en commun.

We stayed in the blue room for a weekend and it was perfect. In walking distance to everything and room simple but clean and warm and cozy as advertised. Gordon welcomed us with advice and they left snacks, tea, coffee etc in the room for us, fresh every day. As the room is above a busy street it can be noisy at night which is to be expected when you're staying in a city centre. All in all i can recommend gordon & amy's b&b to anyone who wants to have central accommodation when visiting the beautiful city, Amsterdam. Have fun :)

The place is easily located using (Hidden by Airbnb) map, well placed near the Central Station and major tourist attractions. I have a pleasant stay and really grateful for the littlest things like free breakfast and clean towels. The room was clean, the bed was adequate, can get a bit creaky, but has all the essentials, including cutleries, guidebooks and euro adapters. All in all, a good value accommodation with a welcoming host.

Estuvimos 3 días en la habitación azul,las fotos corresponden perfectamente a la realidad,Gordon  y Amy fueron muy amables,nos facilitaron información sobre la ciudad y un desayuno muy completo(zumo,yogures,café,te,fruta y bollería ).El barrio donde se encuentra es tranquilo y bonito , cuenta con un supermercado enfrente además de muchos restaurantes y  tiendas alrededor.Volveria a repetir sin duda.

Super hotel! Propre, mignon, au top. Je le recommande!
Très bon accueil de la part des hôtes! & super petit déjeuner!

Gordon was nice and really welcoming.
The room was clean and had everything we needed.
The place is well located in a pleasant neighborhood.
We really enjoyed our stay.
E' la seconda volta che andiamo da Gordon ed Amy e l'accoglienza è sempre perfetta.
The reservation was canceled 14 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

We had a fantastic stay in this lovely, light, comfortable apartment!  It was a perfect situation for our three kids, with toys, and even some obliging cats and a hamster to love.  The apartment is very close to the inner city, but in a wonderful neighbourhood a stone's throw from the gorgeous Vondelpark.  Brenda was very warm, helpful and generous.  We couldn't have been happier with our experience.  Highly recommended, especially for a family.

Wuau! amazing apartment, the perfect place to spend some time with your family. 3 rooms, living room and kitchen, two toilet and a nice balcony Light, big, really well fournished and very close to the Vondelpark, it is very rare! Brenda's place was all we could ask for. Her cats are very nice too! She is super nice and gentle, really a good host.
She speaks Dutch, English and italian, so for my family it was great!

Excellent séjour. L'appartement est très agréable et l'accueil sympathique.
Un superbe parc est à proximité . Les enfants s'y sont beaucoup amusés. Merci!

Great location, and a gracious friendly welcome from Riks, who was very accommodating with a last minute booking and arrival. Much appreciated! This is a B&B rather than a shared home type of experience -- a handful of separate rooms with private bathrooms, and the host offers breakfast for the guests through the morning in a beautiful kitchen overlooking the canal. After breakfast, there is no kitchen or living space access for guests--just your individual room. So that's something to keep in mind. Location is perfectly central, but still has a charming neighborhood feel, and the room was quite quiet. Five minutes walk to the central train station.
Ottima accoglienza e posizione. Una classica casa di Amsterdam sul canale con le scale ripidissime! Il padrone di casa è simpatico e disponibilissimo. Consigliato.

As my first time to use airbnb, i would say that it couldnt be any better.
The house is clean, well furnished, cosy, with an amazing view over the canal. Riks is very friendly and helpful too
Amzing
Riks place is in great location, right where you need to be located in Amsterdam
Great Location!
Great stay and host! I was traveling alone and felt very safe. Great area right on the canals and very close to the central train station. Definitely recommend!

Beautiful canal house in a great location. Easy walking to many popular sights but also set off from the major tourist area. Room was nice and lots of natural light. Riks was kind enough to meet me to check in earlier since my flight arrived in the morning. Would definitely like to stay again next time I return to Amsterdam.

Great location, quiet though in busy area. Very comfortable bed, hot shower. Coffee, muesli in kitchen for morning use. Really only saw Riks at check in but very friendly and helpful. Only 5 mins from Central station. Perfect.
Very nice place, excellent location, charming feel!

nicely located place, during my stay I had cleanliness issues which the host acknowledged and said that we would address in future trips.
Overall okay, really enjoyed the host flexibility and communication, the spot is near Amsterdam central station.

This falls under the old adage, location location location.
It’s perfectly located near everything - bars, restaurants, cultural sights, etc.

The room itself is fine. Has everything you need. It is not a “gigantic luxury room” That you can dance around - but has everything you need and clean.
The city has everything you need go explore.

Highly recommend staying at Riks'! He was very generous and helpful with an early check in, and once I arrived, the place proved to be clean, neat and perfectly located. Having a private bathroom in that size space was really unusual and is quite nice. Try de Belhalmel right up the street if you stay.
Great host and location. Rocommend!

This place is just the perfect location.
Pretty street on the canal, 5 minutes from the station. Perfect Dutch experience of Amsterdam charm.
The room itself was clean and private and secure with separate loo and shower room.
My friends stayed at the W - I would choose Riks place above a room in a hotel.
Thanks Riks.

Great place at a decent price! Riks, the host, is friendly, helpful and accurate. I enjoyed a chat over a cup of coffee. All the mentioned amenities are in place and the location speaks for itself. Highly recommend!
Superb stay!  What made it great?  An unbeatable location, especially if one arrives via the Central Station, an accommodating host, and a clean, quiet room with private shower and toilet.
The location of the place was awesome in the Jordaan area, very close to Amsterdam centraal but still quiet. I went in February and sleeping was a little chilly but Riks provided extra blankets.

Great location but quiet because the room faces the back of the building, so easy to snooze in if you want.  Comfortable bed and small tiled shower and toilet (not shared).  I appreciated the good water pressure in the shower and the fact that the shower head was set high enough for a 6’ (183 cm) tall person (no ducking).  This room is just right for 1 person, but would probably be to small for 2 people.  Note there are a few flights of steep stairs to the room — I didn’t mind it, but something to be aware of.  Riks let me check in early and provided a micro fridge and additional blankets.  Would recommend— you can’t really beat this location.
Nice location
位置非常好的单人房，安静又舒适。
Excellent place. Book it now.
It was a great quiet room very close to the train station and several other attractions.   Rick was great!
Great room with all amenities right in the heart of Amsterdam. Riks was very friendly. The room was warm and comfortable.

Perfect location for exploring Amsterdam, very close to the central station and most of what you’d want to see is walking distance. Riks was awesome from the beginning, very responsive with communication and information. He gave me a good run down of local things to do once I got there and was extremely helpful in general. I highly recommend this to all future travellers if you’d like a nice place to stay that’s centrally located.

Un lugar muy bien ubicado, que tiene todo lo necesario para mientras estés en el lugar nada te falte y descansar adecuadamente. Solo si tienes problemas para subir escaleras, podría ser complicado por el tipo de construcción vertical de Holanda.
Tolle, zentrale Lage. Rick war ein super Gastgeber und stand mir bei Fragen oder Problemen jederzeit zur Seite. Ich habe mich sehr wohl gefühlt. 😊

Perfect location for those who want to travel both inside and outside Amsterdam. You will have an opportunity to enjoy the atmosphere of the Canal Ring, but at the same time will live just in 5 minutes walk from the central station, buses, metro, trams, and ferries to all major destinations. The room was exactly like on the photos - small but having everything you need. The host was very communicative and let me check in earlier, which I appreciate.
Goede locatie, prettige kamer met eigen bad en toilet.
Great host in perfect location!

I had a great stay at Riks, small, quiet, en suite room in a fantastic canal-side location close to Centraal station.  Be prepared for the steep stairs (par for the course in Amsterdam).  Would recommend and visit again.

Riks’ place was almost perfect for a solo traveler or even a couple. Perfect location, room is a smidge small but cozy. Very clean. Riks was an awesome host allowing early check in and giving me local tips and introduction to Amsterdam upon arrival. The only thing that could possibly been better was to add a mini fridge to store cool beverages. Otherwise it’s a great spot for visiting Amsterdam. Would very much recommend and very reliable. Would definitely look to come back and stay again.

Brenda was very welcoming, leaving us a pot of freshly made vegetable soup on our arrival!  The house was beautiful - clean, bright and airy and we all slept well in comfortable beds.
