It's a great neighbourhood, a good restaurant on one corner and friendly bar on the other.  The tram into the city centre is a few minutes away, and Vondelpark is an easy walk.  We would love to return one day.

Nous venons de passer 2 nuits chez Gordon et Amy. La chambre est exactement comme elle est décrite: très correct et sans prétention. Nous avons été reçu par Gordon qui est très gentil. Les plus du séjour: le petit déjeuner proposé tout les jours (viennoiserie, jus d'orange, café, thé, fruits…), le quartier avec plein de boutiques très sympas et la proximité avec la gare. Le moins: le chambre est situé au premier étage et le simple vitrage des fenêtre fait qu'on entends pas mal la rue. Prévoyez des boules Qies !! En résumé bon rapport qualité/ prix.

Wonderful stay! The location was a quick 10 minute walk from the train station Ina beautiful neighborhood. Gordon came out to greet us on the street. He provided tasty breakfast snacks, milk, orange juice and coffee! Quaint and perfect easily walked to all the sights and landmarks that we wanted to see. Highly recommended.

La chambre est idéalement située. Dans un adorable quartier et à 10 minutes à pied de la gare. Le petit déjeuner est parfait, tout correspond à la description donnée.
Je le recommande vivement pour un séjour à Amsterdam !

Gordon met us on arrival with keys, coffee, tea and guides to the area. The apartment is in a safe neighborhood with plenty of shopping options nearby. Easy access to Amsterdam Central Station. Clean facilities. Gordon was very polite and helpful with recommendations in the area as well as public transit information. I recommend Gordon and Amy's place to anyone staying in Amsterdam city.
Gordon was very sweet and there were no problems at all. The room was as advertised A+++ Would recommend it to everybody for a visit to Amsterdam :)

Gordon and Amy were great hosts.
The place is perfect, and very convenient for staying in Amsterdam for a couple of days, and Easily reachable from the central station.
The Room was very clean and cozy, they gave us everything we needed for our stay. 100% recommended.

Gordon estuvo en contacto con nosotros todo el tiempo. La habitación era tal cual se ve en las imágenes, cómoda, equipada, limpia y ubicada en una zona cercana a la estación central de Amsterdam y a los puntos turísticos. Ademas recibimos un riquísimo desayuno.  Muy  muy recomendable!

Amy and Gordon were very nice hosts. Even though they let us enough space, we could always go upstairs to ask some questions, if we needed to. We had a nice breakfast every morning. It was a little bit sweet for our german taste, but still tasty. The toilet and shower were small, but clean.
We had a really nice time in Amsterdam, thank you Amy and Gordon. :)
La habitación azul es un gran lugar para hospedarse. Totalmente recomendable. Gordon es muy atento y el desayuno es genial. Buena ubicación. Las fotos son exactas con la realidad.

It was a great experience! It is our first time to try Airbnb, and it is much better than our expextation.

We arrived in the early morning, but Golden is ready for us already. The room is big and comfortable, providing with all necessity. Moreover, they provided information for tourists like map and attractions' info, that is so nice.

Everyday we go out early in the morning, and the room is like brand new one when we come back cause Golden and Amy will tidy up everyday, it is so amazing to us.

From central station, you just need to walk 15mins, which is not so far from it. Suitable for the people like us, who would like to travel around Netherland.

We highly recommand Golden and Amy, they are so great!

Amazing, Gordon accommodated for us so well me and my boyfriend felt so welcome.
We originally booked the blue room but Gordon gave us the bigger, yellow room as their was no one using it, so lovely.
The room was everything you could ask for, lovely breakfast updated daily, along with all the essentials you'd need too.
It's in a lovely neighbourhood which was by far my favourite in the whole of Amsterdam, Central yet with a local vibe.
It's only a short walk from the train station and super easy to find.
Whenever we next come back to Amsterdam I will no doubt book Amy and Gordon's rooms again!
Thanks so much

We could easily converse per message, with the conversation Airn'b to keep us informed of the arrival time. He we explain how we go home and left a note on the door. We have been very well received by Gordon, very friendly. The room was as it was described, clean, with fridge microwave and dishes. A small sink in the room and the toilet and shower are on the stage that we share with the Yellow Room. The house is perfectly placed 10 minutes from Central Station and the city center, you could not imagine better. Small downside, the noise from the street, for my part I have a deep sleep, it does not bother me, but if like my friend, you have a lighter sleep, this can be a hassle. Last downside, breakfast, if one found for drink, all you need, to eat that was not the case (for me, I like bread, butter and jam) were found ( industrial chocolate bun and yogurt). But we ask Gordon if we could have it for the next day, there has not been a problem, it just lacked butter. In short, the location is ideal, easy access, close trade and places to visit, we did not take the tram once in 4 days. The welcome is friendly and the level of cleanliness there is nothing to complain about. I strongly advice you to spend your time with Gordon and Amy! :-D Nous avons pu converser facilement par message grâce à la conversation de Airn'b, pour nous tenir au courant de l'heure d'arrivée. Il nous a bien expliquer comment nous rendre chez lui et avait laissé un billet sur la porte. Nous avons très bien été accueilli par Gordon, très aimable. La chambre était telle qu'elle était décrite, propre avec un frigot un micro-onde et de la vaisselle. Un petit lavabo dans la chambre et les wc et douche sont sur le palier que nous partageons avec la chambre jaune. La maison est parfaitement placée à 10 minutes de la Centraal Station et du centre ville, on ne pouvait imaginer mieux. Petit bémol, le bruit de la rue, pour ma part j'ai un sommeil de plomb, cela ne m'a pas dérangée, mais si comme mon amie, vous avez le sommeil plus léger, cela peut être embêtant. Dernier bémol, le petit déjeuner, si on trouvait au niveau boisson, tout ce qu'il faut, pour manger ce n'était pas le cas, (pour moi, j'aime le pain, beurre et confiture) on trouvait (petit pain au choc industriel et yaourt). Mais nous avons demander à Gordon si on pouvait avoir ça, pour le lendemain, il n y a pas eu de problème, il manquait juste le beurre. Pour résumer, l'endroit est idéal, facile d'accès, proche des commerce et des places à visiter, nous n'avons pas pris une seule fois le tram en 4 jours. L'accueil est sympa et au niveau de la propreté il n y a rien à redire. Je vous conseil vivement d'aller passer votre...

He helped in carrying the suitcases up the narrow , steep staircase. He also explained how everything worked. He invited us to come to his/their room should we have questions, but we never saw him again for 3 days. As promised, the breakfast supplies were replenished daily (while we were out).

The location was very convenient, close to Centraal station with supermarkets and restaurants nearby. We did not expect breakfast and cleaning service so those were a big plus. Overall a nice, reasonably-priced stay.
Relaxing room in the heart of Amsterdam. Gordon met me as soon as I arrived and was very helpful and informative. Coffee, OJ and breakfast provided.

very friendly and gracious host..though we have only met gordon once when checking in. the host were nice enough to provide breakfast, juices, (Website hidden by Airbnb) well variations on certain days since we stayed for 4 nights...overall a very pleasant stay,spacious room,ideal location with all the necessary amenities nearby...and if you like Vietnamese food in amsterdam...the Poh House just next steps away is a delight.

素敵な部屋でした。ｱﾑｽﾃﾙﾀﾞﾑ中央駅から歩いて10分くらい。周りにはｽｰﾊﾟｰや雑貨店､ﾚｽﾄﾗﾝなどある便利な場所です。ご主人が対応してくださりとても素敵な笑顔でした。到着前にﾒｰﾙでﾄﾞｱのところに宿の名前を書いたｻｲﾝﾎﾞｰﾄﾞをかけておくとあり､迷わず呼び鈴を押せました。
部屋は8畳くらいで清潔で快適。ﾊﾟﾝやﾌﾙｰﾂ､ｺｰﾋｰ､飲み物があって自由に好きな時食べられるのが良かったです。観光でちょっと出て､疲れたら休みに寄れますし､出発日は夜まで荷物を預かってもらって便利でした。普通のﾎﾃﾙにはない良さがあります。また泊まりたいです。

It was very good to choise staying at gordon and Amy's. I easily found thier room as they told me . The room was beautiful and clean. I stayed streetside room,so i could enjoy the view of street. I want to stay again!
The room was nice and cosy. Very well equipped.

La estadía en lo de Amy y Gordon fue muy buena.
Gordon nos espero en la puerta del departamento,nos mostró nuestra habitación en el primer piso, y nos dio algunas indicaciones del barrio. Además nos dejo una guía en español de Amsterdam (muchas gracias me encanto leerla).
En la habitación teníamos un completo y riquísimo desayuno(leches, jugo, yogur, café,te además de quesos, galletitas,muffins y fruta. No falto nada gracias!) todos los días limpiaban la habitación y reponían el desayuno.

Fue muy cómodo entrar y salir del departamento, teníamos llave de la habitación y de la calle.
El wifi funcionaba perfecto.
El barrio muy tranquilo, a la distancia justa del centro para ir caminando a todos lados y a la estación de trenes también.
Muchas gracias por el buen servicio. Súper recomendamos las habitaciones de Amy y Gordon.
Nico y Bar

La habitacion esta muy bien ubicada, cerca de la estacion y el centro de amsterdam.
Gordon nos trato muy bien, el desayuno es abundante y todo estaba muy limpio. Nos ayudo a subir los bolsos y estaba atento de que estubiesemos comodos. Tmb nos dio una guia de Amsterdam que nos fue muy util.
Es recomendable para aquellos que solo utilizan la habitacion para dormir.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The room is well located, close to the station and city center.
Gordon was very polite with us, he helps us with the lugagge and always asks if we were ok. He gave us a guide of Amstrdam that was very helpful. Breakfast is really good and the room is very clean.
It's a nice place for those who only come back late, just for sleeping

Accommodation has great location, just 10 min max from Central station. It is clean, and everything is like in the pictures and as described. Bed is really comfortable and soft. Every day different breakfast and new towels. We really enjoyed our stay! Gordon is a great host!

We stayed with Gordon and Amy for three night. My girlfriend and I have been backpacking through Europe and we have stayed at many different BNB's, but Amy and Gordon's place was by far the best stay yet. The location was ideal, the breakfast was tasty and varied, but more importantly the room was clean. The area was very lively which made the stay even better. I would highly recommend!!

Excellent!!!! Very kind host! The appartement is cozy and clean and Gordon and Amy left us a delicious breakfast!
Thank you for being so nice!
I totally reccomend staying at this appartement! !

This place is great, Gordon was here to welcome us and explain the basics of the room. Then everything was perfect from the beginning to the end. Breakfast was included (and much appreciated). The room was exactly as described and in an area of Amsterdam which we didn't know. So we also discovered a new part of town !
I recommend this place a lot !

Das war 'ne tolle Sache mit Brendas schöner Wohnung, ziemlich zentral in Amsterdam...vor allem war alles ganz prima organisiert und unkompliziert...von der Schlüsselübergabe bis zur Nutzungvon Öl und Gewürzen und der zeitweiligen Unterbringung unserer Autorücksitze, die wir nicht mit auf unsere weitere Tour nehmen wollten und bei Brenda lassen durften... also alles super und sehr zu empfehlen!

Nur: man muss langhaarige Katzen schon sehr mögen, wenn man bei Brenda einzieht...und sollte vielleicht kein Katzenallergiker sein...
Bello. Appartamento molto carino e in ordine. Tutto molto tranquillo. Brenda: host disponibile   che parla molto bene l'italiano. Ottimo
Great Stay.

Brenda was very accommodating and lovely to deal with. We had a wonderful stay here. Her apartment was ideal for us, travelling as a family. It's very spacious and light, the photos don't do it justice. The location was perfect, close to everything -tram stop, groceries, Vondelpark etc.
Highly recommended :)

Brenda was a great host. She quickly accepted the request, confirmed the reservation, and set up the exchange of keys and information in a timely and reassuring way. She let us leave our luggage before check in, having arranged apartment cleaning for arrival. The location and apartment were great, especially for kids. Vondelpark and easy access to transit, and reasonable walk to the museums and canals. Nice to have wifi/computer access. Great neighbourhood. Great time.

We all enjoyed 5 lovely days in your nice apartment.
The apartment fully matched the description; both when it comes to the apartment as well as the location. Taking care of your two lovely cats was just a bonus on top of the holiday experience and made the stay even more personal.
The location and neighborhood was PERFECT. Quite and nice surroundings. 25 meters to Café Forno (and though no noise), 50 meters to the baker, 50 meters to the Tram, 100 meters to Albert Hejn and last but definately not least: only 150 meters to Vondel Park.
Thanks for your trust, letting us into your personal home - and some perfect days in Amsterdam :o)

A very nice, clean, well maintained, spacious home. Very childfriendly too. Use of the pc is very handy, printing facilities are nearby. Supermarket around the corner, the Vondelpark as well as the metro station. The location was great, restaurants nearby without the noise.
Great beds, good/fresh matrasses and bed linen.
Note: 3th and 4th floor, so taking all the suitcases upstairs was heavy.
The 2 cats were so sweet and fond of cuddling, the kids loved them.
Brenda, the host, was very friendly and helpfull.
We definitely recommend this house to other visitors!!

Functional beautiful apartment carefully decorated with all amenities nearby (Forno pizzeria, bakery and supermarket). We felt right at home and Brenda had left us all indications for a great stay. The tram is within 5 minutes walk as well as the Vondelpark we could with the tram to visit all the places fanstastiques in Amsterdam, look after Miertje and Pepsi both cats is a real pleasure.
Thank you to Brenda for her availability and fast, accurate answers.
We can wholeheartedly recommend this apartment.

The stay was great! The apartment is not located on the city center but the tram station is really close (1 block away) and if you like walking, it's about 30 minutes. Also, it's just two blocks away from the park.

The apartment is just like the photos. Just be aware of two things: like most houses in Amsterdam, no elevator and narrow stairs. And the other thing, keep your clothes and shoes inside the bags. Unfortunately, one of the cats scratched my boot. But they are really nice.

Overall, I'd stay there again and recommend it.

We had an absolute fabulous time at Brendas beautiful appartment. Everything, from the booking till our leaving Amsterdam went smooth and very friendly. Brenda is a great host and made our trip as comfortable as possible. The apparment was nice prepared, even with fresh flowers. Brenda made everything easy for us, so we could use their coffee and spices. And there is also the possibility to use the washer and dryer.

The appartment is located in a familiy neighborhood with a huge playground near by and lots of possibilities to eat out, do groceries shopping or go to the park. Also the apparment is near the tram station. So you will be at Central Station in less than 20 minutes. Brendas appartment is very beautiful decorated and yet funcational with kids. There is a huge roof terrace where you can just hang out or enjoy a drink in the evening. The highlight for our kids were the two cats. So all in all it was a great trip for us and we are very happy that we had the possiblity to stay in this appartment.
AMAZING location. Room was the perfect size and would stay again, no question. Check in was a breeze with Riks and he was a great host.

I had a great stay at Riks place, and I hope I can come back soon! Riks is an extremely attentive, very communicative host who has answered all my questions and requests. The room was perfect, big, bright, very clean, with everything you need and a very good bedding. Very well located, in the heart of Jordaan area and its canals, 5 minutes walk from the center, this is the perfect place to explore Amsterdam! I highly recommend!

As the listing name said, location is the best aspect of Riks's house. In the beautiful canal street, 5 minutes walks from central station, tons of food and cute places to have coffee, and also very close to the shopping street.

The room is on third floor (and as usual, very steep stairs in Amsterdam), not facing the street so it's very quiet at night. The showe has good pressure, bed is comfy.

When I came, the first night might be one of the hottest day in Amsterdam, reaching 28 - 30 centigrede celcius. Thus, it could be a little too warm st night. The problem is although I can fully open the big window to get some breeze air, there are no vitrage to get some privacy. The choice is you fully open the window but still have to cover it with the curtain. Though option!

But for the other 2 days, the weather is very nice and I don't have facing any problem again.

All in all, I can say that I will be back to Riks's house on spring or autumn, but not on the peak of summer.
Great location and great host. I will be back for sure.

Gordon greeted us the morning we arrived. We didn't talk that much, but from what I see Gordon is such a nice host. He makes us feel comfortable with our stay. The photo is exactly how the room is like. The location is so convenient, its so easy for us to go anywhere. The toilet is clean. I would highly recommend anyone who in need of just a room to stay here !

Wie haben uns bei Amy und Gordon sehr gut aufgehoben gefühlt.
Das Zimmer war spatanisch eingerichtet, aber man hatte alles was man brauchte und es war sauber.
Excelente, impecable y tranquilo

Excellent location, close to the station and Jordaan - all the main sights are an easy walk.  The room itself is small but spotlessly clean and ideal as a base for exploring the city.  My room overlooked the rear of the property, so I did not get a canal view.  There was a large window that gave plenty of light and could be opened for some fresh air.  At night I found the duvet a bit too warm and I really could have done with a seperate sheet (the breeze from the window was obstructed by the curtains which are necessary given it gets light very early in the summer).  There’s a steep flight of stairs to access rooms.  Overall highly recommended.

Beyond excellent location right along the canals in the heart of Amsterdam, and incredibly close to Amsterdam Centraal station. Small room space, but is perfect for solo travelers such as myself! The room I stayed on was situated farther away from other rooms, so it was very quiet and peaceful. The stairs are narrow and steep, but manageable! Riks is a great host, very friendly, and quick to respond. I’m very pleased with my experience here!
Simple single person room. With private bathroom. And a very caring host.

Loved the room. Very cosy, quiet, great location and within walking distance of all the spots I wanted to visit. Couldn’t be happier with the space. Will definitely stay here again next time I’m in town.
Fantastic location, cute little room but pack light!
Fantastic lodging in a great location.
This was a really great place to stay! Clean and in a nice area.

A very comfortable room at the back of the house looking over rooftops. The house is situated in a beautiful part of Amsterdam, close to picture perfect parts of the city. Turn right out of the door and you're in quiet streets beside canals lined with houses with window boxes and tiny street gardens, the sound of chirping birds and occasional church bells. Almost empty of people. Delightful. The house is on the edge of the wonderful Joordan area.
Turn left out the door and you're in the middle of the madness that is Amsterdam in July. Some of that is nice too.
The listing is titled Canal B&B, but there's no breakfast included. There is access to the kitchen mentioned in the first part of the listing description, but this wasn't mentioned at check-in. I noticed later that in the list of amenities, kitchen is crossed out. Confusing.

If you a planning to travel solo, this place is perfect. It’s clean and cosy with basic amenities you need. I didn’t need much more than a comfy place to sleep as I was out with friends exploring. There is no kitchen as you can see, which was fine for me. However, the only fault with this place is that the WiFi could be improved. I found it hard to get good connection.
Can't beat the location, as it's so close to the station and city center. A tad small, but a good price.
Amazing host, great location would really recommend Riks

My stay at Riks’s place was outstanding. It’s in a perfect location and I walked everywhere. I was able to get in early which was a huge bonus! Thank you Riks for making my first trip to Amsterdam so memorable.
The location was wonderful and the room was comfortable.

Riks was incredibly communicative and helpful. He was flexible when I needed to add an additional guest to the booking. The room was exactly what I needed (and as advertised) and the location could not have been better.

Thanx Ricks for this time in the city, for his hospitality.  Everything was excellent, quickly found an apartment, really very top location.  You can move to anywhere in the city very mobile and flexible if you live here (near the main stations of the city).  An excellent apartment for a small and eventful vacation in Amsterdam.
Small but super clean and comfortable. Lovely host. Amazingly located. Everything you could want is at your doorstep.
Super good location, private and quite. Riks explained everything to me and the room was clean. I recommend him a lot if you u go to Amsterdam
Would happily stay again.

This stay exceeded my expectations. You could not ask for a better location, right in the heart of Amsterdam. 5 minute walk from Central Station...the total commute from the airport was less than an hour (what more can you ask for?!). Grocery stores...restaurants...shopping...beautiful canals all within walking distance. The room itself was immaculate with a private bathroom. Riks was a fantastic host, very communicative! Really could not ask for a better stay in Amsterdam!!

The location of Riks place is fantastic. I didn’t have much down time so this location made it possible for me to actually see things around my busy schedule. It was spotless when I got there and the directions Riks gave me where perfect as when I arrived it was pouring down. I highly recommend Riks place.
Great room close to the central station. Be prepared to climb a lot of steep stairs but that's to be expected for most places in amsterdam.
Riks is a great host. His canal house is located so conveniently and the view is just beautiful. The apartment is spotless clean. Riks is personal and accommodating. I would recommend Riks to anyone.

The B&B was perfect for just me as a solo traveler. I stayed for 3 nights and the location literally could not be beaten. When I went to rent a bicycle the local shop asked where I was staying and he said " wow, this is my favorite street in all of Amsterdam, this is great neighborhood. Chill Coffee shops right at the corner of the street. The only thing perhaps I was missing was a TV. Just with the time difference for travelers, it would be nice to come back and unwind after exploring Amsterdam in your room.
Best location.

Very easy comfortable place to stay. Clean, great location, simple but perfect for solo traveler on the go. The top room is small but comfortable, only WiFi did not really work. Since I have a good plan it was ok. Otherwise 10/10
Perfect location and a great space
Nice room. And the location is perfect. I could access almost shift seeing point easily and enjoy my stay.

Riks place was perfect. Check-in was very easy, and check-out was easy. He met me, and explain/walked me through everything thing. Very communicative prior to check-in. He even let me check-in early, due to my flight-time arrival. He is a very nice/pleasant guy. Place was very clean, and had everything you'd need; great shower, comfortable bed, private toilet. Location is perfect; close to Amsterdam Centraal and Joordan area. A lot of coffee shops/breakfast options nearby, and there is a close by Marqt (~5 min walk) to buy things like fruit, snacks, wine, grocery, etc. No issues with WiFi. I would definitely recommend for 1-2 person stay, and would definitely stay there again.
Great location and helpful host
Better than advertised . Great place

Riks' place is a typical Amsterdam building situated directly in the center at one of the beautiful canals (Gracht). It has completely stylish and modern facilities, yet maintaining beautiful furnishing details of the traditional 'Grachtenhuis'.  The location is just perfect - I came to Amsterdam for a conference and could still enjoy the city: Centraal station as well as authentic cafés and restaurants in the attractive Jordaan-district are just around the corner. Comparable hotels in this area are likely two to three times the price. Check-in and Check-out went outstandingly smooth. Riks is a great host. Highly recommended!
Lovely, quiet, room very close to central station and nearby sights! Enjoyed having this place as home base!
Great location! Riks was very responsive and helpful.
Es un lugar bastante cálido y bien ubicado. Riks es un anfitrión sobresaliente... muy recomendado.
Superb location and great communication by the host. Extremely quiet and clean for how great the location is.

Riks est un hôte très sympathique, souriant et énergique. Il était en train de repeindre la rambarde des escaliers quand je suis arrivé. Il a l’air de très bien entretenir cette maison, dans le style local typique.
La chambre était relativement spacieuse, d’une propreté impeccable. Le lit était confortable, et la douche, et les toilettes, privées et séparées, fonctionnent très bien.
Si vous n’avez besoin d’une chambre que pour y passer la nuit, n’hésitez pas, c’est parfait !
De plus, la localisation de l’appartement est idéale: il est très près de la gare et du centre, mais tout de même a l’écart de l’agitation, et bénéficie du calme et du charme de ces maisons, au bord des canaux.
Je recommande l’appartement de Riks sans réserve !

Riks was very welcoming and helpful. The room was even better than expected, exactly how it is shown in the pictures! The position is super central and in a nice spot next to the canal. Also for the cleaning, nothing to say, the room was perfect. Absolutely recommended!
Nice to stay !
Amazing neighborhood. Very central. Simplicity in the details. Silent place. Comfortable. Excellent communication with Riks. Recommendable.

Perfect location, and I mean really perfect. You’re within walking distance of most of the city, and the street itself is very pretty. Feels like quintessential Amsterdam! The only drawback is the shower, the faucet does not let out a lot of water
Everything went smoothly. Riks is nice and kind, the room is comfortable and well located. I would come back again.
This is a great place in a great location. I was here for 2 nights and the location is perfect. The view from the window is also very nice.
Awesome location! I really enjoyed it, thank you Riks!

Location is the best: 5 minutes walk from Amsterdam Central.
Yet, the room is on quite street, so you won’t be bothered with noise.
The room is very clean, has private facilities and hair dryer.
The shower has hot water which is also great
Shawna and Naos were great hosts. We enjoyed meeting them and their family.  The room was perfect and the location just great.  We would stay at Shawna's on our next visit to Amsterdam.

Gordon and Amy's place was very centrally located, within blocks of open-air markets, wonderful restaurants, and local storefronts.  We tried four herring shops across Amsterdam and the shop on the block of Gordon and Amy's place was hands down the best, freshest source.  The room was also larger than pictured and the view toward the street lovely ~   Highly recommended!

Gordon was very accommodating and gave us excellent info about the neighborhood. The room was clean, the breakfast perfect and the location ideal. The street can be noisy in the late afternoon but then it is relatively quiet by night fall. All in all a very positive experience.
Great! Nice place, very close to the station and the centre. Gordon and Amy are two perfect hosts. The room and the bathroom were perfectly clean and the breakfast was really good!

Gordon and Amy's place was very easy to find and located close to restaurants and supermarkets. Their place is also 10-15 minute walk to the train station. We were only able to meet Gordon he was very welcoming and friendly and gave maps and other useful information about amsterdam.

The room and bathroom were very clean. Being a B&B, they provided us with a variety of breakfast each day which was something to look forward to each morning before heading out on another adventure.

Amy's B&B is located on a wonderful, but busy, street in a nice neighborhood. Though it's a busy street, we were able to sleep just fine. We found the supermarket at the end of the street to be really helpful.
During our stay, all of our questions were answered and our room was cleaned daily. We were also provided fresh baked treats every morning for breakfast.
The only things we would alter would be to have more trash cans around, especially in the room, and have fuller pillows. But, for the location, definitely a great spot to go!
This place had a great central location, and breakfast each day was a nice way to start things off. We really enjoyed our time here!

The flat was bigger than we expected, really light and airy also clean and well decorated. We used the roof terrace a lot in the early morning. The apartment is on a quiet street in a residential area 3 minute walk from a supermarket and walking distance from several good places to eat and drink. The owners 2 cats and impressive fish tank kept us entertained. We rented bikes and cycled around the city, locking the bikes in the street outside. Its a 5 minute tram trip into town, 15 minutes on bikes. It was very easy to take the tram + train to the airport from the tram stop one block away. All in all, a great flat for 2 adults and 3 teens to explore Amsterdam.

Wir, 2 Erwachsene und 3 Jugendliche, haben uns bei Brenda sehr wohl gefühlt. Es war alles bestens organisiert und vorbereitet. Die Wohnung hat eine ausgesprochen angenehme Atmosphäre und ist sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtet. Wir haben uns großzügig empfangen gefühlt.
Die beiden Katzen haben wir gerne versorgt.
Wir waren mit der Tram-Linie 1 direkt zur Central Station angeschlossen. Das war für unsere Unternehmungen in der Stadt äußerst bequem - und einfach ;))
Wir danken Brenda und ihrer Familie für den Aufenthalt.

Brenda the owner was very good at replying back to all my inquiries quickly. The apartment was just as described and in a beautiful quiet street close to shops and trams. It was clean and spacious and all bedding and towels were provided. The space was great with two teenagers as they could spread themselves around. The free internet was used a lot as we had lots of rainy days and the children had use of a computer which they loved. The 2 cats were a delight for my children to feed and stroke. Pepsi the furry one liked nothing better than to cuddle up on the sofa with us to be stroked in the evening. The kitchen had all utensils necessary for self catering plus good size fridge and freezer plus oven and hob. Just be aware that it is a long walk into Amsterdam central itself in case you were thinking of walking but trams are close by. The apartment is on the third floor with steep steps so be aware and careful when bringing bags up. The steps inside the apartment are narrower than British ones so care is needed on these as well as i found out on the first day! The terrace was nice from the main bedroom. Nice size bathroom - there is a bath and shower but the shower is not very powerful at all but plenty of hot water. There is a nice supermarket close by called Albert Heijn which does fabulous fresh orange juice, fresh bread, milk, wine etc where we stocked up on food. On a particularly rainy day we ordered online a free delivery takeaway from a mexican place across the road called Tomatillo - very nice food and not too expensive by Amsterdam standards. We did find the public transport to be good but expensive to use as the rain stopped us using the bicycles we had intended to rent. All of Amsterdam was really busy so we would have worried about using the bikes in the main streets. The restaurants were expensive as well but we enjoyed the Pancake Bakery and Chips and Maoz (a fastfood Felafel place). The ice cream at the hammock shop near the flower market was the best we've tasted in a while.
For children we recommend the Anne Frank Museum (please please please book online for tickets as queues are horrendous), free ferry to Eye Movie Museum, Rhijksmuseum with free download app for a family quest (bit frustrating as wifi in museum kept cutting out), Nemo terrace. For teenage children do Claustrophobia which is an 'escape the room' challenge for an hour - absolutely brilliant, we loved it!! We enjoyed Amsterdam and we enjoyed your apartment Brenda!!

We had the privilege of staying in Brenda's beautiful apartment this month. Communication was excellent pre-trip and also whilst we were there when we had a few queries. The apartment is very clean, light and airy, it's exactly the kind of place we would buy ourselves. It's on a quiet street just a couple of minutes from the main street where the tram runs downtown. The centre is very busy so was nice to get back to a quiet area with our children to relax. Everything a family needs is provided including wifi and a PC if needed. The cats are the icing on the cake and very friendly, following you around everywhere and loving cuddles. There's a convenience store a few doors away or a supermarket round the corner. Had a Thai and Indian takeaway that were just a few mins away and quality and portions were great. Small play park around the corner and across the main road is Vondelpark which is brilliant for children. Will definitely stay again on next trip to Amsterdam.

A very Nice place with a lovely decoration ! The flat has a great localisation because 20 min by walk to the center and the neighborhood is very Nice.
The only negative point is the cats who made their excrements on the floor of the flat and broke some things.
Thank you Brenda for your kindness.

Brenda, sa famille et les chats sont vraiment des hôtes très accueillants.
L'appartement est lumineux et très agréable, à 10mn en Tram du centre.
Je recommande pour un séjour en famille.
Un grand merci !

Shawna's home was very warm and the guest room we stayed in was beyond lovely. As a host, she was extremely helpful; helping us translate and allowing us to use amenities. Great location too! Would definitely stay with her again as well as highly recommend her to others. Thanks Shawna!

Shawna was a great host. We had a great time getting to know her, as well as her family and friends. The room is very nice for a short stay. The location is excellent: on a lovely street with restaurants and various amenities, not far from the tram, and not a long walk to the city center. The cooking abilities in the room are minimal, but definitely better than nothing. The bed was comfortable. The internet was quick and reliable. We wouldn't hesitate to stay with Shawna again.

Наши подружки заселились туда днем! комната была просторная рядом сад и небольшой душ с туалетом внутри. Светило солнышко и в комнате было светло и даже жарковато. Шауна оказалась очень приветливой и веселой девушкой) Сразу нашли с ней общий язык! для русских туристов у нее даже была памятка на русском языке с описанием всех вопросов и моментов по проживанию. Немного отрицательных эмоций возникло когда вечером при принятии душа перед ночной прогулкой у девочек закончилась горячая вода и не оказалось почти не одной работающей лампочки. По возвращении ночью домой в комнате было очень холодно и не было ни одного теплого пледа или покрывала. Утром Мы связались с хозяйкой и она принесла теплые покрывала и решила все вопросы. При этом каждый день готовила для девушек такие замечательные завтраки что они сразу забыли о всех неудобствах и минусах!) завтраки были великолепны!!! Спасибо большое за гостеприимство и волшебные завтраки!!!))))
Wonderful family apartment!

A beautiful gem close to all of the museums, tours, shopping and places to eat. We had been traveling for almost three weeks and stayed at other AirBnB's throughout our travels and Brenda's place was a wonderful home to relax in. Would highly recommend for any family visiting Amsterdam. Also, if you want to visit the Anne Frank house and weren't able to get tickets online check back on the museum site frequently. We were able to purchase last minute tickets. Thank you Brenda and family for a peaceful and relaxing home away from home!

Brenda left a useful information list.
The apartment was beautiful in a friend;y neighbourhood, supermarkets were nearby with easy access to trams.

It was lovely to have the cats in the apartment.
We had a wonderful stay! Brenda's apartment was beautiful, spacious and clean. It was close to the Vondelpark, bus and tram stops, supermarkets and good restaurants.

First time with airbnb so a little nervous about what we might expect . Brenda provided reassurance through emails to us and the apartment turned out to be exactly as described, clean and homely. Apartment in quiet residential neighbourhood but with easy access to city centre via nearby tram. 20 min walk to museums across attractive Vondelpark an added bonus. Visitors must like cats as they need to feed and clean out litter tray, no problem for us.
The host canceled this reservation 25 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.
L'ospitalità di Brenda è stata eccezionale; la casa confortevole e "calda". Ideale e comoda per  famiglie anche grandi (2 adulti e 3 bambini) . Fantastica l'esperienza con i 2 gatti della casa.

We spent a week at Brenda's two years in a row. It is a beautiful place, ideally situated, close to the most beautiful park of the city, not far from the center and the Museumplein but in a quiet area. The place itself is big, bright and comfortable. There is also a nice deck from which you will watch the best sunsets. It was also fun to have a cat around.

This is the first AirBnb apartment in which we felt completely at home. It was beautiful, very close to the city center, comfortable and big. The cat was lovely, educated and friendly. The communication was fast and easy. The best apartment, would recommend 100%.

Wonderful apartment.  Clean.  Comfortable.  Great location.  Lots happening in the neighborhood and a quick tram ride or bike ride to the center.  Brenda is a lovely host.  The cat was a sweet companion to come home to in the evening.  Would highly recommend this place.

Le logement de Brenda est super bien situé à Amsterdam, dans un quartier tranquille en toute proximité du tram reliant le centre de la ville. Loueur de vélos, commerces dans le quartier et parc à proximité, nickel. Le logement est très conforme au photos, très propre, agréable et fonctionnel avec une très bonne literie. Le chat de la famille nous a tenu compagnie, un séjour très agréable et un logement que je recommande.
Un appartement très bien placé et très accueillant pour un séjour en famille à Amsterdam!

Un beau duplex très bien placé dans un quartier calme et bien desservi par les transports. Belle deco
À conseiller !!

The apartment was just as described - everything we needed for a comfortable stay for a family of 4.  We are not generally cat people, but Pepsi was very cute and very friendly. We really enjoyed her and our stay in Amsterdam!

Brendas Wohnung ist sehr groß und hat zwei Terrassen. Sie ist gut ausgestattet. Die Lage ist gut in der Nähe des Vondelparks. Es gibt eine freundliches und verschmuste Wohnungskatze. Allerdings liegt sie im 3. und 4. Stock und die Stiegen hinauf sind sehr steil wie es halt in Amsterdam üblich ist. Auf jeden Fall ein netter Platz für einen Städtetrip.

Nice place. Keep in mind that this house is a family's home, so it's a different feeling from staying in a place that's dedicated to being an AirBnB holiday house. The location is great. We enjoyed it.

Great Host very clean and comfortable. They will clean your room every morning and provide a lot of great breakfast like yogurt, break, juice and coffee. Snacks are also provided. You will get all you need in your room like microwave and fridge. The toilet is very clean. Thanks for the great experience.

Gordon and Amy were wonderful hosts, providing a lovely light breakfast daily, coffee and tea fixings, and endless amounts of information during our stay. Our room was comfortable and everything was clean. The location was great! It was close to all attractions, but not right in the middle of everything where the masses of people are. I recommend bringing ear plugs, as the Blue Room is on a busy street that can be loud with scooters and people at night. We wouldn't hesitate to stay here again on our next trip to Amsterdam.

The main entrance was a little tucked away but once we found it, Gordon showed us to our room. Perfectly sized and equipped. Gordon provided us with towels, power adapters, maps, breakfast items and keys so we could come and go as we pleased. The location is great! Near a supermarket and lots of restaurants. Easy to find from the train station and close to the Anne Frank House.

We had a fabulous stay in this apartment. It's on a great location, close to the train station and a short walk to the main tourist sights, the perfect place to explore the city from. Gordon gave us a wonderful welcome and had maps and books ready if we needed them. Athens breakfast was delicious, yoghurt, fruit, pastries plus coffee and tea. The room itself was bright and clean and has everything we needed for our stay. Would highly recommend.

We had a great stay in Amsterdam. The location of the BnB was very good- we could easily walk anywhere we wanted to go. We had everything we needed while staying here. Breakfast was filling and delicious- even more than we thought we would get. They let us leave our bags on the day we checked out without any issue. We would recommend staying here if you are visiting Amsterdam.

The beautiful apartment on 1st floor, we were welcomed by Amy's beautiful smile. Everything was as expected, nothing better can be found on an amazing location. Great breakfast box on each morning. Highly recommended, we will definitely return in future trip. Thank you Amy and Gordon for your hospitality.
Great location.  10 minute walk from the train station and great areas of the city.  We loved eating the provided breakfast at the table each morning.  Great experience with Gordan and Amy!

We spent four days in Amsterdam and we felt very well in this house. The room was very nice and clean. It is well lighted due to the big window, from which you can see a cute crowded street, because it is situated in a centric area, closed to the central station and to the famous square. Therefore we walked a lot around the small canals. But the cutest were our hosts, Amy and Gordon, who made us feel comfortable. This couple gave us an excellent breakfast every morning and they've also always helped us for any needs.

Thanks Gordon, we had a great stay with you in Amsterdam.  Apartment is very centrally located and an easy walk from the train station and to Anne frank house and the city centre.   The room itself was basic but spacious, sunny and clean, what more could you ask for! The breakfast was also bigger than expected.  Recommended for a hassle-free stay in Amsterdam!

Everytjing wss very easy eith gordon and amy.The check in and the check out was very uncomplicated.
The room is very central and look like on the pictures.
Earplugs could be helpful for people with a soft sleep.
The breakfast was more than we are ecpected and easy as well.
Gordon was so nice to print something for our next travelstop.
Thank you again for this!
Amy and Gordon byli skvělí, s ubytováním i lokalitou jsme byli velmi spokojeni! Díky!

We didn't know Amy, but Gordon is a good host. The first day he gave us some tourist guide about Amsterdam. Moreover, the last day, he allows us to leave our bags in his house until our departure to the airport. He was very attentive to us.

The apartment is in the center of Amsterdam, but in a quiet neighborhood. The room is perfect if you will be in the city for a few days. There isn't a kitchen, but we had our healthy breakfast in the room every morning. For those who need to sleep in total darkness: the apartment has big windows but not any blinds. Even so, it is very comfortable and cleaned. We choose this apartment again if we would be in Amsterdam another time.

We had a pleasant stay at Gordon & Amy's. Gordon greeted us & was very helpful & friendly. The location is superb! Great area of Amsterdam to visit all of the touristy areas within 10-15 minute walk, as well as having authentic Amsterdam at the doorstep. Great view over the street, but if you're a light sleeper, opt for the yellow room because it was quite noisy on workdays in the morning & evening. The room is basic but has everything you need, including a nice breakfast. No issues sharing the bathroom - we didn't see anyone else at all. The room heated up quite a lot during the day & was quite hot, but we were lucky to have abnormally warm weather while staying. Good value for money.

We loved staying at Gordon and Amy's Blue Room. Gordon's communication before and during arrival was great, he provided clear instructions on how to get to the apartment from Central Station and met us when we arrived to go through amenities, provide a key, etc. Gordon and Amy provided various breakfast items for us each day which made this a true b&b experience. The room had all the amenities we needed (bed, mini fridge, microwave, table and two chairs, alarm clock!) and the shared bathroom in the hallway worked well too - the toilet and shower are in separate rooms which is a good set up. The Jordaan neighborhood where the apartment is located is fabulous - within walking distance of major sights and there are lots of cute shops right on the street below. We hope to stay here again next time we are in Amsterdam!

Gordon kwam net aanlopen met herriestoppers ( oordoppen) omdat er dezelfde nacht nog met wegwerkzaamheden begonnen zou worden, ( die gelukkig niet doorgingen), maar zo aardig en attent om dat meteen voor ons te regelen.
De locatie is perfect, midden in de Jordaan, voor ons kon het niet beter. Het ontbijt was iedere dag super, te veel om allemaal op te eten. Goed geregeld! De kamer is niet al te luxe, maar alle basiszaken zijn er. meer hadden wij niet nodig.
We zijn dan ook zeeeeer benieuwd naar de gele kamer en zijn van plan om die ooit eens te reserveren. Gordon en Amy is een aanrader!

Everything was very good. The location is super, the apartment was clean, and it was very easy for us to get to all the parts of the city we wanted to see.

September 2015

Thanks Gordon for making thing easier for me. 10 minutes walking to central station, just above ahops where u can find snacks or drinks or almost anything, in a very safe area. I recommended this bnb. Gordon offer us to use all facilities in the house even u will have your own fridge, microwave and pantry. Would stay here again if i go to amsterdam.

Had a great stay! Only met Gordon he was very helpful, prepared and friendly. Located in a convenient and hip area. Place was clean and he left out fruit, pastries, juice, coffee and tea. Would stay there again if back in Amsterdam!
Gordon provides us many useful info for Amsterdam, and is easy to reach. The room is nice, with breakfast provided. Thank you Gordon for all the arrangement!

This was a great experience. Room is huge, well lit and has everything you could need, and the adjacent courtyard was a beautiful place to relax. Shawna and her family were all very friendly and accommodating. The house is located on a great street in the best part of town with everything on the doorstep (supermarket, bottle shop, cafes, coffeeshops, etc). A+

Gordon is friendly and careful ! This room get everything you need! The breakfast was good! I love the fruit so much! The bed was suitable for me!
The windows are big, fresh air everyday!

Excelente lugar, muy seguro y cerca a los lugares turísticos. La habitación Blue es mejor que lo que se ve en las fotos,  tiene nevera, horno microondas, cafetera, una mesa con dos asientos y lavamanos. Todo los días te dejan en la habitación frutas, yogur, cereal, pan y pasteles dulces. Enseguida de la habitación esta la ducha y el inodoro los cuales se comparten solamente con otra habitación. Todo muy limpio y aseado. El vecindario esta lleno de vida con restaurantes económicos, supermercado, panadería, lavanderia. Gordon vive en un piso mas arriba de las habitaciones que alquila, es muy amable y pendiente de colaborar en todo lo que necesite. No es recomendable para personas con problemas de movilidad ya que las habitaciones son en un segundo piso por escaleras muy inclinadas.

Ottima accoglienza,Gordon è stato gentile e premuroso. Se cercate una sistemazione vicina alla Stazione Centrale,questo è il posto che fa per voi. Nelle vicinanze troverete anche negozi di prima necessità,e sarete subito immersi nell'atmosfera simpatica della città.L'esperienza di alloggiare in una casa tipica del luogo è affascinante,da provare.

This is the best Air BnB I have ever stayed in. Gordon made it very easy to find the apartment, and welcomed us very warmly once we had made our way to it's very convenient location. He brought us up to a cozy and pleasant room with a great view over one of Amsterdam's adorable streets. He explained that there were fresh pastries left for the morning as well as yogurt, coffee and tea. The room was equipped with all you need to have a relaxing morning and a little breakfast. He then gave us maps and recommendations for what to see and places to eat. Every day while we were gone he came in and took our used dishes, leaving behind fresh ones, made our bed, and replenished our breakfast. It made my fiancé and I feel so relaxed and happy after a lot of travel so that we could really enjoy our time in Amsterdam. Thank you Gordon and Amy for having such wonderful hospitality to offer!

Great neighborhood (bus/tram stop just a couple blocks away), cozy room, comfy bed, and a friendly family as a host. We couldn't ask for more.  A variety of really good restaurants within a couple blocks, an Albert Heijn 3 doors down and an ATM next to it making it easy for travelers to settled in. Highly recommended!

Excellent location! Beautiful home. We had a very friendly welcome, privacy, and very pretty courtyard. Everything you need is only a few minutes walk away - many great restaurants, bars, supermarket, post office,  coffee, canals, and Amsterdam splendor. But most of all, Shawna and co were all super sweet. Our next trip we will plan on staying again for sure.
Excellent! Wonderful location, beautiful charming digs, and a beautiful host!
Fantastic location, food restocked everyday, and a very friendly host. Would recommend and would stay again.

Very nice flat and very cute cat ! The location is nice as well, around 30 minutes by foot from the old city center (or 10 minutes by tram). Brenda was very reactive to all our queries. However we would have appreciated some more recommandations about what to do, where to eat, etc. in the neighbourhood and a map of Amsterdam would have been nice as well.

Appartement vaste et lumineux de Brenda à recommander pour son emplacement proche du Tram et du bus et dans le centre d’Amsterdam. Bon point de départ pour les visites des musées très proches et pour la découverte d’Amsterdam.
Casa molto bella e ben organizzata. Vicinissima alla linea del tram. Ideale per un soggiorno di qualche giorno a Amsterdam. Brenda è molto precisa e accorta. La consigliamo.

Shawna and her family were very sweet, and the place is beautiful in the best location.
We would wake up every morning, have the BEST ice cream in the city down the block and only a 5-6 minute walk to the central Dam square. All shopping and great cafes are within 2 minutes from the house.

The backroom is a little guest house in the garden of the main house, so walking thru the house is necessary although no trouble at all, even late at night. The room itself is a nice size, and the internet is fast and reliable.
Keep in mind, during the summer the it gets dark really late, and light really early so if sleeping in a little light is difficult, Shawna provides nice eye covers to help.

I will definitely stay by Shawna the next time we come thru to Amsterdam.
Shawna and her husband were great hosts!  The room is clean and the location can't be beat.

This is a great spacious house in a convenient and safe area away from the crowded tourist areas. Tram and bus stops very close by will get you into the centre of Amsterdam very quickly or it is walkable quite easily. The excellent Vondelpark is a few minutes walk and the local neighbourhood has many good places to eat and drink as well as a supermarket 2 mins away. The house is as described with lots of little extras and a friendly cat who will greet you on your return. Oh, and decent Wi-Fi to keep the teenagers happy.

L'appartement est très grand, très propre, très confortable. Le quartier est très calme. Bien situé, à deux pas d'un tramway et des commerces. Branda et Raoul sont très réactifs, très arrangeants et généreux. Grâce à eux nous avons passé un excellent séjour à Amsterdam. Nous les remercions très sincèrement. Nous recommandons ce logement et leurs propriétaires. Ainsi que leur petit chat très discret et câlin.

This is a lovely place to have a family break in Amsterdam. It is very easy to reach Central Amsterdam and the station by tram and just a couple of minutes walk to the park. There are good nearby shops and restaurants.

The apartment itself is spacious, comfortable and homely with Pepsi appearing on your return to provide a warm welcome.

We would have no hesitation in recommending this to anyone else wanting a holiday in Amsterdam.

You will not be disappointed in any regard if you decide to stay with Shawna and her family. Perfectly located, tidy and quiet with character, the high ceilings and skylights give you space and sanctuary.  We are yoga practitioners and needed space to be able to practice - and there was plenty of room (and privacy) for us in the studio. It was our first go with airbnb so we did not know what to expect.  Shawna was very friendly and professional when we were making the initial arrangements and she was always generous in helping us find what we needed. My only regret is not having had more time in Amsterdam. Highly recommended.

shawna was totally accommodating and welcoming. you do have to walk through the main house to get to the pied-a-tierre, but never felt like i was intruding nor did she feel at all overbearing. she was gracious and lovely as was the space...

thanks shawna!
Great location for exploring Amsterdam! Shawna was great and provided everything I needed for a nice stay.
Great stay, Shawna was easy going and helpful. Definitely recommended.

The backroom was just as great you see it in the pictures. We had a lovely stay, it was very clean, our hosts were very welcoming and helped us out with any questions we had. The location of the room is incredible, you're in the middle of the most beautiful part of the city, everything is within walking distance and the airport isn't far. Some people already said that the room is flooded with light which didn't bother us at all, we liked the atmosphere a lot. The bed was very comfy, we actually thought the room was pretty quiet, even though it's surrounded by other houses in the backyard. :)

So thanks a lot, Shawna! We will hopefully be back some time!

Shawna was really nice and gave us a lot of information about the city.
The backroom was perfect for our short stay in Amsterdam.

very friendly host family, amazing appartement... when i'll be in amsterdam for my next visit i would definitely like to live here again :-)
there's a supermarket next door (open until 10pm), lots of pubs, cafés, restaurants, a cash machine... just a 10min walk to leidsplein...
aawww... and airport/wifi ofcourse... stereo equipment, and i left a headphone connector cable to plug it into your ipod, iphone or whatever :-)
We had a great time at Brenda's flat:  very roomy, comfortable and clean flat in a lovely area. Brenda was very responsive and helpful throughout.

Apparemment idéalement situé, dans un quartier à la fois calme, dynamique et proche de l’hyper-centre (à moins de 10min de tram).
Brenda est très réactive et tout est mis à disposition pour que votre séjour se passe dans les meilleurs conditions.
La terrasse ensoleillée et la déco apportent indéniablement un plus à cet appartement familial tout équipé.
Les deux chats de la maison sont de vrais petites boules d’amour et seront ravis de vous retrouver après vos visites quotidiennes.
Si nous retournons à Amsterdam et que l’appartement de Brenda est disponible nous y retournerons sans hésiter!

Les enfants et moi avons été ravis de passer qq jours chez Brenda et Raoul .Un bel appartement dans un univers calme et un quartier à taille humaine !
Je recommande vivement !

Everything went well. We were close to the tramway at 10/15 mn from the center. The park is really close. There are a lot of places around to buy food or to eat.
The cats are lovely. We didn't really saw the youngest, just the night. We have 2 kids and they were ok with them.
The stairs are really sloping you have to pay attention if you're not use to it.

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour à Amsterdam! L'appartement est très bien aménagé, grand, lumineux et idéalement situé, à proximité du parc dans un quartier calme et avec toutes les commodités (restaurants, supermarché, ...). Le centre d'Amsterdam n'est qu'à 35 mn à pieds et si besoin l'arrêt de tram est tout proche. La communication avec Brenda et Raoul a été très fluide et il m'ont apporté toutes les informations nécessaires. Les chats ont partagé notre séjour, ils ne sont pas envahissants et même plutôt amusants.
Je recommande donc un séjour à cette adresse!

This was the first Air BnB that we have stayed in that was someone’s home. Some of our family didn’t care for it, others didn’t mind. As mentioned by others, there are steep stairs so if that won’t work for you, find someplace else.

Pros: very close to trams (get a pass), close to Vondelpark, groceries and a few good restaurants are also very close by.
Cons: the cat is beautiful and very sweet but if you have any allergies or sensitivities, she is very fluffy, for some reason we were left hand towels to use for showering.

This elegant top-floor apartment is every bit as attractive as it looks in the pictures. We enjoyed the 3 airy porches and the two resident cats are sweet and cuddly. Also, the location was perfect. Please be aware that you will need to climb steep stairs to reach the apartment. This was not a problem for us and we appreciated the fact that we could walk almost every place we wanted to go!

Beautiful family apartment in a nice area in Amsterdam, very close to Vondelpark. The apartment is well-kept and spacious, with  two balconies and a roof garden. The host was accommodating when there was a potential issue with my flight that risked affecting my check-in time.
This is the coolest place to stay in Amsterdam!  It has everything that you could possibly need, and it is in a fantastic location. Thanks Shawna!

Shawna was a very gracious host and we really enjoyed our stay. She was very friendly and made sure that everything was in order for us. Also this space is really unique and interesting and rustic-- all in really good ways. It was close to everything and had everything we needed. I would definitely stay here again as it just felt like it suited the city's "vibe" and our particular occasion. Side note: Also had a really awesome David Bowie poster in it.
A great experience in the center of Amsterdam
Friendly and helpful host. Great location !!

Great host, very welcoming.
He explained everything to us, gave us maps, and even left some few things for us to eat.
The place was very clean and had a great location.
Communication was perfect.

The apartment was lovely, with everything you would need from microwave to utensils and plates. Also, its apartment is very near to Amsterdam Centraal, which means that you can conveniently reach main attractions like Anne Frank House or Rijksmuseum. I would recommend anyone visiting Amsterdam to stay with Gordon and Amy, if the room is available.
The room is in a very good location. Gordon & Amy are quite helpful in my short trip in Amsterdam.
The location of this room was perfect - on a charming street close to everything. The room was exactly as advertised and better. The breakfast was a lovely addition.

The backroom at Shawna's place is the loveliest garden hideaway.  It looks just like it is pictured...beautiful!  It is spacious enough for two people to spread out and be comfortable, It can be a bit bright as you are sleeping underneath a glass ceiling, but Shawna provides eye masks which were great.  Shawna was very responsive to my emails.  Her and her family were very nice and helpful and gave us some great tips for touring Amsterdam.  The backroom is in a great part of town of Amserdam.  I would definitely stay there again.
Beautiful studio in a nice area of the city.

Shawna and her family were very welcoming into their home. Very comfortable, quite and bohemian private back room right in the heart of Amsterdam and the Jordaan district.

Walking distance to Leidseplein for bars, fantastic restaurants and fun.

30 minutes away from the RAI Exhibition Centre via tram 7/10 and then 4 and was great for my exhibition requirements.

Shawna's welcome was warm and sincere. She showed me where I would stay, everything was in place and neat, and it was just right for my needs for a one-night-stay in Amsterdam.

And her children were very helpful !

That was our 4 th day as we have married =) We needed quiet and peacefull atmosphere but in the heart of Amsterdam. Just got a little bit more than we expected =)) & there is a nice cheeeeese shop just a few steps from the entrance door, buy as much as you can grab - they vacuum pack the cheese =))!!

Un emplacement génial dans Jordaan. Une rue vraiment commerçante.

Une chambre parfaite. Des que je retourne à Dam ce sera là bas.
Excelente todo, buena ubicacion, buen trato cordialidad abaoluta, Gordon nos dejaba el desayuno listo todos los dias y hasta cuido nuestras maletas 100% recomendable.

Gordon met us on arrival, explained everything - very easy check-in. Good/safe location, walkable to city center, plenty of nice restaurants and shops around. Breakfast provided was awesome! Gordon provided us with pastries, yoghurt and muesli and bananas! Would highly recommend staying here! Great value.

Thank you Gordon for your easy hospitality. Gordon and Amy's Airbnb is located in an old building in a vibrant and interesting part of Amsterdam. The Airbnb reflects the character of the building and location. If you are like me and looking for character and location, this will suit you. Gordon and Amy provide generous tea, coffee, yoghurt, milk and pastries to get you going in the morning. Gordon is a good comminicator and was agreeable when I wanted to arrive early. Thanks Gordon. Would I stay again? Yes.

We had a great 4 nights holiday with them! A wonderful location, close to the centre. Lovely hosts with fabulous service, with breakfast included!! The room is clean and cosy, with everything you may need. Definitely a great experience! :)

Gordon was a great host, accommodating and very helpful. He welcomed me and explained everything clearly. The place was spacious, clean, well-decorated and comfy. It was located in the very center of Amsterdam. Most of the major attractions were within walking distance. Couldn't be better! Will definitely stay here if I come to Amsterdam again. Highly-recommended! And love the breakfast provided :-))))

Gordon’s and Amy’s place is convenient.  It was easy arranging check in and check out process and they were very kind to let us check in late at night. The room has a basin which is also very handy. Happy to have stayed here. Thank you.

Excellent host. Met us on arrival and explained everything well. The room is in a great location within walking distance to everything. Perfect for one person but also good for two. Bed was comfortable and we slept surprisingly well considering how close the room is to a main street. Breakfast was included with fruit, yoghurt, pastries, tea, coffee, juice etc - a great surprise! Thanks Gordon and Amy!
Shawna was a great host, very friendly and informative. The backroom was perfect for our stay! A very nice family =)

"Mittendrin statt nur dabei ;-)" ... ein super freundliches Paar dass uns den Einblick ins "echte Amsterdam" gegeben hat. Inmitten der Stadt in einem schönen Hinterhäuschen hatten wir 2 super Nächte.Alles da was man braucht, Shawna und ihr Mann waren sehr nett und haben uns freundlich und offen empfangen. Ganz in der Nähe gibt es jede Menge an Möglickeiten (Cafes, Bars, EInkaufsläden etc.)+ Shopping in der Innenstadt die 5 Gehminuten entfernt ist. Gerne kommen wir wieder! :)
The Backroom was perfect. Thanks Shawna and family for making our stay so special.

Excellent location!
Lots of places to have breakfast, dinner, lunch.
The room is exactly what you see in the advertised pictures and the host is great!
I'd definitely recommend this place to my friends!!!

I absolutely recommend this accomodation at the backroom apt.
Lovely host ,great space and location .
Definetly will book this on my next stay in Amsterdam.
We only stopped in for a night before catching an early flight, but the backroom was very cute and comfortable.  Thanks Shawna.

I was only there for 1 night, but this place is a SANCTUARY.
warm, beautiful, cozy, and filled with care. Shawna's a sweetheart, and her husband went out of his way to help me find my way to the airport.
Wifi, private bath, incredibly comfy bed, maps, books, cookware, plenty space, and romance. I really wish I could stay longer.

This place was amazing! Had such a blast here and both Shawna and her husband were both very nice and accommodating. This was def a trip I will never forget! The location of the place couldn't  have been more perfect, food, grocery, COFFEE! all within a minutes walk. Thanks a mill Shawna!
Really nice place. Just looked like in the picture. We just stayed for one night unfortunately. i would definitely stay there again.
We had an excellent  2 night stay with Shawna and her family in Amsterdam. Everything was as described and Shawna and her family were extremely accommodating. Highly recommended!
Shawna is a very nice person!!! The room is a sweet place!!  Near for all you need!!!! ;) love this place and Amsterdam!
This is an original kind of place with plenty of charm. The location is excellent for tourists to Amsterdam, and the hosts are very friendly and uncomplicated.
perfect for a few night's rest. place was clean and in a great spot.
A very nice place!! Friendly family, I would again go there!

We totally enjoyed Shawna's place! Shawna was away, but we met her super helpful husband and lovely girls. The backroom is very unique and artistically decorated. Great location with supermarket and excellent cheese shop nearby, easy in and out. Nice hot shower helped us to relax after a long day walking in Amsterdam streets. High recommend!

This is a  amazing, confortable and romantic place. The Backroom have all you can need.  Shawna and her husband are verynice and friendly. Recommended to everybody who wants to visit Amsterdam. Thank´s for all!!!

Funky space in a fantastic location!
Lots room for Dutch accommodations . Everything a person or two could need while staying in Amsterdam. The street has a grocery store, drugstore, laundry, bread and cheese store and a Thai restaurant next door. All this and a very friendly and accommodating family. Highly recommend this experience.

We enjoyed staying at Shawna's Back Room so (Website hidden by Airbnb) decided our future visits to Amsterdam will hopefully be at Shawna's due to her terrific hospitality and beautiful accommodations.

It was such a pleasure to stay in this beautiful space! Shawna and her family were helpful and easy going. The room is spacious, clean, decorated in such a lovely fashion, and cozy. We loved the tall glass ceilings, which let in the morning light. Perfect location, within walking distance of everything. Would very much recommend it to anyone, and we will be sure to stay here again when next in Amsterdam. Thank you, Shawna!

We had a great time whilst staying in The Backroom, and its very central location made it easy to go for a wonder at any time, without having to plan ahead too much. Shawna and her family were lovely, and willing to help out with any extra info. we required.
Great location and very accommodating host.
The place and the host were really nice! I just wish the room had more lighting in the nightime and was warmer. I am from a cold country, but my soul demands tropics:)

Amsterdam is a great city, calm with no pollution. People are so friendly. We are looking forward to visit Amsterdam again. The backroom was really nice and close from everything we wanted to visit by walk.

I stayed in the backroom for 3 nights with two friends (total 3 people): everything was perfect from the check-in to the check-out. The room is perfect for two people, but can comfortably suit three, as guests are provided with a double bed and an extra (self-)inflatable mattress, which is as comfortable as a bed. The room is heated by two radiators, and if this isn't enough for you, Shawna the host will provide you with warm blankets. The toilet is a bit tiny and only includes the bowl and a shower; however, there is a sink with a mirror in the room.
A small hotplate, pots and pans are available for cooking, there is a fridge in the room as well as a kettle and a microwave, so everything you may need for a short stay is there. Not to forget the hi-fi system with tuner cd and aux-in (cable provided)!
An AlbertHeijn supermarket is almost next door to the place (about 30secs walking, amazing!) and you will find several restaurants, a cheese shop, coffee shops, cafés, pubs, and so on... on the same street.
As for the location, again, just perfect. Located in the Jordaan area, the backroom is at a short walking distance (10-15 mins) from Dam and Leidsplein. We never used public transport, simply walked, as the location is very handy (though renting a bike would be the best solution).
Our host Shawna was extremely helpful and lovable. Will I ever go to Amsterdam again, the backroom is the place where I'm going to stay.

Apartment is in a wonderful position and the street is gourgeous. Shawna has been very nice, but I must tell that apartment was really dirty. The floor was covered with dirt and crumbs, the sheets seemed used by others (I found several hair on the pillow) and in general it seemed that no one had cleaned the room.

La casa es tal cual las fotos, preciosa. Pensábamos que igual pasaríamos frío, porque hemos ido en enero, pero tiene dos estufas que calientan bastante y el edredón se agradece mucho por la noche. El único problema, que faltaba algo de limpieza, aunque el sitio tiene muchísimo encanto y os lo recomendamos totalmente, es como estar en un cuento.

Nuestro hospedaje en la casa de la familia Snow fue un gran experiencia. La casa esta perfectamente ubicada, por lo que todos los dias recorrimos la ciudad a pie. Solo para algunos puntos tomamos el bus o el metro por lo que recomiendo no sacar pases largos.
La familia fue muy agradable y se mostro siempre predispuesta a brindarnos su ayuda. La habitacion es muy linda y esta bien decorada. Teniamos un patio y como mientras estuvimos hacia frio quedo todo poblado de nieve y era sorprendete amanecer frente a eso. Sin dudas recomendamos este lugar. Gracias Shawna y familia. Brian y Giuliana
Shawna's a lovely lady! the backroom is  beautiful and central would reccomend to anyone!

Shawna's back room was great in every respect. She and her family weren't there so their very nice and helpful friend let us in. It's in a great location and has everything you could need. It is very light in the morning but I didn't find it a problem and there are eye masks if you can't sleep. There are some nice restaurants on the road so you don't have to go very far to eat well. Staying here made our trip all the more enjoyable. Thank you Shawna!

We had such a great time at Shawna's during our stay in Amsterdam. The Jordaan district is really quaint, and what some of the locals have called "Old Amsterdam", and it's only about a 15-minute walk from Centraal Station. The area is full of world restaurants, bars and even a few cafes, and there's a fab cheese shop only few doors away that also bakes yummy pastries. All-in-all, a perfect areas to stay in.
We found the backroom exactly as it appeared in the photos.... gorgeous!
And even though Shawna left eye masks for us, we were pleased that we didn't have to use them at all...we had such a lovely, natural sleep!
Although Shawna was away during out visit, she made sure that a friend of hers was around to welcome us.
We'd highly recommend staying at Shawna's, and there's no doubt that we'll be back again very soon too!

Realmente pasamos 2 noches buenas en El cuarto de Atras!! Esta convenientemente ubicado, a pocas cuadras de los lugares para visitar. WIFI en todo momento. Muy recomendable para una breve estancia en Amsterdam. Volveria a hospdedarme alli!!!
Trés sympathique endroit ! Situation idéale et calme pour dormir!

super ! je recommande vivement. Shawna n'était pas là mais son mari
nous a accueilli chaleureusement.
La chambre a beaucoup de charme, est très clame, est bien équipée.
La maison est vraiment très très bien située, à la limite de Jordaan,
entourée de bons restaurants, surtout le palladio !
Amsterdam est une ville très très agréable,
nous avons passé un super séjour. merci !

Alles war bestens! Wir haben das Zimmer so vorgefunden wie auf den Bildern. Einfach toll! Shawna war beruflich unterwegs, aber ihr Mann Naos war da um uns alles zu zeigen. Das Zimmer liegt nicht weit von der Innenstadt entfernt. Es gibt viele kleine Cafes und Restaurants in der Gegend. Wir haben alles zu Fuß erreichen können. Ich freue mich schon auf den nächsten Besuch!

I had an extremely pleasant stay, as I had been staying in hostels up to that point, and having this large, very homely room was just what I needed. I lay down to rest in the early evening and never woke up until the following day, so I can vouch for the comfort of the bed. I read a few reviews about people saying it was cold, not sure if they were sleeping on the floor or in the bed, as the bed kept me snug and warm all night! Shawna was working abroad when I was there, and her husband dealt with my check in very well and was quick to get back to me via email when I was lost. Turns out I had written down the post code instead of the house number, but he was very quick to tell me where to go. Could not fault this experience at all. It was quiet, the neighborhood was great, and withing walking distance of most places I wanted to go. I was quite pleased with the coffee I made myself and the fact that there was a Xavier Rudd c.d. still inside the sound system. Would stay here again!
We loved this place!  Great location! Great host!. And, you're doing a little bit of good for a great cause as the Backroom proceeds go to Shawna's non-profit, Reckoning.  Duh.
Fue una experiencia, la casa se encuentra a 10 min de la estación central, los desayunos muy buenos .

Gordon a été très accueillant et gentil. N'ayant personne dans leur chambre coté court, il nous l'a offerte, ce qui a été très apprécié. Le petit déjeuné inclus est très appréciable et la calme aussi de l'immeuble. L'emplacement est idéal, car sur une rue animée proche du centre. Je recommande sans restriction cet appartement.

The experience into a houseboat was really particular and exciting.
The apartment was clean, brand new and really nice!
To recommend for a unique experience in Amsterdam.
The communication with the host was really simple and functioning.
Thanks Harry for your kindness.

We booked Harry´s houseboat in the last minute but Harry confirmed it fast. The houseboat itself is very nice, we enjoyed our stay there. It is new, pleasant, has a nice atmosphere and the neighborhood is quiet. There is a good public transportation connection, you can reach the city center very easy. Harry is an excellent host!
If you would like to stay in Amsterdam, this place is a great choice!

We were four friends visiting Amsterdam and staying on Harry's houseboat was the best decision we could have made. It's brand new, very stylish with a great rooftop terrace and an awesome bathroom. The rooms are cozy and the beds (2 real ones) had good matresses. Only advice, bring towels (we had to buy some because we forgot to bring our own :-) )

Harry loue une partie de sa splendide maison-bateau, toute neuve. Le lieu, un peu à l'écart du centre-ville, est très calme et le cadre est très dépaysant. On voit passer des cygnes par la fenêtre du salon ! Harry est très sympathique et accueillant, et il a meublé sa maison avec goût et esprit pratique.
Nice stay, and hosts. Clean and spacious, modern house boat. Would come again.

We stayed for two nights and overall our experience was fantastic. This property is in a great location that was quiet and relaxing but also very close to Amsterdam centre by tram (15 mins to central Amsterdam), which you can pick up at the end of the road (number 16 or 24).

The accommodation itself was comfortable, very clean, modern and decorated to a very high standard. It also has great roof deck and just being on the water was such a novelty for us we really enjoyed it.

There are four brand new bikes which you can use free of charge and we cycled to a local park (Amsterdam Bose) that was more like a forest, which was amazing to cycle around. If you like the outdoors this is the place for you. You can have a bit of nature and the city all in one weekend.

Harry thanks again we will hopefully be back again soon!

Very stylish houseboat in a nice and quite location of Amsterdam. It takes you a 15min bustransfer and a 10 minute walk from Schiphol Airport to get there by public transport.
