The houseboat is located next to the Olympic Stadium and surrounded by sports fields (tennis, soccer, icehockey, etc.) and of course water.
The housboat is brand new, is very clean, modern and stylsish. The location is designed for up to 4 guests with 2 bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms, lovely roof terrace and of course 4 brand new bikes. It was a pleasure to get arround with them in Amsterdam. It takes you about 5 minutes to the Vondelpark by bike and another 10 minutes to the City Center. If you go the opposite direction you will get in 5-10 Minutes to the Amsterdam Forest (Amsterdam Bos).
We really enojed our stay in this location. As Harry lives just next door even our late arrival was no problem. Thanks again for this. I really can recomend this location to everyone who want’s to stay stylish and relaxed.

Shawna and her Family are very helpful, easygoing and warm People-they and their Life seems to fit Perfect to this beutiful relaxed City. We had wonderful days in this charming City and Shawnas House . Be careful with Parking-4€/Hour on the Street-use the Parking Garage nearby.make a boat Trip and see NEMO with children,if you have Time. The Thai Restaurant next to Shawnas Door is delizious. All the best to Shawna and her Family for the Future

Amsterdam war wundervoll! Das Zimmer bei Shawna hat unseren Amsterdamaufenthalt perfekt gemacht. Wir wurden sehr nett empfangen, alles ist völlig unkompliziert abgelaufen. Das Zimmer ist genauso wie auf den Bildern, etwas besonderes!  Die Lage ist perfekt!
Shawna and her family were very friendly. And their place is ideally located and charming. Thanks Shawna!
Even if it was rainy, Shawna has been a great host !
Great place, great host

This room is beautiful. Shawna is very friendly.  We stayed there for one night, and we were able to come and go as we pleased.  It is very central to everything.  There is a very good grocery store and bakery right next door.  I would definitely stay here again.
A very nice and warm cozy room. It felt as though we owned a little bungalow in the heart of Amsterdam. Shawna and her family were lovely.
Nice, cozy and clean room. Everything was ok!
Great space! Awesome host!
Wir haben ein wunderschönes Wochenende in einem super Zimmer in Amsterdam gehabt. Sehr nette und gastfreundliche Familie.

Lovely place. peaceful and very relaxing. I really liked the tasteful decoration, very ownable and unic in Amsterdam. You wake up in full daylight through the window roofs. If you don't like that there are sleeping masks available. I would stay here again.

the location of the house is so convient. less than 10 mins to the city centre. The room is so unique and beautiful layout. The only problem is the hot water, it needs more than 20mins to heat the water again.

The roof is made of glass, so romantic laying on the bed to look at the sky.

Love it and would like to come again.

Very nice place in the real cenetr of the city. Comfortable and clean. There are a lot of shops and cafe near house.

Hosts are awesome and very friendly people.

A weekend on a houseboat is just so Amsterdam-ish! Everything worked out perfectly at Harry & Anna´s. Staying in a houseboat community felt very home-like. Bikes were great and having to come in to town from a bit longer distance than if you stay right downtown makes you see new and really nice parts of Amst. Our hosts gave us some real good tips on where to eat.
Appartement très agréable pour son lieu, son espace, son équipement. On se sens chez soi. Un havre de paix. Accueil très sympathique.

Gordon y Amy han sido muy amables en nuestra estadía en su departamento el cual se encuentra en una zona céntrica de Ámsterdam y a 5 minutos de las principales atracciones. La habitación es tal como se ve en las imágenes y el desayuno excelente!

Wonderful room, lovely view & great amenities. The street this apartment on is beautiful. Gordon was very friendly and accommodating.  We always had delicious breakfast every morning and loved the apartment so much we didn't want to leave!
the apartment is as shown in the pictures. Clean, great breakfast, hot water and wifi. 10 Minutes from main attractions.

This was my first time using Air Bnb and I could not have asked for a better experience.  Their place is perfect, accurately described, and the location is amazing.  The street is full of quirky fun shops and places to eat, right next to a grocery store, and centrally located to the train station and metro.  They were so helpful and kind, providing us with coffee and pastries every morning!  If I ever return to Amsterdam, I will definitely be staying with them!

We have had a great experience at Amy´s Room, they are very nice and helpful. The room is very cosy and everything was very clean. The breakfast was also very taste.
The location is quite good, close to the station and you can reach the heart of Amsterdam in 10 minutes on foot. Also the area is full of live.
I would stay again there if I went again to Amsterdam.
Alex & Elena
We had great time during our stay in Amsterdam and we had everything we needed at Amy and Gordon's BnB. Good location, breakfast, supermarket across the street, provided towels or maps of Amsterdam.
Amy's house est très bien situé pour découvrir la ville. Chambre très simple et bien chauffée. Les propriétaires sont discrets et aimables ( bon accueil à notre arrivée)
Great location to all major attractions.  There is a full grocery store 3 doors down.  Easy to get to from the train station.

super séjour a Amsterdam. la chambre est très pratique et très bien située. sa terrasse est très agréable et calme. ça fait du bien après une longue journée et soirée de trouver la paix dans cet endroit plaisant.
nous n'avions jamais vu autant de velos !!

Shawna is a pleasant host, very welcoming and helpful. The apartment is in an ideal location, minutes from downtown and in a safe, fun neighborhood with great restaurants and charm. The room is unique and accurately matches the descriptions and pictures.

Definitely recommend staying here while visiting Amsterdam! We fit three snugly, but would be perfect for one or two.
My mom and I had a great stay at Shawna's, she was very easy and helpful, and the place is very well located in Amsterdam ! I would recommend the backroom !
Perfect location wish we had of stayed longer. Easy access to everywhere and extremely comfortable. Hosts were very welcoming and friendly and we would recommend to stay! Thanks Shawna and family.
We enjoyed our stay there.  The room was very nice and clean but bright in the mornings. Shawna and her family are the nicest people ever and will help you a lot and answer any questions you have.
Shawna and her family are very nice and friendly people. We really had a good time staying at her place. We definitely can recommend staying at her place. Thank you very much!
We had a great stay in the backroom. Perfect location for Amsterdam-visiters. A beautiful room with a good atmosphere and nice garden.
Excellent location, easy walking distance to everything in Amsterdam city and train station and lovely family! Great size room, everything you need. Wonderful place to visit! Thankyou for having us!

Very nice trip in Amsterdam. The Shawna's room is very well located and it was a really good choice for us.

Thanks to Shawna for her hospitality and welcome !

le studio est tout à fait conforme aux photos, étonnant avec son toit de verre, et  très agréable, en particulier avec le petit jardin attenant que l'on partage avec la famille de Shawna. L'accueil a été aimable. Seul bémol, ce coin du Jordaan, magnifique , est un repaire de WASP friqués et assez peu accueillants pour quiconque s'éloigne un tant soit peu de cette définition. Pour la convivialité,  l'accueil, la gezelligheid , il vaut mieux s'éloigner un peu. Il y a quand même quelques endroits agréables dans l'environnement immédiat, sur Elandsgracht, délicieux resto turc  "Divan" tenu par des gens adorables, sur Prinzengracht, coffee shop très agréable en bord de canal, la Tertulia.

We really enjoyed our stay in the backroom. The backroom is in a very central position for sightseeing in Amsterdam; we walked everywhere and didnt need to use public transport.
We were on a cycle tour and arrived soaked after a hard days cycling in the rain, Shawna kindly provided us with some extra towels. The room is very cosy and pleasant, the bed is comfortable and the glass roof is a cool feature!
We would definately recommend the backroom to other Airbnb travellers!

The Backroom room is a beautiful "indoor-outdoor" space that we booked for a long stay in Amsterdam. I absolutely loved the unique architecture of the space and appreciated the patio which we could access at all times. All was provided in the room: towels, toilet paper, microwave & cutlery. My husband was a little uncomfortable with how difficult it was to keep the floor clean so if you have OCD make sure you bring some house slippers with you!! The host family was easily available when we needed them (to ask for clean sheets or advice on where to go in Amsterdam and (embarrassing as it is to admit) even on how to lock our rented bikes!!). I was even happier to stay at the backroom as Shawna rents it out to help out a local charity.
The location was perfect, in a nice neighborhood with plenty of shops & restaurants near by. Def recommend eating at the Burger Meester!! We also highly recommend renting bikes as it made the entire city easily accessible to us. Took us about 15 mins by bike to get from the backroom to the city center, but I'm sure we weren't taking the shortest route there.
I also want to add that I had over booked by one night but when I told Shawna about my mistake she was extremely helpful & explained how I could change the booking on Air bnb & refunded me the extra night.

We thoroughly enjoyed our time in Amsterdam and had the privacy and accessibility that we were looking for. All in all I would recommend the back room.

The back room was a cozy, romantic stay for my husband and I. It could not be in a more perfect location with restaurants, shops, the tram and things to do all right outside the front door. The room is quiet, clean and big. The private shower and sink is great, along with the ability to do some light cooking. Shawna and her family are so nice and welcoming. She even rented us 2 bikes for a small fee, which she normally doesn't do. We stayed here for 1 week and we would highly recommend it!

We loved to stay at Shawna's flat:lightfull(it's better you put eyes cover) clean and very (Website hidden by Airbnb) very central and next to grocery,shops,and all kind of (Website hidden by Airbnb) a very nice family and she let me make a reservation for the van gogh's museum so we didn't make any cue at all!!!we definetly recommend it!!!
Four of us love Shawna's place.  My 10 year old daughter describes the place is a very cool room. We like the location. Shawna's family is very nice. We would recomment the place to any one.

Me and my wife stayed here on our honeymoon.  Found the place easy thanks to Shawna's instructions.  Great location (walkable to food/center), safe neighborhood, easy check in/out procedure.  We had a great stay.

A nice, rustic, bohemian experience. Very well located! Overall my wife and I liked our stay. The pictures and description are accurate. The only drawback is if you require nice furnishings and a high degree of cleanliness - stay in a hotel. It was a bit like camping in a cabin with a clean bed and bathroom, but you still have a little of that outdoorsy experience mixed in: bright skylights in the morning and an rustic feel overall. Nothing to stop us from enjoying our stay or recommending it to a friend.
We had a great weekend staying in the backroom!

Great location, great hosts and a lovely place. The neighborhood was amazing and we were within walking distance of nearly everything. The family was warm and accommodating. They were a pleasure to interact with. The backroom was quaint as could be and just like the pictures. I would not hesitate to stay there again.

Our one night at Shawna's was perfectly pleasant. The room was quaint, clean and secluded. The only advice I have for people who might stay here is make sure you know how the keys work for the front door. We got back to the room after 10 pm and could not figure out why we couldn't get the key to work. Turns out there are two key holes and the one that we were suppose to use we couldn't see because it was so dark. Luckily Shawna's son was still up and was able to let us in. That's not any kind of a deterrent, just letting future visitors know. Our stay in this simple, lovely room was quite nice and I would recommend it to anyone. The 5 minutes we saw Shawna she was very pleasant.
Couldn't have picked a better location. Shawna and family were very accommodating and the back room had everything you could need. Only shame that our travel plans did didn't allow for a longer stay.

I had a great night in the back room - Shawna's family were welcoming without being intrusive and the room is kitted out with everything you need. A little oasis in the heart of the city. I would definitely recommend.

Myself and two friends traveling on the cheap recently stayed in Shawna's beautiful Back Room and had a blast. Shawna and her husband were incredibly accommodating and friendly despite our later than planned arrival. The back room has everything you need in a respite from busy sight-seeing days. The back garden is great for outdoor chill time and I was actually surprised at how quiet it is at night. I felt like I was in a little cabin in the woods and not in the middle of a busy neighborhood.  What you see in photos is exactly what You get. Our only complaint might be that the air mattress (for one of the three of us sharing the space) needed to be re-inflated in the middle of the night both nights, so the room is probably best suited for 2 guests. Regardless, thank you so much, Shawna! We had a great time.
Very nice place, ideally located!

The backroom is a simple, lovely place to come home to after a day of wandering this beautiful city. Shawna and her family are warm and gracious, and the neighborhood is full of delicious places to eat, drink, and be merry. Also, the work you are supporting by staying here is well worth supporting, so you can feel good while you're feeling cozy.

We had a good time in Amsterdam. The location was great. Near the bus station and within walking distance of most of Amsterdam. The bed was not very comfortable but for the price we welt like we had a good experience.
Our stay at Gordon and Amys house was fantastic! The breakfast and the room was incredible! I feel like home.

Nice houseboat. Two floors + sunroof. One bedroom is large enough, another - a bit small for two persons.

A bit far from center, but Harry provided bikes for us, so it wasn't a problem.

New experience.

Overall impression - 4+/5

Harry and Anna's boathouse is absolutely wonderful! It is designed perfectly - we were 4 people and yet there was more than enough space. The decor and facilities were lovely - made you feel right at home. I have no words about the setting which was idylic to say the least - completely in touch with nature yet very close to the center of Amsterdam (about 10-12 minutes by tram, which is about a 5 minutes walk from the house. The tram stops along all the points of interests such as museums, shopping, etc. so basically you can hop on and off. Two tram lines are perfect for this - 16 and 24. You can also take these from Central Station directly to the house and then it is a 5 minute walk to the house.)). It is a perfect place to relax and to visit the city at the same time. We are looking forward to coing back for a longer stay soon!
Harry and Anna were perfect hosts, lovely to talk to and very professional about how they run this property. Bravo!
(4 bikes also come with this property which is a great touch- also the location is perfect for running. There are no supermarkets in very close walking distance from what I saw, but it is easy to get to quickly get to one by bike and of course all sorts of restaurants deliver).

Wir verbrachten leider nur 2 Nächte auf dem Hausboot und haben uns dort sehr wohl gefühlt. Harry ist ein sehr freundlicher Gastgeber, er wohnt direkt nebenan, so dass man jederzeit schnell Kontakt hätte haben können. Man wohnt wie in einem kleinen Dorf, mit dem Rad nur 10 Minuten vom Zentrum entfernt. Wir hatten eine sehr schöne Zeit und möchten gern wiederkommen.
Richard und Ludwiga

Sehr schönes Zimmer! Eher für die Sommermonate geeignet als für den kalten Winter. kleiner Freisitz vor dem Zimmer, dass sonst wohl als Galerie oder Malzimmer benutzt wird. Die Gastgeber sind nett und hilfsbereit ohne dabei aufdringlich zu wirken. Da man nicht direkt mit den Gastgebern Wand an Wand in einem Haus wohnt, hat man die nötige Privatsphäre, die man bei einem Kurzurlaub in Amsterdam benötigt.

Das Bad mit Dusche ist etwas gewöhnungsbedürftig, weil die Dusche weder Kabine noch Vorhang hat und somit der kleine Raum samt Klo beim Duschen geflutet wird :-)

Die Lage ist bombastisch, da man direkt vor der Prinsengracht wohnt. Zwei häuser weiter ist ein Albert Heijn und jede Menge Restaurants und Imbisse, sowie Coffeeshops. Man ist in 2 Minuten mitten in der Stadt und in einer Minute an der Straßenbahnhaltestelle. Alles in allem sehr schön und im Sommer kommen wir sehr gern wieder.

Danke für Eure Gastfreundschaft!

Steffi & Lukasz

This place is awesome. Who wouldn't want to stay on a houseboat? The interior is more or less impeccable (looks fairly new), and accommodated three of us quite comfortably. It's a little ways from the city center, but with the bikes that were provided, it was very easy to get there (riding through the city on bikes was actually one of the highlights of my trip...given how bike-friendly Amsterdam is, I would consider that a must). If bikes aren't your thing, it's also right next to a tram stop (less than 10 minute walk). Harry was very nice and accommodating (and funny, not surprisingly) - he took the time to walk us through everything, and provided quite a bit in the way of recommendations for restaurants, things to check out, etc. Overall great experience, would highly recommend.

We stayed for one night at this gorgeous location. It is easy to find by car and bus- and tram-station aren't far away. Nevertheless it is located in a very calm area. The houseboat looks brandnew and was very clean. Very friendly hosts!
We hope, we will be able to return to this nice place and have a longer stay!

Me and two friends stayed for four nights in this amazing houseboat, which is easily big enough for four. It's very modern with some quaint (Website hidden by Airbnb) in a quiet, relaxing area which is still close enough to central Amsterdam. The area is near other sites you might otherwise miss. We took the bikes that come with the property to Amsterdam Forest, which is only about 10 minutes away.

The nearest shops aren't too far away, around a 15 minute walk. But there is a petrol station near the stadium for basics and snacks. There are good transport connections in the area, the tram, buses, and Amsterdam Zuid station is about a ten minute walk.

Harry was very friendly and welcoming, and I'd stay here again!

Harry and Anna were lovely. Harry picked us up when we came in ( we became a little lost from the airport). The houseboat is beautiful and clean. Everything we needed. Short walk to tram or bus. We actually rode the bikes downtown one day.
There were four adults and two small children in the boat and we were quite comfortable.
Great hosts... thank you Harry and Anna for a wonderful stay!

We really enjoyed the houseboat and Amsterdam is an amazing city! We'll come back for sure and will recommend it to friends.
Thanks to Harry & Anna for their kindness and hospitality.

We were with my wife to Amsterdam like a first step of a long anniversary journey. Harry and Anna were are wonderful persons.
The value proposal of the place is exactly as the airbnb web page appears. The interior is impeccable and looks (Website hidden by Airbnb) very close to Amsterdam Downtown. You have several transportation alternatives. Bike, Tram, Bus, or even Taxi (is not necessary).
For example the bike route thru the neighborhood is amazing. Thanks Harry and Anna
It was a very nice stay. Harry was always helpful and the house boat is the perfect stay for Amsterdam!

Harry and Anna were super helpful, giving us tips on how to get to their lovely house boat and were flexible with meeting us with the keys.  The house boat is BEAUTIFUL! Definitely added to the Amsterdam expeience!
it vas very different for us. thank you for everything

Fabulous stay in this spacious immaculate houseboat. Anna was a super host and very accommadating. I have already referred many people and would love to stay here again. Great people - great place. Thanks Anna

A beautiful houseboat, exactly as the photos show. The 16 & 24 trams go right into the centre of Amsterdam or you can cycle for 15 minutes on the bikes provided. Have recommended it to my parents who are going to visit in autumn and would also recommend it to anyone else.

Harry & Anna weren't there when we stayed but Harry's parents were and they were very helpful and accommodating.

We loved Harry and Anna's houseboat! It was very beautiful and such a different experience. So much better than staying at a hotel. It was very close to town, only a 10 minute bike ride. The bikes were an added bonus. Would recommend this place to everyone!

The first thing you need to know is that the first photo you see of the home is NOT the one you will be renting. That one is the owners. You will not be sitting out on that lovely deck overlooking the canal. You will be in the unit behind that with a view of the home next door. There is a deck on top, but it is not a charming deck like the one pictured. Otherwise, the place was clean and attractive and no other complaints. The owner's dad checked us in, helped us find the cheap parking, and was very nice. We appreciated the bikes.

Completely satisfied. All listed amenities were precisely provided. Gordon is really nice guy and he specially came downstairs to welcome us. Neighborhood was live and its in city center. Central station is just 10 mins walk or in bus/tram is just 2 mins. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and I would recommend everybody to book this room without any hesitation.

Mi estadía en la habitación fue (Website hidden by Airbnb) tuvimos la oportunidad de conocer a Amy pero sí a Gordon. El fue muy acogedor y gentil con nosotras.
Llegamos un poco más tarde de lo previsto por demoras en los vuelos y no tuvo ningún problema. Siempre respondieron nuestros mensajes a tiempo y se mostraron muy atentos a nuestros pedidos.
Los desayunos eran maravillosos y todos los días limpiaban el cuarto. La ubicación es fantástica y la habitación super cómoda. El tener un microondas y heladera facilita muchas cosas! Sin dudas volvería ,fue una experiencia maravillosa!

Appartement très bien situé afin de pouvoir découvrir la ville à pied ou en transport en commun. À 10 min de la gare centrale.
Accueil très chaleureux avec un hôte qui a su être présent.
La chambre était propre avec un petit déjeuner complet.

Super séjour chez Amy et Gordon!
L'appartement est au cœur de Amsterdam donc tout peut être fait a pied. Et le petit déjeuner fourni par les hôtes est juste parfait: fruits, viennoiseries, jus d'orange, lait...
Nous nous somme régalés. Merci a vous!
Rémi et Nina

We had a great stay at gordon and amy's house. We rented the blue room but gordon gave us a biggest one because it was empty, that was very kind. The room is big and has a very good bed. They leave you a great breakfast for every morning (milk, juice, pastries, fruit, yougurt, coffee, tea). The room is very good located, a walking distance from every turistic place. I definetly recomend this room!!
Everything was very good.  The place is amazing giving a typical Amsterdam experience.  Walking distance to central station and hop-on-hop-off bus stop.

Todo tal cual lo describen. El hospedaje fue muy cómodo y limpio. Los articulos para el deaayuno muy buenos y ricos. La ubicación excelente a cuadras de la estación central y del centro.. muy recomendable

El recibimiento fue muy amable. El hospedaje es muy cómodo y lindo. Está en una ubicación privilegiada y muy bonita de la ciudad. Para el desayuno nos daban servicio de café, té, jugo de naranja y comida. les agradecemos mucho.

Nuestra estadía en Gordón and am y fue excelente, Gordón nos estaba esperando cuando llegamos y nos mostró como funcionaba todo. El desayuno varía todos los días y es rico. El barrio nos encanto, es fácil de ubicarse y llegamos a los puntos turísticos caminando. Todo es como se describe en el anuncio, sin duda volveríamos a elegirlo.

We had a great time at Gordon and Amy's the listing was as specified. Gordon was present on our arrival and he even took the pain to arrange some croissants and muffins for us and even refilled them the following morning. I would definitely reccomend this listing.
Thank you again for all your assistance Gordon and Amy!!!
Much appreciated.
Pramod
Perfect for our needs. Clean, quiet, great neighborhood, and Gordon was as accommodating as could be.
Very great stay. Clean room with bread, fruit, milk, tea and coffee everyday. Not far from the Amsterdam Central station.You can find many coffee shop nearby where you can take weed and space cake.
This room is exactly same as picture and Gordon was very friendly. There are cleaning everyday and you will have everything that you need.

We are a couple in early 40s and we stayed in amys for 3 nights April 2016. Positives include location which is a very nice area with lovely shops and gourmet delis bars restaurants etc very central and 10 minutes walk to central train station. Good value for money. Warm. Clean. Wifi. However accommodation is basic.
Great location, Gordon was very welcoming and the little extras in the room were lovely
Clean room. Nearby the center. Shower clogged a little. Clean toilet. Nice host. Cleaning everyday. We had free delicious muffins:)
The host canceled this reservation 114 days before arrival. This is an automated posting.

感謝Gordon!人真的非常好!還為我們準備了很多美味的食物~
我們覺得非常幸運可以來到這裡跟住在這區!非常推薦!

Very great stay. Gordon was very friendly
Very nice room ,clean,comfortable.
There are bread, fruit, milk, tea and coffee everyday.
Not far from the Amsterdam Central station.

We had a great experience! Gordon provided us with daily breakfast, and the room has everything you may need.

Very good location, just 10 minutes away from Central Station.

This place was a great find. Not too far from the center of town and walkable from the central station. Room was nice with a view of the street below. Loud during the day but fine at night. Felt like a great Amsterdam experience. There is one very steep flight of stairs to go up and the bed is hard, but otherwise we had a great stay and would recommend this. They even provided pastries and other nice items.
Gordon was the perfect host.  He was very available when I needed him, but not at all intrusive.  Great location.  Just didn't have enough time.

My partner and I had a great stay with Gordon and Amy. Our flight arrived early and we were able to check into the apartment early which was excellent. The apartment is in the perfect location. We were able to walk to all the spots we wanted to go. The street the apartment is on has plenty of shops, cafes, supermarkets etc. Gordon was really friendly and we knew he was just upstairs if we needed anything. The pastries, yoghurt and fruit were a really nice extra touch as well. We will definitely recommend the apartment to friends.
Gordon and Amy's place was fantastic. Clean, comfortable, and very convenient location. Anywhere that we wanted to go was within walking distance. Highly recommended!

The room was /had all that we needed, it was perfect for our short stay. We easily found our way from the central train station and just around the corner from the room were beautiful canals to walk along. Breakfast was good too! Gordon was very friendly and tild us all we needed to know wheb we arrived

Tuvimos una excelente estadía!
Nos recibió Gordon en el horario acordado! La habitación es tal cual se muestra en las fotos. Muy cómoda y amplia. El baño es compartido pero muy cómodo!
La ubicación es excelente!

Amy and Gordon were great hosts. The room has everything you need plus a lovely view of the traditional buildings on the street. Every day Amy and Gordon will tidy your room and leave danish, yoghurt orange juice and milk for you. We loved out tay here and would definitley stay here again.

Gordon and Amy contacted us well ahead of time to make arrangements for our arrival. While we didn't get to meet Amy, Gordon was there to greet us at their home. It was easy to find from the station and is in a great location as we found it easy to walk almost everywhere! The room was a nice size and it was a bonus to have a sink and mini fridge in the room with us. They were very kind to provide breakfast essentials and would come in and replace whatever was eaten as the days went by. The bathroom and shower were clean as well. We would certainly stay here again.

My husband and I stayed in the the Backroom for just one night but Shawna was super helpful and the apartment looked just like the pictures. Location was great, very central and easy to get around sightseeing. We would definitely stay there again
friendly !
Very differrent  and cute place within the city center and walking distance of everything.  Me and my husband really liked it.

the backroom is located in a beautiful and very central area.
the host is nice, the room had everything we needed. even some basic but delicious things to eat.
although it was very cold in amsterdam during our stay and the backroom is not perfectly isolated, the heating was still sufficient to make the room the warm cosy place we expected.
highly recommended!!
Great room and very smooth, professional organisation. Location is ideal and room was very private.

We had a lovely stay in Amsterdam! The place was just perfect and the added touches such as the breakfast, towels and maps really made it a pleasant stay. Location was quiet and central, perfect for exploring the city.

We had a wonderful time staying at the blue room. Gordon welcomed us and explain us everything. The room was cozy with a very nice view of the street but also really quiet at night. We had plenty of things for breakfast. Thank you!

Staying with Gordon and Amy was an absolute pleasure.  Arrival and check in was super easy.  Gordon was very kind in explaining the city and helped make our time in Amsterdam incredible.  Highly recommend!

A very nice place to stay! We spent 10 days in Amsterdam with the houseboat as our platform and we enjoyed the quietness of the neighborhood along with the very spacious and comfortable houseboat. So nice to wake up and see the water everyday, and so nice to sit on the roof terrace at night. Anna and Harry are such kind people who make sure that everything concerning your stay in the houseboat is as it should be. The bicycles included made it so easy to explore the city and therefore we enjoyed it even more! Dank u woll!
Great room with a lot of charm in a nice location and very central.  Shawna and her family were friendly and helpful.  Highly recommended.
Great host, very helpful and accomodating,  will return the next time we are in Amsterdam.

The room is great and we had a fantastic week-end. Also, it was an incredible experience to sleep under a glas roof while it rained outside. Thank you very much for letting us stay at your house, even though we didn't get to know our host.

lamentablemente no tuvimos una buena experiencia. Cuando llegamos Shawna no estaba y sus hijos fueron muy groseros con nosotras. La habitación y el baño estaban sucios, daba la impresión que otros huéspedes se habían retirado unos momentos antes de nosotras llegar. En la sábanas hasta había migas de pan. Nos quedamos lo mínimo indispensable. Despúes ella llegó, fue muy simpática y nos contó que tuvo un día terrible. Cuando volvimos después del almuerzo estaba todo más limpio pero no nos sentimos cómodas. Y a pesar de que al día de nuestra partida de Amsterdam los trenes hacia Paris estaban de huelga, ni pensamos en volver y nos fuimos a un hotel para esperar hasta las 6 de la mañana para tomar el tren a Paris. Qué pena!!

If location is top of your priority list, then this place will be very well-suited to you. Elandsgracht is a stone's throw away from the nine streets, and it is very easy to walk to all of the main Amsterdam attractions from the accommodation. There is a very nice Thai restaurant literally next door, a well-stocked supermarket 50 meters up the road, and some really good burgers at Burgermeester, 2~3 minutes down the road in the opposite direction. It was also very easy to get to the house via tram number 17, which takes you directly from Amsterdam Central Station. So all in all, location definitely gets five stars. The hosts were friendly and easily accommodating when we changed our reservation dates, which was much appreciated on our part. Also, when we arrived, the house had no water, although this was through no fault of their own - the next door neighbour's building alterations had unexpectedly severed the water pipes. The hosts promptly called a plumber, and rectified the problem as quickly as they could, with no hassle to us.

The Backroom is a cosy, charmingly rustic space, and I thoroughly enjoyed it.  The location, at the southern end of Jordaan, is absolutely perfect; I was able to walk easily through the 9 streets, all the way down to the city center, and also up through Jordaan.  The street on which the house is located is also super convenient -- lots of stores and restaurants, everything you need right outside the front door, easy tram access, and a direct bus to the airport!   And Shawna and her family are lovely, welcoming people who made my stay even more enjoyable than it would have been anyway.

Our stay in Harry & Anna's houseboat was very nice. It was very quiet at night so made for easy sleeping. We enjoyed riding the bicycles that they included with the rental. It was a nice way to see the city, though it took a little bit of learning to figure out how to maneuver all of the other bicycle, scooter, tram, and car traffic. The houseboat was very clean and spacious. We enjoyed relaxing on the rooftop deck and watching boats pass by in the channel near where the houseboat is located. It was also nice to be able to cook our own breakfast in the houseboat's kitchen so we didn't need to find a restaurant in the mornings. Anna also did us a favor by arranging for a taxi to pick us up to take us to the airport when we needed to leave Amsterdam since our phones were not always working properly while we were in Europe. She even sent her parents with a note to inform us she had made the arrangements since we were not likely to see her that evening. She also assisted in our comfort by providing a fan to use while we slept since we are used to using one. Riding bicycles or taking the tram to the city center or other Amsterdam neighborhoods was easy to figure out. We would definitely recommend staying at their houseboat to others.
mooie accommodatie, prima sanitair en degelijke fietsen.

The house is really nice and confortable, the area is super quiet and relaxing, neighbours are so lovely and friendly you can't believe it. Harry and Anna are great hosts, very nice, polite and helpful. We had a great time in Amsterdam, thanks to all the beautiful people we met.

Unfortunately for us, our taxi driver dropped us at the wrong end of Jachtshavenweg, despite me giving him a piece of paper with Harry's directions on it. Anyway after an hour of dragging suitcases along the streets and bike paths we found the Houseboat. Harry & Anna welcomed us with a cold drink and snack. The houseboat is quite spacious and was very comfortable for the three of us. We enjoyed bike riding in the Forest but preferred to use trams to get into the city. Harry was very helpful with directions for the local grocery store, Albert Heijn and where to catch public transport.
We really enjoyed the novelty of staying on a houseboat.
Thank you Harry & Anna.
Although the house was a little difficult to find, it was absolutely beautiful and we wish we had stayed there longer!  The use of complementary bikes was also very nice.
Thank you for the great stay at your wonderful houseboat

My boyfriend, two friends of us and I, spent 4 nights at Annas and Harrys gorgeous houseboat.
Even it rains a lot during our stay in Amsterdam our holiday was not a flop, because of our great accommodation. The houseboat was clean and cozy and we used the kitchen to cook a lot of delicious meals. Also we had so much fun cruising around in Amsterdam with the bikes. Therefore we used the bus to get to the Jachtshavenweg and had no problems to find the pier. The area was really nice and quiet and Anna gave us a warm welcome.

We can recommend Annas and Harrys place to everyone who likes to have a memorable time in Amsterdam and we would always stay again at the houseboat!

This was an amazing base for our short stay in Amsterdam. Very relaxed atmosphere, lovely house and so convenient having the bikes. Harry gave us a great welcome. Can't recommend staying here highly enough.
All you can say when you arrive is Wow!  Really cool houseboat.  Extremely good value for Amsterdam.  I would very highly recommend it.  Great neighborhood and easy access to public transportation.

We loved the houseboat, and Harry was very helpful. We wish we could of stayed longer. We really enjoyed using the bikes to go explore the beautiful city, it is very generous of Harry to include them. Beware, however, I did have a peeping Tom! Turned out it was a gorgeous white swan that floats around with his duck buddies shaking the neighborhood down for goodies! He floated right up to the bedroom window. How cool is that? Thanks for everything, Harry!
Prima verblijf, schoon,netjes, alles naar wens, zeer geschikt voor een weekendje Amsterdam.Helaas waren wij er maar kort maar we zullen zeker terugkomen.
Great place in a nice neighborhood!  The bike were awesome to discover the city ans the parks. The houseboat is clean and confortable.  Harry and Anna are really welcoming. Great place for a family.

Mooie nieuwe woonark, gezellig ingericht,gedeeld met eigenaar maar volledig privacy, eigen ingang, niet gehorig.
Met de bijbehorende fietsen fiets je in 5 minuten het Vondelpark in, vandaar fiets je door het langgerekte park heel leuk naar het centrum. Uitchecken is officieel al om 10.00 uur maar dat konden we i.v.m. bruiloftsfeest op de avond ervoor in overleg aanpassen naar 11.00 uur waarvoor dank!
Beddengoed, handdoeken, theedoek, zeep op wastafels, koffiepads, theezakjes, afwasmiddel: alles was er.
We had an amazing Time. Very clean, gorgeous place!

Une excellente façon de découvrir Amsterdam !

Nous sommes venus chez Harry et Anna pendant 4 jours début octobre ( 2 couples sans enfants) et sommes ravis du séjour que nous avons passé.

La "maison" est neuve, propre, au calme et très bien équipée : un beau séjour avec cuisine équipée (four, plaques de cuisson , lave vaisselles et réfrigérateur), des toilettes au niveau du hall d'entrée, 2 chambres avec des rangements au niveau inférieur et une belle salle de bains avec douche à l'italienne et grande baignoire et un autre toilette.
Le lieu est très mignon et nous avons eu la surprise d'avoir des visiteurs (cygnes et canards) aux fenêtre des chambres et de la salle de bains !!

Le lieu est parfait pour se reposer après une journée ( et soirée) agitée en ville.

Harry est un hôte agréable, prévenant (merci encore pour les bières !) et n'hésite pas a prendre du temps pour discuter ou conseiller.

Les vélos fournis par Harry et Anna sont juste indispensables pour découvrir la ville comme un vrai amstellodamois, il faudra compter une dizaine de minutes pour arriver dans le quartier des musées et une vingtaine pour arriver sur la place duDam

Pour y arriver, il ne faut pas hésiter à suivre les conseils d'Harry a la lettre et d'utiliser (Hidden by Airbnb) Maps ;)

Une expérience que nous referons avec enfants, c'est sur !

The accommodation was really nice, all well equipped and in a really good location close to the city centre. We also liked the possibility of using Harry&Anna's Bikes.
They made us feel very welcome and made the stay even more enjoyable.
Perfect Location!!Great host!Boat was beautiful!Hopefully we will come again next time without rain so we can enjoy the rooftop!Thank you

It's a nice experience to stay in the cozy boat house, the location is every good just behind the sport part, you can enjoy the greens and fresh air, with a very quiet neighborhood. The room is very cozy and clean, the everything we may need has been carefully prepared. Nice experience to stay there. Harry is also quite a nice and kind guy, just like the pic it looks.

We only stayed for one night, but it was great. The boat is very comfortable, the bikes for the ride into the city a great help and Harry & Anna were very relaying. Perfect for families.
We come back someday - if that weather is a little warmer.
Lars

This is an amazing place. The location is perfect. There is a great little neighborhood grocery store, great neighborhood restaurants, bikes to make getting around quick and easy and the space is wonderful. It is spotless and efficient. And an easy bike ride or bus ride to the heart of the city.

Harry and Anna'a Houseboat is magnificent. While it's not in a central Amsterdam location, it's so easy to get to from Schiphol and having the bikes makes it easy to get anywhere.

I can't recommend the houseboat or the setting enough. Excellent value for money and did absolutely everything it said on the tin.
Gorgeous houseboat in a great area. Friendly and uncomplicated owner. Don't miss the opportunity to explore the city with the bikes you rent with the house. Amsterdam at its best!

the houseboat is magnificent, in a quit and relaxing city area. it isn't far from city centre. i reccomend to use the bike (that are rent whit the house). the hause really has everything tou need!
the owner is so nice and friendly...
i can't reccomend to spend some days in Amsterdam, in houseboat Nova.
Arianna

Een zeer fijne locatie met vele mogelijkheden.
Rustige omgeving vlakbij een bos en sportaccomodaties. En met de fiets ben je op een kwartiertje in het historische centrum. Er zijn in de buurt verschillende goede alternatieven voor veilig parkeren tegen een lage prijs.
Alle voorzieningen voor een comfortabel verblijf zijn in de woonboot aanwezig. En het verblijf begon met een vriendelijke ontvangst en heldere afspraken met de verhuurders, die ook in de voorafgaande afspraken heel correct en accuraat waren.
Warm aanbevolen.

Erg volledig, comfortabel & modern uitgeruste boot met een zeer vriendelijke & behulpzame eigenaar! Afstand tot Amsterdam centrum valt goed mee per fiets (ong. 10 min). In tegenstelling tot wat de foto doet vermoeden, bevindt het terras voor het verhuurde deel van de boot zich wel op het dak van de boot en niet op het niveau van de woonruimte (vermoedelijk het terras van de eigenaar). Alleszins zeer aanbevelenswaardig en voor ons zeker voor herhaling vatbaar!

Very nice houseboat we stayed at. Only problem was that it was about a 30 to 40 min trip into the center of the city. Great place to stay but if you wanted to plan anything you had to allow yourself 30 to 40 mins to get anywhere as there wasn't too much as far as food or places to shop near by. Overall it was a great place to stay. It was in a nice quite neighborhood away from all the hustle and bustle. The place was extremely clean nice and modern. Very Ikea decorated.

The Con's -
Bedroom was very tight and small not much space to move around in. The bathroom had a very very nice tub but it wasn't really usable. Seems like the tub was just for looks as the water pressure was so weak that it would take forever to fill up. And by the time it was full the water would be cold.

Very weak water pressure. But I think some of the down side is that it's an eco friendly house.

Anyway very nice place

The Free Wifi Speeds Were excellent best ever 50 megs down and almost 5 up.. nice

Now as far as price we noticed that there are a few other houseboats in the area that my have a better value but overall not to take away fro this place very nice

Harry was great and answered all of our questions. I would differently recommend this a a good place. The view wasn't all that we saw the side of the houseboat next to us. If the weather was good we would have gone to the rooftop deck which was really nice when we checked it out.

We had an amazing break in this gorgeous Houseboat.. The bicycles  were amazing too..we went all around the nearby park! Easy to get to, just grab a 16 or 24 tram and it's then a quick 5 minute walk to the houseboat. Would highly recommend it. Comfortable beds & gorgeous bathroom! I would definitely go back.

I had an amazing time in the Blue Room. Reallt glad Amy and Gordon provide breakfast and they were delicious especially when we were at the end of our trip and budget was tight. I really enjoyed my two nights there and found it extremely easy to sleep.

Gordon was a great host! I recommend this apartment. They give is everyday fruit, pastries, yogurt, milk, and orange juice. Clean towels each day. They give us a fan and he show us where to buy and to take a coffee. You can find also tourist guides books. Thanks for everything!
Gordon fue un excelente anfitrión. Super recomiendo su departamento. Nos dio cada día yogur, leche, fruta, facturas, café, tes, jugo de naranja. Hay microondas, cafetera y para eléctrica. Hay que subir un piso por escalera pero al subir nos ayudó. Cambian las toallas todos los días. Nos dejó guías de turismo y recorrió parate del barrio con nosotras. Muy limpio y prolijo. Gracias por todo!

Excellent location, near to The Central station. Very beautiful street views from the room ❤️ Gordon was lovely and friendly! You will have everything prepared by him - towel, shower gel, shampoo, banana, milk and yoghurt !

We spent 3 nights at Gordon & Amy's and would totally recommend the blue room to anyone. Easy to find location, 5-10min walk from central station and central to everything. Great communication, Gordon was there to greet us at the specified time and was very friendly, made us feel at home straight away. The room was spotless clean and came with a fridge and microwave, which was very handy. Breakfast essentials were topped up and changed daily. We couldn't fault anything about staying here. Thank you for having us. Lindsay & Shane

Shawna und ihre Familie waren sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Ich war auf der Suche nach einem Apartment in Amsterdam und Shawna und ihr Mann haben mich perfekt unterstützt. Dies war meine erste AirBnB Erfahrung und ich habe mich sehr wohl und willkommen gefühlt. Das Bett ist ein Traum! Die Lage ist super und direkt nebenan gibt es ein super Thai-Restaurant. Wenn ihr in Amsterdam übernachten wollt solltet Ihr das Hinterzimmer von Shawna genießen!

The room is in a great location and the furniture is cute, but it was not so clean and maybe it'd be better for 2 people than 4 as we were. It was quite cold outside, so we manage with two heaters, but still it didn't get exactly warm, especially the toilet which is kind of external. The big problem that we had was the second air-mattress. We came back late in the night and it was deflated and folded in the middle of the room. We inflated it (easily, it was electric) and we found out it had a huge hole. We tried to fix it with some scotch tape but (obviously) it didn't work so well, so we had to wake up several times in the middle of the night to inflate it again and again. So uncomfortable; we didn't sleep well at all.

Great location. Jordaan is beautiful and packed with great little shops and restaurants. The backroom is cosy, welcoming and has everything that you need for an enjoyable stay. I would definitely consider staying here again on a return visit to Amsterdam.

I was delighted with my stay in The Backroom. The room is a gem, It's private, cosy, and in an excellent location in a beautiful and historic part of Amsterdam. I mostly kept to myself but my hosts were very courteous and helpful anytime I had a question or needed any assistance.
A++ would stay again!
Very charming place in the Jordan area. Everything was perfect. Very friendly host. Nothing to complain about. Tank you so much!
Shawna was a very nice hostess, and the appartment is very well located. The room is quiet and isolated from the rest of the house, equiped with everything needed. I definitely recommend it.

The backroom is in a great location, in a more quiet neighborhood, but close to Leidsplein and the city center, and there are a few places around the house, like some restaurants and a supermarket. Although it is inside a family house, it has everything you need during your stay. Shawna and her family were very helpful before and during our stay. Everything is clean, the towels, the sheets, the bathroom, and there is a great camp feeling to it, really cozy. There are two heaters in the room, so no need to worry about the cold.
Some minor things that we noticed, but didn't spoil our stay at all: the room is a bit dark at night, and too bright in the morning (but for that, they provide some eyepatches - which we didn't use for hygienic reasons). But if you want to wake up early (our case), it is a good thing. Also, we didn't use the heating plate (stove), because there is only one avaiable, so it would be a bit hard to cook something (we bought some frozen food which we heated in the microwave). Another thing that happened was the internet signal, which wasn't working in our room, but in the house, yes. So, every time we wanted to go online, we needed to go inside the house.
Beside these minor problems, we had a great time in the backroom, good location, good cleanness, nice people, great value for what you pay. We would surely stay there again!

Всем привет!  Данное жилье является пристройкой к основному дому, проходите насквозь через первый этаж и попадаете в маленький внутренний дворик, пересекаете дворик и вы на месте. Из плюсов: расположение (до Дам 20 мин. пешком), стеклянная крыша (дождь барабанит не сильно, свет спать не мешает), комната просторная. Из минусов: wi-fi берет только в хозяйском доме, в комнате он не работает; три дня боялись включить батарею на максимум, было ощущение, что газовая горелка спалит комнату, но окончательно замерзнув (гостили в декабре) решились и согрелись; очень маленький и хододный душ, вода иногда вытекает через порог в комнату. Вывод: это был наш первый опыт размещения не в гостиничном номере, поэтому многое казалось непривычным, но если для вас жить в чужом доме дело привычное, то вам понравится предлагаемая комната.

The Backroom at Shawna's place was an incredible place to stay, me and my friend Shane loved it and would definitely stay here again if we ever come back to Amsterdam. The location is fantastic, really central and well placed for wandering through canals to galleries, theatres, bars.

The room is perfectly furnished - a beautiful cosy hideaway with everything you need to cook or if you want to make coffee then go exploring as we did. The rain on the glass roof is soothing, the shower is hot and lovely.

We had invigorating, inspiring conversations with Shawna (and members of her family we met) about her not for profit work at Reckoning - your stay here subsidises their brilliant projects so invest wiseley.

Un très bon séjour. L'accueil étai chaleureux malgré notre arrivée tardive, la chambre calme, bien placée, pleine de charmes.
Les indications pour trouver l'appartement son très efficaces.
Je n'hésiterai pas à y retourner si je retourne à Amsterdam!

Shawna and her family were very friendly. We didn't have much time with them as we were out visiting the sights.  The temperature was -5 to -7 and the glass roof was beautiful to see the snow falling on it. The house was close to everything so was easy to get to all the attractions.

Harry and Anna's houseboat was super awesome.  The place itself is very modern and cozy and offers an excellent experience for Amsterdam.  We visited at the end of November, and while the weather was a little cold and rainy, it was still very convenient to get around with the bicycles they provided and the train station nearby.  The houseboat also provided a lot of nice touches to make the say comfortable, including coffee and tea and umbrellas!!!  As other reviewers and Harry have mentioned, taxi drivers get a little confused by the address.  One taxi driver said that it is best to specify that the address is near the olympic stadium.  We had  a great visit and look forward to our next trip.
Great place!  Highly recommend.
The houseboat was awesome!  We enjoyed our stay and Harry was so nice to show us around! Hope to see you Harry when you travel to the San Francisco area!

Formidable !
L'appartement est très bien. Un très léger roulis vous rappelle que vous êtes bien dans un house-boat.
L'appartement est très lumineux et de tout confort.
Côté situation, il faut être prêt à pédaler un peu (15 mn pour rejoindre le centre - mais c'est un peu le charme d'Amsterdam et ça vaut le coup justement de s'éloigner du centre pour découvrir tous les visages de la ville !
N'hésitez pas à passer votre séjour ici !
Jérome / France

Very beautiful and quiet place.
I enjoyed with my family.
Thank you guys!!!

We had a great weekend in Amsterdam thanks to Harry and Anna's beautiful houseboat and the great bikes that they lent us as part of the rental. Cycling into town was fun and the bathroom was splendid!

If you like cycling and want a place a bit further away from the centre then this place is perfect.
Nice house boat with everything needed. Cosy and warm. Bikes were handy :-)
The Houseboat with bikes are the best way to visit Amsterdam. This place is very clean and we had a good welcoming. Everything was perfect.

Shawna and her husband were friendly and helpful. The room was clean and unique. Although there were two electric heaters, the room wasn't very warm. Luckily there were extra blankets. So no complaints.
Very cosy and romantic room, located in a charming neighborhood. Thank you Shawna !
Very conveniently located, quiet, friendly atmosphere

We had an awesome weekend in Amsterdam and the place of Shawna was a big reason for that.
It is a romantic little room with a perfect location to visit the city by walking around.
Shawna and her family were friendly and helpful and it was a pleasure to stay at their place.
Thanks a lot!
Thank you very much, it was wonderful in the backroom! Nice family, great room, wonderful city! We'd love to come back!
back room is lovely，simple but enjoy romantic glass roof. especialy for young couple.

Although we just stayed a single night, we were welcomed in a very warm and kind way. The place is a bit weird (in a very positive way) and is perfectly fitting for two persons. All was prepared well and also during cold winter days the room was warm enough to sleep fine.

Thanks for the hospitality. We had a great time.
Room is nice, private and quiet  and very central.
We had a lovely stay in the backroom. A grate location and a comfy bed. It was pretty cold when we were there and the room was comfortable, even with the glass roof.

Nice place to stay in Amsterdam, near city center but far enough to relax and appreciate city life far from tourism and noise! There is everything we need in the street (grossery store, restaurants...)
The backroom is very nice, and shawna and her family was helpfull when we needed something. I recommand the backroom for every couples who want a romantic trip in amsterdam.
Very nice location, very friendly familiy! Thank you very much, Shawna!
Thanks Anna & Harry! Very nice & comfortable houseboat! We enjoyed stay here. I hope, see u again ;)

The place is such a nice place! Harry and Anna were so welcoming and hospitable, they even helped  us out to get around. I can't thank them enough for all their help. High recommend this place if your planning to have a short stay in amsterdam! Thank you Harry and Anna for having us!

Very comfortable place, huge living area, all clean, neat, tidy and IKEA!  Great location if you want to see more of Amsterdam than just the centre, especially the nearby lakes and parks.  The bikes are ideal to get around, but use the canal path and Vondelpark, not the big road.  Harry & Anna friendly and helpful, couldn't have been better.  We were there in a wet February, but in nice weather it would have been wonderful.  Don't expect special eating places nearby, but there's a handy garage shop for basics 3min by bike, and good supermarkets 6min. by bike.
Lovely place to stay. Not in the centre so you can enjoy quite night from tourist. Bus take about 10-15 min to train station. Kitchen with all equipment if you decide to cook a dinner.

Very nice week-end in the spacious , modern and comfortable house boat.
Sweet awake with swan song.Lovely!
Awesome everything. Even thou i was working my whole stay in Amsterdam, the houseboat was a great place to live in. Service was excellent.

Le house boat d'Anna et Harry est design, tout neuf, très propre, très fonctionnel, parfait!
Il est à 1/2 h à vélo du centre ville, avec des pistes cyclables partout. Tout se fait à bicyclette, c'est super sympa.
Nous avons été accueillis par la maman de Harry, parfait!
Belle expérience, super, à conseiller pour un couple avec ou sans enfants...
Het was een erg prettig verblijf: een hele mooie woonboot op een unieke locatie in Amsterdam. Alles erg schoon en goed geregeld. Ik zou er de volgende keer weer heen gaan!

De woonark van Harry en Anna is een zeer leuke en gezellige verblijfplaats als je Amsterdam wil bezoeken. Alles is aanwezig om je verblijf aangenaam en comfortabel te maken (ook belangrijk: zeer goede bedden!) De fietsen waren erg handig, op 20 minuutjes was je in het midden van het centrum! We hadden een super verblijf in de woonboot, jammer dat we Harry en Anna steeds hebben gemist, we hadden ze graag leren kennen!

Great place to stay in Amsterdam.  Spacious, new and clean, very welcoming for families and still very close to the tram into the heart of town and also to the Amsterdam South train station (one short stop to airport Schiphol).

We had an amazing time in Amsterdam and loved staying in the Blue Room. It was everything we expected and more. Gordon was so welcoming and it was very easy to find. We were in love with the location and if we were to visit again, we would most definitely stay there again. Having breakfast included was a bonus and really helped when it came to our expenses near the end of our trip.

we enjoyed staying at amy and gordon's place. their place is only a 10 minute walk from amsterdam centraal. we didnt get to meet amy, but gordon was there when we arrived and be showed us the room, gave us tips to go around the city, and recommended places to go. in the room there is a microwave and a fridge. they supplied us with milk, orange juice, yogurt,  fruits, coffee, tea and sweets. across the street there is a market. overall is a great place if you are on a budget.

We absolutely fell in love with Amsterdam and Gordon and Amy's place was in the perfect location to explore the city. Great value and much appreciated breakfast pastries and coffee :) I would definitely recommend staying here when visiting Amsterdam.
Welcoming and friendly hosts. Nice little place to be  in the middle of a living street in the center. Nice experience for a fiarf price!

Gordon was a very pleasant host. Our train arrived at 8:30am and Gordon was available well before check-in time to show us up to our room and give us rundown of the city. The room was cleaned each day when we left for the day, and all the pastries and yogurts were replenished. Yes, this is truly a BnB as you'll have breakfast in your room available for you each morning, as well as fruits and OJ. The bed was comfortable and big enough for two. The toilet and shower are shared with the yellow room on the other side, but there is a sink & mirror available in your own room.

The blue room faces the street so you'll have a nice view of all the shops. This is a cool thing most of the time (it's fun to see all the people outside), but be aware that during the summer months it can be quite hot so you'll want the windows open, which means lots of noise/light coming in. If you are a light sleeper like me, you will want to have earplugs and/or an eyemask handy. If your budget is flexible, I'd recommend booking the yellow room as it's only a little bit more expensive but bigger, quieter and out of the sunlight. Fortunately though, Gordon and Amy provide fans in the blue room which help A LOT with the heat. None of our other AirBnBs had fans so we were very thankful for that.

All in all we loved staying here and felt very at-home. The breakfast and room cleaning are a huge plus. Try for the yellow room if it's available, but if not you'll still have a great time in the blue room :)

Gordon hat uns sehr freundlich in Empfang genommen. Die An- und Abreise verlief ohne Probleme! Das Zimmer war genauso wie in der Beschreibung und jeden Tag wurde das Essen aufgefüllt. Die Unterkunft liegt sehr zentral und ist zu Fuß sehr schnell vom Hauptbahnhof zu erreichen. Ich kann das Zimmer bei Gordon und Amy jedem weiterempfehlen.

Really enjoyed our stay at Gordon & Amy's, the location was excellent, the room was nice, they were very accommodative to store our bags prior to arrival, and provided maps, guides and converters, all of which were very helpful!

Gordon is a kind person who waited us check in to the room even though we're a bit late from the time we promised earlier due to crowd in airport .The location is great where we can walk to most of the attraction points in Amsterdam. Shops and restaurants is around. Simple food and beverage is provided in the room where you can have a quick breakfast before goes visit. Overall, this is a nice place to stay.

It was very good. If you want less expensive and good room is your choice. Room is very clean and good located near historical center, markets and food ( on corner incredible herring, must for all).  Every day we had breakfast from Gordon, thanks a lot. Спасибо)

Meet Gordon during stays here, he is very friendly. The place looks exactly as per the listing page. Very nice street to stay and close to everything(Walking distance).
Really a good place to stay in Amsterdam.

Staying at the Blue Room was great. Gordon greeted us when we arrived and gave us  tour of the room. They provided pastries, fruit and juice for each day we stayed. The room was big enough to fit our luggage without it becoming too cramped. Would stay here again.

Very nice and clean place.  Excellent breakfast.  Near everything : central station,  downtown, market, shops, coffee shops. Gordon it's a very great host.  I highly recommend to go there.  If I return to Amsterdam,  I 'll return to Gordon's house.

Had a fantastic stay with Gordon and Amy. Gordon was waiting for us when we arrived and made us feel very welcome. The place was in a lovely street that had everything we needed and was not far from all the major attractions. All in all a great stay and would definitely stay here again :) Thank you

Good location, 10/15 mins from centre.
Great breakfast with muffins, yogurt and fruit, topped up daily.
Gordon has all maps and books of Amsterdam you need, which was a big help.
He cleaned room daily and wifi worked great. Privacy was given at all times.
Available at all times through Airbnb messenger.
Good place
Amazing location. They were so kind and helpful. Gave map. Good wifi.  Refilled muffins and pastries. Very comfortable! Best place to stay in Amsterdam

Our stay in the Blue Room has been great! Me and my friend were looking for an easy place to sleep and possible eat in to save some money. The room was tidy and clean, full of natural light. It had everything we needed and the location was perfect especially if you love vintage shopping ;) , full of shops and supermarkets, one on the other side of the road.
Gordon gave us a warm welcoming and made sure we always had everything we needed.
We would totally recommend this room and no kidding...the bed is the comfiest ever hahah

Really nice flat in a great location !!
Gordon was a really nice hote. I recomand it !!

Gordon nous a accueilli chaleureusement. Les photos du logement reflètent bien la réalité. C'est un bon rapport qualité/ Prix.
Le logement est très bien situé, à 10 min de la gare et du centre ville. Le quartier est animé et charmant.
Mais comme annoncé, le bruit de la rue nous a géné. Il faut prévoir des boules Quies surtout si on a le sommeil léger.

Gordon's home was a fantastic experience! the Blue room is very cozy, clean, warm and nice! the bed is very comfortable and if you look through the windows  you'l feel like in fairy tale! the neiborhood is very secure and wonderful, his street has something special. The best is the breakfast! muffins, cakes, fruit, coffee, late, juice, yogurts... a delicious! it was a pleasure meet Gordon, and he was very happy and sympatique. 15 minutes walking to the Damm place, its a pleasant walk. no doubt i would repeat if i go to Amsterdam! thank you Gordon for everything!

Host veramente molto gentile e disponibile, Gordon è sempre stato al massimo della disponibilità con noi, inoltre ci ha portato tutti i giorni dei deliziosi muffin, succo di frutta e latte per la colazione.
La casa è in un bel quartiere, molto tranquillo, a 5 minuti di bicicletta dal centro.
Molto pulito, ci ha pulito la stanza ogni giorno.
Insomma, non c'è nulla di cui potersi lamentare.

Speriamo di tornare presto ad Amsterdam e di nuovo ospiti di Mr. Gordon

Marco e Valentina

Staying at Amy and Gordon's BnB in the blue room was a great experience! My boyfriend and I felt very comfortable and welcome. The room service was impeccable, as they offered us pastries, yogurts, juice and milk, tea and coffee, and washed our dishes and cleaned our room everytime we went out! Thank you both for a wonderful experience in Amsterdam! These hosts go above and beyond to make your stay absolutely wonderful!
Superbe week-end à Amsterdam chez Gordon et Amy. Emplacement très bien situé, chambre propre et confortable. Le petit déjeuner est très appréciable et Gordon très sympathique !

We had a great stay at Gordon and Amy's during our trip to Amsterdam. The location of the airbnb is close to the main train station, restaurants and cafes. The room was on the smaller side but given the fact that we weren't in the room often it wasn't an issue. We arrived later than we had planned but Gordon made it easy for us to find the place and let us in.

Gordon was very nice host. He wellcomed us even we came a little bit late, around 22:00 and showed us the room and provided info about the city. Toilet and bathroom are shared with other guests, but Gordon and his wife clean it every day, they even clean our room every day. We also had fresh fruits, muffins, yogurts for brekfast every day.
Excellente position, every major attractions in walking distance and lovely neighbourhood.
We absolutely recommended Gordon and Amy's place.

This is a good location for a short stay, close enough to town for walking while also exposing us to some general Amsterdam life without the glamour . Addition surprises was the daily food snacks including fruit.
Perfect place to stay in Amsterdam.

My stay at Gordon and Amy's was fabulous: Great communication; the 'blue room' was so nice overlooking the street; the location's within easy walking distance from town; and the included breakfast was a treat!  Highly recommend to anyone!
Thank you Gordon. It has been nice to be hosted at the blue room. Very good location and nice stay. I would recommend it.

Gordon and Amy's blue room was my first Airbnb experience, and a hard one to top! The apartment is above a store in a perfect location. Many cute restaurants and shops right on our street. You can also walk to anything during your stay in Amsterdam. We were greeted by Gordon who was very welcoming and helped us with anything we would need to know. In the morning, we were provided with pastries, yogurt and beverages. Such a thoughtful touch. The room itself is adorable and has everything you would need. Definitely recommend!

The backroom is nice, the location is great, the family is friendly.
Thank you Shawna.
Great room, and Shawna is very nice and friendly!
Shawna was lovely unfortunately our trip got delayed so we only got to spend 1 night in the back room but a great experience very unique, cosy and comfortable in a fantastic area.

Spacious room with everything we needed. Great location & quiet. Shawna and her family are awesome hosts~ gracious and helpful if you need anything, but they respect your complete privacy. The room is separate from the house and feels like your own small apartment.
Shawna went above and beyond by also helping me with a few errands after I left (she had to get gift items from a store and mailed them to me in the US)- and she was super prompt in carrying out my request!
Very nice family. We felt extremely safe staying here. Would definitely stay here again!!!
I highly recommend Shawna & the back room!! :)
Deixe a comunidade Airbnb saber sobre a sua estadia.
Nice host and lovely studio! I'll definitely come back when I visit Amsterdam again :)

Our stay in this apartment marked the beginning of our two-week travels around Europe and set the bar high for the rest of our vacation. With clear directions, we found the place with ease and were warmly greeted by our hostess. Although we arrived early, we were able to freshen up and leave our bags, while we began our exploration of Amsterdam and the beautiful neighborhood in which we were staying. The location was incredible and, after our time spent in Amsterdam, we decided that it beat any other in the city. Although entering the studio apartment required walking through the downstairs of our host's home, it was very private and comfortable. The weather in Amsterdam proved to be a bit colder than we had prepared for and the apartment was a bit drafty, but we were very thankful for the heaters and the induction burner for making hot chocolate! We fell in love with Amsterdam and owe it to our stay here.
Excellent location! Everybody was really kind!! The room is a tiny room but it is really comfy and has everything you need for your stay in Ámsterdam.

The backroom is so nice with great decoration with a Boem taste. A big spacy room with all the comforts for its price. The location was great, in the center of the city...with great cafes and restaurants around. We didn't need to take any bus or taxi!! A pleasant experience which I 'll never forget!
Thank you Shawna!
Shawna was great with us, helpful and nice. The place is in the best part of the city, calm but close to all. We had such a good time there.

I studied abroad this semester and a friend and I took a quick weekend trip to Amsterdam and had the perfect trip - especially because this Airbnb was fantastic! We were a little late checking in but Gordon helped us find the apartment and helped carry our luggage upstairs. We didn't get a chance to meet Amy, but Gordon was so nice and helpful from booking through check out. They provided a lovely little breakfast with danishes, fruit, juice, yogurt, and coffee and tea. The location was great, about a 10-15 minute walk to the center and on a cute street with shops and restaurants. We had such a great stay - thank you so much for being awesome hosts!

Zeer aangenaam verblijf ! De gastheren waren zeer flexibel ivm het aankomstuur.
Geen belangrijke op- of aanmerkingen over de woonark.
Rustig gelegen, makkelijk te vinden, parkeergelegenheid (mits betaling) vlakbij.
Alles werkte naar behoren, alles was prima in orde qua netheid ; TV, koffiemachine, afwasmachine... alles beschikbaar !
De 4 fietsen geven echt een meerwaarde aan diegenen die Amsterdam willen verkennen.
Een aanrader !

Very nice! Newly finished with a modern design--feels luxurious. Our purpose was only to stay one night in order to check out the city. I wish we could have enjoyed more of the house boat. Owner and cleaning lady were very kind and helpful.
This place is great! I would totally recommend this houseboat to everyone. No bad things to say.
Really great place, very clean, calm and spacious. we enjoyed the time in this houseboat. Thank you Harry and Anna!

We really enjoyed our stay @harrys&annas houseboat! It was perfect.
The houseboat is modern and very charming! By bike we were in 15min in
Ansterdams center!the weather was perfect and we enjoyed to relaxe on the houseboat rooftop terrace! It was amazing!! I can really recommend the houseboat of harry&anna!!

We will come back for sure!
Kind regards
Nora & friends

We had a great time staying in Harry and Anna's houseboat which was really well equipped and clean. The houseboat is slightly out of the centre of Amsterdam but with the bikes (which are a great perk staying here!), it was a really easy and quick route through the sports grounds and Vondel Park to get to the centre.

Thanks so much for a great stay Harry!

Hello Harry and Anna,
We stayed at Houseboat Nova recently and had a wonderful time, the accommodation is great and a relaxing place to stay after a day cycling around Amsterdam.
The bikes are really useful and we spent a day exploring the city by bike, Harry gave us some good advice about cycle routes and we had fun cycling through the Vondelpark with the blossom falling around us. Even the rain showers didn't put us off!
Thank you for making our stay so pleasurable, we will book Nova next time we come to Amsterdam and have given the details to many of our friends.
Best wishes, Veronica

Es war wirklich toll. Das Hausboot ist sehr gut ausgestattet und sauber.
Wirklich schön, allerdings auch nicht ganz billig....aber das Haus ist das
Geld wert!!!!!
Great accommodation! Very friendly host. The backroom is located in a very central and nice environment.

Hermosa habitación, con todas las comodidades y perfecta ubicación.
Shawna fue muy amable con nosotros, ayudandonos en nuestras consultas y pidiendonos un taxi para poder llegar a horario a la estación.

It was perfect for me! Like a wonderful little hut hidden in the city ^_^
Thanks to Shawna, Isabelle from Belgium.

Nous avons passé 2 nuits dans l'annexe de la maison de Shawna et nous avons beaucoup aimé cette chambre atypique avec sa déco, mélange d'objets et meuble chiné en brocante. La chambre reflète bien l'ambiance d'Amsterdam, décontracté et sans souci :-)... La literie, malgré que ce ne soit pas un vrai lit, était agréable.  Nous y étions en avril et le temps était bien pluvieux,donc la partie extérieur n'était pas entretenu. Mais je suppose que le coin doit être bien agréable pour le petit déjeuner dès qu'il y a du soleil.
Me aloje una noche y fué todo estupendamente. La amplitud de la habitación, independencia y la situación de la casa lo mejor para mi. Volveria si tuviera ocasión. Gracias Shawna.

My partner and i stayed at Shawna's backroom bnb for 2 nights. The location is superb and of walking distance (10min) to Dam square and (15min) to Central station. The information and directions provided by Shawna in her bnb listing is totally accurate. We easily made our way from the airport without difficulty. Thanks Shawna!

Une location sympa dans un quartier sympa avec une hôte sympa; A recommander vivement. Nous avons passé deux nuits dans ce studio au style bohème en plein centre d'Amsterdam et comme il faisait très beau nous avons profité de la terrasse extérieure pour dîner. Cette location est à l'image de la ville ...zen. nous avons dormi à 4 dans cet espace et nous comptons bien y retourner..un jour.

Excellent hosts good swift communication, houseboat spotless and fully equipped in nice location, far enough away from hustle and bustle of the centre but easy to get in to. Bikes really good for getting around the many cycle paths in all directions. If you want to mix the city with a little relaxation then this is the perfect spot.

We had very nice days on this modern, comfortable and quiet houseboat of Harry & Anna!
Harry was very helpful, gave advice how to cope the best way in this beautiful and busy city. The bikes were extremely useful to get around, discover the Vondelpark and Amsterdam!
I can really recommend the place, the houseboat and the host!

Thanks a lot to Anna & Harry! We enjoyed our stay very very much! The houseboat was very cosy and comfortable. It is a very clean and calm place and you can reach trams and buses to the centre or the airport within a few minutes walk. We also were riding the bikes and we loved it! Hopefully we will stay another time at the houseboat again!

Great place, really classy decor, and great communication by the host.  It looks good in the pictures but it is  even more impressive in person.  Roof deck is great for relaxing, the included bikes were so beneficial to the trip(public rentals are usually 20€/day), and the buses and trains are just a  short bike ride/walk away.

The flat was very pleasant, very quiet, all well organized just in front of channel, really perfect.
This only one night was too short. Maybe in an other opportunity, we will come back.

Das Houseboat war einfach nur schön, die Betreuung von Harry&Anna auch sehr gut und wir haben es sehr genossen, mit den Fahrrädern in die Stadt zu fahren. Somit war es auch absolut OK, dass die Unterkunft ein wenig außerhalb des Zentrums ist. Die nächste Straßenbahn ist jedoch auch nur ein paar Gehminuten entfernt. Die Dachterrasse war auch genial für einen ersten Kaffee bzw. Tee am Morgen...kann ich nur wärmstens empfehlen...

Great communication lots of space and it is completely new. The main photo however shows the house boat that is not part of the space available. A little deceiving, but despite this I strongly recommend this house boat to anyone looking to visit Ansterdam. Best is tram not taxi to get to the boat (30-40eu taxi or 2.6eur/personne by tram direct

The houseboat was very nice as it looked in the pictures and the hosts were friendly. The only problem was there was no Air Conditioning or fans and it was uncomfortably warm the night that we stayed. Even with all windows open it was hot and the windows had to be closed due to rain storm.

Great thanks to Anna & Harry! We found full compliance with advertising and reality! The boat was completely comfortable for our family. We cycled all the time staying there and it's really very convenient for opening Amsterdam! We hope to repeat this experience again!

Where do I start? I wish I could have stayed longer. Check-in was simple and seamless.  The place was amazing, so clean and modern. The bed was super comfortable and the internet worked excellently. Everything was amazing there. Very large for what I expected for a boathouse. This will definitely be a place we book when we come back to Amsterdam.

We had a wonderful time in this lovely houseboat and enjoyed the bikes!
Thank you very much!
Maja
