It was a wonderful stay. This place is close to Amsterdam Zuid and WTC - 5 minutes by bike. Good for business travel especially comparing with tiny hotel rooms.

Tolle Unterkunft um mit de mRad Amsterdam zu erkunden. Sowohl die Gastgeber als auch die Unterkunft sind wirklich zu empfehlen. Es ist nicht besonders zentral gelegen aber mit den Fahrrädern ist man in 20 min im Zentrum und es macht Spass!

What can I say?  This houseboat is fabulous!! An amazing layout and the provision of free bikes is a great idea and a big plus.  The place was well equipped, immaculately clean and with everything you could want from a stay and just 20 minutes by bike from Amsterdam City Centre.

Het verblijf was zeer aangenaam. Fijn comfortabel onderkomen en van alle gemakken voorzien. Aangezien wij veel reizen kun je veel vergelijken. En wat erg op prijs werd gesteld waren de kleine dingen zoals aanwezigheid van zout, peper, aluminium papier, olijfolie, vuilniszakken, vaatwasmachine tabletten etc. Kortom fully equipt. Wel uitkijken als je met de fiets in Amsterdam bent voor de tramrails! Ikzelf heb een aardige smak gemaakt doordat ik in zo'n rail bleef vastzitten met de fiets. De houseboat zouden wij zo aan andere mensen aanraden

We had a wonderful stay! The house boat was faultless. We loved the added bonus of 4 bikes included.

Thanks so much

Katie and Mark

A great experience in Amsterdam. The houseboat was everything we hoped for, it was super cool, very clean and Harry, Anna and Harrys mother was very helpful all the time. It took only about 15 minutes to get into the city and its very easy :-)
I liked staying at the houseboat great experience. Really beautiful home with a fantastic balconies. Great place to be on your birthday. Thanks alot

What a wonderful visit! The houseboat is glorious and an easy bike ride away from town and the main sights. Everything was very clean and the place is well equipped. Easy communication and lovely hosts. Thanks!

This is a lovely and special location in Amsterdam; Quiet and with the bikes provided we were within 20 min. in the centre of Amsterdam! The houseboat is just lovely: clean, spacious, cozy, and the bathroom amazing! The beds were comfy. We felt really at home, and would love to come back! Thank you very much!!

Sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtete Unterkunft, alles was man braucht ist vorhanden. Großes Plus sind die Fahrräder, mit denen man sehr gut (nachdem man sich an den "wüsten" Verkehr gewöhnt hat) Amsterdam erkunden kann. Wir haben unser Auto 7 Tage nicht bewegt.
Das Boot liegt etwas außerhalb, was aber sehr angenehm ist, um einem Tag ruhig ausklingen zu lassen. Leider haben wir Anna und Harry nicht kennengelernt, dafür aber seine Mutter (Grüße).
Es ist aber alles nahezu perfekt organisiert, so dass man sich auch alleine schnell zurecht findet.
Auf jeden Fall eine Reise wert!

센트럴에서 가까운 편이에요. 가는길에 대마초 파는데가 많아서 냄새가 많이 나긴하지만 거의 다 관광객처럼 보여서 위험하지는 않아요. 숙소는 2층에 있어서 좁은계단을 조금 올라가야해요. 방은 그렇게 넓진 않지만 아늑하고 깨끗합니다. 매일 아침 과일 빵 우유 유제품 등을 주세요. 주변에 큰 마트도 있어서 좋아요. 화장실이랑 욕실은 분리되어 있고 공용이지만 큰 불편함 없어요. 엄청 친절하십니다.

This house has very nice location.
Host is very kind and nice.
If i come back to Amsterdam, i want to stay in this lovely house again.

We enjoyed our stay at Gordon and Amy's. The location could not have been any better. Short walk to the train station and tons of restaurants and shops around. The apartment is located on a busy street so you can hear people walking and riding bikes throughout the night. If you want a quiet place to stay for a good night's sleep, perhaps check out the yellow room. Gordon was very easy to communicate with and very helpful. This room shares bathroom facilities with the other room, but they were cleaned every day. We loved the breakfast that they supplied and restocked every day! Fresh pastries, fruit, yogurt, coffee, and juice. We would reccommend staying here to live like a local.
A lovely stay at Gordon and Amy's place.

It takes a while to walk to the house from central station but there is also a bus stop near the house.
As in the description, Gordon and Amy provide various breakfast everyday. We loved it very much.
Gordon is very nice. He helped us to carry our heavy luggages upstairs which was very helpful for us.

Gordon and Amy's place was perfect for our short stay in Amsterdam, Gordon was very good to us the whole time providing a few cakes and milk to keep us going in the morning. Great easy location, ideal for a couple for a few nights :)
Very nice house and location

Nuestra estancia en el departamento de Amy & Gordon fue corta pero muy agradable ! No conocimos a Amy pero definitivamente Gordon fue un anfitrión muy atento y dispuesto a ayudar en todo momento. El departamento es tal como se describe en las fotos y el baño es compartido pero solo con otra habitación lo cual no fue un problema en ningún momento. Lo mejor fue el detalle del desayuno, pasteles muy ricos y cafe, te a nuestra disposición, gracias Gordon por tu amabilidad !!

Our stay at Amy's was great, Amy and Gordon are very nice and friendly. The room is located to many shops, bars and restaurants and really not far from the citycentre. We would definititely come again and recommend it to our friends going to Amsterdam. Thank you Amy and Gordon!
Lovely place, lovely hosts and what a city!

We had a great time in Amsterdam. The room is excellent located in a great neighborhood. At our visits it was at Queensday, so we had a great party in this area :). I really would recommend this room.

One of the most inspiring rooms i've stayed in with all the colour and personal touch to the tiniest detail! There must be an artist in the house! Loved the way the sunlight would flood the room each morning. It was certainly a very comfortable, clean and lovely place.

La maison était en travaux, et notre hôte assez occupé. Le patio devant l'antichambre non aménagé, et servant d'aire de stockage. L'antichambre atypique, haut de plafond avec du charme. Elle ne semblait pas prévue cependant pour nous acceuillir: bougies consummées, toiles d'araignée, placard et tiroirs remplis de divers outils, pots de peintures, vitres avec divers chocs, frigos avec  reste de nourritures de precedant voyageur. Un grand manque d'entretien pour résumer, ce qui est bien dommage vu le potentiel : Endroit très bien localisé dans la ville, proche cafés, restaurants et commerces. Un bémol également sur la salle d'eau, très étroite avec des fils électriques hazardeux, une porte en bois vétuste non fonctionnelle et aucun miroirs exepté le petit au dessus du lavabo dans la chambre.

Shawna's house is located in an excellent neighborhood and was extremely well kept. We reached the apartment well before the check in time but Shawna was extremely accomodating and allowed us to keep our bags. She was extremely friendly and gave us some great pointers about the neighborhood! I would definitely stay there again during my next visit to the city!

The back room was perfect for our one night stop in AMS. Easy to and from airport (20 minute bus), and every human need is within a stones throw. Shawna was very welcoming and the room is very private.  We  highly recommend this listing. Thank you!

Cool spot in a great district of central Amsterdam. The skylight is pretty cool, and there are touristy books should the utility be needed. Wifi works. The bathroom can be a bit awkward and there isn't much hot water, but perhaps I'm just spoiled by my long showers in Michigan as I had similar experiences at other places I stayed in Amsterdam as well.

Shawna and her daughter were helpful and let us leave our bags several hours past check-out, which was a lifesaver. Would have liked to stay a second night so we could have gotten to know them more.

Chambre très bien située à quelques minutes de marche du centre ville, de plusieurs attractions et des trams. Chambre attenante à la maison peu éclairée avec une toilette à même la douche....L'eau se retrouve sous nos pieds lorsqu'on est à la toilette. Le toit est transparent ce qui fait qu'il n'y a pas de grande noirceur pour dormir.

The back room in city center was exactly what we were looking for. Very gracious host and family, flexible about our check in time, great space with good light, on the ground floor, and in a perfect location in a good neighborhood.
Shawna was there to greet us and answer any questions we had. We heartily recommend the backroom.
Great place, location and host. This is definitely the place to stay in Amsterdam.

The Backroom was a great place to stay in the center of the city. Very convenient to all of the old city, we only rode public transit to and from the airport, otherwise we walked the whole city! Clean and comfortable the room was perfect, and Shawna provided eye masks, which helps with sleeping off the jet lag, as the room has a beautiful glass roof which lets in tons of light.
My son spend three days in Amsterdam in this flat. He lived a good experience: this flat is in the center of town and it is one of the best solution for visiting Amsterdam. The price is really good.
Shawna was very helpful and friendly. The apartment was very quiet and peaceful considering we were in a busy area. The huge cheese shop next door looked amazing but sadly didn't get to try it.

This wonderful backyard apartment is in the heart of a really cool area of Amsterdam. Steps from the canals, but more than that, it's the nice touch that Shawna and her family have on the place. It was truly wonderful and I would return in a second.
Very nice place to stay in Amsterdam in the beautiful district of Jordaan. Very great host ! Eveything perfect to discover the city.

The backroom was charming. Behind the brick facades of the houses neatly filed in a row, you discover the inner courtyard which leads to this bohemian California styled/feeling "backroom". A perfect location to discover the canals of Amsterdam by foot or by bike, but that venture on 2 wheels will be for another visit. A fridge, a hot water kettle, the copper sink make it comfortable enough to stay longer than the 3 nights I spent with my adult daughter. Our hosts were the cherry on the cake. Engaged and responsible citizens, it was a heartening experience to discuss the world we share and how we can learn to grow and have a can do attitude. I encourage the sharing and look forward to another chance to stay at this  loving home.

Terrific central location in a separate room at the back of an easy-going family home in the canals of Amsterdam.  The glass roof makes for a very light room at night during summer. A bit like camping out! However, Shawna provides eye masks which came in very useful. Easy and comfortable accommodation with access to an outdoor garden setting which we used in the lovely sunny week we were here.  Shawna was welcoming and friendly. Highly recommended.

The backroom in city center is a great place to explore Amsterdam.
I'll write a little more for Russian readers of this site.
Оно очень похоже на летние домики, которые раньше (а может и сейчас ешё) сдавали туристам где-нибудь в Крыму. Здесь есть всё, что нужно неприхотливой компании. Кому-то условия покажутся спартанскими, но главное - уют и непередаваемая атмосфера. Знаете, Shawna действительно похожа на тех хозяек крымских домиков, которых рекомендовали только лучшим друзьям.
Не ждите здесь отельного комфорта. Сюда надо ехать за другим - за ощущением Амстердама в каждом квадратном метре домика.

Thank you, Shawna! :-)

Shawna’s rustic backroom space presented some small challenges for this aging couple. It would have been more helpful for us to have the following: more flatware and dishes, a place to hang up some things, a place to open out at least one suitcase and something to block the sun from the large glass roof in the middle of the day. But she and her family were friendly and helpful and we felt very comfortable coming and going as we wished.
Gordon et Amy se sont très bien occupés de nous ! La chambre possède tout le nécessaire et les petits déjeuner sont délicieux. Nous reviendrons sûrement, merci beaucoup !
Its a really cozy and beautiful place to stay. Great location, walking distance from the Central Station, definitely a place I recommend in Amsterdam.
If you want to visit Amsterdam, you must stay at Gordons apartment! Great place!
Great location!!! We had an amazing time and we're very impressed :)
Had a wonderful stay, very welcoming hosts, clean and inviting lodgings and great central location. Warmly recommended !

8 minute walk to Anne Frank house and close to very cool local shops and restaurants like a place with herring sandwiches. Also very close to barney's farm if you are into that sort of thing. Walking distance from Amsterdam central station and I walked to all the district s from there no problem. Gordon was easily accommodating with my midnight check in and is very nice and helpful. Gave me an adapter because I forgot mine in the u.s. and always wants to give you as many danish as he can. Very good host.
Gordon was very friendly and helpful. The room was very close to everything in Amsterdam. Great breakfast was provided every morning. I would rent from Gordon again.
Cute place, very clean, loved having pastries and coffee provided.

Alloggio molto bene posizionato, zona tranquilla e comoda per raggiungere tutta Amsterdam. Gordon é stato molto molto gentile al check in.
In camera é presente la moquette, e il bagno non era pulitissimo. Nel complesso ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo.

That was a very good and calm stay at Gordon's place. He is taking care of his visitors. ( Breakfast, little muffins and orange juice were a nice touch.) I will recommend them as hosts. + the location is perfect.

Gordon is amazing and very nice and kind , provided a very good hospitality .
The room has been cleaning everyday ,
Hot water and heat is working all time.
The street is very nice ,lots of boutique stores and many restaurants just next door to the apartment. Yoo can walk for 10 minutes or less to the center station of Ams.
It's been a pleasure to be at Gordon's place ,and I will definitely go back there ,whenever I'll be in Amsterdam.

Gordon was a great host. He provided helpful information, surprised us with breakfast treats and beverages, and gave us a blow dryer to use. The shops on the street were fun to go through and everyone was friendly.
Endroit que conseille fortement
The location is wonderful (walking distance from Amsterdam Central and also some spots). The host is nice and helpful. They prepared breakfast for us and clean our room everyday. Highly recommended.
Gordon and Amy will be my first choice every time when I come to Amsterdam

La chambre est bien située dans une rue commerçante mais pas bruyante.
Les petits déjeuner sont compris dans le prix et ils sont variés.
La douche et les toilette sont sur le palier ( à partager avec une 2e chambre) mais ce n'est vraiment pas dérangeant. La douche est un peu moins clean mais on y passe pas sa vie donc ça le fait carrément !

Gordon met me at the door, answered all my questions and was very professional.
Thank you for everything!

everything is nice .landlord is very enthusiastic and friendly .new decoration ，new pianting .but the oil pianting smell is bad .i hope its nature or high quality oil paint .cuz most of oil piant full of  oxymethylene .
Amazing, the location and accommodation is great!
Erik made our stay comfortable. He was prompt in answering questions. The room was good for 2 people, neat & clean. Many good places to eat nearby. Would recommend stay at Erik's place.
Erik, fue muy amable y accesible. El lugar es tal como aparece en las fotos. Es céntrico, está limpio y ordenado. Gracias 😊
Had a great stay. Super cute spot, with a great host!
Erik is awesome and made everything very easy. Clean, big windows, great value, and excellent location. We liked it so much we're going back tomorrow for another stay.

Chambre idéalement située dans quartier branché et à proximité de nombreux points d'intérêt. Accueil chaleureux, Erik a été vraiment arrangeant quant à notre arrivée tardive le vendredi soir. Seule déception, nous n'avons pas eu le plaisir de goûter aux petits déjeuners de notre hôte.

This was our second stay at Erik and Mary Jo's place. Great location , clean , and everything we needed for our stay in Amsterdam. We would certainly come back for a 3rd  time .Also, the communication was excellent . Thanks Erik!

This spot is in a great location!! So central! I stayed in the room facing the street. If you kept the windows closed, you couldn't hear anything. I kept them open and it wasn't that bad. So much to do near by and Erik is so quick at responding that he can help with all of your questions. If I ever come to Amsterdam again, I will definitely try to stay here!

ein gemütliches Hausboot in Zentru (Hidden by Airbnb) ähe. mit den bereitgestellten Fahrrädern ist man locker in 15 Minuten im Zentrum und kann dabei gemütlich durch den Stadtpark radeln. wir waren zu viert und haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. da wir gutes Wetter hatten, konnten wir die Sonnenterrasse ausgiebig nutzen. absolut empfehlenswert.

We had a great stay on the houseboat in the neighbourhood of Boosban. It is comfortable and homey, extremely clean and has a nice roof-terrace. It is easy to get to the City by bike, tram  or bus. Everythink went smoothly. Thanks Anna and Harry!
We met Anna and had privacy like the boat was entirely ours, Outstanding.

Loved Harry & Annas houseboat!! Upon arrival the information bulletin was on display with everything you need to know. Harry & Anna are thoughtful enough to provide a book with restaurant recommendations with descriptions. The house was very modern, beautifully decorated and perfectly spacious for 2 couples. The upper deck was also a nice, relaxing spot.

Their house was a short 10min walk to the metro station which takes you right into Centraal Station.

Had the pleasure of meeting Anna, she dropped by to make sure we had everything we needed. My boyfriend needed an iron and it wasn't inside our house and she was kind enough to get one from her house and bring it over. Great service!

Would love to stay here again!

Lovely quiet area. Very clean and beautiful apartment which looks exactly like the photographs. Location wise you are quite far out from the centre. We took a taxi from centraal station and it cost us €38 so recommend getting the tram. It's about a 30 min tram ride with a 10 min walk to the tram station. There are limited restaurants nearby without walking for about 20 min but bikes are provided which made it easier. Ideal for a family holiday or a quiet get away. Outdoor space is on the roof of the boat. We didn't use this much as its very overlooked. The bath is fantastic!! We wanted to take it home with us. Thanks for having us.
We enjoyed our 2-night stay at Houseboat Nova.  Everything was very clean. The neighborhood was very quiet. We loved eating on the roof!

Hi,
We had a great time staying at your place. The place was clean and as shown on the website. We met the host, Harry and he was really nice towards us.

Anna was extremely friendly when we arrived. Showed us where everything was and the use of the bikes and the better place for parking. We used the bikes and they were great!  The houseboat was perfect with lots of space and great fresh air. The bathroom was very new and the shower was perfect to stay in all day!
Great spot.. Close to tram downtown.. Spacious and clean location in quiet neighborhood.. Wonderful hosts with fast response time.. Highly recommend

We got to the houseboat by tram (16 or 24 gets you there) a short walk later, we entered, with the neighbor's help into a beautiful and relaxing place. I totally recommend the houseboat, and am even considering to bring my small management team to meet and relax there. the place sleeps four, lots of space and very restful environment.
Thank you for allowing us to stay with last minute travel plans. The house boat was easily accessible and very clean.
Very cool houseboat! We love it and recommend it as a must-do in Amsterdam!

Fantastische woonark op een prachtige, rustige lokatie in Amsterdam. Super ontvangen door Harry en goed geholpen met o.a. parkeren. De woonark is ruim en schoon. Met de bijbehorende fietsen ben je in no time in Amsterdam Centrum. Ik zou iedereen aanraden hier te overnachten!

Love our time on Houseboat Nova! The rain kept us from fully enjoying the bikes and the rooftop deck but everything was great. Harry and Anna were quick with responses and stopped by to answer all our questions.

Det var en fornøjelse at bo i Harry og Anna's husbåd. Alt var som beskrevet, og det var en perfekt beliggenhed i forhold til vores mål med turen til Amsterdam: At løbe maraton. Der var start ved det olympiske stadion, som ligger få hundrede meter fra husbåden. Der er gode transportmuligheder til og fra lufthavnen, og der er mange muligheder for at komme ind til byen enten med bus eller tram.

Vi benyttede os ikke at muligheden for at låne cykler, men de var til rådighed.

Vi kan varmt anbefale den her husbåd, hvis ikke man har behov midt i centrum af byen!

Le bateau est propre et conforme à la description.
Aucune attention d'accueil particulière.
Le petit village constitué par les house boats est sympa, mais très proche de l'autoroute et de la voie ferrée, ce qui n'est pas mentionné.
Suite à un problème de clefs (vite réglé), j'ai laissé deux messages sur le répondeur du propriétaire, il ne m'a jamais rappelé pour s'assurer que tout allait bien.
Great apartment. Everything wonderfully clean and well kept. Easy to get to on tram from centre. Only one little thing - there isn't a balcony, but there is a roof terrace.. And some friendly ducks..

Great! Highly recommended. Modern space in a really pleasant location, close to the old Olympic stadium. Very easy and quick to get to the centre of town via trams 16 and 24.

Spotlessly clean with a nice spacious bathroom. Nearest supermarket is about a 7min bike ride or 10min walk.

Would stay here again.

Thanks for your hospitality and help Harry and Anna.

Wonderful place to stay while visiting AMS.
I had a million questions and they were very kind to respond promptly.
We parked and took the tram in to the (Website hidden by Airbnb) was easy. Safe, clean and a gorgeous set up.
My Aunt, myself and two kids had no issues having enough space to sleep. Would recommend and stay again!

Merci à Anna et Harry pour avoir profiter de notre séjour à Amsterdam d'une manière originale dans leur superbe Houseboat. Très confortable et bien équipé, tout à été parfait jusqu'à l'accueil par Harry en personne(qui en plus parle très bien français).
La terrasse permet une vue du quartier sur 360°, et quel plaisir d'avoir la vue sur le canal !
Le quartier est quant à lui très calme et bien qu'un peu à l'extérieur de la ville, les transports en communs sont à 5 mn et on rejoint le centre en ville en 20 mn.
Bref, si je reviens un jour dans cette merveilleuse ville, ça sera dans le Houseboat !

I had a great three nights staying in the backroom. Two of the nights I had a wonderful time chatting with Shawna and her husband - both interesting and very friendly people!

The location is ideal, after staying even closer to the centre of Amsterdam I appreciated this even more. Dam Sqaure is such a short walk away but at the same time you're surrounded by the more legitimate lifestyle of the inner suburb. Bars and cafés are at your doorstep (I recommend screaming beans for breakfast) and nothing is far away.

If you want to have an entirely private time you'd never know you weren't alone, the room is exceptionally spacious and private. I'll certainly be staying here next time I'm in town.

What a slice of paradise the Nova houseboat is! Beautifully decorated, bright & clean, with everything you could ever want. Having use of the 4 bikes was also brilliant. Host Harry was very friendly & offered to answer any questions we had. We loved our time on the Nova!

The houseboat is really nice and the neighborhood as well. The only thing that we didnt like is that we left our luggage due to having all day before leaving (previous request from my side) and when we came there was an old woman who barely kicked us out. Leaving that behind, the place has everything needed for a good time in amsterdam.  Bikes there are priceless
Beautiful, modern houseboat.
Loved the houseboat experience! Very nice and well equipped place to stay. The bikes were a great plus! Thank you for making us feel welcome and for your help when we had questions!

Outstanding. Houseboat was amazing. Absolutely everything has been thought of in this house. Our daughter loved the bicycles provided too which was a great way to get around Amsterdam. Would highly recommend a stay here and when back in Amsterdam again we will definitely book ahead. Thank you Anna & Harry
The boathouse was just like we expected it. It was very clean, spacious and there was there a very kind atmosphere.

What an amazing houseboat! Had a great weekend staying in this stunning place - couldn't have wished for more. Harry kindly let us stay until our flight time home which meant we didn't have to wander around with our cases on the final day - thank you!
Great hosts, great accommodation and all in, a great weekend :-)

The houseboat was exactly as pictured: light, beautiful and clean. We stayed for two nights and Harry was very accommodating with us checking out late the last day. The extras provided like the coffee, tea and bikes were a huge plus. Communication with Harry was easy and I would definitely recommend the houseboat Nova to anyone traveling to Amsterdam.

In our opinion, the houseboat is really nice and comfortable. It is clean and well equipped. Additionally, great is the roof terrace as well as the offered bikes. Unfortunately, due the rainy weather we did not use the bikes, but definitely we will use them next time :-) The communication with Anna and Harry was very easygoing. We definitely recommend this location.

Nous avons été accueilli chaleureusement par quelqu'un de la famille de Harry et Anna, qui a bien répondu à toutes nos questions.
Bateau-logement plein de charme, reposant, propre et design, comme sur les photos. La terrasse est sur le toit.
Habitation vraiment pratique et fonctionnelle.
Logement original dans un quartier calme, verdoyant à 30 min à vélo du centre.
Parking payant (sauf le dimanche) mais pratique. Tramway à 5 min à pied.
La possibilité de visiter Amsterdam à vélo est un plus. (même en hiver !)
Eric was a wonderful host. He did a great job communicating with us, as well as, being flexible with our check out time. We would definitely stay there again.

This place is really comfortable my girlfriend and I stayed here for two nights and we really enjoyed our stay. The room was great had everything you could possibly need. The location was great just ten minutes walk from the station. If your going to Amsterdam than this is a great place to stay

In a great location, room is perfect for people-watching from the windows. Airy, bright and clean room. Host was friendly and informative. Room above a laundromat which was handy! Close to supermarkets, social activities and an overall great place to stay. Would highly recommend it! Ps room feels a little like a "fun house" due to slightly  wonky flooring and low set windows... we loved that about it!
Todo perfecto! Muy buen lugary ubicacion. Super recomendable
Wonderful! Central location, great host, and comfortable stay. Would definitely do it again!
Ubicacion perfecta, habitacion comoda y Erik se comporto genial. Esperamos volver pronto!

Erik is a great host and made sure we would have everything we needed. It's a cute place with a great feeling of Amsterdam. He added details like coffee and tea which I didn't expect and the communication was always possible if we would have needed something. Thanks for making our stay incredible!

Very kind welcome by Erik and Mary Jo taking care of their guests. The house is lovely and very easy to find. Very well located in the centre and not far from the central station. Very good value for the price.
Perfect place to stay in Amsterdam, good location (Amsterdam center) , clean and pretty quiet. I'd definitely recommend this room for travelers.

La chambre était très bien pour quelques nuits à Amsterdam. Joli quartier proche des canaux typiques et agréables mais aussi des commerces et restaurants. Le reste est accessible à pieds (10 min de la gare centrale) ou à vélo. Notre hôte a été très disponible pour répondre à nos questions et requêtes. La chambre donne sur la rue mais le bruit ne nous a pas gênées  pendant la nuit. Cependant la douche partagée n'est pas très pratique car la sortie de la douche donne directement sur le couloir et il est difficile de s'y changer (peut être faudrait-il rajouter un tapis de sol et de quoi poser ses affaires).
Great spot, super tips from Erik, fantastic location!
Great place right where you wanna be. Great host and room.

We had a wonderful stay at Erik and Mary Jo's Airbnb. The premises are well maintained and clean. The furniture was exactly as shown on the pictures.
Erik was a wonderful host. He was hospitable, always friendly and obliging. The host offers an Airbnb with an excellent price/performance ratio. If we came back to Amsterdam once, we would definitely stay at Erik's Airbnb again.
Thank you for making our stay as comfortable as it was.
el bed and breakfast esta bien, limpio y muy bien ubicado, sin duda poner un pie en amsterdam y alquilar una bicicleta es la mejor opcion!

We really enjoyed our stay here in Amsterdam. The directions Shawna provided were very helpful and easy to follow so we had no problem finding the apartment from the airport. The room is quite large so there is heaps of space plus everything is provided so it is a self-contained area and you can prepare your own food (there is a fridge, dishes, microwave and sink). We stayed here right in the middle of summer so the room did get very warm- there was a fan in the room which we always had on but there were some times at night we struggled to get to sleep as we were a little uncomfortable. The weather was very hot when were here so I don't think this would be a problem all the time. The location is terrific and in a really good spot. We were mostly out exploring the town during our three days in Amsterdam but when we were at the place Shawna was friendly and helpful- she was able to answer all our questions on which buses we needed to take and if we needed anything else she said to just ask and let her know. She was a very nice host! Would definitely recommend staying here =)
Vanessa & Damian

Shawna's place is located in a lovely neighborhood that is quiet and charming yet within walking distance of the big tourist attractions. Really easy to get to from the airport. Shawna is a friendly host and couldn't have been more welcoming. The room itself was okay. It was clean and spacious but a bit decrepit, to be honest. The mattress is lumpy and the bathroom/shower is cramped. However, if you need a centrally located and affordable place to stay for one night, this place will do nicely. Also your money is being donated to charity. :) (PS - the Thai place next door is amazing.)
Great location and friendly host. Enjoyed our time in Amsterdam immensely.  Arie, come see us in Toronto some time!

La casa si trova in un bellissimo quartiere, comodo per la visita del centro città e vicino al capolinea del bus dall'aeroporto. La camera è adatta per 2 persone, meno per 4 perchè il materasso gonfiabile occupa tutto il pavimento e durante la notte si sgonfia come già letto in altre recensioni, anche se occupato da bambini.
Il soffitto a vetri è da un lato romantico, ma in estate lascia entrare molta luce fino alle 22 e dalle 5 di mattina, sarebbe utile mettere delle tende oscuranti per chi è abituato a dormire al buio.
Comodo il piccolo cortile per la colazione che necessiterebbe di una pulizia più accurata per evitare il cattivo odore causato dagli uccelli forse dei tetti circostanti. Pulita invece la camera ed il minuscolo bagnetto.
Abbiamo conosciuto Shawna al nostro arrivo ed è sembrata una persona disponibile, poi è partita per le vacanze e siamo rimasti con il figlio.
Abbiamo soggiornato qui due volte a distanza di una settimana e la seconda volta al nostro arrivo abbiamo trovato un foglio sulla porta scritto dal figlio che ci avvertiva che sarebbe rientrato il pomeriggio dal lavoro, così abbiamo dovuto aspettare oltre 3 ore in strada con i bagagli, tentando più volte di chiamare il cellulare di Shawna senza risposta per sapere almeno a chi lasciare i bagagli: sarebbe bastato avvertirci la mattina via email o telefono per evitarci una pesante attesa.
A parte questo piccolo incidente organizzativo, che immagino non si sarebbe verificato se fosse stata presente Shawna (assenza visibile anche dal caos che regnava sovrano ovunque!), consiglio il soggiorno in questa casa a chi volesse alloggiare in una zona molto comoda e caratteristica, a buon prezzo, senza troppe pretese.

This was our first attempt at using Airbnb so trusted the description of the accommodation on the website.
Unfortunately our host was away on holiday so we were cared for by her young son - charming but very relaxed.
Perhaps if our host had been at home then the accommodation would have been cleaner and the fridge cleaned and cleared of out of date food (the photograph on the website perhaps does not reflect the reality of the room). Generally the room felt tired and would certainly benefit from some TLC.
We were looking forward to using the garden area but feel that some poetic licence had been used in the description, an hours work on it, to tidy it and clear bags of household rubbish would certainly have improved things!
Although the website stated that there was a kitchenette in reality there was a fridge, a microwave oven and one electric ring. There was no dedicated work surface (although there was a table in the room that could have been used) and the washing-up area was in fact the wash basin for personal use.
Unfortunately there was no rails to hang clothes even though the room was spacious enough to have a wardrobe.
Overall we had to keep reminding ourselves that proceeds of our stay were going to charity and we were living in a far better way than the families that the charity was supporting.
Wir hatten einen sehr schönen Aufenthalt in Amsterdam. Das Zimmer ist super, nur mit 4 Personen ist es ein wenig eng aber das war uns vorher schon bewusst. Also volle 5*!

Excellent location!  Our family had a lovely experience and we were very comfortable.  Shawna was helpful and had information readily available about just about anything I needed.  Recommend highly and would definitely stay again.

Wir verbrachten 2 schöne Tage in Amsterdam. Shawna's Zimmer hat die perfekte Lage. Alles ist zu Fuß zu erreichen. Es ist sauber, erstaunlich ruhig und alles da was man so braucht (Dusche, Handtücher, Fön, Kühlschrank, Wasserkocher,  Geschirr) ist vorhanden.

We had a wonderful and pleasant time in Amsterdam. Shawna is a lovely host, always having an open ear for questions and wishes. The room is functional furnished and is located centrally in the beautiful Jordaan quarter. All main attractions are situated within walking distance. Next to Shawna's house you will find a good Thai restaurant, an eco-friendly supermarket, a drugstore and an Albert Heijn supermarket (open daily from 7:30 am until 10 pm). Despite
the urban location, the room is very quiet. Due to missing space for laying down or hanging up our clothes (we are 2 adults and 2 children) we deducted one star. Nevertheless, "The backroom" was the ideal base for our trip to Amsterdam!

Wir hatten eine wundervolle Zeit in Amsterdam und haben uns bei Shawna sehr wohlgefühlt. Sie ist eine nette Gastgeberin, die immer ein offenes Ohr für Fragen und Wünsche hat. Das Zimmer ist zweckmäßig eingerichtet, es liegt sehr zentral im wunderschönen Jordaan-Viertel, man kann alles bequem zu Fuß erreichen. Gleich nebenan befinden sich ein gutes thailändisches Restaurant, ein Käseladen, ein Bio-Supermarkt, eine Drogerie und ein Albert Heijn-Supermarkt (täglich geöffnet von 7:30 bis 22:00 Uhr). Trotz der zentralen Lage ist es im Appartement sehr ruhig. Einen Stern Abzug gibt es für die fehlenden Wandhaken, Kleiderstangen, Schrank- und Ablageflächen. Wir haben das Zimmer mit 2 Erwachsenen und 2 Kindern genutzt, manchmal hat es geregnet, da kommt eine Menge nasser Kleidung und Handtücher zusammen... Dennoch, "The backroom" war ein tolles Quartier für unseren Aufenthalt in Amsterdam!
we stayed two night in the back room. We had a lovely stayed, and recommend this place because it isreally well located to visit Amsterdam in a few days!

It was such a wonderful experience! I would definitely recommend this place as it is a really good location and it provides all the promised facilities and a bit more. Erik was so kind and the communication was so good!

Erik est ponctuel, il nous a gentiment accueilli à l'appartement lequel est situé dans le quartier Jordan. Très beau quartier et très bonne situation géographique. La chambre est privée, la salle d'eau et les WC communs. Nettoyage correct. La chambre dispose d'un frigo, micro-onde, cafetière, bouilloire. Thé et café sont à notre disposition. Draps et serviettes de toilette fournis. Erik a pris de nos nouvelles quotidiennement, il est très arrangeant et serviable ! Je recommande fortement.

Toujours très propre, à 10 Minutes à pieds du centre.
Les hôtes sont réellement à l'écoute.
Je recommande ce logement.

Bellissima esperienza la casa galleggiante, ci siamo trovati bene: molto pulita, ordinata, proprio come nelle foto; l'unica cosa, abbiamo avuto dei problemi con il wifi, ha funzionato solo il primo giorno. Sfortunatamente non abbiamo conosciuto direttamente Harry&Anna, ma ci ha accolti la madre di Harry, Loes che è stata gentile. Ci siamo trovati bene, fortemente consigliata! :)

It was a great experience staying at Harry and Anna´s  houseboat. All pictures were really close to reality, and they make all very easy to stay at their place. Only issue we had was that they notify us really close to our arrival that they would be away for the time we were at their house. We had to perform international calls to their mother (responsible to the house during this time and who did not respond promptly) to fix the internet, which was only working properly again after 3rd day. Also there is only one bathroom in the house, which is in the middle of both rooms separated by thin walls, so when someone is using the shower it is very noisy in the other room. If you have to wake up too long before the other room, this may be a problem, as you wake up everyone.

We enjoyed staying on Harry and Anna's houseboat very much. The use of the bikes was a great addition and the house had everything we needed. The heating was not working properly when we arrived, but it was sorted out straight away and fixed. Although we did not meet Harry and Anna, communication between them was very easy and always answered straight away. Thank you guys for a short but nice stay.
The accommodation was great ! We spent a great time in Amsterdam :-) And I recommend this accommodation !!

Hello - it goes without stating that the boat is just amazing and you will not regret staying here :) for early morning trains you wish it was closer to the train station but I assume you cannot have it all :)

Wir haben uns in dem Hausboot sehr wohl gefühlt, es war angenehm warm und komfortabel. Die Fahrräder haben wir während unseres Aufenthaltes ständig als Fortbewegungsmittel benutzt wobei wir Glück mit dem Wetter hatten. Auch die vollständig eingerichtete Küche ist ein großer Pluspunkt, da man Gäste zum Essen einladen kann und es sich im Winter doch auch gerne gemütlich macht. Alles in allem hat es uns sehr gut gefallen, nicht zuletzt auch durch die Nähe zum Wasser, wo wir Schwäne und Enten als Nachbarn hatten. W-lan funktionierte einwandfrei vom ersten Tag an. Die Gastgeber waren stets hilfsbereit und unkompliziert.

My 3 friends and me had a very nice stay at Nova Houseboat. The Houseboat was near the Olympic Stadium, and was therefor easy to find. We enjoy the peacefull surrounding. It was easy to take a bus or tramp to central Amsterdam. The Houseboat was cosy and there was plenty of space for the four of us. Harry came to welcome us, and informed us about, what we needed. Our weekend in Amsterdam was perfect.
Wonderful venue! Internet failed one day and got fixed. The owners live next door and are responsive to questions.

The houseboat is beautiful and is as described on the website, we had a most enjoyable stay the weather was kind to us and the location is perfect to get in and out of Amsterdam, we explored the local area around the Bosbann and Olympic stadium, we will come back again....maybe during the summertime, thanks again Harry and Anna for loaning us your houseboat.

La habitación es tal cual se la publica y su ubicación es excelente.
La anfitriona tuvo en todo momento una actitud muy cordial y de ayuda para con todas las consultas que le realizamos.
A nice place in a nice area!

The studio is a beautiful gem in my favorite neighborhood of Jordaan. It is a romantic little space with soft light from the windows, garden, and nice big comfortable room. It is very nicely located in the heart of the neighborhood.

Shawna and her family were warm and friendly hosts, and were helpful in making suggestions in the area.

What a great place Shawna has! It is spacious, cool looking, and very well located. The restaurants and grocery stores nearby were handy, the neighborhood wasn't packed with tourists, and Shawna was very accommodating, especially after an 8-hour flight. If we come back, we will try to stay here again!

My boyfriend and I stayed one night at Shawnas backyard room, which we found to be very cosy, warm and extraordinary. Especially the area of Shawnas home is very nice. Lots of interesting shops, galleries and individual cafés. Shawna is a very kind person and we can fully recommend a stay at her place!
Leuke, sfeervolle ruimte (wel beetje veel spinnenwebben bovenin :)). Een nachtje gebleven, helemaal perfect. Locatie is top
everything went without problems! cosy room in a very nice area of the city. perfect location for a short trip to amsterdam and a nice and easy going host! thanks
Nice location in the Jordaan in the heart of Amsterdam. De Negen Straatjes with a lot of lovely shops, bars and restaurants are in walking distantance. Shawna is a very friendly host.
Really sympathic, all was ok!

This room is great for 2 people but maybe a little too crowded for 4 which we didn't mind as we were on a budget. It was decorated nicely and quite clean. The outside section isn't  as tidy like the pictures but didn't phase us as it was wet and rainy anyway. Shawna and her family were absolutely lovely and all very friendly which made wandering through her house to get to the room quite comfortable. Overall if your a couple traveling this is a nice romantic room close to absolutely everything.

Shawana's backroom is just like the pictures, and the place is in a good location near city centre. The room is clean and very artistic and the hosts are very nice and friendly. It was a really good stay!

Amazing location with a reasonable price; however, it was way to cold and damp for the winter stay; the wall was not insulated at all so taking shower was painfully cold.  Secondly, the room just did not match up the photos provided. For example, a hot water maker inside was super moldy and high ceiling had spider webs here and there.  I would not go on with any more details out of respect but we won't be able to pick this place again.

My wife and I enjoyed our stay at The Backroom. The location (Jordaan gushing with old city charm) and the artistic design of the apartment are definitely its best assets. It might, however, get fairly chilly at night (in November) and warm PJs might come in handy.

Shawna is an inviting and friendly host and we would recommend The Backroom to anyone!
We had a lovely time staying in the back room. The location is fantastic and Shawna and her family were so welcoming and helpful. Great people, great location, and great digs!
Great location and a quirky apartment. Perfect for our stay. Shawna and her family were welcoming and accommodating.

Great stay at Shawna's. Bed was comfy, appreciate the warm room with extra heater in the cold winter. Room has all necessities: hair dryer, fridge, cooking facilities with a kind of laid back rustic feel to it. Recommended!

Our trip to Lisbon to see my son who is studying at Lisbon University as an exchange student provided our second stop in Amsterdam. Shawna provided our accommodation in Amsterdam. It was a delight to have selected Shawna's home. Her instructions to get to her place and help for what to do in Amsterdam was a great. I would recommend Shawna's place to anyone who wishes to travel to Amsterdam and need a place to stay.
Norbert.
Excellent host!

This place was amazing and we had everything we needed. Harry was super helpful in making sure we got all set up. The location is great, close to the Olympic stadium and right next to the tram and a short walk to the grocery store. The kitchen was perfect for cooking a few meals in. Everything was modern and clean. I would highly recommend staying here. This was our favorite place out of the many Airbnbs we stayed in throughout Europe.

Le logement est idem à la description. très agréable d'y séjourner et le cadre est magnifique.
Tout le confort dont on a besoin est présent. Ce logement offre calme et originalité.

hébergement sympa pour un trip sur Amsterdam ! certes pas central mais facile d'accès ( tram & métro ) et a proximité un parking peu cher ( chose rare dans le coin ) - le logement était propre neuf et conforme au descriptif et photos ...avec un p'tit terrasse sur le toit agréable - le concept maison bateau est très local. bref séjour plaisant à 3 avec fille de 7 ans - nous recommandons
Great host and lovely place! Good location! Very hospitable!

Ich habe die Unterkunft nur 1 Nacht genutzt. Sie ist sehr sauber und super zentral gelegen. Man ist direkt im Geschehen und kann vieles zu Fuß erkunden. Die Gastgeber sind sehr freundlich und verlässlich.

The back bedroom is a delightful accommodation and is perfectly placed for exploring the city.  We only had one night as a stopover but it had everything we could have needed for a longer stay too. Highly recommended!
an absolutely cozy place in a really nice neighborhood in the heart of the city centre. Really great, clean and stylish room to stay. Definitely suggested!
Een zeer gezellig plekje, vlakbij de 9 straatjes en zoveel meer. Een goede ontvangst en lekker geslapen met 4. Meer hoeft dat niet te zijn.

Thank you very much for your hospitality! Great place, lovely and very friendly family. The place was clean and completely suitable for 3 people. A place to recommend for a weekend or longer. Definitely.
The back room was a great stay. It was warm and comfortable and had all the necessities. Shawna was also very helpful with instructions on how to get to her place.

Myself and 2 others stayed in The Backroom for 4 nights. It is a lovely room, perfect for 3 people.  Shawna and her family are helpful and friendly, and the house is in a great location.  We were able to walk everywhere we wanted to go in the city. I definitely recommend staying here!
It was great. not bad...
séjour très sympa accueil sympa bien situé une bonne adresse.

The backroom is as impressive as it looks in the photos! A really big comfy room and in a great location. We had a great time and only wish we could have got to know the hosts a little better as they seem like a lovely family.

Tha place it's just perfect to experience the real amsterdam. The street is full of stores and next door there's a laundry.
Erick was really kind and helpful.
Highly recommend!!!
Fantastic hosts and amazing location. Erik and Mary Jo are warm and hospitable and charming. Made us feel like family. There is no place in Amsterdam I'd ptefer to stay... these two are the best.
We were two friends spending 3 days in Amsterdam: the place was clean, comfortable... just perfect ! Thanks a lot to Erik for his welcome :)

I didn't get to meet Mary Jo, but Erik was amazing! We had a later flight and even though he doesn't live in the building he waited for us with keys and patiently showed us around. He was super easy to communicate with and daily asked us if everything is ok. The room was big enough for me and my friend and the bathroom and shower was always clean. I will definitely book this place if I go back to Amsterdam!
Très bien !

Excellent location- key sites walkable, variety of good quality restaurants nearby etc. Erik is lovely and friendly, so welcoming and helpful by responding to my messages quickly. The room is cute and very clean, with everything you need and more available.

Great place for a quick stay. Erik was very friendly and welcoming. The room is very central, clean and comfortable. If you are sensitive to noise or aren't used to city sounds, we recommend a white noise app or machine. This helped us cancel out the street noise, nothing unmanageable. Do note that you share a shower and toilet with the guests in the other room. Also the stairs are steep coming in (although this is normal in Amsterdam) but for older folks who aren't used to stairs, this can be disorienting. Overall convenient stay!
Wonderful stay in a brilliant neighbourhood. Had a really comfortable stay. Would totally recommend for a no hassle stay close to everything in Amsterdam. :)

It was my first time in Amsterdam and this place the perfect one. Great location, great host, and great prices. Overall the room was clean, super comfy bed, and amazing places to eat nearby. I always recommend to friends to traveling to Amsterdam to stay here

We stayed at the front room and it was a very good experience. The room is well furnished with a fridge, a microwave, a sink. We could make ourselves coffee or even eat at the little table. It is a bit noisy in the night but that is also clearly stated in the description. For us, it wasn't a problem. The location is perfect! There are nice cafés, shops, bars and restaurants nearby. We wanted to see various museums and exhibitions in Amsterdam and we could reach them all very comfortably by public transportation from the nearby tram/bus stops. Amsterdam centraal is very near as well. Our check-in and check-out was flawless and on time. Throughout our stay Erik asked us several times if everything was ok and if we needed something. We, as a young couple, would very much recommend this place.
Todo muy bien! Ruidoso si, pero se duerme bien! Baño y cuarto limpio! Cerca de todo a pie! Muy recomendable

Staying at Eric and Mary house was very nice, it's a typical Dutch house in an area full of restaurants and pubs. The central station is 15 minutes walking and the host is really kind! Thank you so much!
Really good.💯

Salut tout le monde.
On a était super bien accueilli, la chambre est confortable et fonctionnelle. Au niveau de localisation c'est le top.
On a passé un super séjour.

駅からのｱｸｾｽは､わたしの足では10分では着きませんでしたが､中央駅から近く､周りにはおしゃれなｼｮｯﾌﾟやｽｰﾊﾟｰなどもあり滞在中楽しめました。
お風呂なども清潔で､街の中心近くではありますが夜はとても静かでした。

ﾎｽﾄが空港から部屋までのｱｸｾｽや､ｱﾑｽﾃﾙﾀﾞﾑに滞在するのにｵｽｽﾒのﾒﾄﾛやﾄﾗﾑが乗り放題のﾁｹｯﾄがあることなど､事前にﾒｯｾｰｼﾞ送ってくださり､とても助かりました。
安心して滞在でき､ｵｽｽﾒのお部屋です。
The location was very central. Into 10 minutes you can reach the central station and walk to a lot of other attractions. I would like to come back!
Nice clean room, 10 minutes walk from Centraal. Plus the hosts are lovely, helpful & attentive. Recommend! :)

This has got to be the best Airbnb experience ever. Erik was so attentive even before we arrived. Our room was so clean and cozy and there was even a nice little fruit bowl in the corridor that we could help ourselves to. Erik was super helpful with tips about Amsterdam and his hospitality was outstanding and you very much feel like you're being welcomed home. The place is very central and you can get to practically everywhere just by walking. We saw the Homomonument, the Anne Frank House, and even did a canal tour which were all within a ten minute walking distance. The people here are so friendly, and Amsterdam is such a lovely city. Go to the Foodhallen, go to the Van Gogh museum, as well as Rijksmuseum. The art, culture, and history, is all so beautiful and fascinating. Thanks Erik for letting us stay.

We enjoyed our stay. Erik is a friendly, very good host. He is quick and was more than attentive than I have ever experienced before. The flat is not big but tidy and we had three wonderful days and nights. If you come by train, the location is in walking (!) distance which is more then comfortable.
Wonderful location and welcoming people
Was a perfect stay to see Amsterdam! Its central but also a quiet place. Anytime again!

The location is perfect , only 10 minutes walk, the room is comfortable . They provide coffee , tea,fruits and chocolates .Erik and Mary Jo are so  kind  and warm ,like our family.Its a wonderful experience in Amsterdam:)

Très bon emplacement, a 10 minutes de tout, un très bon accueil et une très bonne réactivité aux messages. La chambre est exactement comme sur les photos, pas de mauvaises surprise. Elle était très propre et fonctionnelle.

What a nice host & what a beautiful room. It is located directly on one of the most beautiful streets to walk around and where you can find everything (coffeeshops, supermarkets, restaurants)

The host is sooo nice. He even gave us some sweets and fruits :-)

Erik's place is superb. I stayed in front room.  It is clean,  equipped with a microwave, cultery,  and for Amsterdam standard the room is spacious! I found Erik is a really helpful host. He texted me everyday during my stay via air bnb message to check if I needed anything.

Chambre propre et très bien située (pour moi dans le meilleur quartier d’Amsterdam). L’accueil par Erik fut parfait, La literie est un peu sommaire mais pas dérangeant vu le peu de temps passé dans la chambre. Je recommande ce logement et lors de mon prochain séjour je reviendrai ici.

Harry & Anna were incredibly accessible to us during our stay via email, and we found their beautiful houseboat very easily. Everything was clean and comfortable, and we couldn't have asked for a better place to stay for our first night in Amsterdam. Thank you!
enjoyed the houseboat particularly feeding the ducks and swans in the morning & use of the bikes.

The houseboat stay has fully satisfied our expectations. It is a nice and quiet place in bubbling Amsterdam to recover from the day excursions into the city. The bikes are the best way to get around in Amsterdam and we really appreciated having them on top of the wonderful accomodation. Thanks again Harald
Boat was amazing! Everything we expected. The hosts were very helpful and left us to enjoy our time. We can't wait to come back, would definitely recommend to a friend. Thank you!
Отличное место, обладает шармом. 25 минут пешком от Центрального вокзала и 15 минут от центра города. Shawna очень гостеприимна. Все было великолепно.
Everything was in order at Houseboat Nova. Thanks Harry and Anna for the opportunity to experience a few days on a convenient, quiet and lovely houseboat.

The houseboat is beautiful and very comfortable. It truly is an elegant place to stay. I was only there for one night but if I'm ever in Amsterdam for a few days or a week I plan to stay here and enjoy the place.
Very nice and easy to deal with hosts. Perfect weekend in Amsterdam. Very nice boat and deck.
The houseboat was fabulous. Very clean beautiful and peaceful. would absolutely stay there again. Photos very accurately described the house and the bikes were wonderful to use!

Abwicklung perfekt. Netter Kontakt. Sehr schöne Unterkunft. Die vermietete Wohnung liegt hinter! der abgebildeten Terasse - hat aber eine eigene Dachterasse. Räder sind super und sehr praktisch. Die Autobahn ist ca. 200m entfernt, stört aber nicht besonders.
Awesome place, wonderful service

Hermosa bienvenida nos recibieron Erik y Mary Jo muy amorosos ! , el depto tiene una ubicación ideal! La habitación es bastante amplia con todo incluido desde nevera hasta microondas ! Hermosa vista desde la ventana , y afuera hay un mueble con bastante información turística ! 100% recomiendo

Can't say how much we loved this room! We'd been to Amsterdam earlier, and had been wondering so much about the insides of the houses ... For three days we felt like we really lived in Amsterdam :) location couldn't be better ... Walkable to everywhere we wanted to go, but still felt like a lovely local street.
Good location. Only 15 min of train station.

Location was perfect! A short walk from the train station and near a bunch of unique shops and restaurants. Seemed slightly less touristy than further down the same road. The place was clean and tidy. The shared bathroom was the only slightly strange part with toilet and shower being in separate rooms and the sink being in the bedroom. Other than that place was great and relatively quiet and dark with the shades drawn.

We stayed for 3 nights at Amy's and were pleasantly surprised at how local and central it was to everything. We didn't need any bus/tram/train tickets and everything is within walking distance. The room itself was spotless, as were the bathroom facilities, and the place was full of thoughtful touches and all you could need for your stay. Erik was so welcoming and made sure we were comfortable for the entirety of our visit, checking in via email to see if he could do anything for us every now and again. Honestly can not recommend this place enough!! We will be back!
Lovely stay in an excellent location. Good host Erik who has offered much help. Totally recommend to others for a stay in Amsterdam.
Excelente anfitrión! Erick es muy amable y siempre pendiente a tu llegada.
I really enjoyed my stay at Erik and Mary Jos. The room was clean, well lit andf it was easy to walk everywhere. The street itself is also lovely and Erik was friendly and helpful.
Sleeping at their place was great. Although the room was small, all our demands we're there.  Erik and Mary Jo are super relaxed and flexibel with check-in and check-out! Thnx for having us. :-)

This place is super if you love the hustle and bustle and want to be in the middle of all the action. It was really awesome to stay here because it is in the middle of everything and you have easy access to public transit and shops and restaurants and you are just completely immersed in Amsterdam culture! :)

Oh my goodness how can I put into words how perfect my stay here was? The hosts are the nicest people you can meet. The room is in the cleanest and cutest part of Amsterdam with a million beautiful shops surrounding it. You must stay here.
Had a great stay, we enjoyed being in the hustle and bustle of the city centre, Erik was very attentive and quick to respond, and was able to let us stay later than the check out time
Nous avons passé un super week-end chez Erik. L’emplacement de l’appartement est idéal, en plein centre et à 10min à pieds de la gare. L’hôte est très réactif et aux petits soin. Nous recommandons!

Everything was perfect! Absolutely perfect! Every single detail was excellent! We had great time because we were able to rest and enjoy ideally at this place! Location was perfect, is like 10 min walking from the train station, is Netherlands’s style and super comfy place! Erik is super friendly and he can give you very good advices!
He was responding super fast all my messages, communication was perfect! This is in my top 3 of the best Airbnb places ever! :)
Erik and Mary Jo were very welcoming. The room and bathroom were clean and looked just like on the pictures! A nice stay to recommand except some noise on the last morning inside the house.

Great place to explore Amsterdam - we reached everything by foot. The area is fantastic: super cute stores, authentic bars, great restaurants ("Pho Viet", "SLA" vegetarian paradise!! & "Bagels & Beans" for the perfect breakfast) a great cinema ("The Movies") and a super-worth-to-go party location ("de marktkantine") are just around the corner. Erik makes you feel welcome the moment you step in and even provided some snackies (fresh fruit & chocolats) for us. The room is rather kept simple but had everything you need! We would love to come back & had a wonderful time - thanks again!

The room was exactly what u need for a central stay in the city. Plenty of Shops, cafes & restaurants within a few minutes walk! Lovely views for people watching too (: Erik was a great host, really understanding when we were delayed in getting there! Would def stay again! X

Vårt besøk hos Erik and Mary Jo var flott! Leiligheten lå sentralt til med butikker (og matbutikk) bare rett over gaten. Ellers var Erik veldig hjelpsom med en gang vi hadde noen problemer, og han ga oss gode tips for restauranter og steder å være eller ikke være. Anbefaler denne leiligheten sterkt for alle som bare har lyst til å ha et sted å sove som ligger greit sentralt til!

O Erik é um excelente anfitrião, responde sempre de imediato e está pronto a ajudar em qualquer detalhe durante a reserva e a estadia, para mim foi a mais valia de ter ficado neste lugar.
O espaço é simples e tem tudo o que é necessário para uma estadia curta, fica bem localizado, fora da zona mais barulhenta do centro, mas perto de qualquer lugar caminhando.

Erik molto cordiale e disponibile, ma odore terribile in stanza, pavimento sporco, stoviglie in pessimo stato... Non lo consiglierei. Con la precedente gestione (Gordon) era tutto perfetto. Siamo rimasti molto delusi.
ｱﾑｽﾃﾙﾀﾞﾑ中央駅から徒歩で行けるので､立地がとても良く便利でした！お部屋がかわいかったです。部屋にも鍵がついているので安心して過ごせると思います。そして､Erikはとてもいい人で､いつでもすばやい対応をしてくれました。ありがとうございました！
Súper Cool!
Location vraiment bien placée. Erik est très réceptif et attentionné, il a tout fait pour nous arranger. On a passé un super séjour. Nous recommandons vivement !

Erik was an amazing host! He check us if we need anything, was really flexible about check in. We had a problem with our train tickets so we arrived at night and he had mo problem! The room was very cozy and warm, perfect location we dont need to take any transportation at all.
If we return to Amsterdam we definitely stay at Erik’s!
Dobre miejsce, niebardzo daleko od starowki, uprzejmy gospodarz.
Erik and Mary Jo were very hospitable. The room was sunny and in an excellent part of town. Check in was easy and they offered advice for getting around town. Overall great experience!
Lovely host, very helpful and willing to give tips about where to go/ what to see etc. Very comfy bed, clean and good location. Would highly recommend!

This place is absolutely great. Literally a short walk to everything you could possibly want to see in Amsterdam.

Everything ran so smoothly and the accommodation was perfect for our short city break.

Eric is the best host possible, couldn’t fault him in any way. His knowledge of the city really came in handy when looking for something to do, and he was just always willing to help out.

Couldn’t praise this place any more! Really had the best time!
Thanks so much!
Excelente ubicación Erik siempre muy atento a si necesitábamos algo.Lugar 100% recomendable.Muchas gracias por todo!
great place！
Séjour très agréable, nous avons beaucoup apprécié l'accueil, la propreté, l'emplacement de la chambre, les petites attentions (fruits & chocolats).
The room was great--sunny and very clean. Erik and Mary Jo super nice, as well!

Erik's place is very well located and he is a great host, directions were super clear and he was waiting for us even after our plane was delayed for 1.5hs. Zero issues with the shared bathroom. Amsterdam was a bit chilly but Erik's place was always warm and comforting. Only thing to note for older people is that the stairs are a bit steep (as in most Amsterdam historic houses I assume). Thanks Erik!

The location is perfect. Near from Amsterdam Central station (8 min walk) and walking distance from Anna frank house, jordaan canal, red light district, etc. The place for me wasn't noisy.  The room has tea and coffee service so you can prepare something to drink, it has a microwave and fridge.
a lovley room where downstair street has lots of lovely fashion shops

Great place right in de Jordaan. Centrally located, stand-alone room with skylights. Very cute but you'll want earplugs if you're a light sleeper and eyemask if you sleep in late. Shawna was extremely flexible and helpful. Everything you need is close by!

We had a lovely time, Shawna and her family were great hosts! They were very helpful when we had questions about the bus system. The Backroom was super cute, a perfect place for two, and a great location.
Such a cute little room located in the garden of the host's house, so close to the centre of Amsterdam and within walking distance to most major attractions!
The backroom was perfect even though it was a bit cold (but it was in february...) . The room is beautiful, it's perfectly located in the city and Shwana is very friendly !

The room cannot be better located within Amsterdam, everything you could possibly want to see is no more than a short walk away. The room was clean, and very comfortable to stay in. There is plenty of natural light and a very homely atmosphere. I did not meet Shawna, but I did meet her daughter and friend and they were so friendly and welcoming. I would definitely recommend this room, especially in the summer when it will be a little less cold.

Great flat, brilliantly located in the Jordaan neighbourhood, with easy access to Dam square et al. Many restaurants on the road itself that we didn't check out but, a pancake place around 3minutes walk away, which was awesome!

Shawna wasn't there but her friend Trish was there to meet us, hand us the keys and any information we needed. The backroom itself was tastefully furnished, clean and welcoming. Was a bit cold, but coming from Switzerland where we have non stop heating and well insulated flats, that's not really a complaint, just an observation. There was ongoing construction work that started at 8am, and the ceiling lets in a lot of light, but there are eye masks provided to avoid this.

All in all, would recommend it to anyone and definitely stay there again. Cheers Shawna!

The location of the apartment couldn't be more central and we had a lovely time staying with Shawna.

The apartment is not meant for four people but Shawna accommodated us very kindly!
We had a great stay. It's an interesting and quirky place and the family were very welcoming

We had a most pleasant couple of nights stay in the Backroom in Amsterdam. The room was cozy, brightly lit by a large skylight and accessible through a privat garden court, unfortunately not yet useable due to the early spring weather in Amsterdam.  Shawna was a very pleasant host and made sure we were as comfortable as we could be.  I would certainly recommend the Backroom and would use it again should I ever get back to Amsterdam.
What a cute garden apartment. It was easy to check in- great for a quick night's stay! And in a great location!
Awesome location. Near good shopping, restaurants, and sights. Highly recommend getting take out and eating by the canal on a sunny day.
No problems here. Enjoyed our stay.
We had a very nice stay in the "antichambre". It's well situated, many good restaurants around. The bed is comfortable. Shawna and her family are friendly. We recommend you to stay there!

I had an excellent time in Amsterdam and the Backroom was perfect for all of my needs. Everything in the apartment was as described and Shawna was very responsive and friendly. The apartment is in the middle of a fantastic neighborhood where you have a wide variety of eating and drinking options. I even went to go see a movie just down the street. All in all, it was a fantastic experience and I would highly recommend the Backroom to anyone.

My parents and I were very lucky to find this amazing place in center of Jordaan in Amsterdam. (5mn by foot from Anne Franck Huis)
This Antichambre is very convenient; lot of shop are just few steps outside (groceries, take away restaurant with tasty food). Hot water everytime, WiFi, clean blanket, confortable beds and a lot of light inside the bedroom make this place a must.
At night, you sleep as a baby because it's very quiet place.

For sure, If I have to come back in Amsterdam, I will select again this place.

About the host, Shawna was very kind and very helpfull each time we needed some infos/advices. Thanks a lot for your welcome :)

The back room is perfectly situated in the central Amsterdam with an access to public transport of both bus and tram. On top of that, there are many restaurants within the area, serving both western and oriental tastes. Tourist attractions are reachable by foot; in fact, the city is best to be explored by foot as it is beautiful both day and night. With regard to the room itself, it is artistically designed with two double beds serving four people. Eventhough the bathroom is a little bit too small for our preferences, it is offset by other aspects. The room is warmth with three heaters; other facilities include microwave, and refrigerator. Wifi works strongly, providing fast connection to the internet.
My daughter and I had a great week in the Backroom in April. Very charming room and just perfect location. I would highly recommend the place.

Erik was a great host and his place was very well located.a definite recommend

Raj

Thank you for a wonderful stay the house is lovely and modern with everything we needed. We used the bikes a lot. After we found the house (we had no internet) it was very convenient from the trams which had great services. Would love to come and visit again! Thanks!
Loved the boat house. It is pretty, super clean, well decorated and so very quiet. Everything in the kitchen was provided. Thank you.

Harry house is wonderful very clean and spacious unfortunately the weather (was a bit cold) doesn't allow us to use the terrace...
the location is not really in the centre but Harry provide for us 4 bicycle those are really fantastic in order to explore amsteram
Great people great place! :)

Bonjour,
Tout était conforme à la description et le quartier était très agréable. Belle expérience sur un "bateau maison"... vie à la hollandaise, dans la nature et sur l'eau.
Le "quartier" permet un accès rapide par tram au coeur d'Amsterdam et de belles balades à vélo dans les parcs !
la proximité de l'autoroute ne gène en rien : la maison-bateau est très bien isolée et les nuits sont de tout repos !

Nous avons été trés gentillement accueilli par harry et sa maman. La maison bateau est trés agréable , trés propre et trés bien équipée et dêcorée. Le fait de pouvoir visiter Amsterdam en vélos est tout simplement un vrai bonheur !encore merci pour tout .

Vielen Dank für den schönen Aufenthalt in Ihrem Hausboot! Die Wohnung ist sehr gut ausgestattet und neuwertig eingerichtet. Die Räder konnten wir angesichts des Wetters leider nicht nutzen, da wir nicht so abgehärtet wie die Niederländer sind! Morgens wurden wir von einem Schwan begrüßt. Vielen Dank nochmals und vielleicht bis bald!

Très bon accueil bien que nous soyons arrivés en avance. Logement conforme à la description . Quartier très calme et proche du centre. La mise à disposition de linge est très pratique lorsque l'on vient en moto.
Nous avons particulièrement apprécié la clarté du logement ainsi que l'espace disponible. La terrasse est un plus pour se détendre entre amis . Le fait de disposer de vélos est génial et permet de profiter pleinement d'Amsterdam.
Le café et le thé en libre service est une délicate attention qui montre la qualité de l'accueil.

The Backroom was great! Pictures and descriptions were all very accurate. Centrally located, it was close to anywhere we wanted to be; shopping, grocery store, canal walks, transportation, etc. We loved the airiness of the room, it was fresh, not stuffy like a hotel. Thanks, Shawna and family!
Muy buena recepción por parte de Shawna. Estuvimos muy cómodos disfrutando nuestra estadía. El lugar es muy tranquilo y cercano al centro de la ciudad.Muy buena experiencia.

The Backroom was absolutely perfect! As a solo traveler who might get a little paranoid about getting around I couldn't have asked for a better accommodation. The last bus stop from the airport lands you basically right at the street, so getting lost with connections and whatnot wasn't an issue. Though the bus cost is 5 Euro, not 4 (no biggie at all). The space itself was very warm and comfortable. I slept great and having the open glass ceiling made waking up rather nice. The street has everything you need: ATM, grocery store, pharmacy, restaurants, late night snacks, shops, there's awesome ice cream around the corner. And it's super close to a lot of the attractions. Finally, Shawna is super nice and willing to answer any questions or help out when needed. I would absolutely stay here again without a doubt.

The 'Backroom' at Shauna's house is exactly as described.
The location is perfect walking distance to all downtown Amsterdam has to offer you.
Right on the same street there is a ATM, Grocery store, cheese store, and great pub (with the red and green striped awning).

Shauna and her family were lovely, easy to interact with, and check in and check out we're easily co-ordinated.

We would stay here again.

Katie and Jesse

If you are looking for a special Appartement directly in City You are right.
The Location of the flat is wonderful.
But all in all we were a bit disappointed about the condition of the flat because the room was rather poor.
And there is no possibilty to lock the room if you are on your way.

My 18 year old daugther stayed ther with two girlfriend. They found that the studio is very well situated in one of the nicest parts of Amsterdam. Although you're close to the crowded center you don't hear much noise, except from the neighbors. The studio is very bright, because of the glass ceiling, which is perfect if you wan't to spend your day discovering the city from 8 am for example - but could be disturbing if you would prefer to sleep in.
We didn't get to meet Shawna but we met her family which was very nice and we had a wonderful time!

This little studio is perfectly situated, but I wouldn't recommend it for more than 2 people because of space. The family stores their things in the closets, with no space left for yours. Towels are not provided. The hosts don't check to see if you need anything. And good luck calling upstairs to get anyone's attention--we tried it twice and got no answer though we could hear them. Overall, it's a great way to kip cheaply in the Jordaan, but don't expect much more. It's a shame in a way because with a little effort it could be really special!

Hidden gem.  Great way to be close to but away from the bustle of tourist Amsterdam.  We loved the neighborhood and cafes.  We also loved the room itself.  It was fun to spend a sunny day on the patio with wine and cheese that we bought next door.  Thanks Shawna.
Bra och flexibelt välkomnande. Bra informationsblad  på rummet. Väldigt mysigt, kul, centralt område på utmärkt gata. Massor av bra restauranger, alternativa  butiker. Vi gillade det hela familjen

The artist's studio is an interesting place and it perfectly accommodated our needs. Shawna was a good host, even when I was unable to communicate before arrival. The place is kind of rustic, however it's location is absolutely perfect, right in the midst of all that oneight want to see in Amsterdam.

Great space. Perfect alternative to a boring and cramped hotel.  Everything was exactly as described. We did not get to meet Harry or Anna but they had all in order for us, so thank you.  Maybe we can meet next time.

Houseboat Nova is in a beautiful spot and the facilities are perfect.  We used the bicycles to explore the area but found it more convenient to travel into the centre by tram.  We thoroughly enjoyed the 3 days we spent on the houseboat and would recommend it to anyone wanting peace and quiet.

Der Aufenthalt im Hausboot hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Das Haus ist schön eingerichtet und wurde sehr sauber an uns übergeben. Die Fahrräder sind praktisch um die Umgebung zu erkunden.
Etwas irritiert hat uns, dass das Hausboot hinter dem Hier abgebildeten Haus liegt.

Perfekt zum Erholen, da ruhige schöne Umgebung. Gerne Wieder

très beau boat house tout était tel que décris, c,est comme à la campagne et à dix minutes en tram du centre ville ,juste à l'arrière du stade olympique, si vous arrive à la gare central je preconise de prendre le tram 14 ou 26 ,je trouve que cela est mieux que l'autobus

The house is just as shown in the pictures, it is very beautiful and comfortable. It is amazing how we are living in a boat house. The guide by the host is very detailed and there is no problem of getting there at all. Everything is swift and smooth! I shall be back if I am happened to be in Amsterdam again!

Quelle magnifique housseront cosy et toute douillette; a 15 min du centre en vélo, et vélo généreusement prêter par HARRY :)

Nous avons passé un super week end prolongé marci Amsterdam, merci Harry

Véronique et stéphane

Das Boot war exakt wie auf den Bildern dargestellt. Wir Anna und Harry kurz kennengelernt, aber an sich ist man völlig autonom in der Wohnung. Die Fahrräder sind praktisch für kleine Ausflüge oder Einkäufe. Wir nutzten aber eher Trambahn und Busse (Ijsbaahnpad, ca. 6 Gehminuten).
Eine sympathische Unterkunft in einer tollen Stadt!
Diese Unterkunft ist in allen Bereichen erstklassig! Netter und freundlicher Kontakt mit den Gastgebern. Auch die Tatsache Fahrräder  zu haben ist spitze. Sehr empfehlenswert!
Excelente experiencia, muy limpio, espacioso, con todas las comodidades ... La zona muy bonita cerca del estadio olímpico, zona tranquila y con buena conectividad, en general 100% recomendable

Das Hausboot ist für 4 Personen prima ausgestattet. Die Innenstadt ist mit den dazugehörigen Fahrrädern in ca. 20 Minuten zu erreichen. Harry und Anna waren sehr hilfsbereit. Insgesamt sehr empfehlenswert.

The houseboat is in a quiet neighborhood jam-packed with houseboats. This houseboat is one of the new and very modern ones. Everything was according to the description apart from one bike having a flat tyre. Also note that the nice deck seen on the photo is not accessible since the houseboat is divided in two separate units and the deck belongs to the other unit. But there's a little sundeck on the roof at least.

Wonderful hosts. A lovely houseboat in a quiet part of town, a perfect home away from the hustle and bustle of the city centre. Very clean, comfortable and well decorated. Excellent communication and advice given.

We had a great stay. The boat was modern and well decorated. It was very clean. It was easy to find from the directions. It took us about 30-40 mins to walk into the city and the tram was also very close. The local area was very interesting and some lovely restaurants within 15 mins walk. I had a small issue with the parking as I have a right hand drive car. After opening the barrier it closed before I could drive away. Fortunately I had a second token so managed to get out. There were 2 double beds and a spacious bathroom. Harry was happy to loan us a double air bed to give us flexibility in sleeping arrangements.
