The bikes were Dutch bikes so if you are under 5 foot 4 inches bring your own or try platform shoes! The kitchen was well equipped. No freezer or microwave but there was plenty of tea and coffee and fridge space. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and wish we could have stayed longer. Thank you Harry and Anna.

We had a wonderful experience at Nova Houseboat. It is very clean and nice. Harry is also helpful. Harry referred us to a reliable taxi driver, Sen. It was a pleasant stay for us, wish to come back again one day.

Very nice houseboat, perfect with the bikes that comes along:)
They were very helpful with time for both check in and check out. Can definitely recommend this place:)

The place is exactly as described. It's in a wonderful neighbourhood away from the bustling crowd. Bikes are essential if you want to explore the city so that makes this houseboat a bonus. We had some tire issues with two of the bikes but Harry was very quick to respond. We had a great time in Amsterdam and would recommend the houseboat as a great option. One of the bonuses of the place was being near the Olympic training centre that happens to be in a forest close to the houseboat. We went there in evening and morning for workouts and to enjoy the scenery.

Unfortunately we didn't meet the hosts but the boat was easy to find and instructions were clear. And it's a lovely little place if you like modern living, want to have a break from the bustle of the centre but be close enough buy to walk or cycle in.  Only note is that we were slightly disappointed that the main photo - and it's beautiful terrace- isn't actually part of the property, and it was a 25 min walk to the closest shop to even get some milk on arrival.
Only stayed one night but Erik was lovely and had everything we needed ready. Great location, clean room with a kettle and microwave and fridge which were handy.
Todo bien. A tener en cuenta que si vienen con valijas pesadas o grandes la escalera es empinada. Lo recomiendo.
A lovely room in the heart of all the great shops and restaurants. Also a great location to Amsterdam Centraal train station but easy walking distance to museums.
Great host. Very confortable and clean room in a great location near Central Station. Always in touch and helpful, also very clear in the comunication. I would recomend 100%!!

Great place in a perfect location. The space is clean and it's nice to have your own fridge and sink in the room. I will warn light sleepers that the street outside this room is noisy at night so I recommend bringing a set of ear plugs. Otherwise, the bed is comfy and I slept great!

Just meeting Erik and Mary Jo and hearing a bit about what they have done with their lives in Amsterdam was a pleasure in and of itself.  Aside from that, their place is clean, all you need, and in a lovely neighborhood! We felt so welcomed and taken care of. Thank you, Erik & Mary Jo. See you again!

A little room, conveniently located, clean, with everything one needs and a couple of really nice touches like an assortment of snacks in case of late night appetite ;)

Great communication and very, very nice hosts. Thank you again!
Ich war nur für eine Nacht in dieser Unterkunft. Sie war sehr sauber und super zentral gelegen. Der Gastgeber war sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Ich kann’s nur weiterempfehlen.
Great place! The hosts were awesome with availability and communication. We'd stay with them again.

Avec ma femme, nous avons visité Amsterdam pendant 4 jours. Le logement est très bien situé (pas loin de la gare Central). Le lit est confortable et l'appartement est propre. Erik est très sympa et nous a bien accueilli. Je recommande.

My husband and I and our two teenage daughters stayed in the Back Room for 5 nights. I was led to believe that the room could accommodate 4 people but it was very cramped and uncomfortable for us. It was, in my opinion, only suitable for two people. The family house is in a fabulous location, close to local amenities, restaurants and shops and within easy walking distance of museums, the city centre shopping area and some delightful designer shops and antique shops. We stayed in separate accommodation behind the main house, which bore more of a resemblance to a shed than an apartment. While the supply of hot water for showers was adequate and the towels provided by the host were the most luxurious I have ever had the privilege to use, we were unhappy about the absence of a wash hand basin in the bathroom. The makeshift bathroom door meant that privacy was not afforded to family members using the toilet. There were no windows in the accommodation and there were two rows of glass panels in the roof so it was very hot most of the time but the host provided us with a very powerful fan which went some way towards keeping down the temperature. She also gave me the loan of an electrical adapter when I realised that I had brought a wrong one with me. A few clothes hangers dangling from curtain tracks were provided for clothes so the girls and my husband had to live out of their suitcases while I managed to store a few garments in one tiny set of drawers, about the width of a school ruler. The rest of my belongings were also consigned to my suitcase! It was very trying to sort out our daily clothing needs in the limited space in which the four of us found ourselves. There was a lot of storage space in the ‘ Backroom’ but the shelving, which was fronted with curtains, was all taken up with the host’s possessions! I was very pleased with the ample fridge which was ideal for storing the lovely fresh food that was readily available from shops only a few doors away from the house. Cooking facilities were very limited but that was not an issue for us. It was not possible for us to use the dining table provided in the Backroom because of lack of space and we could not use the garden table just outside our accommodation as that was invariably taken up by the family in the evenings when we wanted to use it! So we used our beds as seats whenever we ate in! Cutlery and crockery were provided in an open shelf beside the bed so they were subject to a lot of dust. The invasion of our privacy was very upsetting. One of my first recollections was of seeing my host’s foot through the partially opened door of the shed which we occupied. She was seated right outside our...

Hermoso barrio, a pocas cuadras de central Station. Hay que subir escaleras ( solo un piso) pero Erik muy gentilmente nos ayudó. Habitación cómoda, luminosa y con una linda vista a la calle. Cuenta con calentador de agua, microondas y algunos utensilios de cocina. Muy linda experiencia.

Хорошая квартира все как на фото! Есть все удобства , чайник , микроволновка, фен, полотенца. Удобная большая кровать . До центра 10 мин пешком. Была с подругой остались очень довольны . Спасибо Erik за гостеприимство !!!

Erik's place is wonderful! And a very good value! What I love most is the location, I really love the Jordaan neighborhood and it is convenient to the Centraal Station. The Anne Frank house is nearby, you are close to Dam square, there are several local outdoor markets nearby, as well as tons of cute and cozy bars, restaurants, and shops. You simply cannot find anywhere else a nice, safe, clean, friendly place to stay in this neighborhood for this price (I paid $407 for 3 nights in May). My room was very clean, as was the bathroom and the shower. The bed was very comfortable (a new bed too, from Ikea I believe), I had 2 pillows, and in the bedroom was a sink, a small fridge, a coffee maker, and a hot water maker. Also provided were tea bags, coffee, cream and sugar, and some fruit and candy. Shampoo packets too.

Erik was very nice and super responsive to all my emails and (Hidden by Airbnb) texts. I was travelling alone as a woman and security was important to me and I felt safe at all times. Erik is very kind and speaks perfect English (American, that is).

The room I stayed in is the room on the shopping street, so if you like to look out your window and see people and shoppers and Dutch locals on bikes, then this is a good room for you. I had the chance to see the other room across the hall which is not on the street and has a small balcony (unlike the room on the street). They are both nice rooms, you just have to decide what you prefer - would you rather be able to watch the street action or would you rather have a quiet balcony? The room on the street gets the afternoon sun, which on a cold day would make the room feel nice and warm.

I would not hesitate to stay here again, in either room. Thank you Erik! I hope to stay at your place again next time I come to Amsterdam!
Erik é muito atencioso, responde as mensagens rápido. O chuveiro é quente e o quarto é confortável. Recomendo muito!
Great place to stay in Amsterdam! Highly recommend. The place has everything you need

Erik was very nice from the very beginning. The place was definitely as expected, well located, spacious. Special amenities as shampoo, coffee, tea, water, fruits and chocolates. Would definitely choose this Erik’s place again :)

Un lugar MARAVILLOSO.
Ubicación impecable.
Cada detalle en su lugar.
Un cargador de celular para usar.
Canasta de frutas y chocolates!!!!!!!

La habitación muy cómoda, cálida y muy funcional.

Tenía una mesa con 2 sillas, una canilla con una bacha para lavar los platos, platos, cubiertos, café, heladera, pava eléctrica, microondas, cafetera, secador de pelo, toallas... de todo...

La ducha funcionaba muy bien y el baño también.

Todo muy limpio y nos recibieron muy cálidamente a la 1 de la mañana!!!!!

La ubicación es envidiable, muy cómodo, fuimos caminando a toda la parte centrica de la ciudad sin esfuerzo.

Cuando vuelva a Amsterdam, seguramente vaya a la misma habitación!

깔끔하고 쾌적한 숙소 였습니다. Erik은 메세지에 빠르게 응답해주었고, 불편한 사항이 없는지 확인해주었어요.  편안하게 먹을 수 있게 오렌지,자두,바나나,초코렛류를 비치해놓아서 좋았습니다. 예약할때 약간 비싸다고 생각했는데 네덜란드 물가랑 비교해볼때 최고의 선택이었던것 같아요! 무엇보다 상점과 주택이 있는 곳에 위치하여 현지인이 된 기분으로 즐겁게 생활하다 왔어요^^

Communication with Erik was really easy. He sent us precise instructions on how to find the place, welcomed us in person, and checked in on us to make sure that everything was okay. The room was really clean and the location was perfect. Would definitely recommend!
Erik is a amazing host. We spend a really good time there. 100% recommend

Erik est très accueillant et toujours disponible pour ses invités. Il nous a demandé plusieurs fois pendant notre séjour de 3 jours si nous avions besoin de quelque chose et si tout allait bien.
La chambre est petite mais agréable, rapidement chaude lorsque la température est élevée à l’extérieur mais le ventilateur présent est très utile.
La cafetière, la bouilloire et les thès disponibles sont très appréciables.
Le lit (matelas, draps) est tout à fait propre et confortable.

Seul bémol, la salle de bain et les toilettes à partager avec la chambre en face du couloir. En effet les touristes ont souvent le même rythme, donc les « embouteillages » du matin sont à prévoir.
de plus, d’un point de vue hygiénique il est préférable d’emmener des claquettes de piscine ou des tongs pour utiliser la douche et les toilettes.

Erik and Mary Jo’s place is AMAZING! We were greeted by Erik who showed us around the room, and gave us some local tips which are always appreciated. He is very kind! the location is perfect! 10 minute walk from Centraal station, close to public transportation, shops and restaurants, across the street from a supermarket, a few blocks away from bike rental places and in a very very pretty neighborhood :) The room consists of a very comfy bed, a microwave, mini fridge, utensils, table with some chairs, as well as a sink and mirror INSIDE the room! The toilet and shower are just outside the bedroom. Overall this is a very nice place to stay while in Amsterdam, in a GREAT location! This was our second time in amsterdam, we love this city so much! Definitely rent bikes and visit Foodhallen for delicious food options :)

This was the perfect place to stay during our few days in Amsterdam. Erik was very easy to work with and he even unblocked an extra night for us when our plans changed and we wound up in Amsterdam earlier than originally planned. We stayed in the front room and loved watching the people down on the street. The fan was great to keep the street noise out at night. We didn't find sharing a bathroom or a shower to be any kind of annoyance, and all in all were really pleased with this place. Would absolutely recommend!

Bien située. Rue bruyante durant la journée mais relativement calme la nuit, la fenêtre fermée. Erik était très rapide à répondre à nos questions. En lisant les commentaires, nous pensions qu'il y avait un déjeuner d'inclus, mais ce n'est plus le cas.
Great place to stay in the heart of Amsterdam. Erik was extremely hospitable.

Erik is a lovely host - very responsive, helpful and friendly. He kindly let us check in early as the guests before us had left a little early. The room is in an amazing location, on a lovely street just 10 minutes walk from the train station and very accessible to the whole city. The fruit bowl and chocolate bars were a lovely extra touch from the hosts! Definitely recommend if you’re in Amsterdam for a few days.

You can expect hospitality and an extremely quick communicator in this host! Erik was attentive and went the extra mile; when we couldn't find a place to print our boarding passes he went out of his way to print them for us, just in the nick of time! Would happily stay with them again. Their place is off the beaten path so it's quieter and less touristy than most places which we truly loved.

Nice confortable room, with all necessities for 2 people. In center of Amsterdam, next to the train station. Erik is a very nice host ! I recommend strongly his rooms! If I can, I book again for next time

Great location. Very clean and comfortable space! Erik provided us with great directions and we were able to find the place easily. He was also very good about communicating before, during and after our trip.  Would also recommend a restaurant called Cafe Harlem which is very close to their place. Very good food and a fun atmosphere!
Erik and Mary Jo’s place was lovely and clean and super centrally located. It was exactly what we were looking for and Erik was very helpful meeting us for check-in.

Die Unterkunft war einfach, aber sehr sauber und zweckmäßig. Die Lage ist sehr günstig. Die Gastgeber haben unsere Fragen schnell beantwortet. Bei der Ankunft wurde uns frisches Obst, süsse Snacks, Trinkwasser und Reiseführer kostenlos zur Verfügung gestellt. Wir können die Unterkunft weiterempfehlen.
Great location, fantastic hosts and super clean accommodation. Would stay again. Thanks folks!
Great place to stay while in Amsterdam- centrally located, close to lots of shops and restaurants, and very nice hosts. Definitely recommend this place!
We had an amazing time staying at Erik and Mary Jo's home! They were extremely communicative and the location is unbeatable!!
The local is really good. Close to the city center. Eric gave us AMAZING tips for music, we really enjoyed our time in Amsterdam
Lovely room, all we needed for a short stay in Amsterdam. Location was great, 5-10 minute walk to the main centre of the city. Great touches and Erik was very attentive.

Erik and Mary Jo were awesome! Great hosts. They live in such a great location near the Centaal Station. I fell in love with the street they were on! Spent most nights just walking those streets and popping into local restaurants and shops. Highly recommend
We really enjoyed our stay. Erik was very attentive and helpful and it was a pleasure staying at his place in central Amsterdam. Thank you!
Very helpful host and wonderful stay here in Amsterdam, highly recommend!
great location, close to centraal station. served our needs and the host, Erik was very welcoming.
Great location, great host, would HIGHLY recommend to anyone!
Exceptional! Super clean and neat. Beautiful windows and fantastic location. Very central and close to everything. Love it!
EXCELENTE TODO!!!! Recomiendo a Erik. departamento impecable. personas cálidas. cumplieron con todo.

Quartier et chambre vraiment très bien pour une courte durée sur Amsterdam ( 1 semaine ).
Erik était vraiment super sympa très attentionné avec beaucoup de gentillesse !
Je recommande ++++++

central position, first floor in a lovely street where you can find whatever you need/want during your staying in Amsterdam, really very clean, variety of food to take for free (breakfast not included). very recommended!
Great location, being able to access an authentic Amsterdam experience.
Clean, great area to stay in.

Location was excellent - close enough to everything, but far enough from the crazier areas of town.

Sharing the toilet and shower wasn't a problem at all. It's good the facilities are separated into 2 rooms. And everything was clean.

Thanks for having us Erik!
Best part of the place is it’s great location. Erik was utmost helpful and was such a pleasant host. I would recommend this place.
Wonderful experience. The houseboat is lovely, quiet, and very modern. I would definitely suggest staying here for anyone coming to Amsterdam.

Staying in this houseboat was excellent. It is just as described, and having the rooftop terrace there was great. Our hosts were lovely, but we only saw them right at the beginning. Having access to the bikes proved very useful. All in all we had a terrific time.
De boot ligt op een top lokatie en is ideaal voor twee stelletjes. In combinatie met de fietsen was het top. Alles was super schoon en fris

Beautiful and modern. Everything worked and we enjoyed the ride into and from the centre of town. Supermarket close by and also enjoyed our rides through Vondelpark. Wish we had had more time to enjoy the houseboat balcony and Amsterdam.
Great place to stay, very comfortable, lots of space, very clean and super nice hosts! Thx a lot for this nice experience!
We loved our time at the houseboat! It is very comfortable, has everything you need and the rooftop terrace is a real bonus. We highly recommend the Nova Houseboat
We had a good  stay in this beautiful houseboat. Really nice place to enjoy a visit to Amsterdam

Das Hausboot war wie beschrieben eine sehr schöne Location, ruhig gelegen und dennoch nah am Grachtengürtel (15-20 min bis ins Zentrum).
Wir haben uns dort sehr wohlgefühlt, das Hausboot ist sehr schön und komfortabel eingerichtet. Es ist alles vorhanden, was man für eine Ferienwohnung und einen Urlaub braucht. Zudem sind alle Räume sehr sauber und das Equipment ist voll funktionsfähig.
Der Kontakt zu Harry und Anna war sehr unkompliziert und sie haben immer sehr schnell geantwortet. Wir wurden mit allem Wissenswerte und Notwendigem zur Unterkunft frühzeitig informiert.
Für uns war es ein gelungener Urlaub in einem sehr schönen und empfehlenswerten Hausboot (Selbst unser kleiner Hund hat sich dort sehr wohl gefühlt - lag wohl auch an den Enten und Schwänen, die jeden Tag vorbei schwammen ;-) )
Alles in allem ist dieses Hausboot ideal für ruhige, erholsame Ferien in einer City wie Amsterdam.

Très bon moment passer a bord du houseboat.
très bonne accueil, le logement et impeccable.

nous retournerons a Amsterdam dans se logement sans hesiter

merci pour se weekend
住在水上，还有野鸭，水鸟，天鹅相伴，安安静静身处大自然中，真好！

Excellent houseboat. Clean and had everything we needed. The bikes provided enabled us to cycle into the city and enjoy the sights. Would recommend this friends.
Lyn & Ann
Das Hausboot liegt in einem etwas ruhigeren Teils Von Amsterdam. Es ist ziemlich leicht zu finden. Die Schlüssel "übergabe" hat problemlos funktioniert ohne Stress für alle Beteiligten.
The houseboat was very comfortable and located in a quiet family neighborhood. I would totally recommend it to anyone looking for an interesting and cool place to stay while visiting Amsterdam!
Sehr schönes Hausboot, problemlose Abwicklung, haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt

Room exactly as in the photos ! And we were thrilled that even with the most rainfall in 50 years the glass roof didn't leak :) !
Nice hot shower - perfect sized room in a great location! Shawna and her husband were most friendly and accommodating and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay!
We had a fantastic time at Shawna`s beautiful guesthouse. The location is perfect. You will find shops just around the corner and lots of restaurants.

We had a great stay in the backroom, it got quite warm so we were happy that there was a fan in the room! Great location, short walk into town and lots of bars near by. Great cheese shop next door! Thanks
Me  gustó que nada mas llegar nos entregó la llave y pudimos salir y regresar con total tranquilidad.

Sólo estuvimos 1 noche en casa de Shawna. La verdad que no tuvimos de ninguna de las maneras buena impresión.
Llegamos a las 11 para dejar las maletas y nos abrió un chico bastante dejado, tuvimos que cruzar la casa que estaba muy desordenada, ropa sucia en el suelo, platos por lavar, un desorden bastante considerable, esto ya nos causó una sensación negativa que guardamos hasta la hora de entrada a la habitación.
Antes de entrar en la habitación, cruzamos un patio con las bolsas de basura en el suelo y sin ningún tipo de cuidado. Por fin, llegamos. Tuvimos la sensación de una habitación preparada para gente joven, que sólo viene a dormir y que les da igual como esté. Para cuatro personas es pequeña. Tenía bastante polvo.
En fin, me sabe mal hacer este comentario negativo por qué las personas que nos recibieron fueron cordiales y correctas pero tan sólo dejar las maletas y ver como estaba la casa nos dieron ganas de no volver. pero claro, era el último día en Amsterdam, una familia de 2 adultos y 2 niños, y no queríamos gastarlo buscando otro lugar, y además ya estaba pagado.

Pretty much perfect. We were only there for one night but Shawna and family made us feel completely at ease and at home. Superb location and fantastic accommodation. The self contained back room is a charming and neat little space, more than adequate for us. Thanks
Loved the houseboat. My only complaint is that we didn't have longer to stay and enjoy all that it has to offer!  Helpful hosts - appreciated all they did for us. Would love to come back again!
A wonderful place to stay- modern, clean, inviting.  A bit of a walk from/to public transportation. We used Uber which picked us up from the house in less than 10 minutes.  Would highly recommend.

Meine drei Freundinnen und ich hatten einen wunderschönen Aufenthalt in dieser besonderen Unterkunft. Wir mochten die Dachterrasse sehr. Und haben alle gut geschlafen! Die Anbindung zur Innenstadt war auch sehr gut mit den Straßenbahnen. Leider war es etwas regnerisch, so dass wir uns nicht auf die Fahrräder getraut haben. Und unser Aufenthalt war definitiv ein bisschen zu kurz, um das Hausboot voll auszukosten! Nächstes Mal. :-)

Probably the cleanest place I have EVER stayed in!  Great location and surprisingly peaceful considering its proximity to schiphol airport.  Great clear instructions on check-in and check-out.  Just a shame the terrace is not the one in the picture - its on the roof, via a circular staircase so keep that in mind.  For the rest FAB - wish we could have stayed longer.

Meine Freundin und ich hatten ein tolles Wochenende in Amsterdam. Wie bei vielen Besuchern des Hausbootes, war es auch für uns das "1. Mal". Sehr komfortabele Ausstattung, gute Wegbeschreibung und die Räder waren der volle Gewinn :-) Wirklich sehr zu empfehlen.

Everything was beautiful, the best location , it was very very clean and modern furniture..

The host was so good with us , he send me massge befor check in told me every thing about houseboat..
He send location of houseboat and how arrived to it ..

Actually I tried a lot Extended Stay in houseboat but it was full ..
Thank you for the host ..

Harry war sehr hilfsbereit und hat schnell auf unseren Fragen reagiert.  Das Hausboot war sehr schön und sehr sauber und mit einem hohen Standard eingerichtet. Per öffentlichem Nahverkehr waren alle Ziele in  Amsterdam schnell zu erreichen. Gerne kommen wir einmal wieder. Frank und Familie
Lovely houseboat! Peaceful location and very nice 3 floor apartment (including the roof terrace). Would definitely stay again.

Nova Houseboat is really a nice and quaint little place to stay at a little out of the city area. However, it is pretty convenient with numerous trams and buses that heads directly into Amsterdam centrale. It is also really convenient to get to the airport within 30 mins with a direct bus servic.e The place is well equipped, well maintained, clean and very comfortable. There are bicycles provided and it is such a nice little touch of thoughtfulness. It takes about 10 - 15 mins to walk from the tram/bus stop to the houseboat. The place is overall highly recommended!! Thank you for the great experience Nova houseboat!

We came to Amsterdam to run the Marathon and stayed at Nova Houseboat 3 nights and were really impressed by the flat on the water! Everything was very clean and tidy and the bathroom is spacious and modern. Harry was very helpful when we forgot the key in the door and couldn't enter sunday morning... We woke him up and he came to assist... A shame we didn't stay any longer!

We had a great experience at this residence. The host was very pleasant and willing to help in any way. The home was very clean and inviting. It is a bit away from the city center so allow extra time for walking and public transportation which is conveniently located nearby.

We had a great stay at Nova Houseboat - easy transport into the city and a calm, modern place to return to at the end of a busy day!
Harry was friendly and helpful but all important information is clearly displayed the apartment so we had little cause to disturb him.
Wonderful houseboat! We had a lovely stay here and found the bikes made the city very accessible. The houseboat was very clean and comfortable :)
This was a great place to stay, very charming, clean, and good facilities. It was hard not to stay in the whole in the whole time!
Ottima accoglienza anche se la casa non era ancora pronta al nostro arrivo. Casa pulitissima ottima posizione ci tornerò sicuramente.
We enjoyed our stay very much. A tranquil and peaceful spot that offers a different perspective on the well thumbed book that is Amsterdam
tres bon accueil
The location was amazing and Erik was very friendly. Would stay here again!
Lovely little place on a great street, very good location with many vintage shops, cafes and more. Quiet considering it was on a busy street. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay

Amazing place to stay! Erik was so friendly and greeted us when we arrived and was so attentive to anything we needed! The room was beautiful and so comfortable and the little touches like coffee and snacks were amazing when we needed a nibble! Our stay was A+ and you couldn’t get a better location for the price! Would stay here again!

We loved the location! It is a few blocks down from the train station but quiet enough to get a good night sleep. There is plenty of shops nearby and close enough to get around town by foot. The bed was comfortable and we had a view from our window into the street which was beautiful. He had coffee, and teas along with a mini fridge in the room which we loved. Restroom and shower were clean and he had some fruit in a basket in the hallway. Would stay again.

Erik and Mary Jo made my solo trip to Amsterdam so comfortable and warm! Everything from check-in, the snacks and coffee, to the tips and maps of the city made my stay extra special.  The room is located perfectly in the city as well! Highly recommend a stay here!
Erik and Mary Jo's place is very pleasant and a great location in central Amsterdam!
Very good to stay
A small but well-equipped and nicely located apartment. Erik is a very friendly and accommodating host. Good stay!

Great place in a great location! There were two rooms that share a bathroom (separate toilet and shower), but each of the rooms has its own sink and fridge/table/coffee maker/etc. We stayed in the front room that faced the street - it wasn’t too loud and was super cute.

Erik and Mary Jo greeted us upon arrival and were extremely welcoming. They’re originally from the US so their English is perfect.

Would recommend and also stay here again!
My friend and I had the most perfect stay: Erik and Amy are adorable, the building is perfectly located in the city, the room was clean and well-furnished, we'll come back!

Their place is amazing! Erik was so helpful with directions to get to their place and checked in on us throughout the trip. There is a great view from your bed room. Right on the street of stores and restaurants. Such a fun part of town to be in. Super close to all big attractions in Amsterdam. I would definitely stay here again!

The stay at Erik and Mary Jo's was lovely.  The room in the front, even though it faces the street, was very quiet and very tidy.  It is also centrally located to food and venues.  The hosts were very accommodating and quick to respond to me.  I would definitely stay here again!

Nice little place in a great location within walking distance to Jordaan as well as Centraal Station. Has everything you need plus more, e.g. a microwave and and coffee machine.

Erik was a perfect host and communication was outstandingly quick and easy.
Great people and you can ask them anything.

Eric and Mary are nice and kind.
It’s a good location in town.
Everything is clean and Eric is joignable if you need.
I recommend.
Very warm & welcoming host! Beautiful location. Easy access to the tourist destinations in Amsterdam Central. My room was great for a solo traveler who wants to experience the beautiful city 👍

We had a great stay with Erik and Mary Jo. The apartment was perfect and truly had everything we needed. The location was perfect, we were minutes walk from the center of town. Erik was very helpful with parking/directions and was very welcoming. A true Wisconsinite. Highly recommended!

muy recomendado

buena ubicación y limpieza.

The place was as advertised. It is small, but well located. Perfect for solo travellers or a couple. The street outside is lively throughout the day, so the front room can catch some of the noise outside, but I guess that is part of the charm. Eric was very helpful and accommodating for the check-in. He provided some tips to move around the city and was always responsive through email. You can walk from the Amsterdam Central and walk anywhere from here. Even better, you can bike everywhere in the city from here. If you are looking for a bicycle to rent, go to Frédéric's,  a couple of short blocks towards the Centre.
Cozy little spot, very walkable to stores and cafes as well as centraal station.

Erik was quick to respond to messages and was super helpful with tips on how to find the Airbnb. The space was very comfortable for 2 people. Erik provided us with all that we needed: snacks, water, towels, anything you could think of. I believe the hosts live above the Airbnb, so if we had any questions, it was super easy to contact them. Erik also left us his number. He made sure to check in to see if we had any questions, and it was very nice. The Airbnb is a 10-15 minute walk from the train station. There are many food and souvenir shops around the area so it’s nice to look around and they’re open relatively late as well. It was busy during the day, but if the windows are closed, the noise isn’t disturbing at all. We enjoyed our few nights here, everything was super clean and comfortable, and we would definitely recommend staying here!
Great location about 10 min walk from the centre of Amsterdam, in a lovely part of town. Erik made us feel right at home.
Very nice place. Erik was so nice with us. The room was clean, bathrooms were clean. He make us feel like home. The apartment it’s close to anything. We really enjoyed our short visit in Amsterdam.

Great-Great location. All the best of Amsterdam in 1 street

We couldn't use the table inside because of the futon bed, but luckily the weather was okay so we could sit outside. We enjoyed our stay, but we think that the room is too small for four people and the price is a little to high.

It was perfect for our stay and we would gladly stay there again in the future.

Bushaltestelle war sehr gut innerhalb weniger Minuten erreichbar.

Vielen Dank für die tolle Unterkunft, kommen sehr gerne wieder ;-)

Alles hat wunderbar geklappt und die Unterkunft war so wie beschrieben. Die moderne Einrichtung und Ausstattung hat uns sehr gefallen. Die Lage am Wasser ist toll, wenn auch nicht ganz zentru (Hidden by Airbnb) ah.
Beautiful houseboat, spotless with everything you need, a real Amsterdam experience.  Very peaceful. A little bit further out of the centre than we had hoped but bikes are provided.

Bei der Ankunft war die Mutter des Gastgebers nicht über unseren
Hund (mitgebucht) erfreut. Das Hausboot entsprach in großen Teilen unserer Erwartung. Das zweite Doppelbett war für unsere zwei Erwachsenen Söhne zu klein. Positiv waren die vier Fahrräder. Die Woche verlief sehr schön und hatten keine Kontakte zu den Nachbarn. Der Parkplatz war in der Nähe, den Park in der Beschreibung existierte nicht. Meine Frau hatte Samstags Geburtstag und feierten im kleinen Rahmen. Die Nachbarn fühlten sich gestört und beschwerten sich im nachhinein massiv bei unserem Vermieter. Schade, es beschwerte sich keiner an dem Abend. Das die Hausboote sehr hellhörig sind, war uns so nicht bewußt und ist mit ein zubeziehen, wenn man so etwas vor hat. Der Vermieter hat uns, auf Grund der Beschwerden, eine unverschämte E-Mail geschickt. Die Nachbarn haben anscheinend ein Problem mit dem vermieten des Hausboots und nehmen jeden Grund für eine Beschwerde war.

It's a very cute and comfortable house at a convenience location. We enjoyed it very much. Location is great. Thank you.

Lian

We thought Nova houseboat was an AWESOME accommodation and we loved staying there.  The place is very clean, spacious, well equipped, romantic and charming, quiet,  well priced, the host is very accommodating, and it is well located.  I have absolutely nothing bad to say about the experience.  I will definitely plan to return.

We stayed at houseboat Nova for 9 wonderful days. It was raining most of the time we were there so we weren't brave enough to take the bikes out but we found everything exactly as pictured and described. The space was quiet and beautiful so we had a peaceful retreat to return to after a day of sight seeing and art museums. It is very convenient to tram and bus lines. One highlight was seeing a beautiful swan glide by at dusk. We never actually met our hosts but were pleasantly surprised that his mother stopped by to check on us.
I can't imagine a better place to stay in Amsterdam.

We loved staying at this boat house.  It was spacious, clean and well appointed.   It was such an added bonus that there were also bikes for use.  We felt like we were living a very Dutch experience.  The location is in a really nice, safe and quiet residential area, which had easy access to tram, bus and the train.  It's outside city center, but close to Schipol airport.  We thoroughly enjoyed ourselves.
Beau logement sur l'eau, bien situé sur une ligne de tram donc accès facile vers le centre ville.

We had a wunderfull time on the lovely houseboat. The equipment was excellent and we found everything as described beforehand. Harry was very helpfull with all our questions. Thank you very much! We had a very good time.

We only stayed for 1 night but it was a lovely little house boat not too far from the centre. The bikes provided were very useful and made the trip all the more worthy.
Definitely recommend if you want to do something out of the ordinary!

Wir haben den Gastgeber weder persönlich getroffen noch mit ihm gesprochen. Alles lief über E-Mail bzw. SMS. Hat trotzdem wunderbar funktioniert. Die Beschreibung, wie man ins Haus kommt war klar und leicht verständlich. Einziges Problem: uns war nicht gleich klar, wo wir das Passwort für das WLAN finden. Kleiner Tipp: Nicht wie üblich in einer Mappe sonder gleich wenn man rein kommt an der Wand in einem Bilderrahmen...
Die Lage ist 1A. Zwar liegt das Hausboot relativ nahe an Autobahn und Flughafen, an den entsprechenden Verkehrlärm haben wir uns aber sehr rasch gewöhnt. Ansonsten war es sehr ruhig. Die Nachbarn waren praktisch "unsichtbar". Mit dem Fahrrad ist man bei Wahl der besten Route (durch den Vondelpark!) in 15 min. im Zentrum.
Die Wohnung war sehr chic und blitzsauber! Das Foto täuscht allerdings ein wenig. Es zeigt den hinteren Teil des Hausbootes und nicht 14B. Es gibt also keinen großen Balkon (wie abgebildet) sondern eine ebenfalls sehr schöne Dachterrasse, die allerdings nur über eine sehr steile Stiege zugänglich ist und keine Überdachung bietet.
Die 4 Fahrräder sind ein absoluter Pluspunkt für die bequeme Anbindung an die Stadt. Allerdings wäre eine gründlicher Service der Fahrräder kein entbehrlicher Luxus sondern langsam ziemlich wünschenswert. Die Handtücher hatten einen leichten "Kellergeruch".
Unser Resumee: Die Wohnung ist, trotz einiger kleiner Mängel bzw. einiger Optimierungsmöglichkeiten, absolut empfehlenswert. Wir selber werden wahrscheinlich wieder hier buchen, wenn wir nach Amsterdam kommen. Und wir werden ganz sicher wieder kommen!

Loved the house boat. It was more house than boat as it was big and spacious. Lovely layout and very clean. Enjoyed sitting on the roof terrace to have breakfast in the sun. It was great to explore Amsterdam with the bikes provided. it was interesting to stay out of the centre as we had not done that before, but was easy to get to the centre by team and bike. A great stay, exactly as the pictures and description states. Thank you.

We loved the houseboat and the location, it made our stay more enjoyable staying out of the centre, and riding the bikes around the city was great fun. The boat was clean, comfortable and equipped with everything we needed - we'd definitely book it again!

Ein sehr schönes Hausboot, sauber und gepflegt, komfortable und moderne Einrichtung. Die Anreise war Dank des Schlüsselkastens sehr unkompliziert, die Kommunikation mit dem Besitzer freundlich und schnell.
Wenn wir wieder nach Amsterdam wollen, kommen wir bestimmt wieder :)
This is a beautiful houseboat , everything is exactly as the pictures show.the setting is ideal , not too far from the city center , lovely and peaceful.

Wir haben zu viert 4 schöne Tage im Nova House verbracht. Es ist sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtet. Über die Spülmachine haben wir uns ganz besonders gefreut. :))
Die Dachterrasse haben wir - wenn die sonne raus gekommen ist - sehr genossen.
Die Räder waren ein Segen und eine sehr angenehme Art Amsterdam zu erkunden.
Wir kommen gerne wieder....

Sehr gute Ausstattung, sehr sauber, gute Matratzen. Bei geschlossenen Fenstern, Lärm von Autobahn und Flughafen geringer als gedacht. Zu beachten: Dachterrasse - kein Balkon, wie auf Foto. Für Besucher mit kleinen Kindern: bodentiefe Fenster lassen sich zur Wasserseite groß öffnen. Kein Schutzgitter vorhanden. Gute Lage. Ca. 5 bis 10 Gehminuten zur Straßenbahn. Sehr gut funktionierendes WLAN bzw. Internet.
Really liked the little notebook filled with the host and previous guests' restaurant tips - nice touch.

Harry was very nice. They actually let us in early because it was raining and there was no public restaurants, cafes etc to walk to. He called a cab for us when we left for the airport and then came out to let us know it would be 10 minutes late. All in all it was a lovely apartment, which my daughter and I needed to have down time from a hectic tour.

We really enjoyed our stay  - the houseboat was really comfortable and  very clean and tidy, just as in the pictures. The host is really attentive, and gave us all the information we needed to enjoy our stay. Loved being able to go up on the deck with morning coffee! Great location, especially if you're into sports, and cycling around the city was brilliant - the bikes were great.

The houseboat har a perfect location, nice and quiet neighborhood, and in particular convenient if you are arriving by car.

Further, the houseboat is spacious and well furnished. The bicycles that are available are an absolute must in Amsterdam. The houseboat will suit well for both couples and families.

Bon emplacement dans Amsterdam, Shawna est souriante mais pas très curieuse. Le ménage n'était pas fait lors de notre arrivée, et bien qu'on lui ai laissé le temps pour y remédier, résultat final très insatisfaisant... (Micro onde sale, refrégirateur pas vidé, grandes toiles d'araignées au plafond...)
Photos non représentatives.
Solveig Flora Diane
Excellent, quality location handy to city centre (especially using the bikes provided). A novel experience staying in a houseboat - a special part of living in Amsterdam

Il soggiorno è stato gradevolissimo e rispondente alle aspettative. L'host è sempre stata solerte a rispondere alle richieste e non ci sono stati problemi al cambio di programma quando abbiamo dovuto sostituire due persone al gruppo in partenza. I ragazzi sono partiti da soli e sono stati benissimo. Comoda la posizione per l'esplorazione dei dintorni e del centro.

Nydelig ren og moderne husbåd med alt det nødvendige og lidt til. Bl.a. gratis kaffe og 4 cykler, som dog trænger til et lille serviceeftersyn for at få topkarakter, men dejligt at de er der! Hyggeligt område små 6 km fra centrum. Nemt til offentlig transport fra Olympisk Stadion 5 min fra båden. Kommer gerne igen :-)

We had a super time at the nova houseboat. So clean and such a beautiful place. Ideally situated in that you can cycle to central station in about 20 mins. We cycled a whole circuit of the city taking in the zoo, the planetarium and markets along the way. If you have very little ones and can spare the room for a travel safety gate its a good idea... lots stairs that toddlers would find too tempting.

Houseboat Nova was extremely accommodating for our stay in Amsterdam. We had a wonderful time and the houseboat is absolutely beautiful. We especially enjoyed riding the bikes to the city center, as it's a wonderful ride with a scenic bike path. If we return to Amsterdam we will definitely try to stay at the Nova Houseboat once again :]

All kommunikation med värden snabb och professionell. Jag uppskattade särskilt att de lagt ut en bok med personliga tips kring bl a restauranger i Amsterdam. Boendet är väldigt modernt och fräscht med ett fantastiskt fint allrum/kök och två praktiska sovrum på bottenvåningen som delar en modern toalett/dusch. Det ligger lite avsides i Amsterdam om man vill ta sig in till centrum till fots, men låna deras cyklar och man kan vara där ganska snabbt.

We had an awesome time with our two nights here. We caught the 197 bus from the airport and hopped off at the Olympic stadium... Then approx 1 km walk... Bag drag to the houseboat. The bikes were handy and the accoms perfect.
干净整洁的船屋，楼上楼下两层，楼顶有天台，周围环境比较安静。提供自行车，早上起来骑到超市，然后到森林公园转了一圈，很开心。

Nova Houseboat was a very nice and clean place, and we enjoyed staying here. Before our trip, we had a lot of problems due to an Airbnb mistake and the host was very helpful in trying to help us find a solution for it, which ended up being him giving us his own beautiful apartment for the first night.
The bikes could have been held at a higher maintenance level, but they were a really nice contribution to have. Nova Houseboat is close enough to everything and was in general very nice :)
Super host - clean home and very helpful

Die Beschreibungen sowohl bei der Buchungsbestätigung als auch im Haus selber waren perfekt und der Check-In dank Schlüsselkasten unkompliziert. Harry's Mutter hatte uns eine Telefonnummer für Notfälle hinterlassen, die wir aber nicht brauchten. Die Unterkunft ist mit allem ausgestattet was man so benötigt (inkl. Kaffee :)), sehr sauber und nur ca. 10 Minuten zu Fuß von der nächsten Bus- und Straßenbahnhaltestelle entfernt. Es gibt einen gut sortierten Supermarkt in der Nähe (ca. 10 Minuten mit dem Fahrrad entfernt - ebenfalls in der Beschreibung zu finden),  aber Achtung: Kein Bargeld, nur Kartenzahlung möglich. Wie schon mehrfach beschrieben wird der hintere Teil des Hausbootes vermietet, nicht der hier abgebildete, es gibt aber eine sehr schöne Dachterrasse. Trotz Autobahnnähe fanden wir es angenehm ruhig.  Das 2. Bett ist für 2 Erwachsene recht eng, es gibt aber eine große Schlafcouch (allerdings ohne Bettzeug). Die Fahrräder könnten tatsächlich mal eine Wartung vertragen. Insgesamt sehr zu empfehlen, wir hatten eine tolle Zeit.
Super place in excellent but busy location. Easy and fast communication. Some fruit, coffee and chocolate was available, supermarket 1 min walk.

Erik and Mary Jo’s place is quaint, clean and located close to cute cafes and shops. The apartment is clean with all the amenities that you would need like coffee and small fridge. Bathroom is shared but you have your own sink in the room, which makes getting ready in the morning a breeze. I liked how our room was completely seperate from the rest of the Host’s home, so it didn’t feel like we were disturbing them going in and out of the house.

Great place to stay
Very central location
Great hospitality
Great location. Great communication. Overall great place to stay!

Le aspettative erano alte... l'esperienza deludente.
Quando sono arrivata davanti all'appartamento, all'orario concordato (14:30), non c'era nessuno ad aprire. Ho chiamato Shawna al telefono ma si attaccava la segreteria... finalmente una mezz'oretta dopo è arrivata, senza nemmeno scusarsi, ed avvisandoci che la camera non era pronta, ma che l'avrebbe sistemata per la sera. Così siamo dovute uscire senza nemmeno potere usare il bagno, che era in condizioni pessime. Niente però in confronto alle condizioni della casa della proprietaria, che purtroppo è necessario attraversare per arrivare all'appartamento: ovunque piatti e bicchieri sporchi (gli stessi per due giorni), avanzi di cibo, vestiti, spazzatura. Puzza.
Il minuscolo cortile davanti alla stanza sembra una discarica, con montagne di sacchetti dell'immondizia e centinaia di sigarette nei portacenere. La stanzetta in sé e per sé è anche carina (a parte il bagno microscopico che si allaga quando si fa la doccia), ma all'arrivo ci si spaventa. Lo spazio per mettere le proprie cose è davvero scarso, perché ogni angolo è occupato da vestiti/oggetti dei proprietari. Ho letto che la stanza viene affittata anche per quattro persone: mi sembra una follia, non ci sarebbe letteralmente spazio né per muoversi né per appoggiare i vestiti. Nemmeno si può pensare di usare effettivamente l'angolo cottura.
La stanza può andare bene al massimo per due persone giovani e molto flessibili... quando siamo tornate la sera la camera era stata sistemata ed era abbastanza pulita ed ordinata, ma tenete comunque conto che gli asciugamani a nostra disposizione erano vecchi e bucati, che ci sono sacchetti con cose dei proprietari perfino sotto il letto... Con Shawna non abbiamo avuto alcun tipo di contatto: dopo essersi presentata in ritardo al nostro arrivo, non ci ha dato nessuna informazione aggiuntiva, e praticamente non l'abbiamo più vista.
L'unica cosa positiva è che l'appartamentino è situato in una zona meravigliosa della città, ad un passo dal centro ma fuori dal caos. Consiglierei a chiunque di pernottare in questo quartiere ( ma non in questa casa).

Shawna provided my dad and I a great experience while we were in Amsterdam. We had a pretty early flight and so arrived prior to check-in -- Shawna was very gracious in letting us store our luggage with her.

The room was very nice and exactly as described. It was fairly cold, but there were several heaters and heavy blankets. Sleeping in the bed was very warm and the cold was only a minor inconvenience in the morning after we showered. All in all excellent experience!

Shawna was absolutely wonderful and so was the space! She was totally responsive to communication, and gave me the sense that I was very free to come and go as I please. I did not at all feel like I was staying in a room at someone else's home, it was like I had my own little cottage. The location is fantastic, and there are tons of things in walking distance including the nine streets, a coffee shop, great food, cheese store and supermarket... it was great. The room is light and bright and has so much charm. While staying in the room, I felt the urge to consider extending my trip, it was so welcoming. It is a little colder than a normal home given the insulation etc...

Shawnas Mann hat uns morgens rein gelassen, wir waren etwas zu früh, durften aber gleich rein kommen. Shawna hat uns auch herzlich begrüßt. Wir durften unsere Taschen um 10.00 uhr schon bei Shawna abstellen und ab 16:00 uhr nach dem Stadtbummel konnten wir ins Zimmer und schön entspannen =) Das Bett ist super groß und das Schlafsofa für uns Kinder war auch gut. Es sind Bücher und Reiseführer vorhanden im Zimmer und auch fürs Frühstück ist das nötigste da. Die Dusche ist super schön warm, das hilft bei viel shoppen im Regen ;). Das Glasdach des Zimmer macht tolles Licht.
Die Umgebung direkt ums Apartment ist die schönste, die wir gefunden haben in ganz Amsterdam!
Very, very simple. Very, very charming.

LOVED our visit to Erik and Mary Jo’s place! The room was lovely, had everything we needed (hairdryer, small fridge for our cheese, and an in-room sink for getting ready). Shower and bathrooms were just outside the door, and we never saw the other guests across the hall so felt like our own space too! They had awesome touches- provided fruit and snacks in a basket, along with shampoo/conditioner/sunscreen and tour books. They were lovely people as well, greeted and carried our bags up the slightly steep stairs (just 1 flight though!) and sent us a message to make sure we had towels etc.
The location really is excellent. Safe, quiet, but super close to boat tours and Anne frank house, etc. while still feeling like you’re a local. Maybe a bit farther to red light district or the touristy center, but who wants to stay in the middle with all the tourists??
I would love to stay here everytime I’m in Amsterdam, because it’s really that great!

If you need a place close to the station and the touristy areas, then this place would be a good choice. But if those are not an absolute priority, there are better options for less money. Erik was quick to respond and was helpful in figuring out when the next guests are coming so I could leave my bags there for few hours more.
Lugar cómodo, bien ubicado. Erik muy servicial y atento, siempre pendiente de alguna necesidad que podamos tener, un paso adelante. Altamente recomendable!
Recommended! Convenient, comfortable, perfect location in an authentic old Amsterdam flat. Great local tips and assistance. Super good value.

Great location and very friendly and helpful hosts.
Would wholeheartedly recommend.

Communication was great! Cute little space. No issues with sharing a bathroom and shower. Don't forget to bring slippers. The private sink in ther room helped a lot.   We appreciated the little snacks especially the fruit. We would stay here definitely stay here again!
Perfect apartment for a stay in Amsterdam
Good location and they were very responsive.

The room was very nice and tidy. Erik was easy to communicate with and flexible with the check in when our train got delayed. The location of the room was great, walking distance to the city centre. When we visited Amsterdam the weather was very hot, up to 35 degrees Celsius, and this made the room extremely hot, even at night. There was a fan in the room, but we didn’t find it enough to make the temperature bearable in the room. Maybe this occurs only in case of extreme temperatures outside. Apart from that we enjoyed staying at Erik and Mary Jo’s.

The pictures of the view and the room do not do them justice, the windows are very beautiful. We were very pleasantly surprised and it definitely exceeded expectations. The neighborhood is perfect and quieter, it’s outside the main touristy area with a smaller crowd but still close enough to the center to walk. The neighborhood has great shops and restaurants to choose from! Erik responded promptly every time we sent a message, the room and bathroom was sparkling clean, the check-in process was very easy, and he accommodated to our many train delays! Definitely will try to visit again.

Amazing place!!! The location is nice and quiet at night & there is so much to see around during the day. It’s close to the centraal so if you want to explore more, it’s all walking distance.

Erik & Mary’s hospitality is outstanding and their place was comfortable (the beds were amazing) and clean!

I highly recommend this place!!
Great place for an easy access location to Amsterdam. Quick responses from the host and everything as it should be. Would recommend this place to others.

Erik was a very accommodating host! He was quick to reply and was there to greet us upon arrive; sticking around to make sure the wifi worked. The room was filled with many amenities such as a kettle, cutlery, towels etc. and he provided fruit and snacks, which was very kind (it saved us time in the morning, not having to stop for breakfast). It was located on a bumbling street during the day, but very quiet at night, which led to pleasant sleeps. We did buy a transit pass one for one day of our stay, but found most things walkable. At first, I was nervous about the shared bathroom/toilet with the other room, but it was never an issue. It’s strategic that they are separated into two rooms. Would recommend Erik’s place to others.
Erik is quite helpful and the room have microwave and small refrigerator, the location is very conveniente, just the roof is little gradient.
Every thing perfect!
Chambre très propre et bien située.

Nice location! In a nice part of Amsterdam with local shops and away from the tourist traps. Erik was a great communicator and even let us check out later and leave our bags in the room. Would recommend!

Ci siamo trovati bene nell’alloggio sopratutto per quanto riguarda il rapporto posizione/prezzo. Pulito, ma allo stesso tempo essenziale e compatto; la vista sulla strada è bella anche se di notte un po’ rumorosa; credevamo fosse inclusa la colazione, invece c’erano snack e frutta condivisi tra i coinquilini e in camera il caffè e il the.

Maison et coin très agréable à vivre, le tout accentué par l'accès rapide au centre d'Amsterdam . En voiture, vélo, ou encore en transports en communs pour l'avoir fait.
Le petit plus est la terrasse sur le toit qui est posée et d'où l'on a une belle vue.

Host & family bent over backwards to help us feel wanted. The accommodations were perfect for our needs of the people.  The neighbors were very pleasant.  Our special needs were met and over satisfied. The neighborhood cage,  Jack'swish was great.  Grocery store 3 blocks away.  Prefect!

We had a wonderful stay on Houseboat Nova, what a perfect home away from home!! We really enjoyed getting to know the area and staying out of the main downtown was great, especially since we were traveling with our 2 year old daughter. The houseboat was a welcome retreat from a long day of sightseeing. There are two great parks within walking distance which we visited everyday. The highchair, child's bike seat and bathtub were handy additions, making our visit much easier. The kitchen was well stocked and after exploring the markets and the local grocery store, we made some fantastic meals. There are some steep stairs, which weren't a problem for us, but could be for younger children. Harry and his mother did a nice job of making us feel welcome, answering questions, etc. We stayed a week and wish it had been longer. We look forward to our next visit and will definitely stay on Houseboat Nova again!!
Wir hatten eine großartige Zeit auf Eurem Hausboot. Alles super sauber - Bäder alles neu! Tolle Location für 4 Personen
Great property, lovely location near the Bos with easy transport links to the centre. Great to have free use of bicycles to get around.

Everything was perfect. From the instructions to the layout of the nova boat house to the location, everything was on point. The furniture was clean, neat and tidy. I loved the big fridge and the stove. Having an additional half bathroom is an amazing plus for us because there is four in our group. The rooftop patio was an amazing plus. It lets us look at the moving bridge, the city skyline and the neighbourhood. It is so easy to walk to the number 16 tram that goes pretty much everywhere. We recommend going to de hut for dinner (ribs were fantastic) and to the breakfast cafe by the van Gogh museum. We miss the boathouse a lot. Will definitely come back for a longer stay!!!

Thanks so much to the Nova team! They were able to accommodate our early arrival, and the property is great. Quiet evening drink on the rooftop terrace over the water was perfect. Definitely a location I would recommend.
The stay was great. We used the bikes to get to Centrum, worked perfectly.
